Mark2:1 Matuku mamane kupita, Yezu kupingana ku Kefamawume. Bantu kumvua ne: mmumane kufika ku nzubu." 
Mark2:2 Bantu bavule kudisangisha, kujika too ne ku tshiibi tshia ku mushiku wa mbelu. Ke Yezu kubalongesha." 
Mark2:3 Bantu bakuabu kufika, bamutuadila muena tuneke, muambule kudi bantu banayi ba kudibu." 
Mark2:4 Kadi kabavua bamona mua kufika nende kudi Yezu bua bungi bua bantu. Ke kupapulabu tshitupa tshia musaka wa nzubu tshia kulu kua muaba uvua Yezu muimanyine. Ke kupuekeshilabu muena tuneke mulale pa tshiata mu dikela adi. 
Mark2:5 Yezu mumane kumona ditaba dia bantu abu, kuambilaye muena tuneke ne: — Muananyi, mbakujimijile mibi yebe." 
Mark2:6 Bamue balongeshi ba mikenji bavua basomba muaba awu, kuela meji munda muabu ne:" 
Mark2:7 “Mudi muntu ewu ne dikima dia kusendeka Mvidi Mukulu nunku mmunyi? Udi mua kujimijilangana mibi nnganyi? Amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende? ” 
Mark2:8 Diakamue Yezu kumanya meji avuabu bela munda muabu, kubakonkaye ne: — Nudi nuela meji a nanku bua tshinyi?" 
Mark2:9 Tshidi tshitekete, nkuambila muena tuneke ne: “Mbakujimijile mibi yebe,” nansha nkuamba ne: “Juka, ambule tshiata tshiebe, uye?”" 
Mark2:10 Kadi ndi musue mimanye ne: Muana wa muntu udi ne bumfumu pa buloba bua kujimija mibi ya bantu. Ke kuambilaye muena tuneke ne: 
Mark2:11 — Ndi nkuambila ne: juka, ambule tshiata tshiebe, uye kuebe!" 
Mark2:12 Diakamue patshivua bantu bonsu bamutangila, muntu kujuka, kuambula tshiata tshiende, kuyaye. Bonsu kukema bikole. Bavua batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu, bamba ne: — Katshia katuena banji kumona bualu bua mushindu ewu!" 
Mark2:13 Yezu kumukaye kabidi ku dijiba dia Ngalileya. Bantu bavule kuya kudiye, bua yeye kubalongesha." 
Mark2:14 Pavuaye upita, kumonaye Levi muana wa Alfayi musombe mu nzubu uvuaye ulambuishila bitadi. Yezu kumuamba ne: — Ntua mu nyima! Levi kujuka, kumutua mu nyima." 
Mark2:15 Pashishe Yezu kudia biakudia mu nzubu wa Levi. Balambuishi ba bitadi ba bungi ne bantu benji ba malu mabi bakuabu bavua nende ku mesa ne balongi bende, bualu bantu ba bungi ba mushindu ewu ke bavua bamulonda." 
Mark2:16 Balongeshi ba mikenji bavua batua ku tshia Baparushe, kumona muvua Yezu udia pamue ne bantu bonsu abu. Kukonkabu balongi bende ne: — Bua tshinyi udi udia pamue ne balambuishi ba bitadi ne benji ba malu mabi?" 
Mark2:17 Yezu umvua nanku, kubambilaye ne: — Bantu badi ne bukole bua mubidi kabena bakengela munganga nansha, amu badi basama ke badi bamukengela. Tshiena mulue kubikila bantu bakane. Kadi ndi mulue kubikila benji ba malu mabi." 
Mark2:18 Dituku dikuabu, balongi ba Yowanane-Batiste ne Baparushe bavua bajila biakudia. Bantu kufika kudi Yezu, kumukonka ne: — Mudi balongi ba Yowanane-Batiste ne balongi ba Baparushe bajila biakudia, kadi bebe kabayi bajila, mbua tshinyi?" 
Mark2:19 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nudi nuela meji ne: balunda ba bayende wa mukaji badi mua kujila biakudia patshidi musedianganyi mutshikale nabu anyi? Nansha kakese! Patshidi bayende wa mukaji mutshikale nabu kabena mua kujila biakudia nansha. 
Mark2:20 Kadi tshikondu netshifike, tshiabanyengabu bayende wa mukaji. Padi dituku adi dikumbana nebajile biakudia." 
Mark2:21 Muntu kena wasa tshitetela tshia tshilamba tshipiatshipia ku tshilamba tshikulukulu. Yeye muenze nanku, tshitetela tshia tshilamba tshipiatshipia tshidi tshipanda tshilamba tshikulukulu, disosu nedidiunde kabidi." 
Mark2:22 Muntu kena wela nwinyo mupiamupia mu milondu ya biseba bikulukulu. Yeye muenze nanku, nwinyo mupiamupia neapande milondu, maluvu ne milondu nebijimine tshiapamue. Kadi bidi bimpe kuela nwinyo mupiamupia mu milondu ya biseba bipiabipia!" 
Mark2:23 Dituku dikuabu dia Dikisha, Yezu uvua upitshila mu madimi a ntete ya kuenza bukula. Balongi bende kutuadija kutula miepu ya ntete ivua ku muelelu wa njila." 
Mark2:24 Baparushe kukonka Yezu ne: — Tangila, mudi balongi bebe benza bualu budi mikenji yetu mikandike dituku dia Dikisha mbishi?" 
Mark2:25 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Kanuena banji kubala muvua Davide muenze ne bantu bende, pavua nzala mibasume anyi?" 
Mark2:26 Uvua mubuele mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kudia mampa avuabu balambule Mvidi Mukulu. Abiyatare ke uvua mutuangaji munene tshikondu atshi. Mikenji yetu mmianyishe amu batuangaji nkayabu bua kudia mampa aa. Kadi Davide uvua muangate, muapeshe bantu bende kabidi." 
Mark2:27 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Dituku dia Dikisha, ndienzela muntu. Kadi muntu ki mmuenzela dituku dia Dikisha to." 
Mark2:28 Nenku Muana wa muntu udi mfumu mene wa dituku dia Dikisha. 
Mark3:1 Pashishe Yezu kupingana kabidi mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda. Mu nzubu amu muvua muntu ne tshianza tshifulame. 
Mark3:2 Bantu bonsu bavuamu bavua batentekela Yezu bikole bua kumona ne udi mua kuondapa muntu dituku dia Dikisha, bualu bavua bakeba pa kumufundila." 
Mark3:3 Yezu kuambila muena tshianza tshifulame ne: — Imana papa kumpala kua bantu bonsu. 
Mark3:4 Ke kukonkaye bantu bavua batangila ne: — Mikenji yetu mmianyishe tshinyi? Mbua kuenza malu mimpe dituku dia Dikisha, anyi mbua kuenza malu mabi dituku adi? Mbua kupandisha muntu anyi mbua kumushipa? Kadi bobu kabavua basue kuandamuna." 
Mark3:5 Yezu kubatangila bonsu ne tshiji, uvua kabidi ne kanyinganyinga bua muoyi mubi uvuabu nawu. Ke kuambilaye muntu awu ne: — Olola tshianza thiebe. Muntu kutshiolola, kuakanatshi." 
Mark3:6 Baparushe kupatuka mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda, kudisangisha diakamue ne bantu badi batua ku tshia Erode, bua kukebabu mushindu udibu mua kushipa Yezu." 
Mark3:7 Yezu kumuka ne balongi bende ku dijiba dia Ngalileya. Bantu bavule kumulonda. Bavua batumine mu Ngalileya, mu Yudeya," 
Mark3:8 mu Yerushalayime, mu buloba bua bena Idumeya, mu buloba budi dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene ne mu ditunga didi dituangane ne tshimenga tshia Tire ne tshia Sidone. Bantu bonsu aba bavua balonda Yezu, bualu bavua bumvue bionsu bivuaye wenza." 
Mark3:9 Ke Yezu kuambila balongi bende bua kumulongoluela buatu bukese, bua bantu kabamufimpakaji." 
Mark3:10 Bu muvuaye ujikija masama a bantu ba bungi, bonsu bavua basama bavua bafuilakana bua kumulenga." 
Mark3:11 Pavua mikishi mibi imumona nanku, ivua ipona panshi ku makasa ende, yela mbila ne: “Udi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu!”" 
Mark3:12 Kadi Yezu uvua uyikanyina bikole bua kayimusokolodi kudi bantu. 
Mark3:13 Pashishe Yezu kubanda pa kakuna. Kubikilaye bantu bavuaye musue, bobu kumulonda." 
Mark3:14 Kubasungulaye dikumi ne babidi, kubinyika ne: bapostolu. Uvua mubasungule bua kuikalaye pamue nabu, bua kubatuma benda balongesha bantu," 
Mark3:15 kubapesha bumfumu bua kuipata mikishi mibi. 
Mark3:16 Telejayi mena a bantu dikumi ne babidi bavuaye musungule: Simone (uvua ne dina dikuabu dia Petro )," 
Mark3:17 Yakobe ne muanabu wa balume Yowanane, bonsu babidi bavua bana ba Zebede (Yezu uvua mubinyike ne: Bowanerjese, mmumue ne: “Bantu bafuana makubakuba ”)," 
Mark3:18 Andre, Filipe, Bartolmayi, Matayi, Tomase, Yakobe muana wa Alfayi, Tadeyi, Simone uvua mu tshisumbu tshia baluidi ba ditunga diabu," 
Mark3:19 ne Yudase muena mu Iskariyote, uvua mutangile Yezu tshitangu." 
Mark3:20 Pashishe Yezu kupingana ku nzubu. Bantu bavule kudisanga kabidi, Yezu ne balongi bende kabavua ne diba didibu mua kudia nansha." 
Mark3:21 Baledi bende bumvue nanku, kuyabu bua kumuangata, bualu bavua bamba ne: “Yezu mmumane kujimija lungenyi!”" 
Mark3:22 Balongeshi ba mikenji bavua batumine ku Yerushalayime, bavua bamba ne: — Yezu udi ne Belzebule, diabolu munda muende! Bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — Mfumu wa mikishi mibi ke udi umupesha bukole bua kuipata nabu mikishi mibi eyi!" 
Mark3:23 Ke Yezu kubabikila, kubambilaye malu mu nsumuinu ne: — Mudi diabolu mua kuipata diabolu mbishi?" 
Mark3:24 Padi badi mu bukalenga baluangana nkayabu, bukalenga ebu kabuena mua kutungunuka nansha." 
Mark3:25 Padi bena diku dimue baluishangana nkayabu, diku edi kadiena mua kutungunuka nansha." 
Mark3:26 Padi diabolu uluisha diabolu, ditapuluka dikale mu bukalenga buende, bumfumu buende kabuena mua kutungunuka nansha, kuabu kudi kujika." 
Mark3:27 “Muntu kena mua kubuela mu nzubu wa tshilobu, kunyenga binta biende, padiye kayi muanji kusuika tshilobu awu. Amu yeye mumane kumusuika, udi mua kunyenga binta bionsu bia mu nzubu muende." 
Mark3:28 “Ndi nnujadikila ne: nebajimijile bantu mibi yabu yonsu ne bionsu bidibu bapendangana. 
Mark3:29 Kadi muntu udi upenda Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kabena bamujimijila bubi buende tshiendelele. Bubi buende nebushale kashidi.”" 
Mark3:30 Yezu uvua muambe nanku bualu bavua bamba ne: “Udi ne mukishi mubi munda muende.” 
Mark3:31 Mamu ne bana babu ne Yezu kufikabu. Bavua bimanyine pambelu. Kutumabu muntu bua kumubikila. 
Mark3:32 Bantu ba bungi bavua basombe bele Yezu munkatshi, bobu kumuambila ne: — Teleja, mamuebe ne bana benu badi pambelu, bakukeba." 
Mark3:33 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Mamu wanyi nnganyi? Bana betu mbanganyi? 
Mark3:34 Pashishe kutangilaye bantu bavua basombe, bamuele munkatshi, kuambaye ne: — Tangilayi! Mamu wanyi ne bana betu mbobu aba!" 
Mark3:35 Bualu muntu udi wenza mudi Mvidi Mukulu musue, yeye awu udi muanetu wa balume, ne wa bakaji ne mamu wanyi kabidi." 
Mark4:1 Yezu kubanga kulongesha tshiakabidi ku dijiba dia Ngalileya. Bantu bavule kudisangisha, kumuela munkatshi. Yeye kubuela mu buatu, kusomba. Buatu buvua pa mayi, bantu bonsu bavua ku muelelu wa dijiba." 
Mark4:2 Yezu uvua ubalongeha malu a bungi mu nsumuinu. Mu dilongesha diende uvua ubambila ne: 
Mark4:3 — Telejayi! Kuvua muntu muye bua kumiamina ntete. 
Mark4:4 Pavuaye umiamina ntete mu budimi buende, mikuabu kumata ku muelelu wa njila, nyunyi kufika, kuyidia." 
Mark4:5 Mikuabu kumata pa buloba bua mabue pavua kapayi buloba bua bungi. Ntete kutoloka, diakamue bu muvua buloba kabuyi bondoke." 
Mark4:6 Padi diba dibanda mulu, kuoshadi bisekiseki bivua bitoloke, kumabi bualu kabivua ne miji minene." 
Mark4:7 Ntete mikuabu kumata mu mionji ya meba. Mionji ya meba kulepa, kukulakaja bisekiseki bimpe, mushindu udibi kabiyi mua kukuama." 
Mark4:8 Kadi ntete mikuabu kumata mu buloba buimpe. Bisekiseki kutolokabi, kukola, kuela miepu: mikuabu ivua ne miepu ya ntete makumi asatu, mikuabu makumi asambombu ne minga lukama." 
Mark4:9 Yezu kuamba ne: — Udi ne matshi, asangane kumvua anyie!" 
Mark4:10 Pavua Yezu mumane kushala nkayende, bantu bavua bamuele munkatshi ne balongi bende dikumi ne babidi kumulombabu bua kubumvuija nsumuinu." 
Mark4:11 Ke Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nuenu, Mvidi Mukulu mmunumanyishe malu masokome a Bukalenga buende. Kadi bantu bakuabu badi bumvua malu onsu aa bu badi babambilawu mu nsumuinu," 
Mark4:12 bua ne: “Bajooja bimpe kabayi bamona tshintu, bateleja bilenga, kabayi bajingulula bualu, kadi bafuane mua kupingana kudi Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu kuvua kubafuila luse! ”" 
Mark4:13 Pashishe Yezu kubakonka ne: — Kanuena nujingulula lusumuinu elu anyi? Kadi munudi mua kujingulula nsumuinu mikuabu mbishi? 
Mark4:14 Mumiaminyi udi umiamina muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
Mark4:15 Bantu bakuabu mbafuanangane ne ku mielelu ya njila, muaba uvua muaku mumatshile: diakamue padibu baumvua, diabolu udi ufika, umusha muaku uvuabu bamiamina munda muabu." 
Mark4:16 Bantu bakuabu bidi mumue ne ntete ivua imata mu buloba bua mabue. Padibu bumvua muaku ewu, badi bawitaba ne disanka." 
Mark4:17 Kadi kabena baushindamija munda muabu. Badi baulama amu tshitupa tshipi. Padi ntatu ibakuata, nansha babakengesha bua muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, badi bajimija ditaba diabu lukasa." 
Mark4:18 Bantu bakuabu, mmumue ne ntete idibu bamiamina mu mionji ya meba: bobu badi bumvua muaku," 
Mark4:19 kadi disumpakana dia malu a panu, lukuka lua biuma ne majinga makuabu, bidi bibabuela munda, bikutakaja muaku, badi bapanga mua kukuama bimuma." 
Mark4:20 Kadi bantu bakuabu mbafuanangane ne ntete idibu bamiamina mu buloba buimpe. Ke badi bumvua muaku, bawitaba, bakuama bimuma bamue makumi asatu, bakuabu makumi asambombu banga lukama." 
Mark4:21 Pashishe Yezu kubakonka ne: — Muntu udi wangata muinda bua kuuteka muinshi mua kapanza nansha mua bulalu anyi? Kena uuteka pa tshitekelu tshia muinda anyi? 
Mark4:22 Bualu buonsu bua mu musokoku, nebumanyike patoke. Kabidi tshionsu tshidi tshisokoka netshimanyike, batshipatule patoke." 
Mark4:23 Nenuikale ne ntema, muena matshi a kumvua asangana kumvua anyie!" 
Mark4:24 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Nuadimuka panudi numvua bualu! Mvidi Mukulu neanupime ne tshipimu tshinudi nupima natshi bakuabu, nebanusakidile tshikuabu kabidi." 
Mark4:25 Bualu muntu udi ne tshintu, neapete bipite, kadi udi kayi ne tshintu nebamunyenge ne tshikese tshidiye utekemena ne: ndi natshi." 
Mark4:26 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Telejayi, Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu mbufuanangane ne muntu udi umiamina ntete mu budimi buende." 
Mark4:27 Pashishe udi ulala tulu butuku bujima, kabidi ujuka dituku dionsu, kadi ntete musangu awu idi imena, ikola yeye kayi umanya mudibi bienzeka." 
Mark4:28 Buloba nkayabu ke budi bumenesha lutete: kumpala muonji wa lutete udi wanji kupatuka, pashishe muepu, ku ndekelu ntete imueneka ku muepu." 
Mark4:29 Padi ntete ipia, muntu udi utuadija kunowa ne muele, bualu tshikondu tshia kupola ntshimane kufika." 
Mark4:30 Yezu kuamba ne: — Tudi mua kufuanyikija Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu ne tshinyi? Tudi mua kubuamba bufuanangane ne lusumuinu kaayi? 
Mark4:31 Budi bufuanangane ne lutete lua mutshi wa lusanga, padibu balukuna mu buloba, ludi lupite bukese ku ntete yonsu ya biakudia." 
Mark4:32 Bobu bamane kulukuna, ludi lulepa, lukola lupita mitshi yonsu. Ludi luela matamba manene adi nyunyi ilua kuibakila masua ayi mu dileji diawu." 
Mark4:33 Yezu uvua ulongeshila bantu mu nsumuinu ya bungi ya mushindu ewu. Uvua ubalongesha mushindu udibu mua kumvua. 
Mark4:34 Uvua wakula nabu mu nsumuinu. Kavua uyukila nabu kayi wela nsumuinu. Kadi patataye ushala nkayende ne balongi bende, uvua ubumvuija bionsu." 
Mark4:35 Dilolu dia dituku adi, Yezu kuambila; balongi bende ne: — Tusabukayi dia muamua dia dijiba." 
Mark4:36 Kumukabu pavua bantu. Balongi kubuela mu buatu buvua Yezu mumane kubuela, kuyabu nende. Matu makuabu avua pamue nende." 
Mark4:37 Tshipepele tshikole kutuuta. Mavuala kudiela mu buatu, buatu buvua buenda buwule tente ne mayi." 
Mark4:38 Yezu uvua musombele ku muelelu kua buatu, mulale tulu, muteka mutu pa musamu. Balongi bende kumubisha ku tulu, bamba ne: — Mulongeshi, tudi mua kufua, wewe kuena umona bu bualu anyi?" 
Mark4:39 Yezu utabuluka, kukanyinaye bikole tshipepele, kuambilaye mayi a dijiba ne: — Puwa! Batanta! Tshipepele kutuya, bionsu kubalama menemene." 
Mark4:40 Pashishe Yezu kubakonka ne: — Nudi ne bowa nenku bua tshinyi? Kanuena ne ditaba anyi? 
Mark4:41 Kadi batua ne bowa bukole. Bavua bakonkangana ne: — Muntu udi tshipepele nansha mayi a dijiba bitumikile nenku nnganyi? 
Mark5:1 Pashishe kufikabu dishiya dia dijiba dia Ngalileya, mu buloba bua Ngerasa." 
Mark5:2 Yezu kutuluka mu buatu, diakamue muntu kupatuka mu nkita, bua kusambakena nende. Muntu utua ne mukishi mubi munda, umutatshisha." 
Mark5:3 Uvua usomba mu nkita. Muntu kavua mua kumusuika nansha ne nkanu. 
Mark5:4 Misangu mitule, bavua bamusuika nshinga ya biamu ku makasa, ne nkanu ku bianza, kadi utua utula nkanu ne nshinga ayi, uyikosa kabidi. Muntu nansha umue kavua ne dikanda dia kumutekesha." 
Mark5:5 Diba dionsu, munya ne butuku, uvua wendakanangana mu nkita ne ku mikuna, wela mbila, uditapa mputa ne mabue." 
Mark5:6 Kumuenenaye Yezu ku bule, kuyaye kudiye lubilu, kutuaye binu kumpala kuende," 
Mark5:7 kuela diyi dikole ne: — Yezu Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu wa kulu, butudi nebe mbunganyi? Ndi nkusengelela mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, kunnyoki nansha!" 
Mark5:8 (Uvua muambe nanku bualu Yezu uvua mutumine mikishi mibi diyi bua ipatuke munda mua muntu ewu!) 
Mark5:9 Yezu kukonka muntu ne: — Dina diebe nnganyi? Muntu kuandamuna ne: — Dina dianyi ndi “Misumba,” bualu tudi ba bungi." 
Mark5:10 Kusengelelaye Yezu bikole bua kipatshi mikishi mibi mu ditunga. 
Mark5:11 Muaba awu, uvua tshisumbu tshinene tshia ngulube pa mukuna, tshienda tshidia." 
Mark5:12 Mikishi mibi kusengelela Yezu ne: — Ututume mu tshisumbu tshia ngulube, tubuele munda muayi." 
Mark5:13 Yezu kuanyisha. Mikishi mibi kupatuka munda mua muntu, kubuela munda mua ngulube. Tshisumbu tshijima tshia ngulube bu binunu bibidi kupulumuka pa tshibungubungu, kudiela mu dijiba, kufuilamu." 
Mark5:14 Bantu bavua balama ngulube kunyema, kutangalajabu lumu lua bualu abu mu tshimenga ne mu misoku ya ku mpenga. Ke bantu kufika bua kudimuena muvua bualu buenzeka." 
Mark5:15 Batantshila kudi Yezu, kumonabu muntu uvua ne mikishi mibi ya bungi awu musombe panshi, muvuale bilamba, lungenyi luende lubutame. Buowa kubakuata." 
Mark5:16 Bavua bamona malu aa onsu bavua balondela bantu bivua bienzekele muntu uvua ne mikishi munda ne bivua bienzekele ngulube. 
Mark5:17 Nanku bobu kusengelela Yezu bua kumukaye mu ditunga diabu. 
Mark5:18 Pakavua Yezu ubanda mu buatu, muntu uvua mikishi mibi mishiye awu kusengelela Yezu bua kuikalabu nende." 
Mark5:19 Yezu kubenga. Kadi kumuambilaye ne: — Pingana kuenu kudi bana benu. Ubalondele bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila mukuenzele, mudiye mukufuile luse." 
Mark5:20 Nanku muntu kumuka, kuya mu ditunga dia Bimenga Dikumi, wenda wambila bantu bionsu bivua Yezu mumuenzele. Bonsu bavua bumvua nanku bakatshila." 
Mark5:21 Yezu uvua utumina dia muamua dia dijiba. Bantu bavule bavua badisangishe, bamuele munkatshi, bualu uvua ku muelelu wa mayi." 
Mark5:22 Mfumu wa nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda, diende Yayire, kufika. Kumonaye Yezu, kudiela ku makasa ende," 
Mark5:23 umusengelela bikole ne: — Muananyi wa bakaji udi upunga ne lufu. Anyisha ufike, umutentekele bianza, bua apande, kafu to!" 
Mark5:24 Yezu kuya nende. Bantu bavule bavua bamulonda, bamufimpakaja nseke yonsu." 
Mark5:25 Muaba awu, kuvua mukaji ne disama dia mashi, apatuka amu kupatuka bidimu dikumi ne bibidi bilondangane." 
Mark5:26 Uvua mukenga bikole kudi baminganga bavule, mutule makuta ende onsu. Kadi kavua mumvue bimpe to, disama divua amu dinemenene." 
Mark5:27 Kumvuaye bantu batela Yezu. Ke kubuelaye munkatshi mua bantu mutua Yezu mu nyima, kulengaye tshilamba tshia Yezu." 
Mark5:28 Bualu uvua udiambila ne: “Bu meme mulenge anu bilamba biende, disama didi dijika.”" 
Mark5:29 Diakamue mashi kukama. Kudiumvuaye disama diende dijike. 
Mark5:30 Diakamue Yezu kumvuaye ne: bukole buvua bumupatuke. Ke kutangilaye munkatshi mua bantu, ubakonka ne: — Udi mulenge bilamba bianyi nnganyi?" 
Mark5:31 Balongi bende kumuandamuna ne: — Udi mumone mudi bantu bakufinakaja nseke yonsu, udi ukonka kabidi ne: Udi mundenge nnganyi?" 
Mark5:32 Kadi Yezu kukenzakana bua kumona muntu uvua mumulenge. 
Mark5:33 Mukaji kutshina, bualu uvua mumanye tshivua tshimuenzekele. Kuyaye kudiela panshi ku makasa a Yezu, kumuambila amu muvua bualu." 
Mark5:34 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Muananyi wa bakaji, ditaba diebe diajikiji disama diebe. Waya bimpe. Disama diebe ndijike." 
Mark5:35 Patshivua Yezu wamba nanku, bantu kufikabu ne mukenji batumina kua mfumu Yayire, bamuambila ne: — Muanebe wa bakaji mmumane kufua. Utshidi utatshisha kabidi Mulongeshi bua tshinyi?" 
Mark5:36 Kadi Yezu kavua muteleje bivuabu bamba. Ke kuambilaye Yayire ne: — Kutshinyi nansha, itaba anu kuitaba." 
Mark5:37 Yezu kavua muanyishe bua muntu mukuabu amufile nansha, kadi amu Petro ne Yakobe ne muanabu Yowanane." 
Mark5:38 Kufikabu kua mfumu wa nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda. Yezu kusangana bantu ne tshimvundu tshikole, badila bela mbila mikole." 
Mark5:39 Kubuelaye mu nzubu, ubamba ne: — Nudi nuenza tshimvundu, kabidi nudila bua tshinyi? Muana kena mufue to, udi mulale!" 
Mark5:40 Bantu kumuseka. Ke Yezu kubapatula buonsu. Kuangataye tatuende wa muana ne mamuende ne balongi bende basatu, kubuelabu mu tshibambalu tshivua muana." 
Mark5:41 Kumukuataye ku tshianza, umuambila ne: — Talita kume! (Mmomumue ne: “Nsongakaji, ndi nkuambila ne: juka!”)" 
Mark5:42 Diakamue nsongakaji kujuka, kuenda. (Uvua ne bidimu dikumi ne bibidi). Bantu bamona nanku, kukemabu bikole." 
Mark5:43 Kadi Yezu kubakandika bikole bua kabalondedi muntu bualu. Pashishe kubambilaye ne: — Mupeshayi biakudia. 
Mark6:1 Yezu kumuka muaba awu, kuyaye mu tshimenga tshivuaye mukolele. Balongi bende kumulondabu." 
Mark6:2 Pavua dituku dia Dikisha dikumbane, uvua ulongesha bantu mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda. Bantu ba bungi bavua bamuteleja, bavua bakatshila bikole, bamba ne: — Bionsu ebi mmubimanye bishi? Udi ne meji a mushindu kaayi adiye wenza nawu malu a kukema nenku?" 
Mark6:3 Yeye ewu ki mmuntu udi utenga nzubu anyi? Kena muana wa Mariya anyi? Kena muanabu ne Yakobe anyi? Kena muanabu ne Yoze anyi? Kena muanabu ne Yuda ne Simone anyi? Bana babu ba bakaji kabena munkatshi muetu emu anyi? Ke tshiyuabu babengela kumuitabila. 
Mark6:4 Yezu kubambila ne: — Muambi badi bamunemeka miaba yonsu, kadi badi bamupenda mu ditunga diabu ne kudi baledi bende ne kudi bana babu." 
Mark6:5 Yezu kavua muenze muaba awu bualu bua kukema nansha bumue, kadi uvua mutenteke bamue babedi bianza mujikije masama abu." 
Mark6:6 Uvua ukema bikole muvuabu bapange mua kumuitaba. Pashishe Yezu uvua ulongesha bantu mu misoku yonsu ya ku mpenga. 
Mark6:7 Kubikilaye balongi bende dikumi ne babidi, kubatumaye ku babidi ku babidi. Uvua mubapeshe bumfumu bua kuipata mikishi mibi." 
Mark6:8 Uvua mubelele mukenji ne: — Kanuena mua kuya ne tshintu tshikuabu mu luendu, amu dikombu dia luendu. Kanuena mua kuangata diampa nansha tshibuta, kanuyi nansha ne makuta mu bibombi bienu to." 
Mark6:9 Nuvuale bisabata ku makasa. Kadi kanuikadi ne mitelu ibidi nansha. 
Mark6:10 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Panuafika mu tshimenga, nushale mu nzubu mudibu banubikila amu too ne panudi numuka muaba awu." 
Mark6:11 Padi miaba mikuabu bantu babenga mua kunuakidila nansha kunuteleja, numuke muaba awu, nututule lupuishi lua mu makasa enu, bua lushale kubavuluija tshiyuabu benze." 
Mark6:12 Balongi kuyabu kulongesha bantu: bua balengeje nsombelu yabu. 
Mark6:13 Bavua bipata mikishi mibi ya bungi, balaba babedi ba bungi manyi, bajikija masama." 
Mark6:14 Mukalenga Erode uvua mumvue bantu batumbisha Yezu bikole. Bamue bavua bamba ne: — Yowanane-Batiste mmubiike ku lufu! Ke padiye ne bumfumu bua kuenza malu a kukema. 
Mark6:15 Kadi bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — Udi Eliya. Bakuabu kabidi bavua bamba ne: — Udi umue wa ku bambi ba kale ba Mvidi Mukulu. 
Mark6:16 Erode umvua nanku, kuambaye ne: — Udi Yowanane-Batiste umvua mukoseshe mutu awu, mmubiike ku lufu!" 
Mark6:17 Erode nkayende ke uvua mukuatshishe Yowanane, mumusuikishe nkanu, mumueleshe mu nzubu wa lukanu. Erode uvua muenze nanku bualu uvua musele Erodiyade mukaji wa muanabu Filipe." 
Mark6:18 Yowanane-Batiste uvua uyukidila Erode ne: “Kabiena bikumbana bua wewe kuangata mukaji wa muanenu to! ” 
Mark6:19 Erodiyade uvua mulamine Yowanane lukuna. Uvua ukeba mua kumushipesha, kadi kavua ne tshia kuenza to." 
Mark6:20 Bualu Erode uvua unemeka Yowanane, uvua mumanye ne: mmuntu muimpe, udi kabidi wa tshijila. Uvua umulama biakane. Pavuaye umuteleja, uvua ne dipampakana mu muoyi bikole. Kadi uvua munange mua kumuteleja ne disanka." 
Mark6:21 Kadi ku ndekelu, Erodiyade kututa dikasa dimpe, musangu uvua Erode wenza tshibilu tshia diledibua diende. Erode uvua muenzele bena mu bukalenga buende didia dinene, kabidi ne bamfumu ba basalayi ne bantu baneme ba mu Ngalileya." 
Mark6:22 Muana wa bakaji wa Erodiyade, kubuela mu nzubu, kujaye maja, kusankisha Erode ne benyi bende. Ke mukalenga kuambila nsongakaji awu ne: — Undombe tshionsu tshiudi musue, nenkupetshi." 
Mark6:23 Kuditshipaye ne: — Tshionsu tshiwikala mundombe, nenkupetshi, nansha tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bukalenga buanyi!" 
Mark6:24 Nsongakaji kupatuka, kumanyisha mamuende ne: — Ndi mua kulomba tshinyi? Yeye kumuandamuna ne: — Ulombe mutu wa Yowanane-Batiste." 
Mark6:25 Nsongakaji kupingana kudi mukalenga ne lukasa luonsu, umulomba ne: — Ndi musue amu mpindiewu, umpeshe mutu wa Yowanane-Batiste pa dilonga disalame!" 
Mark6:26 Mukalenga kunyingalala bikole. Kadi bu muvuaye muditshipile ku mesu kua benyi bende, kavua mua kubenga kumupa nansha." 
Mark6:27 Diakamue Erode kutuminaye disalayi divua dimulame diyi bua dilue ne mutu wa Yowanane-Batiste. Disolayi kuya mu nzubu wa lukanu, kukosa mutu wa Yowanane-Batiste." 
Mark6:28 Pashishe kuluaye ne mutu wa Yowanane pa dilongu disalame, kuupeshaye nsongakaji, awu pende kuupesha mamuende." 
Mark6:29 Balongi ba Yowanane bumvua lumu alu, kuyabu kuangata tshitalu tshiende, kutshijikabu." 
Mark6:30 Bapostolu kupingana kuvua Yezu, kumulondela bionsu bivuabu benze kabidi balongeshe." 
Mark6:31 Bantu bavua baya bapingana, bapite bungi, Yezu ne balongi bende kabayi mua kupeta nansha diba dia kudia. Nanku Yezu kubambila ne: — Tuyayi muaba mupengame bua nuenu kuikisha tshitupa." 
Mark6:32 Ke kubuelabu mu buatu bobu nkayabu, kuya muaba mupengame." 
Mark6:33 Kadi bantu bavule kubamonabu baya, kubamanyabu, bena mu bimenga bionsu kunyemabu lubilu, kudianzabu kufika ku makasa muaba awu, kumpala kua Yezu ne balongi bende." 
Mark6:34 Padi Yezu upatuka mu buatu, kumonaye bantu bavule. Kubumvuilaye luse, bualu bavua bu mikoku idi kayiyi ne mulami. Kubangaye kubalongesha malu a bungi mutantshi mule." 
Mark6:35 Diba dikavua dimane kuya. Balongi bende kutantshila kudiye, kumuambila ne: — Diba ndimane kuya. Muaba ewu mmu tshipele." 
Mark6:36 Tuma bantu aba baye ku ntshiamba ne ku misoku idi pabuipi bua kudisumbilabu biakudia. 
Mark6:37 Ke Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nuenu nubapeshe biakudia. Kadi bobu kumukonka ne: — Tuye kubasumbila mampa a mushinga wa nkanu nkama ibidi, bua kubadisha anyi?" 
Mark6:38 Ke Yezu kubakonka ne: — Nudi ne mampa bungi munyi? Ndayi nuanji kutangila. Kuyabu kuebeja, kubambilabu ne: — Tudi ne mampa atanu ne mishipa ibidi." 
Mark6:39 Pashishe Yezu kutumina balongi bende diyi bua kuteka bantu mu bisumbu ne kubasombesha mu mashinde. 
Mark6:40 Kusombabu mu mulongu wa bantu lukama, wa bantu makumi atanu." 
Mark6:41 Pashishe Yezu kuangata mampa atanu ne mishipa ibidi, kutangilaye mulu, kuelaye Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Kutshibulaye mampa, kuapeshaye balongi bua kuabanyinabu bantu. Kubabanyinaye bonsu buabu kabidi mishipa ibidi." 
Mark6:42 Bantu bonsu kudia, kuukuta." 
Mark6:43 Balongi kusangisha bipese bia mampa ne bisunsukila bia mishipa bivua bishale, kuwujabu bisaka dikumi ne bibidi." 
Mark6:44 Balume bavua badie mampa bavua binunu bitanu. 
Mark6:45 Diakamue Yezu kubueja balongi bende mu buatu bua badianjile mu tshimenga tshia Betsayida, dia muamua dia dijiba, patshi-vuaye ntangalaja bantu." 
Mark6:46 Yeye mumane kulayangana nabu, kubandaye ku mukuna bua kutendelela." 
Mark6:47 Dilolu, buatu buvua munkatshi mua dijiba. Yezu kavua ku mayi to." 
Mark6:48 Ke kumonaye ne: balongi bende bavua batata bikole bua kuita buatu, bualu lupepele luvua lubatatshisha, pa diba dia isatu wa butuku. Ke kuyaye kudibu wenda pa mutu pa mayi. Uvua ukeba kubapita." 
Mark6:49 Kadi bamumona, wendela pa mutu pa mayi, bobu kuela meji ne: mmukishi, kukangabu kuela mbila," 
Mark6:50 bualu bonsu bavua bamumone bavua bakuatshike buowa. Kadi diakamue Yezu kubambila ne: — Koleshayi muoyi. Mmeme. Kanutshinyi! 
Mark6:51 Pashishe Yezu kubuela mu buatu buvuabu, lupepele kutuya. Balongi bavua bakema bikole menemene," 
Mark6:52 bualu kabavua bajingulula bualu bua kukema bua mampa buvuaye muenze. Lungenyi luabu kaluvua mua kujingulula bualu abu. 
Mark6:53 Bobu bamane kusabuka dijiba, kufikabu mu buloba bua Ngenesarete. Kusuikilabu buatu buabu ku dilobu muaba awu." 
Mark6:54 Kupatukabu mu buatu, bantu kumanyabu Yezu diakamue." 
Mark6:55 Kuyabu mu ditunga dijima, kumutuadilabu babedi balale pa biata, ba miaba yonsu isuabu bumvua ne Yezu mmufike." 
Mark6:56 Miaba yonsu ivua Yezu uya, mu misoku, mu bimenga nansha ku ntshiamba, bantu bavua baya ne babedi babu mu miaba ya bisalu, bamusengelela bua kulengabu nansha luzemba lua tshinkutu tshiende. Bavua bamulenga bonsu masama abu avua ajika." 
Mark7:1 Baparushe ne balongeshi bakuabu ba mikenji batumine ku Yerushalayime, kudikungujabu muaba uvua Yezu." 
Mark7:2 Kumonabu bamue ba ku balongi bende badia biakudia kabayi bowa bianza, bu muvuabu bafunde mu mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu." 
Mark7:3 Bualu Baparushe ne bena Yuda bonsu bakuabu bavua balama dilongesha divuabu bapete kudi bankambua babu. Kabavua badia kabayi bowa mayi ku bianza biabu ne mankenda nansha. 
Mark7:4 Padibu batumine mu tshisalu, kabena mua kudianza kudia kabayi bowa mayi nansha. Badi balonda bibidilu bikuabu bia bungi bidibu balama: bu mudi kusukula makopu, mabungu, ngesu ya tshiamu tshikunze ne malalu." 
Mark7:5 Baparushe ne balongeshi ba mikenji kukonkabu Yezu ne: — Balongi bebe kabena balonda bibidilu bia bankambua betu bua tshinyi? Badi badia kabayi bowa bianza bimpe bua tshinyi? 
Mark7:6 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nuenu bena mpala ibidi, Yeshaya uvua mudianze kuambilamu bualu buenu, pavuaye mufunde ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: Bantu aba badi bantumbisha amu ku mishiku, kadi muoyi wabu kawena kundi." 
Mark7:7 Bantu aba badi bantendelela tshianana, bualu badi balongesha mikenji miela kudi bantu, mienza bu malongesha a Mvidi Mukulu! ”" 
Mark7:8 Yezu kubambila ne: Nudi nulekela mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, nulonda malongesha a bantu." 
Mark7:9 Pashishe Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Bulelela, nudi nubenga mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu bua kulonda dilongesha dienu nuenu!" 
Mark7:10 Bualu Moshe uvua muambe ne: “Unemeke tatuebe ne mamuebe,” kabidi ne: “Muntu udi utshipa tatuende nansha mamuende, bamushipe. ”" 
Mark7:11 Kadi nuenu, nudi nulongesha bantu ne: Padi muntu wambila tatuende nansha mamuende ne: “Bintu bimvua mua kukuambuluisha nabi, bidi Korbane, ” (mmomumue ne: “Ndi mubilamine bua kulambula Mvidi Mukulu,”)" 
Mark7:12 kena wambuluisha tatuende nansha mamuende muvuaye ne bua kuenza. 
Mark7:13 Nenku nudi nunyanga lumu lua muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu ku dilongesha dinudi nulongesha bantu bakuabu. Nudi nuenza kabidi malu makuabu a bungi a mushindu ewu. 
Mark7:14 Pashishe Yezu kubikila bantu tshiakabidi, kubambilaye ne: — Nuenu bonsu, nunteleje, mimanye bimpe ne:" 
Mark7:15 Kakuena tshintu nansha tshimue tshia pambidi pa muntu tshidi tshibuela munda muende bua kumunyanga. Kadi tshidi tshipatuka mu muoyi wa muntu ke tshidi tshimunyanga. [ 
Mark7:16 Telejayi bimpe, udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyie!]" 
Mark7:17 Yezu mumane kushiyangana ne bantu, kubuelaye mu nzubu, balongi bende kumukonka bua kubajinguluilaye lusumuinu alu." 
Mark7:18 Kubakonkaye ne: — Nuenu kabidi, kanuena bamanye mua kujingulula anyi? Kanuena bajingulula ne: kakuena tshintu nansha tshimue tshia pambidi pa muntu tshidi tshibuela munda muende bua kumunyanga?" 
Mark7:19 Bualu tshintu etshi katshiena tshibuela mu muoyi wende. Kadi tshidi tshibuela mu difu diende, pashishe tshipatuka. (Pavuaye wakula nanku, uvua ubambila ne: biakudia bionsu, bantu badi mua kubidia. )" 
Mark7:20 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Tshidi tshipatuka munda mua muntu ke tshidi tshimunyanga. 
Mark7:21 Bualu munda mua muntu, mu muoyi wende, mudi mupatuka meji mabi, buendenda, buivi, dishipangana," 
Mark7:22 buenji bua malu a bundu, lukuka, tshikisu, budimu, ditupa dia mikenji, lubabu lua bintu bia bende, bipendu, ditambisha ne dipanga dia lungenyi." 
Mark7:23 Malu mabi onsu aa adi apatuka munda mua muntu, amubipisha." 
Mark7:24 Pashishe Yezu kumuka aku, kuya mu ditunga divua pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Tire. Kubuelaye mu nzubu. Kavua musue bua muntu amanye ne: udimu. Kadi kavua mua kushala musokome." 
Mark7:25 Mukaji mukuabu uvua ne muana wa bakaji uvuabu batatshisha kudi mukishi mubi. Mukaji awu kumvuaye lumu lua Yezu. Kuyaye kudiye diakamue, kudiela ku makasa ende." 
Mark7:26 Mukaji awu uvua muenyi, bavua bamulelela mu Fenisiya wa mu Arame. Kusengelelaye Yezu bua kuipataye mukishi mubi munda mua muanende wa bakaji." 
Mark7:27 Kadi, Yezu kumuambila ne: — Lekela, bana banji kudia buukuta. Bualu kabiena bimpe kuangata biakudia bia bana kubielela mbua." 
Mark7:28 Kadi mukaji kumuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, mbua idi idia bisunsukila bidi bana bantatshisha muinshi mua mesa!" 
Mark7:29 Ke Yezu kumuambila ne: — Bu muudi muandamune nanku, udi mua kupingana kuebe. Mukishi mubi mmumane kupatuka munda mua muanebe wa bakaji!" 
Mark7:30 Mukaji kupingana kuende, kusanganaye muanende wa bakaji mudiolola pa bulalu; mukishi mubi mumane kupatuka munda muende." 
Mark7:31 Pashishe Yezu kumuka mu ditunga dia Tire, kupitshila ku Sidone, kupingana ku dijiba dia Ngalileya, mu buloba bua Bimenga Dikumi." 
Mark7:32 Bantu kumutuadila muntu muikale ne mapapa ne tshidimi. Kulombabu Yezu bua kumutenteka tshianza. 
Mark7:33 Yezu kumuka nende munkatshi mua bantu, kuya nende pa nkayende. Kuelaye minu mu matshi a muntu, kutuilaye mate, kumulenga nawu ku ludimi." 
Mark7:34 Pashishe Yezu kutangila mulu, witshija mioyi, wambila muntu ne: — Efata! (mmomumue ne “Jibuka.”)" 
Mark7:35 Diakamue, matshi a muntu kujibuka, ludimi luende kuambuluka, kubangaye kuakula bimpe." 
Mark7:36 Yezu kukandika bantu bonsu bua kabambidi muntu bualu ebu. Kadi pavuaye ubakandika bualu, ke pavuabu benda babuambila bantu kabidi." 
Mark7:37 Bantu bonsu bavua bakema bikole bamba ne: — Malu onsu adiye muenze adi amu mimpe: bena mapapa badi bumvua, tumama kabidi tudi tuakula!" 
Mark8:1 Tshikondu atshi, bantu bavule bavua badisangisha tshiakabidi. Kabavua ne tshiakudia to. Ke Yezu kubikila balongi bende, ubambila ne:" 
Mark8:2 — Ndi mumvue luse bua bantu aba, bualu tudi nabu kukadi matuku asatu, kabatshiena ne tshiakudia to." 
Mark8:3 Meme mubapingaje kuabu kabayi badie, badi mua kuzengela, kudishinda mu njila, bualu ba bungi ba kudibu mbafumine kule." 
Mark8:4 Balongi bende kumukonka ne: — Mpenyi patudi mua kupeta bia kubadisha buonsu buabu mu tshipela emu? 
Mark8:5 Yezu kubakonka ne: — Nudi ne mampa bungi bishi? Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Adi muanda mutekete. 
Mark8:6 Yezu kuambila bantu bua kusombabu panshi. Pashishe kuangataye mampa muanda mutekete, kuelaye Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, kuatshibula, kuapeshaye balongi bende bua kuabanyina bantu. Balongi kuenza nanku." 
Mark8:7 Bavua kabidi ne tushipa tukuabu tukese. Yezu kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila bua tushipa atu, kuambilaye balongi bua kutuabanyinabu bantu kabidi." 
Mark8:8 Bantu bonsu kudia, kuukuta. Balongi kusangisha bitupa bivua bishale, kuwujabu bisaka muanda mutekete." 
Mark8:9 Bantu bavua bu binunu binayi. Pashishe Yezu kubatuma ku mabu. 
Mark8:10 Diakamue, Yezu kubuela mu buatu ne balongi bende, kuya mu buloba bua Dalmanuta." 
Mark8:11 Baparushe kufika, kutuadijabu kuelangana mpata ne Yezu bua kumuteta. Kumulombabu bua aleje tshishima tshidi tshijadika ne: bumfumu buende mbufume kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Mark8:12 Yezu kutua tshikema munda munda, wamba ne: — Bena lelu aba badi balomba tshishima bua tshinyi? Ndi nnujadikila ne: Kabena mua kubapesha tshishima nansha tshimue!" 
Mark8:13 Pashishe, kulayanganaye nabu, kubuelaye mu buatu kuya dia muamua dia dijiba." 
Mark8:14 Balongi bavua bapue muoyi bua kuangata biakudia. Bavua amu ne diampa dimue mu buatu. 
Mark8:15 Yezu kubabela ne: — Nuadimuka bikole, nuepuke buanga budi butuntumuna mampa bua Baparushe ne Erode!" 
Mark8:16 Balongi kuelangana meji ne: — Udi wamba nanku bua patudi katuyi ne mampa. 
Mark8:17 Yezu kumanyaye bivuabu bamba, kubakonkaye ne: — Nudi nuamba ne: bualu katuena ne mampa bua tshinyi? Kanuena banji kujingulula anyi? Lungenyi luenu ndujibale anyi?" 
Mark8:18 Nudi ne mesu, kanuena numona anyi? Nudi ne matshi kanuena numvua anyi? Kanuena bavuluke anyi?" 
Mark8:19 Pamvua mutshibule mampa atanu bua bantu binunu bitanu, nuvua bambule bisaka bungi bishi bia bipese bivua bishale? Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Bisaka dikumi ne bibidi." 
Mark8:20 Yezu kubakonka kabidi ne: — Pamvua mutshibule mampa muanda mutekete bua bantu binunu binayi, nuvua bumbule bisaka biuwule tente bungi bishi? Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Bisaka muanda mutekete." 
Mark8:21 Yezu kubakonka ne: — Kanuena banji kujingulula anyi? 
Mark8:22 Bobu kufika mu Betsayida. Bantu kumutuadila mpofu, basengelela Yezu bua kumulengaye." 
Mark8:23 Ke Yezu kukuata mpofu ku tshianza, kuya nende ku mpenga kua musoku. Pashishe kulabaye muntu awu mate ku mesu, kumutenteka bianza, umukonka ne: — Udi umona tshintu anyi?" 
Mark8:24 Mpofu kutabala, wamba ne: — Ndi mmona bantu, ndi mbamona bu mitshi, kadi badi benda." 
Mark8:25 Yezu kutenteka tshiakabidi bianza pa mesu a muntu. Muntu kutangila, kumona bintu bionsu bimpe, bufofu bujike." 
Mark8:26 Pashishe Yezu kumutuma kuabu, umuambila ne: — Kupinganyi mu musoku to." 
Mark8:27 Yezu ne balongi bende kuyabu mu misoku idi pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Kezareya wa Filipe. Patshivuabu mu njila, kubakonkaye ne: — Bantu badi bangamba ne: ndi nganyi?" 
Mark8:28 Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Bamue badi bamba ne: udi Yowanane-Batiste, bakuabu ne: udi Eliya, banga ne: udi umue wa ku bambi ba kale." 
Mark8:29 Yezu kubakonka ne: — Kadi nuenu, nudi nungamba ne: ndi nganyi? Petro kumuandamuna ne: — Wewe udi Meshiya." 
Mark8:30 Yezu kubakanyina bikole bua kabambidi muntu nansha umue. 
Mark8:31 Pashishe Yezu kubanga dilongesha balongi bende, wamba ne: — Muana wa muntu neakenge bikole. Bakulu, batuangaji banene ne balongeshi bamikenji, nebamubenge. Nebamushipe, kunyima kua matuku asatu neabiike ku lufu." 
Mark8:32 Yezu uvua mubambile miaku eyi patoke. Ke Petro kumukoka ku luseke, kutuadijaye kumutandisha." 
Mark8:33 Kadi Yezu kukudimuka, kutangila kudi balongi bende, ukanyina Petro, umuamba ne: — Umuka kundi, diabolu, bualu kuena wela meji bu mudi Mvidi Mukulu wela. Kadi udi wela meji bu mudi bantu bela." 
Mark8:34 Pashishe Yezu kubikila bantu ne balongi bende, kubambila ne: — Padi muntu musue kulua kundi, kaditu mushinga, ambule mutshi wende mutshiamakane, andonde." 
Mark8:35 Bualu muntu udi musue kusungidila muoyi wende, neaujimije. Kadi udi ujimija muoyi wende bualu buanyi ne bua Lumu lua Disanka, neausungidile." 
Mark8:36 Pikala muntu upeta bintu bionsu bia panu pa buloba, ujimija muoyi wende, bidi mua kumuambuluisha ku tshinyi?" 
Mark8:37 Kudi tshintu tshidi muntu mua kufila bua kupikula natshi muoyi wende anyi? 
Mark8:38 Pikala muntu ufua bundu bualu buanyi ne bua miaku yanyi munkatshi mua bena lelu, badi babenga Mvidi Mukulu, benza malu mabi, nenku Muana wa muntu kabidi neafue bundu bualu buende pafikaye mu butumbi bua Tatuende pamue ne batumibue ba tshijila." 
Mark9:1 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: bamue ba ku bantu badi muaba ewu kabena mua kufua kabayi banji kumona mudi Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu bufike ne bukole. 
Mark9:2 Matuku apita asambombu, Yezu kuangata Petro, Yakobe ne Yowanane, kuyaye nabu nkayabu pa mukuna mutumbuke. Kukudimukaye mpala bobu batangila." 
Mark9:3 Bilamba biende kukenka, kutoka bikole mushindu udi muntu wa pa buloba kayi mua kubitokesha." 
Mark9:4 Pashishe balongi basatu abu kumona Eliya ne Moshe bayukila ne Yezu. 
Mark9:5 Ke Petro kuambila Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi, bidi bimpe tuikale muaba ewu. Tuase nzubu ya ntenta isatu, umue webe, mukuabu wa Moshe ne munga wa Eliya." 
Mark9:6 Kavua ne tshivuaye wamba mene to, bualu balongi bakuabu ne yeye bavua ne bowa buvule." 
Mark9:7 Divuba kubabuikila, diyi kumvuika mu divuba ne: — Ewu ke muananyi undi munange, numuteleje!" 
Mark9:8 Diakamue, balongi kukenzakana, kabavua bamone muntu nansha umue, amu Yezu nkayende ke uvua nabu." 
Mark9:9 Pavuabu bapueka pa mukuna, Yezu kubakandika ne: — Kanuambidi muntu nansha umue, binuvua bamone too ne padi Muana wa muntu ubiika ku lufu." 
Mark9:10 Bobu kulama muvua Yezu mubambile, kadi bavua bakonkangana ne: — Kubiika ku lufu kudi kumvuija tshinyi?" 
Mark9:11 Kukonkabu Yezu ne: — Balongeshi ba mikenji badi bamba ne: Eliya udi ne bua kudianjila kufika bua tshinyi? 
Mark9:12 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Bulelela, Eliya udi ne bua kudianjila kufika bua kulongolola malu onsu. Mudi Mukanda wa tshijila ujadika ne: nebakengeshe Muana wa muntu bikole, kabidi nebamupetule mbishi?" 
Mark9:13 Kadi ndi nnuambila ne: Eliya mmumane kufika, bantu bavua bamupenda muvuabu basue kuenza, amu bu muvuabu bamane kufunda mu Mukanda wa tshijila." 
Mark9:14 Padibu bafika pamue ne balongi bakuabu, kumonabu babela munkatshi kudi bantu bavule, balongeshi ba mikenji bavua belangana nabu mpata." 
Mark9:15 Diakamue bantu abu, bamona Yezu, kukemabu bikole, kuyabu lukasa kudiye bua kumuela muoyi." 
Mark9:16 Yezu kukonka balongi bende ne: — Nudi nuelangana nabu mpata pa tshinyi? 
Mark9:17 Muntu umue wa munkatshi mua bantu abu kuandamuna ne: — Mulongeshi, ndi mukutuadile muananyi wa balume, udi ne mukishi mubi udi umukengesha, umupangisha mua kuakula." 
Mark9:18 Muaba onsu udi mukishi mubi ewu umukuatshila, udi umutuuta panshi, muana upatuka ntutu ku mishiku, usumakaja menu, mubidi utandabala. Meme kulomba balongi bebe bua kuipata mukishi ewu, bobu kupangila." 
Mark9:19 Yezu kubambila ne: — Nuenu bantu kanuena ne ditaba! Ndi ne bua kushala kabidi nenu matuku bungi munyi? Ndi mua kulengulula malu enu too ne ku diba kaayi? Luaku ne muana. 
Mark9:20 Mukishi muana. Mukishi mubi umona amu Yezu, kupalulawu. Muana bikole, muana kupona panshi, kubunguluka, ntutu kupatuka ku mishiku." 
Mark9:21 Yezu kukonka tatuende wa muana ne: — Mbimutuadije diba kaayi? Tatu kuandamuna ne: — Mbituadijile ku buana buende. 
Mark9:22 Misangu mivule mukishi udi umuela mu kapia ne mu mayi bua kumushipa. Kadi utufuile luse, utuambuluishe, bu wewe musue!" 
Mark9:23 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Udi wamba ne: bu wewe musue! Kadi bionsu bidi biteketela muntu udi ne ditaba. 
Mark9:24 Diakamue, tatu wa muana kuela diyi dikole ne: — Ndi muitabe, ungambuluishe bualu meme tshiena ne ditaba dikumbane!" 
Mark9:25 Yezu mumone muvua bantu bavule baya lukasa batangila kudibu, kukanyinaye mukishi mubi bikole, wamba ne: — Wewe mukishi mubi udi upangisha mua kuakula ne mua kumvua, ndi nkutumina diyi ne: patuka munda mua muana ewu, kupinganyimu kabidi nansha!" 
Mark9:26 Mukishi wela mbila, kupalulawu muana bikole, kupatukawu. Muana wa balume awu uvua umueneka bu muntu mufue. Bantu ba bungi bavua muaba awu bavua bamba ne: “Mmumane kufila.”" 
Mark9:27 Kadi Yezu kumukuata ku tshianza, kumujula kulu, yeye kuimanakana." 
Mark9:28 Padi Yezu upingana mu nzubu, balongi bende kumukonkabu pa nkayabu ne: — Tuetu katuvua bapatule mukishi ewu bua tshinyi?" 
Mark9:29 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Mukishi wa mushindu ewu badi mua kuwipata amu ku ditendelela Mvidi Mukulu. 
Mark9:30 Kumukabu aku, kupitshilabu mu Ngalileya. Yezu kavua musue bua bantu bamanye muaba uvuaye." 
Mark9:31 Bualu uvua ulongesha balongi bende. Uvua ubambila ne: — Nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia bantu, bobu nebamushipe. Kunyima kua matuku asatu, neabike ku lufu." 
Mark9:32 Kadi balongi kabavua bajingulule tshivuaye wamba nansha. Bavua batshina mua kumukonka bualu ebu. 
Mark9:33 Ke kufikabu mu Kefamawume. Padi Yezu ubuela mu nzubu, kukonkaye balongi bende ne: — Mu njila nuvua nuelangana mpata pa tshinyi?" 
Mark9:34 Kadi bobu kupuwa. Bualu pasuabu mu njila, bavua belangana mpata munkatshi muabu bua kumanya ne: wa kutudi udi mupite bakuabu nnganyi?" 
Mark9:35 Yezu kusomba. Kubikilaye balongi dikumi ne babidi, ubambila ne: — Padi muntu musue kuikala wa kumpala, udi ne bua kuikala wa ku nshikidilu kua bonsu, kabidi muena mudimu wa bonsu." 
Mark9:36 Pashishe kuangataye muana mukese, kumuimanyika kumpala kuabu. Kumupukilaye, ubambila ne:" 
Mark9:37 — Muntu udi wakidila umue wa ku bana bakese aba mu dina dianyi, udi ungakidila meme. Muntu udi ungakidila, kena ungakidila amu meme, udi wakidila kabidi uvua muntume." 
Mark9:38 Yowanane kuambila Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi, tuvua bamone muntu wipata mikishi mibi mu dina diebe, tuvua basue kumukandika, bualu kena wa mu tshisumbu tshietu nansha." 
Mark9:39 Kadi Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Kanumukandiki nansha, bualu muntu kena mua kuenza tshishima mu dina dianyi, diakamue, kunyima kunyanga lumu luanyi to." 
Mark9:40 Bualu muntu udi kayi utubenga ke wetu. 
Mark9:41 Muntu wanupesha dikopu dia mayi a kunua mu dina dianyi, bualu nudi ba Kristu, ndi nnujadikila ne: neapete difutu diende." 
Mark9:42 — Muntu udi ufikisha ku bubi umue wa ku bana bakese aba, badi bangitaba, mbipite buimpe bamusuike dibue dinene mu nshingu, bamuele mu mayi manene." 
Mark9:43 Padi tshianza tshiebe tshifuana mua kukufila ku bubi, utshikose, bidi bimpe ubuele ne tshianza tshimue mu muoyi mulelela pa mutu pa kushala ne bianza bibidi, kukuimanshabu mu kandondu ka bafue, mudi kapia kadi kakayi mua kujima nansha. [" 
Mark9:44 Mmuaba udi misanda idia mibidi kayiyi ifua, kabidi kapia kakayi mua kujima nansha. ]" 
Mark9:45 Pikala dikasa diebe dikufikisha ku bubi, udikose, bidi bimpe wewe kubuela mu muoyi wa tshiendelele ne dikasa dimue, pa mutu pa kushala ne makasa abidi, kukuimanshabu mu kandondu ka bafue. [" 
Mark9:46 Mmuaba udi misanda idia mibidi kayiyi ifua, kabidi kapia kakayi mua kujima nansha. ]" 
Mark9:47 Pikala disu diebe dikufikisha ku bubi, uditonkone, bidi bimpe wewe kubuela mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu ne disu dimue pa mutu pa kushala ne mesu abidi, kukuimanshabu mu kandondu ka bafue." 
Mark9:48 Mmuaba udi misanda idia mibidi kayiyi ifua, kabidi kapia kakayi mua kujima nansha." 
Mark9:49 Bualu nebele muntu ne muntu luepu lua kapia. 
Mark9:50 Luepu ntshintu tshimpe. Kadi padilu lutshipale, nebalutuishe kabidi bishi? Ikalayi batue bu badi ne luepu munda muenu. Sombayi ne ditalala munkatshi muenu." 
Mark10:1 Yezu kumuka aku, kuyaye mu buloba bua Yudeya, pashishe ne dia muamua dia Yardene. Bantu bavule kudisangisha kuvuaye. Pamue ne balongi bende, kubangaye kulongesha amu bu pa tshibidilu." 
Mark10:2 Baparushe bakuabu kusemenabu kudiye bua kumuteta. Bobu kumukonka ne: — Mikenji yetu mmianyishe bua muntu abenge mukajende anyi? 
Mark10:3 Yezu kubebeja ne: — Moshe uvua munuelele mukenji kaayi. 
Mark10:4 Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Moshe uvua muanyishe bua muntu udi ubenga mukajende, afunde mukanda wa kushipa nawu dibaka." 
Mark10:5 Nanku Yeye kubambila ne: — Moshe uvua munuelele mukenji ewu, bualu muoyi wenu udi mupape." 
Mark10:6 Kadi ku ntuadijilu Mvidi Mukulu mumane kufuka bintu bionsu “Wakabika muntu mulume ne mukaji.” Ke padibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: 
Mark10:7 Bua nanku, mulume neashiye tatuende ne mamuende bua kulamataye mukajende." 
Mark10:8 Bubidi buabu bikale muntu mue. Nanku kabatshiena babidi kabidi nansha, badi tshintu tshimue." 
Mark10:9 Nenku muntu kabuludi tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mumane kusuika. 
Mark10:10 Padibu bapingana ku nzubu, balongi badi bela Yezu nkonku tshiakabidi pa bualu abu." 
Mark10:11 Yeye kubambila ne: — Pikala mulume ubenga mukajende, usela mukuabu, udi wenza buenzayi kudi mukajende wa kumpala." 
Mark10:12 Bidi momumue kabidi, pikala mukaji umuka kudi bayende, uya ku dibaka kudi mulume mukuabu, udi wenza buenzayi." 
Mark10:13 Bantu bavua baya ne bana kudi Yezu bua kubatentekela bianza, kadi balongi bavua babatandisha." 
Mark10:14 Padi Yezu umona nanku, kusodiaye, kuambila balongi bende ne: — Lekelayi kukandika bana! Balekelayi balue kundi, bualu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu mbua badi bu bana." 
Mark10:15 Ndi nnujadikila ne: udi kayi wanyisha Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu bu mudi muana, kena mua kubuelamu nansha." 
Mark10:16 Pashishe kuambulaye bana mu maboku ende, ubatentekajila bianza, ubela lupemba!" 
Mark10:17 Pakavua Yezu ubanga luendu, muntu kulua lubilu kudiye, kutua binu kumpala kuende, umukonka ne: — Mulongeshi muimpe, bua meme kupeta muoyi wa kashidi, nengenze tshinyi?" 
Mark10:18 Yezu kumukonka ne: — Udi umbikila muimpe bua tshinyi? Kakuena muntu udi muimpe, amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende." 
Mark10:19 Udi mumanye mikenji ya ne: “Kushipi muntu; kuendi buendenda; kuibi; kuena mua kushiminyina muntu bualu; kuangatshi bintu bia bantu bakuabu ku dishima; unemeke tatuebe ne mamuebe. ” 
Mark10:20 Muntu kuandamuna ne: — Mulongeshi, ndi mutumikile mikenji yonsu eyi, biangatshile ku buana buanyi." 
Mark10:21 Yezu kumutangila, kumunanga, umuambila ne: — Bualu bumue butshidi bukushale. Uye, upane bionsu biudi nabi, upeshe bapele makuta, nanku neupete bubanji mu diulu. Pashishe Ulue, undonde meme." 
Mark10:22 Pumvu muntu nanku, kubungamaye, kumuka mufike munda, bualu uvua ne biuma bia bungi." 
Mark10:23 Yezu ukenzakana, kuambilaye balongi bende ne: — Bidi bikole bua bantu babanji kubuela mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Mark10:24 Balongi kukema bikole pumvubu nanku. Kadi Yezu kubambila tshiakabidi ne: — Bana banyi, bidi bikole bua kubuela mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Mark10:25 Mbikole bua nyama wa kamelu kupitshila mu disu dia kashingi, kadi bidi bipite bukole kabidi bua muntu mubanji kubuelaye mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Mark10:26 Balongi bavua bakema amu kukema, bakonkangana ne: — Kadi, nanku udi mua kupanda nnganyi?" 
Mark10:27 Yezu kubatangila, kubambila ne: — Bantu kabena mua kubuenza nansha, kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi wenza. Bualu ku bionsu kakuena tshidi mua kukolela Mvidi Mukulu nansha." 
Mark10:28 Ke Petro kumuambila ne: — Teleja, tudi bamane kushiya bionsu bakulonda." 
Mark10:29 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi nkujadikila ne: muntu yeye mushiye nzubu wende, nansha bana babu ba balume, bana babu ba bakaji, mamuende, tatuende, bana bende, madimi ende, mu dina dianyi ne bua Lumu lua Disanka," 
Mark10:30 neapete misangu lukama mu matuku atudi aa, nzubu, bana babu ba balume, bana babu ba bakaji, bamamuende, bana ne madimi, kabidi ne makenga; pashishe mu matuku adi alonda neapete muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
Mark10:31 Kadi ba bungi badi kumpala mpindiewu nebikale ba nshikidilu. Badi ku nshikidilu mpindiewu nebikale ba kumpala. 
Mark10:32 Bavua mu njila batangila ku Yerushalayime. Yezu uvua kumpala kua balongi bende. Bobu bavua ne bowa, kabidi bantu bavua babalonda bavua ne luzakalu. Yezu kuangata balongi dikumi ne babidi tshiakabidi, kubangaye kubambila malu avua pabuipi ne bua kumuenzekela." 
Mark10:33 Uvua ubambila ne: — Telejayi, tukadi tuya ku Yerushalayime. Muaba awu, nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia batuangaji banene ne balongeshi ba mikenji. Nebamufundile tshibawu tshia lufu, nebamufile mu bianza bia benyi." 
Mark10:34 Bobu abu nebamuseke, nebamutuile mate pambidi, nebamutuute mikaba, nebamushipe. Kunyima kua matuku asatu, neabiike ku lufu." 
Mark10:35 Pashishe bana ba Zebede, Yakobe ne Yowanane, kusemena kudi Yezu, kumuambila ne: — Mulongeshi, tudi tujinga utuenzele tshitudi basue kukulomba." 
Mark10:36 Yezu kubakonka ne: — Nudi basue nnuenzele tshinyi? 
Mark10:37 Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Pawikala mu Bukalenga buebe bua butumbi, wanyishe bua tuetu kusomba nebe, umue ku dia balume diebe, mukuabu ku dia bakaji diebe." 
Mark10:38 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Kanuena bamanye tshinudi nulomba to. Nuenu nudi mua kunua dikopu dindi ne bua kunua meme, nansha badi mua kunutua mu mayi bu mudibu mua kuntua anyi?" 
Mark10:39 Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Tudi mua kuenza. Yezu kubambila ne: — Mmomu. Bua dikopu dindi ne bua kunua nudi mua kunuinamu, kabidi badi mua kunutua mu mayi bu mudibu bantua." 
Mark10:40 Kadi meme ki nngudi ujadika muntu udi mua kusomba ku dia balume dianyi, nansha ku dia bakaji dianyi nansha. Miaba eyi idi bua badi Mvidi Mukulu muyilongoluele." 
Mark10:41 Padi balongi bakuabu dikumi bumvua nanku, kufikilabu Yakobe ne Yowanane munda." 
Mark10:42 Ke Yezu kubabikila buonsu kubambila ne: — Nudi bamanye bantu badibu bamba ne: mbamfumu ba matunga: badi batumina bantu babu diyi, kabidi baneme badi baleja bantu mudibu ne bumfumu." 
Mark10:43 Kadi kabienzeki nanku munkatshi muenu nansha. Padi umue wa kunudi nuenu musue kuikala munene, ikale muena mudimu wenu." 
Mark10:44 Pikala muntu wa kunudi musue kuikala wa kumpala, ikale mupika wa bonsu." 
Mark10:45 Bualu Muana wa muntu kena mulue bua bamukuatshile mudimu, kadi mmulue bua kukuatshila bantu mudimu ne kufila muoyi wende bu tshieya bua kupikula bantu ba bungi." 
Mark10:46 Kufikabu ku Yeriko. Pavua Yezu upatuka mu tshimenga etshi ne balongi bende pamue ne bantu basule, mpofu mukuabu diende Bartimeye, muana wa Timeye, uvua musombe ku njila, ulomba tshia pa luse." 
Mark10:47 Padiye umvua ne: assu udi usua Yezu wa mu Nazarete, kubangaye kuela mbila ne: — Yezu, Muana wa Davide, umfuile luse!" 
Mark10:48 Bantu ba bungi kumutandisha, bamuamba bua apuwe. Kadi kukoleshaye amu diyi ne: — Muana wa Davide, umfuile luse!" 
Mark10:49 Yezu kuimana, kuamba ne: — Mubikilayi. Bobu kubikila mpofu bamuambila ne: — Kolesha muoyi, juka, Yezu udi ukubikila." 
Mark10:50 Mpofu kuimansha tshilamba tshiende tshivuaye natshi pambidi, kutupika uya kudi Yezu." 
Mark10:51 Yezu kumukonka ne: — Udi musue nkuenzele tshinyi? Mpofu kumuandamuna ne: — Mulongeshi, ngambuluishe bua ntabale tshiakabidi." 
Mark10:52 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Ndaku, ditaba diebe diakondapi. Diakamue, kutabalaye, kutuaye Yezu munyima." 
Mark11:1 Pasuabu bamane kusemena pamue ne Yerushalayime, pabuipi ne musoku wa Betfaje ne wa Betanya, kufikabu ku mukuna wa Olive. Yezu kudianjila kutuma balongi babidi," 
Mark11:2 ubambila ne: — Ndayi mu musoku udi kumpala wawa. Panudi nufika anu momu, nenusangane muana wa nyama wa mpunde musuike, udi muntu nansha umue kayi muanji kubanda. Numusulule, nulue nende muaba essu." 
Mark11:3 Muntu yeye munukonke ne: “Nudi nuenza nanku bua tshinyi?” Numuambile ne: “Mfumu udi nende dijinga, neamupingaje mpindiessu. ”" 
Mark11:4 Kuyabu kusangana muana wa mpunde, musuike pambelu pabuipi ne tshiibi, mu musesu. Bobu kumusulula." 
Mark11:5 Bamue bantu bavua muaba assu kubakonka ne: — Nudi nuenza tshinyi? Nudi nusulula muana wa nyama wa mpunde ewu bua tshinyi? 
Mark11:6 Balongi kuandamuna amu umvua Yezu mubambile, nanku bantu abu kubalekela bobu kuya." 
Mark11:7 Kuyabu ne muana, wa nyama wa mpunde kudi Yezu, kuteka bilamba biabu pa nyama, Yezu kusombapu." 
Mark11:8 Bantu ba bungi kuadija bilamba mu njila, bakuabu kumuteka bisala bibishi bisuabu bakose mu madimi." 
Mark11:9 Bavua bapita kumpala kua Yezu ne bavua bamulonda, bavua bela mbila ne: — Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu! Mvidi Mukulu alabe muntu udi uvua mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, lupemba!" 
Mark11:10 Mvidi Mukulu ele bukalenga budi buvua lupemba, bukalenga bua nkambua wetu Davide! Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu mu diulu!" 
Mark11:11 Yezu kubuela mu Yerushalayime, kuyaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Yeye mumane kutangila bionsu, kuyaye ku Betanya ne balongi bende dikumi ne babidi, bualu diba dikavua dimane kuya." 
Mark11:12 Butshia, bobu bamane kumuka mu Betanya, Yezu kumvua nzala." 
Mark11:13 Kumonaye mutshi wa mfiku pa bule musampile. Kuyaye kutangila bua kumona ne udiku mua kuikala mukuama bimuma. Kadi ufika pabuipi ne mutshi, kusanganaye amu mabeji, bualu katshivua tshikondu tshia mutshi wa mfiku kukuama nansha." 
Mark11:14 Yezu kutshipa mutshi awu ne: — Kashidi muntu nansha umue kena mua kudia bimuma biebe! Balongi bende bavua bamuteleja. 
Mark11:15 Pashishe kufikabu mu Yerushalayime. Yezu kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kubangaye kuipatamu bavua basumbisha ne bavua basumba bintu muaba awu. Kutonkolaye mesa a bashintudi ba makuta ne nkuasa ya basumbishi ba nkudimba. 
Mark11:16 Kavua muanyishe bua muntu kuambulaye tshintu upitshila mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
Mark11:17 Pashishe kubalongeshaye wamba ne: — Mu Mukanda wa tshijila mbafunde ne: “Nebabikile nzubu wanyi ne: nzubu udi bantu ba bisamba bionsu mua kutendelela.” Kadi nuenu nudi bamuenze muaba udi bivi mua kusokomena! 
Mark11:18 Batuangaji banene ne balongeshi ba mikenji bumvua bualu abu, kukebabu mushindu wa kushipesha Yezu. Kadi bavua bamutshina, bualu bantu bavule bavua bakema bikole bua dilongesha diende." 
Mark11:19 Ku dilolu, Yezu ne balongi bende kupatukabu mu tshimenga." 
Mark11:20 Butshia dinda, pavuabu bapita mu njila, kumonabu mutshi wa mfiku mumane kuuma onsu ne ku miji." 
Mark11:21 Petro kuvuluka bivua bienzeka, kuambilaye Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi, tangila mutshi wa mfiku uuvua mutshipe, mmumane kuuma onsu." 
Mark11:22 Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: Nuenu, itabayi Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Mark11:23 Muntu muambile mukuna ewu ne: “Umuka udiele mu mayi manene.” Padiye kayi ne mpata mu muoyi wende, kadi muitabe ne: tshidiye wamba netshienzeke, tshiotshi netshienzeke." 
Mark11:24 Ke pandi nnuambila ne: Panudi nutendelela bua kulomba tshintu, nuitabe ne: nudi bamane kutshipeta kundi, nebanupeshetshi." 
Mark11:25 Ne panudi bimane kulu bua kutendelela, panudi bajilangana ne muntu kampanda, numutuile luse, bua Tatu wenu udi mu diulu anulekele mibi yenu kabidi. [" 
Mark11:26 Kadi panudi kanuyi nulekela bakuabu mibi yabu, Tatu wenu udi mu diulu kena mua kunutekela yenu mibi kabidi. ]" 
Mark11:27 Kupinganabu kabidi mu Yerushalayime. Pavua Yezu wendakana mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bamfumu ba batuangaji, balongeshi ba mikenji ne bakulu kuyabu kudiye," 
Mark11:28 bamukonka ne: — Udi wenza malu aa ne bukenji kaayi? Udi mukuambile bua kuenza nnganyi? 
Mark11:29 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Meme kabidi nennuele amu dikonka dimue, nuenu bangandamune, nennuambile bukenji bundi ngenza nabu malu aa." 
Mark11:30 Uvua mutume Yowanane bua kutua bantu mu mayi nnganyi? Udi mua kuikala Mvidi Mukulu, anyi mbantu? Ngandamunayi." 
Mark11:31 Bobu kubangabu kuelangana mpata munkatshi muabu, bambilangana ne: — Tuetu bandamuna ne: “Mvidi Mukulu, ke uvua mumutume,” neatukonke ne: “Kanuvua bitabe Yowanane bua tshinyi?”" 
Mark11:32 Kadi tuetu bamba ne: “Bantu mbavua bamutume…” (Bavua batshina bantu, bualu buonsu bavua bela meji ne: Yowanane uvua muambi mulelela.)" 
Mark11:33 Ke kuandamunabu Yezu ne: — Katuena bamanye to. Ke Yezu kabidi kubambila ne: — Meme kabidi tshiena nnuambila bukenji bundi ngenza nabu malu aa nansha. 
Mark12:1 Yezu kubanga kubambila malu mu nsumuinu ne: — Kusua muntu mukune mionji ya nwinyo mu budimi. Kubuelaye mu lupangu, kumbulaye tshiina tshia tshikaminu tshia tumuma, kuibakaye kazubu ka batentekedi. ” Pashishe kushilaye bafutshidi budimi abu, kuyaye ku luendu." 
Mark12:2 Padi tshikondu tshia kupola tumuma tshikumbana, kutumaye muena mudimu wende kudi bafutshidi ba budimi abu, bua kupeta tuende tumuma tua nwinyo kudi bafutshidi." 
Mark12:3 Bafutshidi kukuata muena mudimu, kumutuuta, kumuipata bianza bitupu." 
Mark12:4 Muena budimi kutuma muena mudimu mukuabu. Bobu kumutuuta bintu ku mutu, bamupenda." 
Mark12:5 Muena budimi kutuma muena mudimu mukuabu kabidi, bafutshidi kumushipa. Kuenzelabu bena mudimu bakuabu ba bungi mushindu awu: kutuutabu bamue, kushipa bakuabu." 
Mark12:6 Muena budimi uvua mushale amu ne muntu umue, ke muanende wa balume uvuaye munange bikole. Kumutumaye kudi bafutshidi ku ndekelu, wela meji ne: “Nebanemeke muananyi.”" 
Mark12:7 Kadi bafutshidi kuambilangana ne: “Ke washala ne bumfumu bua budimi pashishe wawa. Tuyayi banushipe, budimi bushale buetu!”" 
Mark12:8 Kukuatabu muana, kumushipa, kuimanshabu tshitalu tshiende ku mpenga kua budimi." 
Mark12:9 Yezu kubakonka ne: Nenku muena budimi bua nwinyo udi mua kuenza tshinyi? Muena budimi bua nwinyo nealue, neashipe bafutshidi ba budimi bua nwinyo, neafile budimi kudi bantu bakuabu." 
Mark12:10 Kanuena banji kubala bulelela, mudi Mukanda wa tshijila, wamba ne: “Ke dibue divua bibaki bimanshe, dikadi dibue didi dishindika nzubu." 
Mark12:11 Maweja-Nangila ke udi muenze nanku, bidi bikemesha patudi bitangila! ”" 
Mark12:12 Bamfumu ba bena Yuda bavua bakeba mushindu udibu mua kukuata Yezu. Bualu bavua bamanye muvuaye wela lusumuinu elu bualu buabu. Kadi bavua batshina bantu, nenku bobu kumulekela kuyabu." 
Mark12:13 Kutuminabu Yezu bamue Baparushe ne bamue bantu ba mu tshisumbu tshia bena Erode bua kumuteta. 
Mark12:14 Kufikabu, bamuambila ne: — Mulongeshi, tudi bamanye ne: udi wamba bulelela. Kuena utshina bidi bantu bela meji. Bualu kuena utangila bua mpala wa muntu, kadi udi ulongesha bulelela mudi Mvidi Mukulu musue bua muntu enza. Tuambilaku: mikenji yetu mmianyishe bua kufuta mukalenga wa bakalenga wa bena Rome tshitadi anyi? Tudi mua kumufuta anyi katuena mua kumufuta?" 
Mark12:15 Kadi Yezu uvua mumanye ne: mbasokoke meji abu malelela. Kubandamunaye ne: — Nudi nunteta bua tshinyi? Ndejayi lukanu lunudi nalu, ndumone." 
Mark12:16 Kumutuadilabu lukanu lumue. Yeye kubakonka ne: — Mpala ne dina bidibu bazolapu mbia nganyi? Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Mbia mukalenga wa bakalenga. 
Mark12:17 Yezu kubambila ne: — Futayi mukalenga wa bakalenga bintu bidi biende. Kadi lambulayi Mvidi Mukulu kabidi bidi biende. Kukemabu bikole bua diandamuna diende. 
Mark12:18 Basaduke bakuabu kuya kudi Yezu. (Bobu ke badi balongesha bantu ne: bafue kabena mua kubiika ku lufu ). Kumukonkabu ne: 
Mark12:19 — Mulongeshi, Moshe uvua mutuelele mukenji ne: “Pikala muntu ne muanabu wa balume mufue, mushiye mukaji kayi mulele nende bana, bidi bimpe muanabu wa balume awu apiane mukamba awu, alelele muanabu mufue awu bana. ”" 
Mark12:20 Kuvua bana ba balume muanda mutekete. Wa kumpala kusela mukaji, kufuaye kayi mushiye bana." 
Mark12:21 Muibidi kuangata mukamba uvua mushale awu, kufuaye kabidi kayi mulele bana. Muisatu kubalonda kabidi amu nanku." 
Mark12:22 Buonsu muanda mutekete bavua bangate mukaji, balondangana kutuabu kabayi bashiye bana. Ku ndekelu kua bonsu, mukaji kubalonda kabidi." 
Mark12:23 Dituku diabiika bantu ku bafue, udi mua kuikala muena mukaji awu munkatshi muabu amu nnganyi? Bualu buonsu muanda mutekete bavua bamuangate!" 
Mark12:24 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Ke panudi nutupakana, bualu kanuena bajingulule, nansha Mukanda wa tshijila, nansha bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Mark12:25 Pashishe pabiika bantu ku lufu, bantu balume ne bantu bakaji kabena mua kuselangana nansha, kadi nebikale bu mudi batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu mu diulu." 
Mark12:26 Kadi bua bantu bafue, ne bua dibiika diabu ku lufu. Kanuena babale mu mukanda wa Moshe bivua Mvidi Mukulu muambe mu tshipuka tshitema kapia anyi? Mbafundemu ne: Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambile Moshe ne: “Ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa Abrahame, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izake, ne Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe. ”" 
Mark12:27 Yezu kuamba kabidi ne: — Mvidi Mukulu udi Mvidi Mukulu wa bantu badi ne muoyi, kena wa bafue nansha. Nudi batupakane bikole." 
Mark12:28 Mukuabu mulongeshi wa mikenji uvua mumvue muvuabu belangana mpata. Kumonaye ne Yezu uvua muandamune Basaduke bimpe. Kusemenaye kudiye, umukonka ne: Ku mikenji yonsu, mmukenji kaayi udi mupite mikuabu?" 
Mark12:29 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Mukenji udi mupite mikuabu udi ne: “Izrayele, teleja! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu udi Maweja-Nangila nkayende." 
Mark12:30 Unange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe ne muoyi webe onsu, ne lungenyi luebe luonsu, ne meji ebe onsu, ne bukole buebe buonsu. ”" 
Mark12:31 Mukenji muibidi udi ne: “Unange muntu nebe bu muudi mudinange wewe mene. ” Kakuena mukenji mukuabu udi mupite mikenji ibidi eyi nansha. 
Mark12:32 Mulongeshi wa mikenji kuambila Yezu ne: — Mbimpe bitambe, Mulongeshi! Biudi muambe mbia bulelela. Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu nkayende. Kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu amu yeye." 
Mark12:33 Nenku, muntu udi ne bua kunanga Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi wende onsu, ne lungenyi luende luonsu ne bukole buende buonsu. Udi ne bua kunanga kabidi muntu nende bu mudiye mudinange yeye mene. Kuenza nanku nkupita kuoshila Mvidi Mukulu nyama pa tshilambuilu ne kumulambula milambu ya mishindu yonsu." 
Mark12:34 Yezu umona ne mmuandamune ne lungenyi, kumuambilaye ne: — Wewe udi pabuipi ne bukalenga bua mu diulu. Abi bimane kuenzeka, muntu nansha umue kavua ne dikima dia kumuela lukonku kabidi nansha." 
Mark12:35 Pavua Yezu ulongesha mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kukonkaye ne: — Mudi balongeshi ba mikenji mua kuamba ne Meshiya udi wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide mbishi?" 
Mark12:36 Bualu Davide nkayende mulombolakudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila, uvua wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu uvua wamba Mfumu wanyi ne: Luaku usombe ku diboku dianyi dia balume, too ne pandi nteka baluishi bebe muinshi mua makasa ebe. ”" 
Mark12:37 Davide mene udi umubikila “Maweja-Nangila.” Mudi Meshiya mua kuikala kabidi wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide mbishi? Bantu ba bungi bavua bateleja Yezu ne disanka. 
Mark12:38 Uvua wambila bantu bavuaye ulongesha ne: — Nudimukile balongeshi ba mikenji. Badi banange mua kuendakana bavuale mintumpu mile, banange bua bahele mioyi ya kanemu miaba idi bantu basangile." 
Mark12:39 Badi basungula nkuasa ya lumu mu nzubu ya kutendelela ya bena Yuda ne mu miaba ya kudia ya bibilu. 
Mark12:40 Badi banyenga bakaji bakamba bionsu bidibu nabi, kabidi badi batendelela mutantshi mule bua kumuenekabu bantu bakane. Kadi nebabanyoke bikole bipite." 
Mark12:41 Yezu uvua musombe buludiludi ne mushete wa milambu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kumonaye muvua bantu bavule belamu makuta. Bantu babanji ba bungi bavua bela makuta a bungi." 
Mark12:42 Mukaji mukamba mupele kufika. Kuelaye makuta a tshiamu tshikunze abidi, mikale ne mushinga wa nseki." 
Mark12:43 Ke Yezu kubikila balongi bende, ubambila ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: mukaji mukamba mupele ewu mmuele mu mushete mulambu mupite wa bantu bakuabu bonsu." 
Mark12:44 Bualu bantu bakuabu bonsu mbele makuta mavule avuabu nawu. Kadi yeye ewu ne bupele buende, mmulambule kende konsu kavuaye naku." 
Mark13:1 Pavua Yezu upatuka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, umue wa ku balongi bende kumuambila ne: — Mulongeshi, utangile mudi mabue aa mimpe, ne bunene budi nzubu ewu." 
Mark13:2 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Udi mumone nzubu minene eyi anyi? Kakuakushala dibue nansha dimue diambata pa dikuabu nansha, bionsu nebiupuke." 
Mark13:3 Yezu uvua musombe pa mukuna wa Olive, buludiludi ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Petro, Yakobe, Yowanane, ne Andre kumukonkabu pa nkayabu ne:" 
Mark13:4 — Utuambile diba didi bia nanku mua kuenzeka, kabidi ne tshimanyinu tshidi mua kuleja tshikondu tshidi bionsu abi ne bua kuenzeka." 
Mark13:5 Yezu kubanga kubambila ne: — Nuadimukayi, muntu kanushimi." 
Mark13:6 Bantu ba bungi nebalue bangata dina dianyi, badiamba ne: “Memendi Meshiya!” Nebashime bantu ba bungi." 
Mark13:7 Panumvua mutoyi wa bantu bakula, kanupampakanyi nansha. Bidi bimpe bua bia nanku bienzeke, kadi ki nshikidilu wa panu nansha." 
Mark13:8 Tshisamba netshiluishe tshisamba tshikuabu. Bukalenga nebuluishangane ne bukalenga bukuabu. Bikumina nebienzeke mu matunga mashilangane. Biyole bia nzala nebienzeke. Nebikale bu makenga a kumpala adi akuata mukaji pa lulelu. 
Mark13:9 “Kadi nuenu, dimukayi. Bualu bantu nebanufikishe ku tubadi. Bantu nebanututshishile mitshi mu nzubu ya kutendelela ya bena Yuda. Nenuimane kumpala kua balombodi ba buloba ne kua bakalenga, bua kubajadikila bimvua muambe." 
Mark13:10 Bidi bimpe bangabanga banji kulongesha bantu bonsu Lumu lua Disanka. 
Mark13:11 Panukuatabu bua kuya nenu ku kabadi, kanudianji kupampakana bua binudi mua kuamba. Kadi diba adi, nenuambe miaku idibu banupa. Bualu kayena ifumina kunudi, nkudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Mark13:12 Bantu nebafile bana babu menemene bua kubashipabu. Kabidi batatu nebenzele bana babu badibu balela momumue. Bana nebabenge baledi babu, nebabashipeshe." 
Mark13:13 Bantu bonsu nebanukine bualu nudi bannange. Kadi muntu udi unanukila too ne ku ndekelu, neapande.”" 
Mark13:14 — (Muntu udi ubala bualu ebu ajingulule tshidibu basue kumvuija:) “Tshinyangu tshipite bubi.” Nenumone tshinyangu tshia dibutuka tshishindamena muaba uditshi katshiyi ne bua kuikala. Nenku bantu bikale mu Yudeya nebanyemene ku mikuna. 
Mark13:15 Muntu wikala pa musonga wa nzubu wende, kena ne bua kutuluka bua kuangata bintu bidi mu nzubu." 
Mark13:16 Muntu wikala mu budimi kapinganyi kuende bua kuangata tshinkutu tshiende. 
Mark13:17 Bakaji badi ne mafu ne badi bamusha bana mabele nebikale ne diakabi dipite mu matuku awu! 
Mark13:18 Nulombe Mvidi Mukulu bua malu aa kaenzeki mu tshikondu tshia mashika! 
Mark13:19 Bualu mu matuku awu, dikenga nedikale dipite bukole bua makenga onsu adi bantu bamane kumanya katshia bafuka bintu bionsu, too ne mpindiewu, kakuena mua kuikala dikenga difuanangane ne dia mushindu ewu nansha." 
Mark13:20 Bu Maweja-Nangila kayi mukepeshe bungi bua matuku awu, muntu nansha umue kavua mua kupanda. Kadi mmuakepeshe bua bantu bende badiye musungule." 
Mark13:21 Pikala muntu unuambila ne: “Tangilayi Meshiya udi apa!” nansha ne: “Udi papa,” kanuitabi to." 
Mark13:22 Bualu ba Meshiya ba dishima ne bambi ba dishima nebafike, nebenze bimanyinu ne bishima bua kupeta mushindu wa kushima bantu badi Mvidi Mukulu mumane kusungula." 
Mark13:23 Nenku, nuenu nuadimukayi! Ndi mudianjile kunumanyisha bionsu." 
Mark13:24 — Kadi mu matuku awu, makenga mamane kuenzeka, diba nedibuitshidile, ngondu kakukenka kabidi." 
Mark13:25 Mitotu neyikuluke kulu. Makole onsu adi mulu neatshikakane. 
Mark13:26 Diba adi nebamone Muana wa muntu uluila mu mavuba, pamue ne bukole bua bungi ne butumbi." 
Mark13:27 Neatume batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu ku ntengu inayi ya buloba, bua kukunguja bantu bavua Mvidi Mukulu musungule mu buloba bujima." 
Mark13:28 — Nuangatshile tshilejilu pa mutshi wa mfiku. Padi matamba awu ela ntonga, mabeji asasa, nudi numanya ne: tshikondu tshia mvula tshidi pabuipi." 
Mark13:29 Bidi momumue kabidi, panuamona malu aa enzeka, mimanye ne: Muana wa muntu udi pabuipi, ukadi makasa mu njila." 
Mark13:30 Ndi nnujadikila ne: bena lelu kabakufua bonsu kabayi banji kumona bionsu ebi bienzeka. 
Mark13:31 Diulu ne buloba nebijimine, kadi miaku yanyi kayakujimina tshiendelele." 
Mark13:32 — Kadi bua dituku adi nansha diba, muntu nansha umue kena mubimanye. Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu nansha Muana wa muntu kabena bamanye. Amu Tatu nkayende." 
Mark13:33 Nuadimukayi, tabalayi, bualu kanuena bamanye diba didi tshikondu tshikumbana." 
Mark13:34 Nebikale bu mudi muntu uya ku luendu, ushiya nzubu wende, ushila bena mudimu bende bumfumu, upesha muntu yonsu mudimu wa kuenza, pashishe welela mulamiwa tshiibi mukenji bua kushalaye mutabale." 
Mark13:35 Nenku tabalayi, bualu kanuena bamanye diba diapingana muena nzubu, bumue ndilolu, nansha mmundankulu, nansha mpa bitala nansha dinda." 
Mark13:36 Nutshine bua kafiki bu ntumba wa tshintuluntulu, kanusanganyi balale tulu." 
Mark13:37 Bindi nnuambila ebi, ndi nnuambila bonsu ne: Tabalayi!" 
Mark14:1 Kutshivua kushala matuku abidi bua tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila ne tshia mampa kaayi mela buanga kuenzekatshi. Bamfumu ba batuangaji ne balongeshi ba mikenji bavua bakebela pa kukuatshila Yezu mu musokoku ne kumushipa. 
Mark14:2 Bavua bambilangana ne: — Katuena mua kumukuatshila munkatshi mua tshibilu to. Bualu bantu badi mua kujula mutoyi. 
Mark14:3 Yezu utshivua ku Betanya, mu nzubu mua Simone muena nsudi. Pavuaye musombe bua kudia, mukaji kubuela ne mulangi tente wa manananshi a mushinga mukole, kaayi masangisha ne tshintu tshikuabu. Kuukangulaye, kuelaye Yezu manananshi mu mutu." 
Mark14:4 Bamue ba ku bantu bavua muaba awu kufikabu munda, babambila ne: — Tshidibu banyangila aa manananshi nenku ntshinyi?" 
Mark14:5 Bavua mua kuapana ku mushinga mupite ku nkanu nkama isatu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bua kumona mua kupesha bapele. Bavua badiwula mukaji ewu bikole." 
Mark14:6 Kadi Yezu kuamba ne: — Mulekelayi. Nudi numutatshishila tshinyi? Tshidiye mungenzele ntshimpe. 
Mark14:7 Bualu nenuikale ne bapele matuku onsu, nenku misangu yonsu inudi basue nudi mua kubenzela bimpe. Kadi meme kanuena nanyi matuku onsu to." 
Mark14:8 Yeye mmuenze muende muvuaye namu. Mmudianjile kulaba mubidi wanyi manananshi bua kuujika. 
Mark14:9 Ndi nnujadikila ne: mu buloba bujima miaba yonsu idibu balongesha Lumu lua Disanka, bantu nebalonde kabidi bidi mukaji ewu muenze, bua kumuvuluka." 
Mark14:10 Pashishe Yudase Iskariyote, umue wa ku balongi dikumi ne babidi, kuyaye kudi bamfumu ba batuangaji bua afile Yezu mu bianza biabu." 
Mark14:11 Bobu kusanka bikole. Kumulayabu bua kumupesha makuta. Ke Yudase kubanga kukeba mushindu muimpe uvuaye mua kufila Yezu mu bianza biabu. 
Mark14:12 Dituku dia kumpala dia tshibilu tshia mampa kaayi mela buanga, divuabu balambula bana ba mikoku bua didia dia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, balongi ba Yezu kumukonka ne: — Udi musue tukulongoluele didia dia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila penyi?" 
Mark14:13 Ke Yezu kutuma balongi babidi ba ku balongi bende, ubambila ne: — Nuye mu tshimenga. Nenusambakene ne muntu mulume muambule mulondu wa mayi. Numulonde." 
Mark14:14 Muaba wabuelaye, nuambile muena lubanza ne: “Mulongeshi udi ukonka ne: tshibambalu tshindi mua kudila didia dia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila ne balongi banyi, tshiepi?”" 
Mark14:15 Yeye neanuleje kulu kua nzubu, tshibambalu tshinene, tshimane kulongolola ne bintu biamu bionsu. Ke muaba unuatulongoluela didia awu." 
Mark14:16 Balongi kuya, kufikabu mu tshimenga. Kusanganabu bionsu bu muvua Yezu mubambile. Kulongololabu didia dia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Mark14:17 Dilolu, Yezu kufika ne balongi dikumi ne babidi." 
Mark14:18 Pavuabu badia ku mesa, Yezu kuamba ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: umue wa kunudi, utudi tudia nende, neantungile tshitungu." 
Mark14:19 Balongi kubanga kunyingalala, bamukonka ku muntu ku muntu ne: — Udi mua kuikala meme anyi?" 
Mark14:20 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Mmuntu umue wa ku nuenu dikumi ne babidi, utudi tutua nende diampa diende mu dilongu disalame." 
Mark14:21 Bulelela, Muana wa muntu neafue bilondeshile mudibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila bualu buende. Kadi muntu udi uyila Muana wa muntu tshitungu, mmuena dikasa dibi! Bivua kuikala bitambe buimpe bua kabaledi muntu awu to." 
Mark14:22 Pavuabu badia, Yezu kuangata diampa, yeye mumane kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, kudikosololaye, kudiabanyinaye balongi bende, ubambila ne: — Angatayi etshi, mmubidi wanyi." 
Mark14:23 Pashishe kuangataye kabidi dikopu dia maluvu a nwinyo, yeye mumane kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, kudipeshaye balongi bende, bobu kunuinamu bonsu." 
Mark14:24 Yezu kubambila ne: — Etshi mmashi anyi, avua mapumuka bua ba bungi, bua kushindika ndondu uvua Mvidi Mukulu mutue ne bantu." 
Mark14:25 Ndi nnujadikila ne: tshiena mua kunua kabidi maluvu a nwinyo too ne ku dituku dindi mua kunua nwinyo mupiamupia mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. 
Mark14:26 Pashishe kuimbabu misambu ya kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, kuyabu ku mukuna wa Olive." 
Mark14:27 Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: Nenuye bonsu, nenunshiye. Bualu mbafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Nenshipe mulami wa mikoku, mikoku itangalake. ”" 
Mark14:28 Kadi, Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Pangikala mubiike ku lufu, nendianjile kumpala kuenu mu Ngalileya." 
Mark14:29 Petro kumuambila ne: — Nansha bakuabu bonsu bakushiye, meme tshiena mua kukushiya nansha." 
Mark14:30 Nanku Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi nkujadikila ne: lelu, butuku ebu mene, tshitala katshiyi tshianji kusama misangu ibidi, wewe newikale munwile misangu isatu ne tshiena mumumanye to." 
Mark14:31 Kadi Petro kushindika bikole kabidi ne: — Nansha bua kufua nebe, tshiena mua kukuvila ne tshiena mukumanye to. Balongi bakuabu bonsu kuambabu bia momumue." 
Mark14:32 Kufikabu ku muaba udibu babikila ne: Ngetsemani. Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Sombayi apa, ntshidi nya kutendelela." 
Mark14:33 Kuangataye Petro, Yakobe ne Yowanane. Kubangaye kumvua buowa ne dipampakana dikole," 
Mark14:34 kubambilaye ne: — Muoyi wanyi udi tente ne dibungama too ne ku lufu. Shalayi apa, ikalayi batabale." 
Mark14:35 Kuyaye kule kakese, kudiela panshi, utendelela bua bu biobi mua kuenzeka, dikenga adi kadifiki kudiye to." 
Mark14:36 Uvua wamba ne: — Tatu wanyi, kakuena tshidi mua kukukolela to. Ungumushile dikopu edi dia dikenga. Kadi kabienzeki mundi musue, bienzeke amu muudi musue wewe!" 
Mark14:37 Kupinganaye kudi balongi basatu, kubasangana balale tulu. Kuambilaye Petro ne: — Simone, udi mulale anyi? Kuena ne bukole bua kushala mutabale nansha diba dimue anyi?" 
Mark14:38 Shalayi batabale nutendelele, bua kanulenduki. Muoyi wa muntu udi mulongolole mua kuenza bionsu, kadi mubidi wende udi ne butekete." 
Mark14:39 Yezu kuya tshiakabidi, kutendelela wambulula miaku ya momumue." 
Mark14:40 Pashishe kupinganaye kudi balongi bende, kubasangana balale tulu. Mesu abu avua abungila ne tulu. Bavua amu bamuandamuina ku tulu." 
Mark14:41 Kupinganaye musangu muisatu, ubambila ne: — Nutshidi balale tulu, bikishe? Biakumbanyi. Diba diakanyi. Tangilayi, nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia bantu babi." 
Mark14:42 Jukayi, tuye! Muntu udi untungila tshitungu mmumane kufika!" 
Mark14:43 Diakamue patshivua Yezu wakula, ke Yudase, umue wa ku balongi dikumi ne ba bidi kufikaye pamue ne bantu bavule, bikale ne miele ya nwita ne mitshi. Bavua babatume kudi bamfumu ba batuangaji, balongeshi ba mikenji ne bakulu." 
Mark14:44 Yudase uvua mutangile Yezu tshitungu uvua mumane kuambila bantu abu tshimanyinu tshivuaye ne bua kubaleja ne: “Muntu ungela mu tshitupa awu ke yeye unudi nujinga. Numukuate, nuye nende bamulame bimpe.”" 
Mark14:45 Diakamue Yudase ufika, kusemenaye kudi Yezu, umuamba ne: — Mulongeshi! Pashishe kumuelaye mu tshitupa." 
Mark14:46 Bakuabu kukuatabu Yezu. 
Mark14:47 Ke umue wa ku bavua nende kutula muele wende wa nwita, kutapa muena mudimu wa mutuangaji munene, kumukosa ditshi." 
Mark14:48 Yezu kubakonka ne: — Meme ndi bu muivi panudi balue ne miele ya mvita ne mitshi bua kunkuata anyi? 
Mark14:49 Matuku onsu mvua munkatshi muenu, nnulongeshila mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kanutua bankuate nansha. Kadi bidi bienzeka nenku bua bidibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila bikumbane." 
Mark14:50 Ke balongi bonsu kumushiya nkayende, kunyemabu." 
Mark14:51 Umue nsongalume uvua ulonda Yezu, uvua mutuale anu tshilamba tshia kudibuikila pa kulala. Bavua basue kumukuata," 
Mark14:52 kadi yeye kushiya tshilamba tshia kudibuikila pa kulala atshi, kunyema butaka." 
Mark14:53 Kuyabu ne Yezu kua mutuangaji munene. Muaba uvuabu basangile kudi bamfumu bonsu ba batuangaji, bakulu ne balongeshi ba mikenji." 
Mark14:54 Petro uvua ulonda Yezu pa bule. Kubuelaye munda mua lubanza lua nzubu wa mutuangaji munene. Muaba awu, kusombaye ne balami, ota kapia." 
Mark14:55 Bamfumu ba batuangaji ne bonsu bena Tshipangu tshikulu bavua bakeba bualu bua kushiminyina Yezu, bua kumonabu mua kumufundila tshibawu tshia lufu, kadi kabatua babupeta nansha." 
Mark14:56 Bantu ba bungi bavua basonguela Yezu, kadi kabatua bajadika bualu bua momumue to." 
Mark14:57 Bakuabu batua bajuka, bamushiminyina ne:" 
Mark14:58 — Tutua bumvue wamba ne: “Nengupule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu utua bantu base, mu matuku asatu nengase mukuabu udi bantu kabayi basa. ”" 
Mark14:59 Kadi nansha ku miaku ya nanku mene, kabatua bajadika bualu bua momumue nansha." 
Mark14:60 Mutuangaji munene kujuka munkatshi mua bantu bonsu, kukonka Yezu ne: — Kuena wandamuna bualu nansha bumue anyi? Bantu aba badi bakusonguela bua tshinyi?" 
Mark14:61 Kadi Yezu utua mupuwe, kavua wandamuna to. Mutuangaji munene kumukonka tshiakabidi ne: — Udi Meshiya, Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu utudi mua kutumbisha anyi?" 
Mark14:62 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mmeme. Kabidi nenumone Muana wa muntu musombe ku dia balume dia Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu. Nenumumone kabidi uluila mu mavuba a mu diulu." 
Mark14:63 Ke mutuangaji munene kudipanda bilamba, wamba ne: — Katuena tukengela kabidi bajadiki ba tshilumbu to." 
Mark14:64 Nudi badiumvuile mudiye upenda Mvidi Mukulu. Nudi nuela meji kaayi? Bonsu kuambabu ne: bamufundile tshibawu tshia lufu. 
Mark14:65 Bamue ba kudibu kubanga kutuila Yezu mate pambidi, bamubuikila tshilamba ku mpala, bamutuuta bisusu bamuamba ne: — Jandula udi ukuenza nanku awu. Basolayi kumuangata, kumutuuta mapi." 
Mark14:66 Petro utshivua panshi mu lubanza. Umue wa ku bakaji bena mudimu ba mutuangaji munene kufika. 
Mark14:67 Kumonaye Petro ota kapia, kumujojaye, umuamba ne: — Wewe kabidi uvua ne Yezu wa mu Nazarete." 
Mark14:68 Kadi Petro kumuyila wamba ne: — Tshiena mumanye, tshiena mujingulule tshiudi musue kuamba. Pashishe kuyaye pambelu, ku mushiku wa lupangu. Tshitala kusama." 
Mark14:69 Kadi muena mudimu mukaji uvua mumumone. Kubangaye tshiakabidi kuambila bantu bavua muaba awu ne: — Muntu ewu udi wa ku bobu! 
Mark14:70 Kadi Petro kumuyila tshiakabidi. Katupa kapite, bantu bavua muaba awu kuambabu kabidi Petro ne: — Bushuwa, udi wa ku bobu, bualu kabidi udi muena Ngalileya." 
Mark14:71 Ke Petro kuditshipa, wamba ne: — Tshiena mumanye muntu unudi nuamba awu to. Pangikala nshima, Mvidi Mukulu annyoke!" 
Mark14:72 Pa diba adi, tshitala kusama musangu muibidi. Ke Petro kusuluka bisua Yezu mumuambile ne: “Bangabanga ne tshitala kusama misangu ibidi, wewe newikale mumane kunwila misangu isatu ne: tshiena mumumanye to.” Ke Petro kubanga kudila." 
Mark15:1 Patshiatshia, bamfumu ba batuangaji ne bakulu pamue ne balongeshi ba mikenji kudisangishabu ne bena Tshipangu tshikulu bonsu bua kukosabu tshilumbu. Kusuikabu Yezu mionji, kua kumufila kua Pilate."
