Mark15:2 Pilate kumukonka ne: — Udi mukalenga wa bena Yuda anyi? Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Anu bu muudi wamba amu. 
Mark15:3 Bamfumu ba batuangaji bavua basonguela Yezu ne malu a bungi. 
Mark15:4 Pilate kumukonka tshiakabidi ne: — Kuena wandamuna bualu nansha bumue anyi? Udi mumvue mudibu bakusonguela! 
Mark15:5 Kadi Yezu kasua muandamune kabidi to. Pilate kukema. 
Mark15:6 Ku tshibilu tshionsu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, Pilate uvua upatula mu lukanu muena lukanu umue usua bantu badisunguile." 
Mark15:7 Kadi, kusua muntu uvuabu babikila ne: Barabase. Usua mu lukanu pamue ne bantomboji nende bavua bashipe muntu diba divua bantu bajula ndululu." 
Mark15:8 Bantu bavule kusemena, kubanda kudi Pilate, kubanga kumulomba bua kubenzelaye muvuaye wenza misangu yonsu." 
Mark15:9 Pilate kubandamuna ne: — Nudi basue nnupatuile mu lukanu mukalenga wa bena Yuda anyi? 
Mark15:10 Bualu uvua mumanye ne: bamfumu ba batuangaji mbafile Yezu mu bianza biende bualu bavua nende ne lubabu. 
Mark15:11 Kadi, bamfumu ba batuangaji kusonsola bantu bua balombe Pilate, bua abapatuile mu lukanu anu Barabase." 
Mark15:12 Pilate kukonka bantu tshiakabidi ne: — Kadi nudi basue ne ngenzele unudi nubikila ne mukalenga wa bena Yuda tshinyi? 
Mark15:13 Bobu kumuandamuna bela mbila ne: — Umupopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane! 
Mark15:14 Pilate kubakonka ne: — Ntshilema kaayi tshibi tshidiye muenze? Kadi bobu kuela kabidi mbila bikole ne: — Umupopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane! 
Mark15:15 Pilate uvua musue kusankisha bantu pa kubapatuila Barabase mu lukanu. Pashishe, yeye mumane kukumisha Yezu mikaba, kumufilaye bua bamupopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Mark15:16 Basolayi kuyabu ne Yezu munda mua lubanza (mmomumue ne: mu lubanza lua nzubu wa mulombodi wa buloba). Kubikilabu basolayi bonsu. 
Mark15:17 Kuvuadikabu Yezu tshinkutu tshikunze. Kulukabu tshifulu tshia bukalenga tshia mionji ya meba, kumuasa ku mutu." 
Mark15:18 Pashishe kubangabu kumuela muoyi ne: — Mukalenga wa bena Yuda! Muoyi awu! 
Mark15:19 Bavua bamutuuta lukodi ku mutu, bamutuila mate pambidi, bamutuila binu panshi kumpala kuende bua kumukukuila." 
Mark15:20 Bobu bamane kumuseka, kuntuvulabu tshinkutu tshikunze, kumuvuadikabu bilamba biende. Pashishe kuyabu nende ku mpenga kua tshimenga bua kumupopela pa mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Mark15:21 Muntu mukuabu uvua upita mu njila, utumina ku budimi, diende Simone muena mu Sirene, uvua tatuende wa Aleksandre ne Rufuse. Basolayi kumuenzeja bua kuambulaye mutshi mutshiamakane wa Yezu." 
Mark15:22 Kuyabu ne Yezu muaba uvuabu babikila ne Ngolgota, mmomumue ne: “Muaba wa kabalubalu ka Mutu.”" 
Mark15:23 Bavua basue kumupesha nwinyo musambakaja ne buanga budi bukuata bu diamba pamue ne mire. Kadi Yezu kubenga kunua. 
Mark15:24 Pashishe kumupopelabu pa mutshi mutshiamakane. Kuabanyanganabu bilamba biende, bavua batshinka bua kumanya tshidi muntu yonsu ne bua kuangata." 
Mark15:25 Pavuabu bamupopela pa mutshi mutshiamakane, diba dikavua pa tshitema wa dinda." 
Mark15:26 Pa kabaya kavua kaleja tshibawu tshiyuabu bamufundile, bavua bafundepu ne: “Mukalenga wa bena Yuda.”" 
Mark15:27 Bavua bapopele bantomboji babidi ku nseke yonsu ya Yezu: umue ku dia balume diende, mukuabu ku dia bakaji diende. [" 
Mark15:28 Amu bua kukumbaja miaku idibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Bavua bamuteka munkatshi mua benji ba malu mabi. ”] 
Mark15:29 Bantu bavua bapitshila muaba awu bavua banyukisha mitu, bamupenda, bamuamba ne: — Akia! Wewe uvua musue kupula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne kuasa mukuabu mu matuku asatu," 
Mark15:30 udisungidile, utuluke ku mutshi mutshiamakane!" 
Mark15:31 Bamfumu ba batuangaji ne balongeshi ba mikenji kabidi bavua baseka Yezu, bambilangana ne: — Uvua usungidilangana, kadi mupange mua kudisungidila yeye mene!" 
Mark15:32 Meshiya mukalenga wa bena Izrayele atuluke ku mutshi mutshiamakane mpindiewu! Patuamona nanku, netumuitabe! Bantu bavuabu bapopela ku mutshi mutshiamakane pamue ne Yezu bavua bamupenda kabidi." 
Mark15:33 Diba dia dikumi ne dibidi munda munya, miidima kuenzeka mu ditunga dijima, kunengayi too ne ku diba isatu wa ku mapingaja." 
Mark15:34 Diba dia isatu, Yezu kuela lubila lukole ne: — Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabaktanyi? (mmomumue ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, udi mundekele bua tshinyi? ”)" 
Mark15:35 Bamue bantu bavua muaba awu kumvuabu, kuambabu ne: — Telejayi, udi ubikila Eliya!" 
Mark15:36 Umue wa kudibu kuya lubilu, kuzabika musukulampampa mu maluvu a buanji, kuusuika ku lusongu lua lusokola, kupesha Yezu bua kunuaye, wamba ne: — Lekelayi tumone Eliya ne udi mua kulua kumutulula ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Mark15:37 Kadi Yezu kuela tshiona tshikole, kukulaye muoyi." 
Mark15:38 Tshilamba tshivua tshilembeleja mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu kupandikatshi pankatshinkatshi biangatshile kulu too ne panshi. 
Mark15:39 Mulombodi wa basolayi wa bena Rome uvua muimane buludiludi ne Yezu, umone muakudi Yezu muoyi kuambaye ne: — Muntu awu uvua Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu bulelela!" 
Mark15:40 Bakaji bakuabu bavua kabidi muaba awu, bavua batangidile pa bule. Munkatshi muabu muvua Mariya wa mu tshimenga tshia Magdala, ne Mariya mamuende wa Yakobe mukese ne wa Yose, kabidi ne Salome." 
Mark15:41 Bavua balonda Yezu kabidi bamuambuluisha pavuaye mu Ngalileya. Kuvua bakaji bakuabu bavule kabidi bavua babande nende mu Yerushalayime. 
Mark15:42 Diba dikavua ku dilolu, divua dia didilongolola, momumue ne divua dia muladilu wa dituku dia Dikisha. Yozefe muena mu tshimenga tshia Arimateya, uvua ne muanzu munene mu Tshipangu tshikulu tshia bena Yuda. Uvua kabidi mutekemene Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua ne muoyi mukole bua kuya kudi Pilate bua kumulomba tshitalu tshia Yezu." 
Mark15:43  
Mark15:44 Kadi Pilate uvua mukeme pumvuye ne: Yezu mmumane kufua. Nenku kubikidishaye mfumu wa basolayi, kumukonka ne: Yezu ukadi mumane kufua musangu mule anyi?" 
Mark15:45 Mulombodi wa basolayi mumane kuandamuna Pilate ne: mmomu, ke yeye kuitabaye bua Yozefe angate tshitalu." 
Mark15:46 Yozefe kusumba tshilamba tshia kudibuikila tshia buanda bua mitshi, kutululaye tshitalu tshia Yezu ku mutshi mutshiamakane, kutshijingilaye tshilamba tshia kudibuikila, kutshilonga mu lukita luvuabu bumbule mu lubuebue. Pashishe kubungulujaye dibue dinene bua kubuikila ku mushiku wa lukita." 
Mark15:47 Mariya muena mu Magdala ne Mariya mamuende wa Yose bavua bamona muaba uvuabu bajike Yezu. 
Mark16:1 Dituku dia Dikisha dimane kupita, Mariya muena Magdala, ne Mariya mamuende wa Yakobe kabidi ne Salome kusumbabu manananshi bua kuya kulaba tshitalu tshia Yezu." 
Mark16:2 Dituku dia lumingu pa kabundubundu, diba dimane kupatuka, kuyabu ku lukita." 
Mark16:3 Bavua belangana ne: — Muntu udi mua kubunguluja dibue didi ku mushiku wa lukita nnganyi? 
Mark16:4 Kadi padibu babanduluka, kumonabu dibue divua dipite bunene dimana kubunguluja ku luseke." 
Mark16:5 Kubuelabu mu lukita, kumonabu nsongalume musombe ku dia balume, muvuale nkanzu mutoke. Buowa kubakuata." 
Mark16:6 Kadi yeye kubambila ne: — Nudi nukeba Yezu wa mu Nazarete uvuabu bapopela pa mutshi mutshiamakane. Ukadi mumane kubiika ku lufu, kena apa nansha. Jojayi muaba uvuabu bamuteke. Kanutshinyi nansha." 
Mark16:7 Nuye mpindiewu, nuambile balongi bende kabidi ne Petro ne: Yezu udi udianjila kumpala kuenu mu Ngalileya. Momu ke munuamumuena amu bu musuaye munuambile." 
Mark16:8 Bakaji kupatuka mu lukita, kunyemabu bonsu benda bazakala, batshina. Kadi ka-bavua mua kuyukila ne muntu bualu nansha bumue, bualu bavua ne bowa. [" 
Mark16:9 Yezu mumane kubiika ku lufu pa kabundubundu mu dinda, dituku dia lumingu, uvua mudianze kumuenekela Mariya muena mu Magdala uvuaye mumushe mikishi mibi muanda mutekete." 
Mark16:10 Mariya kuya kumanyisha lumu alu kudi bavuaye wendakana nabu. Bobu kubungama, kudila kabidi." 
Mark16:11 Kadi pumvubu bivua Mariya wamba ne: Yezu udi ne muoyi, mvua mumumone, kabavua bamuitaba nansha." 
Mark16:12 Pashishe, Yezu kumueneka mushindu mukuabu kudi balongi babidi, bavua baya ku musoku." 
Mark16:13 Bobu kupingana, kulondela bakuabu bualu abu, kadi kabavua mua kubitaba nansha." 
Mark16:14 Ku ndekelu, Yezu kumuenekela balongi dikumi ne umue pavuabu badia. Uvua ubatandisha bua pavuabu kabayi ne ditaba ne pavuabu ne muoyi mupape kabayi mua kuitaba bantu bavua bamane kumumona ne muoyi bamba." 
Mark16:15 Pashishe kubambilaye ne: — Nuye mu buloba bujima, nulongeshe bantu bonsu Lumu lua Disanka." 
Mark16:16 Muntu udi witaba, bamutue mu mayi, neapande. Kadi wabenga kuitaba neapete tshibawu." 
Mark16:17 Umvua yi bishima bidibu mua kumanyina bantu badi bitaba mbiebi: nebipate mikishi mibi mu dina dianyi, nebakule miakulu mipiamipia," 
Mark16:18 nansha bobu bakuate nyoka ne bianza biabu, nansha bobu banue mayi a lulengu, kabiena bibenzela bualu bubi nansha bumue. Nebatenteke babedi bianza masama abu neajike." 
Mark16:19 Mfumu Yezu mumane kuyukila ne balongi bende nanku, kumuambulabu mu diulu, kusombaye ku dia balume dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Mark16:20 Balongi kuya kulongesha miaba yonsu Lumu lua Disanka. Mfumu uvua ubambuluisha mu mudimu ewu, bua kuleja ne bivuabu balongesha bivua bia bushiwa ku bishima bivuabu benza.]" 
Luke1:1 Bantu ba bungi mbidikije mua kufunda malu manene avua menzeke munkatshi muetu. 
Luke1:2 Bavua bamfundile malu anu muvuabu batulondelawu kudi bavua baamone bituadije ku ntuadijilu, kabidi kudi bavuabu bimikile bujitu bua kumanyisha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke1:3 Nanku, Teyofile musuibue, mpindiewu meme kabidi, ndi mukebulule menemene bionsu bivua bienzeka bituadije ku tshibangidilu. Ke pandi muele meji bua kukufundilabi mudibi bilondangana." 
Luke1:4 Ndi nkufundila nanku, bua ujingulule mudi malu avuabu bakulongeshe, anu malelela." 
Luke1:5 Tshikondu tshivua Erode mukalenga wa ditunga dia Yudeya, kuvua mutuangaji, dina diende Zekarya. Uvua wa mu tshisumbu tshia batuangaji tshia Abiya. Mukajende uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya mutuangaji munene Arone. Dina diende divua Elisabete." 
Luke1:6 Bonsu babidi bavua bakumbaja bivua Mvidi Mukulu musue, batumikila bimpe menemene mikenji yonsu ne meyi onsu bia Maweja-Nangila." 
Luke1:7 Kadi kabavua ne muana nansha. Bualu Elisabete uvua nkumba, kabidi bonsu babidi bakavua bamane kukulakaja." 
Luke1:8 Dinga dituku, Zekarya uvua wenza midimu yende ya butuangaji kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. Bualu ke tshikondu tshivua tshisumbu tshiabu ne bua kuenza mudimu." 
Luke1:9 Bilondeshile muvua tshibidilu tshia batuangaji, kumusungulabu bua abuele muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila bua kuoshilamu musenga wa kamonya." 
Luke1:10 Diba divuabu bosha musenga wa kamonya, bantu bonsu bavua batendelela pambelu." 
Luke1:11 Ke mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kumuenekela Zekarya. Mutumibue uvua muimane ku dia balume dia tshilambuilu tshia musenga wa kamonya. 
Luke1:12 Zekarya umumona, kupapukaye. Bowa kumukuata." 
Luke1:13 Kadi mutumibue kumuambila ne: — Zekarya, kutshinyi nansha. Mvidi Mukulu mmuitabe ditendelela diebe. Mukajebe Elisabete neakulelele muana wa balume. Neumuinyike dina dia Yowanane." 
Luke1:14 Neusanke bikole bualu buende. Bantu ba bungi kabidi nebikale ne musangelu bua diledibua dia muana ewu. 
Luke1:15 Bualu neikale muntu munene kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Kakunua nwinyo, nansha maluvu makole makuabu. Yeye mutshikale munda mua mamuende, neikale muwule tente ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Luke1:16 Neapingaje bena Izrayele bavule kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. 
Luke1:17 Neadianjile kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. Neikale ne lungenyi, kabidi ne bukole, bivua muambi Eliya nabi. Neatuangaje batatu ne bana. Neapingaje bantomboji mu njila wa bantu bakane. Nealongoluele Maweja-Nangila bantu badi bamuindila." 
Luke1:18 Kadi Zekarya kuebeja mutumibue ne: — Bionsu ebi nenjadike ne: mbilelela, ku tshinyi? Bualu meme nkadi mukulakaje. Mukajanyi kabidi ukadi tshikunda." 
Luke1:19 Ke mutumibue kumuandamuna ne: — Meme ndi Ngabriyele. Ndi ngimana kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu bua kumuenzela mudimu. Yeye mmuntume bua kuyukidilangana nebe, ne kukumanyisha Lumu elu lua Disanka." 
Luke1:20 Nanku neushale kamama, kuyi wakula, too ne pakumbana malu aa. Bualu kuena muitabe bimvua mukuambile. Kadi miaku yanyi eyi neikumbane pa tshikondu tshiayi." 
Luke1:21 Diba adi bantu bavua bindila Zekarya, bakema bua mutantshi mule uvuaye mushale muaba wa tshijila." 
Luke1:22 Ke Zekarya kupatuka. Kadi kavua mua kuakula nabu. Nanku bantu kujingulula ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumuleje malu muaba wa tshijila. Zekarya kushala kamama, uleja bantu malu anu ne bianza." 
Luke1:23 Matuku ende a kuenza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mamane kujika, Zekarya kupingana kuende." 
Luke1:24 Matuku makese apita, ke mukajende Elisabete kuimita difu. Kushalaye kuende ngondu itanu, kayi wendakana. Uvua wamba ne:" 
Luke1:25 “Maweja-Nangila mmungambuluishe; mmunjikije mpindiewu bundu buvua bungenza ku mesu a bantu.” 
Luke1:26 Elisabete ukumbaja difu ngondu isambombu, Mvidi Mukulu kutuma mutumibue Ngabriyele, mu tshimenga tshia mu Ngalileya, tshiyuabu binyika Nazarete." 
Luke1:27 Mutumibue awu uvua ne mukenji wa kuambila nsongakaji, dina diende Mariya. Nsongakaji awu uvua mubangila kudi Yozefe, muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya mukalenga Davide." 
Luke1:28 Mutumibue kubuela mu nzubu mua nsongakaji, umuamba ne: — Sankaku. Maweja-Nangila mmukutokele munda bikole. Mvidi Mukulu udi nebe." 
Luke1:29 Mariya umvua miaku ayi, kupapukaye bikole, udikonka tshivuabu bamuelele muoyi wa mushindu ewu." 
Luke1:30 Ke mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: — Mariya, kutshinyi nansha. Udi mutokele Mvidi Mukulu ku muoyi." 
Luke1:31 Newimite difu, ulele muana wa balume, umuinyike Yezu." 
Luke1:32 Neikale munene. Nebamuinyike Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu neamuteke mukalenga, bu muvua nkambua wende Davide." 
Luke1:33 Neashale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kashidi. Bukalenga buende kabuakuikala ne ndekelu. 
Luke1:34 Mariya kukonka mutumibue ne: — Bualu ebu nebuenzeke munyi? Bualu ntshidi kamama. 
Luke1:35 Mutumibue kumuandamuna ne: — Mueyelu wa Tshijila neukutulukile. Bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu nebukubuikile bu mundidimbi. Nanku muana uwalela neikale wa tshijila. Nebamuinyike Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
Luke1:36 Muanenu Elisabete, nansha mudiye tshikunda, udi pende ne difu dia muana wa balume. Dikadi mpindiewu dia ngondu isambombu. Eku bavua bamuamba ne: kena mua kulela." 
Luke1:37 Bualu kakuena tshidi mua kukolela Mvidi Mukulu. 
Luke1:38 Nanku Mariya kuamba ne: — Ndi muntu wa Maweja-Nangila. Bingenzekele anu muudi wamba. Ke mutumibue kumushiya, kuya." 
Luke1:39 Matuku awu Mariya kumata mu njila, kuya lukasa mu tshimenga tshia mu Yudeya mu ditunga dia mikuna." 
Luke1:40 Kubuelaye kua Zekarya, kuela Elisabete muoyi." 
Luke1:41 Elisabete umvua muoyi uvua Mariya mumuele, diakamue muana kunyungakana bikole munda muende. Ke Elisabete kuwula tente ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Luke1:42 Kuelaye diyi dikole ne: — Mvidi Mukulu mmukuele lupemba, bipite bia bakaji bakuabu bonsu. Muana uwalela udi kabidi wa diakalenga." 
Luke1:43 Meme mene ndi nganyi? Mudi mamuende wa Mfumu mua kuvua kunsamba nunku mbishi? 
Luke1:44 Bualu anu ngumvua ungela muoyi, muana kunyungakana ne disanka munda muanyi." 
Luke1:45 Udi wa diakalenga, bualu udi muitabe ne: malu avuabu bammanyishe kudi Maweja-Nangila neakumbane!" 
Luke1:46 Ke Mariya kuamba ne: — Muoyi wanyi udi utumbisha Maweja-Nangila ne: mmunene! 
Luke1:47 Ndi nsankidila bikole Mvidi Mukulu, mumpandishi wanyi." 
Luke1:48 Bualu mmuntabele meme muntu wende, muntu wa patupu. Eyowa, biangatshile mpindiewu, bantu ba mu bikondu bionsu nebangambe ne: mmuena diakalenga." 
Luke1:49 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu mmungenzele malu a dikema. Dina diende ndia tshijila. 
Luke1:50 Ku ndelanganyi ne ndelanganyi muoyi wende mulenga udi kudi bonsu badi bamunemeka. 
Luke1:51 Uvua muenze midimu minene ku bukole bua diboku diende. Uvua mutangalaje bena ditambisha, bua bapange kukumbaja bivuabu belele meji." 
Luke1:52 Uvua mutonkole bakalenga ba matunga mu nkuasa yabu ya bumfumu. Uvua muzangike ba muoyi mupuekele. 
Luke1:53 Uvua mupeshe bavua ne nzala bilenga bia bungi, mutangalaje babanji bianza bitupu." 
Luke1:54 Uvua muambuluishe bena Izrayele, bantu bende. Kavua mupue muoyi dinanga divuaye mubanange nadi," 
Luke1:55 amu muvuaye mulaye bankambua betu, Abrahame ne ndelanganyi yende kashidi." 
Luke1:56 Mariya uvua mushale kua Elisabete ngondu bu isatu. Pashishe kupinganaye kuende. 
Luke1:57 Tshikondu tshivua Elisabete ne bua kulela kukumbanatshi. Kulelaye muana wa balume. 
Luke1:58 Nanku bena mutumba ne balela ba Elisabete bamona ne: Maweja-Nangila mmumuenzele bimpe bitambe, kusankabu nende pamue." 
Luke1:59 Muana kukumbaja lumingu lujima, bantu kufika bua kumuteka panshi. Bavua basue kumuinyika dina dia tatuende Zekarya." 
Luke1:60 Kadi mamuende kubenga, wamba ne: — Nansha kakese! Dina diende nYowanane." 
Luke1:61 Ke kumuandamunabu ne: — Kadi mu diku dienu emu, kamuena muntu ne dina edi nansha." 
Luke1:62 Nanku bavua baleja tatuende ne bianza, bamukonka dina divuaye musue ne: binyike muana." 
Luke1:63 Zekarya kulomba kabaya, kufunda ne: “Dina diende nYowanane.” Bonsu kukema bikole." 
Luke1:64 Bu mpindiewu Zekarya kutuadija kuakula tshiakabidi, utumbisha Mvidi Mukulu ne diyi dikole." 
Luke1:65 Ke bena mutumba bonsu kumvua bowa. Bantu bavua balondelangana malu aa mu mikuna yonsu ya mu Yudeya. 
Luke1:66 Bonsu bavua bumvua bakula malu aa, bavua baakema, badikonka mundamunda ne: — Muana ewu neikale nganyi? Bualu bivua bimueneka patoke ne: Maweja-Nangila uvua nende, umuambuluisha." 
Luke1:67 Zekarya, tatuende wa muana, kuwula ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Kutuadijaye kumanyisha bantu malu a Mvidi Mukulu, wamba ne:" 
Luke1:68 — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele atumbe! mMuvue kusamba ne kupikula bantu bende. 
Luke1:69 Kutupatuilaye Musungidi wa bukole, mu ndelanganyi ya mukalenga Davide, muntu wende." 
Luke1:70 Ke tshivuaye mudianze kumanyisha bantu kale, mukana mua bambi bende ba tshijila." 
Luke1:71 Ukavua mulaye bua kutupikula kudi baluishi betu, ne ku bumfumu bua bonsu badi batukina." 
Luke1:72 Uvua mulaye bua kuenzela bankambua betu bimpe. Kavua mupue muoyi ndondu wa tshijila uvuaye mutue nabu. 
Luke1:73 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu ukavua mumane kuditshipa kudi nkambua wetu Abrahame," 
Luke1:74 mumulaye bua kutupikula ku bumfumu bua bena lukuna betu, ne kubambuluisha bua tumuenzele mudimu katuyi ne bowa," 
Luke1:75 bua tuikale bantu ba tshijila, tukumbaje tshidiye musue, matuku onsu atutshidi ne muoyi panu." 
Luke1:76 Kadi wewe, muananyi, nebakuinyike ne: mmuambi wa Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu. Bualu neudianjile kumpala kua Mfumu, bua kumulongoluela njila," 
Luke1:77 ne bua kumanyisha bantu bende ne: Mvidi Mukulu neanusungidile, anujimijile mibi yenu." 
Luke1:78 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu wetu udi wa luse ne wa muoyi mulenga. Neatutumine butoke bua mulu, bufuanangane ne diba didi dipatuka." 
Luke1:79 Butoke abu nebutokeshe badi mu miidima ne mu dijimba dia lufu, nebuludike makasa etu mu njila wa bupole." 
Luke1:80 Muana uvua utantamana. Lungenyi luende luvua lukola. Uvua usomba mu tshipela too ne ku dituku divuaye mudileje patoke kudi bena Izrayele. 
Luke2:1 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga wa bakalenga Auguste uvua mutume diyi bua babadike bantu bonsu ba mu bukalenga bua bena Rome." 
Luke2:2 Ke musangu wa kumpala uvuabu babadike bantu nanku. Bivua bienzeka diba divua Kiriniyuse mutangidi wa buloba bua Siriya. 
Luke2:3 Bantu bonsu bavua baya kudifundisha, muntu yonsu kuabu." 
Luke2:4 Yozefe kumuka mu Ngalileya mu tshimenga tshia Nazarete, kuya mu buloba bua Yudeya mu tshimenga tshidibu binyika Betleyeme, muvuabu balelele mukalenga Davide. Bualu Yozefe uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide." 
Luke2:5 Uvua uya kudifundishamu pamue ne mubangila wende Mariya uvua kulu. 
Luke2:6 Pavuabu mu Betleyeme, dituku divua Mariya ne bua kulela kukumbanadi." 
Luke2:7 Kulelaye muana wa balume, muanabute wende. Kumujingilaye mikusu, kumuladika mu tshidilu tshia nyama. Bualu kabavua ne muaba mu nzubu wa tshilala benyi." 
Luke2:8 Mu buloba abu muvua balami ba mikoku, batshisha butuku mu mpata bua kulama mikoku yabu." 
Luke2:9 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kubamuenekela. Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kubela munkatshi ne bukenke bunene. Balami kutshina bikole. 
Luke2:10 Kadi mutumibue kubambila ne: — Kanutshinyi to. Ndi munutuadile Lumu lua Disanka luasankisha bantu bonsu bikole: 
Luke2:11 butuku ebu mu tshimenga tshia Davide, mbalelamu Musungidi wenu. Yeye ke Kristu Mfumu." 
Luke2:12 Nenumujadikile ku tshimanyinu etshi: nenusangane muana mutekete, mujingila mikusu, muladika mu tshidilu tshia nyama." 
Luke2:13 Diakamue mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu awu kumuelabu munkatshi kudi batumibue bakuabu ba mu diulu. Bavua batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu, bamba ne:" 
Luke2:14 “Butumbi buonsu budi kudi Mvidi Mukulu mulu mu diulu, bupole buende budi pa buloba, kudi bantu badiye munange! ”" 
Luke2:15 Pavua batumibue babashiye, bapingane mu diulu, balami ba mikoku kuambilangana ne: — Tuyayi ku Betleyeme: tuye kumona bidi bienzekaku, bidi Maweja-Nangila mutumanyishe ebi." 
Luke2:16 Kuambulujabu lukasa bua kuya. Kusanganabu Mariya ne Yozefe, ne muana muladika mu tshidilu tshia nyama." 
Luke2:17 Balami ba mikoku babamona, kulondabu malu onsu avuabu babambile bua muana mutekete ewu." 
Luke2:18 Bonsu bavua bumvua bivua balami balonda bavua bakema. 
Luke2:19 Kadi Mariya uvua ulama malu onsu aa mu muoyi, welangana meji bikole munda muende." 
Luke2:20 Ke balami ba mikoku kupingana kuabu. Bavua batendelela Mvidi Mukulu, bamutumbisha bua bionsu bivuabu bumvua ne bamona. Bualu bionsu bitua bienzeka amu muvua mutumibue mubamanyishe." 
Luke2:21 Lumingu lujima lumane kupita, tshikondu tshia kuteka muana panshi kukumbana. Kuinyikabu muana dina dia Yezu, divua mutumibue muambe, mamuende wa Yezu kayi muanji kuimita difu." 
Luke2:22 Ke tshikondu kukumbana tshivua Yozefe ne Mariya ne bua kudikobolola bilondeshile muvuabu bafunde mu mikenji ya Moshe. Nanku kuyabu ne Yezu muana mu Yerushalayime bua kumulambula Maweja-Nangila. 
Luke2:23 Bualu mbafunde mu mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila ne: “Muanabute yonsu wa balume nebamujidile mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. ” 
Luke2:24 Batua balambula kabidi ne mulambu udibu bafunde mu mikenji ayi ne: “Nufile nkutshi ibidi, nansha bana ba nkudimba babidi. ”" 
Luke2:25 Diba adi mu Yerushalayime muvua muntu, dina diende Shimeyone. Uvua unemeka Mvidi Mukulu, ukumbaja bivuaye musue. Uvua muindile muntu uvua ne bua kusungidila bena Izrayele. Mueyelu wa Tshijila kabidi uvua nende." 
Luke2:26 Uvua mudianze kumumanyisha ne: kuena ufua, kuyi muanji kumona Kristu, Musungidi mutuma kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Luke2:27 Nanku Mueyelu kulombola Shimeyone, kumufikisha mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Pavua baledi ba Yezu bafike nende mu nzubu amu, bua kumuenzela bitua mikenji miambe," 
Luke2:28 Shimeyone kuambula muana mu maboku ende, kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, wamba ne:" 
Luke2:29 — Mukalenga, biuvua mulaye mbimane kukumbana. Witabe mpindiewu bua muntu webe afue mu bupole." 
Luke2:30 Bualu ndi mudimuene lupandu luebe," 
Luke2:31 luuvua mulongoluele bisamba bionsu. 
Luke2:32 Ke butoke budi bumanyisha bisamba bionsu muudi, bupetesha bena Izrayele, bantu bebe, lumu." 
Luke2:33 Tatuende ne mamuende wa Yezu bavua bakema bikole bua malu avua Shimeyone wakula bualu bua Yezu. 
Luke2:34 Shimeyone kubela lupemba, kuambila Mariya, mamuende wa Yezu ne: — Mvidi Mukulu udi musungule muana ewu bua kushindisha ne kujula bantu ba bungi mu Izrayele. Yeye neatumanyishe mudi Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi bantu nebamujudile milandu." 
Luke2:35 Nenku neasokolole meji adi munda mua bantu ba bungi. Wewe kabidi, dikenga nedisompole muoyi webe bu muele." 
Luke2:36 Kuvua kabidi Ana, muambi mukaji. Uvua muana wa Penuwele, wa mu tshisamba tshia Ashere. Ukavua ne bidimu bia bungi. Uvua mushale mu dibaka ne bayende wa ku buana bidimu muanda mutekete." 
Luke2:37 Pashishe kushalaye mukamba. Tshikondu atshi uvua mukumbaje bidimu makumi muanda mukulu ne binayi. Uvua ukuatshila Mvidi mukulu mudimu bufuku ne munya, kayi umuka mu nzubu wende. Uvua ujila biakudia, utendelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke2:38 Kufikaye diba adi, wela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Uvua uyukidilangana, pa malu adi atangila muana, ne bantu bonsu bavua bindile dituku divua Mvidi Mukulu mua kusungila Yerushalayime." 
Luke2:39 Baledi ba Yezu bamane kukumbaja bionsu bivua mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila miambe, kupinganabu ne Yezu mu Ngalileya mu tshimenga tshiabu tshia Nazarete." 
Luke2:40 Muana uvua ukola, utantamana. Uvua muwule ne meji, kabidi Mvidi Mukulu uvua umunanga." 
Luke2:41 Ku tshidimu ku tshidimu baledi ba Yezu bavua baya mu Yerushalayime ku tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. 
Luke2:42 Yezu mumane kupeta bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, kuyabu nende mu tshibilu bu muvua tshibidilu." 
Luke2:43 Tshibilu tshimane kujika, baledi bende kupingana kuabu. Kadi Yezu muana kushala mu Yerushalayime, baledi bende kabayi bamanye." 
Luke2:44 Bavua bela meji ne: Yezu udi kudi balunda betu batudi nabu mu luendu. Kadi bamane kuenda dituku dijima, ke kushisha kutuadijabu kumukeba mua bena kuabu, ne mua balunda babu." 
Luke2:45 Kadi nanshabu kumusangana. Ke kupinganabu mu Yerushalayime, benda bamukeba." 
Luke2:46 Dituku disatu kumusanganabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua musombe munkatshi mua balongeshi ba bena Yuda, ubateleja, ubela ne nkonku." 
Luke2:47 Bantu bonsu bavua bamuteleja, bavua bakema lungenyi luende, ne ngandamuna avuaye wandamuna." 
Luke2:48 Baledi bende bamumona, kukemabu bikole. Mamuende kumukonka ne: — Muananyi, udi mutuenzele nenku bua tshinyi? Tatuebe ne meme tuvua batate bikole, tuenda tukukeba ne dipampakana." 
Luke2:49 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Kadi nuvua nunkebela tshinyi? Kanuena bamanye ne: ndi ne bua kuikala mu malu a Tatuanyi anyi? 
Luke2:50 Baledi bende kabavua bajingulula tshi-vuaye ubambila to. 
Luke2:51 Ke Yezu kupingana nabu mu Nazarete. Uvua ubatumikila. Mamuende uvua ulama malu aa onsu mu muoyi wende. 
Luke2:52 Yezu uvua utantamana, ukola ne meji. Uvua ulengelela Mvidi Mukulu, ulengelela kabidi ne bantu." 
Luke3:1 Tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshitanu tshia bukalenga bua mukalenga wa bakalenga Tiberiyuse, Ponsiyo Pilate uvua mutangidi wa buloba bua Yudeya, Erode uvua mukalenga mu buloba bua Ngalileya, muanabu Filipe mu buloba bua Itureya ne bua Trakonitise, Lisaniyase uvua mukalenga mu buloba bua Abilene," 
Luke3:2 ne Anase ne Kayifa bavua batuangaji banene. Diba adi, Yowanane, muana wa Zekarya, kumvua diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu mu tshipela." 
Luke3:3 Ke kutuadijaye kuendakana mu buloba bujima bua pabuipi ne Yardene. Uvua wela mbila ne: — Akajayi nsombelu yenu. Banutue mu mayi. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu neajimije mibi yenu. 
Luke3:4 Ebi bivua bienzeka muvua muambi Yeshaya mufunde mu mukanda wende ne: “Ndi ngumvua muntu wela diyi dikole mu tshipela ne: Longoluelayi Maweja-Nangila njila. Numuenzele njila milulame. 
Luke3:5 Tshibandabanda tshionsu, nutshiuwuje. Mikuna minene ne mikese, nuyipuekeshe. Njila mikonyangale, nuyilulamije. Binina bia mu njila, nubilandakaje." 
Luke3:6 Nanku bantu bonsu nebamone mudi Mvidi Mukulu ubasungidila. 
Luke3:7 Bantu bavule bavua bafika kudi Yowanane, bua abatue mu mayi. Uvua ubambila ne: — Nuenu nudi nyoka! Uvua munuambile munudi mua kupanduka ku dinyoka dikadi Mvidi Mukulu musue kununyoka nadi nnganyi?" 
Luke3:8 Enzayi malu adi aleja ne: nudi bakaje nsombelu yenu. Kanudiambidi munda muenu ne: “Abrahame ke nkambua wetu. ” Bualu ndi nnujadikila ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kuandamuna mabue aa, ashale ndelanganyi ya Abrahame!" 
Luke3:9 mBamane kulongolola kasuyi, bua bakosele naku mitshi ku miji. Mutshi onsu udi kauyi ukuama bimuma bilenga, nebaukose, bawele mu kapia." 
Luke3:10 Nanku bantu kumukonka ne: — Kadi tuenze tshinyi? 
Luke3:11 Yowanane kubandamuna ne: — Muntu udi ne bilamba bibidi bia pambidi, afile tshimue kudi udi kayi natshi. Udi ne biakudia, apeshe badi kabayi nabi." 
Luke3:12 Balambuishi ba bitadi kabidi kufika, bua Yowanane abatue mu mayi. Bavua bamukonka ne: — Mulongeshi, tudi ne bua kuenza tshinyi?" 
Luke3:13 Yowanane kubandamuna ne: — Kanufutshishi bantu bitadi bipite mudi mikenji miambe to. 
Luke3:14 Basolayi kabidi kumukonka ne: — Apu tuetu kabidi, netuenze tshinyi? Yeye kubandamuna ne: — Kanunyengi muntu makuta, nansha ku bukole, nansha ku dimudingila bualu. Kadi nusanke ne bidibu banufuta." 
Luke3:15 Bantu bavua benda ne ditekemena dikole, badikonka mundamunda ne: Yowanane udi mua kuikala Kristu, Musungidi wetu, anyi?" 
Luke3:16 Kadi Yowanane kubambila bonsu ne: — Meme ndi nnutua mu mayi. Kadi udi mumpite meme ku bukole, nealue. Meme tshiena mukumbane nansha mua kumukopola bisabata. Yeye neanutue munda mua Mueyelu wa Tshijila, ne mu kapia." 
Luke3:17 Udi ne lubenji mu bianza biende, bua kupepula bisote, kushiya ntete. Nealame ntete mu diyeba. Kadi neoshe bisote mu kapia kadi kakayi kajima." 
Luke3:18 Yowanane uvua ubela bantu kabidi mibelu mikuabu ya bungi. Ke muvuaye ubamanyisha Lumu lua Disanka nanku. 
Luke3:19 Kadi Yowanane kutandisha kabidi Erode, mukalenga wa mu buloba abu, bua pavuaye musele Erodiyade, mukaji wa muanabu, ne bua malu mabi makuabu a bungi avuaye muenze." 
Luke3:20 Nenku Erode uvua musakidile kabidi bualu bukuabu bupite bubi: kueleshaye Yowanane mu lukanu. 
Luke3:21 Yowanane mumane kutua bantu bonsu mu mayi, kushisha kutuaye ne Yezu kabidi. Diba divua Yezu utendelela, diulu kubululuka," 
Luke3:22 Mueyelu wa Tshijila kumutulukila ne mubidi bu wa nyunyi wa nkudimba. Ke diyi kumvuika mu diulu ne: — Wewe udi muananyi munanga. Ndi ne disanka bualu buebe. 
Luke3:23 Pakatuadija Yezu mudimu wende, ukavua ne bidimu bu makumi asatu. Bantu bavua bela meji ne: Yezu udi muana wa Yozefe. Yozefe uvua muana wa Eli." 
Luke3:24 Bankambua bakuabu ba Yezu badi balondangana mushindu ewu: Matate, Levi, Melki, Yanayi, Yozefe," 
Luke3:25 Matitya, Amosa, Nakume, Esli, Nagayi," 
Luke3:26 Maate, Matitya, Semeyine, Yoseke, Yoda," 
Luke3:27 Yowanane, Resa, Zerubabele, Sheyaltiyele, Neri," 
Luke3:28 Melki, Adi, Kosame, Elmadame, Ere," 
Luke3:29 Yoshuwa, Eliyezere, Yorime, Matate, Levi," 
Luke3:30 Shimeyone, Yuda, Yozefe, Yoname, Eliyakime," 
Luke3:31 Meleya, Menna, Matata, Natane, Davide," 
Luke3:32 Ishayi, Obede, Bowaze, Shela, Nashone," 
Luke3:33 Aminadabe, Admine, Ami, Esrome, Perese, Yuda," 
Luke3:34 Yakobe, Izake, Abrahame, Tera, Nakore," 
Luke3:35 Seruge, Regu, Pelege, Ebere, Shela," 
Luke3:36 Kenaane, Arpakshade, Sheme, Nowa, Lemeke," 
Luke3:37 Metushela, Enoke, Yerede, Maleleyele, Kenaane," 
Luke3:38 Enoshe, Shete, Adame. Adame ke muana wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke4:1 Yezu uvua utumina ku musulu wa Yardene muwule ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Ke Mueyelu kumufikisha mu tshipela. 
Luke4:2 Diabolu kumutetamu matuku makumi anayi. Munkatshi mua matuku awu, Yezu kavua udia kantu nansha kamue. Nanku matuku aa mamane kupita, kumvuaye nzala." 
Luke4:3 Ke diabolu kumuamba ne: — Ne udi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, utume diyi, dibue edi diandamuke diampa." 
Luke4:4 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Mukanda wa Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Muntu kena ne muoyi anu bua diampa nkayadi. ” 
Luke4:5 Diabolu kuya nende mulu mule. Kumulejaye makalenga a pa buloba onsu musangu umue. 
Luke4:6 Kumuambilaye ne: — Nenkupeshe makalenga onsu aa, ne bubanji buawu. Bualu bavua bampeshe bionsu ebi. Meme kabidi ndi mua kubipesha undi musue." 
Luke4:7 Nanku wewe munkukuile, bionsu ebi nebishale biebe." 
Luke4:8 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Mukanda wa Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Kukuila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe, umuenzele anu yeye nkayende mudimu. ”" 
Luke4:9 Ke diabolu kufikisha Yezu mu Yerushalayime, kumuimanyika ku musonga wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, umuamba ne: — Ne udi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, tumpika kulu, umate panshi." 
Luke4:10 Bualu mukanda wa Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu neatumine batumibue bende diyi bualu buebe, bua bakulame.”" 
Luke4:11 Mukanda awu udi wamba kabidi ne: “Nebakuambule mu bianza biabu, bua kututshi dikasa diebe ku dibue. ”" 
Luke4:12 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Mukanda wa Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Kutetshi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe. ” 
Luke4:13 Diabolu mumane kuteta Yezu mishindu yonsu, kumushiyaye bua kupingana musangu mukuabu." 
Luke4:14 Yezu muwule ne bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kupinganaye mu Ngalileya. Bantu bavua bayukila bualu buende bikole mu buloba bujima abu." 
Luke4:15 Yezu uvua ulongesha mu nzubu ya ditendelela ya bena Yuda. Bantu bonsu bavua bamutumbisha. 
Luke4:16 Yezu kuya kabidi mu Nazarete, muvuabu bamukoleshe. Dituku dia dikisha kubuelaye mu nzubu wa ditendelela wa bena Yuda, bu muvua tshibidilu tshiende. Kujukaye kulu bua kubala Mikanda ya tshijila." 
Luke4:17 Kumupeshabu mukanda wa muambi Yeshaya. Kuuvungululaye. Kusanganaye muaba uvuabu bafunde ne: 
Luke4:18 “Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila mmuntulukile. Udi munsungule, bua ntuadile bapele Lumu lua Disanka. Uvua muntume, bua mmanyishe bena lukanu ne: nebanulekele; mmanyishe kabidi bampofu ne: nenutabale; kabidi bua mpikule badibu bakengesha," 
Luke4:19 bua mmanyishe bantu tshidimu tshidi Maweja-Nangila mua kubasungidila. ” 
Luke4:20 Nanku Yezu kuvunga mukanda, kuupingajila uvua muulame. Kusombaye. Bantu bonsu bavua mu nzubu wa ditendelela wa bena Yuda kushala bamulengamena." 
Luke4:21 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Miaku eyi, inuvua bumvue mu mukanda wa Mvidi Mukulu, mmikumbane lelu, amu pamvua muyibale apu." 
Luke4:22 Bantu bonsu bavua bamukema, bakatshila bua miaku ya pa dinanga ivuaye muambe. Bavua bakonkangana ne: — Yeye ki mmuana wa Yozefe anyi?" 
Luke4:23 Yezu kubambila ne: — Bulelela nenungelele lusumuinu lua ne: “Wewe munganga, wadiondapa nkayebe!” Nenungambile kabidi ne: “Bimvua bumvue wewe muenze mu Kefamawume, ubienze kabidi munu mu tshimenga tshienu.”" 
Luke4:24 Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Bulelela ndi nnuambila ne: muambi nansha umue kabena bamuangate ne mushinga mu tshimenga tshiabu to. 
Luke4:25 Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: mu tshikondu tshia Eliya, bakaji bakamba bavua ba bungi mu Izrayele. Bidimu bisatu ne ngondu isambombu mvula kavua muloke to. Tshiyole tshikole tshia nzala tshivua mu ditunga dijima." 
Luke4:26 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kavua mutume Eliya kudi mukaji mukamba nansha umue wa kudibu. Uvua mumutume anu kudi mukaji mukamba wa mu tshimenga tshia Sarepta mu ditunga dia Sidone. 
Luke4:27 Mu tshikondu tshia muambi Elisha, muvua kabidi bena nsudi bavule mu Izrayele. Kadi nansha umue wa kudibu kabena bajikija disanka diende, kadi anu dia Naamane wa mu ditunga dia Siriya." 
Luke4:28 Bantu bonsu bavua mu nzubu wa ditendelela wa bena Yuda, bumvua anu miaku ayi, kubindulukabu bikole." 
Luke4:29 Kujukabu kulu, kumusakila ku mpenga kua tshimenga, kumufikisha ku lusongu lua mukuna uvuabu bashile tshimenga tshiabu, bua bamusakile mu lupongu." 
Luke4:30 Kadi Yezu kupitshila munkatshi muabu, kuya." 
Luke4:31 Ke Yezu kuya ku tshimenga tshia Kefamawume, mu ditunga dia Ngalileya. Dituku dia dikisha uvua ulongeshamu bantu." 
Luke4:32 Bantu bavua bakema bua dilongesha diende, bualu uvua wakula ne bumfumu." 
Luke4:33 Mu nzubu wa ditendelela muvua muntu uvua ne mukishi mubi. Muntu awu uvua wela mbila mikole ne: 
Luke4:34 — Akia! Yezu wa mu Nazarete, udi musue kutuenzela tshinyi? Udi mulue kutubutula anyi? Ndi mukumanye bimpe ne: udi Wa Tshijila! Mvidi Mukulu mmukutume!" 
Luke4:35 Yezu kukanyina mukishi mubi bikole, wela diyi ne: — Puwa! Patuka munda mua muntu ewu! Ke mukishi mubi kukulula muntu panshi, bantu bonsu batangile. Mukishi awu kupatuka munda mua muntu, kauyi mumuenzele bualu bubi nansha bumue." 
Luke4:36 Bantu bonsu bavua bakema, bakonkangana ne: — Edi ndiyi dia mushindu kaayi? Muntu ewu udi utumina mikishi mibi diyi dia bumfumu ne dia bukole, yoyi payi ipatuka!" 
Luke4:37 Nanku bantu bavua bayukidilangana bikole bualu bua Yezu mu buloba bujima abu. 
Luke4:38 Yezu umuka ku nzubu wa ditendelela wa bena Yuda, kuyaye ku nzubu wa Simone. Mamuende wa Simone uvua usama mubidi luya lukole. Nanku kulombabu Yezu bua amujikije disama." 
Luke4:39 Yezu kuinama pavuaye, kutumina disama dia mubidi luya diyi. Disama kujikadi! Mamu awu diakamue kutuadija kubalongoluela biakudia." 
Luke4:40 Diba dimane kubuela, bantu bonsu kuya kudi Yezu ne babeedi bavua ne masama mashilangane. Yezu uvua ubatenteka bianza ku muntu ku muntu, ujikija masama abu." 
Luke4:41 Mikishi mibi kabidi ivua ipatuka munda mua babeedi bavule, yela mbila ne: “Wewe udi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu!” Kadi Yezu uvua uyikanyina, uyikandika bua kayakudi, bualu ivua mimanye ne: Yezu udi Kristu, Musungidi mutulaya." 
Luke4:42 Butshia, Yezu kumuka mu tshimenga, kuya pa muaba wa nkayende. Bantu bavule kumukeba. Bamane kumusangana, bavua basue bua ashale munkatshi muabu, bamukandika kabidi bua kayi muaba mukuabu to." 
Luke4:43 Kadi Yezu kubambila ne: — Ndi ne bua kulongesha kabidi Lumu lua Disanka lua Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu mu bimenga bikuabu. Ke tshidi Mvidi Mukulu muntumine! 
Luke4:44 Nanku kuyaye kulongesha mu nzubu ya ditendelela ya mu ditunga dia Yudeya. 
Luke5:1 Dituku dikuabu, Yezu uvua ku muelelu wa dijiba dia Ngenesarete. Bantu bavua bamunguila bua kuteleja muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke5:2 Yezu kumona matu abidi ku muelelu wa dijiba. Balobi bavua batuluke, basukula makondu abu." 
Luke5:3 Yezu kubuela mu buatu bukuabu buvua bua Simone. Kumulombaye ne: “Semena kakese ne buatu mu mayi.” Ke Yezu kusomba mu buatu amu, ulongesha bantu." 
Luke5:4 Yeye mumane kulongesha nanku, kuambilaye Simone ne: — Semeja buatu kumpala, muaba udi mayi mondoke. Pashishe wewe ne balobi nebe, nuele makondu mu mayi bua kuloba." 
Luke5:5 Simone kumuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, tudi balobe butuku bujima. Katuena bakuate kantu to. Kadi bu muudi ungambila bua meme kuenza, nengele makondu." 
Luke5:6 Nanku kuelabu makondu. Ke kukuatabu mishipa mipite bungi, makondu atuadija kupandika." 
Luke5:7 Kubikilabu balobi nabu bavua mu buatu bukuabu bua babambuluishe. Abu bafika, kuwujabu matu abidi tente ne mishipa ya bungi, matu akeba kudina mu mayi." 
Luke5:8 Simone Petro umona nanku, kutuaye binu kumpala kua Yezu, wamba ne: — Mfumu, umuka kundi. Ndi muena malu mabi." 
Luke5:9 Bualu Petro ne bonsu bavuaye nabu bavua ne bowa bua bungi, bua mishipa mivule ivuabu bakuate." 
Luke5:10 Yakobe ne Yowanane, bana ba Zebede, bavua bakuata mudimu ne Simone, bavua kabidi ne bowa. Kadi Yezu kuambila Simone ne: — Kutshinyi to. Biangatshile ku mpindiewu, newikale tshilembi tshia bantu." 
Luke5:11 Nanku kukokabu matu ku mukuna, kushiyabu bionsu, kulondabu Yezu." 
Luke5:12 Pavua Yezu mu tshimenga kampanda, muena nsudi kufika kudiye. Umona amu Yezu, kutuaye mpala panshi kumpala kuende, umusengelela ne: — Mfumu, bu wewe musue, unjikije disama." 
Luke5:13 Yezu kuolola tshianza, kumulenga, wamba ne: — Ndi musue, mubidi webe wakane! Diakamue nsudi kujika pambidi pa muntu awu." 
Luke5:14 Ke Yezu kumukandika ne: — Kuena mua kuambila muntu bualu ebu to! Kadi uye kudi mutuangaji bua akukenkete. Pashishe ulambule mulambu wa kudikobolola uvua Moshe mufunde, bua bantu bonsu bajadike ne: ukadi mupande." 
Luke5:15 Nanku lumu lua Yezu kutangalaka. Bantu ba bungi bavua bamunguila bua kumuteleja, ne bua ajikije masama abu." 
Luke5:16 Kadi Yezu uvua uya miaba mipengame bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu. 
Luke5:17 Dituku dikuabu Yezu uvua ulongesha. Baparushe ne balongeshi ba mikenji bavua basomba pavuaye. Bavua bafume ku misoku yonsu ya mu Ngalileya, ya mu Yudeya, ne ku tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Yezu uvua ne bukole bua kudi Maweja-Nangila, buvuaye ujikija nabu masama a bantu." 
Luke5:18 Bantu bakuabu kufika kudiye, bambule muena tuneke. Bavua bakeba pa kumubuejila mu nzubu, kumuteka kumpala kua Yezu." 
Luke5:19 Kadi bua bungi bua bantu kabavua bamona pa kumubuejila. Nanku kumubandishilabu mu musonga wa nzubu. Kumushabu mampana makuabu. Kumupuekeshilabu mu bulalu buende munkatshi mua bantu kumpala kua Yezu. 
Luke5:20 Yezu umona ditaba dia bantu abu, kuambilaye mubeedi ne: — Muanetu, mibi yebe mmimane kujimina." 
Luke5:21 Ke balongeshi ba mikenji ne Baparushe kuela meji ne: — Ewu muntu udi usendeka Mvidi Mukulu nenku nnganyi? Udi mua kujimija bubi nnganyi? Se amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende! 
Luke5:22 Yezu kumanya meji avuabu bela. Kubakonkaye ne: — Nudi ne meji a mushindu ewu bua tshinyi? 
Luke5:23 Tshidi tshitekete ntshinyi? Nkuamba ne: “Mibi yebe mmimane kujimina,” anyi nkuamba ne: “Juka, enda?”" 
Luke5:24 Kadi ndi musue numanye ne: Muana wa muntu udi ne bukole bua kujimija mibi pa buloba. Nanku kuambilaye muena tuneke ne: — Ndi nkutumina diyi ne: juka, ambula bulalu buebe, upingane kuebe!" 
Luke5:25 Diakamue muntu awu kujuka, bantu bonsu batangile. Kuambulaye bulalu buvuabu bamuladike. Kupinganaye kuende, wenda utumbisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke5:26 Bantu bonsu kukema. Bavua batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu, bikale ne bowa bua bungi, bamba ne: — Lelu tudi bamone malu a dikema!" 
Luke5:27 Ke Yezu kupatuka, kumona mulambuishi wa bitadi musombe mu nzubu wende wa mudimu, dina diende Levi. Yezu kumubikila ne: — Undonde!" 
Luke5:28 Levi kujuka, kushiya bionsu, kulonda Yezu." 
Luke5:29 Ke Levi kulongoluela Yezu didia dinene mu nzubu muende. Balambuishi ba bitadi bavule ne bantu bakuabu bavua nabu mu didia adi. 
Luke5:30 Baparushe ne balongeshi ba mikenji ba mu tshisumbu tshiabu kubinduluka, bakonka balongi ba Yezu ne: — Nuenu nudi nudia, nunua ne balambuishi, kabidi ne bantu bakuabu ba lumu lubi, bua tshinyi?" 
Luke5:31 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Bantu badi ne bukole bua mubidi, kabena bakengela munganga to. Anu badi basama, ke badi bamukengela." 
Luke5:32 Tshiena muvue kubikila bantu ba nsongu, kadi anu bantu babi, bua balengeje nsombelu yabu." 
Luke5:33 Bantu kuamba Yezu ne: — Balongi ba Yowanane badi bajila biakudia misangu ne misangu, batendelela kabidi Mvidi Mukulu. Balongi ba Baparushe badi benza bia momumue. Kadi balongi bebe wewe badi anu badia, banua." 
Luke5:34 Yezu kubakonka ne: — Bantu badibu babikila mu didia dia dibaka, nudi mua kubabambidika bua bajile biakudia, muena dibaka mutshikale nabu anyi? Kanuena mua kuenza nanku to!" 
Luke5:35 Kadi tshikondu netshilue tshiumushabu muena dibaka. Diba adi nebajile biakudia. 
Luke5:36 Yezu kubelela kabidi lusumuinu elu ne: — Muntu kena mua kupanda tshilamba tshipiatshipia, bua kuangata tshitetela, kutshiasa ku tshilamba tshikulukulu. Bualu yeye muenze nanku, udi unyanga tshilamba tshipiatshipia. Kabidi tshitetela tshipiatshipia katshiena tshiumvuangana ne tshilamba tshikulukulu." 
Luke5:37 Muntu kena wela nwinyo mupiamupia mu milondu ya biseba bia kale. Bualu yeye muenze nanku, nwinyo mupiamupia neapande milondu ya biseba bia kale, nwinyo upumuka panshi, milondu inyanguka." 
Luke5:38 Kadi mbimpe kuela nwinyo mupiamupia mu milondu ya biseba bipiabipia. 
Luke5:39 Muntu kena mua kusanka bua kunua nwinyo mupiamupia, yeye mumane kunua wa kale. Bualu bantu badi bamba ne: “Mvinyo wa kale ke udi muimpe.”" 
Luke6:1 Dituku dikuabu dia dikisha, Yezu uvua ukosoluela mu madimi a ntete ya kuenza bukula. Balongi bende bavua batula miepu ya ntete, bayivinga mu bianza, badia ntete." 
Luke6:2 Baparushe bakuabu kubakonka ne: — Nudi nuenza bualu budi mikenji yetu mikandike bua kuenza dituku dia Dikisha bua tshinyi? 
Luke6:3 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Kanuena babale tshivua Davide wenza dituku divua nzala mibasume, yeye ne bantu bende, anyi?" 
Luke6:4 Davide kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuangata mampa avuabu balambule Mvidi Mukulu, kuadia, kuapesha kabidi bantu bende. Kadi mikenji yetu idi yamba ne: mampa awu, badi mua kuadia anu kudi batuangaji nkayabu." 
Luke6:5 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Muana wa muntu udi mfumu wa dituku dia Dikisha. 
Luke6:6 Dituku dikuabu dia dikisha, Yezu mumane kubuela mu nzubu wa ditendelela wa bena Yuda, kutuadijaye kulongesha bantu. Muntu uvuamu, muikale ne tshianza tshia balume tshifulame." 
Luke6:7 Balongeshi ba mikenji ne Baparushe bavua babambisha Yezu bikole, badiebeja ne: neajikije disama dia muntu awu dituku dia Dikisha anyi? Bualu bavua bakeba mua kumufunda ne: udi wenza bibi." 
Luke6:8 Kadi Yezu uvua mumanye meji avua munda muabu. Ke kuambilaye muena tshianza tshibalame ne: — Juka, imana kuaka, bantu bonsu bakumone. Muntu awu kujuka, kuimana." 
Luke6:9 Ke Yezu kubebeja ne: — Mikenji yetu idi mianyishe dituku dia Dikisha bua tuenze bimpe anyi bibi? Bua tupandishe muntu anyi bua tumubutule? 
Luke6:10 Yezu kubatangila bonsu. Ke kuambilaye muntu awu ne: — Olola tshianza tshiebe! Kutshiololaye. Tshianza tshiende kuakana. 
Luke6:11 Kadi baluishi ba Yezu bavua bafika munda bikole, bebejangana tshiyuabu mua kuenzela Yezu." 
Luke6:12 Tshikondu atshi Yezu uvua mubande ku mukuna bua kutendelela. Uvua mushaleku butuku bujima, utendelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke6:13 Butshia kubikilaye balongi bende. Kusungulaye munkatshi muabu dikumi ne babidi, kubinyikaye ne: mbapostolu." 
Luke6:14 Ke Simone (uvuaye muinyike kabidi dina dia Petro), ne muanabu Andre, Yakobe ne Yowanane, Filipe ne Bartolmayi," 
Luke6:15 Matayi ne Tomase, Yakobe muana wa Alfayi, ne Simone (uvua mu tshisumbu tshia baluidi ba ditunga)," 
Luke6:16 Yudase muana wa Yakobe, ne Yudase Iskariyote uvuile kupangila Yezu." 
Luke6:17 Yezu kupueka ne bapostolu bende pa mukuna, kuimana pa muaba mutentema. Balongi bende bakuabu ba bungi bavua muaba awu. Muvua kabidi tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu ba mu misoku yonsu ya mu ditunga dia Yudeya, ba mu Yerushalayime, ne ba mu Tire ne Sidone, bimenga bia ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Luke6:18 Bavua bafika bua kumvua dilongesha dia Yezu, ne bua ajikije masama abu. Bavua ne mikishi mibi ibakengesha, bavua bapanda." 
Luke6:19 Bantu bonsu bavua bakeba kumulenga, bualu bukole buvua bufuma kudiye, bubapandisha bonsu." 
Luke6:20 Ke Yezu kutangila balongi bende, ubambila ne: “Nuenu bapele nudi bena diakalenga, bualu nenuikale ne Mvidi Mukulu mu Bukalenga bupiabupia!" 
Luke6:21 “Nuenu badi ne nzala mpindiewu, nudi bena diakalenga, bualu Mvidi Mukulu neanudishe, nuukute! “Nuenu badi badila mpindiewu, nudi bena diakalenga, bualu nenuseke!" 
Luke6:22 “Padi bantu banukina, banubenga, banupenda, banupenda bualu bua Muana wa muntu, nudi bena diakalenga." 
Luke6:23 Nusanke dituku adi, nutue tshianga, bualu difutu dinene ndinuindile mu diulu. Ke muvua bankambua bakengesha bambi nanku." 
Luke6:24 “Kadi nuenu babanji, nudi bena diakabi, bualu nukadi bamane kupeta diakalenga dienu!" 
Luke6:25 “Nuenu badi ne bintu bionsu mpindiewu, nudi bena diakabi, bualu nenufue ne nzala! “Nuenu badi baseka mpindiewu, nudi bena diakabi, bualu nenubungame, nudile!" 
Luke6:26 “Padi bantu bonsu banutumbisha, nudi bena diakabi, bualu ke muvua bankambua babu benzela bambi ba dishima nanku!”" 
Luke6:27 “Kadi nuenu badi banteleja, ndi nnuambila ne: nangayi bena lukuna benu; enzelayi badi banukina bimpe." 
Luke6:28 Badi banuela mulawu, nubajingile diakalenga. Badi banukengesha, nubalombele kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke6:29 Pikala muntu mukukume dipi ku ditama, umuleje ditama dikuabu. Pikala muntu ukunyenga tshinkutu tshiebe, umupeshe kabidi ne tshilamba tshia pambidi." 
Luke6:30 Muntu yonsu udi ukulomba tshintu, umupeshe. Pikala muntu muangate tshintu tshiebe, kutshinanyi nansha." 
Luke6:31 Enzelayi bantu bakuabu anu binudi basue bua banuenzele nuenu mene. 
Luke6:32 “Panudi nunanga anu badi banunanga, munuapeta difutu dia pa buadi mmunyi? Nansha benji ba malu mabi badi bananga badi babananga." 
Luke6:33 Panudi nuenzelangana bimpe anu ne badi banuenzela bimpe, munuapeta difutu dia pa buadi mmunyi? Nansha benji ba malu mabi badi benza kabidi nanku!" 
Luke6:34 Panudi nusombesha anu banudi batekemena se: nebatupingajilebi, nudi mua kutekemena difutu dia pa buadi bishi? Benji ba malu mabi badi basombesha kabidi benji ba malu mabi, bua babapingajile bia momumue." 
Luke6:35 Kadi nangayi bena lukuna benu, benzelayi bimpe. Sombeshayi bantu bintu, kanuyi nutekemena ne: nebatupingajilebi. Nanku nenupete difutu dinene. Nenuikale bana ba Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu. Bualu Yeye udi wenzela bena kadiwu, ne bantu babi, bimpe." 
Luke6:36 Ikalayi ne luse luvule, bu mudi Tatuenu ne luse luvule." 
Luke6:37 “Kanutangidi bantu bakuabu bu bantu babi, bua Mvidi Mukulu kanutangidi nuenu kabidi nanku. Kanudiwulu bakuabu, bua Mvidi Mukulu kanudiwulu nuenu kabidi. Nu-mvuilangane luse, nanku Mvidi Mukulu neanumvuile kabidi luse." 
Luke6:38 Nupeshe bakuabu bintu, nanku Mvidi Mukulu neanupeshe kabidi. Nebanuelele pa tshilamba bintu bipima bimpe, bishindika, bisekenkeja, biya ne panshi. Nuenzele bantu bimpe ne muoyi wa kalolu. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu neanupe mapa ende ne muoyi wa momumue.”" 
Luke6:39 Yezu kubelela kabidi lusumuinu ne: “Mpofu udi mua kulombola mpofu nende anyi? Nansha kakese! Padi mpofu ulombola mpofu nende, bonsu babidi nebadishinde mu tshina." 
Luke6:40 Mulongi nansha umue kena mua kupita mulongeshi wende. Kadi mulongi yonsu udi mulonge bimpe, mujikije, neafuane mulongeshi wende." 
Luke6:41 “Udi utangila anu kasosa kadi mu disu dia muanenu, kuyi utangila mutshi munene udi mu disu diebe bua tshinyi?" 
Luke6:42 mMunyi muudi mua kuambila muanenu ne: ‘Muanetu, semena, nkumushe kasosa mu disu,’ kuyi umona mutshi munene udi mu diebe? Wewe muena mpala ibidi, bangabanga umushe mutshi munene udi mu disu diebe. Nanku neumone bimpe bua kumusha kasosa kadi mu disu dia muanenu.”" 
Luke6:43 “Mutshi muimpe kawena ukuama bimuma bibi. Mutshi mubi kawena ukuama bimuma bimpe. 
Luke6:44 Mutshi onsu badi baumanyina ku bimuma biawu. Kabena bapola bimuma bia mfiku ku muonji wa meba, nansha tumuma tua nwinyo ku mingonga." 
Luke6:45 Muntu muimpe udi wenza malu mimpe, bualu muoyi wende udi muimpe. Muntu mubi udi wenza amu malu mabi, bualu munda muende mudi mubi. Bualu mukana mua muntu mudi muamba anu malu adi muwule munda muende.”" 
Luke6:46 “Nudi numbikila ‘Mfumu, Mfumu,’ kanuyi nuenza mundi munuambile bua tshinyi?" 
Luke6:47 Muntu yonsu udi uvua kundi, uteleja miaku yanyi, uyikumbaja, nennuleje udiye mufuanangane nende." 
Luke6:48 Udi ufuanangana ne muntu uvua mutuadije kuibaka nzubu. Uvua mumbule mukidi muondoke, muibake tshitaku tshia nzubu pa mabue. Pavua mayi a misulu uwula, apasalala, atuuta ku nzubu, kaavua amunyungisha nansha. Bualu nzubu uvua muibaka bimpe." 
Luke6:49 Kadi muntu yonsu udi uteleja miaku yanyi, kayi uyikumbaja, udi ufuanangana ne muntu udi wibaka nzubu wende pa buloba, kayi tshitaku. Padi mayi a musulu atuuta ku nzubu awu, nzubu udi wupuka diakamue, ubutuka yonsu butubutu.”" 
Luke7:1 Yezu mumane kuambila bantu malu onsu aa, kuyaye ku Kefamawume." 
Luke7:2 Muaba awu muvua mfumu wa basolayi ba bena Rome, muikale ne muena mudimu wende uvuaye munange bikole. Muena mudimu awu uvua usama bikole, wamba kufua." 
Luke7:3 Mfumu wa basolayi umvua lumu lua Yezu, kutumaye bakulu ba bena Yuda kudi Yezu, bua bamulombe ne: ufike bua kujikija disama dia muena mudimu wanyi." 
Luke7:4 Bakulu kufika kudi Yezu, bamusengelela bikole ne: — Muntu awu mmuntu muimpe. mBimpe umuambuluishe." 
Luke7:5 Udi munange tshisamba tshietu. Yeye mene ke uvua muibakishe nzubu wetu wa kutendelela. 
Luke7:6 Ke Yezu kuya nabu. Pakavuaye pabuipi ne kufika ku nzubu, mfumu wa basolayi kumutumina balunda bende bua bamuambile ne: — Mfumu, kaditatshishi to. Tshiena mukumbane bua ubuele mu nzubu muanyi nansha." 
Luke7:7 Ke pamvua muele meji ne: tshiena muakanyine bua mfike kuudi. Kadi tuma anu diyi, muena mudimu wanyi neumvue bimpe." 
Luke7:8 Meme mene ndi ku bumfumu bua bantu bakuabu, kabidi ndi ne basolayi bandi ntumina diyi. Ndi ngamba ewu ne: “Ndaku,” udi uya. Ndi ngambila mukuabu ne: “Pingana,” udi upingana. Pandi ngambila muena mudimu wanyi ne: “Enza mudimu ewu,” udi wenza." 
Luke7:9 Yezu umvua miaku eyi, kukatshilaye mfumu wa basolayi awu. Ukudimuka kudi bantu bavua bamulonda, kubambilaye ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: nansha mu bena Izrayele, tshiena muanji kusangana ditaba dia mushindu ewu." 
Luke7:10 Bantu bavuabu batume kupingana kua mfumu wa basolayi, kusangana muena mudimu mumane kumvua bimpe." 
Luke7:11 Pashishe Yezu kuya mu tshimenga tshia Nayine. Balongi bende ne bantu bakuabu bavule bavua baya nende. 
Luke7:12 Pakavuaye pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga, kumonaye bantu bavua baya kujika muntu ku nkita. Muntu awu uvua muana wa balume mulela umue wa mukaji mukamba. Bena mu tshimenga ba bungi bavua bafila mamu awu." 
Luke7:13 Mfumu ubamona, kumvuilaye mamu awu luse. Kumuambilaye ne: — Lekela muadi." 
Luke7:14 Ke Yezu kuya ku mushete wa tshitalu, kuulenga ne tshianza. Bavua bawambula, kuimanabu. Yezu kuambila mufue ne: — Nsongalume, ndi nkutumina diyi, biika!" 
Luke7:15 Mufue kubiika, kusomba, kutuadija kuakula. Yezu kumupingajila mamuende." 
Luke7:16 Bantu bonsu kumvua bowa. Kutumbishabu Mvidi Mukulu, bamba ne: — Muambi munene mmupatuke munkatshi muetu! Mvidi Mukulu mmufike bua kusamba bantu bende!" 
Luke7:17 Bantu ba mu ditunga dijima dia Yudeya, ne ba mu matunga a ku mpenga, bavua bumvua lumu lua malu avua Yezu muenze." 
Luke7:18 Balongi ba Yowanane bavua bamulondela malu aa onsu. Ke Yowanane kubikila balongi babidi. 
Luke7:19 Kubatumaye kudi Mfumu bua kumukonka ne: “Wewe ke Musungidi wetu utudi bamanye ne: udi ne bua kufika, anyi tuindile mukuabu?”" 
Luke7:20 Balongi aba bafika kudi Yezu, kumuambilabu ne: — Yowanane-Batiste mmututume, ukukonka ne: “Wewe ke utudi bamanye ne: udi ne bua kufika, anyi tuindile mukuabu?”" 
Luke7:21 Diba adi Yezu uvua ujikijila bantu bavule masama abu mashilangane. Uvua wipata kabidi mikishi mibi, utabeja mpofu ya bungi." 
Luke7:22 Ke kuandamunaye bantu bavua Yowanane mutume ne: — Nupingane kudi Yowanane, numulondele bionsu binudi bamone, ne binudi bumvue: mpofu idi imona, batebuki badi benda biakane, bena nsudi badi bakana mibidi, bena mapapa badi bumvua, bafue badi babiika ku lufu, bapele badi bumvua Lumu lua Disanka." 
Luke7:23 Muena diakalenga ngudi ungitaba, kayi unwila." 
Luke7:24 Bantu bavua Yowanane mutume bumuka, Yezu kutuadija kulondela bantu malu a Yowanane, wamba ne: — Tshinuvua baye kumona mu tshipela ntshinyi? Nuvua baye kumona lushiba ludibu banyungisha kudi lupepele anyi? To!" 
Luke7:25 Nenku tshinuvua baye kumona ntshinyi? mMuntu muvuale bilenga anyi? Kadi badi bavuala bilamba bilenga, basanka ne bintu bia mushinga mukole, badi basomba mu nzubu minene ya bakalenga." 
Luke7:26 Nenku tshinuvua baye kumona ntshinyi? mMuambi anyi? Eyowa, ndi nnuambila ne: mmupite kabidi ne muambi." 
Luke7:27 Bualu Yowanane ke muntu udi mukanda wa Mvidi Mukulu ujadikila ne: “Meme Mvidi Mukulu ndi ntuma muntu wanyi kumpala kuebe, bua akulongoluele njila. ”" 
Luke7:28 Ndi nnujadikila kabidi ne: kakuenamuntu nansha umue, udi bamamu balele, mupite Yowanane. Kadi udi mushadile ku bonsu mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu udi mumupite." 
Luke7:29 Bantu bonsu ne balambuishi ba bitadi mene bavua bateleja Yowanane, bitaba bivua Mvidi Mukulu mubalombe, bavua baya kudi Yowanane bua abatue mu mayi." 
Luke7:30 Kadi Baparushe ne balongeshi ba mikenji bavua babenga tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mubalongoluele. Nanku kabavua basue bua Yowanane abatue mu mayi. 
Luke7:31 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Bena lelu ndi mua kubafuanyikija ne banganyi? mBafuanangane ne banganyi? 
Luke7:32 mBafuanangane ne bana badi basomba mu tshisalu, bamue bambila bakuabu ne: “Tuetu kunuelela nshiba bua nuje maja, nuenu nansha kuja! Tuetu kunuimbila misambu ya madilu, nuenu nansha kudila!”" 
Luke7:33 Bualu Yowanane-Batiste uvua mufike, kayi udia mampa, kayi unua nwinyo. Nuenu kumuamba ne: “Udi ne mukishi mubi munda!”" 
Luke7:34 Muana wa muntu kufika pende, udia, unua. Nuenu kuamba ne: “Ewu muntu mmusombele amu kudia ne kunua nwinyo. mMulunda wa balambuishi ba bitadi ne bena buenzayi bakuabu!”" 
Luke7:35 Kadi bonsu badi bitaba meji a Mvidi Mukulu, ke badi bajingulula buimpe buawu." 
Luke7:36 Muparushe mukuabu uvua mubikile Yezu bua kudiaye kuende. Yezu ufika kua muntu awu, kusombaye ku mesa." 
Luke7:37 Mu tshimenga atshi muvua mukaji muena malu mabi. Pavuaye mumvue ne: Yezu udi udia kua Muparushe, kuangataye mulangi wa albatre, muwule ne manananshi." 
Luke7:38 Kuimanaye panyima pa Yezu, ku makasa ende. Uvua udila, ubolesha makasa a Yezu ne binsonji. Uvua wakupula ne nsuki yende, watua mishiku, walaba manananshi." 
Luke7:39 Muparushe uvua mubikile Yezu, umona nanku, kuelaye meji ne: “Bu muntu ewu muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu bulelela, uvua mua kujingulula mukaji ewu, kumanya ne: mmuena malu mabi.”" 
Luke7:40 Nanku Yezu kuambila Muparushe ne: — Simone, ndi ne bualu bua kukuambila. Simone kuandamuna ne: — Mulongeshi, ambaku." 
Luke7:41 Ke Yezu ne: — Musombeshanganyi wa makuta uvua ne bena mabanza ende babidi, ewu ne dibanza dia nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole nkama itanu, mukuabu ne dibanza dia nkanu makumi atanu." 
Luke7:42 Bu muvuabu kabayi ne mushindu wa kumufuta, yeye kubalekela mabanza bonsu babidi. Nanku wa ku babidi aba, udi mua kupita kumunanga nnganyi?" 
Luke7:43 Simone kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi ngela meji ne: uvuaye mutekele dibanza dinene. Ke Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Udi muambe anu bimpe. 
Luke7:44 Pashishe Yezu ukudimuka kudi mukaji, kuambila Simone ne: — Udi mumone mukaji ewu anyi? Meme kufika kuebe, kuena mumpeshe mayi a kuowa ku makasa. Kadi yeye mmungoweshe makasa ne binsonji biende, muakupule ne nsuki yende." 
Luke7:45 Wewe kuena muntue mishiku bua kungakidila. Kadi yeye katshia ngafika kuebe, udi uvua anu mishiku ku makasa anyi." 
Luke7:46 Wewe kuena mungele mafuta mu mutu. Kadi yeye udi mulabe manananshi ku makasa anyi. 
Luke7:47 Ke pandi nkujadikila ne: bunene bua dinanga didiye mundeje, budi bujadika mudibu bajimije mibi yende mivule. Kadi muntu udibu bajimija mibi mikese, udi uleja dinanga dikese." 
Luke7:48 Ke Yezu kuambila mukaji awu ne: — Mibi yebe mmijimine. 
Luke7:49 Bantu bavua ne Yezu ku mesa kukonkangana ne: “Muntu udi ujimijilangana mibi ewu, mmuntu wa mushindu kaayi?”" 
Luke7:50 Kadi Yezu kuambila mukaji ne: — Ditaba diebe diakusungidi. Waya bimpe. 
Luke8:1 Pashishe Yezu kuya ne balongi bende mu bimenga bionsu ne mu misoku. Uvua ulongeshamu bantu, ubamanyisha Lumu lua Disanka lua Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Balongi bende dikumi ne babidi bavua nende mu luendu alu." 
Luke8:2 Muvua kabidi bakaji bakuabu bavuaye mumushe mikishi mibi, mujikije masama. Ke Mariya (udibu binyika ne: ngwa mu Magdala), uvuaye mumushe mikishi muanda mutekete," 
Luke8:3 Yowana, mukaji wa Kuza, mulongolodi wa malu mu nzubu wa mukalenga Erode, Suzane, ne bakaji bakuabu bavule bayua bangata biuma biabu, bua kuambuluisha nabi Yezu ne balongi bende." 
Luke8:4 Bantu bavua baya kudi Yezu bapite bungi, bafumina ku bimenga bionsu. Bamane kunguila, Yezu kubelela lusumuinu elu ne:" 
Luke8:5 “Muntu kampanda uvua muye kumiamina ntete. Pavuaye umiamina ntete mu budimi buende, imue kumata mu njila. Bantu kuyidiatakaja, nyunyi kuyizokola." 
Luke8:6 Minga kumata mu buloba bua mabue. Itoloka, kuumayi diakamue, bualu kayivua muaba wa tshitalela." 
Luke8:7 Ntete mikuabu kumata mu mitshi ya meba. Kutolokayi pamue, kadi mitshi ya meba kuyijingila." 
Luke8:8 Minga kumata mu buloba buimpe. Kutolokayi, kukuama miepu. Muepu onsu uvua ne ntete lukama.” Ke Yezu kuamba kabidi ne: — Muena matshi a kumvua wasangana kumvua anyi? Umvuee!" 
Luke8:9 Balongi ba Yezu kumulomba ne: utumvuije lusumuinu elu. 
Luke8:10 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nuenu bavua banumvuije malu masokome a Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi bantu bakuabu badi babambilawu mu nsumuinu bua “Batangile, kabayi bamona tshintu, bateleje, kabayi bumvua bualu. ”" 
Luke8:11 — Diumvuija dia lusumuinu elu didi nunku: ntete ke muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
Luke8:12 Bantu bakuabu, bidi bibenzekela bu mudi ntete idi imata mu njila. Badi bumvua muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi pashishe diabolu udi ufika, umusha muaku mu muoyi wabu, bua kabitabi, kabapandi." 
Luke8:13 Bakuabu, bidi bibenzekela bu mudi ntete idi imata mu buloba bua mabue. Badi bumvua muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, bawakidila ne disanka. Kadi muaku ewu kawena ushindama munda muabu. Badi bitaba anu bua matuku makese. Padi dikenga dibakuata, badi bajimija ditaba." 
Luke8:14 Bua bakuabu kabidi, bidi amu bu mudi ntete idi imata mu mitshi ya meba. Badi bumvua muaku wa Mvi-di Mukulu. Kadi disumpakana dia matuku onsu, lukuka lua biuma, ne masanka a panu, bidi bikutakaja muaku, biupangisha mua kukuama bimuma munda muabu." 
Luke8:15 Kadi bantu bakuabu, bidi bibenzekela bu mudi ntete idi imata mu buloba buimpe. Badi bateleja muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, bawakidila ne muoyi muimpe, baukumbaja. Bu mudibu bananukila nanku, badi bakuama bimuma." 
Luke8:16 — Muntu kena utemesha muinda bua kuusokoka mu kapanza, nansha bua kuubueja muinshi mua bulalu. Kadi badi bauteka pa tshitekelu tshiawu, bua badi babuela bamone bimpe." 
Luke8:17 Bualu buonsu butshidi busokome, nebumueneke patoke. Bidibu kabayi banji kumvua, nebabiumvue, bualu nebabileje patoke." 
Luke8:18 Nuikale ne ntema, nuteleje bimpe! Bualu udi ne tshintu, neapete bipite. Kadi udi kayi natshi, nebamunyenge bikese bidiye wela meji ne: ndi nabi." 
Luke8:19 Mamu ne bana babu ne Yezu kuya kudiye. Kadi kabavua mua kufika pabuipi nende bua bungi bua bantu. 
Luke8:20 Ke bantu bakuabu kumanyisha Yezu ne: — Mamuebe ne bana benu badi pambelu, bakeba kumonangana nebe." 
Luke8:21 Ke Yezu kuambila bantu bonsu ne: — Mamu ne bana betu mbantu badi bateleja muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, baukumbaja." 
Luke8:22 Dituku dikuabu Yezu kubuela mu buatu ne balongi bende. Kubambilaye ne: — Tusabukayi dia muamua dia dijiba. Kuyabu. 
Luke8:23 Pavuabu bita buatu, Yezu kulala tulu. Bu mpindiewu tshipepele tshikole kutuuta pa dijiba. Mayi kuwula mu buatu. Bavua mu njiwu." 
Luke8:24 Ke balongi kusemena kudi Yezu, bamubisha, bamuambila ne: — Mfumu, mfumu, tudi tufua! Yezu utabuluka ku tulu, kukanyina tshipepele ne mavuala. Kubatamabi, bionsu kushala talalaa." 
Luke8:25 Ke Yezu kukonka balongi ne: — Ditaba dienu diepi? Kadi balongi bavua ne bowa, bakema, bambilangana ne: — Muntu ewu nnganyi? Udi utumina mpepele ne mayi diyi, bimuitaba!" 
Luke8:26 Kufikabu dishiya dia dijiba mu buloba bua bena Ngerasa, buludiludi ne ditunga dia Ngalileya." 
Luke8:27 Yezu utuluka anu mu buatu, kusambakenaye ne muntu ufumina mu tshimenga. Ke muntu uvuabu bakengesha kudi mikishi mibi kuonsu eku. Kavua uvuala kabidi bilamba, kavua usomba mu nzubu. Uvua amu muaba uvua nkita." 
Luke8:28 Muntu awu umona Yezu, kuelaye lubila, udiela ku makasa ende, wamba ne diyi dikole ne: — Yezu, Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu, butudi nebe mbunganyi? Ndi nkusengelela ne: kunkengeshi to." 
Luke8:29 Uvua wamba nanku, bualu Yezu uvua utumina mukishi mubi diyi, bua upatuke munda muende. Mukishi mubi awu uvua mumukuate misangu mivule. Diba adi bavua bamusuika nkanu ku bianza ne ku makasa, bua kanyemi. Kadi yeye uvua utula nkanu ayi, mukishi mubi umutuma amu mu tshipela." 
Luke8:30 Yezu kumukonka ne: — Dina diebe nnganyi? Yeye kumuandamuna ne: — Dina dianyi: “mMusumba.” Bualu mikishi mivule ivua mimubuele munda. 
Luke8:31 Mikishi ayi ivua isengelela Yezu, bua kayitumi mu kandondu ka buloba." 
Luke8:32 Muaba awu muvua tshisumbu tshinene tshia ngulube, yenda idia ku mukuna. Mikishi mibi kutendakena Yezu bua anyishe, ibuele munda mua ngulube. Yezu kuitaba." 
Luke8:33 Nanku mikishi mibi kupatuka munda mua muntu, kubuela mu ngulube. Ngulube yonsu kupulumuka mu tshibungubungu, kudiela mu dijiba dia mayi, kufuilamu." 
Luke8:34 Bantu bavua balama ngulube bamona nanku, kunyemabu. Kutangalajabu lumu lua bualu abu mu tshimenga ne mu misoku." 
Luke8:35 Ke bantu kufika bua kudimuena bivua bienzeke. Basemena pabuipi ne Yezu, kusanganabu muntu uvua mikishi mibi mishiye, musombe ku makasa a Yezu, muvuale bilamba, lungenyi lubutama. Ke bowa kukuata bantu." 
Luke8:36 Bavua bamona bivua bienzeka, kulondela bavua bafika amu mpindiewu, muvua muntu uvua ne mikishi mibi mupande." 
Luke8:37 Nanku bantu bonsu ba mu buloba bua Ngerasa kulomba Yezu bua umuke muaba awu, bualu bavua ne bowa bua bungi. Ke Yezu kubuela mu buatu, kuya." 
Luke8:38 Muntu uvua mikishi mibi mishiye, kusengelela Yezu bua baye nende. Kadi Yezu kumupingaja kuabu, wamba ne:" 
Luke8:39 — Pingana kuenu. Ulondele bantu bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mukuenzele. Nanku muntu awu kuya, kuambila bantu ba mu tshimenga tshijima malu onsu avua Yezu mumuenzele." 
Luke8:40 Pavua Yezu ufuma dia muamua dia dijiba, bantu bavule bavua bamuakidila, bualu bonsu bavua bamuindile." 
Luke8:41 Ke muntu mukuabu kufika, dina diende Yayire. Uvua mulombodi wa nzubu wa ditendelela wa bena Yuda wa muaba awu. Kudielaye panshi ku makasa a Yezu, umusengelela, bua aye ku nzubu kuende." 
Luke8:42 Bualu muanende wa bakaji umue epele wa mvula dikumi ne ibidi uvua upunga ne lufu. Pavua Yezu uya ku nzubu aku, bantu bavule bavua bamufimpakaja nseke yonsu." 
Luke8:43 Muaba awu muvua mukaji uvua ne disama dia mashi a muyeya kukadi bidimi dikumi ne bibidi. Uvua mufute baminganga bionsu bi-vuaye nabi. Kadi muntu nansha umue kavua mujikije disama diende. 
Luke8:44 Mukaji awu uvua ulonda Yezu munyima. Kulengaye luzemba lua tshilamba tshiende. Diakamue mashi ende a muyeya kukama. 
Luke8:45 Yezu kuebeja bantu ne: — Uvua mundenge nnganyi? Bantu bonsu kuandamuna ne: — Katuena bakulenge to. Ke Petro kuamba ne: — Mfumu, bantu bavule mbakuele munkatshi, mbakufimpakaje nseke yonsu." 
Luke8:46 Kadi Yezu kuamba ne: — Muntu uvua mundenge, bualu ndi mumvue bukole bumpatuke." 
Luke8:47 Mukaji kumona ne: mbanjandule. Kuyaye kudiela ku makasa a Yezu, uzakala. Bantu bonsu bavua bamuteleje, pavuaye ulondela Yezu tshivuaye mumulengele, kabidi muvua disama diende dijika diakamue." 
Luke8:48 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Muananyi wa bakaji, waya mu bupole. Disama diebe ndimane kujika, anu bua ditaba diebe." 
Luke8:49 Yezu utshivua wakula, muena mudimu wa Yayire kufika, wambila mfumuende ne: — Muanebe wa bakaji mmumane kufua. Kutatshishi mulongeshi kabidi to." 
Luke8:50 Kadi Yezu umvua nanku, kuambilaye Yayire ne: — Kuzakadi to. Ikala amu ne ditaba. Muana neapande." 
Luke8:51 Yezu ufika kumbelu, kavua musue kubuela mu nzubu ne bantu bakuabu to, anu ne Petro, Yowanane, Yakobe, kabidi ne baledi ba muana." 
Luke8:52 Bantu bonsu bavua badila muana, bela miyenga. Ke Yezu kubapuwisha ne: — Puwayi! Nsongakaji ki mmufue to. mMulale!" 
Luke8:53 Bantu abu kuseka Yezu, bualu bavua bamanye ne: nsongakaji mmumane kufua." 
Luke8:54 Kadi Yezu kumukuata ku tshianza, wela diyi dikole ne: — Nsongakaji, biika!" 
Luke8:55 Nsongakaji kubiika ku lufu, kujuka diakamue. Yezu kuambila bantu bua bamupeshe biakudia." 
Luke8:56 Baledi bende bavua bakema bikole. Kadi Yezu kubakandika bua kabambidi muntu bivua bienzeka. 
Luke9:1 Yezu kusangisha balongi bende dikumi ne babidi, kubapa bukole ne bumfumu bua kuipata mikishi mibi yonsu, ne bua kujikija masama a bantu." 
Luke9:2 Kubatumaye bua baye kulongesha malu a Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu, ne bua bajikijile babeedi masama." 
Luke9:3 Kubambilaye ne: — Kanuyi ne tshintu mu njila, nansha dikombu dia luendu, nansha tshibuta, nansha diampa, nansha makuta. Muntu kikadi ne bilamba bia pambidi bibidi to." 
Luke9:4 Muaba onsu wanuakidilabu, nusombe mu nzubu umue awu, too ne diba dinudi numuka mu musoku awu." 
Luke9:5 Kadi muaba wabenga bantu kunuakidila, numuke mu musoku awu, nututule lupuishi lua ku makasa enu, bua lushale kubavuluija tshiyuabu benze." 
Luke9:6 Balongi kumuka, kuya mu misoku yonsu, kumanyisha bantu Lumu lua Disanka, kujikijila kabidi babeedi masama miaba yonsu." 
Luke9:7 Ke Erode, mukalenga wa buloba abu, kumvua malu onsu avua menzeke. Kavua mumanye tshia kuenza, bualu bamue bantu bavua bamba ne: — Yowanane-Batiste mmubiike ku lufu." 
Luke9:8 Bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — Ke Eliya udi mutumuenekele. Banga bavua bamba ne: — Umue wa ku bambi ba kale mmubiike ku lufu. 
Luke9:9 Kadi Erode kuamba ne: — Mvua mukoseshe Yowanane mutu. Kadi muntu udi wenza malu andi ngumvua bayukila aa nnganyi? Uvua ujinga kumonangana ne Yezu. 
Luke9:10 Bapostolu ba Yezu kupingana kudiye, bamuambila bionsu bivuabu benze. Yezu kubangata, kuya nabu pa nkayabu pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Betsayida." 
Luke9:11 Kadi bantu kumanya bualu, kulonda Yezu. Ke Yezu kubakidila, kubalongesha malu a Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu, kujikija masama a bavua nawu." 
Luke9:12 Pakavua diba dibuela, balongi dikumi ne babidi kuya kudi Yezu, bamuambila ne: — Tangalaja bantu aba, baye mu misoku, nansha mu miaba mikuabu ya pabuipi, bakebe biakudia, ne muaba wa kulala, bualu tudi mu mpata." 
Luke9:13 Kadi Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nuenu mene nubapeshe biakudia. Balongi kumuandamuna ne: — Tudi amu ne mampa atanu ne mishipa ibidi. Kadi udi musue tuye kusumbila bantu bonsu aba biakudia anyi? 
Luke9:14 (Bualu muaba awu bantu balume bavua bu binunu bitanu.) Ke Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Nubambile basombe panshi. Ku tshisumbu tshionsu kuikale bantu bu makumi atanu. 
Luke9:15 Balongi kuitaba, kusombesha bantu bonsu panshi." 
Luke9:16 Yezu kuangata mampa atanu ne mishipa ibidi, kutangila mulu, kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila bua biakudia abi. Kubikosololaye, kutapa balongi, bua babiabanyine bantu." 
Luke9:17 Bonsu bavua badia, buukuta. Balongi kukunguja bivua bishale mu bibondu dikumi ne bibidi tente." 
Luke9:18 Dimue dituku Yezu uvua utendelela nkayende. Balongi bende kuya kudiye. Yezu kubakonka ne: — Bantu badi bangamba ne: ndi nganyi? 
Luke9:19 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Bakuabu badi bakuamba ne: udi Yowanane-Batiste. Banga badi bamba ne: udi Eliya. Bakuabu kabidi ne: udi umue wa ku bambi ba kale, mubiike ku lufu." 
Luke9:20 Ke Yezu kubakonka ne: — Kadi nuenu nudi nungamba ne: ndi nganyi? Ke Petro kumuandamuna ne: — Wewe udi Kristu, Musungidi wetu, uvua Mvidi Mukulu mutulaye." 
Luke9:21 Yezu uvua mukandike balongi bikole, bua kabambidi muntu nansha umue bualu ebu." 
Luke9:22 Kubambilaye kabidi ne: — Muana wa muntu neakenge bikole. Bakulu, batuangaji banene, ne balongeshi ba mikenji, nebamubenge, bamushipe. Kadi dituku disatu neabike ku lufu." 
Luke9:23 Kubambilaye kabidi bonsu ne: — Padi muntu musue kuya nanyi, kakebi amu bidi bimulengelela yeye. Ambule mutshi mutshiamakane ku dituku ku dituku, andonde." 
Luke9:24 Bualu muntu udi musue kusungila muoyi wende, neaujimije. Kadi wajimija muoyi wende bualu buanyi, neausungile." 
Luke9:25 Muntu nansha yeye mupete buloba bujima, bidi mua kumuenzela tshinyi padiye udijimija, nansha udibutula." 
Luke9:26 Pikala muntu umfua meme bundu, ubenga kuitaba patoke miaku yanyi, Muana wa muntu neamufue kabidi bundu, paluaye mu butumbi buende, ne mu butumbi bua Tatu, ne bua batumibue bende ba tshijila." 
Luke9:27 Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: bakuabu badi muaba ewu nebamone Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu, kabayi banji kufua." 
Luke9:28 Yezu mumane kuamba malu onsu aa, kupita lumingu, kuangataye Petro, Yowanane ne Yakobe, kubanda nabu ku mukuna bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke9:29 Patshivuaye utendelela, mpala wende kuandamuka, bilamba kukenka bikole, bibalakana." 
Luke9:30 Diakamue bantu babidi kumueneka muaba uvua Yezu, bayukila nende. Bavua Moshe ne Eliya," 
Luke9:31 bamuenekela mu butumbi bua mu diulu. Bavua bayukila ne Yezu mushindu uvuaye ne bua kutuila mu Yerushalayime, kukumbaja bivua Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Luke9:32 Petro ne binende bavua bapita ku tulu. Kadi bapapuka ku tulu, kumonabu butumbi bua Yezu, ne bantu babidi bavuaye nabu." 
Luke9:33 Pakavua bantu aba bumuka kudi Yezu, ke Petro kumuambila ne: — Mfumu, tudi ne disanka patudi tusomba apa. Nanku netuase tuzubu tua ntente tusatu, kamue kebe, kakuabu ka Moshe, kisatu ka Eliya. (Kavua mumanye tshivuaye wamba.)" 
Luke9:34 Patshivuaye wakula, divuba kumueneka, kubabuikila ne mundidimbi wadi. Balongi kukuatshika bowa." 
Luke9:35 Diyi kumvuika ku divuba, diamba ne: — Ewu mmuananyi umvua musungule, numuteleje!" 
Luke9:36 Diyi dimane kumvuika, balongi kumona amu Yezu nkayende. Kadi bobu kupuwa ne bualu abu. Tshikondu atshi ki mbalondele muntu mukuabu bivuabu bamone nansha." 
Luke9:37 Butshia nenku, Yezu ne balongi bende kutuluka ku mukuna. Bantu ba bungi bavua bafika bua kusambakena nende." 
Luke9:38 Muntu kampanda kuela mbila munkatshi muabu, wamba ne: — Mulongeshi, ndi nkusengelela ne: tangila muananyi wa balume. Ndi amu ne muana umue epele!" 
Luke9:39 Mukishi udi umukuata, umuelesha mbila tshimpitshimpi, umunyukula bikole, umupatuisha ntutu ku mishiku. Nanku udi umukengesha, kauyi musue kumushila muaba lukasa." 
Luke9:40 Mvua musengelele balongi bebe bua bipate mukishi awu, kadi bakapangila bualu!" 
Luke9:41 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nudi bantu babi! Ditaba kanuena nadi! Ndi ne bua kushala kabidi nenu matuku bungi munyi? Nendengulule malu enu too ne ku diba kaayi? Luaku ne muanebe apa. 
Luke9:42 Muana ufika, mukishi kumuela panshi, kumunyukula bikole. Kadi Yezu kukanyina mukishi mubi bikole, kujikija disama dia muana, kumupingaja kudi tatuende." 
Luke9:43 Bantu bonsu bavua bakema bukole budi Mvidi Mukulu nabu. Patshivua bantu bonsu bakema bionsu bivua Yezu muenze, kuambilaye balongi bende ne:" 
Luke9:44 — Nuvuluke bimpe tshindi nnuambila mpindiewu ne: nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia bantu. 
Luke9:45 Kadi balongi kabavua bajingulula tshi-vuaye muambe to. Bavua babasokoka malu aa bua kabumvu bimpe. Bavua batshina kabidi kukonka Yezu bualu ebu. 
Luke9:46 Balongi bavua belangana mpata munkatshi muabu bua kumanya ne: wa kutudi udi mupite bakuabu nnganyi? 
Luke9:47 Yezu kumanya mpata ivuabu bela. Nanku kuangataye muana, kumuimanyika pabuipi nende," 
Luke9:48 ubambila ne: — Muntu udi wakidila muana ewu mu dina dianyi, mmungakidile meme mene. Udi ungakidila meme, udi wakidila kabidi uvua muntume. Bualu udi mushadile kunudi nuenu bonsu, ke udi mupite bonsu mene." 
Luke9:49 Yowanane kuamba ne: — Mfumu, tuvua bamone muntu wipata mikishi mibi mu dina diebe. Tuvua bamukandike, bualu ki ngwa ku tshisumbu tshietu to." 
Luke9:50 Kadi Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Kanumukandiki nansha, bualu udi kayi unubenga, ke wenu!" 
Luke9:51 Matuku avuabu ne bua kuya ne Yezu mu diulu akavua pabuipi. Ke Yezu kushindika bua kuya ku Yerushalayime. 
Luke9:52 Kutumaye bantu kumpala kuende. Kuyabu mu musoku wa bena Samariya, bua kumukebelamu muaba wa kulala." 
Luke9:53 Kadi bantu aba bakabenga kuakidila Yezu, bualu uvua uya mu Yerushalayime." 
Luke9:54 Balongi bende Yakobe ne Yowanane bamona nanku, kuambabu ne: — Mfumu, udi musue tutume diyi mu diulu, kapia kapueke, kababutule anyi?" 
Luke9:55 Yezu kubatangila, kubatandisha." 
Luke9:56 Nanku kuyabu mu musoku mukuabu. 
Luke9:57 Pavuabu mu njila, muntu kampanda kuambila Yezu ne: — Nenkulonde kuonsu kuudi uya." 
Luke9:58 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Nyama ya mibuabua idi ne miaba ya kulala, nyunyi ya mulu idi ne masua. Kadi Muana wa muntu kena ne muaba wa kulala, nansha wa kuikisha." 
Luke9:59 Yezu kuambila muntu mukuabu ne: — Undonde meme. Kadi muntu awu kuamba ne: — Mfumu, witabe bua nganji kuya kujika tatu." 
Luke9:60 Ke Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Kuenji nanku to! Bafue bajike bafue nabu. Kadi wewe uye kulongesha malua Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. 
Luke9:61 Muntu mukuabu kabidi kuamba ne: — Mfumu, nenkulonde. Kadi witabe, nganji kuya kulayangana ne bena diku dietu." 
Luke9:62 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Tshidime udi ukuata lukasu mu bianza, utangila kunyima kuende, Mvidi Mukulu kena mua kukuata nende mudimu mu Bukalenga buende." 
Luke10:1 Ke Mfumu kusungula balongi bakuabu makumi muanda mutekete ne babidi. Uvua ubatuma babidi babidi, bua badianjile kumpala kuende mu bimenga bionsu, ne miaba mikuabu yonsu, bivuaye ne bua kuya." 
Luke10:2 Kubambilaye ne: — Bintu bia kunowa mbivule, kadi banowi mbakese. Nanku lombayi mfumu wa madimi, bua atume banowi bakumbane mu budimi buende." 
Luke10:3 Nuye! Ndi nnutuma bu bana ba mikoku munkatshi mua nkashama. 
Luke10:4 Kanuangatshi tshibuta tshia makuta, nansha tshia luendu, nansha bisabata. Kanuimanyi mu njila bua kuela muntu muoyi." 
Luke10:5 Panudi nubuela mu nzubu, nudianze kuamba ne: “Bupole buikale mu nzubu emu!”" 
Luke10:6 Pikala muntu wa bupole usombamu, bupole buenu nebushale kudiye. Kadi pikala muntu wa bupole kayimu, bupole buenu nebupingane kunudi." 
Luke10:7 Nushale mu nzubu awu, nudie, nunue bianupeshabu. Bualu muena mudimu badi ne bua kumufuta. Kanusambi nzubu." 
Luke10:8 Panuabuela mu tshimenga, banuakidila, nudiemu bidibu banupa." 
Luke10:9 Nujikijile babeedi badimu masama abu. Nubambile ne: “Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu bukadi pabuipi nenu.” 
Luke10:10 Kadi nuenu babuele mu tshimenga, bantu babenga kunuakidila, nuendakane mu misesu yatshi, nuambe ne:" 
Luke10:11 “Tudi tunutuila lupuishi lua mu tshimenga tshienu luvua lubakuate ku makasa. Kadi numanye amu ne: Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu bukadi bumane kusemena pabuipi nenu.” 
Luke10:12 Ndi nnujadikila ne: dituku didi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu, kakunyoka bena Sodome, mudiye ne bua kunyoka bena tshimenga atshi nansha." 
Luke10:13 Wewe Korazine, udi muena diakabi! Wewe Betsayida, udi muena diakabi! Bualu malu a dikema adibu banuenzela nuenu, bu bobu bawenzele bena Tire ne bena Sidone, bena bimenga ebi bavua mua kusomba panshi musangu umue, kuvuala bilamba bikayapale, kudilaba butu mu mutu, bua kuleja ne: tudi basue kudilengeja." 
Luke10:14 Dituku didi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu, kakunyoka Tire ne Sidone bikole, mudiye ne bua kununyoka nuenu nansha." 
Luke10:15 Wewe Kefamawume, udi wela meji ne: neubande mu diulu anyi? Nansha kakese! Nebakuele mu kandondu ka bafue." 
Luke10:16 Ke Yezu kuambila kabidi balongi bende ne: — Muntu udi unuteleja, udi unteleja meme. Muntu udi unubenga, udi umbenga meme. Kadi muntu udi umbenga, udi ubenga ne Tatu uvua muntume." 
Luke10:17 Balongi makumi muanda mutekete ne babidi kupingana kudi Yezu ne disanka divule, bamba ne: — Mfumu, nansha mikishi mibi mene ivua itumikila diyi dietu, patuvua tuyitumina diyi mu dina diebe!" 
Luke10:18 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Mvua mumone diabolu ukuluka mu diulu bu muele wa mvula. 
Luke10:19 Telejayi: mvua munupeshe bumfumu bua nudiate nyoka ne tuminyimynyi, ne bua nutshimune bukole buonsu bua muluishi. Kakuena tshintu tshianuenzela bibi." 
Luke10:20 Kadi kanusanki nangananga bualu mikishi mibi idi inutumikila. Nusanke amu, bualu mbamane kufunda mena enu mu diulu." 
Luke10:21 Diba adi Yezu kuwula ne disanka dia kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kuamba ne: — Tatu, Mfumu wa diulu ne buloba, ndi nkuela tuasakidila, bualu udi mumanyishe bantu bashadile malu, audi musokoke bena meji, ne bantu bavua balonge mikanda. Eyowa, Tatu, ke muuvua musue ne: bienzeke nanku!" 
Luke10:22 “Tatu wanyi mmumpeshe bintu bionsu. Kakuena muntu udi mumanye Muana, anu Tatu nkayende. Kakuena muntu udi mumanye Tatu, anu Muana nkayende, kabidi ne bantu badi Muana musue kumanyisha Tatuende.”" 
Luke10:23 Ke Yezu kutangila balongi bende, ubambila bobu nkayabu ne: — Nuenu nudi bena diakalenga, bualu nudi badimuene malu onsu aa." 
Luke10:24 Bualu ndi nnujadikila ne: Bambi ba bungi ne bakalenga ba matunga bavua bajinga kumona binudi numona, kadi kabavua babimone nansha. Bavua bajinga kabidi kumvua binudi numvua, kadi kabavua babiumvue nansha." 
Luke10:25 Ke mulongeshi wa mikenji kufika kudi Yezu, kumuela lukonku bua kumuteya, wamba ne: — Mulongeshi, bua kupeta muoyi wa kashidi, ngenze tshinyi?" 
Luke10:26 Yezu kumuela kabidi lukonku ne: — Mu mikenji yetu mbafunde tshinyi? Tshiudi ubalamu ntshinyi? 
Luke10:27 Muntu awu kumuandamuna ne: — “Nanga Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe muebe muonsu, ne muoyi webe mujima, ne bukole buebe buonsu, kabidi ne lungenyi luebe luonsu. Nanga kabidi mukuebe muudi mudinange wewe mene. ”" 
Luke10:28 Ke Yezu kumuambila ne: — Udi muandamune bimpe. Enza nanku, newikale ne muoyi." 
Luke10:29 Kadi mulongeshi wa mikenji uvua musue kuleja Yezu ne: lukonku luanyi luvua pa bualu. Ke kuebejaye Yezu ne: — Mukuetu nnganyi? 
Luke10:30 Ke Yezu kumuelela lusumuinu elu ne: — Kuvua muntu ufuma ku Yerushalayime, upueka ku Yeriko. Bivi kumuluisha, kumuvula bilamba bua kuiba bivuaye nabi, kumutuuta, kumushiya panshi mufue tshipuka." 
Luke10:31 Kuvua mutuangaji upueka mu mpukapuka ne njila awu. Kumonaye muntu awu, kusesukaye, kuya." 
Luke10:32 Muena Levi momumue kufika muaba awu, kusemena pabuipi. Umona amu muntu awu, kusesukaye, kuya." 
Luke10:33 Kadi muena Samariya kampanda uvua upitshila mu njila awu. Kufikaye muaba uvua muntu awu. Umumona, luse kumukuata bikole." 
Luke10:34 Kuyaye kudiye. Kuelaye mafuta ne nwinyo mu mputa yende, kusuika. Pashishekumutekaye pa nyama wende, kumufila ku nzubu wa tshilala benyi, bua bamulamemu mu dina diende." 
Luke10:35 Butshia kupeshaye muena nzubu wa tshilala benyi nkanu ibidi ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, umuambila ne: “Ukube muntu ewu bimpe, bamuondape. Makuta onsu awikala mutule mapite pa mutu, meme nenkupingajilewu pangapingena apa.”" 
Luke10:36 Ke Yezu kumukonka ne: — Udi wamba bishi? Ku basatu aba muntu uvua muleje mudiye mukuende wa uvuabu baluisha kudi bivi aba nnganyi?
