Luke10:37 Mulongeshi wa mikenji kuandamuna Yezu ne: — Anu muntu uvua mumuambuluishe awu. Ke Yezu kumuambila ne: — Uye, wenze amu nanku." 
Luke10:38 Yezu ne balongi bende kutungunuka ne luendu. Ke Yezu kubuela mu musoku kampanda. Mukaji, dina diende Marte, kumuakidila kuende." 
Luke10:39 Mukaji awu uvua ne muanabu, diende Mariya. Ke Mariya kuya kusomba ku makasa a Mfumu, uteleja bivuaye ulongesha." 
Luke10:40 Marte uvua usumpakana amu ne midimu ya bungi ya ku nzubu. Kuyaye kudi Yezu, umuambila ne: — Mfumu, padi muanetu wa bakaji undekela midimu yonsu nkayanyi, kabiena bikutonda anyi? Umuambile bua angambuluishe!" 
Luke10:41 Mfumu kumuandamuna ne: — Marte, Marte, udi ulubakana, utata bua malu a bungi." 
Luke10:42 Kadi kudi bualu bumuepele bunudi nukengela. Mariya mmusungule tshidi tshipite buimpe, tshidibu kabayi mua kumunyenga." 
Luke11:1 Dituku dikuabu Yezu uvua utendelela muaba kampanda. Ujikija, umue wa ku balongi bende kumuebeja ne: — Mfumu, ubilongeshe mutudi mua kutendelela, muvua Yowanane mulongeshe balongi bende." 
Luke11:2 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Panudi nutendelela, nuambe ne: “Tatu, bantu bonsu batumbishe dina diebe dia tshijila. Bukalenga buebe bufike." 
Luke11:3 Utupe ku dituku ku dituku tshiakudia tshitudi tukengela. 
Luke11:4 Utulekele bilema bietu, mutudi balekele bonsu bavua batuenzela bibi. Kuanyishi bua batutete, tukuvile.”" 
Luke11:5 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Ambayi tumone. Umue wa kunudi, yeye muye kua mulunda wende mundankulu mua butuku, umuambila ne: “Mulunda wanyi, unsombeshe mampa asatu." 
Luke11:6 Bualu muenyi mmufike kuanyi, ufuma ku luendu. Tshiena ne tshia kumulambila nansha.”" 
Luke11:7 Kadi mukuabu awu mu nzubu kumuandamuna ne: “Umfuile luse! Kumbelu nkukanga. Bana banyi ne meme tukadi bamane kulala. Tshiena ne mushindu wa kujuka, kukupesha mampa to.”" 
Luke11:8 Kadi meme ndi nnujadikila ne: nansha yeye kayi ujuka bua kumupeshawu, bualu mmulunda wende, kadi neajuke bua kumupesha bionsu bidiye ukengela, bualu mulunda wende udi unanukila ne dimulomba, kayi ufua bundu." 
Luke11:9 Nanku meme ndi nnuambila ne: lombayi, nenupete; kebayi, nenumone; kokolayi ku tshiibi, nebanunzuluile." 
Luke11:10 Bualu muntu yonsu udi ulomba tshintu, udi utshipeta. Udi ukeba, udi umona. Udi ukokola ku tshiibi, badi bamunzuluila." 
Luke11:11 Nuenu nudi batatu. Nganyi wa kunudi udi mua kupesha muanende nyoka, padiye ulomba mushipa;" 
Luke11:12 nansha kumupesha kaminyiminyi, padiye ulomba diyi?" 
Luke11:13 Nanku nuenu bantu babi, nudi bamanye mua kupesha bana benu bintu bia nsongu. Mudi Tatu wa mu diulu mua kubenga kupesha bantu Mueyelu wa Tshijila udibu balomba mbishi?" 
Luke11:14 Yezu utshivua wipata mukishi mubi uvuamutulukile muntu, mumushiye kamama. Mukishi mubi mumane kupatuka, kamama kuakula bimpe. Bantu kukema bikole." 
Luke11:15 Kadi bantu bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — Belzebule mfumu wa mikishi mibi, ke udi upesha muntu awu bukole bua kuipata mikishi mibi eyi!" 
Luke11:16 Bantu bakuabu bavua basue kuteta Yezu. Kumulombabu bua enze tshishima tshidi mua kujadika mudi bumfumu buende bufume kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
Luke11:17 Kadi Yezu uvua mumanye meji avuabu bela. Nanku kubambilaye ne: — Bukalenga buonsu budi benabu baluishangana nkayabu, nebunyanguke lukasa. Nzubu yabu neyupuke." 
Luke11:18 Pikala diabolu udiluisha nkayende, bukalenga buende nebutungunuke munyi? Bualu nudi nuamba ne: Belzebule mmukupeshe bukole bua kuipata nabu mikishi mibi." 
Luke11:19 Meme ngipata mikishi mibi ku bukole bua Belzebule, kadi bena dienu udi ubapesha bukole bua kuyipata nnganyi? Nanku bena dienu mene badi bajadika munudi nutupakana." 
Luke11:20 Kadi meme ndi ngipata mikishi mibi amu ku bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu. Ke bidi bileja ne: Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu mbumane kufika kunudi. 
Luke11:21 “Padi tshilobu ne bia mvita mu bianza, ulama nzubu wende, bintu bionsu bidiye nabi bidi amu katakata." 
Luke11:22 Kadi padi muntu udi mumupite dikanda ufika, umutshimuna, udi umunyenga bia mvita bivuaye mutekemene. Udi wabanya kabidi bionsu bidiye mupawule." 
Luke11:23 “Udi kayi mutue ku tshianyi, mmumbenge. Udi kayi ungambuluisha bua kukungija mikoku, udi uyitangalaja." 
Luke11:24 “Diba didi mukishi mubi mumane kupatuka munda mua muntu, udi utambakana miaba miume, ukeba muaba wa kuikisha. Padiwu kauyi upeta muaba, udi wela meji ne: ‘Nempingane mu nzubu umvua mushiye.’" 
Luke11:25 Udi umupingana, usangana nzubu mukomba, utulongolola bimpe." 
Luke11:26 Udi uya kuangata mikishi mikuabu muanda mutekete idi mimupite ku bubi. Udi upingana nayi pamue, isomba mu nzubu amu. Nanku bubi bua muntu ewu mpindiewu budi bupite buende bua kale.”" 
Luke11:27 Yezu utshivua wakula, ke mukaji kuela diyi munkatshi mua bantu, wamba Yezu ne: — Mamu uvua mukulele, mukuamushe, ngwa diakalenga!" 
Luke11:28 Kadi Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — To! Badi bateleja muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, baukumbaja, ke bena diakalenga!" 
Luke11:29 Bantu bavule bavua bunguila Yezu. Ke Yezu kuamba ne: — Bena lelu mbantu babi. Badi balomba bua Mvidi Mukulu abajadikile malu ne tshishima. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu neabajadikile malu amu muvuaye muenze mu tshikondu tshia muambi Yona. 
Luke11:30 Bualu bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu utuma Yona kudi bena Ninive, bua kubaleja tshivuaye ujinga, ke mudiye utuma Muana wa muntu kudi bena lelu." 
Luke11:31 Dituku didi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu, mukalenga mukaji wa mu ditunga dia kuinshi, neimane kumpala kua bena lelu, abadiwule. Bualu uvua mufume ku ditunga dia kule bua kuteleja mibelu ya meji ya kudi Shelomu. Kadi patudi apa padi muntu mupite Shelomu!" 
Luke11:32 Dituku didi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu, bena Ninive nebadiwule bena lelu. Bualu bena Ninive bavua badilengeja, pavuabu bumvua muambi Yona ubalongesha. Kadi patudi apa padi muntu mupite Yona!" 
Luke11:33 — Kabena batemesha muendu bua kuusokoka nansha kuubuikila muinshi mua kapanza. Kadi badi bauteka pa tshitekelu tshiawu, bua ukenkeshe bonsu badi babuela mu nzubu." 
Luke11:34 Mesu ebe adi bu muendu wa mubidi webe. Padi mesu ebe amona bimpe, mubidi webe mujima udi patoke. Kadi pikala mesu ebe kaayi amona bimpe, mubidi webe udi mu miidima." 
Luke11:35 Nanku udimuke bua butoke budi munda muebe kabuikadi miidima. 
Luke11:36 Padi mubidi webe mujima mu butoke, kauyi mu miidima kaba nansha kamue, newikale mu butoke wonsu mujima, bu padi muendu ukutokesha ne nkenke yawu." 
Luke11:37 Yezu utshivua wakula, ke Muparushe mukuabu kumubikila bua kudiaye kuende. Yezu kubuela mu nzubu muende, kusomba ku mesa." 
Luke11:38 Kadi Muparushe uvua ukema bikole, bualu Yezu uvua udia kayi muanji kuowa bianza." 
Luke11:39 Ke Mfumu kumuamba ne: — Ke munudi nuenu Baparushe: nudi nusukula dikopu nansha dilongu panyima, kadi munda muenu mudi muwule tente ne lukuka lua bivi, kabidi ne tshikisu." 
Luke11:40 Nudi bantu batatakane! Mvidi Mukulu uvua muenze panyima, ki ngudi muenze kabidi munda anyi?" 
Luke11:41 Peshayi bapele bidi mu makopu ne mu malongu enu. Nanku malu enu onsu neakane! 
Luke11:42 “Nuenu Baparushe, nudi bena diakabi! Nudi nulambula tshia dikumi tshia bia mu madimi enu, tshia tshiluabenyi, tshia tshikote, nansha tshia bisekiseki bishilangane bikuabu. Kadi kanuena basue kuenzela bantu bimpe, nansha kunanga Mvidi Mukulu. Ke binuvua ne bua kuenza ebi, kanuyi nulengulula bikuabu abi." 
Luke11:43 “Nuenu Baparushe, nudi bena diakabi! Nudi basue kusomba mu nkuasa ya kumpala mu nzubu ya ditendelela. Nudi banange kabidi bua bantu banuele mioyi ya kanemu mu bisalu." 
Luke11:44 Nudi bena diakabi! Bualu nudi bu nkita idibu kabatshiyi bamona, bayidiata kabayi bamanye!”" 
Luke11:45 Mulongeshi mukuabu wa mikenji kumuamba ne: — Mulongeshi, udi utupenda ne tuetu, paudi wamba nanku!" 
Luke11:46 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Nuenu kabidi balongeshi ba mikenji, nudi bena diakabi! Nudi nuambuisha bantu majitu manene panyima. Kadi nuenu kanuena malenga nansha munu umue." 
Luke11:47 Nudi bena diakabi! Nudi nuibakila bambi bavua bankambua benu bashipe nkita mimpe. 
Luke11:48 Ke munudi nuleja munudi banyishe malu avua bankambua benu benze. Bobu bavua bashipe bambi! Nuenu kuibaka nkita yabu! 
Luke11:49 Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu mudianze kuamba ne: “Nembatumine bambi ne bapostolu. Nebashipe bamue ba kudibu, bakengesha bakuabu.”" 
Luke11:50 Kadi nebanyoke bena lelu bua bambi bonsu bavuabu bashipe, biangatshile ku tshibangidilu tshia buloba," 
Luke11:51 kutuadija ku Abele too ne ku Zekarya, uvuabu bashipe pankatshi pa tshilambuilu ne muaba wa tshijila. Eyowa, ndi nnujadikila ne: nebanyoke bena lelu, bua bantu bonsu bavuabu bashipe aba!" 
Luke11:52 Nuenu balongeshi ba mikenji, nudi bena diakabi! Bualu nudi bumushe nsapi idibu mua kunzulula nayi tshiibi tshia muaba wa kumanya malu. Nuenu mene kanuena numubuela. Kadi nudi nukandika kabidi badi bajinga kubuelamu." 
Luke11:53 Yezu mumane kupatuka mu nzubu amu, balongeshi ba mikenji ne Baparushe kumufikila munda bikole, kumuela nkonku ya mishindu yonsu." 
Luke11:54 Bavua bakeba kumuteya, bua bamujikile ulongesha malu adi kaayi malelela." 
Luke12:1 Diba adi bantu bavua bunguile binunu ne binunu, badiatangana pa makasa. Ke Yezu kudianza kuambila balongi bende ne: — Dimukayi bua buanga bua mampa budi Baparushe nabu; momumue ne: bua budingidingi buabu." 
Luke12:2 Bualu buonsu budi busokome, nebumueneke patoke. Bualu budi bantu kabayi bamanye, nebabumanye!" 
Luke12:3 Nanku bionsu binuvua bambe mu miidima, nebabiakule mu munya patoke. Bualu bunuikala banungajangana ku ditshi mu nzubu, bakanga tshiibi, nebabuele mbila ku misonga ya nzubu." 
Luke12:4 — Nuenu balunda banyi, ndi nnuambila ne: kanutshinyi bantu, bualu badi bashipa amu mubidi, kabayi mua kuenza bualu bukuabu." 
Luke12:5 Ndi nnuleja unudi ne bua kutshina: nutshine Mvidi Mukulu, bualu Yeye, kunyima kua lufu, udi ne bumfumu bua kukuela mu kandondu ka bafue. Ndi nnuambila ne: numutshine amu Yeye!" 
Luke12:6 “Kabena basumbisha nyunyi ya mishamisha itanu ku makuta makese anyi? Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kena upua nansha umue wa ku yoyi muoyi to. 
Luke12:7 Nansha nsuki yenu yonsu mbayibadike. Nanku kanutshinyi! Nudi bapite tshisumbu tshia nyunyi ya mishamisha ku mushinga.” 
Luke12:8 — Ndi nnuambila ne: muntu yonsu udi wambila bantu patoke ne: Ndi ngitaba Muana wa muntu, meme kabidi kumpala kua batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu nengitabe ne: muntu ewu ngwanyi!" 
Luke12:9 Kadi muntu yonsu udi unwila kumpala kua bantu, Muana wa muntu neamuvile kabidi kumpala kua batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke12:10 “Muntu yonsu udi usendeka Muana wa muntu, nebamufuile luse. Kadi udi usendeka Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kabakumufuila luse to." 
Luke12:11 “Panufilabu mu nzubu ya ditendelela ya bena Yuda, nansha kumpala kua balombodi ne bamfumu, bua banulumbuluishe, kanupampakanyi bua mushindu unudi mua kudilumbuluila, nansha bua binudi ne bua kuamba." 
Luke12:12 Bualu diba adi Mueyelu wa Tshijila neanumanyishe tshinudi ne bua kuamba.” 
Luke12:13 Muntu mukuabu munkatshi mua bantu kuambila Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi, ambila muanetu tuabanyangane biuma bivua tatu mutushile." 
Luke12:14 Ke Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Muntu, udi munteke munukosedi wa nsambu, ne muabanyinyi wa biuma bienu nnganyi?" 
Luke12:15 Pashishe Yezu kuambila bantu bonsu ne: — Nudimuke. Kanuteki muoyi ku biuma. Bualu muntu kena ne muoyi bualu bua biuma, nansha yeye nabi bivule!" 
Luke12:16 Nanku Yezu kubelela lusumuinu elu ne: — Kuvua mubanji uvua munowe bintu bia bungi pa madimi ende. 
Luke12:17 Uvua udiebeja mundamunda ne: “Nengenze tshinyi? Bualu tshiena ne mayeba a kulamina bia mu madimi bianyi bionsu to.” 
Luke12:18 Kuambaye ne: “Ndi musue kuenza nenku: nengupule mayeba anyi a kale. Nengase makuabu mapite bunene. Nentekelemu ntete yanyi yonsu ya kuenza bukula, kabidi ne bintu bianyi bikuabu bionsu." 
Luke12:19 Nengambe ne: Disanka kaayi! Ndi ne bintu bivule bidi mua kungambuluisha bidimu ne bidimu. Mpindiewu ndi mua kuikisha, kudia, kunua, kuondoloka.”" 
Luke12:20 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: “Udi muntu mutshimbakane! Butuku ebu neufue! Kadi bintu biuvua mudilamine, nebishale bia nganyi?”" 
Luke12:21 Ke Yezu kuamba kabidi ne: — Ke bidi bienzekela muntu udi uditekela biuma nkayende, kayi mubanji kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Luke12:22 Pashishe Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Ke pandi nnuambila ne: kanutatshi bua biakudia binudi nabi dijinga, nansha bua bivualu bidi mubidi wenu ukengela." 
Luke12:23 Bualu nudi nupita biakudia ku mushinga, kabidi mubidi wenu mmupite bilamba ku mushinga." 
Luke12:24 Tentekelayi nyunyi ya bikololu. Kayena ikuna maminu, kayena inowa. Kayena ne mayeba, nansha muaba mukuabu wa kulamina biakudia. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi uyidisha. Nuenu nudi bapite nyunyi ku mushinga bikole!" 
Luke12:25 Nganyi wa kunudi, nansha yeye mutate bishi, udi mua kusakidila nansha dituku dimue ku matuku ende a panu?" 
Luke12:26 Nanku panuikala kanuyi mua kukumbaja kalu kakese ka mushindu ewu, munudi nutata bua malu makuabu mbishi?" 
Luke12:27 Monayi mudi bilongu bitoloka mu madimi. Kabiena bikuata mudimu. Kabiena bikuma bilamba. Kadi ndi nnuambila ne: nansha Shelomu ne bubanji buende buonsu, kabavua bamuvuadika ne bilenga bia mushindu umue ne bia tshimue tshia mu bilongu ebi." 
Luke12:28 Kadi pikala Mvidi Mukulu uvuadika nanku bisosa bidi lelu mu mpata, butshia babiosha, mudiye kayi mua kunuvuadika mmunyi? Nudi ne ditaba dikese be!" 
Luke12:29 Kanupampakanyi. Kanutatshi amu bua biakudia, nansha bua biakunua." 
Luke12:30 Bualu bantu badi kabayi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu bimpe, ke badi bapite kukeba bia nanku. Kadi nuenu, nudi ne Tatu wenu udi mumanye munudi nubijinga." 
Luke12:31 Kebayi nangananga Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku Yeye neanupeshe bikuabu abi. 
Luke12:32 — Nudi amu kasumbu kakese. Kadi kanutshinyi nansha! Bualu Tatu wenu mmusue kunupa Bukalenga. 
Luke12:33 Nupane bintu bienu, nupeshe bapele makuta anuapeta. Kebayi mua kupeta bibuta bidi kabiyi binyanguka. Kungujayi bubanji mu diulu, mudibu kabuyi bujimina. Muamua bivi kabena mua kubuangata. Misanda kayena mua kubunyanga." 
Luke12:34 Bualu misangu yonsu muoyi wenu udi muaba unudi nuteka bubanji buenu. 
Luke12:35 — Shalayi balongame. Nudisuike mikaba mu tshimonu. Ambulayi miendu yenu mitemesha. 
Luke12:36 Nuikale bafuanangane ne bena mudimu badi bindila mfumuabu, diba didiye ufuma ku didia dia dibaka. Padiye ukokola, badi bamunzuluila tshiibi diakamue." 
Luke12:37 Bena mudimu aba badi ne diakalenga, padi mfumu ubasangana batabale. Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: Mfumu neavuale tshilamba tshia mudimu. Neabasombeshe ku mesa, bua kubabanyina biakudia ku muntu ku muntu." 
Luke12:38 Nansha yeye mufike mundankulu mua butuku, nansha patshiatshia, badi ne diakalenga, pikalaye ubasangana batabale nanku." 
Luke12:39 Manyayi ne: bu mfumu wa nzubu mumanye diba didi muivi mua kufika, kena mua kuitaba bua apande nzubu." 
Luke12:40 Shalayi balongame nuenu kabidi, bualu Muana wa muntu neafike pa diba dinudi kanuyi bela meji." 
Luke12:41 Ke Petro kuebeja Yezu ne: — Mfumu, lusumuinu elu udi mutuelele tuetu nkayetu anyi bantu bonsu?" 
Luke12:42 Mfumu kumuandamuna ne: — Muena mudimu muimpe wa meji nnganyi? Se mmuntu udi mfumuende uteka ku mudimu wa kulama nzubu, ne wa kupesha bena mudimu biakudia diba diakane." 
Luke12:43 Muena mudimu wa nanku udi ne diakalenga, padi mfumu ufika, umusangana ukuata mudimu." 
Luke12:44 Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: mfumu neamupeshe bulami bua bintu biende bionsu. 
Luke12:45 Kadi pikala muena mudimu awu wamba mundamunda muende ne: “Mfumuanyi kakupingana lukasa to,” utuadija kutuuta bena mudimu nende balume ne bakaji, udia, unua ukuatshika," 
Luke12:46 mfumuende neafike dituku didi muena mudimu awu kayi muelaku meji, ne diba didiye kayi mumanye. Nanku mfumuende neamunyoke bikole, neamuteke muaba wa baluishi ba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke12:47 Muena mudimu udi mumanye bidi mfumuende musue, kadi ubenga kudilongolola bua kubikumbaja, nebamutuute bikole." 
Luke12:48 Kadi muena mudimu udi wenza malu makanyina dinyoka, kayi mumanye tshidi mfumuende musue, nebamutuute kakese. Muntu muabu bapeshe bia bungi, nebamulombe bia bungi. Uvuabu bambike bia bungi, nebamulombe bipite." 
Luke12:49 — Ndi mufike pa buloba ne kapia. Ndi musue kateme amu mpindiewu. 
Luke12:50 Badi ne bua kuntua mu mayi. Nenkenge bikole, too ne ku diba diakumbana bualu ebu." 
Luke12:51 Nudi nuela meji ne: ndi mufike bua kufila bupole pa buloba anyi? Too! ndi nnuambila ne: ndi mufike bua kupandulula bantu. 
Luke12:52 Kutuadijila ku mpindiewu, padi bantu batanu basomba mu diku dimue nebatapulukangane, basatu babenga babidi, babidi babenga basatu." 
Luke12:53 Tatu neabenge muanende wa balume, muana neabenge tatu. Mamu neabenge muanende wa bakaji, muana neabenge mamuende. Mamuenu neabenge mukaji wa muanende, mukaji wa muana neabenge mamuenende." 
Luke12:54 Yezu uvua wambila bantu kabidi ne: — Diba dinudi numona divuba dibanda ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, nudi nuamba diakamue ne: “Mvula nealoke.” Ke mudibi bienzeka nanku." 
Luke12:55 Diba dinudi numvua lupepele lutuuta lufuma kuinshi kua ditunga, nudi nuamba ne: “Munya newikale mukole.” Ke mudibi bienzeka." 
Luke12:56 Kadi nudi bena mpala ibidi! Nudi mua kujingulula bidi bienzeka pa buloba ne mulu. Kadi munudi kanuyi nujingulula bidi bienzeka lelu mbishi? 
Luke12:57 — Munudi kanuyi mua kujingulula nkayenu binudi ne bua kuenza mmunyi? 
Luke12:58 Padi muntu ukufunda ku tshilumbu, nuya nende pamue ku tshilumbuluilu, enza muebe muonsu bua numvuangane nende, panutshidi mu njila. Kuyi wenza nanku, muena lukuna nebe neakufikishe kudi mukoshi wa nsambu. Awu pende neakufile kudi mufutshishi wa bibawu, bua akueleshe mu nzubu wa lukanu." 
Luke12:59 Ndi nkujadikila ne: kuakupatukamu, amu wewe mufute dibanza dionsu." 
Luke13:1 Diba adi bamue bantu kufika kudi Yezu, bamuambila muvua Pilate mushipeshe bena Ngalileya, diba divuabu balambula Mvidi Mukulu milambu yabu. Mashi abu kubonkana ne mashi a nyama ya milambu." 
Luke13:2 Yezu kubebeja ne: — Nudi nuela meji ne: bena Ngalileya aba bavua babashipe mushindu ewu, bualu bavua bantu babi bapite bena Ngalileya bakuabu bonsu ku bubi anyi?" 
Luke13:3 Nansha kakese! Kadi ndi nnuambila ne: panudi kanuyi nudilengeja, nenufue bonsu momumue!" 
Luke13:4 Bantu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, bavua kaleya ka Silowa kupukila, kashipa, nudi nuela meji ne: ke bavua babi bapite bantu bakuabu bonsu ba mu Yerushalayime ku bubi anyi?" 
Luke13:5 Nansha kakese! Kadi ndi nnuambila ne: panuikala kanuyi nudilengeja, nenufue bonsu momumue!" 
Luke13:6 Ke Yezu kubelela lusumuinu elu ne: — Muntu mukuabu uvua mukune mutshi wa mfiku mu budimi buende bua nwinyo. Kuyaye ku mutshi aku bua kupola bimuma. Kadi kavua mubisangane to. 
Luke13:7 Kuambilaye muena mudimu wa mu budimi abu ne: “Mona: kukadi bidimu bisatu bindi mfika anu ku mutshi eku bua kupola bimuma. Kadi tshiena mubipete to. Nanku upula mutshi ewu, bualu udi unyanga buloba tshianana.”" 
Luke13:8 Kadi muena mudimu awu kumuandamuna ne: “Mfumu, bu wewe musue, mutshi wanji kushala kabidi tshidimu etshi. Nengumbule kuinshi kuawu nseke yonsu. Nenkuele bufuke." 
Luke13:9 Bumue udi mua kukuama bimuma tshidimu tshialonda. Pikalawu kauyi mukuame, diba adi neuukoseshe!”" 
Luke13:10 Dituku dikuabu dia Dikisha, Yezu uvua ulongesha mu nzubu kampanda wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda." 
Luke13:11 Mu nzubu amu muvua mukaji usama. Mukishi mubi uvua mumukuate bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu. Mamu awu mua wenda mukobama, kayi mua kuololoka nansha kakese." 
Luke13:12 Yezu umona mukaji awu, kumubikilaye, umuamba ne: — Mukaji, bulema buebe buakujika!" 
Luke13:13 Yezu kumutenteka bianza. Diakamue mukaji kuololoka, kutuadija kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke13:14 Kadi mfumu wa nzubu wa kutendelela kufika munda, bualu Yezu mua mujikije disama dia mamu awu dituku dia Dikisha. Ke kuambilaye bantu ne: — Kudi matuku asambombu anudi mua kukuata mudimu. Nufike bua kujikija masama a bantu matuku awu, kadi ki ndituku dia Dikisha nansha!" 
Luke13:15 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Nudi bena mpala ibidi! Dituku dia Dikisha, nuenu bonsu kanutu nusulula nyama wa ngombe nansha mpunde bua kumufila ku mayi anyi?" 
Luke13:16 Kadi mukaji ewu mmuntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Abrahame, mua diabolu mukuate bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu. Nanku kabavua mua kumusulula mionji eyi dituku dia Dikisha anyi?" 
Luke13:17 Pavua Yezu wamba nanku, baluishi bende bonsu kumvua bundu. Kadi bantu bakuabu bavua basanka bonsu bua malu mimpe onsu avua Yezu muenze aa." 
Luke13:18 Yezu kuamba ne: — Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu mbufuanangane ne tshinyi? Ndi mua kubufuanyikija ne tshinyi? 
Luke13:19 mBufuanangane ne lutete lua mutshi wa lusanga, luvua muntu mukune mu budimu buende. Lolu kutoloka, mutshi kukola. Nyunyi kuibakila masua ayi mu matamba amu." 
Luke13:20 Yezu kuamba kabidi ne: — Ndi mua kufuanyikija Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu ne tshinyi? 
Luke13:21 mBufuanangane ne buanga bua mampa budi mukaji usambakaja ne bukula bua kilo makumi abidi ne itanu, too ne patuntumuka ditapi dionsu." 
Luke13:22 Mu luendu luende lua kuya ku Yerushalayime, Yezu uvua upitshila mu bimenga ne mu misoku, wenda ulongesha bantu." 
Luke13:23 Muntu kampanda kumuebeja ne: — Mfumu, bantu badi mua kupanda, mbakese anyi? Yezu kumuandamuna ne:" 
Luke13:24 Enzayi muenu muonsu bua nubuele ku tshiibi tshibulakane. Bualu ndi nnujadikila ne: bantu ba bungi nebakebe kubuela, kadi kabakubuela to." 
Luke13:25 “Padi mfumu wa nzubu ujuka bua kukanga tshiibi, nuenu nenuikale pambelu, nukokola ku tshiibi, nuamba ne: ‘Mfumu, utunzuluile!’ Kadi mfumu neanuandamune ne: ‘Tshiena mumanye kunudi nufuma to!’" 
Luke13:26 Kadi nuenu nenumuambile ne: ‘Tuvua badie, banue nebe. Uvua mulongeshe mu misesu ya mu tshimenga tshietu.’" 
Luke13:27 Kadi mfumu neanuambile ne: ‘Tshiena mumanye kunudi nufuma to. Umbukayi apa, nuenu bonsu benji ba malu mabi!" 
Luke13:28 Pinapu nenudile miadi, nusumakaja menu, panuamona Abrahame, Izake, Yakobe, ne bambi bonsu, mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi nuenu, nebanusakidile pambelu!" 
Luke13:29 Bantu nebafume ku nseke yonsu inayi ya buloba. Nebasombe ku mesa mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. 
Luke13:30 Diba adi bantu badi ba ndekelu mpindiewu, nebikale ba kumpala. Badi ba kumpala mpindiewu, nebikale ba ndekelu!”" 
Luke13:31 Diba adi bamue Baparushe kusemena kudi Yezu, bamuambila ne: — Umbuka munu. Uye muaba mukuabu, bualu Erode udi ukeba kukushipesha." 
Luke13:32 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nuye, nuambile nyama wa kabundi awu ne: “Ndi ngipata mikishi mibi, njikija masama lelu ne maloba. Dituku disatu nenjikije mudimu wanyi.”" 
Luke13:33 Kadi ntshidi ne bua kutungunuka ne luendu luanyi lelu, maloba, ne dituku dialonda. Bualu ki mbimpe bua bashipele muambi muaba mukuabu, amu mu Yerushalayime." 
Luke13:34 “Yerushalayime we, Yerushalayime we, wewe udi ushipa bambi. Bantu badi Mvidi Mukulu ukutumina, udi ubasa mabue. Misangu bungi munyi imvua musue kukongoloja bantu bebe, mudi nzolu ukunguja tuana tuende mu mapuapua. Kadi kuvua musue nansha." 
Luke13:35 Nanku Mvidi Mukulu neumuke mu nzubu wende. Ndi nnujadikila ne: kanuakummona kabidi, too ne pakumbana diba dinuela mbila ne: ‘Udi ufika mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu amuele lupemba! ’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Dituku dikuabu dia Dikisha, Yezu uvua muye kua mfumu kampanda wa Baparushe bua kudia. Bantu bavua muaba awu bavua bamujoja bikole." 
Luke14:2 Muntu muikale ne mikolu ne maboku biwule uvua muimane kumpala kuende. 
Luke14:3 Yezu kukonka balongeshi ba mikenji ne Baparushe ne: — Mikenji yetu idi yanyisha bua tujikije disama dia muntu dituku dia Dikisha anyi idi ibenga? 
Luke14:4 Kadi kabavua basue kuandamuna to. Ke Yezu kulenga mubeedi, kumujikijila disama diende, kumupingaja kuabu." 
Luke14:5 Pashishe kuambilaye bantu ne: — Pikala wa kunudi ne muanende, nansha ngombe wende, mupone mu tshina, neamupatule diakamue, nansha dituku mene dia Dikisha. Ki mmomumue anyi?" 
Luke14:6 Kupangabu tshia kumuandamuna. 
Luke14:7 Yezu uvua mumone muvua bantu bavuabu babikila bafuilakana miaba mitambe buimpe. Kubambilaye lusumuinu elu ne: 
Luke14:8 — Pikala muntu mukubikile mu didia dia dibaka, kuyi kusomba pa muaba mutambe buimpe to. Bualu pamue apa bavua babikila muntu mukuabu munene, mukupite wewe." 
Luke14:9 Nanku uvua munubikile bonsu babidi, udi mua kukuambila ne: “Mushila muaba ewu!” Diba adi neujuke bua kuya kusomba muaba wa ndekelu, bundu disu tente." 
Luke14:10 Kadi pikalabu bakubikila, uye kusomba ku ndekelu. Pikala udi mukubikile ufika, neakuambe ne: “Muanetu, bandila kumpala, ku muaba muimpe. ” Nanku neupete lumu kudi bantu bonsu bawikala nabu ku mesa." 
Luke14:11 Bualu muntu yonsu udi uditambisha, nebamufuishe bundu. Muntu yonsu udi udipuekesha, neapete lumu." 
Luke14:12 Pashishe Yezu kuambila uvua mumubikile ne: — Diba diudi upa bantu biakudia bia dinda, nansha bia munda munya, lekela kubikila balunda bebe, bana benu, nansha bena mutumba nebe babanji. Bualu bobu badi mua kukubikila pabu. Nanku nebakupingajile biuvua mubapeshe abi." 
Luke14:13 Kadi pawikala wenza didia dia tshibilu, ubikile bapele, balema, batebuki ne bampofu." 
Luke14:14 Nanku newikale ne diakalenga, bualu bobu kabena mua kukupingajilabi. Mvidi Mukulu neakupingajilebi diba didiye ubisha ku bafue bantu bavua benza malu mimpe." 
Luke14:15 Yezu mumane kuakula nanku, umue wa ku bantu bavua nende ku mesa kumuambila ne: — Muntu waya kudia mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu mmuena diakalenga!" 
Luke14:16 Yezu kumuelela lusumuinu ne: — Muntu mukuabu uvua mulongolole didia dinene. Kubikilaye bantu ba bungi mu didia adi. 
Luke14:17 Diba dia didia dikumbana, kutumaye muena mudimu wende, bua ambile bavuaye mubikile ne: “Luayi mpindiewu, tukadi balongolole bionsu. ”" 
Luke14:18 Kadi muntu yonsu wa ku bantu aba uvua amu umulomba ne: umfuile luse. Muntu wa kumpala kuambila muena mudimu ne: “Ndi musumbe budimi. Ndi ne bua kuya kubumona. Ndi nkusengelela ne: umfuile luse.” 
Luke14:19 Muntu muibidi wa kudibu kumuambila ne: “Ndi musumbe ngombe dikumi ya kuenza nayi mudimu. Ndi nya kuyiteta. Ndi nkusengelela ne: umfuile luse.” 
Luke14:20 Muntu muisatu kuamba ne: “Ndi musele amu mpindiewu. Nanku tshiena ne mushindu wa kuyaku to.” 
Luke14:21 Muena mudimu kupingana kudi mfumuende, kumumanyisha bivua bantu bandamune. Mfumu wa nzubu kufika munda bikole, kuambila muena mudimu wende ne: “Uye lukasa mu bisalu ne mu misesu ya mu tshimenga. Ufike ne bapele, balema, bampofu ne badi batebuka.”" 
Luke14:22 Ke muena mudimu kupingana, wamba ne: “Mfumu, ndi muenze muonsu muudi muambe. Kadi nkushale kabidi muaba.”" 
Luke14:23 Ke mfumu kuambila muena mudimu wende ne: “Uye mu njila ya ku ntshiama, ku mielelu ya mpangu, wenzeje bantu ku bukole, bua babuele mu nzubu wanyi, uwule tente." 
Luke14:24 Ndi nnuambila ne: ku bantu bamvua mubikile aba, muntu nansha umue kakudia didia dianyi edi to.”" 
Luke14:25 Bantu ba bungi bavua baya ne Yezu mu njila. Yezu utangila kudibu, kubambilaye ne:" 
Luke14:26 — Muntu udi undonda, udi ne bua kunnanga meme bipite tatuende, mamuende, mukajende, bana bende, bana babu ba balume nansha ba bakaji, nansha bipite mene mudiye mudinange. Yeye kayi wenza nanku, kena mua kuikala mulongi wanyi to." 
Luke14:27 Muntu udi kayi wambula mutshi wende mutshiamakane, kayi musue kundonda, kena mua kuikala mulongi wanyi to." 
Luke14:28 Pikala umue wa kunudi musue kuibaka kaleya, udi wanji kusomba, utshinka mushinga waku, bua kumona ne: ndi ne makuta makumbane bua kujikija mudimu anyi?" 
Luke14:29 Pikalaye kayi muenze nanku, yeye muibake tshitaku, mupangile kaleya, bantu bonsu badi bamona nanku, nebamuseke." 
Luke14:30 Nebambe ne: “Muntu ewu uvua mubange kuibaka nzubu. Kadi kena ne mushindu wa kujikija mudimu!” 
Luke14:31 Nansha mukalenga wa ditunga udi musue kuluisha mukalenga nende myita, muikale amu ne bantu binunu dikumi, udi wanji kusomba bua kudikonka ne: ndi mua kuluisha muena lukuna wanyi udi ne bena mvita binunu makumi abidi anyi?" 
Luke14:32 Pikalaye kayi mua kumuluisha bimpe, udi umutumina mukenji patshidiye kule, umuebeja mudibu mua kumyuangana nende bua mvita kayenzeki." 
Luke14:33 Nanku ndi nnuambila ne: muntu nansha umue wa kunudi, kena mua kuikala mulongi wanyi, padiye kayi mubenge bionsu bidiye nabi." 
Luke14:34 — Luepu ludi tshintu tshimpe. Kadi pikalatshi lutshipale, badi mua kulutuisha ne tshinyi?" 
Luke14:35 Kalutshiena luimpe bua baluele nansha mu budimi nansha mu tshina tshia bufuke. Badi baluimansha. Badi ne matshi basangane kumvua anyiee? Bumvuee! 
Luke15:1 Balambuishi ba bitadi, ne bantu bakuabu ba lumu lubi, kuyabu kudi Yezu bua kumuteleja." 
Luke15:2 Kadi Baparushe, ne balongeshi ba mikenji, bavua basodia, bamba ne: — Kia! Muntu ewu udi wakidila bantu ba lumu lubi, udia nabu!" 
Luke15:3 Ke Yezu kubelela lusumuinu ne: 
Luke15:4 — Pikala muntu wa kunudi ne mikoku lukama, yeye mujimije umue, kena ushiya mikuabu makumi tshitema ne tshitema mu mpata, bua kuya kukeba udi mujimine anyi? Kakuikisha too ne muawangulaye." 
Luke15:5 Yeye mumane kuwangula, udi usanka bikole, uwambula pa makaya ende." 
Luke15:6 Udi upingana kuende, ubikila balunda bende ne bena mutumba nende, ubambila ne: “Tusankayi, bualu ndi muangule mukoku wanyi uvua mujimine.”" 
Luke15:7 Ndi nnuambila ne: ke mudibu basanka bipite mu diulu, bua muena malu mabi udi udilengeja, mudibu kabayi mua kusanka bua bantu makumi tshitema ne tshitema badi kabayi ne bua kudilengeja." 
Luke15:8 — Ambayi tumone! Mukaji muikale ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole dikumi, yeye mujimije lumue, udi wenza tshinyi? Neatemeshe muendu, ukomba mu nzubu, ukeba bimpe too ne paluangulaye." 
Luke15:9 Yeye mumane kuluangula, udi ubikila bantu bakaji balunda bende ne bena mutumba nende, ubambila ne: “Tusankayi, bualu ndi muangule lukanu luanyi lumvua mujimije.”" 
Luke15:10 Ndi nnuambila ne: ke mudi batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu basanka bua muena malu mabi udi udilengeja. 
Luke15:11 Yezu kuamba kabidi ne: — Muntu kampanda uvua ne bana bende ba balume babidi. 
Luke15:12 Muana muakunyi uvua ulomba tatuende ne: “Tatu, umpeshe tshianyi tshia bumpianyi tshindi ne bua kupeta.” Nanku tatu awu kuabanyina bana bende bi-vuaye nabi." 
Luke15:13 Munkatshi mua matuku makese muana muakunyi kupana bintu biende bionsu, kuya ne makuta ku ditunga dia kule. Kuine aku uvua wenza buenzayi, utulakaja biuma biende." 
Luke15:14 Nsongalume mumane kudila makuta onsu, tshiyole tshia nzala tshikole kubuela mu ditunga adi. Ke nsongalume awu kutuadija kukenga." 
Luke15:15 Kuyaye kubuela ku mudimu kua muntu wa mu ditunga adi. Awu kumutuma ku bikumbi biende bua kulama ngulube. 
Luke15:16 Nsongalume uvua ujinga kudia bimuma bia mutshi bivua ngulube idia. Kadi muntu kavua umupeshabi to. 
Luke15:17 Kutuadijaye kuela meji, kudiambila ne: “Bena mudimu ba tatuanyi badi ne biakudia bipite bungi, kabayi mua kubidia, kubijikija. Meme apa nkadi mfua ne nzala!" 
Luke15:18 Ndi musue kupingana kudi tatu wanyi, umuambila ne: ‘Tatu wanyi, ndi muenzele Mvidi Mukulu bibi. Ndi mukuenzele ne wewe kabidi." 
Luke15:19 Tshitshiena mukumbane bua untangile bu muanebe. Nanku ungangate bu muena mudimu webe.’ ” 
Luke15:20 Ke yeye kujuka bua kupingana kudi tatuende. Yeye mutshikale kule ne nzubu wabu, tatuende kumumona. Kumumvuilaye luse bikole. Kuyaye lubilu bua kusambakena nende. Kumupukilaye ne disanka, umutua mishiku." 
Luke15:21 Ke muana kumuambila ne: “Tatu wanyi, ndi muenzele Mvidi Mukulu bibi. Ndi mukuenzele ne wewe kabidi. Tshitshiena mukumbane bua untangile bu muanebe.”" 
Luke15:22 Kadi tatu kuambila bena mudimu bende ne: “Ambulujayi, tualayi tshilamba tshimpe; numuvuadiketshi. Numuele kakanu ku munu. Numutuadile bisabata, numuelebi." 
Luke15:23 Nufike ne muana wa ngombe utudi badiundishe, numushipe, bua tudie didia dinene dia disanka." 
Luke15:24 Bualu muananyi ewu ukavua mufue, mmubiike ku lufu. Ukavua mujimine, mbamumonyi.” Kutuadijabu kusanka." 
Luke15:25 Diba adi muanabute utshivua ku budimi. Pavuaye upingana ku nzubu, ufika pabuipi, kumvuaye bimba bisanji, baja maja." 
Luke15:26 Kubikilaye muena mudimu mukuabu, kumukonka ne: “Tshidi aku ntshinyi?”" 
Luke15:27 Muena mudimu kumuandamuna ne: “Muanenu wa balume mmupingane. Tatuebe mmushipeshe muana wa ngombe utuvua badiundishe, bualu muanende mmupingane ne bukole bua mubidi.”" 
Luke15:28 Nanku muanabute kufika munda, kubenga kubuela mu nzubu. Tatuende kupatuka, kumusengelela." 
Luke15:29 Kadi muana mukulu kuambila tatuende ne: “Teleja, meme ndi mukuenzele mudimu bidimu bipite bungi. Tshiena muanji kubenga mukenji webe nansha umue to. Kadi katshia kuena muanji kumpesha nansha kana ka mbuji bua meme kusanka ne balunda banyi." 
Luke15:30 Kadi muanebe wawa upingana, yeye uvua mutule biuma biebe bionsu ku bakaji bena tshiendenda, wewe kumushipela muana wa ngombe utuvua badiundishe!”" 
Luke15:31 Tatu kumuandamuna ne: “Muananyi, tudi nebe matuku onsu. Bionsu bindi nabi mbintu biebe wewe." 
Luke15:32 Kadi tuvua ne bua kuenza tshibilu etshi, kusanka, bualu muanenu ewu ukavua mufue, mmubiike ku lufu; ukavua mujimine, mbamumonyi.”" 
Luke16:1 Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Muena biuma kampanda uvua ne mumulaminyi wa bintu. Bantu kuambila muena biuma ewu ne: mukulaminyi wa bintu udi utulakaja bintu biebe. 
Luke16:2 Nanku muena biuma kubikila muntu awu, umukonka ne: “Bualu bundi ngumvua bakuamba ebu budi bishi? Badika bintu bianyi bionsu, bualu kuakundamina kabidi bintu to.”" 
Luke16:3 Ke mulami wa bintu kudikonka nkayende ne: “Mfumuanyi wa mudimu udi unnyenga bintu bimvua mumulamine. Mpindiewu nengenze tshinyi? Tshiena ne bukole bua kudiina. Bundu budi bungenza bua kushala muena lulombu. 
Luke16:4 Eyo, ndi mumanye tshindi mua kuenza. Nanku nansha meme mumuke ku mudimu, bantu bakuabu nebangakidile ku nzubu yabu.”" 
Luke16:5 Kubikidishaye ku umue ku umue bonsu bavua ne mabanza a mfumuende. Kukonkaye wa kumpala ne: “Udi ne dibanza dia mfumuanyi dia bungi munyi?” 
Luke16:6 Muena dibanza kuandamuna ne: “Dia bipanza bia mafuta a olive lukama.” Mulami wa bintu kumuambila ne: “Ke dibeji didi ne dibanza diebe. Somba panshi, funda lukasa makumi atanu.”" 
Luke16:7 Pashishe mulami kukonka muntu mukuabu ne: “Kadi wewe udi ne dibanza dia bungi munyi?” Awu kuandamuna ne: “Dia bibombi bia ntete ya kuenza bukula nkama itanu. Mulami wa bintu ne: “Ke dibeji didi ne dibanza diebe edi. Funda bibombi nkama inayi.” 
Luke16:8 Ke Mfumu kutumbisha mulami wa bintu ewu, bualu mmukuate mudimu ne budimu. Bualu bantu ba panu badi badimukila binabu, bapite mudi bantu badi benda mu butoke benza." 
Luke16:9 Yezu kuamba kabidi ne: — Meme ndi nnuambila ne: kebayi munudi mua kupeta balunda ne biuma bibi bia panu. Nanku panujika bia panu, balunda aba nebanuakidile mu nzubu ya kashidi." 
Luke16:10 Udi ulama bintu bikese bimpe, nealame kabidi bintu bivule bimpe. Udi udinga mu bintu bikese, neadinge kabidi mu bintu bivule." 
Luke16:11 Paudi kuyi ulama biuma bibi bia panu bimpe, udi mua kukupesha biuma bia bushuwa nnganyi?" 
Luke16:12 Paudi kuyi ulama bintu bia muntu mukuabu bimpe, udi mua kukupesha bintu biebe wewe nnganyi?" 
Luke16:13 Muena mudimu nansha umue kena mua kuenzela bamfumu babidi mudimu. Bualu neakine ewu, anange wawa. Neajinge ewu, apepeje wawa. Kanuena mua kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu, kuenzela kabidi ne biuma musangu umue." 
Luke16:14 Baparushe bavua bumvua miaku yonsu eyi. Kadi kusekabu Yezu, bualu bavua bananga makuta." 
Luke16:15 Yezu kubambila ne: — Nuenu nudi basue kudileja bu bantu bimpe ku mesu a bakuabu. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi mumanye mioyi yenu. Bualu tshidi bantu bamona ne: ntshinene, katshiena ne mushinga ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke16:16 Too ne ku tshikondu tshia Yowanane-Batiste, nuvua ne mikenji ya Moshe, kabidi ne mikanda ya bambi. Kutuadija ku Yowanane, badi balongesha Lumu lua Disanka lua Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Muntu yonsu udi upatata bua kubuela mu Bukalenga abu." 
Luke16:17 Diulu ne buloba bidi mua kujimina. Kadi kalu nansha kamue kadibu bafunde mu mikenji kakena mua kujimina to. 
Luke16:18 Muntu yonsu udi wipata mukajende, usela mukuabu, mmunyange dibaka. Udi usela mukaji uvuabu babenga kudi bayende, udi munyange pende dibaka." 
Luke16:19 — Kuvua muena biuma uvuala bilamba bimpe bia mushinga mukole. Dituku dionsu uvua udia bilenga, usanka." 
Luke16:20 Kuvua kabidi muntu mupele, dina diende Lazare. Uvua ne biuja mubidi mujima, ulala ku tshiibi tshia nzubu wa muena biuma." 
Luke16:21 Uvua ujinga kudia bisunsukila bivua bimata ku mesa a muena biuma. Kabidi mbua ivua ifika bua kulaka mu mputa yende. 
Luke16:22 Mupele kufua. Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu kumuambula, kuya kumuteka mu diulu pabuipi ne Abrahame. Muena biuma kufua kabidi. Kumujikabu." 
Luke16:23 Muena biuma uvua ukengakana bikole mu kandondu ka bafue. Ukenzakana, kumonaye Abrahame ku bule, Lazare muikale pabuipi nende." 
Luke16:24 Nanku kuelaye diyi ne: “Tatu Abrahame, ungumvuileku luse. Tuma Lazare, atue lusongu lua munu wende mu mayi, bua kuntalaja pa ludimi. Bualu ndi nkengakana bikole mu kadilu aka.”" 
Luke16:25 Kadi Abrahame kumuandamuna ne: “Muananyi, vuluka ne: uvua mupete biuma bia bungi, pautshivua ne muoyi panu. Diba adi Lazare uvua ne makenga mavule. Mpindiewu badi bamusamba munemu, kadi wewe udi mu dikenga." 
Luke16:26 Vuluka kabidi ne: pankatshi petu nenu padi lupongu lule. Nanku bantu kabena mua kumuka kunu, kufika kunudi aku to. Kabidi kabena mua kumuka kunudi aku, kufika kutudi eku to.”" 
Luke16:27 Ke muena biuma kuamba ne: “Tatu, ndi nkusengelela ne: tuma Lazare mu nzubu mua tatu wanyi," 
Luke16:28 mudi bana betu ba balume batanu. Aye kubadimuja bua kabafiki pabu muaba wa makenga ewu.” 
Luke16:29 Abrahame kuandamuna ne: “Bana benu badi ne Moshe ne bambi badi mua kubadimuja. Babateleje.” 
Luke16:30 Muena biuma ne: “Tatu Abrahame, ebi kabiena bikumbane to. Kadi pikala muntu mubiike ku bafue, muye kumonangana nabu, nebadilengeje.”" 
Luke16:31 Kadi Abrahame kumuambila ne: “Pikalabu babenga kuteleja Moshe nansha bambi, muntu nansha yeye mubiike ku bafue, kabena mua kumuitaba to.”" 
Luke17:1 Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Matuku onsu nekuikale malu adi akoka bantu bua kuenzabu bibi. Kadi muntu udi wenzeja bantu malu mabi aa mmuena diakabi! 
Luke17:2 Muntu wa nanku mbimpe bamusuike dibue dinene dia kupela nadi mu nshingu, bamuele mu mayi manene, bua kafikishi nansha umue wa ku bakese aba ku dienza bibi." 
Luke17:3 Nuadimukayi! Pikala muanenu wa balume mubunde tshibawu, umubele bimpe. Pikalaye munyingalale bua tshilema tshivuaye muenze, umumvuile luse." 
Luke17:4 Nansha yeye mukuenzele bibi misangu muanda mutekete ku dituku, upingana kuudi, ukuambila ne: “Ndi nnyingalala bua bindi mukuenzele,” wamumvuila amu luse." 
Luke17:5 Bapostolu kulomba Mfumu ne: — Kolesha ditaba dietu. 
Luke17:6 Mfumu kuandamuna ne: — Bu nuenu ne ditaba bunene bua lutete lua lusanga, nuvua mua kuambila mutshi wa sikomore wawa ne: “Juka apa, umene mu mayi manene.” Nanku mutshi newitabe mu diyi dienu." 
Luke17:7 — Tuambe ne: muntu wa kunudi udi mua kuikala ne muena mudimu wende udi udima, nansha umulamina bimuna. Padiye umona muena mudimu awu ufuma ku budimi nansha ku mpata, neamubikile lukasa bua kudiaye nende ku mesa anyi?" 
Luke17:8 Kakuenza nanku to. Kadi, neanuambile ne: “Ndambita biakudia. Pashishe vuala bilamba bikuabu bua kungambuluisha pantshidi ndia. Neushishe kudia pebe.”" 
Luke17:9 Neele muena mudimu wende tuasakidila bua padiye mukumbaje bivuaye mumuambile anyi? 
Luke17:10 Ke munudi nuenu kabidi. Panudi nukumbaja bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu unuambila, nuambe amu ne: “Tudi amu bena mudimu ba patupu. Tuvua bakumbaje amu bituvua ne bua kuenza.”" 
Luke17:11 Pavua Yezu mu luendu, mutangile ku Yerushalayime, kupitshilaye ku mikalu ya buloba bua Samariya ne bua Ngalileya." 
Luke17:12 Ufika mu musoku mulkuabu, ke bena nsudi dikumi, bantu balume, kusambakena nende. Bavua bimanyine pa bule," 
Luke17:13 bela mbila ne: — Yezu, Mfumu, utumvuileku luse!" 
Luke17:14 Yezu ubamona, kubambilaye ne: — Nuye kudi batuangaji, banukenkete. Patshivuabu mu njila, disama diabu kujika." 
Luke17:15 Umue wa kudibu umona ne: disama dianyi ndijike, kupinganaye kudi Yezu, wenda utumbisha Mvidi Mukulu ne diyi dikole." 
Luke17:16 Kudielaye mpala panshi ku makasa a Yezu, umuela tuasakidila. Muntu awu uvua muena Samariya." 
Luke17:17 Ke Yezu kuamba ne: — Disama dia bonsu dikumi ki ndijike anyi? Kadi bakuabu tshitema badi penyi? 
Luke17:18 Bobu ki mbapingane bua kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu bua tshinyi? Amu muenyi ewu! 
Luke17:19 Ke Yezu kumuamba ne: — Juka, uye; ditaba diebe ndikupandishe!" 
Luke17:20 Baparushe bavua bakonka Yezu ne: — Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu nebufike diba kaayi? Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu kabuena bufika mushindu udi bantu mua kubumona bimpe to. 
Luke17:21 Muntu kakuamba ne: “Budi apa!” nansha ne “Budi kuaka!” Numanye amu ne: Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu bukadi munkatshi muenu. 
Luke17:22 Ke Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Tshikondu netshifike tshinuajinga kumona dimue dia ku matuku a Muana wa muntu. Kadi kanuakudimona to. 
Luke17:23 Nebanuambile ne: “Nyeye wawa!” nansha ne: “Nyeye ewu!” Kadi kanunyemenyiku bua kuya kumona to! 
Luke17:24 Pakumbana dituku diende, Muana wa muntu neafike, bu mudi mukenya wa mvula upenya mu diulu, udikenkesha dionsu musangu umue." 
Luke17:25 Kadi Muana wa muntu udi ne bua kudianza kukenga bikole. Bantu ba mu tshikondu etshi nebamubenge. 
Luke17:26 Bivua bienzeka mu tshikondu tshia Nowa, nebienzeke mu tshikondu tshidi Muana wa muntu ufika." 
Luke17:27 Bantu bavua badia, banua, baselangana, ne ku diba divua Nowa mubuele mu buatu. Ke mvula wa tshipupu kuloka, kubabutula bonsu." 
Luke17:28 Nebienzeke bu mu tshikondu tshia Lote: bantu bavua badia, banua, basumba, basumbisha bintu, bakuna, bibaka nzubu." 
Luke17:29 Kadi dituku divua Lote mupatuke mu tshimenga tshia Sodome, kapia ne mvuanda bivua biloka, bibutula bantu bonsu." 
Luke17:30 Nanku dituku didi Muana wa muntu umueneka, nebienzeke momumue." 
Luke17:31 Dituku adi, muntu ku musonga wa nzubu, kena ne bua kutuluka bua kuambula bintu biende bidi mu nzubu to. Muntu mu budimi kena ne bua kupingana kuende to." 
Luke17:32 Vulukayi mukaji wa Lote! 
Luke17:33 Muntu udi musue kusungidila muoyi wende, neaujimije. Kadi wajimija muoyi wende, neausungidile." 
Luke17:34 Ndi nnujadikila ne: bufuku abu ku bantu babidi bikale balale muaba umue, nebaye ne umue, bashiye mukuabu." 
Luke17:35 Ku bakaji babidi bikale batue ntete mu tshinu tshiapamue, nebaye ne umue, bashiye mukuabu. [" 
Luke17:36 Ku balume babidi bikale badime mu budimi, nebaye ne umue, bashiye mukuabu. ]" 
Luke17:37 Ke balongi kumukonka ne: — Mfumu, malu aa neenzekele muaba kaayi? Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Padi tshitalu, ke padi nyunyi ya mikanku idisangishila." 
Luke18:1 Pashishe bua kulongesha balongi bende mudibu ne bua kutendelela diba dionsu, kabayi batekesha mu maboku, Yezu kubelela lusumuinu ne:" 
Luke18:2 — Mu tshimenga kampanda muvua mukoshi wa nsambu. Kavua utshina Mvidi Mukulu, kavua unemeka muntu nansha umue." 
Luke18:3 Mu tshimenga atshi muvua kabidi mukaji mukamba. Uvua uya kudi mukoshi wa nsambu misangu ne misangu, umulomba ne: “Unkosele tshilumbu tshianyi amu pa tshiotshi ne muena lukuna wanyi.”" 
Luke18:4 Mukoshi wa nsambu kubenga matuku a bungi. Kadi pashishe kudielaye meji ne: “Nansha meme tshiyi ntshina Mvidi Mukulu, tshiyi nnemeka bantu," 
Luke18:5 kadi bu mudi mukaji mukamba ewu unsuya, nenkose tshilumbu tshiende mudi tshi. Patupu neansuye misangu yonsu, bifuane wangela nzadi mu mesu.”" 
Luke18:6 Ke Mfumu kuamba kabidi ne: — Telejayi tshidi mukoshi wa nsambu mubi ewu wamba! 
Luke18:7 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kakukosa nsambu ya bena diende badi bamubila munya ne butuku pa yoyi anyi? Kakubambuluisha pa lukasa anyi? 
Luke18:8 Ndi nnujadikila ne: neakose nsambu yabu lukasa amu pa yoyi. Kadi pafika Muana wa muntu, neasangane bantu ne ditaba pa buloba anyi?" 
Luke18:9 Bantu bavua badifunyisha ne: tudi bakane ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu, bapepeja kabidi bantu bakuabu, Yezu kubelela lusumuinu ne:" 
Luke18:10 — Bantu babidi bavua babuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi mukulu bua kutendelela. Umue uvua Muparushe, mukuabu mulambuishi wa bitadi." 
Luke18:11 Muparushe uvua muimane kulu, utendelela, wamba mundamunda muende ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi nkuela tuasakidila, bualu tshiena bu bantu bakuabu. Bonsu badi amu biba, bakengesha bantu, babuelela bakaji ba bende mu nzubu. Ndi nkuela tuasakidila nangananga, bualu tshiena bu mulambuishi wa bitadi wawa." 
Luke18:12 Meme ndi njila biakudia matuku abidi ku lumingu, nkulambula tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionsu bindi mpeta.”" 
Luke18:13 Mulambuishi wa bitadi uvua muimane yeye pa bule, kayi nansha ukimina kutangila mu diulu. Kadi uvua udituuta pa tshiadi, wamba ne: “Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ungumvuileku luse. Meme ndi muenji wa malu mabi.”" 
Luke18:14 Ndi nnujadikila ne: muntu ewu mmupingane kuende, mutokela Mvidi Mukulu ku muoyi, kadi mukuabu awu to. Bualu muntu yonsu udi uditambisha, nebamupuekeshe. Kadi yonsu udi ndipuekesha, neapete lumu." 
Luke18:15 Bantu kufika kudi Yezu ne bana, ne ba mu diboku, bua abatenteke bianza. Balongi bende babamona, kubatandishabu." 
Luke18:16 Kadi Yezu kubikila bana kudiye, wamba ne: — Lekelayi bana! Bafike kundi! Kanubakandiki! Bualu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu mbua badi bu bana." 
Luke18:17 Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: udi kayi wanyisha bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu bu muana, kakubuelamu to." 
Luke18:18 Muntu munene wa bena Yuda kukonka Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi muimpe, bua meme kupeta muoyi wa kashidi ngenze tshinyi?" 
Luke18:19 Yezu kumukonka ne: — Udi umbikila muimpe bua tshinyi? Kakuena muntu udi muimpe, amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende." 
Luke18:20 Udi mumanye meyi ne mikandu: “Kubueledi mukaji wa bende mu nzubu, kushipi muntu, kuibi, kushiminyinyi muntu bualu, unemeke tatuebe ne mamuebe." 
Luke18:21 Muntu awu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mukumbaje bionsu ebi bituadije ku buana buanyi. 
Luke18:22 Nanku Yezu kumuambila ne: — Bualu bumue butshidi bukushale: pana bionsu biudi nabi, wabanyine bapele makuta. Nanku newikale ne bubanji mu diulu. Pashishe Ulue, undonde meme." 
Luke18:23 Kadi umvua anu miaku ayi, muntu awu kubungama bikole, bualu uvua ne biuma bivule." 
Luke18:24 Yezu umona muvuaye ubungama, kuambaye ne: — Bidi bikole bua bena biuma kubuela mu Bukalenga bua mu diulu." 
Luke18:25 Bu mudibi bikole bua nyama wa kamelu kubuela mu disu dia kashingi, ke mudibi bikole bipite bua muena mpetu kubuela mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke18:26 Bantu bavua bamuteleja, kumukonkabu ne: — Kadi biobi bikale nanku, wapanda nnganyi?" 
Luke18:27 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Bidi bantu kabayi mua kuenza, Mvidi Mukulu udi ubikumbaja." 
Luke18:28 Ke Petro kuamba ne: — Udi mumanye mutudi bashiye bionsu bimvua nabi bua kukulonda. 
Luke18:29 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: muntu yonsu udi mushiye nzubuende, mukajende, bana babu, baledi bende, bana bende, bualu bua Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu," 
Luke18:30 neapete mpindiewu bia bungi bipite. Matuku adi kumpala, neapete muoyi wa kashidi." 
Luke18:31 Yezu kubikila balongi bende dikumi ne babidi, kubambila ne: — Telejayi. Tukadi tuya ku Yerushalayime. Muaba awu bionsu bivua bambi bafunde bua Muana wa muntu nebikumbane." 
Luke18:32 Nebamufile mu bianza bia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Bobu abu nebamuseke, nebamupende, nebamutuile mate pambidi." 
Luke18:33 Nebamutuute mikaba, nebamushipe. Kadi dituku disatu neabike ku lufu." 
Luke18:34 Kadi bionsu abi balongi kabavua babijungulula to. Kabavua bumvua tshivua Yezu wamba to. Miaku yende eyi ivua mibakolele. 
Luke18:35 Pavua Yezu usemena pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Yeriko, kuvua mpofu musombe ku muelelu wa njila, ulomba tshia pa luse." 
Luke18:36 Mpofu awu uvua mumvue bantu tshisumbu bapita mu njila. Kukonkaye ne: — Ebi mbinganyi? 
Luke18:37 Kumuambilabu ne: — Ke Yezu wa mu Nazarete udi upita mu njila emu. 
Luke18:38 Ke mpofu kuela lubila ne: — Yezu, Muana wa Davide, ungumvuileku luse!" 
Luke18:39 Bantu bavua benda kumpala kua Yezu kutandishabu mpofu bua apuwe. Kadi yeye kuela amu mbila mikole mipite ne: — Yezu, Muana wa Davide, ungumvuileku luse!" 
Luke18:40 Ke Yezu kuimana, kubikidisha mpofu awu. Mpofu ufika, Yezu kumukonka ne:" 
Luke18:41 — Udi musue nkuenzele tshinyi? Ke mpofu ne: — Mfumu, ndi musue, untabeje mesu, mmone tshiakabidi." 
Luke18:42 Nanku Yezu kumuambila ne: — Mesu ebe akane tshiakabidi! Ditaba diebe ndikupandishe! 
Luke18:43 Diakamue mpofu kumona bimpe, kulonda Yezu, wenda utumbisha Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu bonsu bavua bamona bualu ebu, kutumbishabu kabidi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke19:1 Yezu kubuela mu Yeriko, kukosolola tshimenga." 
Luke19:2 Muaba awu muvua muntu, dina diende Zakayi. Uvua mfumu wa balambuishi ba bitadi, muena biuma bia bungi." 
Luke19:3 Uvua musue kumona Yezu bua kumanya ne: nnganyi. Kadi bu muvuaye muntu wa tshitupa, kavua mua kumumona bimpe bua bungi bua bantu." 
Luke19:4 Ke kudianjilaye kumpala lubilu, kubanda ku mutshi wa sikomore, bua kumona Yezu uvua ne bua kupitshila muaba awu." 
Luke19:5 Yezu ufika muaba awu, kutangilaye kulu, wambila Zakayi ne: — Zakayi, tuluka lukasa, bualu lelu ndi muebe." 
Luke19:6 Zakayi kutuluka lukasa, kuakidila Yezu ne disanka." 
Luke19:7 Bantu bonsu bavua bamone nanku, kufikabu munda, bamba ne: — Muntu ewu mmuye kutula kua muenji wa malu mabi." 
Luke19:8 Kadi Zakayi kujuka, kuambila Mfumu ne: — Mfumu, ndi nkujadikila ne: nempeshe bapele tshia bibidi tshia bintu bianyi. Pangikala mushime muntu, muangate makuta ende, nemmupingajile bungi abu misangu inayi." 
Luke19:9 Ke Yezu kumuambila ne: — Lelu wewe ne bena diebe bonsu nudi bapete lupandu. Bualu wewe kabidi udi muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Abrahame. 
Luke19:10 Muana wa muntu mmufike bua kukeba ne kusungidila bantu bavua bajimine. 
Luke19:11 Yezu uvua welela kabidi bantu bavua bumvua bionsu abi lusumuinu lukuabu. Bu muvua Yezu pabuipi ne Yerushalayime, bantu bavua bela meji ne: Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu bukadi pa kumueneka amu mpindiewu." 
Luke19:12 Ke Yezu kuambila bantu ne: — Muntu kampanda wa mu diku dia bantu baneme uvua uya ku ditunga dia kulekule bua kupetaku bukalenga, kupingana nabu kuabu." 
Luke19:13 Kayi muanji kuya, kubikilaye bena mudimu bende dikumi, bua kubapesha muntu yonsu lukanu lua mpawungi. Kubambilaye ne: “Nuenduluke ne lukanu luenu too ne panga-pingana.”" 
Luke19:14 Kadi bena ditunga diabu bavua bamukina. Ke kutumabu bantu kuvuaye uya ne mukenji ne: “Katuena basue bua muntu ewu ikale mukalenga wetu to.” 
Luke19:15 “Kadi muntu awu kupeta amu bukalenga. Ke kupinganaye mu ditunga diende. Kubikidishaye bena mudimu ba-vuaye mupeshe nkanu, bua kumanya tshiyuabu bapete." 
Luke19:16 Wa kumpala kufika, wamba ne: ‘Mukalenga, uvua mumpeshe lukanu lumue. Meme kuenduluka kupeta mikuabu dikumi.’ ”" 
Luke19:17 Mukalenga kumuamba ne: “Uvua muenze bimpe. Udi muena mudimu wa nsongu. Bu muuvua mukumbaje mudimu bimpe ne bintu bikese bindi mukushile, nenkuteke mulombodi wa bimenga dikumi.”" 
Luke19:18 Muena mudimu muibidi kufika, wamba ne: “Mukalenga, uvua mumpeshe lukanu lumue. Meme kuenduluka, kupeta mikuabu itanu.”" 
Luke19:19 Mukalenga kumuandamuna ne: “Ndi nkuteka mulombodi wa bimenga bitanu.” 
Luke19:20 Muena mudimu muisatu kufika, wamba ne: “Mukalenga, ke lukanu luebe lua mpawungi elu. Mvua mululame mu tshitambala." 
Luke19:21 Mvua nkutshina, bualu udi muena tshikisu. Udi wangatabintu bidi kabiyi biebe, unowa biudi kuyi mukune.”" 
Luke19:22 Mukalenga kumuandamuna ne: “Udi muena mudimu mubi. Nenkose tshilumbu tshiebe bilondeshile miaku yebe. Uvua mumanye mundi muntu wa tshikisu, ngangata bintu bidi kabiyi bianyi, nnowa bindi tshiyi mukune." 
Luke19:23 Nanku kuena muteke nkanu yanyi mu tshibutshilu tshivuayi mua kumpetesha makasa bua tshinyi? Bu wewe muenze nanku, mu dipingana dianyi, mvua mua kupeta nkanu yanyi, ne kasombela kabidi!”" 
Luke19:24 Ke mukalenga kuambila bantu bavua muaba awu ne: “Munyengayi lukanu lua mpawungi alu. Nulufile kudi udi ne nkanu dikumi.” 
Luke19:25 Kumuambilabu ne: “Mukalenga, se ukadi nayi dikumi!”" 
Luke19:26 Mukalenga kuandamuna ne: “Ndi nnujadikila ne: muntu yonsu udi ne tshintu, nebamupeshe bipite. Kadi udi kayi ne tshintu, nebamunyenge ne tshikese tshidiye natshi." 
Luke19:27 Kadi bena lukuna banyi bavua kabayi basue bua meme kuikala mukalenga wabu, fikayi nabu apa. Nubashipe, meme mutangile.”" 
Luke19:28 Yezu mumane kuamba nanku, kupitaye kumpala kua bantu bua kuya ku Yerushalayime." 
Luke19:29 Ufika pabuipi ne musoku wa Betfaje ne wa Betanya, pepi ne mukuna wa mitshi ya Olive, kudianjilaye kutuma balongi babidi, ubambila ne:" 
Luke19:30 — Nuye mu musoku udi kumpala wawa. Panuabuelamu, nenusangane muana wa nyama wa mpunde musuika, udi muntu nansha umue kayi muanji kubandapu. Numusulule, nufike nende apa." 
Luke19:31 Pikala muntu unuebeja ne: “Nudi numusulula bua tshinyi?” numuandamune ne: “Mfumu udi nende dijinga.” 
Luke19:32 Balongi kuya, kusangana bionsu muvua Yezu mubambile." 
Luke19:33 Pavuabu basulula muana wa nyama wa mpunde, bena nyama awu kubakonka ne: — Nudi numusulula bua tshinyi?" 
Luke19:34 Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu udi nende dijinga. 
Luke19:35 Nanku kuyabu ne muana wa nyama wa mpunde kudi Yezu. Kutekabu bilamba biabu pa nyama. Yezu kubandapu. 
Luke19:36 Pavua Yezu wenda uya, bantu bavua badija bivualu biabu mu njila." 
Luke19:37 Yezu uvua usemena pabuipi ne Yerushalayime mu njila udi upueka ku mukuna wa mitshi ya Olive. Balongi bende bonsu tshisumbu tshinene bavua ne disanka, batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu ne diyi dikole, bua malu a kukema onsu avuabu bamone." 
Luke19:38 Bavua bamba ne: “Mukalenga udi ufika mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu amuele lupemba! Bupole budi mu diulu, butumbi budi kudi Mvidi Mukulu! ”" 
Luke19:39 Baparushe bakuabu bavua munkatshi mua bantu, kuambilabu Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi, tandisha balongi bebe, bapuwe!" 
Luke19:40 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: nansha bobu bapuwe, mabue neele mbila!" 
Luke19:41 Yezu ufika pabuipi ne tshimenga, utshimona, kuasaye muadi bualu buatshi," 
Luke19:42 wamba ne: — Bu wewe mua kujingulula bidi mua kukupetesha ditalala! Kadi mpindiewu malu onsu aa mbakusokokewu. Kuena mua kuamona! 
Luke19:43 Matuku neafike adi bena lukuna bebe bakuela munkatshi ne biamu binene bia mvita, bakuluisha, bakufimpakaja nseke yonsu." 
Luke19:44 Wewe ne bantu bebe nebanubutule muebe butubutu. Kabakukushila dibue ditentekaja pa dikuabu. Bualu wewe kuena mujingulule tshikondu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mufike bua kukusamba! 
Luke19:45 Yezu kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuipata bangenda mushinga," 
Luke19:46 ubambila ne: — Mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Nzubu wanyi mmuaba udibu batendelela.” Kadi nuenu nukadi bamuandamune muaba wa bivi. 
Luke19:47 Matuku onsu Yezu uvua ulongesha mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bamfumu ba batuangaji, balongeshi ba mikenji, ne bakulu ba mu tshisamba, bavua bakeba muvuabu mua kumushipesha." 
Luke19:48 Kadi kabavua bamanye tshia kuenza, bualu bantu bonsu bavua pabuipi nende, bamuteleja ne ntema mivule." 
Luke20:1 Dituku dikuabu Yezu uvua ulongesha bantu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ubamanyisha Lumu lua Disanka. Bamfumu ba batuangaji, balongeshi ba mikenji, ne bakulu, kufika kudiye." 
Luke20:2 Kumukonkabu ne: — Malu onsu audi wenza aa, udi wenza ne bukenji kaayi? Udi mukuambile bua kuwenza nnganyi?" 
Luke20:3 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Meme kabidi ndi musue kunukonka, nungandamune:" 
Luke20:4 Udi mutume Yowanane bua atue bantu mu mayi nnganyi? Mvidi Mukulu anyi mbantu? 
Luke20:5 Kuelanganabu meji munkatshi muabu, bambilangana ne: — Tuetu bandamune ne: “Mvidi Mukulu mmumutume,” neatukonke ne: “Nanku kanuena bitabe Yowanane bua tshinyi?”" 
Luke20:6 Kadi tuetu bandamune ne: “Bantu mbamutume,” bantu bonsu nebatuase mabue bua kutushipa. Bualu mbajadike ne: Yowanane mmuambi wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke20:7 Ke kuandamunabu Yezu ne: — Katuena bamanye uvua mumutume bua kutua bantu mu mayi. 
Luke20:8 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Nansha meme kabidi, tshiena nnuambila bukenji bundi ngenza nabu malu onsu aa." 
Luke20:9 Ke Yezu kuelela kabidi bantu lusumuinu ne: — Muntu uvua mukune mionji ya nwinyo. Kushiyaye budimi abu kudi bafiitshidi. Kuyaye ku luendu lua matuku a bungi. 
Luke20:10 Tshikondu tshia kupola tumuma tshikumbana, kutumaye muena mudimu wende kudi bafutshidi abu, bua kupeta tuende tumuma kudibu. Kadi bafutshidi kutuuta muntu awu, kumuipata, kayi mupete nansha kantu." 
Luke20:11 Muena budimi kutuma kabidi muena mudimu mukuabu. Bafutshidi kumutuuta kabidi, kumupenda, kumuipata kayi mupete kantu." 
Luke20:12 Muena budimu kutuma kabidi muntu muisatu. Yeye kabidi bafutshidi kumutapa mputa, kumuipata." 
Luke20:13 Ke muena budimi kuamba ne: “Nengenze tshinyi? Ndi ntuma muananyi munanga. Misangu mikuabu badi mua kumuangata ne mushinga.” 
Luke20:14 Kadi bafutshidi bamona muana wa mukalenga, kuambilanganabu ne: “Ke wapiana budimi pashishe wawa. Tumushipayi. Budimi bua nwinyo nebushale buetu.”" 
Luke20:15 Nanku kumukokelabu ku mpenga kua budimi, kumushipa. Kadi muena budimi neenze tshinyi ne bantu bavua bafutshila budimi buende?" 
Luke20:16 Neafike, neabashipe, neapeshe bafutshidi bakuabu budimi buende. Bantu bumvua miaku ayi, kuambabu ne: — Abi kabienzeki nansha!" 
Luke20:17 Kadi Yezu ubatangila, kubakonkaye ne: — Mu Mikanda ya tshijila mbafunde ne: “Dibue divua bibaki balekela, dikadi dibue didi dishindika nzubu. Miaku eyi idi inumvuija tshinyi?" 
Luke20:18 Muntu yonsu udi upona pa dibue edi, udi ubozeka. Padi dibue edi diponena muntu, nedimuvi-ngutule." 
Luke20:19 Balongeshi ba mikenji ne bamfumu ba batuangaji bavua bakeba kukuata Yezu diba adi. Bualu bavua bamanye ne: Yezu mmutuelele tuetu lusumuinu elu. Kadi bavua batshina bantu. 
Luke20:20 Nanku kutuadijabu kutentekela Yezu. Ke kumutuminabu bantu bamueneka bu bantu ba muoyi muimpe. Kadi bantu aba bavua bakeba kuteya Yezu ku dimukonka bualu, bua bamone mua kumufila mu bianza ne ku bumfumu bua mulombodi wa buloba abu." 
Luke20:21 Nanku kukonkabu Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi, tudi bamanye ne: biudi wamba ne biudi ulongesha bidi amu pa biobi. Kuena utangila muanzu wa muntu. Kadi udi ulongesha anu patoke tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue ne: bantu benze." 
Luke20:22 Ke patudi tukukonka ne: bilondeshile mikenji yetu, tudi mua kuhita tshitadi kudi mukalenga wa bakalenga wa bena Rome anyi katutshifutshidi?" 
Luke20:23 Kadi Yezu uvua mujingulule budimu buabu. Kubambilaye ne: 
Luke20:24 — Ndejayi lukanu lunudi nufuta nalu tshitadi. Mpala ne dina bidibu bazolapu ebi mbia nganyi? Kuandamunabu ne: — Mbia mukalenga wa bakalenga. 
Luke20:25 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Nanku futayi mukalenga wa bakalenga bintu bidi biende. Kadi lambulayi Mvidi Mukulu kabidi biende Yeye. 
Luke20:26 Nanku kabavua mua kumusangana ne tshilema mu miaku ivuaye wambila bantu. Bivua Yezu mubandamune bivua bibakemesha. Kupuwabu. 
Luke20:27 Basaduke bakuabu kufika kudi Yezu. (Bobu aba ke badi balongesha ne: bantu ka bena babiika ku bafue. ) Kukonkabu Yezu ne: 
Luke20:28 — Mulongeshi, Moshe uvua mutufundile mukenji ne: “Muntu musele, mufue kayi muana, muanabu apiane mukaji awu, bua asanguile muanabu udi mufue. ”" 
Luke20:29 Kadi kuvua bana ba balume muanda mutekete ba muntu umue. Wa kumpala kusela mukaji, kufua kayi mulele muana." 
Luke20:30 Muibidi kupiana mukaji awu. 
Luke20:31 Pashishe muisatu amu momumue. Nanku bonsu muanda mutekete kusela mukaji awu. Kadi kufilabu bonsu, kabayi balele nende muana." 
Luke20:32 Ku ndekelu kua bonsu, mukaji awu kubatonda." 
Luke20:33 Kadi dituku diabika bantu ku lufu, mukaji neikale wa nganyi? Bualu bonsu muanda mutekete bavua amu bamusele!" 
Luke20:34 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Panu balume ne bakaji badi baselangana. 
Luke20:35 Kadi balume ne bakaji badi bakanyine kubiika ku lufu, kupeta muoyi mupiamupia, kabena baselangana kabidi to." 
Luke20:36 Nanku kabatshiena mua kufua, bualu nebafuanangane ne batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu. Badi bana ba Mvidi Mukulu, bualu mbabike ku lufu." 
Luke20:37 Moshe udi wamba patoke ne: bantu nebabiike ku lufu. Muaba udiye utela tshipuka tshitema kapia, udi winyika Maweja-Nangila ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wa Abrahame, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izake, ne Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe. ”" 
Luke20:38 Nanku Mvidi Mukulu kena Mvidi Mukulu wa bafue to, udi wa bantu badi ne muoyi. Bualu bonsu badi ne muoyi bualu buende." 
Luke20:39 Ke balongeshi bakuabu ba mikenji kuamba ne: — Mulongeshi udi muandamune anu bimpe. 
Luke20:40 Bualu kabatshivua bakimina kumuela nkonku mikuabu. 
Luke20:41 Kadi Yezu kubakonka ne: — mMunyi mudibu mua kuamba ne: Kristu udi wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide? 
Luke20:42 Bualu Davide mene mu mukanda wa misambu udi wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu uvua wamba Mfumu wanyi ne: Somba ku diboku dianyi dia balume," 
Luke20:43 too ne pangateka bena lukuna bebe bu tshidiatshilu kuinshi kua makasa ebe. ” 
Luke20:44 Padi Davide umubikila: “Mfumu wanyi,” mudi Kristu mua kuikala wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide mmunyi?" 
Luke20:45 Pavua bantu bonsu bateleja Yezu, kuambilaye balongi bende ne:" 
Luke20:46 — Nudimukile balongeshi ba mikenji. Badi basanka bua kuendakana bavuale mintumpu mile. Badi bananga bua bahele mioyi ya kanemu miaba idi bantu basangile. Badi basue kusomba mu nkuasa ya kumpala mu nzubu ya ditendelela, ne kupeta miaba ya lumu mu bibilu." 
Luke20:47 Kadi badi banyenga bakaji bakamba nzubu ne bionsu bidibu nabi. Pine apu badi batendelela mutantshi mule bua bamueneke bu bantu bimpe. Kadi nebabanyoke bikole bipite! 
Luke21:1 Yezu ukenzakana, kumonaye bena biuma bela milambu yabu mu mushete mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke21:2 Kumonaye kabidi mukaji mukamba mupele wela pende mu mushete makuta a tshiamu tshikunze abidi. 
Luke21:3 Ke Yezu kuamba ne: — Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: mukaji mukamba mupele ewu mmufile mulambu mupite wa bantu bakuabu bonsu. 
Luke21:4 Bualu bonsu mbalambule makuta avuabu kabayi nawu dikenga. Kadi mukaji mupele ewu mmufile konsu kavuaye mua kudia naku. 
Luke21:5 Bantu bakuabu bavua bakula bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bamba muvuabu bamuibaka ne mabue mimpe, bamulengeja ne bintu bivua bantu balambule Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi Yezu kuamba ne:" 
Luke21:6 — Matuku neakumbane adi bionsu binudi numona ebi ne bua kuupuka. Kakushala dibue ditentakaja pa dikuabu nansha. 
Luke21:7 Ke bantu abu kukonka Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi, bionsu ebi nebienzeke diba kaayi? mBishi mutuamanya ne: tshikondu tshidi ebi ne bua kuenzeka ntshimane kufika?" 
Luke21:8 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Nuadimukayi! Muntu kanushimi! Bualu bantu ba bungi nebafike, bangata dina dianyi, badiamba ne: “Ndi Kristu,” bamba kabidi ne: “Diba dikadi dikumbane!” Kanubalondi to." 
Luke21:9 Panumvua bantu bakula bua mvita ne buntomboji, kanutshinyi to. Malu aa adi ne bua kuenzeka bangabanga. Kadi nshikidilu wa buloba kakuikalaku diakamue to." 
Luke21:10 Ke Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Tshisamba netshiluishe tshikuabu. Bukalenga nebuluishe bukuabu. 
Luke21:11 Bikumina bienza bowa nebienzeke miaba yonsu pa buloba. Biyole bia nzala ne bipupu bia masama nebikale miaba mishilangane. Mu diulu nemukuluke bintu bidi bileja malu manene, bikuatshisha bantu bowa." 
Luke21:12 Kadi bionsu ebi kabiyi bianji kuenzeka, bantu nebanukuate, banukengesha. Nebanufile mu tshilumbuluilu mu nzubu ya ditendelela. Nebanuele mu nzubu wa lukanu. Nebaye nenu kumpala kua bakalenga ne kua balombodi ba ditunga, bualu nudi bangitaba." 
Luke21:13 Tshikondu atshi ke tshinudi mua kujadikila bantu bimvua munuambile. 
Luke21:14 Kanupampakanyi bua mushindu unudi mua kudilumbuluila. 
Luke21:15 Meme nennupeshe miaku ne meji bidi nansha umue wa ku bena lukuna benu kayi mua kutontolola, nansha kubenga." 
Luke21:16 Nansha batatuenu mene, bamamuenu, bana benu, bena diku dienu, ne balunda benu, nebanufunde ku tshilumbu. Nebashipe bamue ba kunudi." 
Luke21:17 Bantu bonsu nebanukine, bualu nudi bangitaba." 
Luke21:18 Kadi lusuki lua ku mutu wenu nansha lumue kaluakujimina. 
Luke21:19 Nenupande amu panuikala nunanukila. 
Luke21:20 — Panuamona tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime tshiela munkatshi kudi baluishi, numanye ne: tshikadi pa kubutuka." 
Luke21:21 Diba adi bantu bikala mu Yudeya, baye kusokoma mu mikuna. Bikala mu Yerushalayime, bumuke lubilu. Bikala mu mpata, kabapinganyi mu tshimenga to." 
Luke21:22 Bualu matuku awu neikale matuku adibu bakosa nsambu ya bantu, bua kukumbaja bionsu bidibu bafunde mu Mikanda ya tshijila." 
Luke21:23 Matuku awu, bakaji badi kulu kule, nansha badi bamusha bana, nebakenge bikole. Dikenga dinene nedikuate bena ditunga edi, bualu Mvidi Mukulu neabanyoke ne tshiji." 
Luke21:24 Nebabashipe ku muele wa nwita. Nebaye nabu mu matunga makuabu onsu, basuika nkanu. Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu nebanyange Yerushalayime, too ne pakumbana tshikondu tshiabu." 
Luke21:25 — Mu diba, mu ngondu, ne mu mitotu, nemumueneke bintu bileja malu. Pa buloba bisamba nebikuatshike bowa bunene, bua tshiona tshia mayi manene ne mavuala awu." 
Luke21:26 Bantu nebafue ku bowa, batshina malu adi mua kuenzeka pa buloba bujima. Bualu mabulunge a kulu neapampalumuke." 
Luke21:27 Diba adi bantu nebamone Muana wa muntu ufika mu divuba, uleja bukole buende ne butumbi." 
Luke21:28 Pikala malu onsu aa atuadija kuenzeka, nubanduluke, nukoleshe muoyi, bualu bakadi pa kunupikula." 
Luke21:29 Ke Yezu kubelela lusumuinu ne: — Tangilayi mutshi wa mfiku ne mitshi mikuabu yonsu. 
Luke21:30 Panudi numona mabeji ayi atuadija kusasa, nudi bamanye ne: tshikondu tshia luya tshikadi pabuipi." 
Luke21:31 Nanku nuenu kabidi, panuamona bionsu ebi bienzeka, nenumanye ne: Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu bukadi pabuipi." 
Luke21:32 Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: bena lelu kabakuanji kufua, malu onsu aa kaayi menzeke." 
Luke21:33 Diulu ne buloba nebijimine. Kadi miaku yanyi kayakujimina to. 
Luke21:34 — Dimukayi! Kanubuelakanyi amu mu bibilu, mu bunuavi, ne mu ntatu ya panu. Bualu dituku didibu bakosa nsambu ya bantu didi mua kunujikidila diakamue," 
Luke21:35 bu mudi buteyi bukuata nyama. Bualu dituku adi nedijikidile bantu bonsu ba pa buloba bujima diakamue. 
Luke21:36 Kanuladi tulu to! Nutendelele diba dionsu, bua nupete bukole bua kupitshisha bimpe bionsu bidi ne bua kuenzeka, ne bua kumueneka bakankamane kumpala kua Muana wa muntu." 
Luke21:37 Dituku dionsu Yezu uvua ulongesha bantu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi dilolu uvua ubanda pa mukuna wa Olive, ushalamu butuku bujima." 
Luke21:38 Dinda dionsu bantu bonsu bavua bafika mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua kumuteleja. 
Luke22:1 Tshibilu tshidi bantu badia mampa kaayi mela buanga, tshidibu binyika tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, tshikavua pabuipi." 
Luke22:2 Bamfumu ba batuangaji, ne balongeshi ba mikenji, bavua bakeba muvuabu mua kushipesha Yezu. Kadi bavua batshina bantu." 
Luke22:3 Ke diabolu kubuela munda mua Yudase Iskariyote, umue wa ku balongi dikumi ne babidi." 
Luke22:4 Yudase kuya kuyukila ne bamfumu ba batuangaji, kabidi ne balombodi ba balami ba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kumvuanga-nabu bua mushindu uvuaye mua kufila Yezu kudibu." 
Luke22:5 Bamfumu kusanka bikole, kumulaya bua kumupesha makuta." 
Luke22:6 Ke Yudase kuanyisha, kukeba diba dimpe divuaye mua kufila Yezu kudibu, bantu kabayi bamanye." 
Luke22:7 Munkatshi mua tshibilu tshia mampa kaayi mela buanga, dituku kukumbanadi di-vuabu ne bua kushipa bana ba mikoku bua didia dia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Luke22:8 Yezu kutuma Petro ne Yowanane, ubambila ne: — Nuye kutulonguelela didia dia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Luke22:9 Ke bobu kumukonka ne: — Udi musue tulongoluele didia edi penyi? 
Luke22:10 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Telejayi! Panuabuela mu tshimenga, nenusambakene ne muntu mulume, muambule mulondu wa mayi. Numulonde too ne mu nzubu muabuelaye." 
Luke22:11 Nukonke muena lubanza ne: “Mulongeshi udi ukuebeja ne: mu nzubu mutuadila, meme ne balongi banyi, didia dia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila muepi?”" 
Luke22:12 Nanku yeye neanuleje kulu nzubu munene udi ne bintu bionsu. Muine amu ke munualongoluela didia. 
Luke22:13 Ke Petro ne Yowanane kuya, kusangana bionsu anu muvua Yezu mubambile. Kulongololabu didia dia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Luke22:14 Diba dia didia dikumbana, Yezu kusomba ku mesa ne balongi bende." 
Luke22:15 Kubambilaye ne: — Mvuamujinge bikole kudia nenu didia edi dia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, tshiyi muanji kukenga." 
Luke22:16 Bualu ndi nnujadikila ne: tshiakudia kabidi didia edi, too ne pakumbanadi menemene mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke22:17 Ke Yezu kuangata dikopu, kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, wamba ne: — Angatayi dikopu edi dia nwinyo, nunue bonsu." 
Luke22:18 Bualu ndi nnujadikila ne: bituadija ku mpindiewu tshiakunua kabidi nwinyo, too ne pafika Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Luke22:19 Ke Yezu kuangata diampa, kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, kudikosolola, kudiabanyina balongi bende, wamba ne: — Etshi mmubidi wanyi, [undi mufile bualu buenu. Enzayi nenku bua kumvuluka." 
Luke22:20 Balongi bamane kudia, Yezu kubapesha kabidi dikopu, wamba ne: — Dikopu edi ntshiovu tshipiatshipia tshia Mvidi Mukulu, tshidibu bashindika ne mashi anyi, adibu bapumuna bualu buenu. ]" 
Luke22:21 Kadi monayi: muntu udi mungelele tshitungu udi muaba ewu. Tudi nende ku mesa. 
Luke22:22 Bushuwa, Muana wa muntu neafue, bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu muambe. Kadi muntu udi mumutungile tshitungu mmuena diakabi!" 
Luke22:23 Ke balongi kukonkanganabu ne: munkatshi muetu emu, udi mua kuenza bualu abu nnganyi?" 
Luke22:24 Balongi kutuadija kuelangana mpata bikole munkatshi muabu bua kumanya ne: wa munkatshi muetu udi mupite bakuabu ku buneme nnganyi? 
Luke22:25 Yezu kubambila ne: — Bakalenga ba matunga badi baatumina diyi. Bena mianzu badi basue bua bantu babinyike ne: “mBatuenzedi ba malu mimpe.” 
Luke22:26 Kadi buenu nuenu kabikadi nanku to. Bualu udi mupite bakuabu munkatshi muenu, udi ne bua kudileja mushadile ku bonsu. Udi utuma diyi, udi ne bua kuenzela bakuabu mudimu." 
Luke22:27 Muntu udi mupite bakuabu nnganyi? Ngudi musombe ku mesa anyi, udi ukuatshila bakuabu mudimu? Se ngudi musombe ku mesa. Nanku meme ndi munkatshi muenu, nnuenzela mudimu." 
Luke22:28 Nuenu nudi bashale nanyi matuku onsu mu makenga anyi. 
Luke22:29 Nanku bu mutua Tatu wanyi mumpeshe Bukalenga, meme kabidi ndi nnupeshabu." 
Luke22:30 Nuenu nenudie, nunue ku mesa anyi mu Bukalenga buanyi. Nenusombe mu nkuasa ya bumfumu bua kukosa nsambu ya bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia bena Izrayele." 
Luke22:31 — Simone, Simone! Dimuka! Diabolu mmulombe bua kunuteta, bu mudibu bapepula ntete ya kuenza bukula, bumusha bisote." 
Luke22:32 Kadi meme kukulombela kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua kulenduki mu njila wa ditaba. Nanku pawapingana kundi, ukankamike bana benu." 
Luke22:33 Ke Petro kumuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, meme ndi musue kuya nebe mu nzubu wa lukanu, nansha bua kufua nebe nemfue!" 
Luke22:34 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Petro, ndi nkujadikila ne: lelu tshitala katshiyi tshianji kusama, neumvile misangu isatu ne: tshiena mumumanye!" 
Luke22:35 Ke Yezu kukonka balongi bende ne: — Tshikondu tshimvua munutume kanuyi ne tshibuta tshia makuta, nansha tshia luendu, kanuyi ne bisabata, nuvua bakengele tshintu anyi? Balongi bende kumuandamuna ne: — Katutua bakengele kantu nansha kamue." 
Luke22:36 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Kadi mpindiewu muntu udi ne tshibuta tshia makuta, atshiangate. Udi ne tshia luendu, atshiangate kabidi. Udi kayi ne muele wa mvita, apanyishe tshinkutu tshiende bua kuusumba." 
Luke22:37 Bualu ndi nnujadikila ne: miaku idibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila bualu buanyi bua ne: “Batua bamuteke munkatshi mua benji ba malu mabi,” neikumbane. Bushuwa matuku anyi akadi ku ndekelu." 
Luke22:38 Ke balongi bende kumuambila ne: — Mfumu, tudi ne miele ya mvita ibidi eyi. Yezu kubandamuna ne: — mBikumbane." 
Luke22:39 Ke Yezu kupatuka, kuya ku mukuna wa Olive, mutua tshibidilu tshiende. Balongi bende kumulonda." 
Luke22:40 Bafika amu ku mukuna, Yezu kubambila ne: — Nutendelele bua kanulenduki, panutetabu." 
Luke22:41 Ke Yezu kumuka muaba uvua balongi bende mutantshi wa dibue dikupa. Kutuaye binu, utendelela," 
Luke22:42 wamba ne: — Tatu, paudi musue, angumushile dikopu dia dikenga edi. Kadi kabienzeki mundi musue meme, amu muudi musue wewe. [" 
Luke22:43 Ke mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kumumuenekela ufuma mu diulu bua kumukankamika. 
Luke22:44 Bowa bukole buvua bukuata Yezu. Ke kutendelelaye bikole bipite. Tshisululu tshiende tshifua tshiandamuka mashi, amata panshi. ]" 
Luke22:45 Yezu mumane kutendelela, kujukaye. Kupinganaye kudi balongi bende, kubasangana balale bua dibungama." 
Luke22:46 Ke kubakonkaye ne: — Nuenu nudi balale bua tshinyi? Jukayi, nutendelele, bua kanulenduki, panutetabu." 
Luke22:47 Patshivua Yezu wakula, bantu ba bungi kufika. Yudase, umue wa ku balongi bende ke uvua ubaludika. Kuyaye kudi Yezu bua kumutua mishiku." 
Luke22:48 Ke Yezu kumukonka ne: — Yudase, udi upangila Muana wa muntu ne dimutua mishiku anyi?" 
Luke22:49 Balongi ba Yezu bamona bitua bisue kuenzeka abi, kumukonkabu ne: — Mfumu, tubatape miele anyi?" 
Luke22:50 Ke umue wa kudibu kupatula muele, kukosa ditshi dia balume dia muena mudimu wa mutuangaji munene." 
Luke22:51 Ke Yezu kubakandika, wamba ne: — Lekelayi! Kanutungunuki to. Yezu kulenga muntu awu ku ditshi. Kupinganadi muadi mua kale." 
Luke22:52 Ke Yezu kuambila bamfumu ba batuangaji, balombodi ba balami ba nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bakulu, bavua bafika bua kumukuata ne: — Nudi bafike ne miele ya mvita, kabidi ne mitshi, bua kunkuata bu mushipianganyi anyi?" 
Luke22:53 Matuku onsu mvua nenu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kanuena bakebe kunkuata nansha. Kadi diba edi ndienu, didi miidima ileja bukole buayi." 
Luke22:54 Kukuatabu Yezu, kuyabu nende mu nzubu wa mutuangaji munene. Petro uvua ubalonda pa bule." 
Luke22:55 Bantu bavua batemesha kapia munkatshi mua lubanza. Nanku Petro kuya kusomba munkatshi mua bavua bota kapia. 
Luke22:56 Ke muena mudimu mukaji kumona Petro musombe ku kapia. Kumujojaye, wamba ne: — Muntu ewu kabidi uvua ne Yezu!" 
Luke22:57 Kadi Petro kuyila, wamba ne: — Mukaji, tshiena mumumanye nansha." 
Luke22:58 Katupa kipi, munga muntu kumona Petro, wamba kabidi ne: — Wewe kabidi udi umue wa kudibu! Kadi Petro kuandamuna muntu awu ne: — Muanetu, meme tshiena wa kudibu to." 
Luke22:59 Kupita bu diba dijima, munga muntu kujadika bikole, wamba ne: — Kamuena mpata! Muntu ewu uvua ne Yezu, bualu mmuena Ngalileya!" 
Luke22:60 Ke Petro kuandamuna ne: — Muanetu, tshiena mumanye tshiudi musue kuamba to! Patshivuaye wakula apu, diakamue tshilala kusamatshi." 
Luke22:61 Nanku Mfumu kukudimuka kudi Petro, kumutangila talalaa. Ke Petro kuvuluka tshivua Mfumu mumuambile ne: “Lelu tshitala katshiyi tshianji kusama, newikale mumane kumvila misangu isatu ne: tshiena mumumanye. ”" 
Luke22:62 Ke Petro kupatuka pambelu, kudila bikole." 
Luke22:63 Bantu bavua balama Yezu bavua bamulembakaja, bamutuuta." 
Luke22:64 Bavua bamubuikila ku mesu, bamukonka ne: — Udi mukutuute nnganyi? Jandula, tumone!" 
Luke22:65 Bavua bamuela kabidi nsenda mikuabu ya bungi. 
Luke22:66 Butshia, bakulu ba bena Yuda, bamfumu ba batuangaji, ne balongeshi ba mikenji, kudisangisha. Kubikilabu Yezu ku Tshipangu tshiabu tshikulu," 
Luke22:67 bamuebeja ne: — Wewe udi Kristu anyi? Utujadikile! Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nansha meme munujadikile, kanuakungitaba to." 
Luke22:68 Meme munukonke bualu, kanuakungandamuna to." 
Luke22:69 Kadi kutuadijia ku mpindiewu, Muana wa muntu neasombe ku diboku dia balume dia Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole." 
Luke22:70 Ke bonsu kukonka Yezu ne: — Nanku wewe udi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Munudi bambe amu, mmomu." 
Luke22:71 Nanku kuambabu ne: — Katukebi kabidi bajadiki to! Bualu tudi badiumvuile miaku ya mukana muende! 
Luke23:1 Bena tshipangu bonsu kujuka, kuya ne Yezu kua Pilate." 
Luke23:2 Kutuadijabu kumusonguela kua Pilate, bamba ne: — Tudi basangane muntu ewu upambula bena ditunga. Udi ukandika bantu ne: kanufutshi tshitadi tshia mukalenga wa bakalenga. Udi udiamba kabidi ne: ndi Kristu, mukalenga wa ditunga." 
Luke23:3 Ke Pilate kukonka Yezu ne: — Udi mukalenga wa bena Yuda anyi? Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Muudi muambe mmomu. 
Luke23:4 Ke Pilate kuambila bamfumu ba batuangaji, ne bantu bakuabu, ne: — Tshiena musangane bualu nansha bumue, bundi mua kunyokela muntu ewu." 
Luke23:5 Kadi bobu kusuminyina bikole bipite, bamba ne: — Udi ulongesha bantu, ubasaka bua batomboke. mMutuadije mu Ngalileya; mmuendakane mu Yudeya mujima; mpindiewu mmufike too ne munemu." 
Luke23:6 Pilate umvua miaku eyi, kuebejaye ne: — Muntu ewu mmuena Ngalileya anyi?" 
Luke23:7 Pilate umvua ne: Yezu udi ufuma mu buloba budibu balombola kudi Erode, kumutumaye kudiye. Matuku awu Erode kabidi uvua mu Yerushalayime." 
Luke23:8 Erode kusanka bikole pa kumona Yezu, bualu uvua mumvue bakula bualu buende. Kuonsu eku uvua ujinga kumonangana nende. Uvua mutekemene kumona ne ende abidi muvua Yezu wenza tshishima." 
Luke23:9 Uvua muele Yezu makonka a bungi. Kadi Yezu kavua muandamune ku dikonka nansha dimue. 
Luke23:10 Bamfumu ba batuangaji ne balongeshi ba mikenji batua muaba awu. Batua basonguela Yezu bikole. 
Luke23:11 Erode ne basolayi bende batua baseka Yezu, bamupepeja. Kumutuadikabu tshilamba tshimpe tshitoke, kumupingaja kudi Pilate." 
Luke23:12 Kuonsu eku Erode ne Pilate kabavua bumvuangana to. Kadi dituku edi kudiabu bulunda. 
Luke23:13 Pilate kusangisha bamfumu ba batuangaji, bakulu, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu," 
Luke23:14 ubambila ne: — Nudi bamvuile ne muntu ewu, nuamba ne: udi upambula bantu. Kadi ndi mumulumbuluishe kumpala kuenu. Tshiena mumusangane mupila ku bualu bubi nansha bumue, bunudi bamufunde." 
Luke23:15 Erode kabidi kena mumusangane ne bualu. Ke padiye mutupingajilaye. Nanku muntu ewu kena muenze bubi nansha bumue budi mua kumukebela lufu. 
Luke23:16 Ndi musue amu kumukumisha mikaba. Pashishe nemmulekele. [ 
Luke23:17 Ku tshibilu tshionsu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, Pilate uvua ulekela muena lukanu umue uvua bantu balomba. ]" 
Luke23:18 Kadi bonsu pamue kuelabu mbila ne: — Ushipeshe muntu ewu, utulekele Barabase!" 
Luke23:19 (Batua bela Barabase mu nzubu wa lukanu, bualu mu tshimenga bantu batua batomboke, bashipe muntu.)" 
Luke23:20 Bu mutua Pilate musue kulekela Yezu, kukonkaye tshiakabidi bantu." 
Luke23:21 Kadi bobu kuela Pilate mbila ne: — Umupopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane! Umupopele! 
Luke23:22 Pilate kubakonka kabidi musangu muisatu ne: — Kadi bualu kaayi bubi budiye muenze? Tshiena mumusangane ne tshilema nansha tshimue tshidiye mua kutuila. Nanku ndi musue anu kumukumisha mikaba. Pashishe nemmulekele. 
Luke23:23 Kadi bantu batua bateka amu mutoyi mukole, balomba amu bua bapopele Yezu pa mutshi mutshiamakane. Mbila yabu kupapisha Pilate mua kuenza tshivuaye musue." 
Luke23:24 Nanku Pilate kuitaba tshiyuabu balomba. 
Luke23:25 Kulekelaye muntu uvuabu bele mu lukanu bua buntomboji ne bua kushiyangana, bualu ke uvuabu balombe. Kadi kubapeshaye Yezu bua benze nende tshiyuabu basue." 
Luke23:26 Patuabu baya ne Yezu, kusangilabu ne Simone muena Sirene, uvua ufuma ku budimi. Basolayi kumukuata, kumupesha mutshi mutshiamakane, bua alonde nawu Yezu munyima." 
Luke23:27 Bantu ba bungi batua balonda Yezu. Munkatshi muabu mutua bakaji batua badila, batua mikemu bualu buende." 
Luke23:28 Yezu ukudimuka, kubambilaye ne: — Nuenu bakaji ba mu Yerushalayime, kanudidi bualu buanyi to. Nudile bualu buenu, ne bua bana benu." 
Luke23:29 Bualu matuku neafike, bantu nebambe ne: “Diakalenga ndia bankumba, ndia badi kabayi balela, kabayi banji kuamusha bana.”" 
Luke23:30 Diba adi bantu nebambile mikuna minene ne: “Nutupukile!” Nebambile mikuna mikese ne: “Nutujibikile! ” 
Luke23:31 Bualu padibu benzela lukunyi lubishi nanku, kadi lukunyi luume nebaluenzele tshinyi?" 
Luke23:32 Kuyabu kabidi mu njila ne bantu balume babidi bena tshibawu, bua babashipe musangu umue ne Yezu." 
Luke23:33 Bafika pa muaba udibu binyika ne: “Kabalubalu,” kupopelabu Yezu pa mutshi mutshiamakane. Kuelabu kabidi bena tshibawu babidi abu ku mitshi mitshiamakane, umue ku dia balume dia Yezu, mukuabu ku diende dia bakaji." 
Luke23:34 Ke Yezu kuamba ne: — Tatu, ubumvuile luse, bualu kabena bamanye tshidibu benza. Kuabanyanganabu bilamba bia Yezu, batshinka udi mua kubiangata." 
Luke23:35 Bantu bonsu batua bimane muaba awu, batangile. Bamfumu ba bena Yuda bavua baseka Yezu, bamba ne: — Uvua musungile bantu bakuabu. Pikalaye Kristu uvua Mvidi Mukulu musungule, adisungile, tumone!" 
Luke23:36 Basolayi pabu bavua bamuseka. Kusemenabu kudiye, kumupesha maluvu a buanji," 
Luke23:37 bamba ne: — Pawikala mukalenga wa bena Yuda, udisungidile nkayebe!" 
Luke23:38 Kulu kua mutu wa Yezu, ku mutshi mutshiamakane awu, bavua bafunde ne: “Ke mukalenga wa bena Yuda.”" 
Luke23:39 Muena tshibawu mukuabu, uvua kabidi mulembelele ku mutshi mutshiamakane, uvua upenda Yezu, wamba ne: — Wewe kuena Kristu anyi? Nanku udisungidile, utusungile ne tuetu kabidi!" 
Luke23:40 Kadi mukuabu kutandisha mukuende awu, wamba ne: — Kuena utshina Mvidi Mukulu anyi? mBakunyoke mushindu umue nende!"
