Luke23:41 Buetu tuetu, dinyoka edi pa bualu. mBatuenzele bilondeshile bituvua benze. Kadi yeye, kena ne bubi budiye muenze." 
Luke23:42 Ke kuambaye kabidi ne: — Yezu, wamyuluka, pawabuela mu Bukalenga buebe." 
Luke23:43 Ke Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi nkujadikila bulelela ne: lelu netuikale nebe mu mparadizu 
Luke23:44 Munda munya, diba kubuitshidila. Midima kuenzeka mu ditunga dijima, too ne ku diba dia isatu wa dilolu. Tshilamba tshiyuabu balembeleje mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kupandikatshi pankatshikatshi." 
Luke23:45  
Luke23:46 Yezu kuela diyi dikole ne: — Tatu, ndi nteka muoyi wanyi mu bianza biebe. Yeye mumane kuamba miaku eyi, kukulaye muoyi." 
Luke23:47 Mfumu wa basolayi ba bena Rome umona bivua bienzeka, kutumbishaye Mvidi Mukulu, wamba ne: — Bushuwa, muntu ewu kavua ne bualu to." 
Luke23:48 Bantu bonsu bavua bavua muaba awu bua kubandila bualu abu. Kumonabu bivua bienzeka abi. Nanku kupinganabu kuabu, badituuta bianza pa tshiadi ne dibungama." 
Luke23:49 Balunda bonsu ba Yezu, kabidi ne bakaji bavua bamulonda biangatshile ku Ngalileya, bavua bimanyine pa bule bua kubandila bionsu bivua bienzeka." 
Luke23:50 Muvua muena Yuda mukuabu, dina diende Yozefe, wa mu tshimenga tshia Arimateya. Uvua muntu muimpe, mutshinyi wa Mvidi Mukulu, muindile difika dia Bukalenga buende. Uvua kabidi muena Tshipangu tshikulu. Kadi kavua muanyishe muvua bena Tshipangu bakuabu bakose nsambu, nansha malu makuabu avuabu benza." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Kuyaye kua Pilate, kulomba tshitalu tshia Yezu." 
Luke23:53 Pashishe kutululaye tshitalu atshi ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Kutshijingilaye mu tshilamba tshienza ne buanda bua mitshi, kutshiteka mu lukita luvuabu bimbe mu lubuebue. Mu lukita amu kabavua banji kutekamu muntu mukuabu to." 
Luke23:54 Muvua mu ditanu. Nanku dituku dia Dikisha dikavua pa kutuadija. 
Luke23:55 Bakaji bavua balonda Yezu biangatshile ku Ngalileya, kulondabu Yozefe. Kutangilabu lukita, ne muaba uvuabu bateke Yezu." 
Luke23:56 Pashishe kupinganabu kuabu. Kulongololabu mafuta ne manananshi bua kulaaba tshitalu. Dituku dia Dikisha, bakaji abu kuikisha, bilondeshile mikenji ya ditunga." 
Luke24:1 Dituku dia lumingu, patshiatshia ponsu, bakaji bavua baye ku lukita. Bavua ne mafuta a dipembu dimpe avuabu balongolole." 
Luke24:2 Kusanganabu muvuabu bamane kumusha dibue ku mushiku wa lukita. 
Luke24:3 Kubuelabu mu lukita. Kadi nanshabu kusanganamu tshitalu tshia Mfumu Yezu. 
Luke24:4 Bavua bapampakana, kabayi bamanye tshia kuenza. Ke bantu babidi, bavuala bilamba bikenka, kubamuenekela." 
Luke24:5 Bakaji abu kutshina, binama panshi. Ke bantu babidi abu kubakonka ne: — Muntu udi ne muoyi, nudi numukeba munkatshi mua bantu bafile bua tshinyi?" 
Luke24:6 Katshiena apa. Ukadi mubiike ku lufu. Nuvuluke miaku ivuaye munuambile patshivuaye mu Ngalileya. 
Luke24:7 Uvua munuambile ne: “Badi ne bua kufila Muana wa muntu kudi benji ba malu mabi, bua bamupopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Kadi neabiike ku lufu dituku disatu. ”" 
Luke24:8 Ke bakaji abu kutuluka miaku ya Yezu. 
Luke24:9 Kumukabu ku lukita, kuya kulondela balongi dikumi ne umue, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu, bionsu bivua bienzeka." 
Luke24:10 Bakaji abu ke Mariya wa mu Magdala, Yowana, ne Mariya, mamuende wa Yakobe. Bakaji bakuabu bavua nabu, batua balondela bapostolu malu mushindu umue." 
Luke24:11 Kadi bapostolu bavua bela meji ne: malu adi bakaji abu batulondela aa kaena mua kuenzeka to. Nanku kabatua babitaba to. 
Luke24:12 Kadi Petro kujuka, kuya lubilu ku lukita. Kuinangilayemu, kumona panshi amu mikaba ya kujingila nayi tshitalu. Ke kupinganaye pambelu, ukema bikole munda muende bua bitua bienzeka." 
Luke24:13 Dituku adi, balongi babidi batua baya ku musoku uvuabu binyika ne: Emawuse. Uvua mutantshi wa kilometre bu dikumi ne umue ne Yerushalayime." 
Luke24:14 Batua bayukila pa bionsu bitua bienzeke. 
Luke24:15 Patshituabu bayukila, belangana meji, Yezu kusemena pabuipi nabu, wenda uya nabu mu njila." 
Luke24:16 Balongi batua bamumona, kadi batua bu bampofu, kabayi mua kumujingulula." 
Luke24:17 Ke Yezu kubebeja ne: — Nudi nuenda nuelangana meji pa bualu kaayi? Balongi kuimana, babungama bikole." 
Luke24:18 Umue wa kudibu, diende Kleyopase, kuambila Yezu ne: — Mu Yerushalayime emu, amu wewe ke udi kayi mumanye malu manene adi menzekemu, matuku adi panshi aa!" 
Luke24:19 Yezu kubakonka ne: — Malu adi menzekemu mmalu kaayi? Balongi kumuandamuna ne: — Malu avua menzekele Yezu wa mu Nazarete. Uvua muambi wa bukole. Uvua mubuleje ku midimu ivuaye wenza, ne ku miaku ivuaye wakula. Mvidi Mukulu, ne bantu bonsu, kumuanyisha." 
Luke24:20 Bamfumu ba batuangaji, ne bakulu betu, batua bamufila bua kumushipesha. Nanku kumupopelabu ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Luke24:21 Tutua batekemene ne: Yeye ke udi mua kupikula Izrayele. Kadi lelu kukadi matuku asatu adi bionsu abi bimane kuenzeka. 
Luke24:22 Bushuwa, bakaji bakuabu ba kutudi batua bankemeshe. Lelu patshiatshia batua baye ku lukita." 
Luke24:23 Kadi ki mbasangane tshitalu tshiende to. Nanku kupinganabu, batulondela kabidi muvua batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu babamuenekela, babajadikila ne: Yezu udi ne muoyi." 
Luke24:24 Bana betu bakuabu batua baye ku lukita. Kusanganabu bionsu anu mutua bakaji bambe. Kadi kabatua bamone Yezu to. 
Luke24:25 Nanku Yezu kubambila ne: — Nudi bantu badi kabayi mua kujingulula malu! Bidi binukolela bua kuitaba lukasa bionsu bitua bambi banumanyisha! 
Luke24:26 Kristu kavua ne bua kudianza kukenga nanku, bua kubuela mu butumbi buende anyi?" 
Luke24:27 Diba adi Yezu kubumvuija bionsu bivuabu bafunde bualu buende mu Mikanda ya tshijila, kutuadija ku mikanda ya Moshe, too ne ku ya bambi bonsu." 
Luke24:28 Bamane kufika pabuipi ne musoku uvuabu baya, Yezu kuenza bu muntu udi musue kutungunuka ne luendu." 
Luke24:29 Kadi balongi kumusengelela, bamba ne: — Shalaku netu, bualu butuku bukadi buila. Nanku Yezu kubuela mu nzubu, kushala nabu." 
Luke24:30 Kusombaye nabu ku mesa, kuangata diampa, wela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Pashishe kudikosololaye, kubabanyinadi." 
Luke24:31 Ke bobu kumutangila, kumujingulula. Kadi Yezu kubajimina kuisu." 
Luke24:32 Balongi kuambilanganabu ne: — Pavua Yezu utuambila malu mu njila, utumtuija Mikanda ya tshijila, katuvua bumvua bu kapia kosha munda muetu anyi?" 
Luke24:33 Diakamue balongi kujuka, kupingana ku Yerushalayime. Kuine aku kusanganabu bapostolu dikumi ne umue, bunguile ne balongi bakuabu," 
Luke24:34 babambila ne: — Bushuwa, Mfumu mmubiike ku bafue! Simone mmumumone!" 
Luke24:35 Balongi babidi abu kabidi kulondela balongi bakuabu malu onsu avua menzeke mu njila, kabidi ne muvuabu bajingulule Yezu diba divuaye ukosolola diampa." 
Luke24:36 Patshivua balongi bayukila, ke Yezu kuimana munkatshi muabu. Kubelaye muoyi ne: — Bupole buikale nenu!" 
Luke24:37 Kadi balongi bavua batshina, bazakala, bela meji ne: tudi bamone mukishi." 
Luke24:38 Ke Yezu kubakonka ne: — Nudi nupampakana bua tshinyi? Nudi nuela mpata munda muenu bua tshinyi? 
Luke24:39 Tangilayi bianza bianyi ne makasa anyi: se mmeme! Ndengayi, nujadike mundi. Bualu mukishi kawena ne mubidi nansha mufuba, bu mundi nabi emu." 
Luke24:40 Yezu wamba miaku eyi, kubalejaye bianza ne makasa ende." 
Luke24:41 Kadi balongi kabatshivua bitaba to, bualu bavua ne disanka dipite, bakema bikole be. Ke Yezu kubakonka ne: — Muaba ewu, nudi ne tshintu tshia kudia anyi?" 
Luke24:42 Balongi kumupesha tshitupa tshia mushipa mukanga. 
Luke24:43 Yezu kutshiangata, kutshidia, bobu batangile." 
Luke24:44 Pashishe kubambilaye ne: — Miaku imvua munuambile, pantshivua nenu, ivua ne: bionsu bivuabu bafunde mu mikenji ya Moshe, ne mu mikanda ya bambi, ne ya misambu, bidi ne bua kukumbana." 
Luke24:45 Ke Yezu kubambuluisha bua bajingulule Mikanda ya tshijila. 
Luke24:46 Kubambilaye ne: — Bavua bafunde ne: Kristu udi ne bua kufua, pashishe kubiika ku lufu dituku disatu." 
Luke24:47 Badi ne bua kulongesha bisamba bionsu mu dina diende, kutuadija ku Yerushalayime, ne: kudiye ke kudi bantu mua kupeta bukole bua kudilengeja, bua Mvidi Mukulu abajimijile mibi yabu." 
Luke24:48 Nuenu nudi ne bua kujadika bionsu ebi. 
Luke24:49 Meme mene nennutumine tshivua Tatu wanyi mulaye. Kadi nushale mu tshimenga, too ne panupuekela bukole bua kulu." 
Luke24:50 Pashishe Yezu kumuka nabu mu tshimenga, kuya pabuipi ne Betanya. Aku kuelaye bianza mulu, ubela lupemba." 
Luke24:51 Patshivuaye ubela lupemba, kumukaye pavuabu bimane, kumuambulabu mu diulu." 
Luke24:52 Ke bobu kumukukuila. Kupinganabu ku Yerushalayime ne disanka dinene. 
Luke24:53 Diba dionsu bavua batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu mu nzubu wende. 
John1:1 Pavua Mvidi Mukulu mufuke ku tshibangidilu bintu bionsu, Muaku ukavuaku. Muaku uvua ne Mvidi Mukulu. Muaku uvua Mvidi Mukulu." 
John1:2 Uvua ne Mvidi Mukulu ku tshibangidilu. 
John1:3 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mufuke bintu bionsu ne Muaku. Kakuvua tshintu nansha tshimue tshivua Mvidi Mukulu kayi mufuke ne Muaku. 
John1:4 Munda mua Muaku muvua muoyi. Muoyi awu uvua mupeteshe bantu butoke. 
John1:5 Butoke budi bukenka mu miidima. Kadi miidima kayivua mibuanyishe. 
John1:6 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutume muntu wende, dina diende nYowanane." 
John1:7 Yeye uvua mulue kujadika malu, bua kumanyisha bantu malu a butoke. Uvua mulue bua bantu bonsu bitabe tshidiye wamba." 
John1:8 Yeye mene kavua butoke. Uvua mulue kujadikila bantu malu a butoke. 
John1:9 Butoke ebu ke butoke bulelela budi bufika pa buloba bua kutokesha bantu bonsu. 
John1:10 Muaku uvua pa buloba. Mvidi Mukulu uvua mufuke bintu bionsu ne Muaku. Kadi bantu kabavua bitabe Muaku. 
John1:11 Muaku kufika mu ditunga diawu. Kadi bana bawu nanshabu kuwakidila. 
John1:12 Kadi bamue kuwakidila, kuwitaba. Kubapeshawu bukole bua kuikala bana ba Mvidi Mukulu." 
John1:13 Kabena babalele ku bukole bua mashi, mudi tatu wa pa buloba ulela muana. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke udi mubapeshe muoyi mupiamupia." 
John1:14 Muaku kudienza muntu. Kusombawu munkatshi muetu. Uvua muwule ne dinanga kabidi ne bulelela. Tuetu kumona butumbi buawu. Butumbi ebu ke budi Muana mulela umue upeta kudi Tatuende. 
John1:15 Yowanane ke uvua muambile bantu bualu buende. Uvua muele diyi dikole ne: — Yeye ewu ke umvua muambe ne: “Muntu neafike panyima panyi udi muntambe meme, bualu kabayi banji kundela, yeye ukavuaku. ”" 
John1:16 Muntu yonsu wa kutudi mmupete tshiende tshitupa tshia bubanji bua dinanga diende. Uvua mudiele lupemba misangu ne misangu. 
John1:17 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutuelele mikenji idi Moshe mutumanyishe. Kadi dinanga ne bulelela mbifika kudi Yezu Kristu. 
John1:18 Muntu nansha umue kena muanji kumona Mvidi Mukulu. Amu Muana mulela umue, Mvidi Mukulu udi musombe pamue ne Tatu, ke udi mutumanyishe Tatu." 
John1:19 Telejayi muvua Yowanane muandamune bamfumu ba bena Yuda ba mu Yerushalayime pavuabu batume batuangaji ne bena Levi kudiye bua kumukonka ne: — Wewe udi nganyi? 
John1:20 Yowanane kavua mubenge kubandamuna. Kadi kubambilaye patoke ne: — Meme tshiena Meshiya. 
John1:21 Kumukonkabu ne: — Kadi udi nganyi? Udi Eliya anyi? Yowanane kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena Eliya. Kumukonkabu kabidi ne: — Udi Muambi utudi bindile anyi? Kuandamunaye ne: — To. 
John1:22 Nanku kumuambabu ne: — Kadi udi nganyi? Utuandamune, bua tuye kuambila bavua batutume? Udi udiamba mene ne: ndi nganyi?" 
John1:23 Yowanane kuandamuna ne: — Ndi “Diyi dia muntu udi wela lubila mu tshipela ne: Longololayi njila wa Maweja-Nangila bimpe! ” (Ke bivua muambi Yeshaya muambe.) 
John1:24 Ku bantu bavuabu batumine Yowanane, kuvua Baparushe." 
John1:25 Ke bavua bamukonka ne: — Paudi kuyi Meshiya, kuyi Eliya, nansha muambi utudi bindile, kadi udi utua bantu mu mayi bua tshinyi?" 
John1:26 Yowanane kubandamuna ne: — Meme ndi nnutua mu mayi. Kadi munkatshi muenu mudi muntu unudi kanuyi bamanye. 
John1:27 Udi ulua panyima panyi. Kadi tshiena nansha muakanyine kusulula nshinga ya bisabata biende. 
John1:28 Bionsu ebi bivua bienzekele mu musoku wa Betanya, dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, uvua Yowanane utua bantu mu mayi." 
John1:29 Butshia, Yowanane kumona Yezu ufika kudiye. Kuambilaye bantu ne: — Tangilayi Muana wa mukoku wa Mvidi Mukulu udi umbusha bubi bua bantu." 
John1:30 Yeye ke umvua muambe ne: “Muntu udi ulua panyima panyi. Kadi udi mumpite meme. Bualu kabayi banji kundela, yeye ukavuaku.”" 
John1:31 Tshivua mumumanye. Kadi ndi mulue kutua bantu mu mayi bua kumumanyisha kudi bena Izrayele. 
John1:32 Yowanane uvua ujadika kabidi ne: — Mvua mumone Mueyelu wa Tshijila upueka mu diulu bu nyunyi wa nkudimba, umuikila." 
John1:33 Tshivua nansha muanji kumumanya. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua muntume bua kutua bantu mu mayi, uvua mungambile ne: “Muntu uwamona Mueyelu wa Tshijila upueka, umuikila, Yeye awu ke udi utua bantu mu Mueyelu wa Tshijila.”" 
John1:34 Ke Yowanane kuamba ne: “Mvua mumone nanku. Ke mundi njadika ne: Muntu awu ke Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu.” 
John1:35 Butshia, Yowanane uvua kabidi muaba awu pamue ne balongi bende babidi." 
John1:36 Umona Yezu upita, kuambaye ne: — Tangilayi Muana wa mukoku wa Mvidi Mukulu!" 
John1:37 Balongi babidi ba Yowanane bumvua muvuaye muambe amu, kulondabu Yezu." 
John1:38 Yezu ukudimuka, kubamonaye bamulonda. Kubakonkaye ne: — Tshinudi nukeba ntshinyi? Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Rabi (mmomumue ne “Mulongeshi”), utu usomba penyi?" 
John1:39 Yezu kubambila ne: — Luayi, nenumone. Kuyabu nende. Kumonabu muaba uvuaye usomba. Kumusombeshabu dituku dijima. (Diba dikavua bu pa inayi wa dilolu)." 
John1:40 Umue wa ku balongi babidi bavua bumvue muvua Yowanane muambe, balonde kabidi Yezu, uvua Andre, muanabu ne Simone Petro." 
John1:41 Andre kusambakena diambedi ne muanabu Simone. Kumuambilaye ne: — Tuvua bamone Meshiya. (Mmomumue ne: “Kristu”). 
John1:42 Kuyaye ne Simone kudi Yezu. Yezu kutangila Simone, umuamba ne: — Wewe udi Simone, muana wa Yowanane. Nebakuinyike ne: Kefase. (Mmomumue ne: “Dibue”)." 
John1:43 Butshia, Yezu uvua musue kuya mu buloba bua Ngalileya. Kusambakenaye ne Filipe. Kumuambilaye ne: — Undonde!" 
John1:44 (Filipe uvua muena Betsayida; Andre ne Petro bavua basombe kabidi mu musoku awu.) 
John1:45 Pashishe Filipe kusambakena ne Natanayele. Kumuambilaye ne: — Tuvua bamone muntu uvua Moshe mutele mu mukanda wa Mikenji, kabidi uvua bambi bambe. Ke Yezu, muana wa Yozefe, muena mu tshimenga tshia Nazarete." 
John1:46 Natanayele kuambila Filipe ne: — Mu Nazarete mudi mua kupatuka bualu bua nsongu anyi? Filipe kumuandamuna ne: — Luaku, neumone." 
John1:47 Yezu umona Natanayele ufika kudiye, kuambaye ne: — Ke muena Izrayele mulelela udi kayi ne dishima nansha dikese munda muende." 
John1:48 Natanayele kumukonka ne: — Udi mummanye munyi? Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Mvua mukumone, Filipe kayi muanji kukubikila, pauvua muinshi mua mutshi wa mfiku." 
John1:49 Nanku Natanayele kumuambila ne: — Mulongeshi, udi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, udi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele!" 
John1:50 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Udi witaba nanku amu bualu mvua mukuambile ne: ndi mukumone muinshi mua mutshi wa mfiku. Neumone malu manene mapite ebu! 
John1:51 Yezu kuamba kabidi ne: — Ndi nnuambila bulelela ne: nenumone diulu diunzuluke, batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu babanda bapueka kulu kua Muana wa muntu." 
John2:1 Kunyima kua matuku abidi, kuvua tshibilu tshia dibaka mu tshimenga tshia Kana mu Ngalileya. Mamuende wa Yezu uvuamu." 
John2:2 Bavua babikilemu kabidi Yezu ne balongi bende. 
John2:3 Pasua mviny o mumane kujika yonsu mamuende wa Yezu kumuambila ne: — Kabatshiena ne nwinyo kabidi to. 
John2:4 Kadi Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Mamu, wewe ke ukadi ungambila tshindi ne bua kuenza anyi? Diba dianyi ki ndianji kukumbana." 
John2:5 Mamuende wa Yezu kuambila bena mudimu ne: — Nuenze muonsu muanuambilaye. 
John2:6 Muaba awu usua milondu isambombu ya mabue ivua bena Yuda balamina mayi bua kuowabu, bu mudi mikenji yabu yamba. Mulondu onsu usua mua kubuela litre lukama." 
John2:7 Yezu kuambila bena mudimu ne: — Uwujayi milondu eyi ne mayi. Kuyuwujabu tente ne pa mishiku. 
John2:8 Yezu kubambila ne: — Mpindiessu, tuntayi mayi makese, nutuadile mulongolodi wa tshibilu. Kuyabu kumupesha." 
John2:9 Mulongolodi wa tshibilu kulabula mayi avua mandamuke nwinyo. Kasala mumanye kuvua nwinyo essu mutumina. (Kadi bena mudimu basua basune mayi basua bamanye). Ke kubikilaye usua mubuele mu dibaka. 
John2:10 Kumuambilaye ne: — Bantu bonsu badi banji kufila nwinyo muimpe kumpala. Padi bantu badibu babikila bamane kunua bikole, ke kushishabu kubapesha nwinyo wa nanku nanku. Kadi wewe kulama nwinyo muimpe too ne mpindiewu!" 
John2:11 Ke bualu bua dikema bua kumpala buvua Yezu muenze mu Kana mu buloba bua Ngalileya. Nanku kulejaye butumbi buende. Balongi bende kumuitaba. 
John2:12 Pashishe Yezu kuya mu tshimenga tshia Kefamawume ne mamuende, ne bana babu, kabidi ne balongi bende. Bobu kushalamu matuku makese." 
John2:13 Tshibilu tshia bena Yuda tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila tshikasua pabuipi. Ke Yezu kuya ku Yerushalayime. 
John2:14 Ubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kusanganaye bantu basumbisha ngombe, mikoku ne nkudimba. Kusanganaye kabidi bashintakaji ba makuta basombe ku mesa abu." 
John2:15 Ke Yezu kuenza mukaba wa mionji. Kubipataye bonsu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne mikoku yabu kabidi ne ngombe yabu. Kuimanshaye panshi makuta a basua bashintakajangana. Kutonkolaye mesa abu." 
John2:16 Kuambilaye basumbishi ba nkudimba ne: — Umbushayi bintu ebi apa! Kanuteki nzubu wa Tatu wanyi bu muaba wa kuendela mushinga! 
John2:17 Balongi bende kuvuluka miaku isuabu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, dinanga dindi nadi bua nzubu webe, didi dingosha munda bu kapia. ”" 
John2:18 Nanku bamfumu ba bena Yuda kukonka Yezu ne: — Udi mua kuenza bualu bua dikema kayi, bua tuetu kujadika ne: udi ne bukokeshi bua kuenza nanku?" 
John2:19 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Upulayi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu. Meme nemmuasulule mu matuku asatu. 
John2:20 Bena Yuda kumuambila ne: — Basua benze mudimu bidimu makumi anayi ne bisambombu bua kuasa nzubu essu. Kadi mmunyi muudi wewe mua kumuasulula mu matuku asatu? 
John2:21 Kadi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu usua Yezu wamba assu, ke mubidi wende." 
John2:22 Pakasua Yezu mumane kubika ku bafue, balongi bende kusuluka musuaye muambe. Nanku kuitababu bisuabu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila, kabidi ne bisua Yezu muambe." 
John2:23 Patshivua Yezu ku Yerushalayime, mu tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, bantu ba bungi basua bamuitabe, pasuabu bamone malu a dikema asuaye wenza." 
John2:24 Kadi Yezu kasua mubatekemene nansha. Bualu usua mubamanye bonsu bikole. 
John2:25 Kasua ukengela bua bamujinguluile malu a bantu. Bualu Yeye nkayende usua mumanye malu adi munda muabu. 
John3:1 Kuvua muntu, dina diende Nikodemu. Uvua wa mu tshisumbu tshia Baparushe, muikale kabidi umue wa ku bamfumu ba bena Yuda." 
John3:2 Dituku dikuabu kufikaye kudi Yezu butuku, umuambila ne: — Mulongeshi, tudi bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmukutume bua kutulongesha. Bualu kakuena muntu udi mua kuenza malu a dikema bu muudi wenza wewe, padi Mvidi Mukulu kayi nende!" 
John3:3 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi nkuambila bulelela ne: muntu nansha umue kena mua kumona Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu kabayi bamulele tshiakabidi. 
John3:4 Nikodemu kukonka Yezu ne: — Kadi muntu mumane kukulakaja, badi mua kumulela tshiakabidi munyi? Udi mua kubuela munda mua mamuende bua kumulelabu musangu muibidi anyi?" 
John3:5 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi nkuambila bulelela ne: muntu nansha umue kena mua kubuela mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu kabayi bamulele ku mayi ne ku Mueyelu wa Tshijila. 
John3:6 Tshidi muntu ulela, tshidi muntu. Tshidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila ulela tshidi Mueyelu." 
John3:7 Kuena mua kukema bualu mvua mukuambile ne: “Nudi ne bua kuledibua tshiakabidi buonsu buenu. ” 
John3:8 Lupepele ludi lutuuta kudilu lusue. Udi umvua tshiona tshialu. Kadi kuena mumanye kudilu lufuma, nansha kudilu luya. Ke mudibi bienzekela muntu yonsu udibu balela kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
John3:9 Nanku Nikodemu kukonka Yezu ne: — Bia nanku bidi mua kuenzeka bishi? 
John3:10 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Wewe udi mulongeshi wa bena Izrayele, udi mumanyike bikole, muudi kuyi mumanye malu aa mbishi?" 
John3:11 Ndi nkuambila bulelela ne: Tudi tuakula bitudi bamanye. Tudi tuamba kabidi bituvua bamone. Kadi kanuena nuanyisha bitudi tunujadikila. 
John3:12 Kanuena nungitaba pandi nnuambila malu adi enzeka pa buloba. Mmunyi munudi mua kungitaba pandi nnuambi la malu adi enzeka mu diulu? 
John3:13 Muntu nansha umue kena muanji kubanda mu diulu, pa kumusha Muana wa muntu udi mufume mu diulu!" 
John3:14 Bu umvua Moshe muele nyoka wa tshiamu tshikunze kulu kua mutshi mu tshipela, ke muelabu Muana wa muntu kulu," 
John3:15 bua muntu yonsu udi umuitaba ikale ne muoyi wa tshiendelele. 
John3:16 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua munange bantu bikole. Ke mutataye mubapeshe Muanende mulela umue, bua muntu yonsu udi umuitaba kafu to, kadi ikale ne muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
John3:17 Mvidi Mukulu kavua mutume Muanende pa buloba bua kupisha badi pa buloba, kadi bua badi pa buloba bapetele lupandu kudiye." 
John3:18 Muntu udi witaba Muana kabena bamupisha. Kadi udi ubenga kumuitaba, mbamane kumupisha, bualu kavua muitabe Muana mulela umue wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
John3:19 Telejayi mudi tshilumbu pa buloba: butoke mbufike pa buloba, kadi bantu kunanga bikole miidima kumpala kua butoke, bualu badi benza malu mabi." 
John3:20 Muntu yonsu udi wenza bualu bubi, udi ubenga butoke. Kena ufika padi butoke, bualu udi utshina bua malu ende mabi kaamueneki patoke." 
John3:21 Kadi muntu udi wenza malu malelela, udi ufika padi butoke, bua bantu bamone patoke ne: udi wenza malu ende bimpe, utumikila Mvidi Mukulu." 
John3:22 Pashishe Yezu kuya ne balongi bende mu ditunga dia Yudeya. Kuanjiye kushala nabu muaba awu amue matuku. Uvua kabidi utua bantu mu mayi. 
John3:23 Yowanane kabidi uvua utua bantu mu mayi ku Ayinone, pepi ne Salime, bualu muaba awu uvua mayi a bungi. Bantu bavua baye kudiye, ke yeye kubatua mu mayi." 
John3:24 (Diba adi kabavua banji kuela Yowanane mu lukanu to.) 
John3:25 Bamue balongi ba Yowanane kutuadija kuelangana mpata ne muena Yuda pa mikenji ya dikobolola. 
John3:26 Balongi kuya kudi Yowanane, kumuebeja ne: — Mulongeshi, udi uvuluka muntu unuvua nende dishiya dia Yardene, uuvua utulondela bualu buende awu. Ukadi pende utua bantu mu mayi. Bonsu badi baya kudiye!" 
John3:27 Yowanane kubandamuna ne: — Muntu kena mua kudipetela tshintu padi Mvidi Mukulu kayi mumupeshetshi. 
John3:28 Nudi mua kujadika mumvua munuambile ne: “Tshiena Meshiya, kadi bavua badianjila kuntuma kumpala kuende. ”" 
John3:29 Muntu udi ne mukaji ke bayende wa mukaji. Kadi mulunda wa bayende wa mukaji udi wimana pabuipi ne muena mukaji, umuteleja. Udi usanka bikole padiye umvua diyi dia bayende wa mukaji. Ke disanka dianyi dijima. Mpindiewu diakumbanyi." 
John3:30 Nenku Yeye atante, meme nkepele." 
John3:31 — Muntu udi ufuma mu diulu udi ku mutu kua bionsu. Muntu wa pa buloba udi muena panu, udi wakula malu a panu. Muntu udi ufuma mu diulu udi ku mutu kua bionsu." 
John3:32 Udi wamba malu avuaye mumone kabidi mumvue. Kadi kakuena muntu nansha umue udi witaba bidiye wamba. 
John3:33 Udi witaba bidiye wamba udi ujadika nanku mudi Mvidi Mukulu wamba malu malelela. 
John3:34 Uvua Mvidi Mukulu mutume udi wamba miaku ya Mvidi Mukulu. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi mumupeshe Mueyelu wende wa Tshijila kayi upima. 
John3:35 Tatu mmunange Muana; mmuteke bionsu ku bumfumu buende. 
John3:36 Muntu udi witaba Muana udi ne muoyi wa tshiendelele. Kadi udi kayi utumikila Muana kakuikala ne muoyi ewu. Mvidi Mukulu utshidi umufikila munda. 
John4:1 Yezu uvua mumvue muvua Baparushe bumvue lumu ne: Yezu udi utua bantu mu mayi, mmupete kabidi balongi ba bungi bapite ba Yowanane." 
John4:2 Yezu kavua mutue mene muntu nansha umue mu mayi to, amu balongi bende ke bavua batua bantu mu mayi." 
John4:3 Ke Yezu kumuka mu Yudeya bua kupingana mu Ngalileya. 
John4:4 Ke muvuaye ne bua kupitshila mu ditunga dia Samariya. 
John4:5 Kufikaye pabuipi ne musoku wa mu Samariya, dina diawu Sikare, uvua pabuipi ne budimi buvua Yakobe mupeshe muanende Yozefe." 
John4:6 Mu musoku awu muvua tshiina tshia mayi tshia Yakobe. Yezu uvua mupungile ne luendu. Kusombaye ku muelelu wa tshiina etshi. Diba dikavua bu pa dikumi ne ibidi ya munda munya. 
John4:7 Mukaji wa mu Samariya kufika bua kusuna mayi. Yezu kumulomba ne: — Mpeshaku mayi a kunua. 
John4:8 (Balongi bende bavua baye mu tshimenga bua kusumba biakudia.) 
John4:9 Mukaji muena Samariya kuandamuna Yezu ne: — Kadi, wewe udi muena Yuda! Muudi ukimina kundomba mayi a kunua, meme muena Samariya mbishi? (Bualu bena Yuda kabena bumvuangana ne bena Samariya to.)" 
John4:10 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Bu wewe mumanye bidi Mvidi Mukulu upeshangana, mumanye kabidi muntu udi ukulomba mayi a kunua, wewe ke uvua mua kumulomba mayi, yeye kukupesha mayi a muoyi." 
John4:11 Mukaji kumuambila ne: — Mulongeshi, kuena ne mbeketshi, kabidi tshiina tshidi tshiondoke. Kadi mayi a muoyi udi mua kuapeta bishi?" 
John4:12 Nkambua wetu Yakobe ke uvua mutupeshe tshiina etshi. Yeye mene uvua munue mayi a mu tshiina atshi ne bana bende, kabidi ne bimuna biende. Wewe udi mupite Yakobe anyi?" 
John4:13 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Muntu yonsu udi unua mayi aa neumvue kabidi nyota. 
John4:14 Kadi wanua mayi andi mmupesha meme, kakumvua kabidi nyota tshiendelele. Bualu mayi andi umupesha, neenze munda muende mpokolu wa muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
John4:15 Mukaji kumuamba ne: — Mulongeshi, umpeshe mayi awu, bua tshikadi kabidi ne nyota, tshikadi kabidi ne dikenga dia kusuna mayi muaba ewu." 
John4:16 Yezu kumuamba ne: — Uye kubikila bayebe, nufike nende apa." 
John4:17 Mukaji kumuandamuna ne: — Tshiena ne bayanyi. Ke Yezu kumuambila ne: — Udi muambilemu bushiwa ne: tshiena ne bayanyi. 
John4:18 Bualu uvua ne balume batanu. Mulume uudi nende mpindiewu ki mbayebe to. Uvua mungambidilemu bulelela. 
John4:19 Ke mukaji kumuamba ne: — Mulongeshi, ndi mmona ne: udi muambi." 
John4:20 Bankambua betu ba bena Samariya bavua batendelela Mvidi Mukulu pa mukuna ewu. Kadi nuenu bena Yuda, nudi nuamba ne: muaba udibu mua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu udi amu mu Yerushalayime." 
John4:21 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Ungitabe, tshikondu netshifike tshinuikala kanuyi nutendelela Tatu pa mukuna ewu, nansha ku Yerushalayime." 
John4:22 Nuenu, bena Samariya kanuena bamanye tshinudi nutendelela. Tuetu, bena Yuda tudi bamanye tshitudi tutendelela. Bualu lupandu ludi lufumina kudi bena Yuda." 
John4:23 Kadi tshikondu netshifike, ntshimane kufika mene, tshidi batendeledi balelela batendelela Tatu mu mueyelu ne mu bulelela. Bualu Tatu udi musue bantu badi bamutendelela mushindu ewu." 
John4:24 Mvidi Mukulu udi Mueyelu. Badi bamutendelela badi ne bua kumutendelela mu mueyelu ne mu bulelela. 
John4:25 Mukaji kumuamba ne: — Ndi mumanye ne: Meshiya (mmomumue ne Kristu) nealue. Pafikaye, neatujinguluile malu onsu." 
John4:26 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Ke meme udi wakula nebe ewu. 
John4:27 Diba adi balongi ba Yezu kufika. Kukemabu pavuabu bamusangana uyukila ne mukaji. Kadi muntu wa kudibu nansha umue kavua mukimine kumukonka ne: “Tshiudi ujinga kudi mukaji ewu ntshinyi?” nansha ne: “Udi uyukila nende bualu kaayi?” 
John4:28 Ke mukaji kushiya mulondu wende wa mayi muaba awu. Kupinganaye mu tshimenga muvuaye musombele, wambila bantu ne:" 
John4:29 — Luayi numone muntu uvua mungambile malu onsu amvua muenze. Bumue udi mua kuikala Meshiya anyi? 
John4:30 Nanku bantu kumuka mu tshimenga, kuya kudi Yezu." 
John4:31 Diba mene adi balongi kusengelela Yezu bua kudiaye, bamuambila ne: — Mulongeshi, anji ela kantu munda." 
John4:32 Kadi Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Ndi ne biakudia binuvua kanuyi bamanye. 
John4:33 Balongi kukonkangana ne: — Muntu uvua mumutuadile biakudia anyi? 
John4:34 Yezu kubambila ne: — Tshianyi tshiakudia nkukumbaja dijinga dia uvua muntume, kabidi nkujikija mudimu uvuaye mumfundile bua kuenza." 
John4:35 Nuenu nudi nuamba ne: “Kutshidi kushala ngondu inayi bua tshikondu tshia kunowa biakudia kukumbanatshi.” Kadi meme ndi nnuambila ne: tangilayi mu madimi; ntete mmimane kuboba, tshikondu tshia kuyinowa ntshimane kufika!" 
John4:36 Muntu udi unowa ukadi upeta diende difutu. Udi usangisha ntete bua muoyi wa tshiendelele. Nanku udi ukuna ne udi unowa badi basanka popamue. 
John4:37 Bualu lusumuinu elu ludi luamba malu malelela ne: “Muntu umue udi ukuna, mukuabu udi unowa.”" 
John4:38 Mvua munutume bua kunowa ntete mu budimi bunuvua kanuyi bakuatshile mudimu. Bantu bakuabu ke bavua babukuatshile mudimu. Nuenu nudi bapete bintu bia ku mudimu wabu. 
John4:39 Bena Samariya ba bungi ba mu tshimenga etshi kuitaba Yezu bualu mukaji uvua mubambile ne: “Muntu ewu mmungambile bionsu bimvua muenze.” 
John4:40 Ke muvua bena Samariya baye kudi Yezu bamusengelela bua ashale nabu. Yezu kushala muaba awu matuku abidi. 
John4:41 Bantu bakuabu bapite bungi kabidi kuitaba Yezu, bua malu avuaye yeye mene ubambila." 
John4:42 Ke bantu kuambila mukaji ne: — Mpindiewu katuena tuitaba amu bua biuvua mutulondele. Kadi tuvua badiumvuile nkayetu. Nanku tudi bamanye ne: Yeye ke Musungidi menemene wa bantu. 
John4:43 Yezu mumane kushala matuku abidi muaba awu, kumukaye bua kuya mu Ngalileya." 
John4:44 Bualu yeye mene uvua muambe ne: “Muambi kabena bamunemeka mu ditunga diabu. ” 
John4:45 Yeye mumane kufika mu Ngalileya, bena ditunga kumuakidila bimpe. Bualu bobu kabidi bavua baye bua tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila ku Yerushalayime, kabidi bavua bamone bionsu bivuaye muenzemu." 
John4:46 Nanku Yezu kupingana mu Kana ka Ngalileya muvuaye muandamuine mayi menze nwinyo. Mu musoku awu muvua muena mudimu munene wa mbulamatadi. Uvua ne muanende wa balume usama ku musoku wa Kefamawume. 
John4:47 Yeye mumane kumvua ne: Yezu mmufike mu Ngalileya ufumine ku Yudeya, kuyaye kudiye. Kumusengelelaye bua aye kujikija disama dia muanende uvua upunga ne lufu ku Kefamawume." 
John4:48 Yezu kumuamba ne: — Nuenu, kanuena ne mushindu wa kuitaba panudi kanuyi numona bishima ne malu a kukema." 
John4:49 Muena mudimu munene wa mu mbulamatadi awu kumuandamuna ne: — Mulongeshi, tuye kuanyi patshidi muananyi kayi muanji kufua." 
John4:50 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Pingana kuebe, muanebe udi ne muoyi. Muntu awu kuitaba muvua Yezu mumuambile. Kuyaye." 
John4:51 Patshivuaye uya kuende, bena mudimu bende kuvua kumuakidila, bamuambila ne: — Muanebe udi ne muoyi!" 
John4:52 Yeye kubakonka diba divua muanende musanguluke. Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Disama ndimushile muaba makelela pa diba umue wa ku dilolu. 
John4:53 Ke tatuende wa muana kuvuluka ne: diba adi mene ke divua Yezu mumuambile ne: “Muanebe udi ne muoyi”. Yeye ne bena mu nzubu wende mujima kuitaba Yezu. 
John4:54 Ke bualu bua dikema buibidi buvua Yezu muenze pavuaye mumane kufika mu Ngalileya, utumina ku Yudeya." 
John5:1 Bionsu ebi bimane kuenzeka, bena Yuda bavua ne tshibilu. Yezu kabidi kuya ku Yerushalayime." 
John5:2 Mu tshimenga atshi mudi dijiba ne bitanda bia makunji bia kuikishila bitanu. Dijiba adi didi pepi ne tshiibi tshia Mikoku, badinyike mu buena ebrewu ne: Betzata." 
John5:3 Mu bitanda ebi, babedi ba bungi bavua balalamu: ke bampofu, batebuki, bena tuneke. [Bavua bindile bua mayi avunduluke bikole." 
John5:4 Bualu mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila uvua upueka meba makuabu mu dijiba amu, uvundulula mayi bikole. Mubedi uvua ubuela mu mayi kumpala pavuawu avunduluka bikole, disama diende divua dijika, nansha diodi dikole bishi. ]" 
John5:5 Muaba awu uvua muntu ne disama bidimu makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu. 
John5:6 Yezu kumumona mulale panshi, kujadika ne: muntu ewu udi usama matuku a bungi. Kumukonkaye ne: — Udi musue disama diebe dijike anyi?" 
John5:7 Mubedi kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, tshiena ne muntu udi mua kunteka mu dijiba padi mayi avunduluka bikole. Pandi nkeba kuyamu, mukuabu udi udianjila kubuelamu kumpala kuanyi." 
John5:8 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Juka, ambula tshiata tshiebe, asa luendu." 
John5:9 Diakamue disama dia muntu kujika. Kuambulaye tshiata tshiende, kuasa luendu. Kadi bu muvua bualu ebu buenzeka dituku dia Dikisha," 
John5:10 bamfumu ba bena Yuda kuambila muntu uvuabu bajikija disama diende ne: — Dituku edi ndia Dikisha. Mikenji yetu kayena mianyishe bua wewe kuambula tshiata tshiebe to. 
John5:11 Kubandamunaye ne: — Muntu uvua mujikije disama dianyi uvua mungambile ne: “Ambula tshiata tshiebe, asa luendu.”" 
John5:12 Kumukonkabu ne: — Uvua mukuambile ne: “Angata tshiata tshiebe, asa luendu” nnganyi?" 
John5:13 Kadi muntu uvuabu bajikija disama kavua mumanye uvua mumujikijedi. Bualu Yezu uvua mumane kumbuka bua bungi bua bantu bavua muaba awu. 
John5:14 Pashishe Yezu kusambakena ne muntu awu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kumuambilaye ne: — Teleja. Disama diebe ndijike mpindiewu. Kuenji bualu bubi kabidi, bua bualu bupite bubi kabukukuatshi nansha." 
John5:15 Muntu awu kuya, kuambila bamfumu ba bena Yuda ne: Yezu ke uvua mujikije disama dianyi." 
John5:16 Bamfumu ba bena Yuda kufikila Yezu munda bikole, bualu uvua muenze bualu ebu dituku dia Dikisha." 
John5:17 Kadi Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Tatu wanyi udi ukuata mudimu diba dionsu. Meme kabidi ndi nkuata mudimu. 
John5:18 Biangatshile ku diba adi, bamfumu ba bena Yuda bavua bakeba bikole kumushipa, bualu uvua mushipe mukenji wa dituku dia Dikisha, kabidi uvua muambe ne: Mvidi Mukulu ke Tatuanyi menemene, uditeka nanku mulongu umue ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
John5:19 Yezu kuambila kabidi bamfumu ba bena Yuda ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: Muana kena udienzela bualu nansha bumue to. Udi wenza amu bidiye umona Tatu wenza. Tshionsu tshidi Tatu wenza, Muana udi utshienza kabidi." 
John5:20 Bualu Tatu udi munange Muana, unuleja bionsu bidiye wenza. Neamuleje malu a kuenza mapite aa bunene. Malu awu neanukemeshe." 
John5:21 Bualu bu mudi Tatu ubisha bantu bafue, ubapingajila muoyi, ke mudi Muana upesha bantu badiye musue muoyi." 
John5:22 Tatu kena ulumbuluisha muntu; kadi mmupeshe Muana bumfumu buonsu bua kulumbuluisha bantu," 
John5:23 bua bantu bonsu banemeke Muana bu mudibu banemeka Tatu. Udi kayi unemeka Muana, kena unemeka Tatu uvua mumutume." 
John5:24 Ndi nnujadikila ne: muntu udi uteleja bindi ngamba, witaba uvua muntume, udi ne muoyi wa tshiendelele. Kabena bamupisha ku tshilumbu to. Kadi ukadi mumane kumuka ku lufu, mupete muoyi." 
John5:25 Ndi nnujadikila ne: tshikondu tshidi kumpala, ntshimane kufika mene, tshidi bantu bafue bumvue diyi dia Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu. Badi badiumvue nebikale ne muoyi." 
John5:26 Bualu bu mudi Tatu ne bumfumu bua kupesha bantu muoyi, ke mudiye mupeshe Muana bumfumu bua kupesha bantu muoyi." 
John5:27 Udi mupeshe Muana mudimu wa kulumbuluisha bantu, bualu udi Muana wa muntu." 
John5:28 Kanukemi bua bualu ebu nansha. Bualu tshikondu tshidi tshifika tshidi bafue bonsu ba-vuabu bajika bumvue diyi dia Muana wa muntu. 
John5:29 Nebapatuke mu nkita yabu. Bavua benza bimpe nebabike bua kupeta muoyi. Kadi bavua benza bibi nebabike bua babapishe. 
John5:30 — Tshiena mua kudienzela bualu nansha bumue to. Ndi nkosa nsambu bilondeshile bidi Mvidi Mukulu ungambila. Ndi nkosa nsambu pa yoyi, bualu tshiena nkeba kuenza tshindi musue, kadi amu tshidi uvua muntume musue." 
John5:31 Bu meme ndijadikila nkayanyi, bindi ngamba kabiena mua kujadika bualu." 
John5:32 Kadi muntu mukuabu ke udi unjadikila bualu. Ndi mumanye ne: tshidiye wamba bualu buanyi tshidi tshitetela. 
John5:33 Nuvua batume bantu kudi Yowanane bua kumukonka bualu buanyi. Yeye kunujadikila malu malelela. 
John5:34 Meme tshiena nkengela ne: muntu ajadike bualu. Kadi ndi ngamba nanku amu bua numone mua kupeta lupandu. 
John5:35 Yowanane uvua bu muendu mutemesha ukenka. Nuenu kuanyisha bua kusanka tshitupa tshipi ku bukenke buawu. 
John5:36 Kadi meme, malu adi ajadika bulelela buanyi mmapite avua ajadika bulelela bua Yowanane. Malu andi ngenza, adi Tatu mumpeshe bua kuenza, ke adi ajadika bulelela buanyi, aleja kabidi ne: Tatu mmuntume." 
John5:37 Tatu kabidi uvua muntume udi ujadika malu anyi. Katshia kanuena banji kumvua diyi diende, kanuena banji kumona mpala wende." 
John5:38 Kanuena nulama miaku yende munda muenu. Bualu kanuena nuitaba uvuaye mutume. 
John5:39 Nudi nulonga malu a mu Mikanda ya tshijila, bualu nudi nuela meji ne: netupetelemu muoyi wa tshiendelele. Kadi mikanda ayi menemene ke idi ijadika bulelela buanyi!" 
John5:40 Kadi kanuena basue kufika kundi bua kupeta muoyi mulelela. 
John5:41 Meme tshiena nkeba bua bantu bantumbishe. 
John5:42 Kadi ndi numujingulule. Ndi mumanye ne: kanuena banange Mvidi Mukulu munda muenu. 
John5:43 Ndi mutumine kudi Tatu wanyi, kadi nuenu kanuena basue kungakidila. Kadi padi muntu mukuabu udiluila kunudi mu dina diende yeye nkayende, nudi numuakidila!" 
John5:44 Nudi basue kutumbishangana, kadi kanuena nukeba butumbi budi bufuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu nkayende. Munudi mua kuitaba mbishi?" 
John5:45 Kadi kanuedi meji ne: nennufunde kudi Tatu wanyi. Moshe unudi batekemene awu, ke wanufunda." 
John5:46 Bu nuenu bitabe Moshe menemene, nuvua mua kungitaba ne meme kabidi. Bualu Moshe uvua mufunde malu aa bualu buanyi." 
John5:47 Kadi bu munudi kanuyi nuitaba bivuaye mufunde, munudi mua kuitaba bindi ngamba mbishi?" 
John6:1 Pashishe, Yezu kuya dishiya dia dijiba dia Ngalileya (didibu binyika kabidi ne: dia Tiberiyade )." 
John6:2 Bantu ba bungi bavua bamulonda. Bualu bavua bamone bishima bivuaye wenza pavuaye ujikija masama a bantu. 
John6:3 Yezu kubanda pa mukuna, kusombapu ne balongi bende." 
John6:4 Tshibilu tshia bena Yuda tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila tshikavua pabuipi. 
John6:5 Yezu ukenzakana, kumona tshisumbu tshia bantu tshinene tshienda tshimuvuila. Nanku kukonkaye Filipe ne: — Nkuepi kutudi mua kusumba biakudia bia kubadisha buonsu bungi buabu?" 
John6:6 (Yezu uvua muebeje nanku awu bua kumanya tshivua Filipe mua kuandamuna, bualu uvua mudianze kumanya tshivuaye musue kuenza.)" 
John6:7 Filipe kumuandamuna ne: — Nansha tuetu batula nkanu nkama ibidi ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, katuena mua kusumba mampa makumbane bua muntu yonsu wa kudibu kupetaye kapese." 
John6:8 Umue wa ku balongi bende, dina diende Andre, muanabu ne Simone Petro, kumuambilaye ne:" 
John6:9 — Kudi nsongalume muaba ewu udi ne mampa a orje atanu ne mishipa ibidi. Kadi binebi, bua bantu bungi nenku, tshienzabi ntshinyi?" 
John6:10 Ke Yezu kuamba ne: — Sombeshayi bantu bonsu panshi. (Muaba awu uvua mashinde a bungi.) Nanku bantu kusomba panshi. Bantu bavua bu binunu bitanu. 
John6:11 Yezu kuangata mampa. Mumane kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, kuabanyinaye bavua basombe panshi abu. Kubapeshaye kabidi mishipa, bungi buvuabu basue." 
John6:12 Bonsu bamane kudia kuukuta, Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Sangishayi bipese bionsu bidi bishala, tshipese nansha tshimue katshijiminyi." 
John6:13 Kusangishabu bipese bia mampa a oije atanu bivua bishala pavuabu bamane kudia. Kuwujabu bisaka dikumi ne bibidi tente. 
John6:14 Bantu bamona tshishima tshivua Yezu muenze, kuambabu ne: — Bulelela, muntu ewu mMuambi uvua ne bua kulua pa buloba!" 
John6:15 Yezu kumanya ne: nebankuate ku bukole bua ngikale mukalenga wabu. Nanku kumukaye tshiakabidi, bua kuya ku mukuna nkayende." 
John6:16 Pakavua diba dibuela, balongi bende kupueka ku muelelu wa dijiba." 
John6:17 Kubandabu mu buatu. Kubangata kusabuka dijiba batangila ku Kefamawume. Butuku bukavua bumane kuila. Yezu kavua muanji kufika pavuabu. 
John6:18 Tshipepele tshikole tshivua tshituuta, mayi avua ajula bikole mavuala." 
John6:19 Balongi bavua bamane kuita buatu mutantshi wa kilometre itanu nansha isambombu. Kumonabu Yezu wenda pa mayi, usemena ku buatu. Buowa kubakuata." 
John6:20 Kadi Yezu kubambila ne: — Kanutshinyi, mmeme!" 
John6:21 Balongi bavua basue kumubueja mu buatu, kadi diakamue buatu kufika ku muelelu wa dijiba, muaba uvuabu basabukila." 
John6:22 Butshia, bantu bavua bashala dia munu dia dijiba, kumonabu ne: buatu muaba ewu buvua amu bumue. Bavua bamanye kabidi ne: Yezu kavua mubande mu buatu pamue ne balongi bende, bualu balongi bavua baye nkayabu." 
John6:23 Kadi matu makuabu afumina ku tshimenga tshia Tiberiyade, avua mafike pepi ne muaba uvuabu badile mampa, pavua Mfumu mumane kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila." 
John6:24 Bantu bamone ne: Yezu kenaku, balongi bende kabenaku, kubandabu mu matu awu. Kuyabu ku Kefamawume, benda bamukeba." 
John6:25 Kusanganabu Yezu dishiya dia dijiba. Kumukonkabu ne: — Mulongeshi, udi mufike apa diba kaayi?" 
John6:26 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: nudi nunkeba bualu nuvua badie buukute, kadi kanuvua bajingulule bishima bimvua muenze to." 
John6:27 Kanukuatshi mudimu bua biakudia bidi binyanguka. Kadi nuenze mudimu bua biakudia bidi bishala, bifikisha bantu ku muoyi wa kashidi. Muana wa muntu neanupe biakudia abi, bualu Mvidi Mukulu Tatu mmumutue tshitampi tshia bumfumu buende." 
John6:28 Ke bantu kumukonka ne: — Kadi tuenze tshinyi bua kukumbaja malu adi Mvidi Mukulu musue? 
John6:29 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Bualu budi Mvidi Mukulu utekemena kunudi, mbua nuenu kuitaba udiye mutume." 
John6:30 Kumuambabu ne: — Kadi bualu bua dikema kaayi buudi mua kutuleja bua tukuitabe? Biudi mua kuenza mbinganyi? 
John6:31 Bankambua betu bavua badie mana mu tshipela, bu mudibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Uvua mubapeshe mampa mafume mu diulu bua kudiabu. ”" 
John6:32 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: Moshe kavua munupe mampa a mu diulu nansha. Kadi Tatu wanyi ke udi unupa mampa malelela a mu diulu. 
John6:33 Bualu diampa didi Mvidi Mukulu ufila, ke didi difuma mu diulu, dipetesha bantu muoyi." 
John6:34 Ke kumuambilabu ne: — Mulongeshi, wikale utupeshaku matuku onsu mampa awu." 
John6:35 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Meme ndi diampa dia muoyi. Muntu udi ulua kundi kakufua nzala to. Udi ungitaba kakufua nyota nansha. 
John6:36 Kadi mvua munuambile ne: nuvua bammone kadi kanuena nungitaba to. 
John6:37 Muntu yonsu wa ku badi Tatu umpesha neafike kundi. Yonsu udi ufika kundi, tshiakumuipata to." 
John6:38 Bualu ndi mufume mu diulu bua kuenza tshidi udi muntume musue, ki mbua kuenza tshindi meme musue to." 
John6:39 Tshidi udi muntume musue ntshiotshi etshi: bua tshijimiji muntu nansha umue wa ku bantu badiye mumpeshe, kabidi bua mbabishe bonsu ku lufu, bapete muoyi dituku dia nshikidilu." 
John6:40 Eyowa, tshidi Tatu wanyi musue ntshiotshi etshi: bua bonsu badi bamona Muana, bamuitaba, bapete muoyi wa tshiendelele, kabidi bua mbabishe ku lufu, bapete muoyi dituku dia nshikidilu." 
John6:41 Bena Yuda kufikila Yezu munda, bualu uvua muambe ne: “Ndi diampa difume mu diulu.”" 
John6:42 Bavua bakonkangana ne: — Muntu ewu ki nYezu muana wa Yozefe anyi? Tudi bamanye tatuende ne mamuende. Kadi mudiye wamba mpindiewu ne: “Ndi mufume mu diulu mbishi?” 
John6:43 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Lekelayi kufika munda munkatshi muenu. 
John6:44 Muntu kena mua kufika kundi padi Tatu uvua muntume kayi mumufikishe kundi. Meme nemmubishe ku lufu dituku dia nshikidilu. 
John6:45 Bambi bavua bafunde ne: “Mvidi Mukulu neabalongeshe bonsu buabu. ” Muntu yonsu udi uteleja Tatu, ulonga malu ende, udi ufika kundi." 
John6:46 Tshiena musue kuamba ne: muntu kampanda mmumane kumona Tatu nansha. Amu uvua mufume kudi Mvidi Mukulu ke uvua mumone Tatu. 
John6:47 Ndi nnujadikila ne: muntu udi witaba, udi ne muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
John6:48 Meme ndi diampa dia muoyi. 
John6:49 Bankambua benu bavua badie mana mu tshipela, kadi kufilabu." 
John6:50 Diampa didi difuma mu diulu didi nunku, muntu udi udidia kena ufua to." 
John6:51 Meme ndi diampa dia muoyi difume mu diulu. Wadia diampa edi, neashale ne muoyi tshiendelele. Diampa dindi mfila, mmubidi wanyi meme. Ndi ngufila bua bantu bikale ne muoyi." 
John6:52 Yeye mumane kuamba nanku, bena Yuda kuelangana mpata bikole, bakonkangana ne: — Mmunyi mudi muntu ewu mua kutupesha mubidi wende tuetu kuudia?" 
John6:53 Yezu kubambila ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: nuenu kanuyi badie mubidi wa Muana wa muntu, kanuyi banue mashi ende, kanuakuikala ne muoyi munda muenu to." 
John6:54 Muntu udi udia mubidi wanyi, unua mashi anyi, udi ne muoyi wa tshiendelele. Meme nemmubishe ku lufu dituku dia nshikidilu bua apete muoyi." 
John6:55 Bualu mubidi wanyi udi tshiakudia tshilelela, mashi anyi adi tshiakunua tshilelela." 
John6:56 Udi udia mubidi wanyi, unua mashi anyi, udi ne muoyi munda muanyi, meme kabidi ndi ne muoyi munda muende." 
John6:57 Tatu uvua muntume udi ne muoyi, meme kabidi ndi ne muoyi kudiye. Momumue kabidi udi undia neapetele muoyi kundi." 
John6:58 Edi ke diampa difume mu diulu. Kadiena bu divuabu badie kudi bankambua benu bakadi bamane kufua. Muntu udi udia diampa edi neikale ne muoyi tshiendelele. 
John6:59 Yezu uvua muambe miaku eyi pavuaye ulongesha mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda mu Kefamawume. 
John6:60 Balongi ba bungi bamane kumvua muvua Yezu muambe, kuambabu ne: — Dilongesha edi ndikole be! Udi mua kudilaba nnganyi?" 
John6:61 Yezu umona ne: balongi bende badi banungana bua miaku eyi, kubakonkaye ne: — Miaku eyi idi mua kundenduisha anyi?" 
John6:62 Kadi nenuenze tshinyi panuamona Muana wa muntu upingana kuvuaye bangabanga? 
John6:63 Mueyelu wa Tshijila ke udi ufila muoyi. Muntu nkayende kena ne tshidiye mua kuenza nansha. Miaku imvua munuambile idi Mueyelu ne muoyi. 
John6:64 Kadi bamue ba munkatshi muenu kabena bitaba nansha. (Bualu Yezu uvua mudianjile kumanya ku tshibangidilu bavua kabayi bitaba. Uvua mumanye kabidi muntu uvua ne bua kumuyila mu tshitungu.) 
John6:65 Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Ke pamvua munuambile ne: muntu kena mua kufika kundi padi Mvidi Mukulu kayi mumupeshe mushindu wa kuenza nanku. 
John6:66 Biangatshile ku diba adi, bantu ba bungi kumbukabu kudiye. Kabavua bamulonda kabidi to." 
John6:67 Yezu kukonka balongi bende dikumi ne babidi ne: — Nuenu kabidi nudi basue kumuka anyi? 
John6:68 Simone Petro kumuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, netuye kudi nganyi? Wewe ke udi ne miaku idi ifila muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
John6:69 Mpindiewu tudi tuitaba, tumanya ne: wewe ke wa Tshijila udi mufume kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
John6:70 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Tshivua munusungule bonsu buenu dikumi ne babidi anyi? Kadi umue wenu ndiabolu! 
John6:71 Uvua Yezu wamba awu ke Yudase, muana wa Simone muena mu Iskariyote. Bualu nansha muvua Yudase umue wa ku balongi dikumi ne babidi, uvua ukeba kutungila Yezu tshitungu." 
John7:1 Pashishe Yezu kuendakana mu ditunga dia Ngalileya. Kavua musue kualukila mu Yudeya, bualu bamfumu ba bena Yuda bavua basue kumushipa." 
John7:2 Tshibilu tshia bena Yuda tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa tshikavua pabuipi. 
John7:3 Bana babu ne Yezu kumuambila ne: — Umuka munemu, uye mu Yudeya bua balongi bebe kabidi bamone midimu iudi ukuata." 
John7:4 Muntu kena usokoka bidiye wenza padiye musue bua bamumanye. Bu muudi wenza midimu minene nanku, enza bua bantu bonsu bakumone." 
John7:5 (Bana babu mene kabavua bamuitaba to). 
John7:6 Yezu kubambila ne: — Dianyi diba kadiena dianji kufika to. Kadi buenu nuenu, diba dionsu ndimpe." 
John7:7 Ba pa buloba kabena mua kunukina. Kadi badi bankina meme, bualu ndi njadika ne: midimu idibu bakuata mmibi." 
John7:8 Nuye nuenu ku tshibilu. Meme tshiena nya ku tshibilu etshi to, bualu dianyi diba kadiena dianji kufika." 
John7:9 Yezu mumane kubambila nanku, kushalaye mu Ngalileya." 
John7:10 Bana babu ne Yezu bamane kuya ku tshibilu atshi, Yezu kabidi kuyamu mu musokoku, kayi musue kudileja kudi bantu." 
John7:11 Bamfumu ba bena Yuda bavua bamukeba mu tshibilu atshi, bakonkangana ne: — Udi penyi?" 
John7:12 Bantu bavua belangana mpata bikole bualu buende. Bamue bavua bamba ne: “Mmuntu wa malu mimpe.” Bakuabu ne: “To, udi udinga bantu.”" 
John7:13 Kadi kakuvua muntu nansha umue uvua umutela patoke, bualu bavua batshina bamfumu ba bena Yuda." 
John7:14 Matuku a tshibilu akavua pankatshikatshi, ke Yezu kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kubanga kulongesha." 
John7:15 Bena Yuda bavua bakatshila, bamba ne: — Mmunyi mudi muntu ewu mumanye malu bungi nenku, kayi mulonge mikanda." 
John7:16 Ke Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Dilongesha dindi ndongesha kadiena difuma kundi, kadi kudi Mvidi Mukulu uvua muntume." 
John7:17 Muntu udi musue kuenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, neajingulule mudi dilongesha dianyi difume kudi Mvidi Mukulu, nansha kundi meme nkayanyi." 
John7:18 Muntu udi wakula mu dina diende nkayende udi udikebela lumu. Kadi muntu udi ukuata mudimu bua kutumbisha uvua mumutume, udi wamba malu malelela. Kena ushima ku bualu nansha bumue to." 
John7:19 Moshe uvua munuelele mikenji. Ki mmomu anyi? Kadi kakuena muntu wa kunudi nansha umue udi utumikila mikenji eyi. Kadi nudi nukeba kunshipa bua tshinyi? 
John7:20 Bantu kumuandamuna ne: — Udi ne mukishi mubi munda muebe! Udi ukeba kukushipa nnganyi? 
John7:21 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Ndi muenze amu tshishima tshimue, nuenu nukadi nukemangana bonsu!" 
John7:22 Moshe uvua munuelele mukenji wa kuteka bana ba balume panshi. Moshe kavua mutuadije kuenza nanku to, kadi bavua batuadija mbankambua benu. Nudi nuanyisha bua bateke muntu panshi, nansha dituku dia Dikisha!" 
John7:23 Panudi nuteka muana wa balume panshi dituku dia Dikisha, bualu kanuena basue kunyanga mikenji ya Moshe, kadi nudi numfikila munda bua tshinyi, pandi meme mujikije disama dijima dia muntu dituku dia Dikisha?" 
John7:24 Lekelayi kukosa nsambu amu ku malu anudi numona ne mesu. Kadi nulonde tshilumbu tshia muntu kanuyi ne kansungasunga. 
John7:25 Bena mu Yerushalayime bakuabu bavua bakonka ne: — Muntu ewu bamfumu bavua bakeba kumushipa, ki mmomumue anyi?" 
John7:26 Kadi tangilayi: udi wakula kumpala kua bantu bonsu, kakuyi muntu umuenza bualu! Bamfumu betu mbajadike bulelela ne: udi Meshiya anyi?" 
John7:27 Kadi pafika Meshiya, muntu kena mua kumanya kudiye ufuma. Kadi muntu ewu tudi bamanye kudiye ufuma." 
John7:28 Diba adi Yezu uvua ulongesha mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kuelaye diyi dikole ne: — Nuenu nudi baajingulule meme, bamanye menemene kundi mfuma anyi? Tshiena mudivuile mu dina dianyi to. Kadi uvua muntume, nudi mua kutekemena kudiye. Nuenu kanuena bamumanye." 
John7:29 Meme ndi mumumanye, bualu ndi mufume kudiye. Yeye kabidi ke udi muntume." 
John7:30 Nanku bantu bavua basue kumukuata. Kadi muntu nansha umue kavua mua kumupeta, bualu diba dia kumukuata kadivua dianji kukumbana." 
John7:31 Kadi ba bungi ba ku bavua muaba awu, kumuitaba. Bavua bakonkangana ne: “Pafika Meshiya, neenze bishima bipite bivua muntu ewu muenze anyi?”" 
John7:32 Baparushe kumvua bantu bavule banungana bua Yezu. Ke bamfumu ba batuangaji ne Baparushe kutuma basolayi bua kumukuata. 
John7:33 Kadi Yezu kuamba ne: — Ntshidi kabidi nenu amu bua matuku utabala ku minu, pashishe nenye kudi uvua muntume." 
John7:34 Nenunkebe, kadi kanuakummona kabidi. Bualu kanuena mua kuya muaba undi to." 
John7:35 Bena Yuda kukonkangana ne: — Nkuepi kuayaye kutudi katuyi mua kumumona? Uyaya kudi bena Yuda badi batangalaka mu bena Ngreke bua kulongesha bena Ngreke anyi? 
John7:36 Padiye wamba ne: Nenunkebe kanuyi nummona, bualu kanuena mua kuya kundi nya, tshidiye musue kumvuija ntshinyi?" 
John7:37 Dituku dia ndekelu dia tshibilu divua dituku dinene dipite. Dituku adi, Yezu kuimana kulu kumpala kua bantu tshisumbu tshinene, wela diyi dikole ne: — Pikala muntu ne nyota, alue kundi, anue." 
John7:38 Ke padibu bafunde mu Mikanda ya tshijila ne: “Misulu ya mayi a muoyi neyipueke munda mua muntu udi ungitaba.” 
John7:39 (Yezu uvua uleja nanku Mueyelu wa Tshijila uvua bantu bavua bamuitaba ne bua kupeta. Bualu diba adi bantu kabavua banji kupeta Mueyelu wa Tshijila to, bualu Yezu kavua muanji kupeta butumbi buende)." 
John7:40 Ku bantu bavua bamane kumvua muvua Yezu muakule, bamue bavua bamba ne: — Bulelela muntu ewu udi Muambi utudi bindile!" 
John7:41 Bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — Yeye ke Meshiya! Kadi bamue bavua bakonka ne: — Meshiya udi mua kufumina mu Ngalileya anyi? 
John7:42 Mbafunde mu Mikanda ya tshijila ne: Meshiya neikale wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide. Neatumine mu Betleyeme, mu musoku uvua Davide usomba." 
John7:43 Nanku bantu kuditapulula bua Yezu. 
John7:44 Bamue ba kudibu bavua basue kumukuata. Kadi muntu nansha umue kavua umulenga pambidi. 
John7:45 Basolayi kupingana kudi bamfumu ba batuangaji ne kudi Baparushe. Bobu kubakonka ne: — Kanuena balue ne Yezu bua tshinyi? 
John7:46 Basolayi kuandamuna ne: — Katshia muntu kena muanji kuakula bu muntu ewu! 
John7:47 Ke Baparushe kubakonka ne: — Mbanudinge ne nuenu kabidi anyi? 
John7:48 Kudi mfumu wa kutudi nansha umue, nansha muntu wa ku Baparushe uvua mumuitabe anyi?" 
John7:49 Kadi bantu abu kabena bamanye mikenji ya Moshe nansha. Mbantu bavuabu bela mulawu! 
John7:50 Nikodemu uvua umue wa ku Baparushe bavua muaba awu. Ke yeye uvua muye kumonangana ne Yezu kumpala kua matuku. Kubambilaye ne: 
John7:51 — Bilondeshile mikenji yetu, katuena mua kupisha muntu katuyi banji kumvua bidiye wamba, katuyi bamanye bivuaye muenze." 
John7:52 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Wewe kabidi udi muena Ngalileya anyi? Longa Mikanda ya tshijila! Neumone ne: muambi nansha umue katshia ki mmuanji kufuma ku Ngalileya. [ 
John7:53 Pashishe muntu yonsu kupingana kuende. 
John8:1 Yezu kuya ku mukuna wa Olive. 
John8:2 Butshia dinda dionsu, kupinganaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu bavule kutantshila kudiye. Yezu usomba kubangaye kubalongesha." 
John8:3 Balongeshi ba mikenji ne Baparushe kumutuadila mukaji uvuabu bajikidile wenda buendenda. Kumutekabu kumpala kua bantu bonsu. 
John8:4 Kuambilabu Yezu ne: — Mulongeshi, tuvua bajikidile mukaji ewu wenda buendenda." 
John8:5 Kadi Moshe uvua mutuelele mukenji bua kushipa ne mabue bakaji ba mushindu ewu. Kadi wewe pa tshilumbu etshi, udi wamba bishi?" 
John8:6 Bavua bamba nanku bua kumuteta, bua kumonabu mua kumusonguela. Kadi Yezu kuzonzama, kubanga kufunda ne munu panshi." 
John8:7 Pavuabu batungunuka amu ne dimukonka, kubandulukaye, kubambila ne: — Muntu wa kunudi udi kayi muanji kuenza bualu bubi, adianjile kumuasa dibue." 
John8:8 Pashishe Yezu kuzonzama tshiakabidi, kutungunuka ne difunda panshi." 
John8:9 Bobu bamane kumvua miaku ayi, kulamukabu ku muntu ku muntu, bituadije ku bakulumpe. Yezu kushala nkayende pamue ne mukaji. Mukaji awu utshivua anu muimane kumpala kuende." 
John8:10 Yezu kubanduluka, kumukonka ne: — Kadi badi penyi? Kakuena muntu udi mukupishe anyi?" 
John8:11 Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Mulongeshi, kakuena muntu uvua mumpishe. Ke Yezu kumuambila ne: — Nansha meme kabidi tshiena nkupisha to. Udi mua kumuka, kadi kuenji kabidi bualu bubi to.]" 
John8:12 Yezu kulongesha kabidi bantu, ubambila ne: — Meme ndi butoke bua badi pa buloba. Muntu udi undonda katshia kena wenda mu miidima, kadi neikale ne butoke bua muoyi." 
John8:13 Baparushe kumuamba ne: — Udi udijadikila malu ebe nkayebe. Nenku malu audi wamba kaena malu a nsongu to. 
John8:14 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Nansha meme ndijadikila malu anyi, bindi ngamba bidi bilelela. Bualu ndi mumanye kundi mufume, nansha kundi nya. Kadi nuenu kanuena bamanye kundi mufume, nansha kundi nya." 
John8:15 Nudi nukosa nsambu mudi bantu bakosa. Kadi meme tshiena nkosa nsambu ya muntu nansha umue to. 
John8:16 Kadi nansha meme mukose nsambu, ndi nyikosa amu pa yoyi, bualu tshiena nkayanyi bua kukosa nsambu to, kadi Tatu uvua muntume udi pamue nanyi." 
John8:17 Mu mukanda wenu wa mikenji mbafunde ne: padi bantu babidi bajadika mushindu umue bualu, tshidibu bamba tshidi tshilelela." 
John8:18 Ndi ndijadikila bualu buanyi, kabidi Tatu uvua muntume udi ujadika bualu buanyi." 
John8:19 Bobu kumukonka ne: — Tatu webe udi penyi? Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Kanuena bamanye nansha meme, nansha Tatu. Bu nuenu bammanye meme, nuvua mua kumanya kabidi Tatu wanyi." 
John8:20 Yezu uvua muambile bantu miaku eyi, pavuaye ulongesha mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mu tshibambalu tshiyuabu balamina mishete ya kuela makuta a kulambula Mvidi Mukulu. Muntu nansha umue kavua mumukuate, bualu diba diende kadivua dianji kukumbana." 
John8:21 Yezu kubambila kabidi ne: — Meme nengumuke. Nenunkebe. Kadi nenufuile mu malu enu mabi. Kanuena mua kuya kundi nya. 
John8:22 Bena Yuda kukonkangana ne: — Neadishipe anyi? Bualu udi wamba ne: “Kanuena mua kuya kundi nya!” 
John8:23 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nuenu nudi bafume panshi pa buloba. Kadi meme ndi mfuma mulu. Nuenu nudi ba pa buloba ebu, kadi meme tshiena wa pa buloba ebu nansha." 
John8:24 Ke pandi munuambile ne: nenufuile mu malu enu mabi. Bualu panuikala kanuyi nuitaba ne: “Meme ndi mundi, ” nenufue mu malu enu mabi." 
John8:25 Kumukonkabu ne: — Wewe udi nganyi? Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Amu mumvua munuambile biangatshile ku tshibangidilu, ke mundi." 
John8:26 Ndi ne malu a bungi a kuamba, kabidi a kunudiwula nawu. Kadi uvua muntume udi wamba malu malelela. Meme ndi ngambila bantu amu malu andi mumvue kudiye." 
John8:27 Kabatua bajingulula ne: utua utela Tatu. 
John8:28 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Nuenu bamane kuela Muana wa muntu kulu, nenumanye ne: “ndi mundi.” Nenujingulule ne: tshiena ndienzela bualu nansha bumue nkayanyi. Kadi ndi ngamba amu malu adi Tatu mundongeshe." 
John8:29 Utua muntume udi pamue nanyi. Kavua mundekelele nkayanyi nansha, bualu ndi ngenza matuku onsu malu adi amusankisha." 
John8:30 Yezu mumane kuamba nanku, bantu ba bungi kumuitababu." 
John8:31 Ke Yezu kuambila bena Yuda batua bamuitaba ne: — Panudi nuitaba muenu muonsu dilongesha dianyi, nenuikale bulelela balongi banyi." 
John8:32 Nanku nenumanye bulelela. Bulelela nebunuenze bantu badikadile. 
John8:33 Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Tuetu tudi ndelanganyi ya Abrahame. Katuena banji kuikala bapika ba muntu nansha. Mmunyi muudi utuamba ne: Nenuikale bantu badikadile? 
John8:34 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: muntu yonsu udi wenza bualu bubi udi mupika wa bubi. 
John8:35 Mupika kena ushala kashidi mu diku to. Kadi muana udi ushalamu kashidi. 
John8:36 Padi Muana unupikula, nenuikale bantu badikadile bulelela." 
John8:37 Ndi mumanye ne: nudi ndelanganyi ya Abrahame. Kadi nudi nukeba kunshipa, bualu kanuena banyishe dilongesha dianyi." 
John8:38 Ndi ngamba bi-vua Tatu wanyi mundeje. Kadi nuenu nudi nuenza bivua tatuenu munuambile. 
John8:39 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Tatuetu ke Abrahame. Yezu kubambila ne: — Bu nuenu bikale bana ba Abrahame, nuvua mua kukuata midimu ivuaye mukuate." 
John8:40 Kadi mpindiewu nansha mundi mumane kunuambila malu malelela andi mupete kudi Mvidi Mukulu, nudi nukeba kunshipa. Abrahame kavua muenze bualu bua mushindu ewu to." 
John8:41 Nudi nuenza midimu ya momumue ne idi tatuenu wenza. Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Katuena bana balela mu buendenda to. Tudi amu ne Tatu umue, ke Mvidi Mukulu." 
John8:42 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Bu Mvidi Mukulu muikale Tatuenu bulelela, nuvua mua kunnanga. Bualu meme ndi mutumine kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Ndi panuapa mu dina diende. Tshiena mudivuile mu dina dianyi to. Kadi yeye ke uvua muntume." 
John8:43 Tshinudi kanuyi numvuila bindi nnuambila ntshinyi? Bualu kanuena ne mushindu wa kuteleja miaku yanyi. 
John8:44 Diabolu ke tatuenu. Nudi basue kuenza bidi tatuenu ujinga. Biangatshile ku tshibangidilu uvua mushipianganyi. Katshia ki mmuanji kushala mu bulelela, bualu bulelela kabuena munda muende. Padiye wamba malu a dishima, malu awu ke adi munda muende, bualu udi mudingianganyi, kabidi tatuende wa dishima." 
John8:45 Kadi meme ndi ngamba malu malelela. Ke panudi kanuyi nungitaba. 
John8:46 Wa munkatshi muenu udi mua kuntuisha ne: Uvua muenze bibi, nnganyi? Pandi ngamba bulelela, kanuena nungitaba bua tshinyi?" 
John8:47 Muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi uteleja miaku ya Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi nuenu kanuena ba Mvidi Mukulu to. Ke panudi kanuyi nunteleja. 
John8:48 Bena Yuda kuandamuna Yezu ne: — Tuvua tuambilamu ne: udi muena Samariya, kabidi ne: udi ne mukishi mubi munda muebe." 
John8:49 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Meme tshiena ne mukishi mubi munda to. Kadi meme ndi nnemeka Tatu wanyi. Nuenu kanuena nunnemeka to. 
John8:50 Tshiena ndikebela butumbi nansha. Kadi kudi mukuabu udi ubunkebela, ukosa kabidi nsambu." 
John8:51 Ndi nnujadikila ne: muntu udi utumikila miaku yanyi, katshia kena ufua to." 
John8:52 Bena Yuda kumuandamuna ne: — Mpindiewu tudi tujadika ne: udi ne mukishi mubi munda! Abrahame kufua, bambi kabidi. Kadi wewe udi wamba ne: “Muntu udi ukumbaja bindi ngamba katshia kena ufua to.”" 
John8:53 Tatu wetu Abrahame ukadi mumane kufua. Wewe udi wela meji ne: udi mumupite anyi? Bambi kabidi mbamane kufua. Kadi wewe udi udimona bu nganyi? 
John8:54 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Bu meme nditumbisha nkayanyi, butumbi buanyi kabuvua mua kuikala ne mushinga to. Udi untumbisha nTatu wanyi, Yeye unudi nuamba ne: “Udi Mvidi Mukulu wetu.”" 
John8:55 Kadi kanuena bamumanye. Meme ndi mumumanye. Bu meme muambe ne: Tshiena mumumanye, mvua kuikala muena dishima munudi nuenu. Kadi ndi mumumanye. Ndi ntumikila miaku yende." 
John8:56 Tatu wenu Abrahame uvua musanke, ujinga dituku dianyi. Wakadimona, wasanka kabidi." 
John8:57 Bena Yuda kumuamba ne: — Kuena muanji kukumbaja bidimu makumi atanu, muudi mumane kumona Abrahame mbishi?" 
John8:58 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: kabayi banji kulela Abrahame, meme “ndi mundi ”." 
John8:59 Kuambulabu mabue bua kumuasa. Kadi Yezu kusokoma, kupatuka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
John9:1 Pavua Yezu upita, kumonaye muntu muikale mpofu katshia bamutela." 
John9:2 Balongi bende kumukonka ne: — Mulongeshi, muntu ewu mbamulele mpofu bua tshinyi? Mbufumine ku bubi buende anyi bua baledi bende?" 
John9:3 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Bufofu ebu ki mbufumine ku bubi buende nansha ku bubi bua baledi bende to. Kadi udi mpofu bua midimu ya Mvidi Mukulu imuenekele kudiye. 
John9:4 Patutshidi mu munya, tudi ne bua kukuata midimu ya uvua muntume. Butuku bukadi pa kuila, budi muntu nansha umue kayi mua kukuata mudimu." 
John9:5 Pantshidi pa buloba, ndi butoke bua pa buloba." 
John9:6 Yezu mumane kuamba nanku, kutuilaye mate ende panshi, kusopakaja kabidi ne bitotshi bikese, kulabaye pa mesu a mpofu bitotshi abi." 
John9:7 Kumuambilaye ne: — Uye kuowa mayi ku mesu ku dijiba dia Silowa. (Dina adi Silowa didi diumvuija ne: “Mutumibue”.) Mpofu kuya ku dijiba, kuowa mayi ku mpala, kupingana umona." 
John9:8 Bena mutumba nende ne bantu bonsu bavua bamumonamona kale ulombangana bintu bavua bebejangana ne: — Ki mmuntu uvua musombe ulombangana bintu anyi? 
John9:9 Bamue bavua bamba ne: — Nyeye. Bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — To, ki nyeye nansha, kadi mmumufuane. Kadi uvua mpofu kuamba ne: — Mmeme!" 
John9:10 Kumukonkabu ne: — Mesu ebe mmatabale bishi? 
John9:11 Kubandamunaye ne: — Muntu udibu binyika ne: Yezu, uvua musope bitotshi ne mate, undaba pa mesu, ungamba ne: “Uye kuowa mayi ku mpala mu dijiba dia Silowa.” Meme kuya ku dijiba, kuowa mayi. Mumane kuowa mayi, meme kushisha kumona." 
John9:12 Kumukonkabu kabidi ne: — Muntu awu udi penyi? Kubandamunaye ne: — Tshiena mumanye. 
John9:13 Nanku kuyabu ne uvua mpofu awu kudi Baparushe. 
John9:14 Kadi dituku divua Yezu musopakaje buloba, mumutabeje mesu adi, divua dituku dia Dikisha." 
John9:15 Ke pavua Baparushe kabidi bakonka muntu ewu bivua bimuenzekele bua kutabalaye mpindiewu. Kubambilaye ne: — Uvua mundabe bitotshi bikese pa mesu, meme kuowa mayi ku mpala, diakamue meme kumona." 
John9:16 Bamue Baparushe bavua bamba ne: — Muntu uvua muenze bualu bua nenku kena mua kufumina kudi Mvidi Mukulu to. Bualu kena utumikila mikenji ya dituku dia Dikisha. Kadi bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — Muntu muikale muena malu mabi, udi mua kuenza bishima bia nanku anyi? Ke kupanganganabu munkatshi muabu." 
John9:17 Baparushe kukonka muntu uvua mpofu tshiakabidi ne: — Kadi wewe, bua muntu uvua mukutabaje mesu awu, udi wamba bishi? Kuandamunaye ne: — Udi muambi." 
John9:18 Kadi bamfumu ba bena Yuda kabavua basue kuitaba ne: muntu ewu uvua mpofu, kadi ukadi umona, kabayi banji kubikila baledi bende," 
John9:19 bua kubebeja. Kubakonkabu ne: — Nsongalume ewu mmuana wenu bushuwa anyi? Nudi nujadika ne: mmulela mpofu anyi? Kadi mudiye umona mpindiewu mbishi? 
John9:20 Baledi kuandamuna ne: — Tudi bamanye ne: mmuana utuvua balele, kabidi mmulela mpofu." 
John9:21 Kadi katuena bajingulule mukadiye umona mpindiewu. Katuena bamanye muntu uvua mumutabaje mesu. Numukonke yeye. Ukadi muntu mukole. Udi mua kudilumbuluila! 
John9:22 Bavua bandamuna nanku, bualu bavua batshina bamfumu ba bena Yuda. Bualu bamfumu bavua bamane kumyuangana bua kuipata mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda muntu yonsu wajadika ne: Yezu udi Meshiya." 
John9:23 Ke pavua baledi bandamuna ne: “Ukadi muntu mukole. Numukonke!” 
John9:24 Baparushe kubikila muntu uvua mpofu awu tshiakabidi, kumuamba ne: — Uditshipe kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu bua kuamba malu malelela. Tuetu tudi bamanye ne: muntu ewu udi muenji wa malu mabi." 
John9:25 Kuandamunaye ne: — Ne udi muenji wa malu mabi, ne kena muenji wa malu mabi, tshiena mumanye to. Kadi tshindi mumanye tshidi amu ne: mvua mpofu, nkadi mmona mpindiewu." 
John9:26 Kumukonkabu ne: — Uvua mukuenze tshinyi? Mmukutabaje mesu bishi? 
John9:27 Kubandamunaye ne: — Nkadi mumane kunuambila, kadi kanuena banteleje. Nudi basue bua nnuambile tshiakabidi bua tshinyi? Nuenu kabidi nudi basue kudienza balongi bende anyi?" 
John9:28 Kumupendabu bikole, bamba ne: — Wewe ke udi mulongi wa muntu awu. Kadi tuetu tudi balongi ba Moshe." 
John9:29 Tudi bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu uvua muakule ne Moshe. Kadi muntu ewu, katuena nansha bamanye kudiye mufume!" 
John9:30 Muntu kubandamuna ne: — Ebu mbualu bua dikema! Kanuena bamanye kudiye mufume, kadi mmuntabaje mesu!" 
John9:31 Tudi bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu kena uteleja benji ba malu mabi. Kadi udi uteleja muntu udi umunemeka, ukumbaja bidiye musue." 
John9:32 Katshia katuena banji kumvua ne: muntu mmutabeje mesu a muntu mulela mpofu. 
John9:33 Bu muntu ewu kayi mufume kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kavua mua kuenza bualu nansha bumue to." 
John9:34 Ke Baparushe kumuandamuna ne: — Wewe kantu katela kajima mu bubi, ukadi musue kutulongesha anyi? Kumuipatabu mu nzubu wa kutendelela." 
John9:35 Yezu kumvua mu wabu bipate mpofu. Kusambakenaye nende, kumukonkaye ne: — Udi witaba Muana wa muntu anyi?" 
John9:36 Muntu kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, ungambile ne: Muana wa muntu nnganyi mene, bua mmone mua kumuitaba." 
John9:37 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Udi mumumone. Ke muntu mene udi wakula nebe mpindiewu. 
John9:38 Muntu awu kuamba ne: — Mfumu, ndi ngitaba. Kutuaye binu panshi kumpala kua Yezu." 
John9:39 Ke Yezu kuamba ne: — Ndi mulue pa buloba ebu bua balumbuluishe bantu: bua bampofu bamone, kabidi bua badi bamona bashale bampofu." 
John9:40 Bamue ba ku Baparushe bavua nende bumvua nanku, kumukonkabu ne: — Tuetu kabidi tudi bampofu anyi?" 
John9:41 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Bu nuenu bampofu, kanuvua mua kupila. Kadi bu munudi nuamba ne: “Tudi tumona,” nudi nushala bena tshibawu." 
John10:1 — Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: muntu udi kayi ubuelela ku tshiibi tshia lupangu lua mikoku, kadi usambukila muaba mukuabu pa tshimana, mmuivi kabidi mmuena mutshima." 
John10:2 Kadi udi ubuelela ku tshiibi, mmulami wa mikoku." 
John10:3 Mulami wa ku tshiibi udi umunzuluila tshiibi, mikoku idi iteleja diyi diende. Udi ubikila mikoku yende, mukoku onsu mu dina diawu, uyipatula pambelu." 
John10:4 Yeye mumane kuyipatula yonsu, udi wenda kumpala kuayi. Yoyi idi imulonda munyima, bualu idi mimanye diyi diende." 
John10:5 Kadi kayena mua kulonda muntu udiyi kayiyi mimanye. Neyimunyeme kule, bualu kayena mimanye diyi diende." 
John10:6 Yezu uvua mubele lusumuinu elu, kadi bobu kabavua bajingulula tshivuaye musue kubambila." 
John10:7 Yezu kuamba kabidi ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: meme ndi tshiibi tshia lupangu lua mikoku. 
John10:8 Bonsu bavua badianjidile kumpala kuanyi mbivi, kabidi mbena mutshima. Kadi mikoku kayivua mibateleje." 
John10:9 Ndi tshiibi. Muntu udi ubuelela kundi neapande. Neabuele, neapatuke, neapete kabidi tshiakudia tshiende." 
John10:10 Muivi udi ufika amu bua kuiba, kushipa ne kubutula. Meme ndi mulue bua bantu bapete muoyi, baupete wa bungi." 
John10:11 Ndi mulami muimpe wa mikoku. Mulami muimpe wa mikoku udi ufuila mikoku yende. 
John10:12 Muntu udi ukuata mudimu amu bua kupeta difutu, kayi mulami wa mikoku, kabidi kayi muena mikoku, padiye umona nyama wa lonji ufika, udi ulekela mikoku, unyema. Nanku nyama wa lonji udi uyikuata, uyitangalaja." 
John10:13 Udi unyema, bualu mmuena mudimu udi ukeba difutu. Kena bualu ne mikoku to." 
John10:14 Ndi mulami muimpe wa mikoku. Mudi Tatu mummanye, kabidi mundi mumanye Tatu, ke mundi mumanye mikoku yanyi, mikoku yanyi kabidi idi mimmanye. Ndi mfila kabidi muoyi wanyi bua mikoku yanyi." 
John10:15  
John10:16 Ndi kabidi ne mikoku mikuabu idi kayiyi mu lupangu elu. Ndi ne bua kuyilombola kabidi. Neyiteleje diyi dianyi. Neyenze tshisumbu amu tshimue, tshikale ne mulami amu umue." 
John10:17 Tatu mmunnange, bualu ndi mfila muoyi wanyi bua meme kuwangata tshiakabidi." 
John10:18 Kakuena muntu udi unnyenga muoyi wanyi, kadi ndi ngufila mundi musue. Ndi ne bumfumu bua kuufila, kabidi ne bumfumu bua kuwangata tshiakabidi. Ke mukenji udi Tatu mungelele bua meme kuenza." 
John10:19 Bena Yuda kutapulukangana tshiakabidi ku meyi aa. 
John10:20 Ba bungi ba munkatshi muabu bavua bamba ne: — Udi ne mukishi mubi munda! Mmupale! Nudi numuteleja bua tshinyi? 
John10:21 Kadi bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — Muntu ne mukishi mubi munda kena mua kuakula nenku to. Mukishi mubi udi mua kutabaja bampofu mesu anyi? 
John10:22 Diba adi, bena mu Yerushalayime bavua benza tshibilu tshia mufikilu wa Dijidila dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Tshikondu atshi tshiena tshia mashika." 
John10:23 Yezu uvua utambakana mu lutanda lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, luvuabu binyika ne: ndua Shelomu." 
John10:24 Ke bena Yuda kumunguila, bamukonka ne: — Neutupampakaje too ne ku diba kaayi? Paudi Meshiya, utuambile patoke." 
John10:25 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Nkadi mumane kunuambila bualu ebu, kadi kanuena nungitaba to. Midimu indi nkuata ne bumfumu bua Tatu wanyi, idi injadikila bulelela." 
John10:26 Kadi kanuena nuitaba, bualu kanuena ba mu mikoku yanyi." 
John10:27 Mikoku yanyi idi iteleja diyi dianyi. Ndi muyimanye. Idi indonda. 
John10:28 Ndi nyipesha muoyi wa tshiendelele. Katshia kayakufua nansha. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kuyinyenga ku tshianza tshianyi. 
John10:29 Tshidi Tatu mumpeshe ntshipite bionsu. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kunyenga Tatu tshintu mu tshianza tshiende. 
John10:30 Tatu ne meme tudi tshintu tshimue. 
John10:31 Bena Yuda kuambula tshiakabidi mabue bua kumuasa. 
John10:32 Ke Yezu kubambila ne: — Ndi mukuate midimu mivule mimpe ku mesu enu ne bumfumu buvua Tatu mumpeshe. Ku midimu eyi, mbua mudimu kaayi bunudi basue kunshipela ne mabue?" 
John10:33 Bena Yuda kuandamuna ne: — Katuena basue kukushipa ne mabue bua mudimu muimpe uudi ukuata, kadi bualu udi usendeka Mvidi Mukulu. Wewe udi amu muntu, kadi udi musue kudienza Mvidi Mukulu." 
John10:34 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Mu mukanda wenu wa Mikenji mbafunde ne: Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambe ne: “Nudi nwidie. ” 
John10:35 Tudi bamanye ne: kabena mua kushipa tshidi Mukanda wa tshijila ujadika. Bavuaye umanyisha miaku yende, Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubinyike ne: mmvidie." 
John10:36 Nanku meme, Mvidi Mukulu mmunsungule, muntume pa buloba. Mmunyi munudi nungamba ne: udi usendeka Mvidi Mukulu, pandi njadika ne: ndi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu?" 
John10:37 Pandi tshiyi nkuata midimu ya Tatu wanyi, kanuena ne bua kungitaba to." 
John10:38 Kadi pandi nyikuata, nansha kanuyi nungitaba meme, itabilayi nansha bua midimu, bua mimanye amu ne: Tatu udi munda muanyi, meme kabidi ndi munda muende." 
John10:39 Bavua bakeba kabidi kumukuata, kadi yeye kongoloka." 
John10:40 Yezu kuya tshiakabidi dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, muaba uvua Yowanane mudianjidile kutua bantu mu mayi. Kusombayemu." 
John10:41 Bantu ba bungi bavua baya kudiye, bamba ne: — Yowanane kavua muenze tshishima nansha tshimue. Kadi bionsu bivuaye muambe bua muntu ewu mbilelela." 
John10:42 Muaba awu bantu ba bungi kuitaba Yezu. 
John11:1 Kuvua muntu usama, diende Lazare. Uvua musombe mu Betanya, musoku uvua Mariya ne muanabu wa bakaji Marte basomba kabidi." 
John11:2 (Mariya ewu ke mukaji uvua muele Mfumu manananshi ku makasa, muakupule ne nsuki yende. Nunku muanabu Lazare ke uvua usama )." 
John11:3 Nsongakaji ibidi eyi kutumina Yezu diyi ne: — Mfumu, mulunda webe udi usama." 
John11:4 Yezu mumane kumvua lumu elu, kuambaye ne: — Disama dia Lazare ki ndia lufu to. Didi bua kuleja mudi bukole bua butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi bua kutumbisha Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
John11:5 Yezu uvua munange Marte ne muanabu wa bakaji, kabidi ne Lazare." 
John11:6 Mumane kumvua ne: Lazare udi usama, kushalaye kabidi matuku abidi kuvuaye aku." 
John11:7 Pashishe kuambilaye balongi bende ne: — Tupinganayi mu Yudeya. 
John11:8 Balongi kumuandamuna ne: — Mulongeshi, kudi matuku makese menemene avuabu bakeba kukuasa mabue bua kukushipa. Wewe udi ujinga kupinganamu kabidi anyi?" 
John11:9 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Dituku dijima kadiena ne meba dikumi ne abidi anyi? Padi muntu wenda munda munya, kena utuuta dikasa ku dibue, bualu udi umona butoke bua panu." 
John11:10 Kadi padi muntu wenda butuku, udi utetuka, bualu butoke kabuena munda muende to." 
John11:11 Yezu mumane kubambila nanku, kutungunukaye kabidi ne: — Mulunda wetu Lazare mmulale. Ndi nya kumubisha ku tulu." 
John11:12 Balongi kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, pikalaye mulale, disama nedijike." 
John11:13 Yezu uvua musue kuamba ne: Lazare mmumane kufua. Kadi balongi bavua bela meji ne: Yezu udi wamba bua tulu tua misangu yonsu. 
John11:14 Ke Yezu kubatokeshila ne: — Lazare mmumane kufua. 
John11:15 Ndi ne disanka buenu nuenu bua pamvua tshiyi muaba awu, bua nanku numone mua kungitaba. Kadi tuyayi kudiye." 
John11:16 Kadi Tomase udibu binyika ne: Dipasa, kuambilaye balongi bakuabu ne: — Tuyayi bonsu ne Mulongeshi, batushipe nende!" 
John11:17 Yezu mumane kufika, kusanganaye bamane kujika Lazare kupita matuku anayi." 
John11:18 Betanya udi pabuipi ne Yerushalayime mutantshi wa kilometre bu isatu. 
John11:19 Bena Yuda ba bungi bavua balue kusamba Marte ne Mariya bua lufu lua muanabu. 
John11:20 Marte mumane kumvua ne: Yezu udi ufika, kuyaye kumuakana. Kadi Mariya uvua mushale musombe mu nzubu." 
John11:21 Marte kuambila Yezu ne: — Mfumu, bu wewe muikalepu, muanetu kavua mua kufua to." 
John11:22 Kadi ndi mumanye ne: nansha mpindiewu, Mvidi Mukulu neakupe tshionsu tshiwamulomba." 
John11:23 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Muanenu neabike ku lufu. 
John11:24 Marte kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mumanye ne: neabike ku lufu, pabika bafue bonsu dituku dia nshikidilu." 
John11:25 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Meme ke udi ubisha bantu ku lufu, ubapesha muoyi. Muntu yonsu udi ungitaba, neikale ne muoyi, nansha yeye ufua." 
John11:26 Yonsu udi ne muoyi, ungitaba, kena ufua nansha. Udi witaba nanku anyi?" 
John11:27 Marte kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, Mfumu, ndi ngitaba ne: Wewe udi Meshiya, Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bua kulua pa buloba." 
John11:28 Marte mumane kuamba nanku, kuyaye kubikila muanabu wa bakaji Mariya, umuambila ku luseke ne: — Mulongeshi ukadi mufike. Udi ukubikila." 
John11:29 Mariya umvua nanku, kujukaye diakamue. Kuyaye kudi Yezu." 
John11:30 (Yezu kavua muanji kubuela mu musoku. Utshivua amu kuvua Marte muye kumuakana.) 
John11:31 Pavua bena Yuda bavua ne Mariya mu nzubu bua kumusamba bamumona ujuka upatuka lukasa, kumulondabu. Bavua bela meji ne: udi uya ku lukita bua kudilamu muadi." 
John11:32 Mariya ufika muaba uvua Yezu, umumona, kudielaye ku makasa ende, wamba ne: — Mfumu, bu wewe muikalepu, muanetu kavua mua kufua." 
John11:33 Yezu umona muvua Mariya udila, kabidi umvua bena Yuda bavuaye muvue nabu badila, kubungamaye bikole, ubinduluka." 
John11:34 Kubakonkaye ne: — Nudi bamujike penyi? Kumuandamunabu ne: — Mfumu, luaku umone." 
John11:35 Ke Yezu kudila. 
John11:36 Bena Yuda kuamba ne: — Monayi muvuaye mumunange bikole! 
John11:37 Kadi bamue ba kudibu bavua bamba ne: — Muntu ewu uvua mutabaje mpofu mesu, muvuaye kayi mua kukuata mudimu bua Lazare kafu mbishi?" 
John11:38 Yezu kuwula tshiakabidi ne tshinyongopelu tshikole. Kuyaye ku lukita luvuabu bumbula mu lubuebue, babuikila ku mushiku ne dibue." 
John11:39 Yezu kuamba ne: — Umushayi dibue. Marte, muanabu ne mufue, kuamba ne: — Mfumu, ukadi ununka bibi, bualu mbamujike kukadi matuku anayi." 
John11:40 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Tshivua mukuambile ne: wewe muitabe, neumone butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu anyi?" 
John11:41 Bantu kumusha dibue. Yezu utangila mulu, kuamba ne: — Tatu, ndi nkuela tuasakidila, bualu uvua munteleje." 
John11:42 Ndi mumanye ne: udi unteleja misangu yonsu. Kadi ndi ngamba nanku, bua bantu badi bannyungulukila bitabe ne: wewe ke uvua muntume." 
John11:43 Yezu mumane kuamba nanku, kuelaye diyi dikole ne: — Lazare, patuka!" 
John11:44 Mufue kupatuka, makasa ne bianza bijingila mikaba ya bilamba, mpala mubuikila tshitambala. Yezu kubambila ne: — Mukutululayi, numulekele aye." 
John11:45 Bena Yuda ba bungi ba munkatshi mua bavua balue kudi Mariya, bamone bivua Yezu muenze, kumuitababu." 
John11:46 Kadi bamue ba kudibu kuya kudi Baparushe, kubalondela muvua Yezu muenze." 
John11:47 Baparushe ne bamfumu ba batuangaji kudisangisha mu Tshipangu tshiabu tshikulu. Kuebejanganabu ne: — Netuenze tshinyi? Bualu muntu ewu udi wenza bishima bivule! 
John11:48 Tuetu bamulekele wenza nunku, bantu bonsu nebamuitabe. Pashishe bamfumu ba bena Rome nebafike bua kunyanga nzubu wetu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne tshisamba tshietu!" 
John11:49 Umue wa kudibu, diende Kayifa, uvua mutuangaji munene tshidimu atshi, kubambilaye ne: — Kanuena bajingulule bualu nansha bumue to!" 
John11:50 Kanuena numona ne: mbimpe muntu umue afuile bantu, bua tshisamba tshijima katshibutuki anyi?" 
John11:51 (Kavua muambe nanku ku meji ende yeye nkayende. Kadi bu muvuaye mutuangaji munene tshidimu atshi, Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumuakuishe ne: Yezu uvua ne bua kutuila tshisamba tshia bena Yuda," 
John11:52 kadi kavua ne bua kutuila amu tshisamba etshi nkayatshi, kadi mmufue kabidi bua kusangisha mu bobumue bantu bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu bavuabu batangalaje.)" 
John11:53 Biangatshile dituku adi, bamfumu ba bena Yuda kujadikabo bua kushipesha Yezu." 
John11:54 Ke pavua Yezu katshiyi wendakana kabidi patoke munkatshi mua bena Yuda to. Kuyaye mu ditunga divua pabuipi ne tshipela, mu musoku uvuabu binyika ne: Efrayime. Kushalayemu ne balongi bende." 
John11:55 Tshibilu tshia bena Yuda tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila tshivua pabuipi. Bantu ba bungi ba mu ditunga bavua baya mu Yerushalayime, tshibilu etshi katshiyi tshianji kuenzeka, bua bumushe mikiya yabu." 
John11:56 Bavua bakeba Yezu. Pavuabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bavua bebejangana ne: — Nudi nuela meji bishi? Udi mua kulua mu tshibilu anyi kena ulua?" 
John11:57 Bamfumu ba batuangaji ne Baparushe bavua bamane kuela mukenji ne: Muntu yeye mumanye muaba udi Yezu, amanyishe bua tumone mua kumukuata." 
John12:1 Matuku asambombu kumpala kua tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, Yezu kuya ku Betanya kuvua Lazare, uvuabu babishe ku lufu awu, musombe." 
John12:2 Muaba awu, Marte uvua mumulambile biakudia. Lazare uvua umue wa ku bantu bavua ku mesa ne Yezu." 
John12:3 Mariya kuangata tshia bibidi tshia litre wa manananshi a mushinga mukole, avuabu kabayi basambakaja ne tshintu tshikuabu to. Kuelaye Yezu ku makasa. Pashishe kuakupulaye ne nsuki yende. Nzubu mujima kuwula ne mupuya wa manananshi." 
John12:4 Umue wa ku balongi ba Yezu, diende Yudase Iskariyote — ke uvua ne bua kumuelela tshitungu, — kuambaye ne:" 
John12:5 — Kabavua mua kupana manananshi aa ku mushinga wa nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole nkama isatu, bua kuyipesha bapele bua tshinyi?" 
John12:6 Yudase kavua wamba nanku bualu uvua usumpakena bapele to. Kadi uvua muivi. Uvua mulami wa tshibutshilu, wiba bivuabu batekamu." 
John12:7 Kadi Yezu kuamba ne: — Mulekelayi! Enze tshidibu ne bua kuenza dituku dia kunjikabu. 
John12:8 Nenuikale ne bapele matuku onsu pamue nenu, kadi meme kanuakuikala nanyi matuku onsu." 
John12:9 Bena Yuda bavule kumvua lumu ne: Yezu udi ku Betanya. Kuyabu muaba awu, kabayi baya amu bualu bua Yezu nkayende to, kadi kabidi bua kumona Lazare uvua Yezu mubishe ku lufu." 
John12:10 Ke bamfumu ba batuangaji kumyuangana bua kushipesha Lazare kabidi. 
John12:11 Bualu bena Yuda ba bungi bavua bumuke kudibu bualu buende, bitabe Yezu." 
John12:12 Butshia, bantu bavule bavua bavuile tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, kumvuabu ne: Yezu mmufike ku Yerushalayime." 
John12:13 Kuangatabu malala a mabue, kuyabu kumuakidila, bela mbila ne: — Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu! Mvidi Mukulu ele muntu udi ulua mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila lupemba! Mvidi Mukulu ele mukalenga wa Izrayele lupemba!" 
John12:14 Yezu kusangana muana wa nyama wa mpunde, kubandapu! Mudibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne:"
