John12:15 “Bena Siyone, kanutshinyi! Tangilayi, ke mukalenga wenu udi ufika! Mmusombe pa muana wa nyama wa mpunde. ”" 
John12:16 Balongi bende kabavua banji kujingulula bionsu abi to. Kadi Yezu mumane kupeta butumbi buende, ke kushishabu kuvuluka ne: mu Mukanda wa tshijila mbamane kufunda malu aa bualu buende. Nanku malu aa nunemeke umvua mukanda muambe bualu buende." 
John12:17 Bantu bonsu bavua ne Yezu pavuaye mubishe Lazare ku lufu, mumupatule mu lukita bavua balonda bivuabu bamone." 
John12:18 Ke pavua bantu ba bungi balue kuakidila Yezu. Bualu bavua bamane kumvua muvuaye muenze bualu ebu bua dikema. 
John12:19 Ke Baparushe kuambilangana ne: — Nudi numona ne: kanuakupeta tshipeta tshimpe to. Bantu bonsu bakadi bamulonda! 
John12:20 Bamue bena Ngreke bavua munkatshi mua bantu bavua baye kutendelela ku Yerushalayime mu tshibilu. 
John12:21 Kuyabu kudi Filipe (uvua wa mu Betsayida mu Ngalileya), bamuambila ne: — Mukalenga, tudi basue kumona Yezu." 
John12:22 Filipe kuya kuambila Andre, pashishe bonsu babidi kuya kuambila Yezu." 
John12:23 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Diba ndimane kukumbana mpindiewu didi bantu ne bua kutumbisha Muana wa muntu. 
John12:24 Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: lutete kaluyi lumata mu buloba, lufila, ludi lushala nkayalu. Kadi lolu lutue, ludi lumenesha ntete ya bungi." 
John12:25 Muntu udi unanga muoyi wende neaujimije. Kadi muntu udi kayi unanga amu muoyi wende, neaulame too ne ku muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
John12:26 Pikala muntu musue kungenzela mudimu, udi ne bua kundonda. Nanku muena mudimu wanyi neikale kabidi muaba undi. Tatu wanyi udi utumbisha muntu udi ungenzela mudimu." 
John12:27 — Mpindiewu muoyi udi undubakana. Nengambe tshinyi? Nengambe ne: Tatu unsungidile ku bidi ne bua kuenzeka diba edi anyi? Kadi tshindi mufikile panu tshidi nangananga bua kupitshila mu diba edi dia makenga. 
John12:28 Tatu, tumbisha dina diebe! Kumvuabu diyi difumina mu diulu ne: — Ndi mumane kuditumbisha, nenditambishe tshiakabidi." 
John12:29 Bantu bavule bavua muaba awu bumvua diyi adi, kuambabu ne: — Ndikubakuba dia mvula! Bakuabu bavua bamba ne: — Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua uyukila nende!" 
John12:30 Kadi Yezu kubambila ne: — Diyi edi kadiena diamba nanku bualu buanyi to, kadi bualu buenu." 
John12:31 Mpindiewu ke diba dialumbuluishabu bantu. Mpindiewu nebipate mfumu wa panuapa. 
John12:32 Kadi meme, pangelabu kulu, nenkoke bantu bonsu kundi." 
John12:33 (Yezu uvua muambe nanku, bualu uvua musue kuleja bantu lufu luvuaye ne bua kufua.)" 
John12:34 Bantu bavule kumuandamuna ne: — Tudi balonge mu Mikanda ya mikenji yetu ne: Meshiya neashale ne muoyi tshiendelele. Nanku muudi mua kuamba ne: Muana wa muntu nebamuele kulu mbishi? Awu Muana wa muntu nnganyi? 
John12:35 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Butoke butshidi munkatshi muenu, kadi mbua katupa kipi. Endayi panutshidi ne butoke, bua miidima kuyinujikididi. Bualu muntu udi wenda mu miidima kena mumanye kudiye uya." 
John12:36 Itabayi butoke panutshidi nabu, bua nuikale bana ba butoke. Yezu mumane kuamba nanku: kumukaye, kuyaye kubasokoma." 
John12:37 Nansha muvuaye muenze bishima bia bungi bobu batangila, kabavua bamuitaba to." 
John12:38 Ke muvua miaku ya muambi Yeshaya ikumbana ne: “Maweja-Nangila, udi muitabe bituvua bambe nnganyi? Uvua Maweja-Nangila muleje bivuaye musue kuenza nnganyi. ”" 
John12:39 Kabavua mua kuitaba to, bualu Yeshaya uvua muambe kabidi ne:" 
John12:40 “Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubafofamije mesu, mututubije lungenyi luabu, bua mesu abu kaamonyi, lungenyi luabu kalujinguludi bualu, bua kabapinganyi kundi, bua meme kubasungidila. ”" 
John12:41 Yeshaya mmuambe nanku bualu uvua mumone butumbi bua Yezu, muambe kabidi bualu buende." 
John12:42 Kadi nansha munkatshi mua bamfumu ba bena Yuda, ba bungi kuitaba Yezu. Kadi kabavua badileja patoke. Bualu bavua batshina Baparushe bavua mua kubipata mu nzubu wa kutendelela." 
John12:43 Bavua basue nangananga bua bantu babanyishe, pa mutu pa kukeba bua Mvidi Mukulu abanyishe." 
John12:44 Yezu kuela diyi dikole ne: — Muntu udi ungitaba, kena ungitaba nkayanyi, kadi udi witaba kabidi uvua muntume." 
John12:45 Muntu udi ummona, udi umona kabidi uvua muntume." 
John12:46 Meme ndi mufike pa buloba bu butoke, bua muntu yonsu udi ungitaba kashadi mu miidima." 
John12:47 Padi muntu umvua miaku yanyi, kayi uyikumbaja, meme tshiena mua kumupisha ku tshilumbu to. Bualu meme ndi mufike bua kusungidila bantu. Tshiena muvue kubapisha to." 
John12:48 Muntu udi umbenga, kayi wanyisha miaku yanyi, udi ne mumuluishi: muaku undi mulongeshe neumupishe dituku dia nshikidilu." 
John12:49 Bualu tshiena muakule ku bumfumu buanyi nkayanyi to, kadi Tatu uvua muntume ke uvua mumfundile tshimvua ne bua kuamba, nansha kulongesha." 
John12:50 Ndi mumanye ne: tshidi Mvidi Mukulu ufundila muntu tshidi tshipetesha muoyi wa kashidi. Nanku tshindi ngamba, ndi ntshiamba muvua Tatu wanyi mungambile." 
John13:1 Dituku dimue kumpala kua tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, Yezu mumanye muvua diba dimane kufika dia kumuka panu bua kupingana kua Tatu, bu muvuaye munange bantu bende ba pa buloba matuku onsu, kubanangaye too ne ku ndekelu." 
John13:2 Yezu ne balongi bende bavua mu didia dia dilolu. Diabolu ukavua mumane kuitabijija Yudase muana wa Simone Iskariyote, bua elele Yezu tshitungu." 
John13:3 Yezu uvua mumanye muvuaye mutumine kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi muvuaye ne bua kupingana kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua mumanye kabidi nunua Mvidi Mukulu muteke bionsu ku bumfumu buende." 
John13:4 Kujukaye ku mesa, kukulaye tshilamba tshivuaye mutenteke pa mutu; kuangataye tshilamba tshikuabu kudijingila mu tshimonu." 
John13:5 Pashishe kuelaye mayi mu dilongu, kubanga kuowesha balongi bende mayi ku makasa, wakupula ne tshilamba tshivuaye mudijingile mu tshimonu." 
John13:6 Yezu ufika kudi Simone Petro, awu kumukonka ne: — Mfumu, udi ukeba kungowesha mayi ku makasa anyi?" 
John13:7 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Tshindi ngenza etshi, kuena mutshimanye mpindiewu to. Kadi neutshijingulule pashishe." 
John13:8 Petro kumuamba ne: — To, katshia kuena mua kungowesha mayi ku makasa nansha! Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Meme tshiyi mukuoweshe mayi ku makasa, kuena mua kupeta kabidi tshintu nansha tshimue kundi." 
John13:9 Simone Petro kumuandamuna ne: — Nanku, Mfumu, kungoweshi anu ku makasa nkayaku to! Ungoweshe kabidi ku bianza ne ku mutu!" 
John13:10 Yezu kumuamba ne: — Muntu mumane kuowa mayi mubidi mujima, kena ukengela kuowa tshiakabidi. Udi ne bua kuowa amu ku makasa, bualu kena ne manyanu nansha makese pambidi. Nuenu kabidi kanuena ne manyanu, kadi ki nnuenu bonsu to." 
John13:11 (Yezu uvua mumane kumanya muntu uvua ne bua kumuelela tshitungu. Ke pavuaye wamba ne: “Kanuena bonsu badi kabayi ne manyanu.”) 
John13:12 Yezu mumane kubowesha mayi ku makasa, kuvualaye bilamba biende tshiakabidi, kupinganaye ku mesa. Kubakonkaye ne: — Nudi bajingulule tshindi munuenzele anyi?" 
John13:13 Nudi numbikila “Mulongeshi,” kabidi “Mfumu.” Nudi nuamba bimpe. Ke mundi." 
John13:14 Pangikala meme Mulongeshi kabidi Mfumu munoweshe mayi ku makasa, nuenu kabidi nudi ne bua kuoweshangana mayi ku makasa." 
John13:15 Ndi munuleje tshilejilu bua nuenze mundi munuenzele. 
John13:16 Ndi nnujadikila ne: muena mudimu kena mua kuikala ku mutu kua mfumuende. Kabidi mutumibue kena mua kuikala ku mutu kua uvua mumutume nansha. 
John13:17 Mpindiewu nudi bamanye bualu ebu. Nuenu benze nanku, nenuikale ne disanka." 
John13:18 Tshiena ngamba buenu bonsu to. Ndi mumanye bandi musungule. Kadi mbimpe ikumbane miaku ivuabu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Muntu utuvua tudia nende diampa, ukadi unduisha. ”" 
John13:19 Ndi udianjila kunuambila bualu ebu mpindiewu kabuyi buanji kuenzeka, bua penzekabu nuitabe ne: “Meme ndi mundi.”" 
John13:20 Ndi nnujadikila ne: muntu wakidila muntu undi ntuma, udi ungakidila meme. Muntu udi ungakidila udi wakidila uvua muntume." 
John13:21 Yezu mumane kuamba nanku, kulubakanaye bikole. Kuambilaye balongi bende ne: — Ndi nnujadikila ne: umue wa kunudi neantungile tshitungu." 
John13:22 Balongi kutangilangana, kabayi mua kumanya uvuaye wamba." 
John13:23 Umue wa ku balongi, mulongi uvua Yezu munange, uvua musombe ku luseke lua Yezu." 
John13:24 Simone Petro kumulomba ne tshianza bua ebeje Yezu ne: udiye wamba nnganyi? 
John13:25 Mulongi awu kueyemena Yezu, kumukonka ne: — Mfumu, nnganyi mene awu?" 
John13:26 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Nenzabike tshipese tshia diampa mu nsupu. Muntu ungatshipesha awu nyeye. Yezu kuangata tshipese tshia diampa, kutshizabikaye mu nsupu, kutshipesha Yudase muana wa Simone Iskariyote." 
John13:27 Diakamue Yudase mumane kuangata tshipese tshia diampa, diabolu kubuela munda muende. Ke Yezu kuambila Yudase ne: — Tshiudi musue kuenza, utshienze lukasa!" 
John13:28 (Ku bonsu bavua ku mesa, muntu nansha umue kavua mujingulule tshivua Yezu muambile nanku." 
John13:29 Bu muvua Yudase ulama tshibutshilu, bakuabu bavua bela meji ne: Yezu udi umuambila bua kuyaye kusumba bintu bivuabu bakengela bua kuenza nabi tshibilu, nansha utua umuambila bua kuambuluishaye bapele.)" 
John13:30 Yudase kuangata tshipese tshia diampa, kupatukaye diakamue. Butuku buvua bumane kuila." 
John13:31 Yudase mumane kupatuka, Yezu kuamba ne: — Mpindiewu butumbi bua Muana wa muntu budi bumueneka patoke. Butumbi kabidi bua Mvidi Mukulu nebudileje kudiye." 
John13:32 Padi butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu budileja kudiye, Mvidi Mukulu nealeje kabidi butumbi bua Muana wa muntu. Neabuleje lukasa." 
John13:33 Bana banyi, ntshidi nenu kabidi amu bua meba makese. Nenunkebe. Kadi ndi nnuambila mpindiewu bimvua muambile bena Yuda ne: kanuena mua kuya kundi nya." 
John13:34 Ndi nnupesha mukenji mupiamupia ne: Nunangangane. Nudi ne bua kunangangana mundi mununange. 
John13:35 Panuikala banangangane, nenku bantu bonsu nebanumanye ne: nudi balongi banyi." 
John13:36 Simone Petro kumukonka ne: — Mfumu, udi uya penyi? Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Kuena mua kundonda mpindiewu muaba undi nya to. Kadi neundonde pashishe." 
John13:37 Petro kumukonka ne: — Mfumu, tshiena mua kukulonda mpindiewu bua tshinyi? Ndi mumane kudilongolola bua kufila muoyi wanyi bualu buebe." 
John13:38 Yezu kumukonka ne: — Petro, udi mumane kudilongolola menemene bua kufila muoyi webe bualu buanyi anyi? Ndi nkujadikila ne: tshitala katshiyi tshianji kusama, newikale mumane kujadika misangu isatu ne: tshiena mumumanye to." 
John14:1 Yezu kuambila balongi bende ne: — Kanupampakanyi. Itabayi Mvidi Mukulu, nungitabe ne meme kabidi." 
John14:2 Mu nzubu mua Tatu wanyi mudi miaba ya bungi ya kusomba. Ndi nya kunulongoluela muaba. Bu bualu ebu kabuyi bulelela, tshivua mua kumuambilabu nansha." 
John14:3 Meme mumane kuya kunulongoluela muaba, nempingane bua kunuangata, bua nuikale nuenu kabidi muaba undi." 
John14:4 Nudi bamanye njila wa kundi nya. 
John14:5 Tomase kumuamba ne: — Mfumu, katuena bamanye kuudi uya to. Mutudi mua kumanya njila mbishi?" 
John14:6 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi njila, ndi bulelela, ndi muoyi. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kuya kudi Tatu kayi mupitshile kundi." 
John14:7 Panudi bammanye meme, nenumanye kabidi Tatu wanyi. Mpindiewu nukadi bamumanye, kabidi nukadi bamumone." 
John14:8 Filipe kumuamba ne: — Mfumu, utuleje Tatu. Ke tshionsu tshitudi tujinga." 
John14:9 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Filipe, kudi matuku mulongulongu andi mushale nenu, kuena muanji kummanya anyi? Muntu mumane kummona, mmumane kumona Tatu. Muudi wamba ne: “Utuleje Tatu” mbishi?" 
John14:10 Kuena witaba ne: ndi munda mua Tatu, kabidi Tatu udi munda muanyi anyi? Miaku indi nnuambila buonsu buenu kayena ifuma kundi. Kadi Tatu udi ushala munda muanyi, ke udi ukumbaja midimu yende." 
John14:11 Pandi nnuambila ne: ndi munda mua Tatu, kabidi Tatu udi munda muanyi, nungitabe. Nuitabile nansha bua malu aa andi ngenza." 
John14:12 Ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: muntu udi ungitaba neenze kabidi midimu indi ngenza. Neenze mikuabu mipite bunene, bualu ndi nya kudi Tatu." 
John14:13 Nengenze bionsu binualomba mu dina dianyi, bua Muana amueneshe butumbi bua Tatu." 
John14:14 Panudi nundomba tshintu mu dina dianyi, nentshienze." 
John14:15 — Panudi nunnanga, nenutumikile mikenji yanyi." 
John14:16 Nendombe Tatu bua anupe udi mua kunuambuluisha, Mueyelu wa bulelela bua wikale nenu kashidi." 
John14:17 Ba pa buloba kabena mua kuwakidila, bualu kabena mua kuumona nansha kuumanya. Kadi nuenu nudi baumanye. Bualu udi ushala nenu, udi kabidi munda muenu." 
John14:18 Tshiena mua kunushiya nkayenu to. Nempingane tshiakabidi kunudi. 
John14:19 Kunyima kua katupa, ba panu kabakummona kabidi to. Kadi nuenu nenummone, bualu ndi ne muoyi, nuenu kabidi nenuikale ne muoyi." 
John14:20 Dituku adi, nenujingulule ne: ndi munda mua Tatu wanyi, nuenu kabidi nudi munda muanyi, meme munda muenu." 
John14:21 Muntu udi ulama mikenji yanyi, uyitumikila, ke udi munnange. Muntu udi munnange, Tatu wanyi neamunange. Meme kabidi nemmunange, nendileje kudiye." 
John14:22 Yuda (ki nYudase Iskariyote to) kumukonka ne: — Mfumu, mmunyi muudi mua kudileja kutudi, kuyi udileja kudi ba pa buloba?" 
John14:23 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Muntu udi munnange, neakumbaje bindi ngamba. Tatu wanyi neamunange. Tatu wanyi ne meme netuye kudiye, netusombe munda muende." 
John14:24 Muntu udi kayi munnange, kena utumikila miaku yanyi. Binudi nungumvua ngamba, ki mbianyi to. Kadi mbifumina kudi Tatu uvua muntume." 
John14:25 Ndi munuambile malu aa pantshidi nenu. 
John14:26 Udi ne bua kunuambuluisha, Mueyelu wa Tshijila watumabu kudi Tatu mu dina dianyi, neunulongeshe bionsu. Neunuvuluije bionsu bimvua munuambile." 
John14:27 Ndi nnushila ditalala. Ndi nnupesha ditalala dianyi. Tshiena nnupeshadi bu mudi ba pa buloba badipeshangana. Kanupampakanyi. Kanutshinyi. 
John14:28 Nuvua bumvue nnuambila ne: “Nkadi ngumuka, kadi nempingane kunudi.” Panuikala bannange, nenusanke panudi numanya ne: ndi nya kudi Tatu. Bualu Tatu udi mumpite ku bunene." 
John14:29 Ndi mumane kunuambilabi mpindiewu kabiyi bianji kuenzeka, bua padibi bienzeka, nuitabe." 
John14:30 Tshiena mua kuyukila nenu kabidi bia bungi to. Bualu mfumu wa pa buloba ebu udi ulua. Kena mua kuntumina diyi to. 
John14:31 Kadi bidi bimpe bua ba pa buloba bamanye ne: ndi munange Tatu, kabidi ndi ngenza mudi Tatu untumina diyi. Jukayi, tumukayi apa!" 
John15:1 — Meme ndi mutshi wa nwinyo menemene. Tatu wanyi ke muena budimi bua nwinyo ebu. 
John15:2 Udi ukosa katamba kuonsu kadi kundi, kadi kakayi kakuama bimuma; udi upempa, ulengeja katamba kuonsu kadi kakuama bimuma bua kakuame bivule." 
John15:3 Dilongesha dindi munulongeshe, dikadi dimane kunulengeja." 
John15:4 Shalayi badisange nanyi, bu mundi mumane kudisanga nenu. Katamba pa nkayaku kakena mua kudikuamina tumuma, padiku kakayi ku mutshi. Ke munudi kanuyi mua kukuama bimuma, panudi kanuyi nushala badisange nanyi." 
John15:5 Ndi mutshi wa nwinyo. Nuenu nudi matamba. Muntu udi ushala mudisange nanyi, kabidi undi ndisanga nende, neakuame bimuma bia bungi. Bualu nuenu kanuyi nanyi, kanuena mua kuenza bualu nansha bumue." 
John15:6 Muntu udi kayi ushala mudisange nanyi, nebamuimanshe pa mbelu bu ditamba. Neume. Matamba mume badi baangula, baela muiku, baosha." 
John15:7 Panudi bashale munda muanyi, kabidi miaku yanyi mishale munda muenu, lombayi binudi basue, nenubipete." 
John15:8 Butumbi bua Tatu wanyi budi bumueneka, panudi nukuama bimuma bivule, kabidi nudileja nanku munudi balongi banyi." 
John15:9 Ndi mununange mudi Tatu munnange. Shalayi mu dinanga dianyi dindi mununange nadi. 
John15:10 Panudi nutumikila mikenji yanyi, nenushale mu dinanga dianyi, mumvua mutumikile mikenji ya Tatu, nshala mu dinanga diende." 
John15:11 Mvua munuambile nanku bua disanka dianyi dikale munda muenu; kabidi bua disanka dienu dikale dijima. 
John15:12 Telejayi mudi mukenji wanyi: nunangangane mundi munanga. 
John15:13 Dinanga dipite bunene didi muntu mua kuleja ndia kufila muoyi wende bua balunda bende. 
John15:14 Nudi balunda banyi, panudi nuenza mundi munuelele mukenji." 
John15:15 Tshiena nnubikila kabidi bena mudimu. Bualu muena mudimu kena mumanye tshidi mfumuende wenza. Ndi nnubikila balunda. Bualu mvua munumanyishe bionsu bimvua mumvue kudi Tatu wanyi. 
John15:16 Nuenu kanuvua bansungule, kadi meme mvua munusungule, munutumine diyi bua nuye kukuama bimuma, bimuma bidi bishala kashidi. Nenku Tatu neanupeshe tshionsu tshinuamulomba mu dina dianyi." 
John15:17 Nanku mukenji undi nnuela udi ne: nunangangane. 
John15:18 Padi ba pa buloba banukina, mimanye ne: bavua badianjila kunkina meme kumpala kuenu." 
John15:19 Bu nuenu bikale ba pa buloba, ba pa buloba batua mua kununanga bu bana babu. Kadi mvua munusungule, munusomone munkatshi mua ba pa buloba, bualu kanuena ba pa buloba to. Ke padi ba pa buloba banukina." 
John15:20 Vulukayi mumvua munuambile ne: “Muena mudimu nansha umue kena mua kupita mfumuende. ” Bu mmuabu bankengeshe, nebankengeshe kabidi. Pikalabu banyishe dilongesha dianyi, nebanyishe kabidi dienu." 
John15:21 Kadi nebanuelele bionsu abi amu bualu buanyi. Bualu kabena bamanye utua muntume. 
John15:22 Bu meme tshiyi mulue, kabatua mua kupila nansha. Kadi mpindiewu kabena ne pa kubingila bua bubi buabu." 
John15:23 Muntu udi unkina, mmukine kabidi ne Tatu wanyi." 
John15:24 Bu meme tshiyi muenzele munkatshi muabu midimu idi katshia muntu nansha umue kayi muanji kuenza, kabatua mua kupila nansha. Kadi mpindiewu mbamone midimu yanyi, kabidi badi batukina, Tatu wanyi ne meme." 
John15:25 Kadi bidi bienzeka nanku bua miaku ikumbane idibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji yabu ne: “Mbankine kapayi bualu. ” 
John15:26 Udi ne bua kunuambuluisha neafike. Yeye ke Mueyelu wa bulelela udi utumina kudi Tatu. Nennutuminewu, utumina kudi Tatu. Neunujadikile malu anyi." 
John15:27 Nuenu kabidi nenujadikile bantu malu anyi! Bualu nutua nanyi biangatshile ku tshibangidilu. 
John16:1 Ndi nnuambila malu aa, bua kanutedi ditaba dienu to." 
John16:2 Nebanuipate mu nzubu ya kutendelela ya bena Yuda. Kabidi tshikondu netshifike tshikata bantu badi banushipa bela meji ne: tudi tukuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu. 
John16:3 Nebanuenze nanku, bualu kabavua bamanye Tatu, nansha meme." 
John16:4 Kadi ndi nnuambila malu aa bua padi tshikondu tshifika tshidibu benza nanku, mwuluke ne: mvua mumane kunuambila. — Tshivua munuambile malu aa ku tshibangidilu, bualu ntshivua nenu." 
John16:5 Mpindiewu nkadi mpingana kudi uvua muntume. Muntu wa kunudi nansha umue kena unkonka ne: “Uyaya penyi?” 
John16:6 Kadi mioyi yenu mmiuwule ne dibungama, bualu ndi munuambile malu aa." 
John16:7 Kadi ndi nnujadikila ne: buenu nuenu bidi bimpe nye. Bualu meme tshiyi muye, udi mua kunuambuluisha kena ufika kunudi to. Kadi meme muye, nennutumineye." 
John16:8 Padiye ufika, nealeje ba pa buloba mudibu batupakana bua malu mabi, bua malu mimpe, ne bua mushindu udi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu pa yoyi." 
John16:9 Badi batupakana bua malu mabi, bualu kabena bangitaba." 
John16:10 Badi batupakana bua malu mimpe, bualu nyaya kudi Tatu, kabidi kanuakummona kabidi." 
John16:11 Badi batupakana bua mushindu udi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu, bualu mfumu wa bena panu bakadi bamane kumulumbuluisha." 
John16:12 Ntshidi ne malu a bungi a kunuambila. Kadi kanuena mua kuajingulula mpindiewu. 
John16:13 Padi Mueyelu wa bulelela ufika, neunulombole mu malu malelela onsu. Kawena wamba malu ne bumfumu buawu nkayawu to. Kadi neunuambile bionsu bivuawu mumvue. Neunumanyishe bidi ne bua kuenzeka." 
John16:14 Neuntumbishe, bualu neupete bidi kundi bua kunumanyishabi." 
John16:15 Bionsu bidi Tatu nabi, bidi kabidi bianyi. Ke pamvua munuambile ne: Mueyelu neupete bidi kundi meme bua kunumanyishabi." 
John16:16 — Kunyima kua katupa kanuakummona to. Pashishe kunyima kua katupa nenummone kabidi. 
John16:17 Nanku bamue balongi bende kuebejanganabu ne: — Mmusue kuamba tshinyi? Udi wamba ne: “Kunyima kua katupa, kanuakummona kabidi, pashishe kunyima kua katupa nenummone kabidi,” wamba kabidi ne: “Bualu ndi nya kudi Tatu.”" 
John16:18 Padiye wamba ne: “Kunyima kua katupa,” tshidiye musue kumvuija ntshinyi? Katuena lujingulula tshidiye musue kuamba to." 
John16:19 Yezu uvua mumanye ne: badi bajinga kunkonka. Ke kubebejaye ne: — Mvua munuambile ne: “Kunyima kua katupa kanuakummona kabidi, pashishe kunyima kua katupa nenummone.” Ke bualu bunudi nuebejangana anyi?" 
John16:20 Ndi nnujadikila ne: nenudile, nuele miyenga, kadi ba pa buloba nebasanke. Nenubungame. Kadi dibungama dienu nediandamuke disanka." 
John16:21 Padi mukaji wamba kulela, udi ne dibungama, bualu tshikondu tshiende tshia dikenga ntshifike. Kadi padiye ulela muana, kena uvuluka kabidi dikenga divuaye nadi to. Bualu udi ne disanka dia muntu udiye mufikishe panu." 
John16:22 Ke munudi nubungama nuenu kabidi mpindiewu. Kadi nennumone tshiakabidi. Muoyi wenu neusanke. Kakuakuila muntu nansha umue udi mua kununyenga disanka dienu. 
John16:23 Pafika dituku adi, kanuakunkonka kabidi bualu to. Ndi nnujadikila ne: Tatu neanupeshe tshionsu tshinuamulomba mu dina dianyi." 
John16:24 Too ne mpindiewu kanuena banji kulomba tshintu mu dina dianyi. Lombayi, nenupete, bua disanka dienu dikale dijima." 
John16:25 — Mvua munuambile bionsu ebi mu nsumuinu. Tshikondu netshifike tshingikala tshiyi ngakula nenu kabidi mu nsumuinu, kadi nennujikuile patoke malu onsu a Tatu." 
John16:26 Pafika dituku adi, nenulombe Tatu mu dina dianyi. Tshiena nnuambila ne: nennulombele kudi Tatu to." 
John16:27 Bualu Tatu yeye nkayende udi mununange. Udi mununange, bualu nudi bannange, bitabe kabidi ne: ndi mufume kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
John16:28 Ndi mufume kudi Tatu, mufike pa buloba. Mpindiewu ndi ngumuka pa buloba, mpingana kudi Tatu." 
John16:29 Ke balongi bende kumuamba ne: — Mpindiewu udi wamba malu patoke, kuyi wamba kabidi mu nsumuinu to." 
John16:30 Tudi bamanye mpindiewu ne: udi mujingulule malu onsu. Kuena ukengela bua bakuebeje bualu to. Ke patudi tuitaba ne: udi mufume kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
John16:31 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Mpindiewu nudi nuitaba anyi? 
John16:32 Kadi tshikondu netshifike, — ntshimane kufika mene — tshianutangalajabu bonsu buenu, muntu yonsu ku nzubu kuende. Nenunshiye nkayanyi. Kadi tshiena nkayanyi to, bualu Tatu udi nanyi." 
John16:33 Mvua munuambile bionsu ebi bua nuikale ne ditalala, badisange nanyi. Nenukenge pa buloba. Kadi nukoleshe muoyi! Nkadi mumane kutshimuna ba pa buloba!" 
John17:1 Yezu mumane kuakula nanku, kutangilaye mulu, wamba ne: — Tatu, diba ndimane kufika. Leja butumbi bua Muanebe, bua Muana aleje kabidi butumbi buebe." 
John17:2 Bualu uvua mumupeshe bumfumu pambidi pa bantu bonsu, bua apeshe bonsu baudi mumupe muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
John17:3 Muoyi wa tshiendelele udi nunku: bua bakumanye wewe Mvidi Mukulu umue mulelela, bamanye kabidi Yezu Kristu uuvua mutume." 
John17:4 Mvua muleje butumbi buebe pa buloba. Ndi mujikije mudimu uuvua mumpeshe bua kuenza. 
John17:5 Tatu, mpindiewu umpeshe ku mesu kuebe butumbi bumvua nabu kabayi banji kufuka buloba." 
John17:6 Mvua mukumanyishe kudi bantu ba pa buloba bauvua mumushe munkatshi mua bantu bakuabu bua kubampesha. Bavua bebe, wewe kubangambika. Ke bobu kuitaba diyi diebe!" 
John17:7 Badi bamanye mpindiewu ne: bionsu biuvua mumpeshe mbifume kuudi. 
John17:8 Bualu mvua mubambile meyi auvua mungambile, bobu kuitaba. Mbitabe ne: mvua mufume kuudi menemene. Mbitabe kabidi ne: wewe ke uvua muntume." 
John17:9 Ndi mbalombela kuudi. Tshiena ndombela ba pa buloba. Kadi ndi ndombela bantu bauvua mumpeshe, bualu mbebe." 
John17:10 Bionsu bindi nabi mbiebe. Kabidi bionsu biudi wewe nabi mbianyi meme. Butumbi buanyi budi bumueneka munda muabu. 
John17:11 Tshitshiena kabidi munkatshi mua bantu ba pa buloba. Kadi bobu badi munkatshi muabu. Meme ndi mfika kuudi. Tatu wa Tshijila, ubalame ku bukole bua dina diebe, dina diuvua mumpeshe, bua bikale tshintu tshimue mutudi tuetu, wewe ne meme, tshintu tshimue." 
John17:12 Pamvua pamue nabu, mvua mubalame ku bukole bua dina diebe, dina diuvua mumpeshe. Mvua mubalame, nansha umue wa kudibu ki mmujimine to, pa kumusha uvua ne bua kujimina bua miaku ikumbane ivuabu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila." 
John17:13 Kadi mpindiewu ndi mfika kuudi. Ndi ngakula nanku pantshidi pa buloba bua bikale ne disanka dianyi, disanka dijima munda muabu." 
John17:14 Mvua mubapeshe diyi diebe. Ba pa buloba bavua babakina, bualu kabena ba pa buloba, bu mundi meme tshiyi wa pa buloba." 
John17:15 Tshiena nkulomba bua ubumushe panu, kadi bua ubepule kudi Muena bubi." 
John17:16 Kabena ba pa buloba to, mundi meme tshiyi wa pa buloba." 
John17:17 Ubajidile mu bulelela, bua bikale bantu bebe wewe menemene. Muaku webe udi mulelela." 
John17:18 Mvua mubatume pa buloba, muuvua muntume pa buloba." 
John17:19 Ndi ndifila mujima kuudi bualu buabu, bua bobu kabidi bikale bebe menemene." 
John17:20 Tshiena ntendelela amu bualu buabu nkayabu to, kadi kabidi bua bonsu balualua kungitaba bua dilongesha diabu." 
John17:21 Ndi ntendelela bua bonsu benze tshintu tshimue. Tatu, benze tshintu tshimue netu, muudi wewe munda muanyi, meme munda muebe. Benze tshintu tshimue bua ba pa buloba bitabe ne: wewe uvua muntume." 
John17:22 Mvua mubapeshe butumbi buuvua mumpeshe, bua benze tshintu tshimue mutudi tuenza wewe ne meme tshintu tshimue:" 
John17:23 meme munda muabu, wewe munda muanyi, bua benze tshintu tshimue menemene, bua ba pa buloba bamanye ne: wewe uvua muntume; kabidi ne: udi mubanange muudi munnange." 
John17:24 Tatu, uvua mubampeshe. Ndi musue bua bikale pamue nanyi muaba ungikala, bua bamone butumbi buanyi, butumbi buuvua mumpeshe, bualu uvua munnange, kabayi banji kufuka buloba." 
John17:25 Tatu muimpe, ba pa buloba kabena kakumanye, kadi meme ndi mukumanye. Bobu aba mbamanye ne: uvua muntume." 
John17:26 Ndi mukumanyishe kudibu. Nentungunuke ne dikumanyisha, bua dinanga diudi munnange dikale munda muabu, bua meme kabidi ngikale munda muabu." 
John18:1 Yezu mumane kulomba Mvidi Mukulu nanku, kumukaye ne balongi bende, kuyaye dishiya dia musulu wa Kedrone. Muaba awu uvua lupangu, yeye kubuelamu ne balongi bende." 
John18:2 Yudase mumutungidi wa tshitungu uvua mumanye kabidi muaba awu. Bualu Yezu ne balongi bende bavua bafikemu pamue misangu mivule. 
John18:3 Yudase kuya mu lupangu alu ne tshisumbu tshia basolayi, kabidi ne tshia balami ba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bavua bamfumu ba batuangaji ne Baparushe batume. Bantu abu bavua ne bia myita, bikale kabidi ne bimunyi bia kapia." 
John18:4 Yezu uvua mumanye bionsu bivua ne bua kumuenzekela. Ke kusemenaye kuvuabu, kubebeja ne: — Unudi nukeba nnganyi?" 
John18:5 Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Yezu wa mu Nazarete. Yezu kubambila ne: — Ke meme ewu. Yudase mumutungidi wa tshitungu uvua muimane pamue nabu. 
John18:6 Yezu ubambila ne: “Ke meme ewu,” kupinganabu tshianyima, kudishinda panshi." 
John18:7 Ke Yezu kubakonka tshiakabidi ne: — Unudi nukeba nnganyi? Kuambabu ne: — Yezu wa mu Nazarete. 
John18:8 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Ndi mumane kunuambila ne: ke meme ewu. Nanku panuikala nunkeba meme, nulekele bantu bakuabu aba baye." 
John18:9 Ke muvuaye ne bua kukumbaja miaku ivuaye mumane kuamba ne: “Tatu, tshiena mujimije muntu nansha umue wa ku bauvua mumpeshe.”" 
John18:10 Simone Petro uvua ne muele wa myita. Kuupatulaye, kutapaye muena mudimu wa mutuangaji munene, kumukosa ditshi dia lua balume. (Muena mudimu awu, dina diende mMalkuse.)" 
John18:11 Kadi Yezu kuambila Petro ne: — Pingaja muele webe mu tshibuubu. Udi wela meji ne: ndi mbenga kunua dikopu dia dikenga didi Tatu mumpeshe anyi? 
John18:12 Diba adi tshisumbu tshia basolayi, mulombodi wabu, kabidi ne balami ba bena Yuda kukuatabu Yezu, kumusuika mionji." 
John18:13 Kuyabu nende bangabanga kua Anase. Anase uvua tatuende muenu wa Kayifa, uvua mutuangaji munene tshidimu atshi." 
John18:14 Kayifa awu ke uvua muambile bamfumu ba bena Yuda ne: “Mbimpe bua muntu umue afuile bantu bonsu. ” 
John18:15 Simone Petro ne mulongi mukuabu bavua balonda Yezu. Mulongi awu bavua bamumanye kudi mutuangaji munene. Nanku kubuelaye diakamue pamue ne Yezu mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu wa mutuangaji munene. 
John18:16 Kadi Petro uvua mushadile pambelu pabuipi ne tshiibi. Ke mulongi awu uvuabu bamanye kudi mutuangaji munene, kupatuka bua kuyukila ne mukaji uvua ulama ku tshiibi. Pashishe kubuejaye Petro." 
John18:17 Mukaji mulami wa tshiibi kukonka Petro ne: — Wewe kabidi, kuena wa ku balongi ba muntu ewu anyi? Petro kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena wa ku balongi bende nansha." 
John18:18 Kuvua mashika. Nanku bena mudimu ne balami bavua batemesha kapia, bela tshitangu bota. Petro kabidi uvua muimane pamue nabu, wota kapia." 
John18:19 Diba adi mutuangaji munene kulumbuluisha Yezu bua balongi bende ne bua dilongesha divuaye ulongesha. 
John18:20 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Mvua muambile bantu bonsu malu amu patoke. Mvua mulongeshe misangu mivule mu nzubu ya kutendelela ya bena Yuda, ne mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, muaba udi bena Yuda bonsu basangila. Tshivua muakule bualu nansha bumue mu musokoku." 
John18:21 Udi ungela nkonku bua tshinyi? Ebeja bavua bumvue bimvua mubalongeshe. Bobu mbamanye bimpe bimvua mubambile. 
John18:22 Yezu wamba nanku, umue wa ku balami, uvua muimane pabuipi nende, kumutapaye dipi, wamba ne: — Ke muudi wandamuna mutuangaji munene anyi?" 
John18:23 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Pangikala muambe bibi, utuleje mumvua muambe bibi. Kadi pangikala muambe bimpe, tshiudi untutshila ntshinyi?" 
John18:24 Ke Anase kumutuma amu musuika mionji kua Kayifa, mutuangaji munene." 
John18:25 Diba adi Simone Petro utshivua wota amu kapia. Kumukonkabu ne: — Wewe kabidi, kuena umue wa ku balongi ba muntu ewu anyi? Kadi Petro kuyila, wamba ne: — To, tshiena wa ku balongi bende nansha." 
John18:26 Umue wa ku bena mudimu ba mutuangaji munene, muanabu ne muntu uvua Petro mukose ditshi, kumuamba ne: — Tshivua mukumone nende mu lupangu anyi?" 
John18:27 Kadi Petro kuyila tshiakabidi. Diakamue tshitala kusama. 
John18:28 Pashishe kumukabu ne Yezu kua Kayifa, kuyabu nende ku nzubu wa bukalenga wa mulombodi wa ditunga. Bivua dinda dinda. Kadi bamfumu ba bena Yuda kabavua babuela mu nzubu wa bukalenga, bua kabapi mikiya, kadi bapange mua kudia didia dia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
John18:29 Ke pavua Pilate, mulombodi wa ditunga mupatukile pa mbelu, muye kudibu. Kubakonkaye ne: — Tshilumbu tshinudi nuasa muntu ewu ntshilumbu kaayi?" 
John18:30 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Bu yeye kayi muenzayi, katuvua mu kumufila kuudi to." 
John18:31 Pilate kubambila ne: — Muangatayi amu nuenu, numulumbuluishe bilondeshile mikenji yenu. Kuandamunabu ne: — Tuetu katuena ne bumfumu bua kushipa muntu to." 
John18:32 Ke muvua Yezu mukumbaje diyi divuaye muambe, divua dileja bantu mushindu uvuaye ne bua kufua." 
John18:33 Pilate kupingana mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kubikilaye Yezu, umukonka ne: — Udi mukalenga wa bena Yuda anyi?" 
John18:34 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Udi ungela lukonku elu ku lungenyi luebe, peshi bantu bakuabu mbakuambile malu anyi?" 
John18:35 Pilate kuandamuna ne: — Meme ndi muena Yuda anyi? Bena tshisamba tshienu ne bamfumu ba batuangaji mbakufile kundi. Tshiudi muenze ntshinyi? 
John18:36 Yezu kuandamuna ne: — Bukalenga buanyi ki mbua pa buloba to. Bu bukalenga buanyi buikale bua pa buloba, bantu banyi bavua mua kuluangana myita bua kabamfidi mu bianza bia bamfumu ba bena Yuda. Kadi bukalenga buanyi ki mbua pa buloba to." 
John18:37 Ke Pilate kumukonka ne: — Nanku udi mukalenga anyi? Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Anu muudi muambe amu: Ndi mukalenga. Meme tshidibu bandelele, kabidi tshindi mufikile panu apa, mbua kujadika malu malelela. Muntu yonsu udi munangi wa bulelela udi uteleja bindi ngamba." 
John18:38 Pilate kumukonka ne: — Bulelela ntshinyi? Pilate mumane kuamba nanku, kupatukaye tshiakabidi pambelu. Kuyaye kudi bena Yuda, ubambila ne: — Tshiena musangane bualu nansha bumue bundi mua kufundila muntu ewu tshibawu to." 
John18:39 Kadi bilondeshile tshibidilu tshienu, ndi nnukopuela misangu yonsu muena lukanu umue bua tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. Nudi basue nnukopuele mu nzubu wa lukanu mukalenga wa bena Yuda anyi?" 
John18:40 Kumuandamunabu, bela mbila ne: — Awu to! Tudi basue amu Barabase! Kadi Barabase awu uvua mushipianganyi." 
John19:1 Pashishe Pilate kutuma diyi bua bangate Yezu, bamutuute mikaba." 
John19:2 Basolayi kuluka tshikata tshia meba, kutshiasa Yezu ku mutu. Kumuvuadikabu kabidi tshinkutu tshikunze." 
John19:3 Kutantshilabu kudiye, bamuamba ne: — Muoyi, mukalenga wa bena Yuda! Bavua bamutapa kabidi mapi." 
John19:4 Pilate kupatuka tshiakabidi, kuambila bantu ne: — Telejayi. Ndi nnupatuila muntu ewu pambelu, bua numanye ne: tshiena musangane bualu nansha bumue bundi mua kufundila muntu ewu tshibawu." 
John19:5 Nanku Yezu kupatuka pambelu, muwule tshikata tshia meba ku mutu, kabidi ne tshinkutu tshikunze pambidi. Ke Pilate kubambila ne: — Ke muntu wenu ewu!" 
John19:6 Kadi bamfumu ba batuangaji ne balami bamumona, kuelabu mbila ne: — Umupopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane! Umupopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane! Pilate kubambila ne: — Muangatayi nuenu nkayenu, numupopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Bualu meme tshiena musangane bualu nansha bumue bundi mua kumufundila tshibawu." 
John19:7 Bena Yuda kumuandamuna ne: — Tudi ne mikenji, bilondeshile mikenji eyi, muntu ewu udi ne bua kufua. Bualu uvua muambe ne: ndi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
John19:8 Pilate umvua nanku, bowa bupite bukole kumukuata." 
John19:9 Kupinganaye mu nzubu wa bukalenga, bua kuebeja Yezu ne: — Udi mufume penyi? Kadi Yezu kavua muandamune to." 
John19:10 Ke Pilate kumuamba ne: — Udi ubenga kungandamuna anyi? Kuena mumanye ne: ndi ne bumfumu bua kukulekesha mu lukanu, nansha bua kukupopeshisha ku mutshi mutshiamakane anyi?" 
John19:11 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Kuena ne bumfumu nansha bumue pambidi panyi, pa kumusha buvua Mvidi Mukulu mukupeshe. Nanku muntu uvua mmufile kuudi, udi ne tshibawu tshipite tshiebe." 
John19:12 Biangatshile diba adi, Pilate uvua ukeba mushindu wa kutekesha Yezu. Kadi bena Yuda kubanga kuela mbila ne: — Wewe mukopole muntu ewu mu lukanu, kuena mulunda wa mukalenga wa bakalenga to. Muntu yonsu udi udifunyisha ne: ndi mukalenga, mmuluishi wa mukalenga wa bakalenga." 
John19:13 Pilate umvua nanku, kupatulaye Yezu pambelu. Kusombaye mu nkuasa wa bundumbulula, muaba uvuabu binyika ne: “Muaba mulamika mabue.” (Mu buena ebrewu badi bawinyika ne: “Ngabata”)." 
John19:14 Dituku adi divua dia muladilu wa tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, bu ku munda munya. Pilate kuambila bena Yuda ne: — Ke mukalenga wenu awu!" 
John19:15 Bobu kuela mbila ne: — Afue! Afue! Umupopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane! Pilate kubakonka ne: — Ndi ne bua kupopela mukalenga wenu ku mutshi mutshiamakane anyi? Bamfumu ba batuangaji kuandamuna ne: — Katuena ne munga mukalenga to, amu mukalenga wa bakalenga." 
John19:16 Nanku Pilate kufila Yezu bua bamupopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Nanku kukuatabu Yezu. 
John19:17 Yezu kupatuka mu tshimenga mudiambuile mutshi mutshiamakane wende, bua kuya muaba udibu binyika ne: “Muaba wa Kabalubalu ka mutu” (mu buena ebrewu badi bawinyika ne: “Ngolgota. ”)" 
John19:18 Bamane kufika muaba awu, basolayi kupopela Yezu ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Musangu umue, bavua bapopela kabidi bantu balume bakuabu babidi pa mitshi mitshiamakane, muntu ku luseke, muntu ku luseke, Yezu munkatshi." 
John19:19 Pilate kufundisha kabidi miaku pa kabaya, bua bakapopele ku mutu kua mutshi mutshiamakane. Bavua bafunde pa kabaya aku ne: “Yezu wa mu Nazarete, mukalenga wa bena Yuda.”" 
John19:20 Bena Yuda ba bungi bavua babala miaku ayi, bualu muaba uvuabu bapopela Yezu ku mutshi mutshiamakane uvua pabuipi ne tshimenga. Kabidi miaku eyi bavua bayifunde mu buena ebrewu, mu buena latine, kabidi ne mu buena ngreke." 
John19:21 Ke bamfumu ba batuangaji ba bena Yuda kuambila Pilate ne: — Kuvua mua kufundisha ne: “Mukalenga wa bena Yuda”. Kadi ufundishe ne: “Muntu ewu uvua wamba ne: Ndi mukalenga wa bena Yuda.” 
John19:22 Pilate kuandamuna ne: — Tshindi mumane kufunda tshishale amu muditshi amu. 
John19:23 Basolayi bamane kupopela Yezu ku mutshi mutshiamakane, kuangatabu bilamba biende. Kubitapululabu mu bitupa binayi, bua musolayi angate tshiende, musolayi tshiende. Kuangatabu kabidi muntumpu wende uvua kauyi ne mutelu, baukume nanku mujima kulu too ne panshi." 
John19:24 Basolayi kuambilangana ne: — Katupandi muntumpu ewu to. Kadi tutshinke bua kumanya ne: udi mua kuwangata nnganyi? Ebi bivua bienzeka bua kukumbaja miaku ivuabu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Bavua babanyangana bilamba bianyi, batshinka uvua mua kuangata tshilamba tshianyi. ” Ke muvua basolayi benza nanku." 
John19:25 Pabuipi ne mutshi mutshiamakane wa Yezu, bavua bimanepu kudi mamuende, kudi mukaji muanabu ne mamuende, kudi Mariya muena kua Klopase, ne kudi Mariya wa ku tshimenga tshia Magdala." 
John19:26 Yezu kumona mamuende ne mulongi uvuaye munange uvua pabuipi nende. Kuambilaye mamuende ne: — Mamu, ke muanebe awu." 
John19:27 Pashishe kuambilaye mulongi awu ne: — Ke mamuebe awu. Biangatshile musangu awu, mulongi kumuangata bua kuya nende kuende." 
John19:28 Malu aa mamane kupita, bu muvua Yezu mumanye ne: mpindiewu bionsu mbimane kukumbana, bua kukumbaja miaku ivuabu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila kuambaye ne: — Ndi ne nyota." 
John19:29 Muaba awu uvua luesu luwule ne maluvu a buanji tente. Basolayi kutua musukula mpampa mu maluvu awu, kuusuika ku lusokolu lua mutshi wa isope bua kuufikisha ku mishiku ya Yezu." 
John19:30 Yezu mumane kunua maluvu awu, kuambaye ne: — Bionsu mbimane kukumbana! Pashishe kuinyikaye mutu, kukula muoyi." 
John19:31 Dituku adi divua dia ditanu. Bena Yuda kabavua basue bua bitalu bishale pa mitshi mitshiamakane too ne dituku diabu dia Dikisha. Bualu dituku dia Dikisha adi divua dinene. Kulombabu Pilate bua kutshibulabu mikolu ya bavuabu bele ku mitshi mitshiamakane, ne bua kumusha bitalu ku mitshi." 
John19:32 Nanku basolayi kufika, kutshibula mikolu ya muntu wa kumpala, pashishe ne ya muibidi uvuabu bapopele ku mitshi mitshiamakane musangu umue ne Yezu." 
John19:33 Padibu bafika kudi Yezu, badi bamusangana mumane kufua. Nanku ki mbamutshibule mikolu to." 
John19:34 Kadi umue wa ku basolayi kumutua difuma diende mu lubadi. Mashi ne mayi kupatukamu diakamue. 
John19:35 Muntu uvua muambe malu aa ke uvua muamone. Bidiye wamba bidi bilelela. Yeye kabidi udi mumanye ne: ndi ngamba malu malelela, bua nuenu kabidi nuitabe." 
John19:36 Bivua bienzeka nanku bua miaku ikumbane ivuabu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Kabena mua kutshibula mufuba wende nansha umue. ” 
John19:37 Mbafunde kabidi miaku mikuabu mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Bantu nebatangile uvuabu batubule. ” 
John19:38 Pashishe, Yozefe muena mu tshimenga tshia Arimateya kulomba Pilate dianyisha dia kuangata tshitalu tshia Yezu. (Yozefe ewu uvua mulongi wa Yezu, kadi mu musokoku, bualu uvua utshina bamfumu ba bena Yuda.) Ke Pilate kuanyisha dilomba adi. Nanku Yozefe kuya kuangata tshitalu tshia Yezu." 
John19:39 Nikodemu, muntu uvua muye kudi Yezu musangu umue butuku, kufika kabidi ne manananshi a mire ne a alowe, bisambakaja, bia kilo bu makumi asatu." 
John19:40 Bubidi buabu kuangatabu tshitalu tshia Yezu, kutshijingilabu bilamba bienza ne buanda bua mitshi. Kutshielabu mafuta a manananshi bilondeshile muvua tshibidilu tshia bena Yuda padibu bajika muntu kampanda mufue." 
John19:41 Muaba uvuabu bapopele Yezu ku mutshi mutshiamakane awu, uvua lupangu. Mu lupangu amu muvua lukita lupialupia, luvuabu kabayi banji kujika muntu to." 
John19:42 Bu muvua dituku adi dia muladilu wa dituku dia Dikisha dia bena Yuda, kabidi muvua lukita pabuipi, ke kujikabu Yezu muaba awu." 
John20:1 Dituku dia lumingu patshiatshia, Mariya wa ku Magdala kuya ku lukita, panshi patshivua pafike. Kusanganaye bamane kumusha dibue ku mushiku wa lukita." 
John20:2 Nanku kupinganaye lubilu kuvua Simone Petro ne mulongi mukuabu uvua Yezu munange. Kubambilaye ne: — Mbapatule Mfumu mu lukita luende. Katuena bamanye muaba udibu bamuteke to. 
John20:3 Petro ne mulongi mukuabu awu, kuya batangile ku lukita." 
John20:4 Bavua banyema lubilu bonsu bubidi buabu, kadi mulongi mukuabu uvua mupite Petro ku lubilu. Nanku kufikaye ku lukita kumpala." 
John20:5 Kuinangilaye bua kutangila. Kumonaye bilamba bienza ne buanda bua mitshi biteka panshi, kadi kavua mubuele to." 
John20:6 Pashishe Simone Petro kufika umulonda. Kubuelaye mu lukita. Kumonaye bilamba bienza ne buanda bua ndanda, biteka panshi," 
John20:7 kabidi ne tshilamba tshivua ku mutu kua Yezu. Tshitambala etshi katshivua pamue ne bilamba bienza ne buanda bua ndanda to, kadi tshivua tshivunga pa nkayatshi pa muaba mukuabu." 
John20:8 Nanku mulongi mukuabu uvua mudianjile kufika ku lukita, kubuelaye kabidi. Utangila, kuitabaye." 
John20:9 (Bualu balongi kabavua banji kujingulula miaku ivuabu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: Yezu uvua ne bua kubika ku lufu. ) 
John20:10 Pashishe balongi babidi abu kupinganabu kuabu. 
John20:11 Mariya uvua muimane ku lukita udila. Pavuaye udila uvua winangila bua kutangila mu lukita. 
John20:12 Kumonaye batumibue babidi ba Mvidi Mukulu bavuale bilamba bitoke, basombe muaba uvua tshitalu tshia Yezu, umue muaba uvua mutu, mukuabu muaba uvua makasa." 
John20:13 Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu kumukonka ne: — Tshiudi udidila ntshinyi? Yeye kubandamuna ne: — Mbapatule Mfumuanyi mu lukita. Tshiena mumanye muaba udibu bamuteke. 
John20:14 Mumane kuamba nanku, kukudimukaye, kumona Yezu muimane muaba awu. Kadi kavua mumanye ne: nYezu to." 
John20:15 Yezu kumukonka ne: — Mukaji, tshiudi udidila ntshinyi? Uudi ukeba nnganyi? Mariya uvua muele meji ne: mmuena mudimu wa mu lupangu alu. Ke kumuambaye ne: — Ne ngwewe udi mumumbushe, ungambile kuudi mumuteke, nye kumuangata kabidi." 
John20:16 Yezu kumuela diyi ne: — Mariya! Mariya kukudimuka kudiye, umuamba mu buena ebrewu ne: — Rabuni! (mmomumue ne: “Mulongeshi.”)" 
John20:17 Yezu kumuamba ne: — Kundami to, bualu tshiena muanji kubanda kudi Tatu. Kadi uye kudi bana betu, ubambile ne: Ndi mbanda kudi Tatu wanyi, udi Tatu wenu kabidi, kudi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, udi Mvidi Mukulu wenu kabidi." 
John20:18 Nanku Mariya wa ku Magdala kuyaye kumanyisha balongi ba Yezu ne: — Ndi mumone Mfumu! Kubalondelaye bivua Yezu mumuambile. 
John20:19 Dilolu mene dia dituku dia lumingu adi, balongi bavua badisangishe mu nzubu, binjile biibi bakanga ne nsapi, bualu bavua batshina bamfumu ba bena Yuda. Ke Yezu kufika, kuimana munkatshi muabu ubela muoyi ne: — Bupole buikale nenu!" 
John20:20 Yeye mumane kubambila nanku, kubalejaye bianza biende ne lubadi luende. Balongi kusanka bikole pamonubu Mfumu." 
John20:21 Yezu kubela muoyi tshiakabidi ne: — Bupole buikale nenu. Mudi Tatu muntume, meme kabidi ndi nnutuma." 
John20:22 Mumane kuamba nanku, kubelaye mupuya, ubambila ne: — Angatayi Mueyelu wa Tshijila!" 
John20:23 Bantu banudi nujimijila mibi yabu, mibi yabu neyijimine; banudi nubenga kujimijila mibi yabu, kayena ijimina." 
John20:24 Kadi Tomase, umue wa ku balongi dikumi ne babidi ba Yezu, (uvuabu binyika kabidi ne: wa Dipasa), kavua pamue nabu diba divua Yezu mufike." 
John20:25 Balongi bakuabu kumuambila ne: — Tuvua bamone Mfumu. Kadi Tomase kubandamuna ne: — Pandi tshiyi mumone bibangu bia misumadi mu bianza biende, tshiyi mulenge ne minu muaba uvua misumadi, tshiyi mubueje tshianza tshianyi mu lubadi luende, tshiena mua kuitaba to." 
John20:26 Lumingu kupita, balongi ba Yezu bavua badisangishe mu nzubu tshiakabidi. Tomase uvua nabu. Biibi bivua bikanga ne nsapi. Kadi Yezu kufika, kuimana munkatshi muabu, ubela muoyi ne: — Bupole buikale nenu!" 
John20:27 Pashishe kuambilaye Tomase ne: — Teka munu webe apa. Tangila bianza bianyi. Tuma tshianza tshiebe, utshibueje mu lubadi luanyi. Lekela kuela mpata, itaba!" 
John20:28 Tomase kumuandamuna ne: — Mfumu wanyi ne Mvidi Mukulu wanyi! 
John20:29 Yezu kumuambila ne: — Udi witaba bua paudi mummone. Bantu badi bangitaba kabayi bammone ke bena diakalenga. 
John20:30 Yezu uvua muenze kabidi ku mesu kua balongi bende, bishima bikuabu bia bungi bidibu kabayi bafunde mu mukanda ewu to." 
John20:31 Kadi bidibu bafundamu mbabifunde bua nuitabe ne: Yezu udi Meshiya, Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kabidi panudi numuitaba, nenupete muoyi kudiye." 
John21:1 Kunyima kua matuku, Yezu kumuenekela balongi bende tshiakabidi ku dijiba dia Tiberiyade. Telejayi muvuaye mubamuenekele:" 
John21:2 Simone Petro, Tomase (udibu binyika ne: wa Dipasa), Natanayele (uvua wa mu Kana mu Ngalileya), bana ba Zebede ne balongi bakuabu babidi ba Yezu bavua pamue." 
John21:3 Simone Petro kubambila ne: — Ndi nya kuloba mishipa. Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Tuetu kabidi, tuyaya nebe. Nanku kuyabu, kubanda mu buatu. Kadi butuku abu kabavua bakuata tshintu nansha tshimue." 
John21:4 Pakavua butuku butshia, Yezu kubamuenekela ku muelelu wa mayi, kadi balongi kabavua bamanye ne: nYezu to." 
John21:5 Yezu kubakonka ne: — Bana banyi, nudi bakuate mishipa anyi? Bobu kumuandamuna ne: — To." 
John21:6 Yeye kubambila ne: — Elayi bukondu ku dia balume dia buatu, nenukuate mishipa. Nanku bobu kuela bukondu. Kabavua mua kubupatula mu mayi bualu buvua buwule tente ne mishipa." 
John21:7 Mulongi uvua Yezu munange, kuambila Petro ne: — Ke Mfumu! Petro umvua ne: “mMfumu,” kuvualaye tshilamba tshiende (bualu kavua ne bilamba pambidi to.) Kudielaye mu mayi." 
John21:8 Balongi bakuabu kufika ne buatu, benda bakoka bukondu buwule tente ne mishipa. Bavua pabuipi ne muelelu wa mayi, mutantshi bu wa metre lukama." 
John21:9 Bamane kupatuka mu mayi, kumonabu muaba awu kapia katema ne mishipa mitentekapu, kabidi ne diampa." 
John21:10 Yezu kubambila ne: — Luayi ne mishipa ya ku inudi bakuate. 
John21:11 Simone Petro kubuela mu buatu, kukokela bukondu ku muelelu wa mayi, buwule tente ne mishipa minene, yonsu misanga ivua lukama makumi atanu ne isatu. Nansha muvuayi bungi nanku, bukondu kabuvua bupandike to." 
John21:12 Yezu kubambila ne: — Luayi nudie. Mulongi nansha umue kavua mupete dikima dia kumukonka ne: “Wewe udi nganyi?” Bualu bavua bamanye ne: mMfumu. 
John21:13 Yezu kusemena, kuangata diampa, kubabanyina, kubapesha kabidi ne mishipa." 
John21:14 Ke musangu muisatu uvua Yezu mumuenekele balongi bende katshia wabika ku lufu. 
John21:15 Bobu bamane kudia, Yezu kukonka Simone Petro ne: — Simone, muana wa Yowanane, udi munnange mupite mudi bakuabu aba bannange anyi? Petro kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, Mfumu, udi mumanye mundi mukunange. Yezu kumuambila ne: — Ukube bana banyi ba mikoku." 
John21:16 Pashishe kumukonkaye tshiakabidi ne: — Simone, muana wa Yowanane, udi munnange anyi? Petro kumuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, Mfumu, udi mumanye mundi mukunange. Yezu kumuambila ne: — Ukube mikoku yanyi." 
John21:17 Pashishe kumukonkaye tshiakasatu ne: — Simone, muana wa Yowanane, udi munnange anyi? Petro kubungama, bualu Yezu uvua umukonka tshiakasatu ne: “Udi munnange anyi?” Ke kumuandamunaye ne: — Mfumu, udi mumanye bionsu, udi mumanye mundi mukunange! Yezu kumuambila ne: — Ukube mikoku yanyi." 
John21:18 Ndi nkujadikila ne: pautshivua nsongalume, uvua udisuika mukaba wewe nkayebe, uya kuuvua musue, kadi pawashala mukulakaje, newolole maboku, mukuabu neakusuike mukaba webe, neakufile kuudi kuyi musue kuya." 
John21:19 (Pavua Yezu wamba nanku, uvua musue kumvuija mushindu uvua Petro ne bua kufua bua kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu.) Pashishe Yezu kumuamba ne: — Undonde!" 
John21:20 Petro ukudimuka, kumonaye mulongi uvua Yezu munange, ubalonda. (Yeye awu ke uvua mueyemene Yezu pavuabu badia, kabidi uvua mumukonke ne: “Mfumu wakutungidi tshitungu nnganyi? ”)" 
John21:21 Petro umumona, kukonkaye Yezu ne: — Mfumu, kadi yeye tshidi mua kumuenzekela ntshinyi?" 
John21:22 Yezu kumuandamuna ne: — Meme musue bua ashale ne muoyi too ne pangapingana tshiakabidi, mbualu buebe anyi? Wewe, undonde!" 
John21:23 Lumu kutangalaka kudi bavua balonda Yezu ne: mulongi awu kakufua to. Kadi Yezu kavua muambile Petro ne: “Mulongi awu kena ufua to,” kadi uvua muambe ne: “Meme musue bua ashale ne muoyi too ne pangapingana tshiakabidi, mbualu buebe anyi? ”" 
John21:24 Mulongi awu ke udi ulonda malu aa, uvua muafunde kabidi. Tudi bamanye ne: bidiye ujadika mbilelela." 
John21:25 Yezu uvua muenze kabidi malu makuabu a bungi. Bu bantu baafunde mu mukanda ku bumue ku bumue, ndi ngela meji ne: mu buloba bujima kabavua mua kupeta muaba wa kulamina mikanda ivuabu mua kufunda." 
Acts1:1 Teyofile musuibue, Mu mukanda wanyi wa kumpala, mvua mulonde malu onsu avua Yezu muenze, kabidi mulongeshe, biangatshile ku mbangilu," 
Acts1:2 too ne ku dituku divuabu bamuambule mu diulu. Bangabanga ne kubandamu, uvua mumanyishe bapostolu, bavuaye musungule ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila, bivuabu ne bua kuenza." 
Acts1:3 Kunyima kua lufu luende, uvua mumuenekele bapostolu misangu ne misangu, bua kubajadikila ne: ndi ne muoyi. Uvua mudileje kudibu matuku makumi anayi, ubambila malu a pa Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts1:4 Dituku dikuabu, pavuaye usomba nabu ku mesa, kubakandikaye ne: — Kanumuki mu Yerushalayime. Kadi nuindile dipa dimvua munumanyishe, divua Tatu mulaye." 
Acts1:5 Yowanane uvua utua bantu mu mayi. Kadi matuku makese aa, nebanutue nuenu munda mua Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts1:6 Bantu bavua bunguile pavua Yezu, kumukonkabu ne: — Mfumu, newenzulule bukalenga bua Izrayele mpindiewu anyi?" 
Acts1:7 Yezu kubandamuna ne: — Tatu ke udi ujadika meba ne bikondu ku bumfumu buende. Nuenu kanuena ne bua kubimanya to. 
Acts1:8 Kadi nenupete bukole, diba dianupuekela Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Nanku nenumone mua kujadika malu anyi mu Yerushalayime, mu ditunga dijima dia Yudeya ne dia Samariya, kabidi too ne ku ndekelu wa buloba." 
Acts1:9 Yezu mumane kuamba nanku, kubandaye mu diulu, bobu batangile. Ke divuba kujika Yezu, kabayi bamumone kabidi to." 
Acts1:10 Batshivua batangile muvua Yezu ubanda mu diulu, ke bantu babidi bavuala bilamba bitoke kubamuenekela diakamue," 
Acts1:11 kubakonka ne: — Bena Ngalileya, munudi bimane apa batangile mulu nanku mbishi? Yezu ewu, udibu bumushe kunudi, bambule mu diulu, neapingane kabidi, mushindu unudi bamumone ubandamu." 
Acts1:12 Ke bapostolu kumuka ku mukuna wa mitshi ya Olive, kupingana ku Yerushalayime. Mukuna awu uvua mushilangane ne Yerushalayime mutantshi wa kilometre amu bu umue." 
Acts1:13 Bamane kufika ku Yerushalayime, kubandabu mu tshibambalu tshia nzubu tshia kulu, muaba muabu basomba misangu mivule. Bobu abu ke Petro, Yowanane, Yakobe ne Andre, Filipe ne Tomase, Bartolmayi ne Matayi, Yakobe muana wa Alfayi, Simone muluidi wa ditunga, ne Yuda muana wa Yakobe." 
Acts1:14 Bonsu bavua muoyi umue, bananukila mu ditendelela, pamue ne bakaji bakuabu, kabidi ne Mariya, mamuende wa Yezu, ne bana babu ne Yezu." 
Acts1:15 Matuku makese apita, bena ditaba bamane kusangila bu lukama ne makumi abidi, ke Petro kujuka, kubambila ne:" 
Acts1:16 — Bana betu, miaku idibu bafunde mu Mikanda ya tshijila ivua ne bua kukumbana. Mueyelu wa Tshijila uvua mudianjile kumanyisha mukana mua Davide malu a Yudase, muludiki wa bantu bavua bakuate Yezu." 
Acts1:17 Yudase uvua wa mu tshisumbu tshietu, ukuata netu mudimu wa mushindu umue." 
Acts1:18 (Muntu awu uvua musumbe budimi ne makuta avuabu bamufute bua bualu bubi buvuaye muenze. Kuponaye mu budimi amu, mutu panshi. Mubidi wende kutayika, bia munda bionsu kuya panshi." 
Acts1:19 Bena Yerushalayime bonsu kumvua bualu ebu. Ke kuinyikabu budimi abu mu muakulu wabu ne: “Akeldama,” mmomumue ne: “Budimi bua mashi. ”)" 
Acts1:20 Ke mudibu bafunde mu mukanda wa misambu ne: “Nzubu wende ashale munda mutupu, muntu kasombimu.” mBafundemu kabidi ne: “Muntu mukuabu apingane pa muaba wende." 
Acts1:21 Nanku mbimpe muntu umue adisange netu bua kujadika ne: Mfumu Yezu mmubiike ku bafue. Muntu awu ikale umue wa ku bantu batuvua nabu diba dionsu, pavua Mfumu Yezu wendakana netu, bituadija katshia Yowanane wamutua mu mayi, too ne ku dituku divuabu bamumushe kutudi, baye nende mu diulu." 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Nanku kufilabu mena abidi: Yozefe, uvuabu binyike ne: Barsabase, nansha ne: Muakane; kabidi ne Matiyase." 
Acts1:24 Ke bonsu pamue kutendelela, bamba ne: — Mfumu, wewe udi mumanye muoyi wa muntu yonsu. Nanku ku babidi aba utuleje uudi musungule." 
Acts1:25 Apingane Yudase mu mudimu wa bupostolu. Bualu Yudase mmuushiye, muye ku wende muaba." 
Acts1:26 Kutshinkabu bua kupeta muntu umue ku babidi aba. Kupetabu Matiyase. Kumusakidilabu ku bapostolu dikumi ne umue. 
Acts2:1 Dituku dia Pentekostese bena ditaba bonsu bavua basangile muaba umue. 
Acts2:2 Bu mpindiewu tshiona tshikole kufuma mu diulu, bu tshipepele tshikole tshituuta. Kumvui-katshi mu nzubu mujima uvuabu basombe." 
Acts2:3 Kumonabu ndimi imueneka bu ya kapia, yabulukangana iya kuikila ku lumue ku lumue pa mitu yabu." 
Acts2:4 Bonsu kuwula ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Kutuadijabu kuakula miakulu mikuabu, bilondeshile muvua Mueyelu wa Tshijila ubakuisha." 
Acts2:5 Mu Yerushalayime amu muvua bena ditaba ba bena Yuda, bafume ku matunga onsu a pa buloba bujima." 
Acts2:6 Bantu kunguila pavuabu bumvua tshiona atshi. Bavua bakema bikole, bualu muntu yonsu uvua umvua balongi ba Yezu bakula muakulu wa kuabu kudiye ufuma." 
Acts2:7 Bavua bakatshila bikole, bamba ne: — Badi bakula bonsu aba ki mbena Ngalileya anyi?" 
Acts2:8 Kadi mutudi tubumvua bakula muakulu wa kuetu kutudi bafume mmunyi? 
Acts2:9 Munkatshi muetu emu se mudi bena Parte, bena Madayi, bena Elame, bantu ba mu Mezopotamiya, ba mu Yudeya, ba mu Kapadokiya, ba mu Pontuse, ba mu buloba bua Aziya," 
Acts2:10 ba mu Frijiya, ba mu Pamfiliya, ba mu Ejipitu, ne ba mu buloba bua Sirene budi mu ditunga dia Libiya. Bakuabu mene badi bafume ku Rome." 
Acts2:11 Mudi bena Yuda, ne benyi batshidi bakeba kubuela mu tshisumbu tshia bena Yuda. Mudi bantu ba mu Kreta, kabidi ne Ba Arabe. Kadi bonsu tudi tubumvua balonda mu miakulu yetu mishilangane malu a kukema adi Mvidi Mukulu muenze." 
Acts2:12 Bantu bonsu aba bavua bakema, balubakana, bakonkangana ne: — Bionsu bidi bienzeka ebi bidi bileja tshinyi?" 
Acts2:13 Kadi bantu bakuabu bavua baseka bena ditaba, bamba ne: — mBakuatshike maluvu menemene!" 
Acts2:14 Ke Petro kujuka kulu, pamue ne bapostolu bakuabu dikumi ne umue, kuambilaye bantu ne diyi dikole ne: — Nuenu bena Yuda, nuenu bonsu kabidi badi basomba mu Yerushalayime, ntelejayi bimpe, bua nnumvuije bidi bienzeka ebi." 
Acts2:15 Bantu aba ki mbakuatshike maluvu, munudi nuela meji amu to. Tutshidi amu pa diba dia tshitema wa dinda." 
Acts2:16 Kadi bidi bienzeka lelu ebi, ke bivuamuambi Yowele mumane kumanyisha ne:" 
Acts2:17 “Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: matuku a nshikidilu, nentumine muntu yonsu Mueyelu wanyi. Bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji nebambe malu anyi. Nendeje bansonga benu malu. Banunu benu nebalote ndota." 
Acts2:18 Eyowa, matuku awu nentumine bonsu badi bangenzela mudimu, balume ne bakaji, Mueyelu wanyi. Nanku nebambe malu anyi." 
Acts2:19 Nengenze malu a kukema mu diulu muamua, ne bishima pa bupoba apa: nebamone mashi, kapia, ne dibungi dikole dia muinshi." 
Acts2:20 Dituku dinene dia Maweja-Nangila, dituku dia butumbi, kadiyi dianji kufika, diba nediandamuke miidima, ngondu neakunze bu mashi." 
Acts2:21 Kadi muntu yonsu wabila Maweja-Nangila, neapande. ”" 
Acts2:22 Nuenu bena Izrayele, telejayi tshindi nnuambila: Yezu wa mu Nazarete uvua mufike kunudi mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu. Mvidi Mukulu kujadika bumfumu buende munkatshi muenu ne bishima bivule, kabidi ne malu a kukema, bivuaye munuenzele kudiye. Bionsu abi, nuenu kabidi nudi babimanye." 
Acts2:23 Bavua bafila muntu ewu kunudi, muvua Mvidi Mukulu mudianze kujadika. Nuenu kumushipa, kumupopeshisha pa mutshi mutshiamakane kudi bena malu mabi." 
Acts2:24 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmumubishe ku lufu, mumumbushe ku makenga a lufu, bualu kavua mua kushala ku bumfumu bua lufu." 
Acts2:25 Ke muvua Davide muambe bualu buende ne: “Mvua mumone Maweja-Nangila diba dionsu kumpala kuanyi, udi pabuipi nanyi bua tshizakadi." 
Acts2:26 Ke padi muoyi wanyi ne disanka, ntua tshianga, tshionkomoka. Nansha mubidi wanyi muikale ne butekete, nendale ne ditekemena ne:" 
Acts2:27 kuakundekela mu kandondu ka bafue, kuakuanyisha bua meme, mulunda webe, mbolele mu lukita." 
Acts2:28 Wewe kundeja njila uvua mumfikishe ku muoyi. Paudi pabuipi nanyi, ndi ne disanka divule. ”" 
Acts2:29 Bana betu, ndi mua kunuambila bualu bua nkambua wetu Davide patoke too: ukadi mufue. Bakamujika. Lukita luende ludi munkatshi muetu emu ne lelu." 
Acts2:30 Kadi yeye uvua muambi. Uvua mumanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmundaye uditshipa ne: nenteke umue wa ku ndelanganyi yebe mu nkuasa webe wa bumfumu. 
Acts2:31 Nanku Davide uvua mudianze kumona bivua ne bua kuenzeka. Ke muvuaye mumanyishe dibika dia Kristu, pavuaye wamba ne: “Kabavua bamulekele mu kandondu ka bafue. Mubidi wende kauvua mubolele mu lukita.”" 
Acts2:32 Yezu undi ntela awu, ke udi Mvidi Mukulu mubishe ku bafue. Tuetu bonsu tudi bajadiki ba bualu ebu." 
Acts2:33 Mpindiewu udi muzanjike ku dia bukole dia Mvidi Mukulu. Kupetaye Mueyelu wa Tshijila uvua Tatu mulaye. Ke yeye kututuminawu: ke binudi numona, numvua kabidi lelu ewu." 
Acts2:34 Davide kavua mubande mu diulu. Kadi udi wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile Mfumu wanyi ne: Somba ku dianyi dia balume," 
Acts2:35 too ne pangateka baluishi bebe tshidiatshilu tshia makasa ebe. ” 
Acts2:36 Nuenu bena Izrayele bonsu, nujadike ne: Yezu ewu, unuvua bapopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane, ke yeye udi Mvidi Mukulu muteke Mfumu ne Kristu!" 
Acts2:37 Bantu bumvua miaku eyi, kulubakanabu bikole. Kukonkabu Petro ne bapostolu bakuabu ne: — Kadi, bana betu, tshitudi ne bua kuenza ntshinyi?" 
Acts2:38 Ke Petro kubandamuna ne: — Nudilengeje. Batue yonsu wa kunudi mu mayi mu dina dia Yezu Kristu, bua Mvidi Mukulu anujimijile mibi yenu. Nanku nenupete dipa dia kudi Mvidi Mukulu, ke Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts2:39 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmunulaye nuenu ne bana benu, kabidi ne bonsu batshidi kule, bonsu badi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu musue kubikila." 
Acts2:40 Petro uvua ubasaka, ubakolesha ku muoyi, ubambila miaku mikuabu ya bungi ne: — Umbukayi kudi bena buenzayi ba lelu aba. Nanku nenupete lupandu!" 
Acts2:41 Bantu ba bungi kuitaba miaku ya Petro ayi. Kubatuabu mu mayi. Dituku adi, bantu bu binunu bisatu kubuela mu tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
Acts2:42 Matuku onsu bantu abu bavua basombe kaba kamue: bavua bateleja ne ntema bivua bapostolu babalongesha, badisanga mu buena muntu, badila kaba kamue batendelela bonsu pamue." 
Acts2:43 Muntu yonsu uvua ne bowa, bualu bapostolu bavua benza bishima ne malu a kukema mavule." 
Acts2:44 Bena ditaba bavua bonsu ne muoyi umue, bateka bionsu bivuabu nabi muaba umue, babanyanganabi" 
Acts2:45 Bavua bapana madimi ne bintu biabu, babanyangana bonsu mushinga wabi, bilondeshile dikenga divua muntu yonsu nadi." 
Acts2:46 Ku dituku ku dituku, bavua basangila mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi umue, bakosolola diampa pamue mu nzubu yabu, badila pamue ne disanka, ne muoyi wa dinanga." 
Acts2:47 Bavua batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu bonsu bavua babanyisha. Dituku dionsu Mfumu uvua usakidila ku tshisumbu tshiabu bantu bavuaye musungile. 
Acts3:1 Dituku dikuabu Petro ne Yowanane bavua babuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu diba dia kutendelela dia isatu wa dilolu. 
Acts3:2 Ku tshiibi tshia nzubu tshivuabu binyika ne: “Tshilengele,” kuvua muntu mulela tshibombu. Dituku dionsu bavua baya kumuteka muaba awu, bua amone mua kulomba tshia pa luse kudi bantu bavua babuela mu nzubu." 
Acts3:3 Muntu awu umona Petro ne Yowanane babuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu amu, kulombaye tshia pa luse." 
Acts3:4 Petro ne Yowanane kumutangila talalaa. Ke Petro kumuamba ne: — Banduluka tumone, ututangile!" 
Acts3:5 Muntu awu kubatangila ne ntema yonsu, utekemena kupeta kantu kudibu." 
Acts3:6 Ke Petro kumuamba ne: — Tshiena ne lukanu lua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kadi tshindi natshi, ndi nkupeshatshi: mu dina dia Yezu Kristu wa mu Nazarete, ndi nkuamba ne: juka, enda!" 
Acts3:7 Pashishe Petro kumukuata ku tshianza tshia balume, kumujula. Diakamue makasa ende ne tupombu kukolabi." 
Acts3:8 Muntu awu kutua makasa panshi, kuimana bimpe, kutuadija kuenda. Kubuelaye ne bapostolu pamue mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, wenda utupika, utumbisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts3:9 Bantu bonsu kumona muvuaye wenda, utumbisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts3:10 Bakuabu kumumanyabu ne: nyeye uvua musombe ku Tshiibi Tshilengele tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ulomba tshia pa luse. Nanku bavua ne bowa, bakatshila bivua bimuenzekela ebi." 
Acts3:11 Bu muvua muntu awu kayi musue kushiya Petro ne Yowanane, bantu bonsu bavua bakema bikole, bunguila mu Lutanda luvuabu binyika ne “lua Shelomu, ” muvua Petro ne Yowanane." 
Acts3:12 Petro umona nanku, kuambilaye bantu ne: — Nuenu bena Izrayele, nudi nukema padi muntu ewu wenda bimpe bua tshinyi? Tshinudi nututangidila ntshinyi? Bienza bu tuetu badi bendesha muntu ewu ku bukole buetu tuetu, nansha bualu tudi bantu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Acts3:13 Kabiena nanku to! Mvidi Mukulu wa Abrahame, wa Izake, ne wa Yakobe, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu, mmuleje patoke butumbi budi muntu wende Yezu nabu. Nuenu kumufila kudi bamfumu, kumubenga kumpala kua Pilate. Kadi Pilate uvua musue kumulekela." 
Acts3:14 Nuenu kubenga muntu wa tshijila, muitabi wa Mvidi Mukulu, kulomba Pilate, bua anulekele mushipianganyi." 
Acts3:15 Nanku nuenu kushipesha mfumu wa muoyi. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmumubishe ku lufu. Tuetu tudi bajadiki ba bualu ebu. 
Acts3:16 Muntu ewu unudi bamona, kabidi bamanye, udi wenda ku bukole bua dina dia Yezu, ne bua ditaba divuaye nadi pa dina adi. Bu muvuaye muitabe Yezu, ke padiye wenda bimpe kashidi, bu munudi bamumona mujukilamu." 
Acts3:17 Kadi, bana betu, ndi mumanye se: nuenu ne bamfumu benu, nudi benze bualu ebu, bualu kanuvua bamanye Yezu." 
Acts3:18 Mvidi Mukulu mmukumbaje bivuaye mudianze kumanyisha ku kale kudi bambi bonsu ne: Kristu wende uvua ne bua kukenga. 
Acts3:19 Nanku nudilengeje, nupingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua anujimijile mibi yenu." 
Acts3:20 Diba adi Mvidi Mukulu neasemeje pabuipi matuku a lupandu. Neanutumine Kristu uvuaye mudianze kunusunguila, ke Yezu mene." 
Acts3:21 Mpindiewu Yezu udi ne bua kushala mu diulu, too ne ku tshikondu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kuakajilula bionsu, bu muvuaye muambe kale kudi bambi bende ba tshijila." 
Acts3:22 Moshe uvua muambe ne: “Munkatshi mua bana benu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neanupatuile muambi bu meme. Nenumuteleje, nuitabe bionsu bianuambilaye." 
Acts3:23 Muntu yonsu wabenga kuitaba muambi awu, nebamuipate mu tshisamba tshia bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, bamushipe. ”" 
Acts3:24 Bituadija ku Samuwele, bambi bonsu ku muntu ku muntu bavua badianjile kumanyisha bantu malu adi menzeke matuku aa." 
Acts3:25 Nuenu nudi bantu bavua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye kudi bambi. Nudi bantu bavua Mvidi Mukulu mutuile ndondu ne bankambua babu, pavuaye muambile Abrahame ne: “Bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba nebipetele diakalenga ku ndelanganyi yebe. ”" 
Acts3:26 Mvidi Mukulu mmusungule muntu wende; mmudianze kumutuma kunudi, bua nulekele kulonda njila yenu mibi, nupete diakalenga." 
Acts4:1 Patshivua Petro ne Yowanane balongesha bantu, ke batuangaji, balombodi ba balami ba nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne Basaduke, kufika." 
Acts4:2 Bavua bafike munda bikole, bualu bapostolu babidi aba bavua balongesha bantu, babamanyisha ne: bantu badi mua kubiika ku lufu, bualu bavua babajadikile ne: Yezu mmubiike ku bafue." 
Acts4:3 Kukuatabu Petro ne Yowanane, kubela mu nzubu wa lukanu, bualu butuku bukavua buila. Kubalamamu too ne ku dinda." 
Acts4:4 Kadi bantu ba bungi bavua bumvue dilongesha edi, kuitababu. Bena ditaba bakavua bu binunu bitanu." 
Acts4:5 Butuku bumane kutshia, bamfumu ba bena Yuda, bakulu, ne balongeshi ba mikenji, kusangila mu Yerushalayime." 
Acts4:6 Ku bobu abu kuvua Amase, mutuangaji munene, Kayifa, Yowanane, Aleksandre, ne bena diku dia mutuangaji munene bonsu." 
Acts4:7 Kubikilabu Petro ne Yowanane. Kubimanyikabu munkatshi muabu, babakonka ne: — Nuvua benze bualu ebu ku bukenji kaayi? Nuvua bajikije disama dia muntu ewu mu dina dia nganyi?" 
Acts4:8 Ke Petro, muwule ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kubambila ne: — Nuenu bamfumu ba ditunga ne bakulu," 
Acts4:9 nudi nutulumbuluisha lelu, bua bilenga bitudi benzele mulema, nutukonka mushindu udiye mupanda." 
Acts4:10 Nanku nuenu bonsu badi apa, kabidi ne bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu, numanye ne: muntu, unudi numona ewu, udi wenda bimpe amu ku bukole bua dina dia Yezu Kristu wa mu Nazarete, unuvua bapopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmumubishe ku bafue." 
Acts4:11 Bu mudi Mikanda ya tshijila yamba, Yezu ke: “Dibue dinuvua nuenu bibaki balekele, kadi didi dienza dibue dia mu ditumba, dishindika nzubu. ”" 
Acts4:12 Kakuena lupandu kudi munga muntu to. Bualu panu ponsu Mvidi Mukulu kena mupe bantu dina dikuabu didi mua kutusungila. 
Acts4:13 Bena Tshipangu tshikulu bavua bakema bikole, pavuabu bumvua Petro ne Yowanane badilumbuluila bimpe, bashindika bivuabu bamba. Bualu bavua bamanye ne: bantu aba mbantu bashadile, kabayi balonge mikanda. Bavua bajadike kabidi ne: ke bantu bavua bendakana ne Yezu." 
Acts4:14 Bu muvua bena Tshipangu bamona kabidi muntu uvua tshibombu, muimane pavuabu, wenda biakane, kupangabu tshia kuamba." 
Acts4:15 Kupatulabu Petro ne Yowanane mu Tshipangu, bua bamone mua kuela tshifulu nkayabu." 
Acts4:16 Bavua bakonkangana ne: — Bantu aba neabenzele tshinyi? Bualu tshishima tshinene tshidibu benze, bena mu Yerushalayime bonsu mbatshimanye. Nanku katuena mua kutshivila to." 
Acts4:17 Kadi bua lumu luatshi kalupitshi kutampakana mu bantu, tu-bakanyine bikole, bua kabalongeshi kabidi muntu nansha umue mu dina dia Yezu." 
Acts4:18 Nanku kubabikilabu, kubakanyinabu bikole, bua kabalongeshi, kabatedi nansha dina dia Yezu." 
Acts4:19 Ke Petro ne Yowanane kubandamuna ne: — Tshidi tshimpe ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu ntshinyi? nKunuitaba nuenu anyi, nkumuitaba Yeye? Nudiambile nuenu nkayenu!" 
Acts4:20 Kadi tuetu katuena mua kubenga kuamba, tshitudi bamone, kabidi bumvue to." 
Acts4:21 Bena Tshipangu kubakanyina tshiakabidi, pashishe kubalekelabu. Kabavua ne mushindu wa kubanyoka, bualu bantu bonsu bavua batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu bua bivua bienzeke." 
Acts4:22 Muntu mene uvuabu bajikije disama ku tshishima awu, ukavua ne bidimu bipite pa makumi anayi!" 
Acts4:23 Bamane kubalekela, Petro ne Yowanane kuya kuvua bena ditaba nabu. Kubalondelabu bionsu bivua bamfumu ba batuangaji, ne bakulu ba bena Yuda, bambe." 
Acts4:24 Bena ditaba bumvua nanku, kutendelelabu Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi umue, bamba ne: — Mukalenga, wewe ke udi mufuke diulu, buloba, mayi manene, ne bionsu bidimu." 
Acts4:25 Wewe ke uvua muambe ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kabidi mukana mua nkambua wetu Davide muntu webe, ne: “Bisamba bidi biditambisha, bitomboka bua tshinyi? Bena matunga badi bela bifufu bia tshianana bualu kaayi?" 
Acts4:26 Bakalenga ba matunga mbele mualu wa mvita, bamfumu mbapunge diyi dimpe, bumvuangane bua kubenga Maweja-Nangila ne Musungula wende." 
Acts4:27 Bushuwa, mu tshimenga emu, Erode ne Ponsiyo Pilate, bantu benyi ne bena Izrayele, mbumvuangane bua kubenga muntu webe wa tshijila Yezu uudi musungule." 
Acts4:28 Nenku mbakumbaje bionsu biuvua mudianze kujadika ku bukole buebe ne ku meji ebe ne: nebienzeke. 
Acts4:29 Kadi mpindiewu, Mfumu, umvua mudibu batukanyina. Ambuluisha bantu bebe, bua bamanyishe muaku webe ne dikima dionsu." 
Acts4:30 Olola tshianza tshiebe, jikija masama a babeedi, enza bishima ne malu a dikema, mu dina dia muntu webe wa tshijila Yezu." 
Acts4:31 Bamane kutendelela nanku, muaba uvuabu basangile kuzakala bikole. Bonsu kuwula ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kumanyisha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu ne dikima dionsu." 
Acts4:32 Bena ditaba bonsu bavua ne muoyi umue, kabidi ne lungenyi lumue. Muntu nansha umue kavua wamba ne: bintu ebi mbianyi meme. Kadi bonsu bavua basangisha bionsu kaba kamue." 
Acts4:33 Bapostolu bavua bajadika dibika dia Mfumu Yezu ne bukole bua bungi. Mvidi Mukulu uvua ubambuluisha bonsu bikole, ubela lupemba." 
Acts4:34 Kamuvua muena dikenga nansha umue munkatshi muabu. Bonsu bavua ne madimi nansha nzubu, bavua babipana, bangata mushinga wabi," 
Acts4:35 baufila kudi bapostolu. Pashishe bavua babanyangana lupetu luonsu, bilondeshile dikenga divua muntu yonsu nadi." 
Acts4:36 Ke muvua muena Levi mukuabu, mulelela mu tshidila tshia Shipre, dina diende Yozefe, uvua bapostolu binyike ne: Bamabase (mmomumue ne: musambianganyi)," 
Acts4:37 mupane budimi buende, muangate mushinga wabu, muufile kudi bapostolu." 
Acts5:1 Kavua muntu mukuabu, dina diende Ananiyase. Bavua bumvuangane ne mukajende Safira bua kupana budimi buabu." 
Acts5:2 Kadi Ananiyase kudilamina tshitupa tshia lupetu lua budimi, kuya ne tshikuabu kudi bapostolu. Mukajende uvua mumanye mu-vuaye muenze amu." 
Acts5:3 Ke Petro kumuebeja ne: — Ananiyase, mudi diabolu mubuele mu muoyi webe mmunyi? Udi mushime Mueyelu wa Tshijila, mudilamine tshitupa tshia mushinga wa budimi bua tshinyi?" 
Acts5:4 Bangabanga budimi ebu buvua buebe. Wewe mumane kubupana, lupetu luabu luvua amu luebe. Kadi udi mushindike bua kuenza bualu ebu bubi bua tshinyi? Kuena mudinge bantu to, udi mudinge Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts5:5 Ananiyase umvua miaku eyi, kuponaye panshi, kufila. Bowa kukuata bantu bonsu bavua bumvua bualu ebu." 
Acts5:6 Bansongalume kufika, kujingila tshitalu bilamba, kuya kutshijika." 
Acts5:7 Kunyima kua meba bu asatu, mukaji wa Ananiyase kufika, kubuela mu nzubu, kayi mumanye bivua bienzeke." 
Acts5:8 Ke Petro kumuebeja ne: — Safira, ngambila tumone, mushinga ewu ke unuvua bapane budimi buenu anyi? Ke Safira ne: — Eyowa, ke mushinga wonsu awu!" 
Acts5:9 Nanku Petro kumukonka ne: — Nudi bumvuangane bua kuteta Mueyelu wa Mfumu bua tshinyi? Ee, umvua, bantu bavua baye kujika bayebe bakadi bapingana. Badi ku tshiibi. Nebaye kukujika ne wewe kabidi." 
Acts5:10 Safira kudishinda diakamue ku makasa a Petro, kukula muoyi. Bansongalume kubuela, kumusangana mufue. Kumuambulabu, kuya kumujika pabuipi ne bayende." 
Acts5:11 Bowa bunene kukuata Tshisumbu tshijima tshia bena ditaba, kabidi ne bonsu bavua bumvua malu aa." 
Acts5:12 Bapostolu bavua benza bishima bia bungi ne malu a dikema munkatshi mua bantu. Bena ditaba bavua basangile pamue mu lutanda lua Shelomu. 
Acts5:13 Bantu bavua kabayi mu tshisumbu tshiabu, kabavua bafika pavuabu. Kadi bavua amu banyisha bena ditaba." 
Acts5:14 Bungi bua bantu balume ne bakaji bavua bitabe Mvidi Mukulu, babuele mu tshisumbu, buvua buenda buvula." 
Acts5:15 Bavua bafika ne babeedi mu misesu, babaladika pa malalu ne pa biata, bua nansha Petro upita, mundidimbi wende ubuikile bamue ba kudibu." 
Acts5:16 Bantu ba bungi ba mu misoku ya pabuipi ne Yerushalayime, bavua bafika ne babeedi, kabidi ne bantu bavua mikishi mibi mikuate. Bonsu bavua amu bapanda." 
Acts5:17 Diba adi mutuangaji munene ne bantu bonsu bavuaye nabu, ke bena tshisumbu tshia Basaduke, kufikila bapostolu munda. Kushindikabu mua kuenza bualu." 
Acts5:18 Ke kukuatabu bapostolu, kubela mu nzubu wa lukanu." 
Acts5:19 Kadi butuku, mutumibue wa Mfumu kunzulula biibi bia nzubu, kupatula bapostolu, ubambila ne:" 
Acts5:20 — Nuye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Numanyishemu bantu malu onsu adi atangila muoyi mupiamupia udi Yezu mubatuadile. 
Acts5:21 Bapostolu kuitaba. Dinda dionsu kubuelabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kutuadija kulongesha bantu. Pinapu mutuangaji munene ne bavuaye nabu, kusangishabu bakulu ba bena Yuda bonsu mu Tshipangu tshikulu. Pashishe kutumabu bantu bua baye kuangata bapostolu mu nzubu wa lukanu." 
Acts5:22 Kadi bantu aba bafika ku nzubu, ki mbasangane bapostolu to. Kupinganabu kuvua bena Tshipangu, babamanyisha ne:" 
Acts5:23 — Tudi basangane nzubu wa lukanu mukanga bimpe, basolayi pa miaba yabu ku biibi. Kadi tukangula nzubu, katuena basanganemu muntu nansha umue to." 
Acts5:24 Mulombodi wa balami ba nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bamfumu ba batuangaji bumvua nanku, kulubakanabu, kabayi mua kumvua muvua bapostolu bajimine." 
Acts5:25 Ke muntu mukuabu kufika, ubambila ne: — Bakalenga, bantu banutua bele mu lukanu abu, badi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, balongesha bantu." 
Acts5:26 Mulombodi wa balami ba nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu kuya ne bantu bende bua kukuata bapostolu. Kadi kabavua babakengesha to, bualu bavua batshina ne: bantu badi mua kutuasa mabue." 
Acts5:27 Bafika nabu, kubimanyikabu kumpala kua bena Tshipangu. Ke mutuangaji munene kutuadija kubalumbuluisha," 
Acts5:28 wamba ne: — Tuvua banukandike bikole, bua kanulongeshi bantu mu dina dia muntu awu. Kadi tshinudi benze mpindiewu ntshinyi? Nukadi batampakaje dilongesha diende mu Yerushalayime mujima. Nenku nudi basue kumbueja mu tshilumbu tshia lufu lua muntu ewu!" 
Acts5:29 Petro ne bapostolu kuandamuna ne: — Tudi ne bua kutumikila Mvidi Mukulu kumpala, kadi ki mbantu to!" 
Acts5:30 Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu mmubishe Yezu, unuvua nuenu bashipeshe, bapopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Acts5:31 Mvidi Mukulu mmumuzanjike ku dia bukole diende; mmumuteke Mfumu ne Mupandishi, bua bena Izrayele badilengeje. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu neabajimijile mibi yabu." 
Acts5:32 Tuetu ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, udi Mvidi Mukulu mupe badi bamuitaba, tudi bajadiki ba malu aa." 
Acts5:33 Tshiji tshikole kukuata bena Tshipangu, patuabu bumvue miaku ayi. Bavua bakeba kushipesha bapostolu." 
Acts5:34 Kadi mu Tshipangu muvua Muparushe mukuabu, dina diende Ngamaliyele, mulongeshi wa mikenji, uvua bantu bonsu banemeka. Kujukaye munkatshi mua bena Tshipangu, kulomba bua banji kupatula bapostolu katupa pambelu." 
Acts5:35 Ke kuambilaye bena Tshipangu ne: — Nuenu bena Izrayele, nuamanya tshinudi nukeba kuenzela bantu aba." 
Acts5:36 Matuku makese aa, Teyudase kupatuka, udiamba mudiye muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu bu nkama inayi kumuitaba. Kadi kumushipabu. Bonsu bavua bamuitaba, kutangalaka. Lumu lua tshisumbu tshiende kujika." 
Acts5:37 Munyima muende, pa tshikondu tshivuabu babadika bantu, Yudase, muena Ngalileya, kupatuka, kukoka bantu ba bungi mu tshisumbu tshiende. Kadi kumushipabu kabidi. Bonsu bavua bamuitaba, kutangalaka ndung!" 
Acts5:38 Nanku ndi nnuambila ne: kanubuelakanyi mu bilumbu bia bantu aba to. Balekelayi, baye! Bualu pikala mudimu wabu ne tshisumbu tshiabu bifuma kudi bantu, nebijike nkayabi!" 
Acts5:39 Kadi pikalabi bifuma bulelela kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kanuakubibutula nansha. Dimukayi: pamue apa nudi nuluisha Mvidi Mukulu! Bena Tshipangu bonsu kuanyisha lungenyi lua Ngamaliyele alu." 
Acts5:40 Ke kubikilabu bapostolu, kubatuutshishabu nkodi, kubakandika bua kabatedi kabidi dina dia Yezu. Nanku kubalekelabu." 
Acts5:41 Bapostolu kumuka mu Tshipangu, benda basanka, bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubamone ne: mbakane kumvua bipendu bua dina dia Yezu." 
Acts5:42 Ku dituku ku dituku, bavua amu balongesha, bamanyisha bantu Lumu lua Disanka lua Yezu Kristu, mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne ku nzubu ya bantu." 
Acts6:1 Matuku makese apita, bu muvua bungi bua balongi buvulangana, bena Yuda bavua bakula tshiena ngreke, kujana bena Yuda ba mu ditunga. Bavua bamba ne: bena ditunga badi balengulula bakamba betu, padibu bababanyina biakudia ku dituku ku dituku." 
Acts6:2 Nanku bapostolu dikumi ne babidi kusangisha balongi bonsu, kubambila ne: — Katuena mua kulekela kulongesha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kubuelakana ne malu a didia to." 
Acts6:3 Nenku bana betu, sungulayi munkatshi muenu bantu ba lumu luimpe muanda mutekete, badi buwule ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kabidi ne meji. Netubateke ku mudimu ewu." 
Acts6:4 Tuetu netutungunuke ne mudimu wetu wa kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, ne wa kulongesha muaku wende." 
Acts6:5 Bantu bonsu kuanyisha bivua bapostolu bambe. Kusungulabu Stefane, muntu wa ditaba divule, muwule kabidi ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, pamue ne Filipe, Prokore, Nikanore, Timona, Parmenase, ne Nikola, muena Antiyokiya, uvua mubuele mu tshisumbu tshia bena Yuda kukavua matuku." 
Acts6:6 Pashishe kubalejabu kudi bapostolu. Abu kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, kubatenteka bianza." 
Acts6:7 Muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu kutanta bikole. Balongi kuelangana mu Yerushalayime. Batuangaji ba bungi bavua batuadija kuitaba. 
Acts6:8 Mvidi Mukulu uvua muele Stefane lupemba. Kupetaye bukole bua kuenza bishima ne malu a dikema munkatshi mua bantu. 
Acts6:9 Bantu bakuabu ba mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda, uvuabu binyika ne: “Ngwa Bapikula, ” kudiwula Stefane. Bantu abu bavua bena Yuda ba mu musoku wa Sirene, ne ba mu tshimenga tshia Aleksandriya, kabidi ba mu buloba bua Silisiya ne Aziya. Kuelanganabu mpata ne Stefane." 
Acts6:10 Kadi kabavua ne bukole bua kumutuisha. Bualu Stefane uvua wakula ne meji, avuaye mupete kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts6:11 Kubuejilabu bantu, bua bamusonguele ne: “Tudi bamumvue usendeka Moshe, ne Mvidi Mukulu mene!”" 
Acts6:12 Ke pavuabu basonsola bakulu, ne balongeshi ba mikenji, ne bantu bakuabu. Kuyabu kudi Stefane, kumukuata, kuya nende ku Tshipangu tshikulu." 
Acts6:13 Kubilabu kabidi bantu bavua bamushiminyina malu, bamba ne: — Muntu ewu udi amu usendeka nzubu wetu wa tshijila, ne mikenji ya Moshe!" 
Acts6:14 Tudi bamumvue wamba ne: “Yezu wa mu Nazarete awu neupule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu; neakudimune kabidi bibidilu bivua Moshe mutushile!” 
Acts6:15 Bantu bonsu bavua basombe mu nzubu wa Tshipangu bavua batangile Stefane talalaa. Bavua bamone mpala wende umueneka bu wa mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
Acts7:1 Mutuangaji munene kukonka Stefane ne: — Bidi bantu aba bakusonguela nabi mbia bushuwa anyi? 
Acts7:2 Ke Stefane kuandamuna ne: — Batatu, bana betu, ntelejayi. Mvidi Mukulu wa butumbi kumuenekela nkambua wetu Abrahame, patshivuaye mu Mezopotamiya, kayi muanji kuya mu Arane." 
Acts7:3 Kumuambilaye ne: “Umbuka mu ditunga dienu ne mu diku dienu, uye mu ditunga dingakuleja.”" 
Acts7:4 Abrahame kumbuka mu ditunga dia bena Kesede, kuya kuasa mu Arane. Tatuende mumane kufua, Mvidi Mukulu kumufikisha mu ditunga dinudi basombe mpindiewu edi." 
Acts7:5 Mu ditunga edi Mvidi Mukulu kavua mupeshe Abrahame buloba nansha bukese, nansha muaba bunene bua dikasa to. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kumulaya amu bua kumupa ditunga. Ndelanganyi yende ivua mua kudipiana, yeye mumane kufila. Kadi tshikondu atshi Abrahame kavua muanji kulela." 
Acts7:6 Ke Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: “Ndelanganyi yebe neisombe mu ditunga dia bende. Nebashalemu mu bupika bidimu nkama inayi. Nebabakengeshemu. 
Acts7:7 Kadi nennyoke bantu bavua babakuate ku bupika. Pashishe nebumbuke mu ditunga adi, bua kuntendelela muaba ewu." 
Acts7:8 Nenku Mvidi Mukulu kutua ndondu ne Abrahame. Tshimanyinu tshia ndondu ewu ke ditekangana panshi. Abrahame kulela Izake, kumuteka panshi kunyima kua matuku muanda mukulu. Izake pende kuteka Yakobe panshi. Yakobe kuenza momumue ne bankambua betu dikumi ne babidi." 
Acts7:9 Bankambua kutekela Yozefe lubabu, kumupana bua ashale mupika mu Ejipitu. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua nende." 
Acts7:10 Kumusungidilaye ku makenga ende onsu. Kumuambuluishaye bua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, amunange, anyishe meji ende. Ke mukalenga awu kumuteka mulombodi wa ditunga dia Ejipitu, ne wa nzubu wende mujima wa bukalenga." 
Acts7:11 Tshiyole tshia nzala kubuela mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu ne dia Kenaane. Bantu kukenga bikole. Bankambua betu kabavua ne tshiakudia. 
Acts7:12 Yakobe umvua ne: mu Ejipitu mudi ntete ya kuenza bukula, kutumayemu bankambua betu musangu wa kumpala." 
Acts7:13 Musangu muibidi uvuabu baye mu Ejipitu, Yozefe kudimanyisha kudi bana babu. Nanku diku dia Yozefe kumanyikadi kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
Acts7:14 Ke Yozefe kubikidisha tatuende Yakobe ne diku diabu dijima; bantu bonsu basanga bavua makumi muanda mutekete ne batanu. 
Acts7:15 Nanku Yakobe kupueka mu Ejipitu. Ke muakafuilaye, ne bankambua betu kabidi." 
Acts7:16 Kuambulabu bitalu biabu, kuya nabi mu Shekeme, kubijikabu mu lukita luvua Abrahame musumbe, mufile mushinga kudi bana ba Emore, nkambua wa bena Shekeme." 
Acts7:17 Matuku avua Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kukumbaja bivuaye mulaye Abrahame, tshisamba tshietu kutanta, kuvulangana mu Ejipitu." 
Acts7:18 Ke mukalenga mupiamupia, uvua kayi mumanye Yozefe, kudia bukalenga bua bena Ejipitu." 
Acts7:19 Mukalenga awu kudinga bana betu, kukengesha bankambua, kubenzeja ku bukole bua bashiye bana babu batekete mu tshisuku, bafue." 
Acts7:20 Ke tshikondu tshivuabu balele Moshe, muana wa mpala muimpe, uvua mutokele Mvidi Mukulu ku muoyi. Kumudishabu ngondu isatu ku nzubu kua tatuende." 
Acts7:21 Pavuabu bamushiye pende mu tshisuku nanku, muana wa bakaji wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kumuangula, kumukolesha bu muanende mulela." 
Acts7:22 Ke muvuabu balongeshe Moshe malu onsu avua bena Ejipitu bamanye. Kuenzaye muntu uvua mumanye mua kuakula ne kulongolola malu.
