Acts7:23 Moshe ukumbaja bidimu makumi anayi, kujingaye kumonangana ne bana babu bena Izrayele." 
Acts7:24 Dimue dituku kumonaye muena Ejipitu ukengesha muena Izrayele. Kusungidilaye uvuabu bakengeshe. Bua kumusombuela, kushipaye muena Ejipitu." 
Acts7:25 Uvua wela meji ne: bana betu bena Izrayele nebumvue ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmunsungule bua kubapikula. Kadi bobu kabavua bitabe nanku to. 
Acts7:26 Butshia, Moshe kusangana bena Izrayele babidi baluangana. Kukebaye mua kubasunga, ubabela ne: “Bana betu, nudi bena muntu. Nudi nukengeshangana bua tshinyi?”" 
Acts7:27 Kadi uvua ukuma muinende, kusakila Moshe, umuamba ne: “Udi mukuteke mfumu ne mukoshi wa nsambu yetu nnganyi?" 
Acts7:28 Udi musue kunshipa, muuvua mushipe muena Ejipitu makelela anyi?”" 
Acts7:29 Moshe umvua miaku ayi, kunyemaye, kuya mu buloba bua Madiyane. Kulelayemu bana ba balume babidi." 
Acts7:30 Bidimu makumi anayi bimane kupita, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kumuenekela Moshe mu tshipuka tshitema kapia, mu tshipela tshivua pabuipi ne mukuna wa Sinayi." 
Acts7:31 Moshe kukatshila bivuaye mumone abi. Kusemenaye pabuipi bua kubibandila. Kumvuaye diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, diamba ne:" 
Acts7:32 “Meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua bebe, Mvidi Mukulu wa Abrahame, wa Izake ne wa Yakobe.” Moshe kuzakala ne bowa. Nanshaye kukimina kubanduluka kabidi." 
Acts7:33 Ke Maweja-Nangila kumuamba ne: “Ko-pola bisabata, bualu muaba uudi muimane ewu mbuloba bua tshijila." 
Acts7:34 Ndi mumone mudi bantu banyi bakenga mu Ejipitu. Ndi mumvue mudibu batua mikemu. Ke pandi mupueke bua kubasungidila. Mpindiewu, luaku! Ndi nkutuma ku Ejipitu. ”" 
Acts7:35 Bena Izrayele bavua babenga Moshe, bamuamba ne: “Udi mukuteke mfumu ne mukoshi wa nsambu yetu nnganyi?” Kadi yeye Moshe, ke muntu uvua Mvidi Mukulu mutume, bua alombole bantu bende, abapikule ku diambuluisha dia mutumibue wende, uvua mumumuenekele mu tshipuka." 
Acts7:36 Moshe kupatula bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu, kuenza bishima ne malu a dikema mu ditunga dia bena Ejipitu, mu mayi manene Makunze, ne mu tshipela, bidimu makumi anayi." 
Acts7:37 Moshe awu kabidi ke uvua muambile bena Izrayele ne: “Mvidi Mukulu neanutumine muambi bu meme, muntu wa mu tshisamba tshienu. ”" 
Acts7:38 Moshe ke uvua pamue ne bena Izrayele mu tshipela: uvua pankatshi pa bankambua betu ne mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua wakula nende pa mukuna wa Sinayi. Mvidi Mukulu kumumanyisha miaku idi mua kumpetesha muoyi. Moshe kuyifikisha kutudi." 
Acts7:39 Kadi bankambua betu bavua babenga kumutumikila. Bavua bamudiombola, bajinga kupingana mu Ejipitu." 
Acts7:40 Bavua bambila Arone ne: “Utuenzele nwidie idi mua kutulombola, bualu Moshe uvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu awu, katuena bamanye tshidi tshi-muenzekela.”" 
Acts7:41 Kufulabu lupingu lua muana wa ngombe, kululambulabu mulambu. Nanku kusankidilabu tshintu tshivuabu benze ne bianza biabu!" 
Acts7:42 Ke Mvidi Mukulu kubalengulula, kubalekela banemeke mabulunge a mulu. Ke mudibu bafunde mu mukanda wa bambi ne: “Bena Izrayele, bidimu makumi anayi binuvua mu tshipela, nuvua bandambule meme milambu ya nyama, nansha milambu mikuabu anyi?" 
Acts7:43 Nansha kakese! Kadi nuvua bambule ntente wa nwidie Moloke, ne tshimfuanyi tshia Refane, nwidie wenu wa mutotu. Ke mpingu inuvua benze bua kuyikukuila. Ke pandi nnufila mu bupika, dia muamua dia Babilone." 
Acts7:44 Mu tshipela, bankambua betu bavua ne ntente wa kusambakena, uvuabu benze mushindu uvua Mvidi Mukulu muambile Moshe, kabidi bilondeshile tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mumuleje." 
Acts7:45 Bankambua betu bakuabu bavua bapiane ntente ewu. Bavua bamuambula diba divua Yoshuwa, mulombodi wabu, mukuate nabu ditunga divua dia bisamba bia bende. Bisamba abi, Mvidi Mukulu uvua ubipata, pavua bena Izrayele benda babuela mu ditunga. Nanku ndelanganyi yonsu ya bena Izrayele kushala ne ntente awu, too ne ku tshikondu tshia Davide." 
Acts7:46 Davide kabidi uvua mutokele Mvidi Mukulu ku muoyi. Kulombaye bua amone mua kuashila Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe nzubu. 
Acts7:47 Kadi nzubu awu, bakamuasa amu kudi Shelomu." 
Acts7:48 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu wa mulu kena usomba mu nzubu miasa kudi bantu. Bambi bavua bajadika ne: 
Acts7:49 “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Diulu ke nkuasa wanyi, buloba ke tshidiatshilu tshia makasa anyi. Kadi nuenu nenungashile nzubu wa mushindu kaayi? mMuaba kaayi ungasomba meme?" 
Acts7:50 Diulu ne buloba, ki mmeme udi mubienze anyi? ”" 
Acts7:51 Nuenu bantu ba mutu mukole, ba muoyi mupape, kanuena nuitaba ku lubila lua Mvidi Mukulu! Nudi amu nutombokela Mueyelu wa Tshijila! Muvua bankambua benu benza, ke munudi nuenza amu!" 
Acts7:52 Kudi muambi uvua bankambua benu kabayi bakengeshe anyi? Bavua bashipe bantu bavua babamanyishe ne: Muena buakane neafike. Ke Yeye unudi bapangile, bashipe kabidi mpindiewu!" 
Acts7:53 Mvidi Mukulu kunutumina mikenji yende kudi batumibue bende. Kadi kanuena bayikumbaje to! 
Acts7:54 Bena Tshipangu bumvua miaku yonsu eyi, kufikabu munda bikole, kudia dinu, pavuabu batangile Stefane." 
Acts7:55 Kadi Stefane, muwule ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kutangila mulu, kumona butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu, ne Yezu muimane ku dia bukole dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts7:56 Kuambaye ne: — Telejayi: ndi mmona diulu diunzuluke. Ndi mmona Muana wa muntu, muimane ku dia bukole dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts7:57 Ke kuelabu mbila mikole, bajibika ne bianza ku matshi. Kudielabu kudiye bonsu tshiapamue." 
Acts7:58 Kumukokelabu ku mpenga kua tshimenga. Kumuasabu mabue bua kumushipa. Bajadiki ba bualu ebu, bavua badianjila kumuasa mabue, bavua bashiye bilamba biabu kudi nsongalume, diende Shawule." 
Acts7:59 Pavuabu bamuasa mabue apu, Stefane uvua utendelela Mvidi Mukulu, wamba ne: — Mfumu Yezu, angata muoyi wanyi!" 
Acts7:60 Pashishe kutuaye binu panshi, kuela lubila lukole ne: — Mfumu, kuvuluki bubi buabu ebu! Mumane kuamba nanku, kukulaye muoyi." 
Acts8:1 Shawule uvua muanyishe pende lufu lua Stefane alu. Dituku mene adi, kutuadijabu kukengesha bikole Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba tshivua mu Yerushalayime. Bena ditaba bonsu kutangalaka. Kuyabu mu buloba bua Yudeya ne bua Samariya. Bapostolu kudishadila." 
Acts8:2 Bantu balamatshi ba Mvidi Mukulu kujika Stefane. Kudilabu bikole bua lufu luende. 
Acts8:3 Shawule uvua wenza muende muonsu bua kubutula Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Uvua upita ku nzubu ku nzubu, ukuata balume, ukuata bakaji, ubela mu lukanu." 
Acts8:4 Bantu bavua batangalaka, bavua bendakana miaba yonsu, balongesha Lumu lua Disanka." 
Acts8:5 Filipe kuya mu tshimenga tshikulu tshia Samariya, wenda ulongesha bena mu tshimenga ne: Kristu wafiki!" 
Acts8:6 Bantu bavule bavua bateleja ne ntema malongesha a Filipe, bualu bavua bumvua lumu lua bishima bivuaye wenza, babimona kabidi ne abu abidi." 
Acts8:7 Bualu mikishi mibi ya bungi ivua mikuate bantu, ivua ipatuka, yela mbila mikole. Bena tuneke bavule ne batebuki bavua basanguluka." 
Acts8:8 Nanku bantu bavua basanka bikole mu tshimenga atshi. 
Acts8:9 Mu tshimenga amu muvua muntu, dina diende Simone. Ukavua musombemu bidimu bivule. Uvua muena dialu, ukemesha bena Samariya. Uvua udiamba ne: ndi muntu muneme." 
Acts8:10 Bantu bonsu, bana ne bakulumpe, bavua bamuteleja ne ntema, bamba ne: — Muntu ewu ke bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu. “Bukole bunene,” mutudi tuamba, ke budi munda muende." 
Acts8:11 Nanku bavua bamuanyisha, bualu uvua ubakemesha matuku mavule ne midimu yende ya dialu." 
Acts8:12 Kadi Filipe mumane kubakengesha Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ne bukole bua dina dia Yezu Kristu, kuitababu Lumu lua Disanka. Kubatuaye mu mayi, balume ne bakaji." 
Acts8:13 Simone kabidi kuitaba. Kumutuabu mu mayi. Kushalaye pabuipi ne Filipe. Uvua ukema bua bishima binene ne malu a dikema bivua bienzeka, yeye mumone." 
Acts8:14 Bapostolu bavua mu Yerushalayime, bumvua ne: bena mu Samariya mbitabe muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, kubatuminabu Petro ne Yowanane." 
Acts8:15 Bobu bamane kufika mu Samariya, kutendelelabu Mvidi Mukulu, bua bena ditaba bapete Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts8:16 Bualu Mueyelu wa Tshijila kauvua muanji kupuekela nansha muntu umue. Kadi bavua babatua amu mu mayi mu dina dia Mfumu Yezu. 
Acts8:17 Nenku Petro ne Yowanane kubatenteka bianza. Kupetabu Mueyelu wa Tshijila. 
Acts8:18 Kadi Simone umona ne: bena ditaba mbapete Mueyelu wa Tshijila, bualu bapostolu bavua babatenteka bianza, kutuadilaye Petro ne Yowanane makuta," 
Acts8:19 ubalomba ne: — Mpeshayi kabidi bukenji ebu, bua muntu yonsu undi ntentekela bianza, apete Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts8:20 Kadi Petro kumuandamuna ne: — Wewe ne makuta ebe, nubutuke! Bualu udi wela meji ne: dipa dia Mvidi Mukulu tudi mua kudisumba ku makuta!" 
Acts8:21 Wewe kuena mua kukuata netu mudimu nansha kakese, bualu muoyi webe kawena mululame kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts8:22 Lekela meji mabi auvua nawu. Utendelele Mfumu, bua, bu biobi mua kuenzeka, akufuile luse, bua meji mabi auvua muele." 
Acts8:23 Bualu ndi mumone muudi ne lubabu munda muebe tente, mujingila kudi bubi." 
Acts8:24 Ke Simone kuambila Petro ne Yowanane ne: — Ngakuilayi nuenu kudi Mfumu, bua kannyoki munudi nuamba amu." 
Acts8:25 Bapostolu babidi aba bamane kujadikila bantu muaku wa Mfumu, kabidi bamane kubumvuijawu, kupinganabu mu Yerushalayime. Mu njila bavua benda balongesha Lumu lua Disanka mu misoku ya bungi ya bena Samariya." 
Acts8:26 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Filipe ne: — Pueka kuinshi mu ditunga, ulonde njila wa kale wa mu tshipela, wa kumuka ku Yerushalayime, kufika ne ku Ngaza." 
Acts8:27 Filipe kuya diakamue. Mu njila kupetanganaye ne muntu. Uvua muntu mupakula, muntu munene mu bulongolodi bua ditunga dia bena Kushe, mulami wa mpetu yonsu ya mukalenga mukaji wabu. Uvua muye kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime." 
Acts8:28 Ukavua upingana kuabu, musombe mu ditempu diende, ubala mukanda wa muambi Yeshaya." 
Acts8:29 Ke Mueyelu wa Tshijila kuambila Filipe ne: — Ambuluja, upete ditempu diadia." 
Acts8:30 Filipe kusemena, wenda unyema. Kulu vuaye muena Kushe ubala mukanda wa muambi Yeshaya. Filipe kumukonka ne: — Udi mujingulule biudi ubala abi anyi?" 
Acts8:31 Muntu awu kumuandamuna ne: — Nenujingulule bishi, pandi tshiyi ne udi mua kubinjunguluila? Kulombaye Filipe bua abande mu ditempu, asombe pamue nende." 
Acts8:32 Miaku ya mu Mukanda wa tshijila ivuaye ubala ivua nenku: “Uvua bu mukoku udibu baya nawu ku tshishipelu, bu muana wa mukoku udi upuwa, padibu bamukulula boya. Kavua muakule muaku nansha umue." 
Acts8:33 Bavua bamupepeja, banyanga tshilumbu tshiende. Udi mua kuakula bua ndelanganyi yende nnganyi? Bualu bavua bamushipe pa buloba." 
Acts8:34 Muena Kushe awu kuebeja Filipe ne: — Ngambila tumone, udi muambi utela ewu nnganyi? Udi uditela anyi, udi utela muntu mukuabu?" 
Acts8:35 Ke Filipe kumujinguluila miaku ya mu Mukanda wa tshijila ivuaye ubala. Ke muvuaye mumulongeshe Lumu lua Disanka lua Yezu. 
Acts8:36 Baya too, kufikabu muaba uvua mayi. Muena Kushe kuambila Filipe ne: — Ke mayi aa. Tshidi tshikandika bua kuntuamu ntshinyi? [" 
Acts8:37 Filipe kumuandamuna ne: — Pawikala muitabe ne muoyi webe mujima, badi mua kukutua mu mayi. Ke muntu awu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi ngitaba ne: Yezu-Kristu ke Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu! ]" 
Acts8:38 Kuimanyikaye ditempu. Filipe ne muena Kushe kutuluka, kubuela bonsu babidi mu mayi. Ke Filipe kumutua mu mayi." 
Acts8:39 Bobu bamane kupatuka mu mayi, Mueyelu wa Tshijila kuambula Filipe. Muena Kushe nanshaye kumumona kabidi to. Kutungunukaye ne luendu, wenda usanka." 
Acts8:40 Filipe kudimona ne: nkadi mu Azote. Kutungunukaye ne luendu too ne ku tshimenga tshia Kezareya. Mu njila uvua wenda ulongesha Lumu lua Disanka mu bimenga bionsu. 
Acts9:1 Kadi Shawule utshivua amu ukanyina balongi ba Mfumu, ukeba kubashipa. Ke kuyaye kudi mutuangaji munene," 
Acts9:2 umulomba mikanda bua kuyaye kudileja nayi mu nzubu ya kutendelela ya bena Yuda ya mu tshimenga tshia Damase. Ne mikanda ayi, yeye musangane bantu, balume nansha bakaji, badi balonda Njila wa Mfumu, uvua mua kubakuata, kuya nabu ku Yerushalayime." 
Acts9:3 Patshivuaye mu njila uya mu Damase, ufika pabuipi ne tshimenga atshi, bu mpindiewu butoke kufuma mu diulu, kumunyungulukila." 
Acts9:4 Kuponaye panshi. Kumvuaye diyi dimuebeja ne: — Shawule, Shawule, udi unkengeshila tshinyi?" 
Acts9:5 Shawule kuebeja ne: — Mukalenga, wewe udi nganyi? Ke diyi kuandamuna ne: — Ndi Yezu uudi ukengesha." 
Acts9:6 Kadi, juka, buela mu tshimenga. Nebakuambilemu tshiudi ne bua kuenza." 
Acts9:7 Bantu bavua ne Shawule mu njila, kupampakana, bapuwa. Bavua bumvua diyi, kabayi bamona muntu." 
Acts9:8 Shawule kujuka panshi, utabala, kadi nanshaye kumona tshintu. Kumukuatabu ku tshianza, bua kumufikisha mu Damase." 
Acts9:9 Kushalaye matuku asatu, kayi mua kumona, kayi udia nansha unua kantu." 
Acts9:10 Mu Damase muvua mulongi mukuabu, dina diende Ananiyase. Mfumu kumumuenekela, kumubikila ne: — Ananiyase! Yeye kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, ke meme ewu!" 
Acts9:11 Mfumu kumuambila ne: — Juka, uye lukasa mu musesu Mululame. Ukonke ku nzubu kua Yudase. Kudi muntu wa mu Tarse, dina diende Shawule. Udi utendelela mpindiewu." 
Acts9:12 Mvua mumuleje muntu, dina ne Ananiyase, ubuela, umutenteka bianza, bua kumonaye tshiakabidi." 
Acts9:13 Ananiyase kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, bantu ba bungi bavua batela muntu awu, bangambila malu mabi onsu avuaye wenzela bantu bebe mu Yerushalayime." 
Acts9:14 mMufike munu ne bukenji bua kudi batuangaji banene, bua kukuata bonsu badi bitaba dina diebe." 
Acts9:15 Ke Mfumu kumuandamuna ne: — Uye. Bualu muntu awu ke tshiamu tshia mudimu tshindi musungule, bua kumanyishaye bisamba bikuabu, bakalenga ba matunga, ne bena Izrayele, dina dianyi." 
Acts9:16 Nemmuleje muonsu muakengaye bua dina dianyi. 
Acts9:17 Ke Ananiyase kuya. Kubuelaye mu nzubu awu, kutenteka Shawule bianza, umuamba ne: — Muanetu Shawule, Mfumu Yezu uvua mukumuenekele mu njila muudi utumina, mmuntume bua wewe kumona tshiakabidi, kuwula kabidi ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts9:18 Diakamue bintu kupatuka mu mesu a Shawule bu mamba a nyama. Yeye kutuadija kumona tshiakabidi. Kujukaye. Kumutuabu mu mayi. 
Acts9:19 Pashishe kudiaye, kupeta bukole. Shawule kushala amue matuku ne balongi ba mu Damase." 
Acts9:20 Diakamue kutuadijaye kulongesha mu nzubu ya kutendelela, ujadika ne: Yezu udi Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts9:21 Bonsu bavua bamuteleja bavua bakema, bamba ne: — Uvua ukengesha bikole bantu bavua bitaba dina dia Yezu mu Yerushalayime, ki mmuntu ewu anyi? Ki mmufike apa bua kukuata bantu, kubafila kudi bamfumu ba batuangaji anyi?" 
Acts9:22 Kadi Shawule uvua amu ulongesha ne bukole ku dituku ku dituku. Pavuaye uleja bena Yuda bavua basomba mu Damase ne miaku ya mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: Yezu udi Kristu, Musungidi wetu, kabavua bamona pa kumuandamuina." 
Acts9:23 Matuku makese apita, bena Yuda kumyuangana bua kumushipesha." 
Acts9:24 Kadi bantu bakuabu kumanyisha Shawule tshifufu tshiabu atshi. Baluishi bende kulama biibi bia tshimenga munya ne butuku, bua bamone mua kumushipesha." 
Acts9:25 Ke balongi bende kumuangata butuku, kumutuluila pambidi pa tshimana tshia tshimenga mu tshisaka." 
Acts9:26 Shawule ufika mu Yerushalayime, kuidikijaye mua kudisanga ne balongi. Kadi balongi bonsu bavua amu bamutshina. Kabavua bitabe ne: Shawule udi mulongi menemene to." 
Acts9:27 Ke Barnabase kumuangata, kumufikisha kudi bapostolu. Kubalondelaye muvua Shawule mumone Mfumu mu njila, kabidi mutua Mfumu muyukile nende. Kubumvuijaye kabidi ne: Shawule mutulongeshe mu Damase ne dikima mu dina dia Yezu." 
Acts9:28 Ke Shawule kutuadija kuendakana ne balongi miaba yonsu mu Yerushalayime, ulongesha ne dikima mu dina dia Mfumu." 
Acts9:29 Uvua uyukila kabidi ne bena Yuda bavua bakula tshiena ngreke, welangana nabu mpata. Kadi bantu abu bavua bakeba kumushipesha." 
Acts9:30 Balongi bamanya bualu abu, kufilabu Shawule mu Kezareya, bua afike mu Tarse." 
Acts9:31 Diba adi Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba tshivua ne ditalala mu ditunga dijima dia Yudeya, dia Ngalileya, ne dia Samariya. Tshivua tshienda tshikola. Bu muvua bena ditaba balamata Mfumu, batua batanta ne diambuluisha dia Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts9:32 Petro uvua wendakana mu ditunga dijima. Dituku dikuabu kuyaye kukumbula bena ditaba ba mu musoku wa Lida. 
Acts9:33 Mu musoku amu Petro kusangana muena tuneke, dina diende Eneyase. Ukatua mulale mu bulalu panshi bidimu muanda mukulu." 
Acts9:34 Petro kumuamba ne: — Eneyase, Yezu udi ujikija disama diebe! Juka, udilongoluele bulalu! Eneyase kujuka diakamue." 
Acts9:35 Bena mu Lida bonsu, ne bena mu mpata wa Sarone, bamumona wenda bimpe, kuitababu Mfumu." 
Acts9:36 Mu Yope muvua mukaji muena ditaba, dina diende Tabita (ke “Dorkase” mu buena ngreke, mmomumue ne “ngulungu.”) Uvua wenza malu mempe a bungi, wambuluisha kabidi bapele." 
Acts9:37 Matuku awu disama kumukuata, kufuaye. Kulongololabu tshitalu tshiende, kutshiteka mu nzubu mu tshibambalu tshia kulu." 
Acts9:38 Balongi ba mu Yope kumvua ne: Petro udi mu Lida. Bu muvua Lida kayi mutantshi mule ne Yope, kutumabu bantu babidi kudi Petro, bamusengelela ne: “Fika lukasa munu, kujingakanyi.”" 
Acts9:39 Petro kuya ne bantu babidi aba diakamue. Ufika, kumubandishabu ku tshibambalu tshia kulu. Bakamba bonsu kumujingila ne miadi, bamuleja bilamba bia pambidi ne binkutu bivua Dorkase mutele, patshivuaye ne muoyi." 
Acts9:40 Petro kupatula bantu bonsu mu nzubu, kutua binu, utendelela Mvidi Mukulu. Pashishe kutangilaye tshitalu, wamba ne: — Tabita, biika! Tabita utabala, kumonaye Petro. Kujukaye pa bulalu, kusomba." 
Acts9:41 Ke Petro kumukuata ku tshianza, umujula pa bulalu. Ke kubikilaye bena ditaba ne bakamba, ubaleja Tabita ne muoyi." 
Acts9:42 Bualu ebu kumanyika mu Yope mujima. Bantu ba bungi kuitaba Mfumu. 
Acts9:43 Petro kushala matuku mavule mu Yope kua Simone, muena mudimu wa biseba." 
Acts10:1 Mu Kezareya muvua muntu, dina diende Korneliyuse. Uvua mulombodi wa tshisumbu tshia basolayi ba bena Rome, tshivuabu binyika ne: “Ntshia bena Italiya.”" 
Acts10:2 Uvua muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, umutendelela pamue ne nzubu wende mujima. Uvua wambuluisha bakengi ba bena Yuda ne bintu bivule, utendelela Mvidi Mukulu misangu ne misangu." 
Acts10:3 Dituku kampanda, ku diba dia isatu wa dilolu, Mvidi Mukulu kumuleja malu. Kumonaye patoke mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, ubuela mu nzubu muende, umubikila ne: — Korneliyuse!" 
Acts10:4 Korneliyuse kutangila mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu ne bowa, kumuebeja ne: — Mukalenga, udi wamba bishi? Mutumibue kuandamuna ne: — Mvidi Mukulu udi ukuvuluka, ukuanyisha bua dimutendelela diebe, kabidi ne bua bintu biudi upesha bapele." 
Acts10:5 Nanku tuma bantu mu Yope, ubikidishe Simone, udi dina dikuabu ne Petro." 
Acts10:6 Udi usomba kua munga Simone, muena mudimu wa biseba, muena nzubu udi ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Acts10:7 Mutumibue mumane kumuka, ke Korneliyuse kubikila bena mudimu bende babidi, ne musolayi umue wa ku bavua bamulama, uvua pende muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts10:8 Kubalondelaye bionsu bivua bipita. Pashishe kubatumaye ku Yope. 
Acts10:9 Butshia, patshivuabu mu njila, basemena pabuipi ne Yope, Petro kubanda ku tshibambalu tshia kulu kua nzubu, diba dia munda munya, bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts10:10 Nzala kumusuma. Kujingaye kudia. Patshivuabu bamulongoluela biakudia, Mvidi Mukulu kumuleja malu." 
Acts10:11 Kumonaye diulu diunzuluka, kabidi tshintu bu tshilamba tshinene tshia pa mesa, batshikuata ku nsongu inayi, tshienda tshipueka panshi." 
Acts10:12 Munda muatshi muvua nyama ya mishindu yonsu: ya mikonu inayi, bilandadi, ne nyunyi ya kulu." 
Acts10:13 Petro kumvua diyi, dimuamba ne: — Petro, juka, ushipe, udie!" 
Acts10:14 Ke Petro kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, tshiena mua kuenza nanku to! Bualu katshia tshiena muanji kudia tshintu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mukandike, nansha tshia mikiya." 
Acts10:15 Kumvuaye tshiakabidi diyi, dimuandamuna ne: — Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu muambe ne: katshiena ne mikiya, wewe kuena mua kutshiamba ne: tshidi ne mikiya!" 
Acts10:16 Kuenzekabi nanku misangu isatu. Pashishe kupingajabu tshintu atshi mu diulu. 
Acts10:17 Petro uvua ulubakana, ukeba kujingulula malu avuabu bamuleje. Diba adi bantu bavua Korneliyuse mutume, bakavua bamane kuebeja, bua babaleje ku nzubu kua Simone. Mpindiewu bakavua mene ku tshiibi tshia nzubu." 
Acts10:18 Kubikilabu bena nzubu, babakonka ne: — Eku ke kudi Simone, udibu binyika kabidi Petro, usomba anyi?" 
Acts10:19 Petro utshivua amu ukeba kumvua malu avua Mvidi Mukulu mumuleje. Ke Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: — Kudi bantu basatu badi bakukeba. 
Acts10:20 Juka, tuluka panshi. Kuelakanyi to. Uye nabu. Meme ngudi mubatume." 
Acts10:21 Nanku Petro kutuluka, kuya kuvua bantu abu, kubambila ne: — Ke meme unudi nukeba ewu. Tshinudi bavuile ntshinyi?" 
Acts10:22 Bantu kuandamuna ne: — Korneliyuse, mulombodi wa tshisumbu tshia basolayi, mmututume. Udi muntu muimpe, muitabi wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bena Yuda bonsu badi bamuanyisha. Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu mmumulombe, bua akubikidishe kuende, umvue malu audi mua kumuambila." 
Acts10:23 Ke Petro kubabueja mu nzubu, kubapa ne pa kulala. Butshia, Petro kumuka nabu. Bamue bena ditaba ba mu Yope kuya nende." 
Acts10:24 Petro kufika mu Kezareya dituku divua dilonda. Korneliyuse uvua mumuindile, pamue ne bena diku diende, kabidi ne balunda bende ba pa muoyi, bavuaye mubikile." 
Acts10:25 Amu Petro ubuela mu nzubu, Korneliyuse kumuakidila, kudiela ku makasa ende, kumuela muoyi ne kanemu ka bungi." 
Acts10:26 Kadi Petro kumujula, kumuamba ne: — Juka, bualu ndi amu muntu mudi bantu bonsu." 
Acts10:27 Ke Petro ne Korneliyuse kubuela mu nzubu, benda bayukila. Petro kusangana bantu ba bungi badikungijamu." 
Acts10:28 Kubambilaye ne: — Nudi bamanye mudi meyi ne mikandu bietu bikandike bikole bua muena Yuda kumvuangana ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, nansha kubuela mu nzubu yabu. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmundeje mundi tshiyi mua kutangila muntu nansha umue ne: udi ne mikiya, nansha kubenga kubuela kuende." 
Acts10:29 Ke pandi mufike, paudi mumbikile, tshiyi mbenga. Nanku ndi nnuebeja ne: tshinudi bambikidile ntshinyi?" 
Acts10:30 Korneliyuse kuandamuna ne: — Kukadi matuku asatu, mvua ntendelela ku nzubu kuanyi, pa diba edi dia isatu wa dilolu. Meme kumona muntu umueneka diakamue kumpala kuanyi, muvuale tshilamba tshibalakana." 
Acts10:31 Kungambilaye ne: “Korneliyuse, Mvidi Mukulu mmumvue muudi umutendelela, kabidi mmuvuluke muudi wambuluisha bapele." 
Acts10:32 Nanku tuma bantu mu Yope, babikile Simone udi kabidi dina ne Petro. Udi usomba ku nzubu kua munga Simone, muena mudimu wa biseba, muena nzubu udi ku muelelu wa mayi manene.”" 
Acts10:33 Ke meme kukubikidisha diakamue. Wewe pebe udi muenze bimpe, bu muudi mufike. Mpindiewu tudi bonsu kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, bua kumvua tshidi Mfumu mukuambile bua kutumanyisha." 
Acts10:34 Ke Petro kuambila bantu ne: — Mpindiewu ndi njadika ne: Mvidi Mukulu kena ne kansungasunga. 
Acts10:35 Muntu nansha wa mu tshisamba kaayi, udi umutshina, wenza tshidiye musue, Mvidi Mukulu udi mumuanyishe." 
Acts10:36 Nudi bamanye Lumu lua Disanka ludi Mvidi Mukulu mumanyishe bena Izrayele. mMubambile ne: nenupete bupole kudi Yezu Kristu, Mfumu wa bantu bonsu." 
Acts10:37 Nudi bamanye bivua bienzeka bangabanga mu Ngalileya, pashishe mu Yudeya mujima, Yowanane mumane kulongesha bantu, mubatue mu mayi." 
Acts10:38 Nudi bamanye Yezu wa muNazarete, uvua Mvidi Mukulu musungule. Uvua mumuwuje ne Mueyelu wende wa Tshijila, kabidi ne bukole buende. Nanku Yezu kuendakana mu ditunga dijima, wenza bilenga, ujikija masama a bantu bonsu, bavuabu bakuate kudi mukishi mubi. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua nende." 
Acts10:39 Tuetu tudi bajadiki ba bionsu bivuaye muenze mu ditunga dijima dia bena Yuda, ne mu Yerushalayime. Bavua bamushipeshe, bamupopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Acts10:40 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumubishe ku lufu dituku disatu, muanyishe bua amuenekele bantu," 
Acts10:41 ki mbantu bonsu to, kadi amu tuetu bajadiki bavua Mvidi Mukulu mudianze kusungula. Mvidi Mukulu mumane kumubisha ku bafue, tuvua badie, banue nende." 
Acts10:42 Yezu kututumina diyi dia kulongesha bantu, kubajadikila ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumuteke bua kulumbuluisha badi ne muoyi, ne bafue." 
Acts10:43 Bambi bonsu badi bajadika bualu buende ne: muntu yonsu udi witaba Kristu, bukole bua dina diende nebumujimijile mibi yende." 
Acts10:44 Patshivua Petro wakula nanku, Mueyelu wa Tshijila kupuekela bantu bonsu bavua bamuteleja." 
Acts10:45 Bena ditaba ba mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda, bavua bafika ne Petro, kukema bikole pa kumona muvua Mvidi Mukulu mupuekeshile ne bantu ba mu bisamba bikuabu Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts10:46 Bualu bavua bumvua bantu abu bakula miakulu ivuabu kabayi bamanye, batumbisha bunene bua Mvidi Mukulu. Ke Petro kuamba ne:" 
Acts10:47 — Bu mudi bantu abu bamane kupeta Mueyelu wa Tshijila mumue netu, udi mua kukandika bua babatue mu mayi nnganyi?" 
Acts10:48 Kutumaye diyi bua babatue mu mayi mu dina dia Yezu Kristu. Bantu abu kulomba Petro bua ashaleku nabu amue matuku. 
Acts11:1 Bapostolu ne bena ditaba bavua mu Yudeya, kumvuabu lumu ne: bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mbitabe muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts11:2 Kadi diba divua Petro mupingane mu Yerushalayime, bena ditaba ba mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda kumujaana," 
Acts11:3 bamba ne: — Udi mubuele mu nzubu ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bavuabu kabayi bateke panshi, muebe kabidi nabu bua tshinyi?" 
Acts11:4 Ke Petro kubumvuija muvua bualu bujima, wamba ne:" 
Acts11:5 — Mvua mu tshimenga tshia Yope, ntendelela. Mvidi Mukulu kundeja malu. Meme kumona tshintu bu tshilamba tshinene tshia pa mesa, batshikuata ku nsongu inayi, tshienda tshipueka mu diulu, tshitangila kundi." 
Acts11:6 Meme kutangila bimpe munda muatshi, kumona nyama ya mikonu inayi, nyama ya lonji, bilandadi, ne nyunyi ya kulu." 
Acts11:7 Ke meme kumvua diyi, dingamba ne: “Petro, juka, ushipe, udie!”" 
Acts11:8 Meme kuandamuna ne: “Mfumu, tshiena mua kuenza nanku. Bualu katshia tshiena muanji kudia tshintu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mukandike, nansha tshia mikiya.”" 
Acts11:9 Meme kumvua tshiakabidi diyi difuma mu diulu ne: “Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu muambe ne: katshiena ne mikiya, wewe kuena mua kutshiamba ne: tshidi ne mikiya!”" 
Acts11:10 Kuenzekabi nanku misangu isatu. Pashishe kupingajabu bionsu mu diulu. 
Acts11:11 Amu diba adi, bantu basatu ba ku Kezareya bavuabu bantumine, kufika ku nzubu kumvua nsomba." 
Acts11:12 Mueyelu wa Tshijila kungambila bua kuya nabu, tshiyi ngelakana. Bana betu basambombu, bandi mufike nabu apa, kuya kumfila mu Kezareya. Tufika, tuetu kubuela bonsu mu nzubu mua Korneliyuse." 
Acts11:13 Yeye kutulondela muvaye mumone mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu mu nzubu muende, muimane kumpala kuende, umuamba ne: “Tuma bantu mu Yope, babikile Simone, udi dina dikuabu ne Petro." 
Acts11:14 Neukumanyishe malu adi mua kukusungidila, wewe ne nzubu webe mujima.”" 
Acts11:15 Ntuadija kulongesha, Mueyelu wa Tshijila kupuekela bantu abu, anu muvuawu mutupuekele petu mu ntuadijilu amu." 
Acts11:16 Meme kuvuluka muvua Mfumu muambe ne: “Yowanane uvua mutue bantu mu mayi. Kadi nuenu nebanutue munda mua Mueyelu wa Tshijila. 
Acts11:17 Mvidi Mukulu kubapa dipa dia momumue, divuaye mutupe, pamvua bitabe Mfumu Yezu Kristu. Nanku mumvua meme mua kujikila Mvidi Mukulu njila mbishi?" 
Acts11:18 Miaku ayi kubatalaja. Kutumbishabu Mvidi Mukulu, bamba ne: — Bushuwa, Mvidi Mukulu mmupe kabidi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bukole bua kudilengeja, bua bapete muoyi mulelela." 
Acts11:19 Bamane kushipa Stefane, kutuadijabu kukengesha bena ditaba. Ke bena ditaba kutangalaka. Bamue ba kudibu kuya too ne ku Fenisiya, ne ku Shipre, ne ku Antiyokiya. Kadi bavua balongesha amu bena Yuda nkayabu malu a Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts11:20 Kadi bamue bena ditaba bavua mu tshidila tshia Shipre, ne ba mu tshimenga tshia Sirene, bavua bafike kabidi mu Antiyokiya. Kutuadijabu kulongesha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, babamanyisha Lumu lua Disanka lua Mfumu Yezu." 
Acts11:21 Mfumu uvua ubambuluisha ne bukole buende. Bantu bavule kuitaba Mfumu, kudilengeja." 
Acts11:22 Balombodi ba Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Yerushalayime kumvua lumu alu. Kutumabu Barnabase mu Antiyokiya. 
Acts11:23 Ufika, kumonaye muvua Mvidi Mukulu mukumbaje mudimu ne dinanga munkatshi mua bena ditaba. Nanku kusankaye, ubabela bonsu bua bananukile ne muoyi mukole, bitabe Mfumu." 
Acts11:24 Barnabase uvua muntu muimpe, muwule ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kabidi ne ditaba. Ke muvua bantu bavua bitaba Mfumu bavulangana bikole." 
Acts11:25 Ke Barnabase kuya kukeba Shawule ku Tarse. 
Acts11:26 Umusangana kupinganaye nende ku Antiyokiya. Kushalabu koku tshidimu tshijima bonsu babidi mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba atshi. Bavua balongesha bantu bavule malu a ditaba. Mu Antiyokiya ke muaba uvua bena ditaba badianze kupetela dina dia bena Kristu. 
Acts11:27 Matuku awu bambi kumuka ku Yerushalayime, kufika ku Antiyokiya." 
Acts11:28 Umue wa kudibu, diende Agabuse, kujuka. Mueyelu wa Tshijila kumuambila, bua amanyishe bantu ne: “Matuku makese aa tshiyole tshia nzala tshinene netshienzeke pa buloba bujima.” (Tshiyole atshi kuenzeka tshikondu tshivua Klode mukalenga wa bakalenga )." 
Acts11:29 Bena ditaba kumvuangana bua muntu yonsu afile tshiende tshidiye natshi, bua kuambuluisha bena ditaba ba mu Yudeya." 
Acts11:30 Kuenzabu nanku. Kutumabu Barnabase ne Shawule ne bintu abi kudi bakulu ba mu Yudeya. 
Acts12:1 Tshikondu atshi mukalenga Erode kutuadija kukengesha bamue ba mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. 
Acts12:2 Kukoseshaye Yakobe, muanabu ne Yowanane, mutu." 
Acts12:3 Bu muvuaye mumone ne: bimvua ngenza ebi bidi bisankisha bena Yuda, kukuatshishaye kabidi ne Petro. (Bivua mu tshikondu tshia tshibilu tshia Mampa kaayi mela buanga. )" 
Acts12:4 Bamane kukuata Petro, Erode kumuelesha mu lukanu. Kutekaye basolayi bisumbu binayi, basolayi banayi banayi ku tshisumbu, bua bamulame, bakombolangana. Uvua musue kumulumbuluisha ku mesu a bantu, pajika tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Acts12:5 Pavua Petro mu lukanu, bena ditaba bavua batendelela Mvidi Mukulu muabu muonsu, bamuakuila." 
Acts12:6 Dia muladilu wa dituku divua Erode musue kumulumbuluisha ku mesu a bantu, Petro uvua mulale munkatshi mua basolayi babidi. Bavua bamusuike ne nkanu ibidi. Basolayi bakuabu bavua balama tshiibi tshia ku nzubu wa lukanu." 
Acts12:7 Bu mpindiewu, mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kumueneka. Butoke kukenka mu tshibambalu. Mutumibue kunyungisha Petro mu lubadi, kumubisha, umuamba ne: — Juka lukasa! Diba adi nkanu ivuabu bamusuike ku bianza kukoseka, kupona panshi." 
Acts12:8 Ke mutumibue kumuamba ne: — Vuala tshinkutu tshiebe, undonde." 
Acts12:9 Petro kupatuka, ulonda mutumibue. Kavua mumanye ne: bionsu bidi mutumibue wenza mbia bushuwa. Kadi uvua wela meji ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi undeja malu mu tshiota." 
Acts12:10 Kupitabu tshisumbu tshia kumpala tshia basolayi, pashishe tshibidi. Kufikabu ku tshiibi tshia biamu tshia nzubu wa lukanu bua kubuela mu tshimenga. Amu bafika, tshiibi kunzuluka nkayatshi. Bobu kupatuka, kubuelabu mu musesu mukuabu. Ke mutumibue diakamue kujimina Petro kuisu." 
Acts12:11 Petro kushisha kumanya bivua bimuenzekela, wamba ne: — Mpindiewu ndi mmona bidi bienzeka ebi ne: mbia bushuwa. Maweja-Nangila mmufume mutumibue wende. mMumpatule mu bianza bia Erode, ne mu bualu buonsu bubi buvua bena Yuda bakeba kungenzela." 
Acts12:12 Petro mumane kujingulula malu onsu avua mamuenzekele, kuyaye kua Mariya, mamuende wa Yowanane, udi dina dikuabu ne: Marke. Bantu bavule bavua basangilaku, batendelela." 
Acts12:12 Petro mumane kujingulula malu onsu avua mamuenzekele, kuyaye kua Mariya, mamuende wa Yowanane, udi dina dikuabu ne: Marke. Bantu bavule bavua basangilaku, batendelela." 
Acts12:13 Petro ukokola ku tshiibi tshia ku tshibuelelu, Roda, muena mudimu mukaji, kuya ku tshiibi bua kunzulula." 
Acts12:14 Kadi bu muvuaye mujingulule diyi dia Petro, kumvuaye disanka. Nanku pa mutu pa kukangula tshiibi, kupinganaye lubilu munda mua nzubu, bua kumanyisha bavuamu ne: Petro udi pambelu." 
Acts12:15 Bobu kumuamba ne: — Udi mupale anyi? Kadi yeye kushindika muende muonsu ne: — nYeye menemene! Ke bantu kuandamuna ne: — Nanku mmutumibue wende udi umulama. 
Acts12:16 Kadi Petro uvua amu ukokola. Ke bantu kunzulula tshiibi, kumona Petro! Bonsu kukema bikole, kukatshila." 
Acts12:17 Ke Petro kupuwisha bantu ne tshianza, kubalondela muvua Mfumu mumupatule mu nzubu wa lukanu. Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Numanyishe Yakobe, ne bana betu bakuabu, bionsu ebi. Pashishe kupatukaye, kuya muaba mukuabu." 
Acts12:18 Dinda mutoyi munene kujuka munkatshi mua basolayi. Bavua badikonka ne: Petro mmuye penyi? 
Acts12:19 Erode kubambila bua bamukebe. Kadi nanshabu kumusangana to. Ke Erode kutuma diyi, bua balumbuluishe basolayi balami abu, babashipe. Pashishe kumukaye mu Yudeya, bua kuya kusomba amue matuku mu Kezareya." 
Acts12:20 Erode uvua mufikile bena Tire ne bena Sidone munda bikole. Nanku bena bimenga ebi kudisangisha bua kuya kumyuangana nende. Kulombabu Blastuse, mulombodi wa bena mudimu ba mu nzubu wa mukalenga, bua abakuile. Pashishe kumanyishabu Erode muvuabu bajinga kumyuangana nende. Bualu matunga abu avua apeta biakudia mu ditunga dia mukalenga Erode." 
Acts12:21 Dituku divuabu bajadike bua kuyukila nende, Erode kuvuala biende bia bukalenga. Kuyaye kusomba mu nkuasa wende wa bumfumu, wenzela bantu aba diyuki dinene." 
Acts12:22 Diba adi, bantu kuela tunkunduluila, bamba ne: — Udi wakula nanku mMvidi Mukulu mene, ki mmuntu to!" 
Acts12:23 Diakamue mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kusamisha Erode, bualu uvua udikebela lumu luvua Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kupeta. Kubuelaye bikusu, kufua." 
Acts12:24 Kadi bantu bavua bitabe muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu kuvulanganabu bikole. 
Acts12:25 Barnabase ne Shawule bamane kukumbaja mudimu wabu mu Yerushalayime, kupinganabu mu Antiyokiya, pamue ne Yowanane, uvua dina dikuabu ne: Marke." 
Acts12:25 Barnabase ne Shawule bamane kukumbaja mudimu wabu mu Yerushalayime, kupinganabu mu Antiyokiya, pamue ne Yowanane, uvua dina dikuabu ne: Marke." 
Acts13:1 Mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Antiyokiya muvua bambi ne balongeshi. Mena abu adi nunku: Barnabase, Shimeyone (udibu binyika ne: Mufiike), Lusiyuse wa mu Sirene, Manayene (uvua mukole pamue ne Erode, mulombodi wa ditunga ), ne Shawule." 
Acts13:2 Dituku dikuabu, bobu bamane kujila biakudia amue matuku, pavuabu batendelela Mfumu, Mueyelu wa Tshijila kubambila ne: — Kanupeshi Barnabase ne Shawule mudimu mukuabu to. Baye amu kuenza mudimu undi mubabikidile." 
Acts13:3 Bena ditaba kujila kabidi biakudia matuku makuabu, kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu. Pashishe kutentekabu Barnabase ne Shawule bianza, kubatuma ku mudimu wabu awu." 
Acts13:4 Nanku Mueyelu wa Tshijila kutuma Barnabase ne Shawule ku mudimu. Kufikabu mu Selekiya. Muaba awu kubuelabu mu majuwa, batangile ku tshidila tshia Shipre." 
Acts13:5 Kufikabu mu Salamine. Kulongeshabu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu mu nzubu ya kutendelela ya bena Yuda. Yowanane Marke uvua nabu, ubambuluisha." 
Acts13:5 Kufikabu mu Salamine. Kulongeshabu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu mu nzubu ya kutendelela ya bena Yuda. Yowanane Marke uvua nabu, ubambuluisha." 
Acts13:6 Kukosololabu tshidila tshijima, too ne ku tshimenga tshia Pafose. Mu tshimenga atshi kusanganabu muena dialu, diende dina Bar-Yezu. Uvua muena Yuda, udiamba mudiye muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts13:7 Uvua usomba kua Serjiyuse Polu, muntu wa lungenyi, uvua ulombola tshidila atshi. Serjiyuse kubikidisha Barnabase ne Polu, bualu uvua ujinga kumvua muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts13:8 Kadi Elimase (ke mudibu bandamuna dina diende mu tshiena ngreke nanku), muena dialu awu, uvua uluisha Barnabase ne Polu, ukeba bua mulombodi kafiki ku ditaba." 
Acts13:9 Ke Shawule, udibu binyika kabidi ne: Polu, muwule ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kumujooja," 
Acts13:10 wamba ne: — Wewe udi muntu mubi, muena dishima, muana wa diabolu, mubengi wa malu mimpe onsu. Neulekele kujikila Mvidi Mukulu njila diba kaayi?" 
Acts13:11 Mpindiewu, teleja: Mfumu neakunyoke. Neushale mpofu, kuyi umona diba amue matuku. Diakamue mesu a Elimase kufofama. Ukadi udimona butuku, unyunguluka nseke yonsu, ukeba muntu udi mua kumulombola, mumukuate ku tshianza." 
Acts13:12 Mulombodi wa tshidila umona bivua bienzeka abi, kuitabaye. Bivuabu bamulongesha bualu bua Mfumu, bivua bimutua ku muoyi bikole." 
Acts13:13 Polu ne binende kubuela mu majuwa mu Pafose, kuya mu Perje wa mu Pamfiliya. Yowanane Marke kubashiya muaba awu, kupingana ku Yerushalayime." 
Acts13:13 Polu ne binende kubuela mu majuwa mu Pafose, kuya mu Perje wa mu Pamfiliya. Yowanane Marke kubashiya muaba awu, kupingana ku Yerushalayime." 
Acts13:14 Polu ne binende kutungunuka ne luendu, kumuka mu Perje, kufika mu Antiyokiya wa mu Pisidiya. Dituku dia Dikisha, kubuelabu mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda, kusombabu." 
Acts13:15 Bantu bamane kubala mukanda wa Mikenji ne wa Bambi, bamfumu ba nzubu wa kutendelela kubalomba ne: — Bana betu, panuikala ne imue miaku ya kukolesha nayi bantu ku muoyi, nudi mua kuakula mpindiewu." 
Acts13:16 Polu kujuka, kupuwisha bantu ne tshianza, wamba ne: — Nuenu bena Izrayele, nuenu kabidi bena bisamba bikuabu badi batendelela Mvidi Mukulu, ntelejayi:" 
Acts13:17 Mvidi Mukulu wa tshisamba etshi, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, mmusungule bankambua betu. Uvua muvu-dije tshisamba etshi, pavuatshi kua bende mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Pashishe kubapatulaye mu Ejipitu ku bukole buende." 
Acts13:18 Uvua mubalame bidimu bu makumi anayi mu tshipela. 
Acts13:19 Kubutulaye bisamba muanda mutekete mu buloba bua Kenaane. Kufilaye buloba buabi kudi bantu bende ne: mbuenu. 
Acts13:20 Bionsu abi bivua bienzeka munkatshi mua bidimu bu nkama inayi ne makumi atanu. Pashishe kupeshaye bankambua betu balombodi, too ne ku tshikondu tshia muambi Samuwele." 
Acts13:21 Kadi bankambua betu kulomba mukalenga kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Yeye kubapesha Shawule, muana wa Kishe, wa mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi anayi." 
Acts13:22 Mvidi Mukulu mumane kubenga Shawule, kutekaye Davide, bua ikale mukalenga wabu. Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Ndi musungule Davide, muana wa Ishayi, muntu wa pa muoyi wanyi. Neakumbaje bionsu bindi musue. ”" 
Acts13:23 Ku ndelanganyi ya Davide, ke kudi Mvidi Mukulu mupatuile bena Izrayele Yezu, Musungidi wabu, amu muvuaye mulaye." 
Acts13:24 Yezu kayi muanji kufika, Yowanane kubela bantu bonsu bua badilengeje, babatue mu mayi." 
Acts13:25 Pavua Yowanane mumane kufika ku matuku ende a ndekelu panu, uvua ukonka bantu ne: “Nudi nuela meji ne: meme ndi nganyi? Tshiena unudi bindile awu to! Kadi unudi batekemene udi ufika munyima muanyi. Tshiena muakanyine nansha mua kukopola bisabata bia ku makasa ende. ”" 
Acts13:26 Bana betu, nuenu ndelanganyi ya Abrahame, kabidi ne nuenu bena bisamba bikuabu bitabi ba Mvidi Mukulu, mbatutumine tuetu bonsu mukenji wa lupandu ewu." 
Acts13:27 Bualu bena mu Yerushalayime, ne bamfumu babu, kabavua bamanye ne: Yezu udi nganyi. Nanku kabavua bajingulule miaku ya bambi, ivuabu bababadila dituku dionsu dia Dikisha. Kadi bavua bakumbaje miaku eyi pa kufundila Yezu tshibawu tshia lufu." 
Acts13:28 Nansha muvuabu kabayi basangana bualu bua kunufundila lufu, kulombabu Pilate bua amushipeshe." 
Acts13:29 Bobu bamane kukumbaja bionsu bivua Mikanda ya tshijila midianjila kuamba bualu buende, kumutululabu ku mutshi mutshiamakane, kumuteka mu lukita." 
Acts13:30 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kumubisha ku bafue. 
Acts13:31 Matuku mavule Yezu kumuenekela bavuaye mufume nabu ku Ngalileya, muye nabu ku Yerushalayime. Bobu abu ke badi bajadikila bena Izrayele mpindiewu malu ende." 
Acts13:32 Tuetu kabidi tudi tunumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka elu ne: bivua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye bankambua betu," 
Acts13:33 ke bidiye mutukumbajile tuetu, ndelanganyi yabu, mpindiewu. Bualu mmubishe Yezu ku bafue, amu mudibu bafunde mu musambu muibidi ne: “Wewe ke Muananyi, biangatshile lelu, meme ndi Tatuebe.”" 
Acts13:34 Mvidi Mukulu uvua ne bua kubisha Yezu ku bafue, bua mubidi wende kaubodi. Ke bivuaye mudianze kumanyisha bantu ne: “Nennupe mapa a tshijila adi kaayi anyanguka, amvua mulaye Davide.”" 
Acts13:35 Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu ujadika kabidi muaba mukuabu ne: “Kuakulekela mukuitabi webe abolele mu lukita. 
Acts13:36 Mu tshikondu tshiende, Davide mmukumbaje bivua Mvidi Mukulu musue. Pashishe kufuaye. Kumujikabu pabuipi ne bankambua bende, kubolaye." 
Acts13:37 Kadi udi Mvidi Mukulu mubishe ku bafue, ki mmubole to." 
Acts13:38 Nenku, bana betu, tudi tunumanyisha se: Yezu ke udi ujimija mibi yenu." 
Acts13:39 Muntu yonsu udi umuitaba, neapete dijimija dia mibi yonsu, dinuvua kanuyi mua kupeta kudi mikenji ya Moshe." 
Acts13:40 Nanku dimukayi, bua bivua bambi bambe kabinuenzekedi. Bavua bambe ne:" 
Acts13:41 “Nuenu bena kapeja, tangilayi! Zakalayi ne bowa, nubutuke! Bualu mu tshikondu tshienu etshi nkadi pa kuenza tshishima, tshidi muntu mua kunulondela, kanuyi mua kuitaba. ”" 
Acts13:42 Polu ne Barnabase bapatuka mu nzubu wa kutendelela, bantu kubalomba bua bapingane Dituku dia dikisha didi kumpala, bua kuyukila kabidi nabu pa bualu ebu." 
Acts13:43 Ditendelela dimane kujika, bena Yuda bavule, ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bavua bamane kubuela mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba bena Yuda, kulondabu Polu ne Barnabase. Bobu abu bavua bayukila nabu, babakolesha ku muoyi, bua bashindame mu ditaba divuabu bapete kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts13:44 Dituku dia dikisha di vua kumpala, bena mu tshimenga bu bonsu kusangila bua ku-mvua muaku wa Mfumu." 
Acts13:45 Kadi bena Yuda bamona bungi bua bantu abu, kupetabu lubabu, babenga bivua Polu wamba, bamupenda kabidi." 
Acts13:46 Kadi Polu ne Barnabase bavua babambila patoke ne: — Nuenu ke batuvua ne bua kudianza kumanyisha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi bu munudi nuubenga, nudimona ne: katuena bualu ne muoyi wa kashidi, nanku tuetu tudi tuya kudi bantu badi kabayi bena Yuda." 
Acts13:47 Bualu Mfumu mmutuleje bua kuenza nunku, pavuaye wamba ne: “Ndi mukuteke butoke bua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bua ufikishe lupandu ne ku ntengu ya buloba. ”" 
Acts13:48 Bavua kabayi bena Yuda bumvua nanku, kusankabu bikole, bela Mfumu tuasakidila bua muaku wende. Bantu bonsu bavuabu basungula bua kupeta muoyi wa kashidi, kubuelabu mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
Acts13:49 Muaku wa Mfumu kutangalaka mu ditunga dijima. 
Acts13:50 Kadi bena Yuda kusonsola bakaji ba baneme bavua bamane kubuela mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba bena Yuda, ne balombodi ba tshimenga, bua bakebele Polu ne Barnabase mvita. Nanku kubipatabu mu ditunga diabu." 
Acts13:51 Polu ne Barnabase kubatutuila lupuishi lua ku makasa, kuya mu Ikoniyume." 
Acts13:52 Kadi bena ditaba ba mu Antiyokiya bavua ne disanka, buwule ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Acts14:1 Mu Ikoniyume Polu ne Barnabase kubuela kabidi mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda. Bu muvuabu balongesha bimpe, bena Yuda bavule, ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, kubuela mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
Acts14:2 Kadi bena Yuda bakuabu bavua babenga kuitaba, kusonsolabu bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bua baluishe bana betu abu." 
Acts14:3 Kadi Polu ne Barnabase bavua amu mua kushala matuku makumbane mu Ikoniyume. Bavua batekemena kudi Mfumu, balongesha bantu ne: Mfumu ke udi utupa bumfumu bua kuenza bishima ne malu a dikema. Ke mudiye unuleja ne: bitudi tunulongesha pa dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu utunanga nadi mbilelela." 
Acts14:4 Ke bena mu tshimenga kuabulukangana: bamue banyisha bena Yuda, bakuabu bitaba bapostolu." 
Acts14:5 Bena Yuda, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, ne bamfumu babu, bavua bajula tshimvundu, bakeba kukengesha Polu ne Barnabase, kubasa mabue, kubashipa." 
Acts14:6 Polu ne Barnabase bamanya bualu ebu, kunyemabu mu Listra ne mu Derbe, bimenga bia mu Likawoniya." 
Acts14:7 Kuine aku, ne mu misoku ya pa mpenga, kulongeshabu Lumu lua Disanka." 
Acts14:8 Mu Listra muvua muntu ne bulema ku makasa, biangatshile ku buana buende. Katshi bamutela, kavua wenda to." 
Acts14:9 Uvua muteleje muvua Polu wakula. Polu kumujooja, kumona ne: uvua ne ditaba, utekemena kuenda." 
Acts14:10 Kumuambilaye ne diyi dikole ne: — Juka, imana mululame bimpe. Muntu kutupika, kuimana, kuenda bimpe." 
Acts14:11 Bantu bavule bavua bamona tshivua Polu muenze atshi, kuelabu mbila mu tshiena Likawoniya, bamba ne: — Mvidie mmituluke muetu munu bu bantu!" 
Acts14:12 Bavua binyika Barnabase ne: Zewuse, Polu ne: Ermese, bualu Polu ke uvua wakula." 
Acts14:13 Mutuangaji wa mu nzubu wa nwidie Zewuse uvua ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga, kufikaye ku tshibuelelu atshi ne ngombe milume milengeja ne bilongu. Bualu yeye ne bantu bavua basue kuyilambula Barnabase ne Polu." 
Acts14:14 Kadi bapostolu babidi kumanya bualu abu. Kupandabu bilamba biabu, kuya lubilu kudi bantu, benda bela mbila ne:" 
Acts14:15 — Bana betu, tshinudi nuenza nunku ntshinyi? Tudi amu bantu bu nuenu. Tudi tunumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka, bua nulekele nwidie yonsu ya tshianana eyi, nupingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, udi mufuke diulu, buloba, mayi manene, ne bionsu bidimu." 
Acts14:16 Ku kale Mvidi Mukulu uvua muanyishe bua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu balonde wabu njila. 
Acts14:17 Kadi uvua udimanyisha matuku onsu mu malu mimpe avuaye wenza: udi unulokeshila mvula, ubobesha bikunyibua mu tshikondu tshiabi, unupa biakudia, usankisha mioyi yenu." 
Acts14:18 Kadi nansha bapostolu bakula nanku, bivua bikole bua kukandika bantu, bua kababalambudi milambu." 
Acts14:19 Bena Yuda ba mu Antiyokiya wa mu Pisidiya, ne ba mu Ikoniyume, kufika. Kuenzejabu bantu, bua batue ku tshiabu. Nanku bantu kuasa Polu mabue, kukeba kumushipa. Pashishe kumupulumunabu, kupatuka nende mu tshimenga, bamanye ne: mmufue." 
Acts14:20 Kadi bena ditaba kuvua kunyungulukila Polu. Yeye kujuka, kupingana nabu mu tshimenga. Butshia, Polu ne Barnabase kuya mu Derbe." 
Acts14:21 Polu ne Barnabase kulongesha Lumu lua Disanka mu tshimenga tshia Derbe. Kupetabu bena ditaba bavule muaba awu. Pashishe kupitshilabu mu Listra, ne mu Ikoniyume, bua kupingana mu Antiyokiya wa mu Pisidiya." 
Acts14:22 Bavua bakolesha balongi ku muoyi, bua bananukile mu ditaba, babambila ne: — Tudinebua kumvua makenga mavule, bua tuetu kubuela mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts14:23 Bavua bateka bakulu mu Tshisumbu tshionsu tshia bena ditaba. Bamane kujila biakudia, kutendelelabu Mvidi Mukulu amue matuku. Pashishe kubatekabu mu bianza bia Mfumu, uvuabu bitabe." 
Acts14:24 Pashishe bapostolu kupitshila mu ditunga dia Pisidiya, bua kufika mu ditunga dia Pamfiliya." 
Acts14:25 Kumanyishabu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Perje. Pashishe kuyabu mu Ataliya. 
Acts14:26 Bumuka mu Ataliya, kuyabu ne majuwa mu Antiyokiya. Ke muaba uvua bena ditaba badianze kubateka mu bianza bia Mvidi Mukulu, muena dinanga, bua mudimu uvuabu bakumbaje mpindiewu." 
Acts14:27 Bafika ku Antiyokiya, kusangishabu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Kubalondelabu bionsu bivua Mvidi Mukulu wenza nabu, ne muvuaye munzuluile bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabidi tshiibi, bua bafike ku ditaba." 
Acts14:28 Polu ne Barnabase kushala ne bena ditaba matuku mavule muaba awu. 
Acts15:1 Bamue bantu batumina ku Yudeya, kufikabu mu Antiyokiya. Bavua balongesha bena ditaba ne: “Kabayi banuteka panshi, mudi mikenji ya Moshe miambe, kanuena mua kupanda to. ”" 
Acts15:2 Kadi Polu ne Barnabase kubenga bivuabu balongesha abi, kuelangana nabu mpata bikole pa bualu abu. Ke bena ditaba kushindika ne: tutume Polu ne Barnabase, ne bantu bakuabu ba mu Antiyokiya, ku Yerushalayime, kudi bapostolu ne bakulu, bua batangile tshilumbu etshi." 
Acts15:3 Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba kubambuluisha bua kuya ku luendu alu. Bavua bapitshila mu Fenisiya ne mu Samariya, balondela bena matunga aa, muvua bantu ba mu bisamba bikuabu bitabe Mvidi Mukulu. Bualu abu buvua busankisha bena ditaba bonsu bikole." 
Acts15:4 Bamane kufika mu Yerushalayime, kubakidilabu kudi Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, bapostolu ne bakulu. Ke bobu kubalondela bionsu bivua Mvidi Mukulu muenze mu bianza biabu." 
Acts15:5 Kadi bantu bakuabu ba luseke lua Baparushe bakavua bamane kubuela mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, kujukabu, bamba ne: — Bateke bantu ba bisamba bikuabu panshi, babambile kabidi bua bakumbaje mikenji ya Moshe." 
Acts15:6 Ke bapostolu ne bakulu kusangila bua kutangila tshilumbu atshi. 
Acts15:7 Bamane kuelangana meji mukungulu mule, Petro kujuka, kubambila ne: — Bana betu, nudi bamanye ne: kukadi matuku a bungi, Mvidi Mukulu mmunsungule munkatshi muenu, bua meme kumanyisha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu Lumu lua Disanka, bua balumvue, bitabe Yezu." 
Acts15:8 Mvidi Mukulu udi mumanye mioyi ya bantu, mmuleje mudiye muanyishe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bualu mmubapeshe Mueyelu wa Tshijila mumue netu." 
Acts15:9 mMumushe kansungasunga konsu munkatshi muetu nabu. Ke padiye mujimije mibi yabu, bualu bavua bitaba." 
Acts15:10 Kadi nudi nuteta Mvidi Mukulu mpindiewu bua tshinyi? Nudi basue komekela bena ditaba bujitu buvua bankambua betu, nansha tuetu mene katuyi mua kuambula anyi?" 
Acts15:11 Kanuenji nanku! Bualu tudi tuitaba ne: amu Mfumu Yezu udi utusungidila mumue nabu, amu bua luse luende." 
Acts15:12 Bonsu bavua mu tshipangu kushala bapuwa. Bavua bateleja muvua Barnabase ne Polu babalondela malu a dikema ne bishima bionsu bivua Mvidi Mukulu muenzele bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mu bianza biabu. 
Acts15:13 Bajikija diakula, Yakobe kuamba pende ne: — Bana betu, ntelejayi!" 
Acts15:14 Simone mmutulondele muvua Mvidi Mukulu mene mudianze kukuata mudimu, bua kusungula munkatshi mua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bantu bende, badi banemeka dina diende." 
Acts15:15 Bionsu ebi bidi Kumyuangana ne miaku ya bambi. Bualu Mikanda ya tshijila idi ijadika ne: 
Acts15:16 “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: pajika malu onsu aa, nempingane, nengibakulule nzubu wa Davide uvua mupuke, nendongolole bivua binyanguke, nengimanyike nzubu, ashindame." 
Acts15:17 Nanku bantu bakuabu bonsu nebakebe Maweja-Nangila: ke bena bisamba bionsu bimvua mubikile, bua bishale bianyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila nenkumbaje," 
Acts15:18 bimvua mumane kumanyisha kale. ” 
Acts15:19 Ke muapostolu Yakobe kuamba kabidi ne: — Ndi ngela meji ne: ki mbimpe kutatshisha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu to. 
Acts15:20 Kadi tubafundile mukanda, tubambile ne: kanudi minyinyi ya nyama ivuabu balambule nwidie, bualu idi ne mikiya; nulekele buendenda; kanudi minyinyi ya nyama mishipa kayiyi mipatule mashi, nansha mashi mene." 
Acts15:21 Bualu kuonsu kuaka, bantu badi balongesha mikenji ya Moshe mu tshimenga tshionsu; kabidi badi babala mikenji eyi mu nzubu ya kutendelela matuku onsu a Dikisha." 
Acts15:22 Ke bapostolu, bakulu, pamue ne Tshisumbu tshijima tshia bena ditaba, kujadika bua kusungula bamue ba kudibu, bua babatume mu Antiyokiya, pamue ne Polu ne Barnabase. Kusungulabu bakulu babidi bavua ba lumu luimpe munkatshi mua bena ditaba: ke Yuda, udibu binyika kabidi Barsabase, ne Silase." 
Acts15:23 Kubapabu mukanda. Bavua bafundamu ne: “Tuetu bapostolu ne bakulu, bana benu, tudi tunuela muoyi, nuenu bena ditaba badi kabayi bena Yuda, badi basa mu Antiyokiya, mu Siriya, ne mu Silisiya." 
Acts15:24 Tudi bumvue ne: bantu bakuabu ba kuetu kunu mbavue kunulubakaja, kunupampakaja kabidi, ne malongesha abu. Kadi katuena babatume ne mukenji nansha." 
Acts15:25 Ke patudi bumvuangana ne muoyi umue bua kusungula bantu, kunutuminabu. Nebikale mu luendu amu, ne bana betu basuibue Barnabase ne Polu," 
Acts15:26 bavua badiele mu njiwu ya lufu, bua mudimu udibu bakuatshila Mfumu Yezu Kristu." 
Acts15:27 Tudi banutumine Yuda ne Silase, bua banuambile mukana bitudi banufundile." 
Acts15:28 Bualu Mueyelu wa Tshijila, ne tuetu mene, tudi bajadike ne: katuena mua kunuomekela bujitu nansha bumue bupite mikenji inudi ne bua kukumbaja eyi:" 
Acts15:29 kanudi minyinyi ya nyama ivuabu balambule nwidie. Kanudi mashi, nansha minyinyi ya nyama mishipa, kayiyi mipatule mashi. Nulekele buendenda. Nuenu bakumbaje mikenji eyi, nudi nuenza biakane. Kolayi!”" 
Acts15:30 Bantu bavuabu batume abu kuya mu Antiyokiya. Kukungijabu bena ditaba bonsu, kubapa mukanda." 
Acts15:31 Pavuabu bababadila mukanda awu, bonsu kusanka bua miaku eyi ivua ibakolesha ku muoyi." 
Acts15:32 Yuda ne Silase bavua bambi. Nanku kuakulabu mukungulu mule, bua kukolesha bana betu ku muoyi, kubasamba kabidi." 
Acts15:33 Kushalabu amue matuku mu Antiyokiya. Pashishe bana betu kulayangana nabu bimpe, bua bapingane kudi bavua babatume. [" 
Acts15:34 Kadi Silase uvua musue kushala muaba awu. ] 
Acts15:35 Polu ne Barnabase kushala matuku a bungi mu Antiyokiya. Pamue ne bantu bakuabu ba bungi bavua balongesha bena ditaba, babamanyisha muaku wa Mfumu." 
Acts15:36 Kupita matuku, Polu kuambila Barnabase ne: — Tubange luendu, tumonangane ne bena ditaba, mu bimenga bionsu bituvua bamanyishe muaku wa Mfumu, bua tumone mudibu." 
Acts15:37 Barnabase uvua musue kuya ne Yowanane, uvuabu binyika kabidi ne: Marke." 
Acts15:37 Barnabase uvua musue kuya ne Yowanane, uvuabu binyika kabidi ne: Marke." 
Acts15:38 Kadi Polu kavua musue kuya nende to. Bualu Yowanane Marke uvua mubashiye mu Pamfiliya, mubenge kuenza nabu mudimu." 
Acts15:38 Kadi Polu kavua musue kuya nende to. Bualu Yowanane Marke uvua mubashiye mu Pamfiliya, mubenge kuenza nabu mudimu." 
Acts15:39 Polu ne Barnabase kutandangana bikole, kushiyangana. Barnabase kuangata Marke, kubuela nende mu majuwa, kuya ku Shipre." 
Acts15:39 Polu ne Barnabase kutandangana bikole, kushiyangana. Barnabase kuangata Marke, kubuela nende mu majuwa, kuya ku Shipre." 
Acts15:40 Polu kusungula Silase. Bena ditaba bamane kubateka mu bianza bia Mvidi Mukulu, ke bobu kuya." 
Acts15:41 Polu kupita mu Siriya ne mu Silisiya, wenda ukolesha bantu ku muoyi mu Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba." 
Acts16:1 Polu kufika mu Derbe, pashishe mu Listra. Muine amu muvua muena ditaba, dina diende Timote. Mamuende uvua muena Yuda mumane kubuela mu Tshisumbu tshia bena Kristu. Tatuende uvua muena Ngreke." 
Acts16:2 Bena ditaba ba mu Listra, ne ba mu Ikoniyume, bavua banyishe Timote bikole." 
Acts16:3 Ke pavua Polu musue kuya nende. Nanku kuyaye kumuteka panshi, bualu bua bena Yuda bavua mu ditunga adi. Bualu bonsu bavua bamanye muvua tatuende wa Timote muena Ngreke." 
Acts16:4 Mu bimenga bivuabu bapitshila, bavua bamanyisha bena ditaba mikenji ivua bapostolu ne bakulu ba mu Yerushalayime bele. Bavua balomba kabidi bena ditaba, bua bayikumbaje bimpe." 
Acts16:5 Mu Bisumbu bionsu bantu bavua bakolesha ditaba diabu, bavulangana kabidi ku dituku ku dituku." 
Acts16:6 Mueyelu wa Tshijila uvua mukandike Polu, ne bavuaye nabu, bua kabalongeshi muaku mu buloba bua Aziya. Ke bobu kupitshila mu buloba bua Frijiya ne bua Ngalate." 
Acts16:7 Bafika ku mikalu ya Miziya, kukebabu kubuela mu buloba bua Bitiniya. Kadi Mueyelu wa Tshijila kubakandika." 
Acts16:8 Nanku kupitabu mu Miziya, kuya ku tshisabu tshia Trowase." 
Acts16:9 Butuku Mvidi Mukulu kuleja Polu malu. Kumonaye muntu wa bena Masedoniya muimane, umulomba ne: “Pitshila mu Masedoniya, uvue kutuambuluisha!”" 
Acts16:10 Polu mumane kumona malu aa, tuetu kudilongolola diakamue bua kuya mu Masedoniya. Bualu tuvua bashindike ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi mutubikile bua kulongesha bena mu ditunga adi Lumu lua Disanka." 
Acts16:11 Tubuela mu majuwa mu Trowase, tuetu kuya buludi ne mu tshidila tshia Samotrase. Butshia tuetu kufika mu Neyapolise." 
Acts16:12 Tumuka amu, tuetu kufika mu Filipe, tshimenga tshia tshitupa tshia kumpala tshia buloba bua Masedoniya, tshivua kabidi ku bumfumu bua bena Rome. Tuetu kushala mu tshimenga atshi amue matuku." 
Acts16:13 Dituku dia Dikisha, tuetu kupatuka mu tshimenga, kuya ku muelelu wa musulu, kutuvua bela meji ne: netupete muaba uvua bena Yuda batendelela. Tuetu kusomba muaba awu, kuyukilangana ne bakaji bavua basangilamu." 
Acts16:14 Umue wa kudibu, dina diende Lidiya, uvua mutumine ku tshimenga tshia Tiyatira. Uvua ngendamushinga wa bilamba bikunze bia mushinga mukole. Uvua mumane kulamata tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba bena Yuda. Uvua muteleje ne ntema bituvua tuamba. Mfumu kunzulula muoyi wende, bua umvue bimpe bivua Polu wakula." 
Acts16:15 Kumutuabu mu mayi, yeye ne nzubu wende mujima. Pashishe kutulombaye ne: — Panuikala bamone ne: ndi ngitaba Mfumu menemene, nuvua kusomba kuanyi. Kutusengelelaye bikole. Tuetu kushisha kuitaba." 
Acts16:16 Dituku dikuabu tuvua tuya muaba uvua bantu batendelela. Tuetu kusambakena ne mukaji mupika, muikale ne mukishi mubi uvua umusaka bua kuambila bantu malu adi ne bua kuenzeka. Uvua upetesha bamfumu bende lupetu lua bungi ku mudimu awu." 
Acts16:17 Kutulondaye tuetu ne Polu, wela mbila ne: — Bantu aba mbena mudimu wa Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu! Badi banumanyisha munudi mua kupanda!" 
Acts16:18 Mukaji awu uvua wenza nanku matuku a bungi. Pashishe kutondabi Polu. Ke kukudimukaye, wambila mukishi mubi awu ne: — Mu dina dia Yezu Kristu, ndi nkutumina diyi ne: patuka munda mua muntu awu! Diakamue mukishi kupatuka." 
Acts16:19 Kadi bamfumu ba mukaji awu bavua bamona ne: katuakupetela kabidi makuta kudi mukaji awu. Nanku kukuatabu Polu ne Silase, benda babapulumuna kumpala kua bamfumu ba tshimenga, muaba uvua bantu basangile." 
Acts16:20 Kubimanyikabu kumpala kua balombodi ba tshimenga ba bena Rome, babambila ne: — Bantu aba badi batombola bantu mu tshimenga tshietu. Badi bena Yuda!" 
Acts16:21 Badi balongesha bibidilu bidi mikenji yetu kukandika. Bu mutudi bena Rome, katuena mua kubianyisha, nansha kubienza." 
Acts16:22 Bantu bonsu bavua basangile muaba awu kuela Polu ne Silase bibingu. Ke balombodi kutuma diyi, bua babavule bilamba, babatuutshishe mikaba." 
Acts16:23 Bamane kubatuuta bikole, kubelabu mu nzubu wa lukanu. Kuambilabu mulami wa nzubu awu ne: ubalame bimpe." 
Acts16:24 Mulami umvua nanku, kubelaye mu kazubu ka munda mua nzubu menemene. Kubelaye kabidi tshikunyi ku makasa." 
Acts16:25 Munda nkulu, Polu ne Silase bavua batendelela, bimba misambu, batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu. Bena lukanu bakuabu bavua babateleja." 
Acts16:26 Diakamue tshikumina tshikole kuenzeka, kunyukisha nzubu wa lukanu too ne ku tshitaku tshiende. Bu mpindiewu, biibi bionsu bia nzubu wa lukanu kunzuluka, nkanu ya bena lukanu bonsu kufuka." 
Acts16:27 Mulami utabuluka ku tulu, kumonaye biibi bionsu bia nzubu wa lukanu buashi. Kutulaye muele wende bua kudishipa, bualu uvua muele meji ne: bena lukanu mbanyeme." 
Acts16:28 Kadi Polu kumuela diyi muende muonsu ne: — Kudienzedi bibi nansha! Tuetu bonsu tudi apa! 
Acts16:29 Ke mulami kulombesha muendu, kubuela lukasa mu kazubu kavua bena lukanu. Kudielaye ku makasa a Polu ne Silase, uzakala ne buowa." 
Acts16:30 Pashishe kubapatulaye mu kazubu aku, ubakonka ne: — Bakalenga, bua meme kupanda, ngenze tshinyi?" 
Acts16:31 Polu ne Silase kuandamuna ne: — Itaba Mfumu Yezu. Nanku neupande, wewe ne nzubu webe." 
Acts16:32 Nanku kubalongeshabu, yeye ne bonsu ba mu nzubu muende, muaku wa Mfumu." 
Acts16:33 Butuku abu, mulami kuya nabu, kusukula mputa yabu. Diakamue yeye ne bena diende bonsu, kubatuabu mu mayi." 
Acts16:34 Mulami kuya ne Polu ne Silase kuende, kubalambishila biakudia. Yeye ne bonsu ba mu nzubu muende bavua ne disanka divule, bualu mpindiewu bavua bitaba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts16:35 Butshia balombodi ba tshimenga ba bena Rome kutuma bantu, bua bambile mulami ne: — Lekela bantu abu, baye!" 
Acts16:36 Ke mulami kuvua kuambila Polu ne: — Balombodi ba tshimenga mbatume diyi, bua bamupatule mu lukanu. Nanku nudi mua kupatuka. Nuaya amu bimpe!" 
Acts16:37 Kadi Polu kuambila bantu bavua balombodi batume ne: — Tuetu bavua bapete bukenji bua bena Rome, mbatutuutshishe mikaba, bantu bonsu batangile, kabayi banji kutulumbuluisha. Bavua batuelesha kabidi mu lukanu. Kadi mpindiewu badi basue kutulekela mu musokoku anyi? Tuetu katuena basue nanku to! Balombodi bafike bobu nkayabu bua kutulekela!" 
Acts16:38 Bantu bavuabu batume, kuyabu kuambila balombodi ba tshimenga ba bena Rome miaku ayi. Balombodi bumvua ne: Polu ne Silase badi ne bukenji bua bena Rome, buowa kubakuata." 
Acts16:39 Kuvuabu kubalomba luse. Pashishe kubalekelabu, babasengelela bua bumuke mu tshimenga." 
Acts16:40 Polu ne Silase bamane kupatuka mu nzubu wa lukanu, kuyabu kua Lidiya. Kumonanganabu ne bena ditaba, kubakoleshabu ku muoyi, kulayanganabu nabu." 
Acts17:1 Polu ne Silase kupitshila mu Amfipolise, ne mu Apoloniya, kufika mu Tesalonike. Mu tshimenga atshi muvua nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda." 
Acts17:2 Bilondeshile tshibidilu tshiende, Polu kubuela mu nzubu wa kutendelela awu. Matuku a Dikisha a mbingu isatu milondangane, Polu ne bantu bavua mu nzubu awu, kuelanganabu meji pa Mikanda ya tshijila." 
Acts17:3 Polu kubumvuija mikanda ayi, ubaleja ne: bilondeshile Mikanda ya tshijila eyi, Kristu uvua ne bua kukenga, kufua, kubiika. Uvua ubambila kabidi ne: — Kristu, Musungidi wetu, ke Yezu undi nnumanyisha!" 
Acts17:4 Bamue bena Yuda kuitaba bivua Polu ne Silase bambe, kudisangisha nabu. Ke muvua kabidi bena Ngreke ba bungi, bavua bamane kubuela mu tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba bena Yuda, ne bakaji bavule bamanyike, benze." 
Acts17:5 Kadi bena Yuda bavua ne tshiiji tshipite. Kusangishabu bena buenzayi bavua bendakana mu misesu. Kujulabu nabu tshimvundu munkatshi mua bantu mu tshimenga tshijima. Kuyabu bonsu ku nzubu kua Yazone, bakeba Polu ne Silase, bua kuya kubalumbuisha kumpala kua bantu." 
Acts17:6 Bu muvuabu kabayi babasangane, kukuatabu Yazone ne bena ditaba bakuabu, kuyabu babapulumuna kumpala kua bamfumu ba tshimenga, bela mbila ne: — Bantu aba mbatombole bantu miaba yonsu. Mpindiewu bakadi muetu munu!" 
Acts17:7 Yazone mmubateke kuende! Buonsu buabu badi benza bidi bibengangana ne meyi ne mikandu bia mukalenga wa bakalenga, bualu badi bamba ne: kudi mukalenga mukuabu, diende Yezu!" 
Acts17:8 Miaku ayi kujula tshiiji tshia bantu bavule, kabidi ne tshia bamfumu ba tshimenga." 
Acts17:9 Ke Yazone ne bantu bavuaye nabu kufila makuta, bua banji kubalekela." 
Acts17:10 Bufuku buila, bena ditaba kutuma Polu ne Silase mu Bereya. Bafika muaba awu, kuyabu mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa bena Yuda." 
Acts17:11 Bena Bereya bavua bantu ba disanka, bapite bena Yuda ba mu tshimenga tshia Tesalonike. Bavua bateleja muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu ne ntema. Dituku dionsu bavua babala Mikanda ya tshijila, bua kujadika bivua Polu wamba ne bidi bilelela." 
Acts17:12 Bantu bavule ba kudibu kuitaba. Bena Ngreke bavule kabidi kuitaba. Munkatshi muabu muvua bakaji baneme ba bungi, kabidi ne bantu balume tshisumbu." 
Acts17:13 Kadi bena Yuda ba mu Tesalonike, bumvua ne: Polu udi ulongesha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Bereya kabidi, kufikabu mu tshimenga atshi, bua kusonsola bantu, bua bajule mutoyi." 
Acts17:14 Diakamue bena ditaba kutuma Polu ku muelelu wa mayi manene. Silase ne Timote kushala mu Bereya. 
Acts17:15 Bantu kuya kushindikija Polu too ne ku Atene. Pashishe kupinganabu ku Bereya. Kuambilabu Silase ne Timote ne: Polu udi wamba ne: bandonde lukasa. 
Acts17:16 Patshivua Polu mu Atene, muindile Silase ne Timote, uvua ne kanyinganyinga pa kumona mu tshimenga tshijima mpingu mivule ya kutendelela nayi nwidie." 
Acts17:17 Mu nzubu wabu wa kutendelela uvua uyukila ne bena Yuda, kabidi ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bavua bamane kubuela mu tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba bena Yuda. Kabidi dituku dionsu, muaba uvua bantu bonsu basangile, uvua uyukila ne bantu bakuabu bavua bafika muaba awu." 
Acts17:18 Bamue balongeshi ba mu tshisumbu tshia bena Epikure, ne ba mu tshisumbu tshia bena Stowa, bavua bayukila kabidi nende. Bamue bavua bamba ne: — Tshidi muena lubuakabuaka ewu musue kuamba ntshinyi? Kadi pavua bakuabu bumvua Polu ulongesha bantu malu a Yezu ne a dibiika, bavua bamba ne: — Bidi bimueneka ne: udi ulongesha malu a mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Acts17:19 Nanku kuyabu nende mu tshipangu tshia Areyopaje, bamuebeja ne: — Udi mua kutumvuija bualu bupiabupia ebu, buudi ulongesha anyi?" 
Acts17:20 Bualu udi utuambila malu adi atukemesha. Nanku tudi basue kumanya tshidi malu awu umvuija. 
Acts17:21 (Bualu bena Atene bonsu, ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bavua basomba mu tshimenga atshi, bavua basombela amu bua kuamba, nansha bua kuteleja malu mapiamapia!)" 
Acts17:22 Polu kuimana munkatshi mua bena tshipangu tshia Areyopaje, wamba ne: — Nuenu bena Atene, ndi mumone ne: nudi batendeledi menemene ba nwidie." 
Acts17:23 Bualu ndi muendakane mu tshimenga tshienu tshionsu. Meme kumona miaba yonsu inudi nutendelela. Meme kusangana tshilambuilu tshikuabu: bavua bafundapu ne: “Mvidie utudi katuyi bamanye. ” Kadi tshinudi nutendelela kanuyi bamanye, meme ndi musue kunumanyishatshi." 
Acts17:24 Mvidi Mukulu udi mufuke bukua panu ne bionsu bidipu, Yeye ke Mfumu wa diulu ne wa buloba. Kena usomba mu nzubu idi bantu bibaka." 
Acts17:25 Kena ukengela bua bantu bamuambuluishe ku tshintu nansha tshimue. Bualu Yeye ke udi upa bantu bonsu muoyi, mueyelu, ne bintu bikuabu bionsu." 
Acts17:26 Udi mufuke bisamba bionsu, bifumine kudi muntu umue, mubitangalaje pa buloba bujima. Kufundilaye tshisamba tshionsu tshikondu tshia kusomba panu, ne mikalu ya miaba idi tshi mua kuasa." 
Acts17:27 Uvua muenze nanku, bua bantu bikale bamukeba. Nanku padibu bidikija mua kupetangana nende, bumue nebamupete. Bushuwa Mvidi Mukulu udi pabuipi ne muntu yonsu," 
Acts17:28 bualu “Munda muende tudi ne muoyi, munda muende tudi mua kunyunga, tudi kabidi amu munda muende.” Ke mudi bamue ba ku bafundi benu bajadike ne: “Tudi bana bende kabidi. ”" 
Acts17:29 Patudi bana bende, katuena mua kuela meji ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi mufuanangane ne lupingu luenza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nansha ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha ne dibue, bintu bidi bantu batalame benza ku lungenyi luabu." 
Acts17:30 Mvidi Mukulu kena musue kuvuluka bikondu bivua bantu kabayi bamumanye. Kadi mpindiewu udi ubikila bantu bonsu miaba yonsu, ubalomba bua badilengeje." 
Acts17:31 Bualu mmufunde dituku didi muntu udiye musungule ne bua kulumbuluisha bantu bonsu, kukosa nsambu yabu pa yoyi. Ke bualu budiye mujadikile bantu bonsu pa kubisha muntu ewu ku bafue!" 
Acts17:32 Bumvua amu Polu wakula bua dibiika dia bafue, bamue bantu kumuseka. Kadi bakuabu kuamba ne: — Netuvue kukuteleja musangu mukuabu, bua upite kutuambila bualu ebu!" 
Acts17:33 Ke Polu kulayangana nabu, kuya." 
Acts17:34 Bamue kumulonda, kuitaba Mvidi Mukulu. Kudibu kuvua Diyonisiyuse, muena mu tshipangu tshia Areyopaje, kabidi ne mukaji, diende Damarise, ne bantu bakuabu kabidi." 
Acts18:1 Pashishe Polu kumuka mu Atene, kuya mu Korente." 
Acts18:2 Kusanganaye mu Korente muena Yuda, dina diende Akuila, wa mu buloba bua Pontuse. Utshivua ufumina ku Italiya ne mukajende Priskila. Bualu mukalenga wa bakalenga Klode uvua mutume diyi, bua bena Yuda bonsu bumuke mu Rome. Ke Polu kuya kumonangana ne Akuila ne mukajende." 
Acts18:3 Bu muvuabu bamanye mudimu wa momumue (bavua benji ba nzubu ya ntenta), Polu kuya kusomba kuabu, bua bakuate mudimu pamue." 
Acts18:4 Dituku dionsu dia Dikisha, Polu uvua ulongesha mu nzubu wa kutendelela, usonsola bena Yuda ne bena Ngreke, bua bitabe Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts18:5 Silase ne Timote kumuka ku Masedoniya, kuya ku Korente. Bobu bamane kufika, ke Polu kudifila muende muonsu ku mudimu wa kulongesha muaku. Uvua ujadikila bena Yuda ne: Yezu udi Kristu." 
Acts18:6 Kadi bena Yuda bavua bamuluisha, bamupenda. Nanku Polu kubanyukuila bilamba biende, ubamba ne: — Panuikala bajimine, nuambe ne: tudi badijimije nkayetu. Meme tshiena ne bualu. Bituadija ku lelu, nenye kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Acts18:7 Umuka ku nzubu wa kutendelela, kuyaye kua Titiyuse Yustuse, muena Ngreke uvua mubuele mu tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba bena Yuda. Nzubu wa muntu awu uvua mutumba ne nzubu wa kutendelela." 
Acts18:8 Krispuse, mulombodi wa nzubu wa kutendelela, ne bena nzubu wende bonsu, kuitaba Mfumu. Bena Korente ba bungi bumvua bivua Polu ulongesha, kuitababu. Kubatuabu mu mayi." 
Acts18:9 Butuku kampanda, Mfumu kuleja Polu malu, umuambila ne: — Kutshinyi. Kadi akula amu kuakula. Kupuwu to." 
Acts18:10 Bualu ndi nebe. Muntu kakukulenga bua kukuenzela bibi to. Bualu mu tshimenga etshi bantu ba bungi mbanyi! 
Acts18:11 Polu kushala mu Korente tshidimu tshijima ne ngondu isambombu, ulongesha bantu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts18:12 Pavua Ngaliyone muena Rome mupete muanzu wa mulombodi wa buloba bua Akaya, bena Yuda kumyuangana bua kuluisha Polu. Kumukuatabu, kuya nende ku tshilumbuluilu," 
Acts18:13 bamba ne: — Muntu ewu udi witabijija bantu, bua batendelele Mvidi Mukulu mushindu udi mikenji mikandike." 
Acts18:14 Pavua Polu ukeba kuakula, Ngaliyone kuambila bena Yuda ne: — Bena Yuda, nuenu bamvuile ne bualu bubi buenza kudi muntu ewu, nansha ne tshilema tshinene, mvua mua kunuteleja." 
Acts18:15 Kadi bu munudi amu nuelangana mpata bua miaku, bua mena, ne bua mikenji yenu, abi bidi binutangila amu nuenu nkayenu. Tshiena musue kukosa bilumbu bia nenku to!" 
Acts18:16 Ke kubipataye mu tshilumbuluilu. 
Acts18:17 Nenku bonsu kukuata Sostene, mulombodi wa nzubu wa kutendelela, kumutuutshila kumpala kua tshilumbuluilu aku. Kadi Ngaliyone kavua muelemu diyi to." 
Acts18:18 Polu kushala kabidi matuku makumbane mu Korente. Pashishe kulayanganaye ne bena ditaba. Yeye, Priskila ne Akuila, kubuela mu majuwa, kuya ku Siriya. Bangabanga ne kubuela mu majuwa mu Kenkreya, Polu uvua mukunguishe mu mutu, bualu uvua muenze dilaya." 
Acts18:19 Kufikabu mu Efeze. Polu kubuela mu nzubu wa kutendelela, kuyukidilangana ne bena Yuda. Bena Yuda kulomba Polu, bua ashale nabu matuku makuabu. Kadi Polu kavua musue to. Uvua ulayangana nabu, wamba ne: — Nempingane kuenu kunu, pikala Mvidi Mukulu musue. Kushiyaye Priskila ne Akuila muaba awu. Kumukaye mu Efeze ne majuwa." 
Acts18:20  
Acts18:21  
Acts18:22 Utuluka mu Kezareya, kuyaye mu Yerushalayime, bua kumonangana ne Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Pashishe kuyaye ku Antiyokiya." 
Acts18:23 Usombamu amue matuku, kumukaye tshiakabidi. Kupitshilaye mu buloba bua Ngalate ne bua Frijiya, wenda ukolesha balongi bonsu mu ditaba." 
Acts18:24 Muena Yuda mukuabu, mulelela mu Aleksandriya, dina diende Apolose, kufikaye mu Efeze. Uvua ngamba malu, mumanye Mikanda ya tshijila bilenga." 
Acts18:25 Bavua bamulongesha njila wa Mfumu. Uvua ulongesha pende ne disuminyina, umanyisha bantu malu a Yezu bijalame, kayi utupakana. Kadi uvua mumanye amu muvuabu batua bantu mu mayi mushindu uvua Yowanane muenze." 
Acts18:26 Kulongeshaye ne dikima mu nzubu wa kutendelela. Pavua Priskila ne Akuila bamumvua ulongesha, kuyabu nende kuabu. Kumumvuijabu malu a njila wa Mvidi Mukulu avuaye kayi muanji kumanya." 
Acts18:27 Pashishe Apolose uvua musue kuya mu Akaya. Bena ditaba kumukolesha ku muoyi bua ayemu. Kufundilabu bena ditaba ba mu buloba abu, bua bamuakidile bimpe. Yeye mumane kufika mu Akaya, kuambuluishaye bikole bantu bakavua bamane kuitaba ku luse lua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts18:28 Bualu uvua ufuisha bena Yuda bikole ku mesu a bantu bonsu, ubumvuija Mikanda ya tshijila, ubaleja nayi ne: Yezu udi Kristu, Musungidi wetu." 
Acts19:1 Patshivua Apolose mu Korente, Polu kupitshila mu matunga a munkatshi mua Aziya mukese, kufika mu Efeze. Kusanganayemu bamue bena ditaba." 
Acts19:2 Kubakonkaye ne: — Nuvua bapete Mueyelu wa Tshijila, diba dinuvua batuadije kuitaba Yezu anyi? Kumuandamunabu ne: — Katuena nansha banji kumvua batela ne: Mueyelu wa Tshijila udiku to!" 
Acts19:3 Ke Polu kubebeja kabidi ne: — Bavua banutua mu mayi mushindu kaayi? Ke bobu kuandamuna ne: — Bavua batutua mu mayi, muvua Yowanane utua bantu amu." 
Acts19:4 Polu kubambila ne: — Yowanane uvua utua bantu bavua banyisha bua kudilengeja. Kadi uvua wambila kabidi bena Izrayele, bua bitabe muntu uvua ne bua kufika panyima pende, mmomumue ne: Yezu." 
Acts19:5 Bantu bumvua miaku ayi, kuanyishabu bua babatue mu mayi mu dina dia Mfumu Yezu." 
Acts19:6 Polu kubatenteka bianza. Mueyelu wa Tshijila kubatulukila. Kutuadijabu kuakula miakulu ivuabu kabayi bamanye, bambila bantu malu avua Mvidi Mukulu mubamanyishe." 
Acts19:7 Bantu abu bavua bu dikumi ne babidi. 
Acts19:8 Polu kuya mu nzubu wa kutendelela. Ngondu isatu uvua uyukila ne dikima ne bena Yuda. Uvua ubalongesha malu adi atangila Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu, ukeba kuitabijija." 
Acts19:9 Kadi bamue ba kudibu bavua ne muoyi mupape, babenga kuitaba, bakula ne kapeja bua njila wa Mfumu, bantu bonsu bumvue. Nanku Polu kubashiya, kupatuka mu nzubu amu pamue ne bena ditaba. Kutuadija dituku adi, uvua ubalongesha mu tshilongelu tshia Tiranuse ku dituku ku dituku." 
Acts19:10 Kuenzaye nanku bidimu bibidi. Nenku bena Yuda ne bena Ngreke bonsu bavua mu buloba bua Aziya abu kumvuabu muaku wa Mfumu. 
Acts19:11 Mvidi Mukulu uvua wenzeja Polu bishima bia dikema. 
Acts19:12 Bavua bateka pambidi pa babeedi bilamba, nansha tulamba, bivua bilenga mubidi wa Polu. Babeedi kumvua amu bilenga, mikishi mibi kumuka kudibu." 
Acts19:13 Bamue bena Yuda, bavua baya miaba yonsu bua kuipata mikishi mibi munda mua babeedi, bavua bidikija mua kutela dina dia Mfumu Yezu bua kuyipata. Bavua bambila mikishi mibi ne: — Mu dina dia Yezu, udi Polu ulongesha, ndi nnutumina diyi: patukayi!" 
Acts19:14 (Bavua benza nanku kudi bana ba balume muanda mutekete ba Skeva, mutuangaji munene wa bena Yuda.)" 
Acts19:15 Kadi mukishi mubi kubandamuna ne: — Ndi mumanye Yezu, mumanye kabidi ne Polu. Kadi nuenu nudi banganyi?" 
Acts19:16 Ke muntu uvua ne mukishi mubi awu, kudiela kudibu, kubapita bonsu bukole. Kubakengeshaye bikole bipite. Bobu kunyema ku nzubu kua muntu awu, kabayi bilamba, mputa mubidi mujima." 
Acts19:17 Bena mu Efeze bonsu, bena Yuda ne bena Ngreke, kumanyabu bualu abu. Kukuatshikabu buowa, kutumbisha dina dia Mfumu Yezu." 
Acts19:18 Bantu ba bungi ba ku bavua bitabe, kutondabu patoke malu mabi avuabu benze." 
Acts19:19 Bantu bavule bavua benza malu a majimbu, kufika ne mikanda yabu, kuyosha, bantu bonsu bamone. Bavua batshinka mushinga wa mikanda ayi, bapeta nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole binunu makumi atanu." 
Acts19:20 Ke muvua muaku wa Mfumu wenda utanta, uleja bukole buawu." 
Acts19:21 Malu onsu aa mamane kupita, Polu kupangadika mua kupitshila mu Masedoniya ne mu Akaya, bua kuya mu Yerushalayime, wamba ne: — Pangafika ku Yerushalayime, nenye kabidi ne ku Rome." 
Acts19:22 Kutumaye bamuambuluishi bende babidi, Timote ne Eraste, mu Masedoniya. Kadi yeye uvua muanji kushala kabidi amue matuku mu Aziya." 
Acts19:23 Ke tshikondu tshivua tshimvundu tshinene tshijuka mu Efeze bualu bua njila wa muoyi wa Mfumu. 
Acts19:24 Muntu kampanda, dina diende Demetriyuse, nsenda wa biamu, uvua wenza tuzubu tua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, utentula bimfuanyi bia nzubu wa kutendelela wa nwidie mukaji Artemise. Ke muvuaye upetesha bena mudimu bende makuta a bungi." 
Acts19:25 Demetriyuse kusangisha bansenda bende aba, ne bantu bakuabu bavua benza mudimu wa momumue. Kubambilaye ne: — Bakalenga, nudi bamanye ne: buetu bubanji budi amu ku mudimu wetu ewu." 
Acts19:26 Kadi nudi bamone, badiumvuile kabidi tshidi muntu ewu Polu wenza. Udi ujadika ne: nwidie idi bantu benza ki mmvidie menemene to. Ukadi muitabijije bantu ba bungi, ki amu munu mu Efeze, kadi ne miaba kana yonsu ya mu Aziya." 
Acts19:27 Ebi bidi bifuana kunyanga mudimu wetu, bifuana kabidi kumuenesha nzubu wa nwidie mukaji munene Artemise bu tshintu tshia tshianana. Nanku nwidie mukaji ewu, udi bantu bonsu ba mu Aziya ne ba mu buloba bujima bakukuila, kakuikala kabidi ne lumu to!" 
Acts19:28 Bantu bumvua miaku ayi, kupetabu tshiiji tshikole, bela bibingu, bamba ne: — Artemise wa bena Efeze ke udi munene!" 
Acts19:29 Tshimyundu kutampakana mu tshimenga tshijima. Bantu kukuata Ngayuse ne Aristarke, bena Masedoniya babidi bavua mu luendu ne Polu. Kubapulumunabu, kuya nabu mu lupangu lua manaya, muvua bantu bonsu bafuilakana bua kubuela." 
Acts19:30 Polu uvua musue kumueneka kudi bantu. Kadi bena ditaba kumukandika. 
Acts19:31 Bamue balombodi ba mbulamatadi ba mu Aziya, bavua balunda bende, kumutuminabu bantu, bamuambila bua kayi muaba wa manaya awu." 
Acts19:32 Diba adi bantu bavua basangile kuakula kupangakana, bamue bela mbila, bakuabu bela bibingu. Ba bungi kabavua nansha bamanye tshine tshiyuabu bavuile muaba awu." 
Acts19:33 Ke bena Yuda kumvuija Aleksandre bualu, kumupatula munkatshi mua bantu, kumuimanyika kumpala kuabu, bua abakuile. Aleksandre kupuwisha bantu bonsu ne tshianza, ukeba kuakuila bena Yuda." 
Acts19:34 Kadi bajingulula ne: mmuena Yuda, bonsu kuela bibingu diyi dimue bu meba abidi majima, bamba amu ne: — Artemise wa bena Efeze ke udi munene!" 
Acts19:35 Ku ndekelu mufundi mukuabu wa malu a mu tshimenga, kupetaye mushindu wa kupuwisha bantu, ubambila ne: — Nuenu bena Efeze, telejayi! Bantu bonsu mbamanye ne: tshimenga tshia Efeze tshidi ne bukokeshi bua kulama bimpe nzubu wa nwidie mukaji munene Artemise, kabidi ne lupingu luende luvua lukuluke mu diulu." 
Acts19:36 Muntu nansha umue kena mua kubenga bualu ebu to. Nanku shalayi ne lutulu, kanuenji bibi nansha kakese." 
Acts19:37 Nudi bavue ne bantu aba: ki mbapawule nzubu yetu ya nwidie, kabena nansha bapepeja nwidie mukaji wetu." 
Acts19:38 Pikala Demetriyuse ne bansenda bende tshilumbu ne muntu mukuabu, tudi ne bandumbulula, tudi ne matuku adibu bakosa nsambu. Baye kudibu!" 
Acts19:39 Kadi panuikala ne majinga makuabu, nebaatangile mu tshisangilu tshia bena ditunga. Ke mudi mikenji yamba." 
Acts19:40 Kadi bua bidi bienzeka lelu, bantu bakuabu mbafuane kutufunda ne: tudi bantomboji. Kakuena bualu nansha bumue budi buleja tshitudi basangile muaba ewu bantu bungi nanku. Bobu batuebeja, netupange tshia kuamba." 
Acts19:41 Mufundi mumane kuamba nanku, kutangalajaye bantu." 
Acts20:1 Mitoyi mimane kujika, Polu kusangisha bena ditaba, kubakolesha ku muoyi, kulayangana nabu. Pashishe kuyaye mu Masedoniya." 
Acts20:2 Kupitshilaye munkatshi mua ditunga adi, wenda ukolesha bena ditaba ku muoyi ne malongesha mavule. Pashishe kuyaye mu ditunga dia bena Ngreke." 
Acts20:3 Kushalayemu ngondu isatu. Pakavuaye mumane kudilongolola bua kubuela mu majuwa, kuya mu Siriya, kumvuaye lumu ne: bena Yuda mbamuelele tshifufu tshibi. Ke yeye kupangadika bua kulonda njila wa ku makasa, kupitshila mu Masedoniya." 
Acts20:4 Bavua bamushindikija kudi Sopatere, muana wa Piruse, wa mu tshimenga tshia Bereya, kabidi ne kudi Aristarke ne Sekunduse ba mu Tesalonike, Ngayuse wa mu Derbe, Tishike ne Trofime ba mu Aziya, kabidi ne kudi Timote." 
Acts20:5 Bonsu abu kudianjila, bua kutuindila mu Trowase." 
Acts20:6 Kunyima kua tshibilu tshia Mampa kaayi mela buanga, tuetu kumuka ne majuwa mu Filipe, kuenda matuku atanu, kusangana bena ditaba netu aba mu Trowase. Tuetu kushalamu lumingu lujima." 
Acts20:7 Disambombu dilolu, tuvua basangile bua Didia dia Mfumu Polu uvua uyukila ne bantu bavua basangile netu. Kutungunukaye ne dilongesha too ne mundankulu mua butuku, bualu uvua ne bua kubashiya patshiabu." 
Acts20:8 Mu nzubu mu tshibambalu tshia kulu mutuvua basangile, bavua batemeshe miendu ya bungi." 
Acts20:9 Nsongalume mukuabu, dina diende Etike, uvua musombe ku muelelu wa dididishi. Bu muvua Polu ulongesha mukungulu mule, kubungilaye ne tulu, kulala bikole. Bua bukole bua tulu, nsongalume awu kutetuka, kupona panshi ku tshisasa tshisatu tshia nzubu wa tshilala kulu. Bantu kuya bua kumujula. Kadi ukavua mufue." 
Acts20:10 Polu kutuluka, kuya kulala pambidi pende. Pashishe kumuambulaye mu maboku, wamba ne: — Lekelayi kulubakana nanku, udi ne muoyi!" 
Acts20:11 Pashishe kubandaye tshiakabidi kulu, kudiabu Didia dia Mfumu. Yeye mumane kulongesha kabidi tshitupa tshile too ne ku dinda, ke kushisha kuyaye." 
Acts20:12 Kupingajabu nsongalume kuabu ne muoyi. Bantu kusanka bikole. 
Acts20:13 Tuetu kudianjila kubuela mu majuwa, kuya ku Ashose. Ke kutuvua ne bua kuangatshila Polu mu majuwa. Uvua mumane kujadika nanku, bualu uvua ujinga kuyila mu njila wa ku makasa." 
Acts20:14 Pavua Polu utupeta mu Ashose, kubuelaye pende mu majuwa. Tuetu kuya ku Mitilene." 
Acts20:15 Tumuka mu Mitilene, tuetu kufika pabuipi ne tshidila tshia Kiyose dituku divua dilonda. Butshia tuetu kufika mu Samose, butshia kabidi tuetu kufika mu Milete." 
Acts20:16 Bualu Polu uvua musue kupita Efeze, kayi utulamu. Kavua musue kujingakana mu buloba bua Aziya. Uvua uya lukasa, bua kufika mu Yerushalayime dituku dia Pentekostese, bu biobi mua kuenzeka." 
Acts20:17 Pavua Polu mu Milete, kutumaye bantu mu Efeze bua kubikila bakulu ba Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
Acts20:18 Bakulu bamane kufika, Polu kubambila ne: — Nudi bamanye mumvua musombe matuku onsu atuvua nenu, biangatshile ku dituku dia kumpala dimvua mufike mu buloba bua Aziya." 
Acts20:19 Mvua mukuatshile Mfumu mudimu ne bupuekele buonsu. Bena Yuda bavua bambungamija, bankengesha, bualu bavua bangelela bifufu bibi."
