Acts20:20 Nudi bamanye ne: pamvua munulongeshe, munumanyishe malu onsu mu bisangilu ne mu nzubu yenu, tshivua munusokoke bualu nansha bumue buvua mua kunulengelela." 
Acts20:21 Mvua ndomba bena Yuda ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bua badilengeje, bapingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bitabe Mfumu wetu Yezu." 
Acts20:22 Mpindiewu ndi nya mu Yerushalayime, mudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila untuma. Tshiena mumanye bidi mua kungenzekelamu." 
Acts20:23 Ndi amu mumanye ne: ku tshimenga tshionsu, Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi umuanyisha ne: nebakukengeshe, nebakuele mu nzubu wa lukanu." 
Acts20:24 Kadi kushala ne muoyi kakuena ne mushinga kundi. Tshidi ne mushinga tshidi anu kujikija mudimu wanyi, kukumbaja mudimu uvua Mfumu mungomekele: ke kukobola Lumu lua Disanka lua mudi Mvidi Mukulu mutunange, mutufuile luse." 
Acts20:25 Mvua mutambakane munkatshi muenu bonsu, ndongesha malu a Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi mpindiewu ndi mumanye se: muntu nansha umue wa kunudi kakummona kabidi." 
Acts20:26 Ke pandi nnujadikila lelu ne: pikala muntu wa kunudi ujimina, tshilumbu tshiende katshiena tshinkuata to." 
Acts20:27 Bualu mvua munumanyishe muonsu mudi Mvidi Mukulu ulongolola malu, tshiyi musokoke kalu nansha kamue." 
Acts20:28 Dimukayi! Nudilame bimpe, nulame Tshisumbu tshia mikoku, tshidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila munupe. Nukube Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mupete ku lufu lua muanende mulela." 
Acts20:29 Ndi mumanye ne: pangaya, nyama ya lonji neibuele munkatshi muenu, inyangakaje tshisumbu." 
Acts20:30 Munkatshi muenu kabidi nemujuke bantu bakula malu a dishima, bua kukoka bena ditaba bua babalonde." 
Acts20:31 Nanku nuikale batabale. Nuvuluke ne: bidimu bisatu butuku ne munya, mvua mbela yonsu wa kunudi, nansha ne binsonji ku mesu." 
Acts20:32 Kadi mpindiewu, ndi nnuteka mu bianza bia Mvidi Mukulu, ne mu muaku wa luse luende. Muaku awu udi mua kunukolesha mu ditaba, kunupa bilenga bidi Mvidi Mukulu mulamine bantu badi bende." 
Acts20:33 Tshivua mulombe muntu nansha umue nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha mpawungi, nansha bilamba." 
Acts20:34 Nudi bamanye nuenu bine mumvua mukuate mudimu bua kupeta bionsu bituvua tukengela, meme ne bavua nanyi mu luendu." 
Acts20:35 Mvua munuleje misangu yonsu ne: ke munudi ne bua kukuata mudimu bikole bua kuambuluisha bakengi. Nuvuluke miaku ivua Mfumu Yezu muambe ne: “Disanka dia kupa ndipite dia kupeta. ” 
Acts20:36 Polu mumane kuamba nanku, kutuaye binu ne bavuaye nabu, kutendelelabu Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts20:37 Bonsu kudila miadi, kupukila Polu, bamutua mishiku bua kulayangana nende." 
Acts20:38 Bavua ne dibungama, nangananga bualu uvua mubambile ne: katuakumonangana kabidi kashidi. Pashishe kumushindikijabu too ne ku majuwa." 
Acts21:1 Bamane kulayangana nabu, tuetu kubuela mu majuwa, kuya buludi ku tshidila tshia Kose. Butshia tuetu kufika mu tshidila tshia Rodose. Tumukamu, tuetu kuya mu tshimenga tshia Patara." 
Acts21:2 Tuetu kusanganamu majuwa aya ku Fenisiya. Ke tuetu kubuelamu, kuya." 
Acts21:3 Bafika pabuipi ne Shipre, muaba uvua tshidila tshimueneka ku diboku dietu dia bakaji, tuetu kupita kuinshi kuatshi, kuya ku Siriya. Tuetu kutuluka mu majuwa mu Tire, bualu ke muaba uvua majuwa ne bua kushiya bujitu." 
Acts21:4 Tuetu kusanganamu bena ditaba, kushala nabu lumingu lujima. Mueyelu wa Tshijila kubasonsola, bua bambile Polu ne: kuyi mu Yerushalayime to." 
Acts21:5 Kadi lumingu alu lujika, tuetu kutungunuka ne luendu luetu. Bena ditaba bonsu, bakaji babu ne bana, kuya kutushindikija too ne ku mpenga kua tshimenga. Tuetu kutua binu ku muelelu wa mayi manene, kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts21:6 Bamane kulayangana nabu, tuetu kubanda mu majuwa. Bena ditaba kupingana kuabu." 
Acts21:7 Tuetu kumuka mu Tire, kuya mu Ptolemayise. Ke mutuvua bajikije luendu luetu lua pa mayi nanku. Mu Ptolemayise tuetu kuya kukumbula bena ditaba, kushala nabu dituku dijima." 
Acts21:8 Butshia tuetu kutungunuka ne luendu, kuyila njila wa ku makasa, kufika mu Kezareya. Tuetu kuya kua Filipe, mulongeshi wa Lumu lua Disanka, kulala kuende. Filipe uvua wa ku bantu muanda mutekete, bavuabu basunguile ku Yerushalayime, bua kuambuluisha bapostolu." 
Acts21:9 Uvua ne bana bende ba bakaji banayi, kabayi basela. Bavua bambi, bamanyisha bantu bivua Mvidi Mukulu mubambile." 
Acts21:10 Tuetu bamane kushala muaba awu matuku makese, ke muambi kampanda, diende Agabuse, kufumina ku Yudeya." 
Acts21:11 Kufikaye patuvua, kuangata mukaba wa Polu, kudisuika nawu makasa ne bianza, wamba ne: — Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi wamba ne: Muena mukaba ewu, bena Yuda nebamusuike mushindu ewu mu Yerushalayime, pashishe nebamufile mu bianza bia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Acts21:12 Tumvua nanku, tuetu ne bena mu Kezareya kusengelela Polu ne: kuyi ku Yerushalayime to." 
Acts21:13 Kadi yeye kutuandamuna ne: — Nudi nudila, nukeba kuntekesha mu maboku bua tshinyi? Meme ndi nganyisha ki amu bua bansuike mionji, apu kabidi ne bua kutuila Mfumu Yezu mu Yerushalayime." 
Acts21:14 Bu muvua Polu kayi musue kuitaba bituvua bambe, tuetu kulekela kumusengelela, tuamba ne: — Bienzeke mudi Mfumu musue!" 
Acts21:15 Bamane kushala kabidi amue matuku muaba awu, tuetu kulongolola bintu bietu, bua kuya ku Yerushalayime." 
Acts21:16 Bena ditaba ba mu Kezareya kutushindikija. Kutufdabu kua Mnasone, bua tuetu kulala kuende. Uvua muntu wa mu Shipre, umue wa ku bena ditaba ba kumpala." 
Acts21:17 Tufika mu Yerushalayime, bena ditaba kubakidila ne disanka." 
Acts21:18 Butshia Polu kuya netu kua Yakobe, kuvua bakulu bonsu ba Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba basangile." 
Acts21:19 Polu kubela muoyi, kubalondela malu onsu menemene, avua Mvidi Mukulu mukumbaje ku mudimu uvuaye muenze munkatshi mua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Acts21:20 Bamane kumvua bionsu abi, kutumbishabu Mvidi Mukulu. Pashishe kuambilabu Polu ne: — Muanetu, udi mumone mukadi bena Yuda bitaba Yezu binunu ne binunu. Kadi buonsu buabu batshidi amu bakumbaje bimpe mikenji ya Moshe." 
Acts21:21 Kadi bavua babambile ne: Polu udi ulongesha bena Yuda bonsu, badi basomba munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu, ne: kanulondi mikenji ya Moshe, kanuteki bana benu panshi, nulekele bibidilu bia bena Yuda." 
Acts21:22 Kadi netuenze tshinyi? Bualu bena Yuda ba muetu munu nebamanye ne: udi mumane kufika! 
Acts21:23 Nenku, enza tshitudi tukuambila etshi: tudi apa ne bantu banayi bavua benze dilaya." 
Acts21:24 Ubangate, uye nabu. Wikaleku, padibu badikobolola. Ubafutshile mushinga, bua babeyishe nsuki. Nanku bantu bonsu mbajadike ne: mbakujane patupu, bualu wewe mene udi amu ukumbaja mikenji ya Moshe." 
Acts21:25 Kadi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bakadi bitaba Yezu, tukadi babafundile bimvua bajadike ne: kabadi minyinyi ya nyama ivuabu balambule mvidie; kabadi mashi; kabadi minyinyi ya nyama mishipa, kayiyi mipatule mashi; balekele buendenda." 
Acts21:26 Butshia Polu kuya ne bantu banayi abu. Kushalaye nabu, pavuabu badikobolola. Pashishe kubuelaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kumanyisha dituku divuabu ne bua kujikija kudikobolola. Bualu dituku adi bavua ne bua kufila mulambu bua yonsu wa kudibu." 
Acts21:27 Lumingu lua kudikobolola lukavua pa kujika. Ke bena Yuda ba mu Aziya kumona Polu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kusonsolabu bantu bonsu, kukuatabu Polu," 
Acts21:28 bela mbila ne: — Bena Izrayele, tuambuluishayi! Monayi muntu udi ulongesha bantu bonsu miaba yonsu, bua bapepeje tshisamba tshia Izrayele, mikenji ya Moshe, ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu. Lelu mmubueje bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mu nzubu ewu! mMupishe muaba ewu wa tshijila mukiya!" 
Acts21:29 (Bavua bamba nanku, bualu bavua bamona Polu ne Trofime wa mu tshimenga tshia Efeze, bendakana mu tshimenga. Nanku bavua bela meji ne: Polu mmubuele nende mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu )." 
Acts21:30 Tshimvundu kutampakana mu tshimenga tshijima. Bantu bonsu kukungila ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kukuatabu Polu, bamupulumuna, bamupatula mu nzubu. Diakamue kukangabu biibi." 
Acts21:31 Bavua bakeba kushipa Polu. Kadi bantu bakavua bamanyishe mulombodi wa tshisumbu tshia basolayi ba bena Rome ne: Yerushalayime mujima mmutomboke! 
Acts21:32 Nanku diakamue mulombodi awu kubikila basolayi ne bamfumu babu, kuya lubilu kudi bavua benza mutoyi. Aba bamona mulombodi ne basolayi bende, kulekelabu dituuta Polu." 
Acts21:33 Ke mulombodi wa basolayi kusemena kudi Polu, kutuma diyi, bua bamukuate, bamusuike nkanu ibidi. Pashishe kuebejaye ne: nnganyi ewu? Tshivuaye muenze ntshinyi?" 
Acts21:34 Kadi bantu bavua bela mbila, bamba aba muabu, aba muabu. Nanku mulombodi kavua mua kujingulula muvua tshilumbu. Ke kutumaye diyi, bua baye ne Polu mu nzubu wa basolayi." 
Acts21:35 Amu Polu udiata nabu pa bibandilu bia kumpala kua nzubu, basolayi kumuambuila kulu, bualu bantu bavua ne lonji." 
Acts21:36 Bonsu bavua bamulonda, bela mbila ne: — Bamushipe!" 
Acts21:37 Pakavuabu bamba kubueja Polu mu nzubu wa basolayi, kulombaye mulombodi wabu ne: — Ndi mua kukuambila bualu anyi? Mulombodi kumuebeja ne: — Udi mumanye muakulu wa bena Ngreke anyi?" 
Acts21:38 Nanku kuena muena Ejipitu ewu, uvua mutombueshe bantu matuku makese aa, muye mu tshipela ne bashipianganyi binunu binayi anyi?" 
Acts21:39 Polu kuandamuna ne: — Meme ndi muena Yuda. mBandele mu Tarse, tshimenga tshia lumu tshia mu Silisiya. Ndi nkulomba dianyisha, bua ngambile bantu bualu." 
Acts21:40 Mulombodi wa basolayi kuanyisha. Ke Polu kuimana pa bibandilu, kupuwisha bantu ne tshianza. Bantu bamane kupuwa, Polu kubambila mu buena ebrewu ne:" 
Acts22:1 — Batatu ne bana betu, ntelejayi. Bualu ndi musue kudilumbuluila mpindiewu kumpala kuenu." 
Acts22:2 Bantu bumvua ne: Polu udi wakula mu buena ebrewu, kupuwabu talalaa. Ke Polu kuamba ne:" 
Acts22:3 — Ndi muena Yuda. mBandele mu Tarse wa mu Silisiya. Kadi ndi mukolele mu Yerushalayime emu. Ngamaliyele, ke uvua mundongeshe bimpe bitambe mikenji ya bankambua betu. Mvua mukuatshile Mvidi Mukulu mudimu ne disuminyina, amu munudi nuenu bonsu benza lelu." 
Acts22:4 Mvua mukengeshe, mushipeshe bavua balonda njila wa Mfumu Yezu. Mvua mukuate balume ne bakaji, mubeleshe mu nkanu." 
Acts22:5 Mutuangaji munene, ne bena tshipangu tshia bakulu bonsu badi apa, badi mua kujadika bindi ngamba ebi. Bavua bampeshe mikanda, mifundila bana betu bena Yuda ba mu Damase. Ke mumvua mufike muine amu, bua kukuata bavua bitaba Yezu, kupingana nabu mu Yerushalayime, bua babanyoke." 
Acts22:6 — Mvua nya mu njila. Nkavua pa kubuela mu Damase. Bu mpindiewu, diba munda munya, butoke bunene bufuma mu diulu kumbuikila ne nkenke yabu." 
Acts22:7 Meme kudishinda panshi, kumvua diyi ne: “Shawule, Shawule, udi unkengesha bua tshinyi?”" 
Acts22:8 Meme kuebeja ne: “Mukalenga, wewe udi nganyi?” Diyi kungandamuna ne: “Ndi Yezu wa mu Nazarete uudi ukengesha.”" 
Acts22:9 Bantu bafuvua nabu kumona butoke, kadi kabavua bumvua diyi dia uvua ungakuisha to." 
Acts22:10 Ke meme kukonka ne: “Mukalenga, ngenze tshinyi?” Ke Mfumu kungandamuna ne: “Juka panshi, uye mu Damase. Momu amu nebakuambile bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mukufundile bua wewe kuenza.”" 
Acts22:11 Butoke bunene abu buvua bungenza mpofu. Ke batuvua nabu kunkuata ku tshianza, kumfikisha mu Damase." 
Acts22:12 Momu amu muvua muntu, diende Ananiyase, munangi wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua ukumbaja bimpe mikenji yetu. Bena Yuda bonsu ba mu tshimenga atshi bavua bamuanyisha." 
Acts22:13 Ke kufikaye bua kumonangana nanyi. Kusemenaye pabuipi nanyi, ungamba ne: “Muanetu Shawule, tabalaku!” Diba mene adi meme kutabala, kumumona." 
Acts22:14 Kuambaye kabidi ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu mmukusungule, bua wewe kumanya tshidiye musue, kumona Muntu umue epele uvua mukumbaje tshidiye musue, kudiumvuila ne diyi diende menemene." 
Acts22:15 Bualu wewe ke udi ne bua kujadikila bantu bonsu tshiuvua mumone, ne tshiuvua mumvue bualu buende." 
Acts22:16 Kadi mpindiewu tshiudi windila kabidi ntshinyi? Jukaku, bakutue mu mayi, utonde mu dina dia Yezu, bua mibi yebe ijimine.”" 
Acts22:17 — Meme kupingana mu Yerushalayime. Mvidi Mukulu kundeja malu, pamvua ntendelela mu nzubu wende." 
Acts22:18 Meme kumona Mfumu, ungamba ne: “Kolesha, patuka lukasa mu Yerushalayime. Bualu benamu kabakuitaba biudi ulongesha bualu buanyi.”" 
Acts22:19 Ke meme kuandamuna ne: “Mfumu, kadi badi amu bamanye mumvua mbuela kale mu nzubu ya kutendelela, mbelesha mu nkanu, nkumisha bantu bavua bakuitaba." 
Acts22:20 Pavuabu bashipa mujadiki webe Stefane, meme kabidi mvuapu. Mvua muanyishe bavua bamushipe, mubalamine ne bilamba. ”" 
Acts22:21 Kadi Mfumu kungambila amu ne: “Uye! Bualu ndi nkutuma kule, kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu.”" 
Acts22:22 Bantu bavua bateleja Polu too ne ku miaku eyi. Ke kushishabu kuela mbila ne: — Muntu awu tshiende ndufu! Mushipayi! Tshidiye wenza pa buloba ntshinyi? 
Acts22:23 Kuelabu bibingu, bela bilamba biabu panshi, bela ne buloba mulu." 
Acts22:24 Mulombodi wa basolayi ba bena Rome kutuma diyi, bua babuele ne Polu mu lupangu lua basolayi, bamukume mikaba, bua ambe tshidi bantu bamubengele nanku." 
Acts22:25 Kadi basolayi bamane kumusuika, ke Polu kuebeja tshindonda tshia mulombodi wabu tshivua muaba awu ne: — Nudi mua kukumisha muntu muena Rome mikaba, kabayi nansha banji kumulumbuluisha anyi?" 
Acts22:26 Ke tshindonda atshi kuya kuebeja mulombodi wa basolayi ne: — Udi mumvue tshiudi wenza anyi? Muntu ewu mmuena Rome! 
Acts22:27 Mulombodi kuya kuebeja Polu ne: — Ngambila tumone, udi muena Rome menemene anyi? Polu kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, ndi muena Rome." 
Acts22:28 Ke mulombodi kuamba ne: — Meme ndi mutule lupetu luvule, bua kusumba muanzu wa bena Rome. Ke Polu kuandamuna ne: — Kadi mene, mbandele muena Rome." 
Acts22:29 Diakamue basolayi bavua ne bua kukumisha Polu mikaba bua akule, kumukabu muaba awu. Mulombodi wa basolayi kabidi kumvua buowa, bualu uvua mujingulule ne: Polu undi musuikishe nkanu mmuena Rome!" 
Acts22:30 Butshia, mulombodi wa basolayi kukeba kumanya tshilumbu tshivua bena Yuda bafundile Polu. Kumusuluishaye nkanu. Kubikilaye bamfumu ba batuangaji, ne bena Tshipangu tshikulu bonsu, mu tshisangilu. Pashishe mumane kubueja Polu, kumuimanyikaye kumpala kuabu." 
Acts23:1 Ke Polu kutangila bena Tshipangu, wamba ne: — Bana betu, too ne lelu mvua mukumbaje bimpe bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Nanku kondu ka munda kakena kantuuta." 
Acts23:2 Kadi mutuangaji munene Ananiyase kutumina bantu bavua pabuipi ne Polu diyi, bua bamutuute mapi mu mbanga." 
Acts23:3 Ke Polu kumuamba ne: — Wewe muena mpala ibidi, Mvidi Mukulu neakutuute! Udi apa bua kundumbuluisha bilondeshile mikenji. Kadi wewe mene udi ushipa mikenji, wamba bua kuntuutabu!" 
Acts23:4 Kadi bantu bavua pabuipi ne Polu, kumuambila ne: — Udi upenda mutuangaji munene wa Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Acts23:5 Polu kuandamuna ne: — Bana betu, tshivua mumanye ne: mmutuangaji munene to. Bualu mu Mukanda wa tshijila mbafunde ne: “Kanuedi mfumu wa tshisamba tshienu milawu. ”" 
Acts23:6 Bu muvua Polu mumanye ne: mu Tshipangu mudi Basaduke ne Baparushe, ke kuelaye diyi dikole, wamba ne: — Bana betu, meme ndi Muparushe, muana wa Baparushe. mBamfunde ku tshilumbu, bualu ndi ngitaba, ntekemena ne: bafue nebabike!" 
Acts23:7 Wamba nanku, bena tshipangu kuabulukangana, bualu Basaduke ne Baparushe bakavua batandangana." 
Acts23:8 (Bualu Basaduke kabena bitaba ne: bafue nebabiike; nansha ne: batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu ne mikishi bidiku. Kadi Baparushe badi bitaba bionsu abi ). 
Acts23:9 Ke bantu kuela mbila mikole. Bamue balongeshi ba mikenji ba luseke lua Baparushe kujuka, babenga tshilumbu, bamba ne: — Katuena bamona ne: muntu ewu mmupile to! Misangu mikuabu mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, nansha mukishi, mmumuambile malu!" 
Acts23:10 Matandu kukola kupita. Ke mulombodi wa basolayi kutshina ne: kabavu kusunsula Polu. Kutuminaye basolayi diyi ne: buelayi mu tshipangu, numbushe Polu, nupingane nende mu lupangu luenu." 
Acts23:11 Butuku, Mfumu kumuenekela Polu, umuambila ne: — Kolesha muoyi. Mu Yerushalayime emu, udi muleje bantu muudi ungitaba. Ke muwaya kuenza kabidi ne mu Rome!" 
Acts23:12 Butshia dinda, bamue bena Yuda kuya kuela tshitungu, baditshipa, bamba ne: “Katuena tudia, katuena tunua, amu tuetu bashipe Polu!”" 
Acts23:13 Bena tshitungu etshi bavua bapite pa makumi anayi. 
Acts23:14 Kuyabu kumonangana ne bamfumu ba batuangaji, kabidi ne bakulu, babamanyisha ne: — Tudi baditshipe ne: katuena tudia, amu tuetu bashipe Polu." 
Acts23:15 Nenku nuenu, ne bena Tshipangu tshikulu bonsu, lombayi mulombodi wa basolayi, bua anutumine Polu. Numudingidije ne: tudi basue kutangila tshilumbu tshiende bimpe. Tuetu netumuadile mu njila, bua kumushipa, kayi muanji kufika kunudi." 
Acts23:16 Kadi muana wa balume mansebende wa Polu kumvua muvuabu bela tshitungu atshi. Kuyaye mu lupangu lua basolayi. Kubuelayemu bua kumanyisha Polu bualu ebu. 
Acts23:17 Nenku Polu kubikila tshindonda tshia mulombodi wa basolayi, umuambila ne: — Nuye ne nsongalume ewu kudi mulombodi. Udi ne bualu bunene bua kumuambila." 
Acts23:18 Musolayi kuya ne nsongalume kudi mulombodi, umuambila ne: — Polu udi mu lukanu awu, mmumbikile, mungambile ne: nuye ne nsongalume ewu kudi mulombodi. Udi ne bualu bunene bua kumuambila." 
Acts23:19 Ke mulombodi kukuata nsongalume ku tshianza, kuya nende ku luseke, umuebeja ne: — Buudi musue kungambila mbunganyi?" 
Acts23:20 Nsongalume kuandamuna ne: — Bena Yuda mbumvuangane bua kukulomba ne: utume Polu maloba mu Tshipangu tshikulu. Pine apu mbadingidije ne: tudi basue kutangila tshilumbu tshiende bimpe. 
Acts23:21 Kadi kubitabi to! Bualu bantu bapite pa makumi anayi bayaya kuadila Polu mu njila bua kumukuata. mBaditshipe ne: katuena tudia, katuena tunua, amu tuetu bamushipe. Mpindiewu mbamane kudilongolola, bindile amu bua umutume mu Tshipangu." 
Acts23:22 Mulombodi kulayangana ne nsongalume, kumukandika ne: — Kuambidi muntu bualu buudi mutumanyishe." 
Acts23:23 Ke mulombodi kubikila bindonda biende bibidi, ubiambila ne: — Sangishayi basolayi, nkama ibidi badi ne bia mvita biabu bionsu, bakuabu makumi muanda mutekete babandi ba pa tubalu, banga nkama ibidi badi bambula amu mafuma. Nudilongolole bua kuya ku Kezareya bufuku, diba dia tshitema." 
Acts23:24 Nuangate kabidi ne tubalu, bua nuambule Polu, nufike nende bimpe kudi Felikse, mulombodi wa ditunga." 
Acts23:25 Kufundaye kabidi mukanda ne: 
Acts23:26 “Wakunemekibua mulombodi wa ditunga, mukalenga Felikse, muoyi awu! Meme Klode Liziyase, ndi nkumanyisha ne:" 
Acts23:27 Bena Yuda bavua bakuate muntu ewu, bakeba kumushipa. Pangumvu ne: mmuena Rome, meme kufika ne basolayi banyi, kumunyenga." 
Acts23:28 Meme kumufikisha mu Tshipangu tshikulu, bua kumanya tshivua bena Yuda bamufundile." 
Acts23:29 Meme kujadika ne: kavua muenze bualu bubi budi mua kumuelesha mu lukanu, nansha kumushipesha. Muvua amu mpata ya pa mikenji yabu." 
Acts23:30 Pashishe pavuabu bammanyisha ne: bena Yuda mbamuelele tshitungu, ke pandi mupangadike diakamue bua kukutuminaye. Ndi mulombe kabidi badi bamufunde, bua bafike ne tshilumbu tshiende kuudi. ”" 
Acts23:31 Basolayi kuenza muvuabu babafundile. Kuyabu ne Polu butuku abu, too ne ku Antipatrise." 
Acts23:32 Butshia basolayi bavua ku makasa kupingana kuabu, bena tubalu kutungunuka luendu ne Polu." 
Acts23:33 Bafika mu Kezareya, diakamue bena tubalu kupa mulombodi wa ditunga mukanda, kumushila kabidi ne Polu." 
Acts23:34 Mulombodi wa ditunga mumane kubala mukanda, kukonkaye Polu ne: “Udi wa mu ditunga kaayi?” Yeye mumvue ne: Polu ngwa mu Silisiya," 
Acts23:35 kumuambilaye ne: — Nenkukonkoloje amu pafika badi bakufunde. Kutumaye diyi bua balame Polu mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga, uvuabu base kudi Erode." 
Acts24:1 Kupita matuku atanu, mutuangaji munene Ananiyase, bamue bakulu, ne mulumbuluidi Tertuluse, kufika mu Kezareya. Kumonanganabu ne mulombodi wa ditunga Felikse, bua kumumanyisha tshidibu bafundila Polu." 
Acts24:2 Ke Felikse kubikidisha Polu. Tertuluse kulonda tshilumbu, wamba ne: — Wakunemekibua, mu ditunga emu, tudi tusomba talalaa, amu bualu buebe wewe. Udi mulongolole malu a bungi bimpe bitambe muetu munemu, bua diakalenga dietu." 
Acts24:3 Bua bionsu bitudi tupeta diba dionsu, ne miaba yonsu, tudi tukuanyisha bikole." 
Acts24:4 Kadi tshiena musue kukupitshishila diba. Ke pandi nkulomba, bua wanji kututelejaku katupa." 
Acts24:5 Tudi bamanye se: muntu ewu ntshipupu. Udi utombueja bena Yuda bonsu pa buloba bujima. Udi mfumu wa tshisumbu tshia bena Nazarete. 
Acts24:6 Ukavua ukeba kunyanga nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne mikiya. Ke tuetu kumukuata. [Tuvua basue kumulumbuluisha bilondeshile mikenji yetu. 
Acts24:7 Kadi Liziyase mulombodi wa basolayi kufika, kutunyenga Polu ku makanda." 
Acts24:8 Kutumaye kabidi diyi bua bavua bamufunda bamonangane nebe. ] Wewe mulumbuluishe muntu ewu, neudiumvuile nkayebe, mutudi bamufundile pa bualu." 
Acts24:9 Bena Yuda kutua ku tshia Tertuluse, bela mbila ne: muudi muambe amu, mmomu!" 
Acts24:10 Ke mulombodi wa ditunga kuanyisha Polu, bua alonde pende bualu. Ke Polu kuamba ne: — Bushuwa, ndi mumanye ne: udi ndumbulula munene mu ditunga edi, kukadi bidimu bivule. Ke pandi ndilumbuluila, ntekemena kuudi." 
Acts24:11 Wewe mene udi mua kujadika bindi ngamba: kakuena kupita matuku dikumi ne abidi, andi mufike mu Yerushalayime, bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Acts24:12 Kabena bansangana ngelangana mpata mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne muntu nansha umue, nansha ntombueja bantu mu nzubu ya kutendelela, nansha miaba mikuabu mu tshimenga." 
Acts24:13 Bantu aba kabena mua kukujadikila bidibu bamfunde abi to. 
Acts24:14 Kadi tshindi nkujadikila tshidi nunku: ndi ngenzela Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu mudimu, ndonda njila mupiamupia, udibu bamba ne: mmubi. Kadi ndi ngitaba bionsu bidibu bafunde mu mikanda ya mikenji, ne ya bambi." 
Acts24:15 Ndi mutekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu, amu mudibu bobu mene batekemene ne: bantu bimpe ne babi nebabiike ku bafue." 
Acts24:16 Ke pandi ngenza muanyi muonsu, bua kondu kanyi ka munda kikale katalale kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu ne kua bantu." 
Acts24:17 Ndi mumbuke mu Yerushalayime bidimu bivule. Ndi mupinganemu amu mpindiewu, bua kupesha bena tshisamba tshietu makuta a diambuluisha, kabidi bua meme kulambula Mvidi Mukulu milambu." 
Acts24:18 Ke tshimvua ngenza mene, diba divuabu basangane mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ngambuluisha bantu mu mulambu wa kudikobolola. Tshivua ne bantu ba bungi to. Tshivua mujule mutoyi nansha." 
Acts24:19 Kadi bena Yuda bakuabu ba mu Aziya bavuapu. Bu bobu ne bualu menemene bua mua kusonguela kuudi, bavua mua kuikala apa." 
Acts24:20 Kadi udi mua kuebeja kabidi bantu badi apa. Babambile tshilema tshivuabu bansangane natshi, pavuabu bandumbuluisha mu Tshipangu tshikulu tshiabu." 
Acts24:21 Tshilumbu tshindi mua kuikala natshi, tshidi amu tshia miaku imvua muambe ne diyi dikole ne: “mBamfunde lelu ku tshilumbu kumpala kuenu, bualu ndi ngitaba ne: bafue nebabiike. ”" 
Acts24:22 Felikse uvua mumanye bimpe malu avua atangila bena Kristu. Kuindijaye bena tshilumbu, wamba ne: — Netukose tshilumbu tshienu, pikala Liziyase, mulombodi wa basolayi, mumane kufika." 
Acts24:23 Kutuminaye mfumu wa basolayi bavua ne bua kulama Polu diyi ne: “Kanutambi kumufimpakaja. Kanukandiki balunda bende badi basue kumukumbula.” 
Acts24:24 Kupita matuku, Felikse ne mukajende Drusila wa bena Yuda kufikabu. Kubikidishabu Polu. Bavua basue kumvua tshi-vuaye ulongesha bua Yezu ne bua ditaba dia bena Kristu." 
Acts24:25 Kadi pakavua Polu ulongesha mudi muntu ne bua kukumbaja bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, kudikolela, kudilongolola ku dituku diavua Mvidi Mukulu kulumbuluisha bantu, Felikse kukuatshika buowa, kuamba ne: — Abi mbikumbane! Nenkubikidishe kabidi, pangapeta diba." 
Acts24:26 Kadi bu muvua Felikse mutekemene ne: Polu neambuejile makuta, kumubikidishaye misangu mivule, bua kuyukila nende." 
Acts24:27 Kupita bidimu bibidi, Porsiyuse Festuse kupingana Felikse mu bulombodi bua ditunga. Kadi bu muvua Felikse musue kusankisha bena Yuda, ki mmupatule Polu mu lukanu nansha." 
Acts25:1 Bamane kubanjija Festuse mu bulombodi bua ditunga, kupita matuku asatu, kumbukaye mu Kezareya, bua kuya ku Yerushalayime." 
Acts25:2 Kuine aku bamfumu ba batuangaji, ne bakulu ba bena Yuda, kuya kudiye bua kufunda Polu. Bavua balomba Festuse ne:" 
Acts25:3 “Anyisha, utupingajile Polu mu Yerushalayime.” Bualu bakavua bamuelele tshitungu, bua kumushipela mu njila." 
Acts25:4 Kadi Festuse kubandamuna ne: — Polu udi mu lukanu mu Kezareya. Meme kabidi nkadi pa kupinganamu. 
Acts25:5 Nanku tuye pamue ne bamfumu benu mu Kezareya. Pikala muntu ewu muenze bualu bubi, bamufundile kuine aku." 
Acts25:6 Festuse kushala mu Yerushalayime amu matuku bu dikumi. Pashishe kupinganaye ku Kezareya. Butshia kuyaye kusomba mu nzubu wa bilumbu, kubikidisha Polu." 
Acts25:7 Polu ufika, bena Yuda bavua bafuma mu Yerushalayime kumuela munkatshi. Bavua bamufunda ne malu mabi a bungi, avuabu kabayi mua kujadika." 
Acts25:8 Kadi Polu uvua ndilumbuluila, wamba ne: — Tshiena muenze bualu nansha bumue budi bubengangana ne mikenji ya Moshe. Tshiena munyange nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Tshiena mubenge Kezare." 
Acts25:9 Bua kusankisha bena Yuda, Festuse kuebeja Polu ne: — Udi musue tuye kukulumbuluisha mu Yerushalayime anyi?" 
Acts25:10 Polu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi ku tshilumbuluilu kua Kezare. Ke kudibu ne bua kundumbuluisha. Wewe mene udi mumanye bimpe ne: tshiena muenzele bena Yuda bibi nansha kakese. 
Acts25:11 Kadi pangikala ne tshibawu, mubunde bualu buakanyine lufu, tshiena mbenga kufua to. Kadi pikala bidi bantu aba bamba kabiyi bilelela, muntu nansha umue kena mua kumfila kudibu to. Ndi ndomba bua nutume tshilumbu tshianyi kua Kezare." 
Acts25:12 Festuse mumane kuakidilangana ne bena tshipangu tshiende, kuandamunaye Polu ne: — Bu mundi mulombe bua kuya ne tshilumbu tshiebe kua Kezare, neuye kudi Kezare." 
Acts25:13 Kupita matuku, mukalenga Agripa, ne muanabu wa bakaji Berenike, kufikabu mu Kezareya, bua kuela Festuse muoyi." 
Acts25:14 Bu muvuabu bashale amue matuku mu Kezareya, ke Festuse kukuatshila mukalenga Agripa tshilumbu tshia Polu, umuambila ne: — Muaba ewu kudi muntu uvua Felikse mushiye mu lukanu." 
Acts25:15 Pamvua muye ku Yerushalayime, bamfumu ba batuangaji, ne bakulu ba Tshipangu, bavua bamufunda kundi, bandomba, bua mmufundile tshibawu." 
Acts25:16 Mvua mubandamune ne: bena Rome kabena ne tshibidilu tshia kubindila muntu tshibawu, kayi muanji kutuilangana ne badi bamufunde, kayi mupete pa kudilumbuluila." 
Acts25:17 Nanku tudi balue nabu munu. Kadi tshivua muindile to. Butshia meme kubuela mu nzubu wa bilumbu, kubikidisha Polu." 
Acts25:18 Bavua bamufunde kufika. Kadi ki mbatele tshilema nansha tshimue, ku bimvua muelele meji." 
Acts25:19 Bavua belangana nende mpata, amu pa malu abu a kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, ne pa tshilumbu tshia muntu kampanda, mumane kufua, diende Yezu. Bualu Polu udi ujadika ne: udi ne muoyi." 
Acts25:20 Meme tshivua mumanye mua kupita ne tshilumbu etshi to. Ke pamvua muebeje Polu ne: udi musue tuye kukulumbuluisha ku Yerushalayime anyi? 
Acts25:21 Kadi Polu kulomba bua tutume tshilumbu tshiende kua Kezare. Nanku udi musue kushala mu lukanu, too ne diba didi Kezare ukosa tshilumbu tshiende. Nanku meme kutuma diyi, bua bamulame mu lukanu, too ne pangamutuma kua Kezare." 
Acts25:22 Mukalenga Agripa kuambila Festuse ne: — Ndi musue kudiumvuila mudi muntu awu wakula. Festuse kuandamuna ne: — Neudiumvuile maloba mudiye wakula. 
Acts25:23 Butshia Agripa ne Berenike kufika, bavuale biabu bia bukalenga. Kubuelabu mu nzubu wa bilumbu, pamue ne balombodi ba basolayi, ne bantu banene ba mu tshimenga. Festuse kubikidisha Polu." 
Acts25:24 Pashishe kuambaye ne: — Mukalenga Agripa, nuenu bonsu badi bafika muaba ewu, muoyi wenu! Tangilayi muntu ewu. Bena Yuda bonsu, ne ba mu Yerushalayime ne ba munemu, mbafike kundi bua tshilumbu tshiende, bela mbila ne: numushipe!" 
Acts25:25 Kadi meme tshiena musangane bualu bubi nansha bumue budiye mua kutuila. Bu mutataye ulomba bua tutume tshilumbu tshiende kua Kezare, ndi musue kumutuma ku Rome." 
Acts25:26 Kadi tshiena ne bualu busunguluke bundi mua kufundila mukalenga wa bakalenga pa tshilumbu tshiende. Ke pandi mumupatule kumpala kuenu, nangananga kumpala kuebe wewe, mukalenga Agripa. Tumuele nkonku, mpete tshia kufunda." 
Acts25:27 Bualu ndi mumone ne: mbibi kutuma muena lukanu kua Kezare, tshiyi muleje malu adibu bamusonguela nawu." 
Acts26:1 Agripa kuambila Polu ne: — Ndi nganyisha bua udilumbuluile. Ke Polu kuolola tshianza, wamba ne:" 
Acts26:2 — Mukalenga Agripa, ndi ne disanka dia kudilumbuluila lelu kumpala kuebe, pa bionsu bidi bena Yuda bansonguela." 
Acts26:3 Bualu wewe udi mumanye bimpe bibidilu bia bena Yuda, ne mpata yabu. Ke pandi nkulomba, bua untelejeku ne lutulu." 
Acts26:4 Bena Yuda bonsu mbamanye mumvua mukole mu buana, nsomba amu munkatshi mua bana betu, ne mu Yerushalayime." 
Acts26:5 Nanku badi bammanye kale. Bu bobu basue, badi mua kujadika ne: ndi Muparushe, muena tshisumbu tshia bantu badi bakumbaja bimpe bitambe malu a ditaba dietu." 
Acts26:6 Mpindiewu mbangase tshilumbu, bualu ndi ntekemena ne: Mvidi Mukulu neakumbaje bivuaye mulaye bankambua betu." 
Acts26:7 Bisamba bietu dikumi ne bibidi bidi bitendelela Mvidi Mukulu butuku ne munya, bitekemena amu: bidi Mvidi Mukulu mulaye, nebikumbane. Mukalenga Agripa, bena Yuda mbamfunde amu bua ditekemena adi." 
Acts26:8 Munyi munudi nuenu bena Yuda kanuyi mua kuitaba ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kubisha bafue! 
Acts26:9 Meme kabidi mvua muele meji ne: ndi ne bua kuenza muanyi muonsu bua kuluisha Yezu wa mu Nazarete. 
Acts26:10 Ke bimvua muenze mu Yerushalayime. Mvua mupete dianyisha dia pa buadi kudi batuangaji banene. Ke pamvua muele bena ditaba bavule mu lukanu. Pavuabu babafundile lufu, mvua muanyishe." 
Acts26:11 Misangu mivule mu nzubu ya kutendelela, mvua mbakumisha, mbakolela bua bayile ditaba diabu. Bu mumvua ne lonji lupite, meme kuya too ne ku bimenga bia mu matunga makuabu bua kubakengesha." 
Acts26:12 — Ke mumvua muye mu Damase, ne bukenji buvuabu bampeshe kudi bamfumu ba batuangaji, bua kukumbaja mudimu uvuabu bamfundile." 
Acts26:13 Mukalenga Agripa, mu njila munda munya, meme kumona butoke bufume mu diulu, bukenke buabu bupite bua diba. Kadi buvua buntokesha amu meme ne batuvua nabu." 
Acts26:14 Tuetu bonsu kudishinda panshi. Meme kumvua diyi dingamba mu buena ebrewu ne: “Shawule, Shawule, udi unkengesha bua tshinyi? Bu mudi nyama kayi mua kukandamana padibu bamutuuta, bamuludika kudi mfumu wende ne dikombu, ke muudi kuyi mua kuntuila nkanana.”" 
Acts26:15 Ke meme kuebeja ne: “Kadi, mukalenga, wewe udi nganyi?” Kungandamunaye ne: “Ndi Yezu, uudi ukengesha!" 
Acts26:16 Kadi juka, imana kulu. Ndi mukumuenekele, bualu ndi mukusungule bua wikale muena mudimu wanyi. Neujadikile bantu bakuabu muudi mummone lelu. Neubamanyishe kabidi bimbakuleja pashishe." 
Acts26:17 Nenkulame, bua bena Yuda ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabakuenzedi bibi. Ndi nkutuma kudibu," 
Acts26:18 bua ubatabaje; ubumushe mu miidima, babuele mu butoke; ubapatule ku bumfumu bua diabolu, babuele mu bumfumu bua Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku bobu bangitabe, nebabajimijile mibi yabu. Nebabuele mu tshisumbu tshia bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu.”" 
Acts26:19 — Nanku, mukalenga Agripa, tshivua mubenge bivua Mvidi Mukulu mundeje to." 
Acts26:20 Bangabanga meme kulongesha mu Damase ne mu Yerushalayime, pashishe mu ditunga dijima dia Yudeya, ne mu matunga a bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Mvua mulombe bantu bonsu, bua bandamune ngenzelu yabu, bapingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu, baleje ku malu mimpe adibu benza, mudibu badilengeja." 
Acts26:21 Ke buvua bena Yuda bankuatshile mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bakeba kunshipa." 
Acts26:22 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua mundame too ne ku lelu. Ke muntshidi mua kujadikila bantu bonsu, bana ne bakulumpe, malu a Mvidi Mukulu. Ndi ndongesha amu bivua bambi ne Moshe bamanyishe bantu ne:" 
Acts26:23 Kristu neakenge, neafue, neikale wa kumpala wa kubiika ku bafue. Neamanyishe bena tshisamba tshietu, ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, butoke budi mua kubasungidila." 
Acts26:24 Patshivua Polu ndilumbuluila nanku, Festuse kumuela diyi dikole ne: — Polu, udi mupale anyi? Malu mapite bungi audi mulonge mmanyange lungenyi luebe!" 
Acts26:25 Polu kumuandamuna ne: — Wakunemekibua Festuse, tshiena mupale to. Bindi ngamba bidi bia meji, kabidi mbilelela." 
Acts26:26 Mukalenga Agripa mmumanye bindi ngamba. Bualu ndi mua kumulongesha bionsu patoke. Tshiena ngamba bualu bupiabupia, budiye kayi mumanye. Bionsu ebi ki mbienzeke mu musokoku ku mpenga nansha." 
Acts26:27 Mukalenga Agripa, udi witaba bambi anyi? Ndi mumanye ne: udi ubitaba!" 
Acts26:28 Ke Agripa kuebeja Polu ne: — Udi wela meji ne: amu katupa katudi nebe aka, ukadi mungenze muena Kristu anyi?" 
Acts26:29 Polu kuandamuna ne: — Nansha tuetu bashale nebe katupa kipi, nansha tshitupa tshile, kadi ndi nsengelela Mvidi Mukulu ne: ne wewe, ne nuenu bonsu badi banteleja lelu, numfuane meme. Kadi kanumfuanyi ku nkanu eyi to!" 
Acts26:30 Ke mukalenga Agripa, mulombodi wa ditunga, Berenike, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu, kujuka." 
Acts26:31 Kumukabu, bambilangana ne: — Muntu ewu ki mmuenze bualu bubi bua mua kumushipesha, nansha kumuelesha mu lukanu." 
Acts26:32 Ke mukalenga Agripa kuambila Festuse ne: — Bavua mua kumulekela, yeye kayi mulombe bua kuya kua Kezare." 
Acts27:1 Dituku dituvua ne bua kubuela mu majuwa bua kuya ku Italiya, kufilabu Polu, ne bamue bena lukanu bakuabu, kudi Yuliyuse, mulombodi wa tshisumbu tshia basolayi ba bena Rome, tshiyuabu binyika ne: “Ntshia Kezare,” bua tshibalame bimpe mu njila." 
Acts27:2 Nanku tuetu kubuela mu majuwa a ku Adramite. Majuwa aa avua aya ku bisabu bia mu buloba bua Aziya. Tuvua ne Aristarke, muena Masedoniya, wa mu tshimenga tshia Tesalonike." 
Acts27:3 Butshia, tuetu kufika mu Sidone. Yuliyuse uvua unemeka Polu, wanyisha kabidi bua aye kumonangana ne balunda bende, bua bamupeshe bivuaye ukengela." 
Acts27:4 Bamane kumuka, tuetu kulonda mielelu ya tshidila tshia Shipre, bualu lupepele lukole luvua lufuma kutuvua tuya." 
Acts27:5 Tuetu kusabuka mayi manene pabuipi ne Silisiya ne Pamfiliya, kufika mu Mira mu buloba bua Lisiya." 
Acts27:6 Momu amu mulombodi wa basolayi kupeta majuwa a ku Aleksandriya, avua aya ku Italiya. Ke kutubuejayemu." 
Acts27:7 Matuku mavule majuwa avua enda amu bitekete. Tuvua batate bikole bua kufika pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Knidose. Bu muvua lupepele lutupumbisha mua tuetu kutungunuka luseke alu, tuetu kubenda, batangile ku tshidila tshia Kreta, kupitshila ku lusongu lua buloba bua Salmona." 
Acts27:8 Tuetu kuyila ku mielelu ya tshidila ne lutatu lua bungi, kufika pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Laseya, muaba uvuabu binyika ne: “Tshisabu Tshilenga”." 
Acts27:9 Bu mutuvua bajimije matuku a bungi mu njila, mukavua njiwu bua kutungunuka ne luendu lua majuwa, bualu matuku a tshijila a mu ntuadijilu wa muvu wa mashika akavua mamane kupita. Ke Polu kuambila bavua mu majuwa ne:" 
Acts27:10 — Bana betu, ndi mumone ne: luendu elu nebikale ne njiwu. Majuwa ne bintu bidi mua kunyanguka. Tuetu mene tudi mua kufuilamu." 
Acts27:11 Kadi mulombodi wa basolayi kavua bualu ne miaku ya Polu. Uvua muitabe amu bivua muendeshi wa majuwa, ne muenawu, bamuambile." 
Acts27:12 Luseke lukuabu katuvua ne mushindu wa kupitshisha bimpe tshikondu tshia mashika mu tshisabu atshi to. Ke pavua bantu ba bungi bavua mu majuwa bajinga kumuka, bua kufika mu tshisabu tshia Fenikse, bu biobi mua kuenzeka. Tshisabu atshi tshivua mu tshidila tshia Kreta, luseke ludi diba dibuelela luatshi. Tshivua muaba muimpe wa tuetu kupitshisha muvu wa mashika." 
Acts27:13 Kapepe kavua kafuma kuinshi kua ditunga. Bantu kuela meji ne: tudi mua kukumbaja mutudi tujinga. Nanku kupatulabu longu mu mayi. Bavua bendesha majuwa, balamata menemene ku muelelu wa tshidila tshia Kreta." 
Acts27:14 Kadi bu mpindiewu tshipepele tshikole kufuma ku mikuna ya tshidila, luseke lua ku mutu luatshi." 
Acts27:15 Kukokatshi majuwa, kaayi mua kukandamana. Tuetu kupueka," 
Acts27:16 kupitshila kuinshi kua tshidila tshikese tshia Kawuda, muaba uvua tshipepele tshituya kakese. Ke tuetu kuenza muetu muonsu bua kujula buatu bukese buvua mu mayi." 
Acts27:17 Bendeshi kububandisha mu majuwa. Pashishe kujingilabu majuwa majima nshinga, bua kaatayiki. Bu muvuabu batshina ne: tudi mua kujama ku nsenga idi ku muelelu wa ditunga dia Libiya, kusululabu longu lukuabu luvua lulelema pa mayi. Ke majuwa kudipuekela ne lupepele." 
Acts27:18 Bu muvua tshipepele tshitubukula amu bikole, butshia kutuadijabu kuela bintu bikuabu bia bujitu mu mayi." 
Acts27:19 Dituku divua dilonda, bendeshi kudielela ne biamu mene bia majuwa mu mayi." 
Acts27:20 Matuku a bungi, katuvua tumona diba, nansha mitotu. Tshipepele tshivua amu tshikole. Katuvua kabidi batekemene ne: netupande to." 
Acts27:21 Bantu bavua mu majuwa, matuku mavule kabavua nansha badia. Nanku Polu kuimana kulu kumpala kuabu, ubambila ne: — Bana betu, nuvua mua kunteleja, tuetu kushala mu Kreta. Nanku bintu bietu kabivua mua kunyanguka, nansha kujimina to." 
Acts27:22 Kadi mpindiewu ndi nnulomba ne: kolayi muoyi. Wa kunudi nansha umue kakufua to. Anu majuwa nkayawu neajimine mu mayi. 
Acts27:23 Butuku ebu, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu undi ngitaba, nkuatshila mudimu, mmummuenekele." 
Acts27:24 Kungambilaye ne: “Polu, kutshinyi to. Neumonangane ne Kezare. Bu mudi Mvidi Mukulu mukunange, neakupandishe ne bonsu baudi nabu mu majuwa emu.”" 
Acts27:25 Nanku, bana betu, koleshayi muoyi. Ndi mutekemene Mvidi Mukulu: neakumbaje bionsu bidiye mungambile." 
Acts27:26 Kadi tshipepele netshituele ku muelelu wa tshidila kampanda. 
Acts27:27 Tshipepele tshikavua tshitusaka matuku dikumi ne anayi mu Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga. Kadi mundankulu bendeshi ba majuwa kumvua ne: tukadi basemena ku mukuna. 
Acts27:28 Kuelabu nshinga musuika tshintu tshia bujitu mu mayi, bua kuteta bondoke buawu. Kusanganabu bondoke bua metre makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete. Basemena katupa kumpala, kuelabu tshiakabidi nshinga. Kusanganabu bondoke bua metre makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu." 
Acts27:29 Bavua batshina bua majuwa kaayi kudituuta ku mabue. Ke kuelabu ndongu inayi kunyima kua majuwa, bindila ne mioyi kulukulu ne butuku butshie." 
Acts27:30 Bendeshi bavua bakeba kunyema mu majuwa. Kutululabu buatu bukese mu mayi, badinga bantu ne: tudi tuya kuela ndongu kumpala kua majuwa." 
Acts27:31 Ke Polu kuambila mulombodi ne basolayi ne: — Pikala bantu aba kabayi bashala mu majuwa, kanuena nupanda to." 
Acts27:32 Ke basolayi kukosa nshinga ya buatu bukese, bua bupueke ne mayi." 
Acts27:33 Butuku kabuyi buanji kutshia, Polu kulomba bantu bonsu bua badie. Uvua wamba ne: — Kukadi matuku dikumi ne anayi mpindiewu anudi bashale kanuyi badie." 
Acts27:34 Nenku ndi nnulomba bua nudie. Amu nuenu badie, ke kushisha kushala ne muoyi. Muntu nansha umue wa kunudi kakujimija lusuki lua ku mutu wende to." 
Acts27:35 Polu mumane kuamba nanku, kuangataye diampa, kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bonsu bateleja. Pashishe kudikosaye, kudia." 
Acts27:36 Bonsu kukolesha muoyi, kudia." 
Acts27:37 Mu majuwa bonsu basanga tuvua bantu nkama ibidi makumi muanda mutekete ne basambombu. 
Acts27:38 Bantu bamane kudia kuukuta, kuimanshabu ntete mikuabu mu mayi, bua majuwa apepele." 
Acts27:39 Butshia, bendeshi ba majuwa kabavua bamanye muaba utuvua. Kadi bavua bamona amu tshibungubungu ne lusenga. Kuambabu ne: tuidikije mua kufikaku ne majuwa." 
Acts27:40 Kukosabu ndongu, kuyilekela mu mayi. Kusululabu kabidi ne mionji ya biamu bia kuludika nabi majuwa. Pashishe kubandishabu tshilamba tshia ku mutshi uvua kumpala mu majuwa, bua lupepele lusemeje majuwa, aye mu lusenga." 
Acts27:41 Kadi kufikabu pa muaba wa lusenga pankatshi pa mayi, ku dia bakaji muenji uya luseke elu, ku dia balume muenji uya luseke lukuabu. Majuwa kujaminapu. Mutu wa majuwa kudina mu lusenga, kaayi mua kunyunga. Mavuala makole kutshibula tshiamanda tshiawu." 
Acts27:42 Basolayi bavua basue kushipa bena lukanu bonsu, bua muntu nansha umue wa kudibu kanyemi mu mayi." 
Acts27:43 Kadi bu muvua mulombodi wabu musue kupandisha Polu, kuambilaye basolayi bende ne: “Kanuenji nanku to!” Kutumaye kabidi diyi, bua bavua bamanye kuowela, badianjile kudiela mu mayi, baye ku mukuna." 
Acts27:44 Bantu bakuabu bavua ne bua kusabukila pa mabaya, nansha pa bitupa bikuabu bia majuwa. Ke muvua bantu bonsu bafike ku mukuna ne muoyi nanku." 
Acts28:1 Tuetu bamane kupanduka, tuakumvua bantu binyika tshidila etshi ne: “Malta.”" 
Acts28:2 Bena tshidila kubakidila bimpe bitambe. Muvua mashika makole, bualu mvula uvua uloka wa bungi. Nanku kutemeshabu kapia, tuetu kusemena bonsu bua kuota." 
Acts28:3 Polu kuangula nkunyi bua kuela mu kapia. Nyoka kupatukamu, unyema luya, kumusuma ku tshianza." 
Acts28:4 Pavua bena ditunga bamona nyoka mulembelela ku tshianza tshia Polu, kuambilanganabu ne: — Bushuwa, ewu mmushipianganyi. Nansha yeye mupanduke ku mayi, Mvidi Mukulu udi amu umunyoka!" 
Acts28:5 Kadi Polu kunyukula tshianza, nyoka kumata mu kapia. Kabivua bimusama nansha." 
Acts28:6 Bakuabu bavua bela meji ne: Polu neuwule mubidi, nansha neadishinde panshi, afile. Kuindilabu tshitupa tshile, nansha kumona bualu. Ke kuelabu meji makuabu, bamba ne: muntu ewu mmvidie." 
Acts28:7 Pabuipi ne muaba awu pavua lupangu lua Publiyuse, mfumu wa tshidila. Muntu ewu kutuakidila bimpe. Tuetu kulala kuende matuku asatu." 
Acts28:8 Tatuende wa Publiyuse uvua mu bulalu, usama mubidi luya, ne munda mua mukungulu. Polu kuya kumumona, kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu. Kutentekaye muntu awu bianza, yeye kumvua bimpe." 
Acts28:9 Ke babeedi bakuabu ba mu tshidila kufika. Masama abu kujika. 
Acts28:10 Bena mu tshidila kudisankisha ne bintu bishilangane. Diba dia kulayangana nabu, kutupabu bionsu bituvua tukengela bua luendu." 
Acts28:11 Kunyima kua ngondu isatu, tuetu kubuela mu majuwa a ku Aleksandriya, avua dina ne: “Mvidie ya Mapasa. ” Avua mashale mu tshidila ngondu yonsu ya muvu wa mashika." 
Acts28:12 Nanku tuetu kufika nawu mu tshimenga tshia Sirakuse, kushalamu matuku asatu." 
Acts28:13 Tumukamu, tuetu kulonda muelelu wa mayi, kufika ku Rejiyo. Butshia lupepele kujuka luseke lua kuinshi kua ditunga. Tuetu kuenda amu matuku abidi tshianana, kufika mu Putiyoli." 
Acts28:14 Mu tshimenga etshi tuetu kusangana bena tshisumbu tshietu. Bavua balomba bua tushale nabu lumingu lujima. Ke mutuakafika ku Rome nanku. 
Acts28:15 Bena ditaba ba mu Rome bavua bamane kumvua lumu lua difika dietu. Kuvuabu too ne ku Tshisalu tshia Apiyuse, ne ku Nzubu isatu ya Tshiala benyi, bua kutuakidila. Amu Polu ubamona, kukolaye muoyi, wela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila." 
Acts28:16 Tuetu bamane kufika mu Rome, kuanyishabu bua Polu ashale pa nkayende, bamulama amu kudi musolayi umue." 
Acts28:17 Kupita matuku asatu, Polu kubikidisha bakulu ba bena Yuda bavua mu Rome. Bamane kusangila, kubambilaye ne: — Bana betu, tshiyi muenzele tshisamba tshietu bualu bubi, tshiyi munyange bibidilu bia bankambua betu, bavua bankuata mu Yerushalayime. Kumfilabu mu bianza bia bena Rome." 
Acts28:18 Aba bamane kunkonkoloja, bavua basue kundekela, bualu kabavua bansangana ne tshilumbu tshia mua kumfundila lufu." 
Acts28:19 Kadi bena Yuda kubenga ne: “Ka-numulekedi!” Ke meme kulomba ne: nutume tshilumbu tshianyi kua Kezare. Kadi tshiena ne muoyi wa kufunda tshisamba tshietu, bua kulumbulula natshi." 
Acts28:20 Ke pandi mulombe bua kumonangana nenu apa. mBansuike lukanu elu, bualu bua muntu ewu udi bena Izrayele bonsu batekemena." 
Acts28:21 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Bena Yuda ki mbatutumine mukanda nansha umue udi utangila bualu buebe. Muanetu nansha umue ki mmufume kuntu aku, bua kutuambila bualu bubi buudi muenze, nansha kutujadikila malu ebe." 
Acts28:22 Nanku tudi basue kudiumvuila meji audi wela. Bualu tudi bamanye ne: tshisumbu tshiudi mubuele atshi, miaba yonsu bantu badi batshibenga." 
Acts28:23 Dituku divuabu bumvuangana ne Polu, bantu bapite bungi kufika muaba uvuaye ulala. Polu kubalongesha ku dinda too ne ku dilolu, kubumvuija bimpe malu a Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua utela miaku ya mu Mikenji ya Moshe, ne ya mu mikanda ya Bambi, ukeba amu bua bitabe Yezu." 
Acts28:24 Bamue bavua bitaba, bakuabu babenga." 
Acts28:25 Bu muvuabu kabayi basue kumyuangana, bakavua bakeba kutangalaka. Ke Polu kubambila amu ne: — Miaku ivua Mueyelu wa Tshijila muambile bankambua benu mukana mua muambi Yeshaya, ivua pa bualu!" 
Acts28:26 Uvua muambe ne: “Uye, wambile bena tshisamba etshi ne: Nenuteleje, kanuyi nujingulula; nenutangile, kanuyi numona tshintu." 
Acts28:27 Bualu nuenu bena tshisamba etshi, nudi bapapishe muoyi wenu, nudi bajibike matshi, babuite ku mesu. Nudi nubenga kumona, nubenga kumvua, nubenga kujingulula malu, nubenga kupingana kundi, bua meme kunupandisha. ”" 
Acts28:28 Ndi nnuambila ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmutumine bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mukenji wa lupandu, bualu bobu nebauteleje! [" 
Acts28:29 Polu wamba nanku, bena Yuda kutangalakangana, benda belangana mpata mikole. ]" 
Acts28:30 Polu kushala bidimu bibidi bijima mu nzubu uvuaye ufutshila. Uvua uyukila ne bonsu bavua baya kumonangana nende. 
Acts28:31 Uvua umanyisha malu a Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu, ulongesha ne muoyi mukole, bidi bitangila Mfumu Yezu Kristu, kabayi bamukandika." 
Romans1:1 Meme Polu, muena mudimu wa Yezu Kristu, udi Mvidi Mukulu mubikile bua ngikale mupostolu, udiye musungule bua mmanyishe bantu Lumu luende lua Disanka, ndi nnutumina mukanda ewu." 
Romans1:2 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumane kutulaya Lumu lua Disanka elu ku kale mukana mua bambi bende. Bavua balufunde mu Mikanda ya tshijila. 
Romans1:3 Uvua mulukumbaje kudi Muanende Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, uvuabu balele ne mubidi wa muntu mu diku dia mukalenga Davide;" 
Romans1:4 kadi ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila uvua umueneka Muana wa butumbi wa Mvidi Mukulu, pavuabu bamubisha ku lufu." 
Romans1:5 Kudiye ke kudi Mvidi Mukulu mumpeshe dipa dia kuikala mupostolu, bua meme kusaka bantu ba bisamba bionsu, bua bitabe Lumu lua Disanka, batumikile Mvidi Mukulu, bua dina dia Yezu dipete lumu." 
Romans1:6 Nuenu kabidi nudi bamue ba ku bantu abu. Mvidi Mukulu mmunubikile bua nuikale bantu ba Yezu Kristu. 
Romans1:7 Nuenu bonsu badi mu Rome, badi Mvidi Mukulu unanga, badiye mubikile bua nuikale bende ba tshijila, ndi nnutumina mukanda ewu. Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu, ne bia kudi Mfumu Yezu Kristu, bishindame munda muenu." 
Romans1:8 Bangabanga ndi ngela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, mu dina dia Yezu Kristu, bualu buenu bonsu. Bualu mu buloba bujima badi bayukila bua ditaba dienu." 
Romans1:9 Mvidi Mukulu undi nkuatshila mudimu ne muoyi wanyi onsu, bualu ndi ndongesha Lumu lua Disanka lua Muanende, mmumanye ne: bualu bundi ngamba mbulelela. Udi mumanye kabidi mundi nnuvuluka diba dionsu," 
Romans1:10 misangu yonsu indi ntendelela. Ndi ndomba kudi Mvidi Mukulu, pikalaye musue, bua ampeteshe mushindu wa meme kufika kuenu." 
Romans1:11 Bualu ndi njinga bikole kunumona, bua kunutuadila mapa makuabu a Mueyelu wa Tshijila adi mua kunukolesha mu ditaba." 
Romans1:12 Ndi ngamba ne: ndi njinga kuikala munkatshi muenu, bua tukoleshangane ku muoyi mu ditaba, meme nkolesha ditaba dienu, nuenu nukolesha dianyi." 
Romans1:13 Bana hetu, ndi musue mmanye ne: mvua mujadike misangu ne misangu bua kufika kuenu aku. Kadi too ne lelu bavua amu bampumbishe. Mvua mujinge bua mudimu undi nkuata upete tshipeta ne kuenu kabidi, bu mudiwu wenda udiunda mu matunga makuabu a pa buloba." 
Romans1:14 Bualu ndi muena dibanza kudi bantu bonsu, kudi badi bashidimuke ne badi kabayi bashidimuke, kudi bavua balonge ne bavua kabayi balonge." 
Romans1:15 Ke pandi njinga kunutuadila nuenu kabidi badi basomba mu Rome Lumu lua Disanka. 
Romans1:16 Nanku tshiena ne bowa pandi ndongesha Lumu lua Disanka. Bualu ludi bukole budi Mvidi Mukulu ukuata nabu mudimu, bua kusungidila bantu bonsu badi bitaba, kutuadija ne bena Yuda, pashishe ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Romans1:17 Bualu Lumu lua Disanka ludi luleja mudi Mvidi Mukulu ubingisha bantu ku mesu kuende, amu bua ditaba nkayadi. Biangatshile ku ntuadijilu too ne ku ndekelu njila wa kulonda udi amu wa ditaba. Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Udi ubinga ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu bua ditaba, neikale ne muoyi. ”" 
Romans1:18 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi ufikila munda mu diulu, bua bubi buonsu ne malu mabi onsu, bidi bantu benza ku buenzavi buabu, bakandika bulelela bua kabukuatshi mudimu pa wowu." 
Romans1:19 Mvidi Mukulu udi ubanyoka, bualu bia Mvidi Mukulu bidi bantu mua kumanya bidi bimueneka ku mesu kuabu. Mvidi Mukulu nkayende mmubalejebi patoke." 
Romans1:20 Bualu katshia Mvidi Mukulu ufuka buloba, bilenga biende bidi kabiyi bimueneka ku mesu, — nkuamba ne: bukole buende bua tshiendelele, ne bu-Mvidi Mukulu buende, — bidi bimueneka mu midimu ivuaye muenze. Ke muaba udi bantu mua kubimanya. Nanku badi bapila ku mesu kuende." 
Romans1:21 Bualu badi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu, kadi kabena bamunemeka. Kabena bamuela tuasakidila mudibu ne bua kuela Mvidi Mukulu nansha. Kadi meji abu adi matatakana. Mioyi yabu ya bupote idi miwule tente ne miidima." 
Romans1:22 Badi baditemba ne: tudi bena meji, kadi badi bantu bapale." 
Romans1:23 Pa mutu pa kukukuila Mvidi Mukulu wa butumbi udi kayi ufua, badi batendelela mpingu ya bantu badi bafua, ya nyunyi, ya nyama ya bidimba binayi, ne ya bilandadi." 
Romans1:24 Ke pavua Mvidi Mukulu mubafile ku nkuka idi mu mioyi yabu, bua kuenzabu malu a bundu, babuelelangana mu nzubu." 
Romans1:25 Badi bumusha bulelela budi butangila Mvidi Mukulu, bapingaja dishima. Badi batendelela bintu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mufuke, babikuatshila mudimu, pa mutu pa kutendelela Mubifuki, kumuenzela Yeye nkayende mudimu. Yeye mene atumbe kashidi! Amene." 
Romans1:26 Ke pavua Mvidi Mukulu mubafde ku bijingajinga bia bundu. Bakaji babu mene badi balekela bulongolodi bua Mvidi Mukulu, bua kubuelelangana mu nzubu." 
Romans1:27 Momumue kabidi balume badi babenga kubuelela bakaji babu mu nzubu. Mioyi idi ibajukuka kapia bua kusaminanganabu muoyi. Balume nkayabu badi benzelangana malu a bundu. Ke mudibu bapeta bobu nkayabu dinyoka dikumbanyina bubi buabu. 
Romans1:28 Bu muyuabu babenga kumanya Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu mmubafile ku butshimbakane, bua kuenzabu bivuabu kabayi mua kuenza." 
Romans1:29 Badi buwule tente ne malu mabi a mishindu yonsu: bubi, lukuka, tshikisu; badi ne lubabu munda tente, bashipangana, batandangana; bikale kabidi ne budimu, kabidi ne bibidilu bibi. Badi bena lubuakabuaka," 
Romans1:30 bajanangana; badi bakina Mvidi Mukulu, baleja dikamakama, baditambisha, baditemba. Badi bela meji ku malu mabi mapiamapia adibu mua kuenza. Badi batombokela baledi babu." 
Romans1:31 Kondu kabu ka munda kakena kabapisha ku bualu nansha bumue. Kabena bakumbaja bidibu balaya. Badi ne muoyi mupape, kabayi bafuila bantu luse." 
Romans1:32 Badi bamanye bimpe tshilumbuluilu tshia Mvidi Mukulu, bamanye mudi bantu badi benza malu a mushindu ewu bakumbanyina lufu. Kadi badi amu batungunuka ne dienza dia malu a nanku, batua kabidi benji ba malu mabi makumbu." 
Romans2:1 Nanku wewe udi ulumbuluisha bakuabu, kuena mubinge, nansha wewe nnganyi ne nnganyi. Bualu paudi ulumbuluisha bakuabu, wenza kabidi malu adibu benza, udi udipisha wewe nkayebe." 
Romans2:2 Tudi bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi upisha amu pa bualu bantu badi benza malu a nanku. 
Romans2:3 Wewe udi ulumbuluisha badi benza malu a nanku, wenza kabidi a momumue, udi wela meji ne: neupanduke ku tshilumbuluilu tshia Mvidi Mukulu anyi?" 
Romans2:4 Udi upepeja dinanga dikole didi Mvidi Mukulu utuleja, lutulu luende, kabidi ne muoyi wende wa kalolu anyi? Kuena mumanye ne: dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu ukuleja didi ne bua kukusaka bua udilengeje anyi?" 
Romans2:5 Kadi udi ne muoyi mupape. Kuena musue kudilengeja. Ke muudi udikebela dinyoka dipite bunene, dituku diamueneka tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu, diakosaye nsambu pa yoyi." 
Romans2:6 Dituku adi Mvidi Mukulu neafute muntu yonsu bilondeshile bivuaye muenze. 
Romans2:7 Bavua bananukila mu dienza dia malu mimpe ke bavua bakeba butumbi, lumu, ne bidi kabiyi bifua. Neabapeshe muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
Romans2:8 Kadi bavua bamutombokela, babenga bulelela, badifila ku malu mabi, neabaleje tshiji tshiende ne kanyinganyinga kende." 
Romans2:9 Makenga ne ntatu nebikuate bonsu badi benza bibi, bangabanga bena Yuda, pashishe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabidi." 
Romans2:10 Kadi bonsu badi benza bimpe, Mvidi Mukulu neabapeshe butumbi, lumu ne bupole, bangabanga bena Yuda, pashishe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabidi." 
Romans2:11 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu kena ne kansungasunga kudi bantu. 
Romans2:12 Bonsu badi benza malu mabi, kabayi bamanye mikenji ya Moshe, nebafue, kabayi bapila ku mikenji. Kadi bonsu badi benza malu mabi, bamanye mikenji, nebabalumbuluishe bilondeshile mikenji." 
Romans2:13 Bualu bantu badi basankisha Mvidi Mukulu ki mbadi bateleja mikenji patupu, kadi amu badi batumikila bidiyi ibafundila." 
Romans2:14 Padi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, badi kabayi bamanye mikenji ya bena Yuda, batumikila bobu nkayabu bidi mikenji ifunda, badi badielela mikenji nkayabu, nansha bobu kabayi ne mikenji." 
Romans2:15 Badi baleja mudi malu adi mikenji yamba mafunde mu mioyi yabu. Kondu kabu ka munda kabidi kadi kabamanyisha nanku. Meji adibu bela adi abaleja misangu idibu benza bimpe, ne misangu idibu benza bibi." 
Romans2:16 Lumu lua Disanka lundi ndongesha ludi luamba ne: dituku diakosa Mvidi Mukulu nsambu kudi Yezu Kristu, bionsu bidi bisokome mu mioyi ya bantu abi nebimueneke patoke." 
Romans2:17 Kadi wewe udi witaba ne: ndi muena Yuda. Udi ushindamena pa mikenji, uditemba bualu bua Mvidi Mukulu webe." 
Romans2:18 Udi mumanye bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Mikenji ivua mikulongeshe muudi mua kusunguluja tshidi tshimpe. 
Romans2:19 Udi udiumvua muudi mulombodi wa bampofu, muudi butoke bua badi mu miidima," 
Romans2:20 muudi muludiki wa badi kabayi bamanye malu, mulongeshi wa bana. Bualu udi mujadike ne: pandi mumanye mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, ndi mumanye malu onsu anu mudiwu mu bulelela." 
Romans2:21 Kadi wewe udi ulongesha bakuabu, kuena udilongesha wewe mene bua tshinyi? Udi ulongesha bakuabu ne: kanuena mua kuiba. Kadi wewe mene udi wiba bua tshinyi?" 
Romans2:22 Udi wamba ne: kanuena mua kuenda buendenda. Kadi wewe udi wenda buendenda bua tshinyi? Udi upepeja nwidie, kadi udi wiba bidi mu nzubu ya nwidie bualu kaayi?" 
Romans2:23 Udi uditambisha, bualu udi mumanye mikenji. Kadi kuena unemeka Mvidi Mukulu, paudi wenza bidi mikenji ibenga!" 
Romans2:24 Bualu Mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Buenu nuenu bena Yuda, ke budibu bampendela kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Romans2:25 Paudi utumikila mikenji, dikuteka panshi nedikuambuluishe. Kadi paudi kuyi utumikila mikenji, udi amu bu muntu udibu kabayi bateke panshi." 
Romans2:26 Pikala muntu uvuabu kabayi bateke panshi, utumikila mikenji, Mvidi Mukulu kena mua kumulumbuluisha bu muntu uvuabu bateke panshi anyi?" 
Romans2:27 Muntu udibu kabayi bateke panshi mu mubidi wende, kadi udi ukumbaja mikenji, neakulumbuluishe wewe udi kuyi ukumbaja mikenji, nansha wewe mumanye mikenji ivuabu bafunde, nansha bamane kukuteka panshi mene." 
Romans2:28 Bualu muena Yuda wa menemene, ki mmuntu udi umueneka amu bu muena Yuda nansha; ki ngudibu bateke panshi mu mubidi wende, amu mushindu udi bantu mua kumona to." 
Romans2:29 Kadi muena Yuda mulelela ke udi muena Yuda mundamunda muende, ke udibu bateke panshi mu muoyi wende. Mbamuteke nanku kudi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabiyi bilondeshile mikenji mifunda nansha. Muena Yuda wa bushiwa awu neapete lumu luende kudi Mvidi Mukulu, ki nkudi bantu to." 
Romans3:1 Nanku muena Yuda utshidi mupite bakuabu ku tshinyi? Kuteka muntu panshi kutshidi ne mushinga anyi? 
Romans3:2 Mushinga wa bionsu abi mmunene. Bangabanga bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mudianze kumanyisha bena Yuda miaku yende. 
Romans3:3 Kadi tudi mua kuamba tshinyi, padi bamue ba kudibu kabayi bakumbaja bivuabu bamulaye? Mvidi Mukulu neabenge kukumbaja bivuaye mubalaye, bualu bobu kabena babikumbaje anyi?" 
Romans3:4 Nansha kakese! Nansha bantu bonsu bikale bena dishima, Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bua kuikala muena diyi dimue. Ke mudi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Badi ne bua kumanya muudi ukumbaja biudi wamba, muudi ubinga padibu bakeba kukulumbuluisha. ”" 
Romans3:5 Kadi padi malu mabi atudi tuenza aleja mudi Mvidi Mukulu ubinga, tudi mua kuamba tshinyi? Nanku Mvidi Mukulu udi upila padiye utunyoka anyi? (Ndi ngakula mudi bantu bakula.)" 
Romans3:6 Kabiena nanku nansha! Bualu bu Mvidi Mukulu mua kupila, mmunyi mudiye mua kulumbuluisha bukua panu?" 
Romans3:7 Kadi padi dishima dianyi dileja patoke menemene bulelela bua Mvidi Mukulu, dilengelela nanku butumbi buende, mudibu ne bua kumpisha kabidi bu muntu udi wenza bibi mbishi?" 
Romans3:8 Nanku diba adi katuena mua kuamba ne: “Tuenze malu mabi, bua bubi butupeteshe malu mimpe” anyi? Bualu bamue bantu bua kunjana, badi bansonguela, bamba ne: Polu udi ulongesha malu a nanku. Bantu aba Mvidi Mukulu neabanyoke dinyoka dibakumbanyina!" 
Romans3:9 Kadi bualu ebu budi bishi? Tuetu bena Yuda tudi bapite bantu bakuabu anyi? Nansha kakese! Nkadi mumane kumvuija ne: bantu bonsu, ne bena Yuda, ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, badi ku bumfumu bua bubi." 
Romans3:10 Mukanda wa tshijila udi ujadika ne: “Kakuena muntu udi wenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue," 
Romans3:11 kakuena muntu udi umvua bualu, kakuena nansha umue udi ukeba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans3:12 Bonsu mbapambuke mu njila muimpe, bonsu pamue mbashiye njila mululame. Kakuena udi wenza malu mimpe, kakuena nansha umue." 
Romans3:13 Mukana muabu mudi bu lukita lumbula lushala buashi, ludimi luabu ludi lubambuluisha bua kushima, miaku idi ipatukila ku mishiku yabu idi bu lulengu lua nyoka." 
Romans3:14 Mukana muabu mmuwule ne mitshipu, kabidi ne miaku mibi." 
Romans3:15 Badi banyema lukasa bua kushipa bantu. 
Romans3:16 Miaba yonsu idibu baya, badi babutula bantu, babashiya mu dikenga." 
Romans3:17 Kabena bamanye njila wa bupole. 
Romans3:18 Badi basomba, kabayi batshina Mvidi Mukulu. ”" 
Romans3:19 Tudi bamanye ne: bionsu bidi mikenji itela, idi ibiambila bantu badi ku bumfumu bua mikenji, bua bantu kabapetshi mushindu wa kudibingisha, kabidi bua bantu bonsu ba pa buloba bamueneke ne tshilumbu ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans3:20 Kakuena muntu udi mua kubinga ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu, bualu muntu nansha umue kena ukumbaja bidi mikenji yamba. Mikenji idi yambuluisha amu bantu bua bamanye muyuabu benze malu mabi." 
Romans3:21 Kadi lelu, Mvidi Mukulu mmutuleje mudiye utubingisha kumpala kuende, kabiyi bua dikumbaja dia mikenji. Mikenji ne bambi bivua bimane kujadika ne:" 
Romans3:22 Mvidi Mukulu udi ubingisha bantu kumpala kuende amu bua ditaba diabu mu Yezu Kristu. Bonsu badi bitaba Yezu Kristu, udi ubenzela nanku, bualu bonsu badi mushindu umue." 
Romans3:23 Bonsu mbenze malu mabi. Bonsu mbabule butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu. 
Romans3:24 Kadi bu mudi Mvidi Mukulu ubananga, udi ubabingisha kumpala kuende patupu, kudi Yezu Kristu udi ubapikula ku bubi." 
Romans3:25 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mufile Yezu Kristu bu mulambu, bua bantu badi bamuitaba bapete dijimija dia mibi ku lufu luende. Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu musue kuleja mudiye ubinga: kale uvua ulama lutulu, kayi unyoka bantu bua malu abu mabi." 
Romans3:26 Kadi mu tshikondu tshia mpindiewu, udi uleja mushindu udiye ubingisha bantu ku mesu kuende. Bualu Yeye mene udi musue kubinga, kabidi udi musue kuhingisha bonsu badi bitaba Yezu Kristu." 
Romans3:27 Nanku kutshidi tshintu tshidi bantu mua kuditemba natshi anyi? Nansha kakese! Katshienaku nansha tshimue. Katshienaku bua tshinyi? Badi mua kuditemba bua mikenji idi ibafundila mudimu wa kuenza anyi? Nansha kakese! Amu mikenji idi ibafikishaku ditaba ke idi ne bualu. 
Romans3:28 Bualu tudi tuitaba ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ubingisha muntu bualu bua ditaba diende, ki mbua padiye ukumbaja mikenji nansha." 
Romans3:29 Tudi mua kuamba ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi amu wa bena Yuda nkayabu anyi? Kena Mvidi Mukulu wa bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabidi anyi? Bushuwa, udi kabidi Mvidi Mukulu wa bantu ba bisamba bikuabu," 
Romans3:30 bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi amu umuepele. Neabingishe bena Yuda amu ku ditaba, ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabidi amu ku ditaba." 
Romans3:31 Nanku bualu bua ditaba tudi tunyanga mushinga wonsu wa mikenji anyi? Nansha kakese! Ke mutudi tuangata mikenji ne mushinga wayi menemene. 
Romans4:1 Nanku netuambe bishi bua nkambua wetu Abrahame? Tshivuaye mupete ku bivuaye muenze ntshinyi? 
Romans4:2 Bu Abrahame mubinge ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu bua bivuaye muenze, uvua mua kuditambisha. Kadi kena mua kuditambisha kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu nansha." 
Romans4:3 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Abrahame uvua mutekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Ke Mvidi Mukulu kumulumbuluisha, kumubingisha amu bua ditaba diende. ”" 
Romans4:4 Muntu udi ukuata mudimu, badi bamufuta. Difutu adi kabena badibala bu tshintu tshimupa patupu nansha: ntshintu tshiende tshivuaye ne bua kupeta." 
Romans4:5 Kadi diba didi muntu kayi wenza bualu, utekemena amu kudi Mvidi Mukulu udi ufuila bantu babi luse. Mvidi Mukulu udi umubingisha bua ditaba diende adi." 
Romans4:6 Ke padi Davide umvuija disanka didi muntu upeta, padi Mvidi Mukulu umubingisha kabiyi bua midimu ivuaye mukuate, wamba ne:" 
Romans4:7 “Bena diakalenga mbadi Mvidi Mukulu ufuila luse, badiye ujimijila mibi yabu!" 
Romans4:8 Muena diakalenga mmuntu udi Mvidi Mukulu kayi utangila bu muena tshibawu! ” 
Romans4:9 Amu bantu badibu bateke panshi ke badi ne diakalenga edi anyi? Nansha kakese! Badibu kabayi bateke panshi kabena nadi anyi? Tudi tufuma ku diamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubingishe Abrahame amu bua ditaba diende.” 
Romans4:10 Bine abi mbienzeke diba kayi? Divuabu bamane kumuteka panshi anyi divuabu kabayi banji kumuteka panshi? Ki ndivuabu bamane kumuteka panshi nansha, kadi kumpala!" 
Romans4:11 Kunyima kua matuku mavule bakateka Abrahame panshi, bua bikale bu tshimanyinu tshidi tshileja ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumutue tshitampi, bualu mmumubingishe amu bua ditaba, pavuabu kabayi banji kumuteka panshi. Nenku Abrahame udi tatu wa bantu bonsu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu, nansha kabayi babateka panshi, kabidi badi Mvidi Mukulu ubingisha." 
Romans4:12 Udi kabidi tatu wa badibu bateke panshi, kadi badi kabayi batekemena amu ku diteka panshi diabu adi. Badi balonda njila wa ditaba uvua Abrahame mulonde, nansha pavuabu kabayi banji kumuteka panshi." 
Romans4:13 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mulaye Abrahame ne ndelanganyi yende ne: nenupete buloba. Kavua mumulaye dilaya edi, bualu Abrahame uvua mukumbaje mikenji nansha, kadi amu bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumubingishe bua ditaba divuaye nadi." 
Romans4:14 Pikala amu badi bakumbaja mikenji mua kupeta bilenga bivua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye, nanku ditaba kadiena ne mushinga to. Nansha dilaya mene dia Mvidi Mukulu didi patupu." 
Romans4:15 Bualu mikenji idi ijudija Mvidi Mukulu tshiji. Kadi muaba udi kauyi mikenji, dibenga kuitaba mikenji kadienaku to." 
Romans4:16 Nanku Abrahame uvua mupete dilaya amu bua ditaba, bua dikale dipa didi Mvidi Mukulu upa tshianana. Ke padi dilaya edi ne mushinga mu ndelanganyi yonsu ya Abrahame, kadiyi amu bua badi bakumbaja mikenji, kadi kabidi bua badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu mushindu uvua Abrahame mumuitabe. Abrahame udi tatu wetu bonsu," 
Romans4:17 mudi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Meme kukuenza nkambua wa bisamba bivule. ” Udi tatu wetu kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu uvuaye muitabe. Ke Mvidi Mukulu udi ubisha bantu ku lufu; udi ushindika bidi kabiyiku bua bikaleku. 
Romans4:18 Abrahame uvua muitabe, mutekemene kabidi bivuaye kayi mua kutekemena. Ke yeye kuenza “nkambua wa bisamba bi-vule,” bilondeshile bivua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile ne: “Ndelanganyi yebe neyikale bungi bua momumue ne mitotu. ”" 
Romans4:19 Ukavua ne bidimu bu lukama. Kadi uvua amu muitabe bikole, kayi uteketa, nansha diba di vuaye wela meji ku mubidi wende ukavua bu tshitalu, ne kudi Sara, muena kuende, uvua kayi mua kupeta muana." 
Romans4:20 Kavua ujimija njila wa ditaba, kavua wela mpata ku bivua Mvidi Mukulu mumulaye nansha. Kadi ditaba diende divua dimukolesha ku muoyi. Ke yeye kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans4:21 Uvua mujadike menemene ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole bua kukumbaja bivuaye mulaye. 
Romans4:22 Ke pavua “Mvidi Mukulu mubingishe Abrahame” amu bua ditaba diende. 
Romans4:23 Kadi miaku idibu bafunde ne: “Uvua mubingishe Abrahame,” kabena bayifunde amu bua Abrahame nkayende nansha." 
Romans4:24 Bavua bayifunde kabidi ne buetu tuetu, badi Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kuhingisha, bualu tudi tuitaba uvua mubishe Yezu Mfumu wetu ku lufu, mumupingajile muoyi." 
Romans4:25 Bayua bamufundile tshibawu tshia lufu bua mibi yetu. Bavua bamupingajile muoyi bua kutubingisha ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu. 
Romans5:1 Nanku tuetu bamane kubinga ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu amu bua ditaba, mpindiewu pankatshi petu nende tudi ne bupole mu dina dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
Romans5:2 Amu kudi Yezu, bualu bua ditaba, ke kumvua mua kusemena ku dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu, kutudi bashindamene mpindiewu. Tshidi tshitusankisha, ke ditekemena ditudi nadi dia kudisanga ne Mvidi Mukulu mu butumbi buende." 
Romans5:3 Nanku nansha tuetu mu makenga, tudi amu tusanka. Bualu tudi bamanye ne: dikenga didi dipetesha lutulu," 
Romans5:4 lutulu ludi lupetesha muoyi mukole mu mateta, muoyi mukole udi upetesha ditekemena." 
Romans5:5 Ditekemena adi kadiena ditushima to. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmumuangalaje dinanga diende mu mioyi yetu, ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila uvuaye mutupeshe." 
Romans5:6 Bualu patutshivua katuyi ne bukole, Kristu wakafuila bantu babi tshikondu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu musungule." 
Romans5:7 Bidi bikole bua kuanyisha kutuila muntu udi kayi ne bualu. Bumue muntu udi mua kukolesha muoyi, kutuila muntu wa malu mimpe." 
Romans5:8 Kadi Kristu wakatufuila tuetu batshikale benji ba malu mabi. Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu mutuleje mudiye utunanga bikole. 
Romans5:9 Ku mulambu wa Kristu, ke kutudi babingile mpindiewu ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu. Nangananga tuetu bamane kubinga nanku, Yezu Kristu neatusungidile bulelela ku dinyoka dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans5:10 Tuvua baluishi ba Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi ku lufu lua Muanende, Mvidi Mukulu mmupingaje diulu vuangana pankatshi petu nende. Nanku mpindiewu bamane kupingaja diumvuangana pankatshi petu nende, netupete lupandu ku muoyi wa Muanende." 
Romans5:11 Ki ngamu nanku to! Kadi tudi mua kuditumbisha kabidi munda mua Mvidi Mukulu, bualu bua Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, uvua mupingaje mpindiewu diumvuangana pankatshi petu ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans5:12 Padi muntu umue, Adame, mubueje bubi pa buloba, kabidi bubi bubueje lufu, nanku lufu ludi lukuata bantu bonsu, bualu bonsu bavua benze malu mabi." 
Romans5:13 Mvidi Mukulu kayi muanji kupesha Moshe mikenji, bubi bukavua pa buloba. Kadi bu muvua mikenji kayiyi mianji kuikalaku, Mvidi Mukulu kavua mupishe bantu to." 
Romans5:14 Kadi biangatshile ku tshikondu tshia Adame too ne ku tshia Moshe, lufu luvua amu ne bumfumu, nansha pambidi mene pa bantu bavua kabayi benze malu mabi mafuanangane ne avuabu benze kudi Adame, uvua mubenge kuitaba mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu. Adame uvua tshimfuanyi tshia uvua ne bua kufika." 
Romans5:15 Kadi bubi bua Adame katuena mua kubufuanyikija ne bunene bua dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu mutuleje amu ku luse luende. Bushuwa bonsu mbafue bua bubi bua muntu umuepele ewu. Kadi dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu didi dipita bubi ku bunene. Nanku dipa didiye mupeshe bantu bonsu amu ku luse luende patupu kudi muntu umuepele, Yezu Kristu, didi dipita kabidi bubi ku bunene." 
Romans5:16 Kadi mudi dishilangana dinene pankatshi pa dipa dia Mvidi Mukulu ne bubi bua muntu umuepele ewu. Bualu bua bubi bua muntu umuepele ewu bavua balumbuluisha bantu, babapisha. Kadi bantu bamane kuenza malu mabi a bungi, Mvidi Mukulu kubapesha ku luse luende patupu dipa didi dibabingisha." 
Romans5:17 Bushuwa, lufu luvua ne bumfumu, anu bualu bua tshilema tshia muntu umue, tshienza kudi muntu umuepele. Kadi kudi Yezu Kristu nkayende ke kutudi tupetela bipite bungi: bualu kudiye bantu bonsu nebikale ne muoyi, nebadie bumfumu. Ke bonsu bavua Mvidi Mukulu muleje dinanga dipite bunene, bavuaye mubingishe patupu ku luse luende." 
Romans5:18 Nanku bu muvua bubi bua muntu umue ewu, Adame, bupisha bantu bonsu, ke mudi malu mimpe a muntu umue, Yezu Kristu, abingisha bantu bonsu kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, abapetesha muoyi." 
Romans5:19 Bu muvua dibenga kutumikila dia muntu umue dipisha bantu bonsu ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu, ke mudi butumike bua muntu umue bubingisha kabidi bantu bonsu kumpala kuende." 
Romans5:20 Mikenji mmifike bua bubi buvulangane. Kadi muaba uvua bubi butampakana, dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu divua dipita kuelangana kabidi." 
Romans5:21 Nenku bu muvua bubi bupetela bukole kudi lufu, ke mudi kabidi dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu dipetela bukole, pa-vuaye mutubingishe kudi Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, bua kutufikisha kudiye ku muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
Romans6:1 Nanku netuambe bishi? Tudi mua kunanukila mu dienza dia malu mabi, bua dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu utuleja dipite kuelangana anyi?" 
Romans6:2 Nansha kakese! Tudi bafue bua bubi. Nanku mmunyi mutudi mua kutungunuka kabidi ne dienza dia malu mabi? 
Romans6:3 Kanuena bamanye ne: tuetu bonsu baeabu batue mu mayi, bua tudisange ne Kristu, bavua batutue mu mayi, bua tudisange nende mu lufu luende anyi?" 
Romans6:4 Pavuabu batutue mu mayi, bavua batujike nende, bua tuikale bafue nende, tubike kabidi nende ku lufu, muvua Kristu mubike ku bukole bua butumbi bua Tatu, bua tupete petu nsombelu mupiamupia." 
Romans6:5 Bualu patudi badisange nende mu lufu ludi bifuanangane ne luende, netudisange kabidi nende mu dibika dia ku bafue difuanangane ne diende." 
Romans6:6 Tumanyayi bimpe bualu ebu ne: muntu utuvua kale awu wakafua ne Kristu ku mutshi mutshiamakane, bua mubidi wetu wa bubi ubutuke, bua katuikadi kabidi bapika ba bubi." 
Romans6:7 Bualu udi mufue kena kabidi ku bumfumu bua bubi. 
Romans6:8 Patudi bafue pamue ne Kristu, tudi tuitaba ne: netubike kabidi pamue nende." 
Romans6:9 Nanku tudi bamanye ne: Kristu katshia wabika ku lufu, kena ne bua kufua kabidi to. Lufu kaluena kabidi ne bumfumu pambidi pende." 
Romans6:10 Lufu luvuaye mufue ndumumushe ku bubi musangu umue bua kashidi. Kadi muoyi udiye nawu mpindiewu, udi nawu bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans6:11 Nanku nuenu kabidi nuditangile bu bantu bafue bua bubi, kadi nuikale ne muoyi bua Mvidi Mukulu, bu munudi badisange ne Yezu Kristu." 
Romans6:12 Nanku malu mabi kaena ne bua kutekesha kabidi mubidi wenu udi ufua, bua nuenu kuukumbajila bijingajinga biawu." 
Romans6:13 Kanufidi kabidi bidimba bishilangane bia mubidi wenu ku malu mabi, bu biamu bia mudimu bia kuenza nabi bidi Mvidi Mukulu ubenga. Kadi nudifile kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bu bantu bavua babike ku lufu, bapete muoyi. Nudifile muenu muonsu bua kumuenzela mudimu. Bidimba bienu bikale biamu bia mudimu bia kuenza nabi bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Romans6:14 Bualu malu mabi kaena mua kuikala ne bumfumu pambidi penu nansha. Kanuena ku bumfumu bua mikenji, kadi nudi ku bumfumu bua dinanga divua Mvidi Mukulu mutuleje." 
Romans6:15 Kadi bualu ebu budi bishi? Tuye kuenza malu mabi, bualu katuena kabidi ku bumfumu bua mikenji, kadi amu bua dinanga divua Mvidi Mukulu mutuleje anyi? Nansha kakese!" 
Romans6:16 Nudi bamanye bimpe ne: panudi nukuatshila kampanda mudimu, nudi numutumikila. Nanku nudi ne bua kuikala bapika ba mfumu unudi nutumikila awu. nKuamba ne: nansha nudi bapika ba malu mabi adi afikisha bantu ku lufu, nansha nudi bapika bua kutumikila Mvidi Mukulu, bua amone mua kunubingisha." 
Romans6:17 Kadi tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu: nuenu bavua kale bapika ba malu mabi, mpindiewu nudi bitabe ne muoyi wenu mujima malu malelela avuabu banulongeshe." 
Romans6:18 Bavua banupikule ku bubi. Nukadi bapika ba malu mimpe. 
Romans6:19 Ndi ngumvuija ne tshimfuanyi tshia bupika, musombele bantu bamba, bua numvue bimpe bindi ndongesha. Kale nuvua nufila bidimba bienu ne muoyi wenu mujima bua bikale bapika ba malu mabi ne ba buenzayi, bua nuenze nabi bidi Mvidi Mukulu ubenga. Momumue mpindiewu nubifile ne muoyi wenu, bua bikale bia tshijila, bua nuenze nabi bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Romans6:20 Panuvua bapika ba bubi, kanuvua ku bupika bua malu mimpe nansha." 
Romans6:21 Kadi panuvua benze malu adi anufuisha bundu mpindiewu, tshinuvua bapete ntshinyi? Malu a nanku adi afikisha ku lufu!" 
Romans6:22 Kadi lelu mbanupikule ku bubi. Nudi nukuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu. Ke munudi bantu ba tshijila, badi benza bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Ku ndekelu nenupete muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
Romans6:23 Bualu difutu didi bubi butufuta ke lufu. Kadi dipa didi Mvidi Mukulu utupesha patupu ku luse luende, ke muoyi wa kashidi, patudi tudisanga ne Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
Romans7:1 Bana hetu, nenumvue bimpe bindi musue kunuambila, bualu nudi bantu badi bamanye mikenji. Nudi bamanye ne: mikenji idi ne bumfumu pambidi pa muntu, amu patshidiye ne muoyi panu." 
Romans7:2 Tuangate tshilejilu tshia mukaji musela. Mikenji idi imusuikakudi bayende, amu patshidi mulume ne muoyi. Kadi padi bayende ufua, mukaji udi usuluka ku mikenji ivua mimusuike kudi bayende." 
Romans7:3 Nanku patshidi bayende ne muoyi, yeye muye kudi mulume mukuabu, nebambe ne: mukaji awu mmuena tshiendenda. Kadi bayende mumane kufua, mmusuluke ku mikenji. Udi mua kuya kudi mulume mukuabu, kabayi bamuamba ne: mmuena tshiendenda." 
Romans7:4 Bana hetu, bidi bia momumue kabidi buenu nuenu. Nudi bafue ku bidi bitangila mikenji, bualu nudi badisange mu mubidi wa Kristu. Mpindiewu nudi bantu ba muntu mukuabu, ba muntu uvua mubike ku bafue, bua tukuatshile Mvidi Mukulu midimu idi imusankisha." 
Romans7:5 Bualu patutshivua tuenza malu adi buntu buetu bujinga, bijingajinga bia kuenza malu mabi, bidi mikenji ijula, bivua bikuata mudimu munda muetu muonsu, bitufikisha ku lufu." 
Romans7:6 Kadi mpindiewu, mbatupikule ku mikenji. Bualu tuvua bafue ku mikenji ivua mitukuate, mitujingile mu nkanu. Nanku tudi mua kukuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu mushindu mupiamupia ku bulombodi bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Katumukuatshidi kabidi mudimu muetu mua kale ku bulombodi bua bivuabu bafunde mu mikenji." 
Romans7:7 Kadi tshitudi mua kuamba kabidi ntshinyi? Mikenji idi mulongu umue ne bubi anyi? Nansha kakese! Kadi mikenji ivua mimmanyishe mudi bubi. Bualu tshivua mua kujingulula mudi lukuka, bu mikenji kayiyi miambe ne: “Kualakanyi to. ”" 
Romans7:8 Bubi kupetela njila ku mikenji, bua kujula munda muanyi majinga a mishindu yonsu. Bualu kakuyi mikenji, bubi ntshintu tshifue." 
Romans7:9 Kale mvua ne muoyi, bualu mikenji kayivuaku. Kadi pafiki meyi ne mikandu, bubi kutuadija." 
Romans7:10 Ke meme kufua. Meyi ne mikandu bivua ne bua kumpetesha muoyi. Kadi kumfikishabi ku lufu. 
Romans7:11 Ke meyi ne mikandu kupetesha bubi njila, bua bubi bundenduishe, bumfikishe ku lufu ku meyi ne mikandu mene abi." 
Romans7:12 Nenku mikenji idi ya tshijila. Meyi ne mikandu bidi bia tshijila. Bidi bimpe, bitufundila bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Romans7:13 Kadi tshintu tshimpe tshidi mua kumpetesha lufu anyi? Nansha kakese! Amu bubi ke budi bunkebela lufu. Buvua budimuenesha mudibu bubi menemene. Buvua bubuela mu tshidi tshimpe, bua kunkebela lufu. Ke muvua bubi budileja bu bualu bubi menemene, bualu bua meyi ne mikandu." 
Romans7:14 Tudi bamanye ne: mikenji mmifume kudi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi meme ndi muena butekete, udi bubi busumba bu mupika wabu." 
Romans7:15 Tshiena mujingulule bindi ngenza to. Bualu tshiena ngenza bindi musue kuenza. Kadi ndi ngenza bindi mbenga. 
Romans7:16 Pandi ngenza bindi tshiyi musue kuenza, ndi ngitaba ne: mikenji mmimpe." 
Romans7:17 Nanku udi ubienza ki mmeme to, kadi bubi budi munda muanyi." 
Romans7:18 Bualu ndi mumanye ne: bidi bimpe kabiena bisomba munda muanyi, nkuamba ne: mu buntu buanyi butekete. Bualu nansha dijinga dia kuenza bimpe dikale munda muanyi, tshiena ne bukole bua kudikumbaja." 
Romans7:19 Tshiena ngenza bimpe bindi musue. Kadi ndi ngenza bibi bindi tshiyi musue. 
Romans7:20 Pandi ngenza bindi tshiyi musue, nanku udi ubienza ki mmeme to, kadi mbubi budi busomba munda muanyi." 
Romans7:21 Nanku ndi mumone mudi bionsu bilonda njila ewu: pandi musue kuenza bimpe, ndi amu ne bukole bua kuenza bibi." 
Romans7:22 Mu kondu kanyi ka munda, ndi nsanka bua mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans7:23 Kadi mu bindi ngenza ndi mpeta mukenji mukuabu, udi uluangana ne mukenji udi muoyi wanyi musue. Mukenji mukuabu awu udi ungela mu lukanu, bua ngikale mu bindi ngenza mupika wa bubi budi munda muanyi." 
Romans7:24 Ndi muena dikasa dibi. Udi mua kunsulula ku mubidi ewu udi umfikisha ku lufu nnganyi? 
Romans7:25 Tuelayi Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bualu Yeye mmuenze nanku kudi Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu. Nanku ndi nkuatshila mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu mudimu ne lungenyi luanyi. Kadi mu bindi ngenza ne buntu buanyi butekete, ndi mupika wa mikenji ya bubi." 
Romans8:1 Nanku mpindiewu kabena bapisha kabidi badi badisanga ne Yezu Kristu. 
Romans8:2 Bualu mukenji wa Mueyelu wa Tshijila, udi utufulula patudi tudisanga ne Yezu Kristu, mmutupikule ku mukenji wa bubi ne wa lufu." 
Romans8:3 Mvidi Mukulu mmukumbaje bivua mikenji ya Moshe kayiyi mua kupeta bualu bua butekete bua bantu. Bua kutshimuna bubi buvua ne bumfumu mu bantu, Mvidi Mukulu kutuma Muanende wa menemene, bua angate buntu bufuanangane ne bua benji ba malu mabi, bua amone mua kumushamu bubi." 
Romans8:4 Mvidi Mukulu uvua muenze nanku, bua tukumbaje bidi mikenji itufundila, tuetu badi kabayi balonda kabidi bidi buntu buetu bujinga, kadi bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila musue." 
Romans8:5 Bualu badibu baludika kudi buntu buabu nkayabu, badi bakeba amu bidi buntu buabu abu bujinga. Kadi badibu baludika kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila, badi bakeba bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila ujinga." 
Romans8:6 Kukeba bidi buntu buetu nkayabu bujinga, kudi kufikisha bantu ku lufu. Kadi kukeba bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila musue, kudi kubafikisha ku muoyi ne ku ditalala." 
Romans8:7 Bantu badi badina ne kasuki ku dienza dia bidi buntu buabu nkayabu bujinga, badi baluishi ba Mvidi Mukulu. Bualu kabena batumikila mikenji yende. Kabena nansha ne bukole bua kuyitumikila." 
Romans8:8 Badi balonda bidi buntu buabu nkayabu bujinga, kabena mua kusankisha Mvidi Mukulu to." 
Romans8:9 Kadi nuenu, kanuena nukeba bidi buntu buenu nkayabu bujinga nansha. Nudi nukeba bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila musue, bualu Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi usomba munda muenu. Udi kayi ne Mueyelu wa Kristu, kena wa Kristu to." 
Romans8:10 Padi Kristu munda muenu, nanku, nansha mubidi wenu mufundila lufu, bualu uvua wenza malu mabi, kadi Mueyelu udi uufulula munda muenu. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua munubingishe kumpala kuende." 
Romans8:11 Padi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua mubishe Yezu ku lufu, usomba munda muenu, nanku uvua mubishe Kristu ku bafue, mumupingajile muoyi, neafulule mibidi yenu idi ifua ku bukole bua Mueyelu wende udi usomba munda muenu." 
Romans8:12 Nanku, bana hetu, tudi ne dibanza. Kadi katuena ne dibanza amu dia kuenzela buntu buetu nkayabu bidibu bujinga nansha." 
Romans8:13 Bualu panuikala nukeba bidi buntu buenu nkayabu bujinga, nenufue. Kadi panuikala nubenga malu mabi onsu ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila, nenuikale ne muoyi." 
Romans8:14 Bantu bonsu badi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu uludika badi bana ba Mvidi Mukulu," 
Romans8:15 bualu Mueyelu unudi bapete kawena mueyelu udi unupingaja mu bupika, bua nuikale tshiakabidi ne bowa mesu tente. Kadi Mueyelu udi unuenza bana ba Mvidi Mukulu, bua tumuele mbila ya ne: “Tatu wanyi!" 
Romans8:16 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu mene udi ujadikila kondu ketu ka munda ne: nudi bana ba Mvidi Mukulu. 
Romans8:17 Patudi bana bende, netupiane bilenga bivua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye bantu bende. Netubipiane pamue ne Kristu. Bualu patudi tukenga badisange ne Kristu, netusanke nende pamue mu butumbi bua momumue." 
Romans8:18 Ndi mumone ne: mutudi tukenga lelu emu, katuena mua kumufuanyikija ne butumbi buatupesha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans8:19 Bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mufuke bidi bipampakana, bindila tshikondu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kuleja bana bende patoke." 
Romans8:20 Bualu bifukibua mbibuele ku bumfumu bua bidi kabiyi mua kubilengelela. Bifukibua kabivua binanga bua bienzeke nanku. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmubiteke nanku. Kadi ditekemena ditshidiku: 
Romans8:21 dikuabu dituku nebapikule ne bifukibua mene, nebabipatule ku bumfumu bua mubutudi, udi mubikuate mu bupika, bua bidisange mu butumbi bua bana ba Mvidi Mukulu padibu bamane kubapikula." 
Romans8:22 Bualu tudi bamanye ne: too ne lelu bifukibua bionsu bitshidi bitua mikemu, bikenga bu mukaji pa lulelu."
