Romans8:23 Kadi bifukibua kabiena bitua mikemu nkayabi nansha. Tuetu kabidi, bakadi bamane kupeta Mueyelu wa Tshijila bu dipa dia ntuadijilu dia Mvidi Mukulu, tudi tutua mikemu mundamunda, bindile ne: Mvidi Mukulu atuenze bana bende bua kashidi, atupikule mu bujima buetu." 
Romans8:24 Bualu bavua batusungidile, kadi amu bua tushale batekemena. Padi bantu bamona bidibu batekemena, kabena batekemena kabidi to. Utshidi mua kutekemena tshidiye mumone nnganyi?" 
Romans8:25 Kadi patudi tutekemena tshitudi katuyi bamone, tudi tutshindila ne lutuulu." 
Romans8:26 Ke mudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila kabidi utuambuluisha, bualu tudi bena butekete. Katuena bamanye mutudi ne bua kutendelela, ne bitudi ne bua kulomba nansha. Kadi Mueyelu wende udi utulombela kudi Mvidi Mukulu, utua mikemu idi kayiyi yumvuika bu miaku ya bantu." 
Romans8:27 Mvidi Mukulu udi utangila mu mioyi ya bantu, udi ujingulula bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila musue kulomba. Bualu Mueyelu udi wakuila bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu mushindu udi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Romans8:28 Tudi bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ukuata mudimu mu bionsu, bua bilengelele badi bamunanga, bavuaye mubikile bilondeshile meji ende." 
Romans8:29 Bualu bavua Mvidi Mukulu mudianze kusungula, ukavua mudianza kujadika bua kubenza bafuanangane ne Muanende, bua Muanende ashale muanabute munkatshi mua bana babu bavule." 
Romans8:30 Bavua Mvidi Mukulu mudianze kusungula, uvua mubabikile kabidi. Bavuaye mubikile, ukavua mumane kubabingisha kabidi ku mesu kuende. Bavuaye mumane kuhingisha, mmubabueje kabidi mu butumbi buende." 
Romans8:31 Tshituambe kabidi ntshinyi? Padi Mvidi Mukulu mutue ku tshietu, udi mua kubibenga kabidi nnganyi?" 
Romans8:32 Kavua nansha muengeleke Muanende to. Uvua mumufile bualu buetu bonsu. mMunyi mudiye kayi mua kutupesha bionsu pamue ne Muanende? 
Romans8:33 Udi mua kusonguela bavua Mvidi Mukulu musungule nnganyi? Kakuena muntu udi mua kuenza nanku! Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmujadike ne: mbabinge. 
Romans8:34 Nanku udi mua kubapisha nnganyi? Muntu nansha umue! Bualu Yezu Kristu mmufue, mubike kabidi. Udi ku dia bukole dia Mvidi Mukulu, utuakuila." 
Romans8:35 Udi mua kutupandulula kudi Kristu udi utunanga nnganyi? Makenga, dipampakana, tshinyangu tshia kudi bantu, nzala, bulanda, njiwu, lufu, bidi mua kutupandulula kudiye anyi?" 
Romans8:36 Bu mudi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Bu mutudi bebe, tudi mu njiwu ya lufu dituku dijima. Badi batutangila bu mikoku idibu mua kuya nayi bua bayishipe. ”" 
Romans8:37 Kadi bionsu abi tudi mua kubitshimuna kashidi ku bukole bua uvua mutuleje mudiye utunanga. 
Romans8:38 Bualu ndi mumane kujadika ne: nansha lufu, nansha muoyi, nansha batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, nansha mamfumu makuabu a mulu, nansha bidi bienzeka matuku aa, nansha biavua kuenzeka matuku adi kumpala," 
Romans8:39 nansha makole a mulu, nansha a pa buloba, nansha tshifukibua tshikuabu, kashidi kakuena tshintu nansha tshimue tshidi mua kutupandulula ne Mvidi Mukulu uvua muleje mu Yezu Kristu Mfumu wetu mudiye utunanga." 
Romans9:1 Ndi ngamba malu malelela. Ndi wa Kristu, nanku tshiena nshima to. Kondu kanyi ka munda kabidi kadi kanjadikila ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila ne: bindi ngamba bidi bilelela ne:" 
Romans9:2 ndi ne dibungama dinene, ngumvua dikenga tshiyi mpeta dikisha." 
Romans9:3 Bualu ndi njinga bua Mvidi Mukulu antshipe meme, angumushe kudi Kristu, bu biobi mua kulengelela bana hetu, bena tshisamba tshianyi." 
Romans9:4 Badi bena tshisamba tshia Izrayele. Mvidi Mukulu mmubenze bana bende. mMumueneke munkatshi muabu ne butumbi buende. mMutue nabu ndondu yende, mubapeshe kabidi mikenji yende. Uvua mubaleje muyuabu mua kutendelela. mMubalaye ne malaya." 
Romans9:5 Badi ba ku ndelanganyi ya bankambua. Kristu mu buntu buende udi wa ku tshisamba tshiabu. Yeye Mvidi Mukulu, udi ku mutu kua bionsu, atumbe kashidi. Amene." 
Romans9:6 Kadi tshiena musue kuamba ne: bivua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye, kena mubikumbaje nansha. Bualu bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Izrayele, kabena bonsu bena Izrayele balelela to." 
Romans9:7 Ndelanganyi ya Abrahame kayena yonsu bana bende menemene to. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambile Abrahame ne: “Kudi Izake ke kuwapetela ndelanganyi imvua mukulaye. ” 
Romans9:8 mBuena kuamba ne: ki mbana badibu balela ku bukole bua buntu buabu, badi bana ba Mvidi Mukulu to. Kadi amu bana badibu balela bilondeshile dilaya dia Mvidi Mukulu, ke badi ndelanganyi menemene ya Abrahame." 
Romans9:9 Bualu miaku ya dilaya, ivua Mvidi Mukulu muambe, ivua ya ne: “Pakumbana tshikondu, nempingane. Sara neikale ne muana wa balume. ”" 
Romans9:10 Ki mbionsu to. Bana ba balume babidi ba Rebeka bavua ba tatu umue, ke nkambua wetu Izake." 
Romans9:11 Kadi Rebeka kayi muanji kulela bana bende babidi ba balume, bana kabayi banji kuenza malu mimpe nansha mabi, Mvidi Mukulu ukavua mumane kuambila mamuabu ne: “Mukulu neakuatshile muakunyi mudimu. ”" 
Romans9:12 Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu uleja mudiye ukungula bantu mudiye musue. Udi ubasungula, ubabikila, kayi utangila bidibu benza." 
Romans9:13 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Mvua munange Yakobe, mubenge Esawu. ”" 
Romans9:14 Nanku netuambe tshinyi? Netuambe ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmuena kansungasunga anyi? Nansha kakese! 
Romans9:15 Bualu uvua muambile Moshe ne: “Undi musue kutuila luse, nemmufuile. Undi musue kuleja muoyi muimpe, nemmuleje. ”" 
Romans9:16 Nanku bidi muntu ujinga, nansha bidiye wenza, kabiena ne bualu. Kadi mudi amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende udi musue kutuila bantu luse." 
Romans9:17 Mu Mukanda wa tshijila Mvidi Mukulu udi wambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: “Mvua mukuteke mukalenga bua kuleja bukole buanyi munda muebe, ne bua lumu luanyi lutangalake pa buloba bujima. ”" 
Romans9:18 Nanku muntu udi Mvidi Mukulu musue kutuila luse, udi umufuila. Muoyi wa muntu udiye musue kupapisha, udi uupapisha." 
Romans9:19 Bumue nenunkonke ne: “Kadi biobi bikale nanku, Mvidi Mukulu utshidi udiwula kabidi bantu bua tshinyi? Bualu udi mua kumufuila nkanana ku bidiye musue nnganyi?”" 
Romans9:20 Kadi wewe muntu udi welangana mpata ne Mvidi Mukulu, udi nganyi? Luesu lua dima ludi mua kukonka udi mulufumbe ne: “Udi mutufumbe nenku bua tshinyi? ”" 
Romans9:21 Mufumbi wa luesu udi mua kufumba dima mudiye musue. Udi mua kuenza ne dima dia mushindu umue luesu lua mushinga mukole, nansha lua patupu." 
Romans9:22 Bushuwa Mvidi Mukulu uvua musue kuleja tshiji tshiende, ne kumanyisha bantu bukole buende. Kadi uvua muanji kulengulula ne lutuulu luvule bantu bavuaye mufikile munda, bakafua bakumbanyine kubutuka." 
Romans9:23 Butumbi buende bunene uvua musue kuteleja kabidi tuetu bantu badiye ufuila luse, badiye mudianze kulongolola bua tubuele mu butumbi buende." 
Romans9:24 Bualu tuetu ke bantu badiye mubikile. Ki mmutubikile amu munkatshi mua bena Yuda nkayabu nansha, kadi kabidi munkatshi mua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Romans9:25 Ke bidibu bafunde mu mukanda wa Osheya ne: “Tshisamba tshia bantu bavua kabayi banyi, ne ntshibikile ne: ntshia bantu banyi. Bantu bamvua tshiyi munange, nembabikile ne: mbandi nnanga." 
Romans9:26 Muaba menemene uvuabu babambile ne: ‘Kanuena bantu banyi’, nebababikile ne: mbana ba Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi. ”" 
Romans9:27 Yeshaya kabidi bualu bua bena Izrayele mmuambe ne: “Nansha bena Izrayele bungi bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene, kadi anu kasumbu ka bantu ba munkatshi muabu nekapande." 
Romans9:28 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu neakumbaje pa lukasa pa buloba bionsu bi-vuaye muambe. ” 
Romans9:29 Yeshaya mene awu uvua mudianze kuamba ne: “Bu Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu kayi mutulamine ndelanganyi mikuabu, tuvua mua kushala bu tshimenga tshia Sodome, tuvua mua kufuanangana ne bena mu tshimenga tshia Ngomore. ”" 
Romans9:30 Nenku netuambe bishi? Bantu bavua kabayi bena Yuda, kabayi bakeba kubinga ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu mmubabingishe kumpala kuende bua ditaba." 
Romans9:31 Kadi bena tshisamba tshia Izrayele bavua bakeba mikenji ivua mua kubabingisha ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu, ki mbapete tshikuabu bipatshila nansha." 
Romans9:32 Bua tshinyi? Bualu kabavua bakeba kulengelela Mvidi Mukulu ku dimuitaba nansha. Bayua bela meji a kumulengelelaku midimu ivuabu benze. Nanku bavua batuute dikasa ku “dibue didi ditetula bantu,”" 
Romans9:33 mudi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Tangilayi, ndi nteka mu Siyone dibue didi ditetula bantu, lubuebue ludi lubaponesha. Kadi udi umuitaba, kakufua bundu nansha. ”" 
Romans10:1 Bana hetu, ndi njinga ne muoyi wanyi mujima, ndomba kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua bena Yuda bapete lupandu." 
Romans10:2 Bualu ndi mua kubajadikila ne: badi ne disuminyina dikole, bakeba kuenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Kadi disuminyina diabu adi kadiena dishindamena pa dimanya dilelela nansha." 
Romans10:3 Bualu kabavua bajingulula mushindu udi Mvidi Mukulu ubingisha bantu kumpala kuende nansha. Bavua bakeba kudibingisha nkayabu mushindu wabu. Nanku kabena bitabe mushindu udi Mvidi Mukulu ubingisha bantu nansha. 
Romans10:4 Bualu Kristu mumane kufika. mikenji ya Moshe kayena kabidi njila wa kuya kudi Mvidi Mukulu to. Nanku mpindiewu badi Mvidi Mukulu ubingisha, ke bonsu badi bitaba." 
Romans10:5 Telejayi bivua Moshe mufunde bua bantu badi bakeba kubinga ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu ku ditumikila dia mikenji: “Muntu udi ukumbaja bidibu bafunde mu mikenji, neapete lupandu kudiyi. ”" 
Romans10:6 Kadi umvuayi mudibu bamba bua bantu badi bakeba kubinga ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu bua ditaba: “Kudiedi lukonku mundamunda ne: Wabanda mu diulu nnganyi?” (mbuena kuamba ne: bua kutulula Kristu panshi). 
Romans10:7 Kudiedi nansha lukonku lua ne: “Wapueka mu kandondu nnganyi?” (mbuena kuamba ne: bua kupatula Kristu ku bafue, kumupingaja panu). k" 
Romans10:8 Tshidibu basue kuamba ntshinyi? Mbambe ne: “Muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu udi pabuipi nebe. Udi mukana muebe, ne mu muoyi webe. ” Muaku awu ke dilongesha ditudi tulongesha ne: nuitabe." 
Romans10:9 Paudi ujadika mukana muebe ku mesu kua bonsu ne: Yezu udi Mfumu, paudi witaba mu muoyi webe ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumubishe ku bafue, neupande." 
Romans10:10 Bualu padi muntu witaba mu muoyi wende, Mvidi Mukulu udi umubingisha kumpala kuende. Padi muntu utonda mukana muende, Mvidi Mukulu udi umusungidila." 
Romans10:11 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Yonsu udi umuitaba, kakufua bundu. ”" 
Romans10:12 Nanku kakuena dishilangana pankatshi pa bena Yuda ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Bonsu badi ne Mfumu wa momumue, udi upesha bonsu badi bamubikila bilenga biende." 
Romans10:13 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Yonsu udi ubikila Mfumu, nebamusungidile. ”" 
Romans10:14 Kadi mudibu mua kumubikila kabayi banji kumuitaba mmunyi? Mudibu mua kumuitaba kabayi banji kumvua bamutela mbishi? Mudibu mua kumvua bamutela, muntu kayi umumanyisha, mmunyi?" 
Romans10:15 Mudibu mua kumumanyisha, kakuyi bantu badibu bafuma bua kuenza nanku, mbishi? Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Disanka kaayi dia kumona bantu bafika, batutuadila Lumu lua Disanka! ”" 
Romans10:16 Kadi kabavua banyishe bonsu Lumu lua Disanka to. Ke padi Yeshaya wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, uvua muitabe bituvua bambe nnganyi? ”" 
Romans10:17 Nenku ditaba didi difuma ku diteleja dia Lumu ludibu batumanyisha. Lumu alu ludi lufuma ku muaku uvua Kristu mene muambe. 
Romans10:18 Nanku ndi nkonka ne: Kabena bumvue Lumu alu anyi? Eyowa, mbalumvue! Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Diyi diabu divua diumvuike pa buloba bujima, miaku yabu mmifike too ne ku ntengu ya buloba.”" 
Romans10:19 Ndi nkonka kabidi ne: Bena Izrayele kabavua bajingulule Lumu alu anyi? Ndi ngandamuna bangabanga bidi Moshe wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: Nenjule lubabu luenu, bua nubabe bantu badi kabayi tshisamba mene. Nenjule tshiji tshienu, bua nufikile tshisamba tshia bantu badi kabayi ne lungenyi munda.”" 
Romans10:20 Ke padi muambi Yeshaya ukimina kuamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: Tuamonanganyi ne bantu bavua kabayi bankeba. Ndi mudileje kudi bavua kabayi bangebeja bualu.” 
Romans10:21 Kadi bua bena Izrayele, muaba mukuabu mbafunde ne: “Dituku dijima mvua muolole bianza kudi bantu bavua bambenga, bantombokela. ”" 
Romans11:1 Nanku ndi ngebeja ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmubenge bantu bende anyi? Nansha kakese! Bualu meme mene ndi muena Izrayele, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Abrahame, muena tshisamba tshia Binyamine." 
Romans11:2 Mvidi Mukulu kena mubenge bantu bende, bavuaye mudianze kudisunguila. Nudi bamanye bidibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila. Pavua Eliya ufunda bena Izrayele ku tshilumbu kudi Mvidi Mukulu," 
Romans11:3 uvua wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, bena Izrayele mbashipe bambi bebe, bashimbule kabidi bilambuilu biebe. Meme nkayanyi ndi mushale ne muoyi. Kadi badi bakeba kunshipa.”" 
Romans11:4 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumuandamune tshinyi? Kumuandamunaye ne: “Ndi mudilamine bantu binunu muanda mutekete, bavua kabayi batendelela nwidie Baale. ”" 
Romans11:5 Momumue kabidi matuku aa, kasumbu ka bantu badi Mvidi Mukulu nkayende mudisunguile, muleje luse luende, katshidiku." 
Romans11:6 Uvua mubasungule, bualu uvua mubanange. Kavua mubasungule bua midimu ivuabu benze nansha. Tshianana, luse luende kaluvua luse menemene to." 
Romans11:7 Nanku tudi mua kuamba bishi? Bena Izrayele ki mbapete bivuabu bakebe nansha. Amu bavua Mvidi Mukulu musungule, ke bavua babipete. Bakuabu bavua bapapishe muoyi wabu, bua kabumvu." 
Romans11:8 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu mmututubije lungenyi luabu. mMupangishe mesu abu bua kaamonu, matshi abu bua kaateleji, too ne lelu.”" 
Romans11:9 Davide kabidi udi wamba ne: “Ubateye, ubele mu bukondu, padibu basomba ku mesa, badishinde panshi, bapete dinyoka." 
Romans11:10 Upofamije mesu abu, kabamonyi kabidi tshintu. Nyongoboja nyima yabu kashidi. ”" 
Romans11:11 Nanku ndi ngebeja kabidi ne: diba divua bena Yuda balenduke, bavua badishinda bua kulala panshi kashidi anyi? Nansha kakese! Kadi bua tshilema tshivuabu benze, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kupeta lupandu, bua bena Yuda babakuatshile lubabu," 
Romans11:12 Pakadi tshilema tshivua bena Yuda benze, tshipetesha bantu ba pa buloba bubanji kudi Mvidi Mukulu, pakadi ntupakanyi yabu yelesha bisamba bikuabu lupemba kudiye, nanku dituku diapinganabu muabu muonsu mu njila wa ditaba, nebapeteshe ba pa buloba bilenga bipite!" 
Romans11:13 Mpindiewu ndi nnuambila nuenu bantu ba bisamba bikuabu ne: ndi mupostolu udibu bafundile mudimu wa kulongesha bantu badi kabayi bena Yuda. Ndi nsanka bua mudimu wanyi ewu. 
Romans11:14 Bualu ndi ntekemena kujula lubabu kudi bena kuetu, bua nansha bamue ba kudibu bamone mua kupeta lupandu." 
Romans11:15 Bualu pavuabu babateke ku luseke, bantu ba pa buloba kupingana mu diumvuangana ne Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku dituku didibu babakidila, nebienzeke bishi? Diba adi nebikale bu bantu badi bumuka ku lufu, babuela mu muoyi." 
Romans11:16 Pikalabu balambula Mvidi Mukulu bia tshianyi bia ntete ya kuenza bukula, ntete mikuabu yonsu idi kabidi ya tshijila. Pikalabu balambula Mvidi Mukulu miji ya mutshi, matamba onsu neikale ende a tshijila." 
Romans11:17 Bena Izrayele badi bu mutshi wa olive, udibu balame mu budimi. Kukosabu matamba makuabu a mutshi awu. Wewe muntu wa ku bisamba bikuabu, udi bu ditamba dia mutshi wa olive uvua muitu. Wewe ke ditamba divuabu bakose ku mutshi wa olive awu, bua kudilamika ku mutshi wa olive uvuabu balame mu budimi, pa muaba wa matamba avuabu bakose. Ditamba adi mpindiewu didi dinua mayi ku miji ya mutshi uvuabu bakune mu budimi." 
Romans11:18 Nanku kuena mua kupepeja matamba avuabu bakose nansha. Wewe kuena wambula miji to. Miji idi ikuambula wewe. Nanku udi mua kuditemba bishi? 
Romans11:19 Kadi neungambile ne: “Bayua bakose matamba a mutshi aa, bua bandamike meme pa muaba wawu!”" 
Romans11:20 Eyowa, bavua bumushe matamba awu, bualu avua apanga ditaba. Bayua bakulamike wewe pa muaba wawu, bualu bua ditaba diebe. Kadi kuditambishi nansha! Wikale ne buowa!" 
Romans11:21 Bualu pavua Mvidi Mukulu mukose bena Yuda, matamba avua muaba wawu ku mutshi wa olive uvuabu bakune mu budimi, kena mua kukukosa ne wewe kabidi anyi?" 
Romans11:22 Tangilayi mudi Mvidi Mukulu ne luse, kabidi ne disu dikole. Udi ne disu dikole kudi bavua balenduka, ukufuila wewe luse. Kadi wewe udi ne bua kunanukila ne dimunanga. Tshianana udi mua kukukosa ne wewe kabidi, kukumusha ku mutshi." 
Romans11:23 Pikala bena Yuda balekela kubenga Mvidi Mukulu, nebabalamike tshiakabidi ku mutshi muaba uvuabu kale. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole bua kubalamika tshiakabidi ku mutshi." 
Romans11:24 Wewe muntu wa tshisamba tshikuabu, udi ditamba divua muaba wadi ku mutshi wa olive uvua muitu. Bavua bakose ditamba adi, badilamika ku bukole pa muaba uvua kauyi wadi, ku mutshi wa olive uvuabu bakune mu budimi. Bena Yuda ke matamba avua muaba wawu ku mutshi wa olive uvuabu bakune mu budimi. Nanku mudimu wa kubalamika tshiakabidi ku mutshi ukavua wabu mmutekete menemene." 
Romans11:25 Bana hetu, telejayi bualu bulelela busokome, bundi musue kunumanyisha, bua kanudiangatshi bu bena meji. Bena Izrayele bakuabu mbapapishe muoyi wabu. Kadi bualu ebu nebatungunuke amu too ne padi bisamba bikuabu bionsu bimane kupeta lupandu." 
Romans11:26 Ke muasungidilabu bena Izrayele bonsu. Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Mupikudi neafume mu Siyone. Neumushe buntomboji kudi ndelanganyi ya Yakobe. 
Romans11:27 Ke ndondu undi ntua nabu, pandi ngumusha mibi yabu. ”" 
Romans11:28 Patudi lutangila mushindu uvua bena Yuda babenge Lumu lua Disanka, badi baluishi ba Mvidi Mukulu, kadi amu bua nuenu kutuuta dikasa dimpe. Kadi patudi bitangila mushindu uvua Mvidi Mukulu musungule bankambua babu, badi bashala bantu badiye unanga." 
Romans11:29 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu kena unyenga tshintu tshidiye mumane kufila. Kena ukudimuna meji avuaye nawu pambidi pa ba-vuaye mubikile. 
Romans11:30 Kale nuenu bena bisamba bikuabu, nuvua batombokele Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi lelu Mvidi Mukulu mmunufuile luse, bualu bena Yuda bavua bamutombokele." 
Romans11:31 Momumue kabidi bena Yuda bavua batombokele Mvidi Mukulu mpindiewu, bua amone mua kunufuila luse, kadi bua amone mua kutuila ne bobu kabidi luse mene alu mpindiewu." 
Romans11:32 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubueje bantu bonsu mu buntomboji, bua amone mua kubafuila bonsu luse." 
Romans11:33 Bubanji bua Mvidi Mukulu mbunene be! Meji ende ne dimanya diende mbiondoke! Udi mua kumvuija bidiye wenza nnganyi? Udi mua kujingulula meji adiye nawu, udiku anyi?" 
Romans11:34 Ke mudi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Udi mumanye meji a Maweja-Nangila nnganyi? Udi mua kuikala mufidi wende wa ngenyi, udiku anyi?" 
Romans11:35 Ukadi mudianze kumupa tshintu, bua Yeye amufute, amupingajile tshikuabu nnganyi? ”" 
Romans11:36 Bualu bionsu bidi bifuma kudiye. Bionsu bidiku ku bukole buende, kabidi bualu buende. Mvidi Mukulu atumbe kashidi tshiendelele! Amene." 
Romans12:1 Bana hetu, padi Mvidi Mukulu muleje nanku mudiye utufuila luse, ndi nnusengelela bua nudifile kudiye bu mulambu udi ne muoyi, bu mulambu wa tshijila, udi umusankisha. Ke mushindu muimpe unudi ne bua kumutendelela." 
Romans12:2 Kanulondi bidi bena panu benza. Kadi nuanyishe bua Mvidi Mukulu ashintulule meji enu onsu, bua nuikale bantu bapiabapia. Nenku nenujingulule bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, bidi bimpe, bimulengelela, bidi biakane tshishiki." 
Romans12:3 Mu dina dia dipa didi Mvidi Mukulu mumpeshe ku luse luende, ndi nnuambila bonsu ne: kanuditembi bu bapite bakuabu nansha. Ikalayi ne lungenyi lua kalolu. Yonsu wa kunudi adiangate ne mushinga, bilondeshile mudiye muitabe Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans12:4 Bualu mu mubidi wa muntu mudi bidimba bivule, bidi bikuata midimu mishilangane." 
Romans12:5 Momumue kabidi, nansha tuetu bavule, tudi amu tuenza mubidi umue, patudi tudisanga ne Kristu. Tudi tulamakana bonsu pamue bu bidimba bia mubidi umue." 
Romans12:6 Tudi ne mapa mashilangane. Tukuate nawu mudimu, bilondeshile bivua Mvidi Mukulu mupeshe muntu yonsu amu patupu ku luse luende. Padi muntu wa kutudi ne dipa dia kuambila bantu malu adi Mvidi Mukulu umumanyisha, udi ne bua kuenza nanku, bilondeshile ditaba didiye nadi." 
Romans12:7 Pikala mukuabu ne dipa dia kuambuluisha bantu, abambuluishe. Udi ne dipa dia kulongesha, udi ne bua kulongesha." 
Romans12:8 Udi ne dipa dia kukolesha bakuabu ku muoyi, abakoleshe. Udi ne dipa dia kupa bakuabu bilenga bidiye nabi, abipeshangane ne kalolu konsu. Udi ulombola, alombole ne muoyi muimpe. Udi wambuluisha bakengi, abambuluishe ne musangelu." 
Romans12:9 Udi ne dinanga, kikadi ne mpala ibidi. Abenge malu mabi, ananukile ne dienza dia malu mimpe." 
Romans12:10 Nanganganayi, mudi bana ba muntu umue banangangana. Nunemekangane ne disuminyina." 
Romans12:11 Nukazamuke, nukuate mudimu, nulekele lulengu. Nukuatshile Mfumu mudimu ne muoyi wenu mujima, kabidi ne disuminyina." 
Romans12:12 Ikalayi ne disanka bua ditekemena dinudi nadi. Ikalayi ne lutuulu panudi mu dikenga. Tendelelayi Mvidi Mukulu ne munanunanu. 
Romans12:13 Ambuluishayi bana benu ne bidibu bakengela. Akidilayi bimpe badi bafika ku nzubu yenu. 
Romans12:14 Badi banukengesha, nubalombele kudi Mvidi Mukulu bua abele lupemba. Numulombe bua abasankishe, kabatshipi nansha." 
Romans12:15 Sankayi ne badi basanka, nudile ne badi badila." 
Romans12:16 Umvuanganayi munkatshi muenu. Kanuditambishi to. Kadi nuanyishe midimu mishadile yonsu. Kanudiangatshi bu bena meji. 
Romans12:17 Kanupingajidi muntu bubi ku bubi. Nukebe kuenza malu mimpe kumpala kua bantu bonsu. 
Romans12:18 Nuenze muenu muonsu bua nusombe ne bantu bonsu mu ditalala, bilondeshile munudi numona ne: tudi mua kuenza nanku." 
Romans12:19 Balunda banyi, kanudisombuedi. Kadi nuanyishe amu bua Mvidi Mukulu aleje bantu tshiji tshiende. Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Meme Maweja-Nangila, nensombuele. Nembapingajile bubi buvuabu benze.”" 
Romans12:20 Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba kabidi ne: “Padi muluishi webe ne nzala, umupeshe biakudia. Padiye ne nyota, umupe biakunua. Bualu paudi wenza nanku, nebikale bu makala atema kapia, audi unguija pa mutu wende. ”" 
Romans12:21 Kuanyishi bua malu mabi akupite bukole. Kadi watshimune ku dienza dia malu mimpe. 
Romans13:1 Muntu yonsu udi ne bua kutumikila bamfumu badi balombola ditunga. Bualu kakuena bumfumu budi kabuyi bufuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Yeye ke udi muteke bamfumu bonsu muaba wabu. 
Romans13:2 Nenku, muntu udi ubenga diyi dia mfumu, udi ubenga kabidi bulongolodi bua Mvidi Mukulu. Badi babenga diyi dia mfumu, nebadikebele tshilumbu nkayabu." 
Romans13:3 Bualu bamfumu kabena bakuatshisha bantu badi benza malu mimpe buowa, kadi amu badi benza malu mabi. Wewe udi musue ne: tshitshinyi bamfumu ba ditunga nansha. Nanku enza malu mimpe, bamfumu nebakupe lumu." 
Romans13:4 Bualu bamfumu badi bakuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu, bua kukusaka ku dienza dia malu mimpe. Kadi paudi wenza malu mabi, wabatshina! Bidi bimpe bua bamfumu bapete bumfumu bua kunyoka bantu. Ke mudibu bakuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu, bua kuleja tshiji tshidiye ulekela badi benza bibi." 
Romans13:5 Ke mutudi ne bua kutumikila bamfumu. Katuenji nanku amu bua Mvidi Mukulu alekele kutunyoka nansha. Kadi kondu ketu ka munda kabidi katusake ku dienza dia malu mimpe. 
Romans13:6 Ke panudi nufuta bitadi, bualu bena mbulamatadi badi babilambuisha badi bakuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu, bakeba kukumbaja bimpe mudimu wabu ewu." 
Romans13:7 Nulambuile bonsu binudi ne bua kubalambuila. Nulambule tshitadi kudi udi utshilambuisha. Nufute binudi ne bua kuhita. Nutshine unudi ne bua kutshina. Nunemeke unudi ne bua kunemeka. 
Romans13:8 Kanuikadi dibanza ne muntu, pa kumusha dia dinangangana. Muntu udi unanga bakuabu, udi ukumbaja bionsu bidi mikenji Uufundila." 
Romans13:9 Bualu mikenji ya ne: “Kuendi buendenda, kushipi muntu, kuibi, kualakanyi tshintu tshia mukuenu,” ne mikuabu yonsu idi nudisange mu mukenji umuepele udi wamba ne: “Nanga mukuenu, muudi udinanga. ”" 
Romans13:10 Muntu udi unanga mukuabu, kena umuenzela bualu bubi nansha bumue. Patudi tunangangana, tudi tukumbaja mikenji yonsu mu bujima buayi." 
Romans13:11 Ke binudi ne bua kuenza, nangananga bualu nudi bamanye tshikondu tshitudi natshi. Diba ndimane kufika dia nuenu kujuka ku tulu bienu. Bualu diba dituvua babange kuitaba, lupandu luvua kule, mpindiewu lukadi pabuipi." 
Romans13:12 Butuku bukadi butshia. Munya ukadi pabuipi ne kutema. Nanku tubenge midimu idibu benza mu miidima. Tuvuale bia mvita bitudi mua kuluangana nabi mu munya. 
Romans13:13 Tuenze malu mimpe, bu bantu bakadi benda mu butoke bua dituku. Tulekelayi budiavi, bunuavi, malu a bundu, ne buenzavi bukuabu, matandu ne lubabu." 
Romans13:14 Vualayi amu Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, numufuane. Kanusumpakanyi bua kusankisha buntu buenu ne bijingajinga biabu." 
Romans14:1 Nuakidile bimpe udi mutekete mu ditaba. Kanuedianganyi nende mpata, bua kupetula meji ende." 
Romans14:2 Tudi mua kuteka tshilejilu: muntu mukuabu udi witaba ne: ndi mua kudia tshintu tshionsu. Kadi mukuabu, udi mutekete mu ditaba, udi udia amu bisakisaki." 
Romans14:3 Muntu udi udia bintu bionsu, kena ne bua kupetula udi kayi udia bintu bikuabu. Nanku udi kayi udia bintu bikuabu, kena ne bua kulumbuluisha udi udia bionsu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumuanyishe." 
Romans14:4 Wewe kabidi udi nganyi bua wewe kulumbuluisha muena mudimu wa bende? Bualu, nansha yeye ukuatshila mfumuende mudimu ne dinanukila, nansha yeye mupangile mu njila, tshilumbu atshi tshidi amu tshia mfumuende wa mudimu. Kadi neakuate mudimu ne dinanukila, bualu Mfumu udi ne bukole bua kumuimanyika." 
Romans14:5 Mukuabu udi wela meji ne: manga matuku adi manene mapite makuabu. Kadi munga udi wela meji ne: matuku onsu adi momumue. Kadi muntu yonsu ajadike bimpe meji adiye nawu. 
Romans14:6 Udi mumone ne: dituku kampanda ndinene dipite dikuabu, udi wenza nanku bua kunemeka Mfumu. Udi udia bionsu, udi ubidia bua kunemeka Mfumu, bualu udi wela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila padiye udia. Udi kayi udia bionsu, udi wenza nanku bua kunemeka Mfumu. Yeye kabidi udi wela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila." 
Romans14:7 Bualu kakuena muntu wa kutudi nansha umue udi ne muoyi amu bualu buende yeye nkayende. Kakuena udi ufua buende yeye nkayende. Patudi ne muoyi, tudi ne muoyi bua Mfumu." 
Romans14:8 Nansha tufua, tudi tufua amu bua Mfumu. Nanku nansha tuetu ne muoyi, nansha tufua, tudi ba bende ba Mfumu." 
Romans14:9 Bualu Kristu mmufue, mubike kabidi ku lufu, bua ikale Mfumu wa bafue ne wa badi ne muoyi." 
Romans14:10 Kadi wewe, udi ulumbuluisha muanenu bua tshinyi? Wewe mene udi upetula muanenu bualu kaayi? Tuetu bonsu netuimane kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, bua atulumbuluishe." 
Romans14:11 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Meme, Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi, ndi njadika ne: bantu bonsu nebatue binu kumpala kuanyi. Bonsu nebantumbishe, bajadika ne: ndi Mvidi Mukulu. ”" 
Romans14:12 Nenku yonsu wa kutudi neadilumbuluile nkayende kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
Romans14:13 Nanku tulekelayi kulumbuluishangana. Tshinudi ne bua kulekela kuenza ngetshi: kanuenji bualu nansha bumue budi mua kulenduisha muanenu, nansha kumufikisha ku bubi." 
Romans14:14 Ndi mumanye, mushindike menemene ne: patudi bamane kudisanga ne Mfumu Yezu, kakuena tshintu tshidi tshibi tshiotshi nkayatshi. Kadi amu padi muntu wela meji ne: tshintu etshi ntshibi, nanku tshidi tshibi kudiye." 
Romans14:15 Paudi ubungamija muanenu bua biudi udia, kuena ulonda njila wa dinanga nansha. Kuena mua kujimija muanenu, uvua Kristu mufuile, amu bua biudi udia nansha." 
Romans14:16 Bidi binulengelela nuenu, kabiena ne bua kulenduisha bakuabu nansha." 
Romans14:17 Bualu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu kabuena ku biakudia nansha ku biakunua. Kadi budi ku malu mimpe, ku bupole, ne ku disanka didi Mueyelu wa Tshijila utupesha." 
Romans14:18 Muntu udi ukuatshila Kristu mudimu mushindu ewu, udi usankisha Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu kabidi nebamuanyishe." 
Romans14:19 Nanku tukebayi bidi mua kufila ditalala, bidi mua kutushindamija pamue mu ditaba." 
Romans14:20 Kubutudi mudimu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bualu bua biakudia. Bulelela, tudi mua kudia bintu bionsu. Kadi bidi bibi padi muntu udia tshintu kampanda bua kulenduisha muanabu." 
Romans14:21 Bidi bimpe kubenga kudia munyinyi, kubenga kunua maluvu, kuepuka bionsu, padibi mua kulenduisha muanenu." 
Romans14:22 Biudi witaba nkayebe mu bualu ebu, udilaminebi munda muebe kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. Muntu udi wenza bualu kampanda, kayi udiumvua ne: ndi muena tshibawu, mmuena diakalenga." 
Romans14:23 Kadi udi udia biakudia, wela mpata, Mvidi Mukulu neamupishe padiye ubidia, bualu kena ulonda ditaba didiye nadi. Bualu buonsu budibu benza budi kabuyi bufuma ku ditaba didi muntu nadi, mbualu bubi." 
Romans15:1 Tuetu badi bakole mu ditaba, tudi ne bua kuambuluisha badi batekete mu ditaba diabu. Katuena panu bua kukeba amu bidi bitusankisha tuetu." 
Romans15:2 Kadi yonsu wa kutudi akebe mua kusankisha muntu nende, amuenzele malu mimpe, bua kumukolesha mu ditaba." 
Romans15:3 Bualu Kristu kavua musombe panu, amu bua kukeba bivua mua kumusankisha yeye nkayende. Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Padibu bakupenda, badi bampenda ne meme. ”" 
Romans15:4 Nenku bionsu bitudi tubala mu Mikanda ya tshijila mbabifunde bua kutulongesha. Mikanda ya tshijila idi kukolesha ku muoyi, bua tunanukile, tupete bitudi tutekemena." 
Romans15:5 Mvidi Mukulu, mpokolu wa dinanukila ne wa disambangana, anupe kabidi diumvuangana dilelela, bua nulonde tshilejilu tshia Yezu Kristu," 
Romans15:6 bua bonsu pamue, kabidi ne diyi dimue, nutumbishe Mvidi Mukulu, Tatu wa Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
Romans15:7 Nenku akidilanganayi, muvua Kristu numuakidile, bua Mvidi Mukulu apete lumu." 
Romans15:8 Bualu ndi nnujadikila ne: Kristu mmudienze muena mudimu wa bena Yuda, bua kukumbaja malaya avua Mvidi Mukulu muambile bankambua babu, kabidi bua kuleja nanku mudi Mvidi Mukulu wa diyi dimue." 
Romans15:9 mMufike kabidi bua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu batumbishe Mvidi Mukulu bua luse luende. Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Ke pandi nkutumbisha munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu, nsaka misambu ya kutumbisha nayi dina diebe.”" 
Romans15:10 Udi wamba kabidi ne: “Nuenu bena bisamba bikuabu, tuayi tshianga pamue ne bena tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila!”" 
Romans15:11 Udi wamba kabidi ne: “Nuenu bena matunga onsu, tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila. Bisamba bionsu bimusamune!”" 
Romans15:12 Yeshaya kabidi udi wamba ne: “Muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Ishayi neafike, neajuke bua kulombola matunga. Bisamba bionsu nebimutekemene amu yeye. ”" 
Romans15:13 Bu munudi nuitaba Mvidi Mukulu, udi utupa ditekemena, anuwuje kabidi ne disanka, kabidi ne bupole tshishiki, bua ditekemena dienu diye amu kumpala ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Romans15:14 Bana hetu, meme mene ndi mushindike ne: nudi bena muoyi muimpe. Nudi bamanye bionsu binudi ne bua kumanya. Nudi ne bukole kabidi bua kubelangana nkayenu." 
Romans15:15 Kadi miaba mivule mu mukanda wanyi ewu, mvua munufundile ne dikima, bua kunuvuluija binuvua bamane kulonga. Mvua munufundile nanku, bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumpeshe dipa," 
Romans15:16 dia meme kuikala muena mudimu wa Yezu Kristu bua bisamba bikuabu. Ndi nkumbaja mudimu wa tshijila wa mutuangaji ewu, pandi ndongesha Lumu lua Disanka lua Mvidi Mukulu, bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila ujidile bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bikale bu mulambu udi ulengelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans15:17 Nanku ndi ndisanga ne Kristu, nditemba bua mudimu wanyi undi nkuatshila Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans15:18 Bualu meme musue kutela bualu kampanda, ndi ngamba amu bivua Kristu muenze kundi, bua kufikisha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu ku ditumikila Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua muenze nanku ku bimvua muambe, ne ku bimvua muenze," 
Romans15:19 ku bukole bua bishima ne bua malu a dikema, kabidi ne ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Ke mumvua mulongeshe muanyi muonsu Lumu lua Disanka ludi lutangila Kristu. Mvua muendakane nseke yonsu, kutuadijila mu Yerushalayime, too ne ku buloba bua Iliriya." 
Romans15:20 Kadi mvua musue kumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka amu miaba ivuabu kabayi banji kumvua batela Kristu. Tshivua musue kuibaka pa bitaku bivua muntu mukuabu muase. 
Romans15:21 Ke mumvua musue kukumbaja bidi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Bantu bavuabu kabayi bamanyishe bualu buende, nebamumone. Bavua kabayi bumvua bamutela, nebamumvue. ”" 
Romans15:22 Ke bivua bimpumbishe misangu mivule bua meme kufika kuenu aku. 
Romans15:23 Kadi mpindiewu ndi mujikije mudimu wanyi mu matunga aa. Kukadi bidimu bivule bindi njinga kumonangana nenu. 
Romans15:24 Mvua musue kupitshila kuenu, pakumbana luendu luanyi lua kuya ku Espanye. Bualu ndi ntekemena kufika kuenu mu luendu alu bua kumonangana nenu. Ndi musue kushala nenu amue matuku, njinga kabidi bua nungambuluishe, bua mmone mua kufika ku ditunga dia Espanye." 
Romans15:25 Kadi mpindiewu ndi nganji kuya ku Yerushalayime, bua kuambuluisha Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba badi kuaka." 
Romans15:26 Bualu bena ditaba ba mu Masedoniya ne ba mu Akaya bavua bapangadika bua kusangisha makuta, bua kuambuluisha bakengi ba mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba badi mu Yerushalayime." 
Romans15:27 Bavua badijadikile bualu ebu nkayabu. Kadi bulelela bavua ne bua kuambuluisha bakengi aba. Bualu bena ditaba ba bena Yuda ba ku Yerushalayime bavua babanyangana ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu ditaba diabu. Nanku bantu ba bisamba bikuabu badi ne bua kubambuluisha, kuabanyangana nabu bintu bia panu bidibu nabi." 
Romans15:28 Pangikala mujikije mudimu ewu, mumane kubapesha makuta avuabu basangishe, nentungunuke ne luendu bua kuya ku Espanye. Nanku mu luendu alu nempitshile kuenu." 
Romans15:29 Ndi mumanye ne: ku difika dianyi kuenu, Kristu neanuele lupemba muende muonsu." 
Romans15:30 Kadi, bana hetu, ndi nnulomba ne: mu dina dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, ne ku bukole bua dinanga didi Mueyelu wa Tshijila utupa: luanganayi nanyi. Nutendelele, nundombele kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans15:31 Nulombe bua mmone mua kuepuka ku bianza bia bena muoyi mupape badi mu Yudeya; kabidi bua bena ditaba badi mu Yerushalayime banyishe bintu bindi mubatuadile. 
Romans15:32 Ke mundi mua kufika kuenu ne disanka divule, pikala Mvidi Mukulu musue. Nenganji kuikisha kuenu aku, muaba unudi." 
Romans15:33 Mvidi Mukulu, udi ufila bupole, ikale nenu bonsu. Amene." 
Romans16:1 Ndi nnusengelela bua nuakidile bimpe muanetu wa bakaji Febe, udi ukuatshila Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba badi mu Kenkreya mudimu." 
Romans16:2 Numuakidile mu dina dia Mfumu, mudi bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kuakidilangana. Numuambuluishe mu malu onsu adiye mua kuikala nenu dijinga. Yeye mene uvua muambuluishe bantu bavule, nangananga meme." 
Romans16:3 Elayi Priskila ne Akuila muoyi. Ke bantu batudi tukuatshila nabu Kristu mudimu. 
Romans16:4 Bavua babuele mu njiwu ya lufu bua kusungidila. Ki mmeme nkayanyi udi ne bua kubela tuasakidila nansha. Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba ba mu bisamba bikuabu bidi ne bua kubela tuasakidila. 
Romans16:5 Elayi kabidi bena ditaba badi basangile kumbelu kuabu muoyi. Elayi Epayinete, mulunda wanyi musuibue, muoyi. Yeye ke muntu wa kumpala wa mu buloba bua Aziya uvua muitabe Kristu." 
Romans16:6 Elayi Mariya, uvua munukuatshile mudimu bikole, muoyi." 
Romans16:7 Elayi Andronikuse ne Yuniyase muoyi. mBana hetu, bavua nanyi mu lukanu. Bapostolu badi babanyisha bikole. Bavua babuele mu Tshisumbu tshia bena Kristu, meme tshiyi muanji kubuelamu." 
Romans16:8 Elayi Ampliyatuse, mulunda wanyi munda mua Mfumu, muoyi." 
Romans16:9 Elayi Urbene, utudi tukuatshila nende Kristu mudimu, muoyi. Kabidi ne Stakise wanyi musuibue." 
Romans16:10 Elayi Apelese muoyi. Uvua muleje muende muonsu mudiye witaba Kristu. Elayi bena diku dia Aristobule muoyi. 
Romans16:11 Elayi muanetu Erodiyone muoyi. Elayi bena diku dia Narsise badi bitaba Mfumu muoyi. 
Romans16:12 Elayi Trifene ne Trifose, badi bakuatshila Mfumu mudimu, muoyi; kabidi ne Persida wanyi musuibue, uvua mukuatshile pende Mfumu mudimu bikole." 
Romans16:13 Elayi Rufuse, muena mudimu musunguluke wa Mfumu, muoyi; kabidi ne mamuende, udi kabidi mamu wanyi meme." 
Romans16:14 Elayi Asinkrite, Flegone, Ermese, Patrobase, Ermase, ne bana hetu bakuabu badi nabu, muoyi." 
Romans16:15 Elayi Filoloke ne Yuliya, Nereya ne muanabu wa bakaji, Olimpase, kabidi ne bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu bonsu badi nabu, muoyi." 
Romans16:16 Elanganayi muoyi, nupukilangana ne dinanga bu bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba ba Kristu bidi binuela muoyi." 
Romans16:17 Bana hetu, ndi nnulomba ne: nudimukile bantu badi bajula ditapulukangana, bakeba kupambula bena ditaba mu njila, babenga bivuabu banulongeshe. Numuke kudi bantu ba nanku." 
Romans16:18 Bualu bantu ba mushindu ewu kabena bakuatshila Kristu Mfumu wetu mudimu, kadi amu difu diabu! Badi bamanye mua kuakula bimpe, balongesha ne miaku ya lubombu. Ke mudibu badinga bantu badi ne lungenyi lutekete." 
Romans16:19 Bantu bonsu mbamanye munudi nutumikila Mfumu. Nanku ndi nsanka bualu buenu, njinga bua nuikale bantu ba meji, badi benza amu malu mimpe, babenga malu mabi onsu." 
Romans16:20 Mvidi Mukulu, udi utupa bupole, neaboze amu mpindiewu diabolu muinshi mua makasa enu. Dinanga dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu dishindame munda muenu!" 
Romans16:21 Timote, utudi tukuata nende mudimu, udi unuela muoyi, kabidi ne Lukiyuse, Yazone ne Sosipatere, bana hetu." 
Romans16:22 Meme kabidi, Tertiyuse, uvua mufunde mukanda ewu, ndi nnuela muoyi munda mua Mfumu, udi utusanga pamue." 
Romans16:23 Ngayuse, muena ku nzubu kundi, muaba udi bena ditaba bonsu basangile, udi unuela muoyi. Eraste, mulami wa mpeta wa mu tshimenga, ne muanetu Kuartase, badi banuela muoyi. [" 
Romans16:24 Dinanga dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu dikale nenu bonsu. Amene. ] 
Romans16:25 Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu! Yeye udi mua kunuenza bantu bakole mu ditaba, bilondeshile lumu lua disanka lundi ndongesha. Ke Lumu ludi lutangila Yezu Kristu, ludi lutumanyisha meji masokome avua Mvidi Mukulu nawu, avuaye musokoke kale bidimu bia bungi." 
Romans16:26 Kadi mpindiewu bavua baaleje patoke. Mikanda ya bambi idi ijadika nanku. Mvidi Mukulu mmufume diyi bua bamanyishe bisamba bionsu meji masokome aa, bua bitabe Lumu lua Disanka, bitamikile Mvidi Mukulu." 
Romans16:27 Mvidi Mukulu, udi nkayende muena meji, utudi bamanye kudi Yezu Kristu, atumbe kashidi tshiendelele! Amene." 
1Corinthians1:1 Meme Polu, uvua Mvidi Mukulu musue kusungula, bua ngikale mupostolu wa Yezu Kristu, pamue ne muanetu Sostene," 
1Corinthians1:2 tudi tunufundila, nuenu bena Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba tshia Mvidi Mukulu badi mu Korente, mukanda ewu. Tudi tunuela muoyi nuenu bonsu badi Mvidi Mukulu mubikile, bua nuikale bende, nuikale kabidi bantu ba tshijila, panudi nudisanga ne Yezu Kristu. Mukanda ewu mmufundila kabidi bantu bonsu ba miaba yonsu badi bitaba Yezu Kristu, udi Mfumu wabu, ne wetu kabidi." 
1Corinthians1:3 Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu, ne bia kudi Mfumu Yezu Kristu, bishindame munda muenu." 
1Corinthians1:4 Ndi ngela amu kuela Mvidi Mukulu wanyi tuasakidila bualu buenu, bualu mmunupe mu Yezu Kristu mudiye ununanga." 
1Corinthians1:5 Bualu panudi badisange ne Kristu, nudi bapete mapa onsu, nangananga dipa dia kumanya malu onsu, ne dia kualongesha." 
1Corinthians1:6 Bivua Kristu mutujadikile mbimane kushindama bimpe munkatshi muenu. 
1Corinthians1:7 Ke munudi kanuyi bapange dipa dia Mvidi Mukulu nansha dimue, nuenu badi bindile tshikondu tshidi Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu ne bua kumueneka mu butumbi buende." 
1Corinthians1:8 Yeye neanuambuluishe, bua nushale bashindame ne ku ndekelu, bua muntu kamonyi mua kunuasa tshilumbu nansha tshimue, dituku diafika Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Mvidi Mukulu uvua munubikile, bua nuenu kudisanga ne Muanende Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu mu nsombelu wenu mujima, udi ukumbaja bionsu bidiye ulaya." 
1Corinthians1:10 Bana hetu, mu dina dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, ndi nnulomba ne: umvuanganayi. Kanuabulukianganyi nansha. Nuenze tshintu tshimue menemene. Nuikale ne meji amue, kabidi ne muoyi umue." 
1Corinthians1:11 Bualu, bana hetu, bena diku dia muanetu wa bakaji Klowa bavua bammanyishe ne: nudi batapulukangane." 
1Corinthians1:12 Nudi bamanye tshindi musue kuamba. Yonsu wa kunudi udi wamba muende munga, yonsu wende mushindu. Ewu ne: “Ndi ndonda Polu”; mukuabu ne: “Ndi ndonda Apolose”; mukuabu ne: “Meme amu Petro ”; wawakabidi ne: “Meme amu Kristu.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Kadi nudi nuela meji ne: Kristu mmukosolola mu bitupa anyi? Uvua munufuile pa mutshi mutshiamakane Polu anyi? Bayua banutue mu mayi mu dina dia Polu anyi? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndi ngela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bualu tshivua mutue muntu wa kunudi nansha umue mu mayi, pa kumusha Krispuse ne Ngayuse." 
1Corinthians1:15 Nanku muntu nansha umue kena mua kuditemba ne: mbantue mu mayi mu dina dia Polu. 
1Corinthians1:16 (Bushuwa, mvua mutue kabidi bena mu diku dia Stefanaze mu mayi. Kadi tshiena muvuluke mumvua mutue kabidi muntu mukuabu mu mayi to.)" 
1Corinthians1:17 Kristu kavua muntume bua kutua bantu mu mayi nansha. Uvua muntume bua kumanyisha bantu Lumu lua Disanka. Kadi tshiena ndumanyisha ne meji a bantu, bua lufu lufuila Kristu pa mutshi mutshiamakane kalujimiji bukole bualu." 
1Corinthians1:18 Bualu bantu badi kabayi benda mu njila wa lupandu, badi batangila dilongesha dia bualu bua lufu lua Kristu pa mutshi mutshiamakane, bu dilongesha dia bupale. Kadi bualu buetu tuetu badi benda mu njila awu, dilongesha adi didi bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians1:19 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Nembutule meji a bena meji, nembenge dimanya dia bena lungenyi. ”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Nanku tshidi muena meji, nansha muntu udi mulonge mikanda, nansha muedianganyi wa mpata wa panuapa, mua kuamba kabidi ntshinyi? Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kuleja ne: meji a bena panu mbupale! ”" 
1Corinthians1:21 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmuleje meji ende mu bionsu. Kadi bantu ne meji abu nkayabu kabavua mua kujingulula mudi Mvidi Mukulu. Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu musue kusungidila bena ditaba ku dilongesha dietu dia Lumu lua Disanka, nansha badiamba ne: ndia bupale." 
1Corinthians1:22 Bena Yuda badi basue kumona malu a dikema, bena Ngreke badi bakeba meji." 
1Corinthians1:23 Kadi tuetu tudi tukobola Kristu uvuabu bapopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane. Bena Yuda badi bakamba ne: nudi nusendeka Mvidi Mukulu. Badi kabayi bena Yuda badi bakamba ne: nudi nulongesha malu a bupale. 
1Corinthians1:24 Kadi bua bonsu badi Mvidi Mukulu mubikile, nansha bena Yuda nansha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, Kristu udi bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ne meji a Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians1:25 Bualu bidi Mvidi Mukulu wenza, bantu badi babimona bu bia bupale, kadi bidi bipita meji a bantu. Mvidi Mukulu umueneka bu udi kayi ne bukole, kadi bukole buende mbupite bua bantu." 
1Corinthians1:26 Bana hetu, nuditangile nuenu mene. Bavua Mvidi Mukulu mubikile bua kubanga tshisumbu tshienu mbanganyi? Luseke lua buntu buetu, munkatshi muenu mudi bena meji bakese, mudi badi ne bukole bakese, mudi bantu baneme amu bakese kabidi." 
1Corinthians1:27 Kadi bua kufuisha bena meji bundu, Mvidi Mukulu mmusungule bidi bantu batangila bu bia bupale. Bua kufuisha badi ne bukole bundu, mmusungule bidi bantu batangila bu bidi kabiyi ne bukole." 
1Corinthians1:28 Uvua musungule bantu bashadile, badibu bapetula, badibu kabayi bangata ne mushinga, bua kubutula badi badiamba ne: tudi baneme." 
1Corinthians1:29 Nanku muntu nansha umue kena mua kuditemba kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmunusange ne Yezu Kristu. mMuenze Kristu meji etu. Kristu udi utubingisha kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, utuenza bantu bende ba tshijila, utupikula kabidi ku bubi." 
1Corinthians1:31 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Udi ujinga kuditemba, aditembe bua bidi Mvidi Mukulu muenze. ”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Bana hetu, tshikondu tshimvua mufike kuenu aku musangu wanyi wa kumpala, bua kunulongesha bualu bulelela busokome bua Mvidi Mukulu, tshivua muakule miaku mikole, nansha ya lungenyi lutue to." 
1Corinthians2:2 Bualu pamvua nenu, tshivua musue kunumanyisha bunga bualu, amu Yezu Kristu, nangananga Yezu Kristu uvuabu bapopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ke pamvua mudileje kunudi ne butekete, nzakala ne buowa." 
1Corinthians2:4 Bimvua muambe, bimvua munulongeshe, kabivua binutuila bualu mvua ngakula ne miaku ya lubombu, nansha ne meji matue a bantu; kadi amu bualu bukole bua Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu buvua budileja munda muanyi." 
1Corinthians2:5 Nanku ditaba dienu kadiena dishindama pa meji a bantu, kadi amu pa bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians2:6 Numanye ne: malu atudi tulongesha adi a meji, kadi amu bua bantu bakadi bashindame mu malu a Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku meji aa ki nga panu, nansha a bamfumu badi balombola buloba, bualu badi ne bua kubutuka." 
1Corinthians2:7 Kadi ndi nnumanyisha meji masokome a Mvidi Mukulu. Mvidi Mukulu kayi muanji kufuka buloba, ukavua mupangadike bua kutusanga mu butumbi buende. Kadi uvua musokoke bantu meji awu." 
1Corinthians2:8 Nansha umue wa ku bamfumu ba pa buloba ebu kavua mujingulule meji aa. Bu bobu baajingulule, kabavua mua kupopela Mfumu, udi wenza tshintu tshimue ne Mvidi Mukulu mu butumbi buende, pa mutshi mutshiamakane." 
1Corinthians2:9 Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Bidi muntu nansha umue kayi muanji kumona nansha kumvua, bidi kabiyi bianji kubuela mu meji a muntu, ke bidi Mvidi Mukulu mulongoluele badiye unanga. ”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmutusokoluele tuetu bualu busokome ebu ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Bualu Mueyelu udi mua kujingulula bionsu, nansha meji masokome menemene adi Mvidi Mukulu wela." 
1Corinthians2:11 Amu lungenyi lua muntu, ke ludi lujingulula bionsu bidi munda muende. Ke mudi kabidi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu nkayawu ujingulula bidi munda mua Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians2:12 Tuetu katuena bapete lungenyi lua pa buloba. Kadi tudi bapete Mueyelu udi ufuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Ke mutudi tumanya bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mutuenzele. 
1Corinthians2:13 Nanku katuena tulongesha malu aa ne miaku idi ileja meji a bantu, kadi amu ne miaku idi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu utumanyisha. Ke mutudi tumvuija bantu bidi Mvidi Mukulu muenze, ne miaku idi Mueyelu ewu utumanyisha." 
1Corinthians2:14 Muntu udi kayi ne Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kena mua kuitaba malu malelela adi Mueyelu ewu utumanyisha. Neaatangile bu a bupale. Kena mua kuajingulula, bualu amu muntu udi ne Mueyelu, ke udi mua kuamanya." 
1Corinthians2:15 Muntu udi ne Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kukonkonona bionsu, kadi yeye mene muntu nansha umue kena mua kumukonkonona to." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Udi mumanye lungenyi lua Mfumu nnganyi? Udi mua kumupesha lungenyi udiku anyi? ” Kadi lungenyi lua Kristu, tuetu tudi nalu." 
1Corinthians3:1 Bana hetu, tshivua musue kuyukila nenu, mudibu bayukila ne bantu badi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu ulombola nansha. Kadi mvua ne bua kunuyukidisha mudibu bayukila ne bantu batshidi ne meji a buntu, batshidi bana mu ditaba." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ke pamvua mununuishe mabele, tshiyi mua kunupa biakudia bikole, bualu kanuena banji kupeta bukole bua kubidia. Nansha mpindiewu mene kanuena banji kupeta bukole bua kubidia," 
1Corinthians3:3 bualu nutshidi nusomba bu bantu ba panu. Nudi nubabangana, nutandangana. Ke bidi bileja ne: nudi bantu ba panu, nuenza amu bidi bantu bakuabu bonsu benza." 
1Corinthians3:4 Padi umue wa kunudi wamba ne: “Meme ndi ndonda Polu,” munga ne: “Ndi ndonda Apolose, ” kanuena nuenza bu bantu batshidi ne meji a panu anyi?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Kadi Apolose mene nnganyi? Polu kabidi nnganyi? Tudi amu bena mudimu ba Mvidi Mukulu, bayua banufikisha ku ditaba. Yonsu wa kutudi udi ukumbaja mudimu udi Mfumu mumufundile." 
1Corinthians3:6 Mvua mukune maminu, Apolose kuamiamina mayi. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu ke udi wamenesha." 
1Corinthians3:7 Nanku mudimu wa mukunyi, ne wa mumiaminyi wa mayi, udi wa patupu. Kadi udi wenza bualu, ke Mvidi Mukulu. Bualu Yeye udi umenesha." 
1Corinthians3:8 Mudimu wa mukunyi, ne mudimu wa mumiaminyi wa mayi, udi wa mushinga wa momumue. Mvidi Mukulu neafute muntu yonsu diende difutu, bilondeshile mushindu udiye ukumbaja mudimu wende." 
1Corinthians3:9 Bualu tudi tukuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu amu umue, kabidi nuenu nudi budimi bua Mvidi Mukulu. Tudi mua kuamba kabidi ne: nudi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians3:10 Bilondeshile dipa dimvua mupete patupu kudi Mvidi Mukulu, mvua mulongolole bia kuasa nabi nzubu, meme kuibaka kabidi tshitaku. Mpindiewu mukuabu udi ubandisha bimana. Kadi muntu yonsu amanye mushindu udiye ne bua kuibaka." 
1Corinthians3:11 Bualu mbamane kuibaka tshitaku, ke Yezu Kristu. Kabena mua kutshijula, kupingaja tshikuabu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Bamue badi babandisha pa tshitaku atshi bimana bia mpawungi, nansha bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha bia mabue a mushinga mukole. Bakuabu badi babibandisha bienza ne mabaya, nansha ne mitshi, nansha ne nsona mene." 
1Corinthians3:13 Kadi mushinga wa mudimu wa muntu yonsu neumueneke dituku dia Tshilumbuluilu, bualu dituku adi kapia nekateme. Kapia aka nekatete mudimu wa muntu yonsu, bua kuleja mushinga wawu." 
1Corinthians3:14 Pikala muntu mubandishe pa tshitaku bimana bidi kapia kakayi mua kuosha, neapete difutu." 
1Corinthians3:15 Kadi pikala kapia kosha nzubu uvuaye muase, neapange difutu. Kadi yeye mene nebamusungidile, mudi muntu upitshila lubilu mu kapia bua kupanda." 
1Corinthians3:16 Nudi bamanye bulelela ne: nudi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu; kabidi ne: Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi usomba munda muenu. 
1Corinthians3:17 Nanku padi muntu upula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu neamupule ne yeye kabidi. Bualu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi wa tshijila. Nzubu wende awu ke nuenu mene." 
1Corinthians3:18 Muntu kaditshimbishi. Pikala muntu wa kunudi uditangila bu muena meji wa panuapa, adienze mupale, bua apete meji a bushuwa." 
1Corinthians3:19 Bualu meji a panu adi bupale kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. Ke mudi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi ukuata bena meji mu buteyi bua budimu buabu.” 
1Corinthians3:20 Mukanda udi wamba kabidi ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi ujingulula meji adi bantu bela, udi mumanye ne: adi a tshianana. ”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Nanku muntu kena ne bua kuditemba bua balongeshi bende. Bualu bionsu mbienu: 
1Corinthians3:22 Polu, Apolose, nansha Petro, bukua panu bujima, muoyi ne lufu, lelu ne malaba, bionsu mbienu." 
1Corinthians3:23 Kadi nuenu nudi bantu ba Kristu, Kristu pende udi wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians4:1 Nudi ne bua kututangila bu bantu badi bakuatshila Kristu mudimu, badi ne bujitu bua kulongesha malu masokome a Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians4:2 Kadi tshidibu batekemena kudi muntu udibu bafundile mudimu ntshinyi? Badi bajinga amu ne: aukumbaje pa wowu! 
1Corinthians4:3 Nuenu kanuena mua kundumbuluisha bua mushindu undi ngenza mudimu wani. Nansha bantu bakuabu bonsu, bakoshi ba nsambu, kabena mua kundumbuluisha. Meme mene tshiena ndilumbuluisha." 
1Corinthians4:4 Bulelela kondu kanyi ka munda kakena kampisha nansha kakese. Kadi ebi kabiena bijadika ne: ndi mubinge to. Mfumu ke mukoshi wanyi wa nsambu. 
1Corinthians4:5 Nanku kanulumbuluishi muntu, diba kadiyi dianji kufika. Indilayi Mfumu. Afike! Yeye nealeje patoke bidibu basokoka mu miidima. Neasokolole bidi bisokome mu mioyi ya bantu. Diba adi muntu yonsu neapete kudi Mvidi Mukulu lumu ludiye ne bua kupeta." 
1Corinthians4:6 Bana hetu, mu bionsu ebi mvua mutele Apolose, muditele kabidi, amu bu bilejilu bua kunulongesha. Mvua musue bua nujingulule tshidi lusumuinu elu luamba ne: “Nuitabe amu bidibu bafunde. ” Muntu nansha umue wa kunudi kena mua kutumbisha mulongeshi umue, kudiwula mukuabu." 
1Corinthians4:7 Kadi muudi mua kuditemba bu udi mupite bakuabu mmunyi? Bionsu biudi nabi, kuena mubipete kudi Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Kadi muudi mua kuditemba bua bionsu abi, bu muntu udi mudipetelebi mmunyi?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Nudi nuela meji ne: nukadi ne bionsu binudi nujinga anyi? Nukadi bena biuma anyi? Nuenu nukadi bakalenga, tuetu tushala bantu ba patupu anyi? Mvua musue bua nuikale bakalenga bushuwa, bua tuetu kabidi tudie nenu bukalenga!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Bualu ndi mumone ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmututeke tuetu bapostolu muaba wa ku ndekelu. Tudi bu bena tshibawu, bua batushipe, bonsu batangile. Mbatuele mu tshialu bu bena manaya, bua bonsu bautangile, batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu ne bantu kabidi." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tudi bantu bapale bualu bua Kristu, kadi nuenu nudi ne meji badisange ne Kristu. Tuetu katuena ne bukole, kadi nuenu nudi nabu. Badi batupenda, kadi nuenu badi banunemeka!" 
1Corinthians4:11 Too ne ku lelu ewu, tudi tukenga, tufua nzala ne nyota, katuyi ne bilamba bikumbane. Badi batutuuta, tutua eku tutua kuaka." 
1Corinthians4:12 Tudi tukuata mudimu, tupungila bua kudipetela biakudia, Badi batupenda, tudi tubela lupemba. Padibu bankengesha, tudi tulama lutuulu." 
1Corinthians4:13 Badi batushiminyina malu, tudi tubandamuna ne miaku mimpe. Nansha mpindiewu kabidi, badi batutangila munkatshi mua bantu bu bintu bidibu bakomba bua kubiela ku diala." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ndi nnufundila nenku, ki mbua kunufuisha bundu, kadi amu bua kunubela bu bana banyi bandi nnanga." 
1Corinthians4:15 Bualu, nansha nuenu bapete balongeshi binunu dikumi, badi banuludika mu njila wa Yezu Kristu, kadi tatuenu udi anu umue. Bualu bu mumvua munutuadile Lumu lua Disanka, ndi mudienze tatuenu mu njila unudi nulonda badisange ne Yezu Kristu." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ke pandi nnusengelela ne: ngidikijayi. 
1Corinthians4:17 Ke mundi nnutumina Timote, muananyi munanga, wa diyi dimue munda mua Mfumu. Yeye neanuvuluije bindi ngenza mu didisanga dianyi ne Yezu Kristu. Neanulongeshe malu andi ndongesha miaba yonsu mu Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba." 
1Corinthians4:18 Bamue ba kunudi bayua badiela mulu, bela meji ne: Polu kakufika kuetu bua kumonangana netu." 
1Corinthians4:19 Kadi pasua Mfumu, nemfike kuenu aku lukasa. Diba adi tshiakumanya amu miaku ya badi badiela mulu abu, kadi nenjingulule kabidi bidibu mua kuenza." 
1Corinthians4:20 Bualu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu kabuena bualu bua miaku nansha, kadi bua bukole budi Mvidi Mukulu uleja." 
1Corinthians4:21 Tshinudi nusungula ntshinyi? Mfike kuenu aku ne lukodi, anyi ne muoyi wa dinanga, kabidi ne miaku mimpe?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Tudi bumvue bamba miaba yonsu ne: kuenu eku mbenze malu a bundu bupite, adi nansha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabayi benza. Bualu badi balonda ne: umue wa kunudi udi usomba ne mukaji wa tatuende!" 
1Corinthians5:2 Kadi munudi nuditemba kabidi mmunyi? Nuvua ne bua kubungama, kumusha muntu awu munkatshi muenu." 
1Corinthians5:3 Nansha tshiyi munkatshi muenu ne mubidi, kadi ndi nenu ku bukole bua Mueyelu. Nkadi mumane kukosa mu dina dia Yezu Mfumu wetu tshilumbu tshia muntu uvua muenze bibi awu, amu bu meme muikale munkatshi muenu." 
1Corinthians5:4 Ke mudi dikosa dia tshilumbu tshiende nenku: nusangile muaba umue. Meme nengikale nenu ku bukole bua Mueyelu mu dina dia Yezu Mfumu wetu. 
1Corinthians5:5 Nanku tufile muntu awu kudi diabolu bua kubutula mubidi wende, kadi bua kusungidila mueyelu wende dituku dia Mfumu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Tshinudi mua kuditambishila ntshinyi? Nudi bamanye lusumuinu lua ne: “Buanga bukese bua mampa budi butuntumuna tshitapitapi tshionsu. ” 
1Corinthians5:7 Umushayi buanga bua mampa bukulukulu bua mibi ebu, bua nuikale kanuyi ne kalema nansha kamue. Nanku nenuikale bu tshitapitapi tshipiatshipia katshiyi tshiela buanga. Ke munukadi bulelela. Bualu bakadi bamane kulambula Kristu, muana wa mukoku wetu, bua kubanga tshibilu tshietu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Corinthians5:8 Nanku tuenzayi tshibilu tshietu. Kadi katuena mua kutshienza, kudia mampa mela buanga bukulukulu, buanga bua bubi, ne bua malu a bundu. Tudie amu mampa kaayi mela buanga, mampa a bunonoke, ne a bulelela." 
1Corinthians5:9 Mvua munulombe mu mukanda mukuabu ne: kanubuelakanyi ne bena malu a bundu. 
1Corinthians5:10 Tshivua musue kuamba ne: nulekele kuendakana panu ne bonsu badi benza malu a bundu, nansha ne bena lukuka lua biuma, bivi, anyi batendeledi ba mvidie. Bualu bu nuenu basue kuepuka bonsu abu, nudi ne bua kumuka panu!" 
1Corinthians5:11 Mvua musue kunuambila ne: kanubuelakanyi ne muntu udi udiamba ne: ndi ndonda Kristu, kadi muikale muenji wa malu a bundu, muena lukuka lua biuma, mutendeledi wa mvidie, munyangi walumu lua bende, mukuatshiki wa maluvu, nansha muivi. Nansha bua kudia ne muntu wa nanku, kanudi nende to." 
1Corinthians5:12 Bualu tshiena mua kulumbuluisha badi kabayi mu tshisumbu tshietu. 
1Corinthians5:13 Mvidi Mukulu neabalumbuluishe. Kadi kanuena ne bua kulumbuluisha badi mu tshisumbu tshienu anyi? Nudi amu ne bua kulumbuluisha! Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Ipatayi muntu mubi munkatshi muenu. ” 
1Corinthians6:1 Padi umue wa kunudi tshilumbu ne muanabu, mudiye ukimina kufunda muanabu kudi bakoshi ba nsambu badi kabayi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu mmunyi? Bena ditaba nabu kabena mua kubalumbuluisha anyi?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Kanuena bamanye ne: bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu nebalumbuluishe bantu bonsu anyi? Panudi mua kulumbuluisha bonsu ba pa buloba, munukadi kanuyi mua kukosa nsambu mikese idi munkatshi muenu mbishi?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Kanuena bamanye ne: netukose nsambu ya batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Kadi mutudi katuyi mua kukosa nsambu ya bena panu mmunyi? 
1Corinthians6:4 Kadi panudi ne bilumbu bia nanku, nudi nuya kudi bakoshi ba nsambu, badi kabayi badisanga nenu mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba!" 
1Corinthians6:5 Ikalayi ne bundu! Munkatshi muenu kamuena muntu nansha umue wa meji udi mua kukosa nsambu ya bana babu anyi? 
1Corinthians6:6 Bulelela, muena ditaba udi mua kufunda muena ditaba nende ku tshilumbu anyi? Badi kabayi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu, ke badi ne bua kukosa nsambu yenu anyi?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Kadi nukadi nuenza bibi bitambe, panudi nufundangana. Pa mutu pa kuenza nanku, nuanyishe bua banukengeshe kapayi bualu; nuanyishe kabidi bua bibe bintu bienu." 
1Corinthians6:8 Pa mutu pa kulama lutuulu, nuenu mene nudi nukengesha bantu, nuiba bintu biabu, bobu bikale bena ditaba nenu!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Nudi bamanye bimpe ne: bantu badi benza malu mabi, kabena mua kupeta muaba mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Kanudishimi! Badi benza malu a bundu, batendeledi ba mvidie, banyangi ba mbanza ya bende, badi banaya ne bana manaya a bundu," 
1Corinthians6:10 bivi, bena lukuka lua biuma, bakuatshiki ba maluvu, banyangi ba lumu lua bende, ne bantu badi banyenga bantu bintu ku bukole, kabakupeta muaba mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians6:11 Ke muvua bamue ba kunudi kale. Kadi mbamane kunujimijila mibi yenu, banuenze bantu ba tshijila bua nuikale bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kunubingisha mu dina dia Mfumu Yezu Kristu, kabidi ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Bamue ba kunudi badi bamba ne: “Ndi mua kuenza bionsu bindi musue.” Bidi nanku! Kadi bionsu kabiena bikulengelela nansha. Mvua mua kuamba ne: “Ndi mua kuenza bionsu bindi musue,” kadi tshiena mua kudienza mupika wa muntu, nansha wa tshintu." 
1Corinthians6:13 Nudi nuamba kabidi ne: “Biakudia bidiku bua tshibi. Tshiotshi tshidiku bua biakudia.” Eyowa, kadi Mvidi Mukulu neabutule bionsu bibidi. Nanku mubidi kawena muenzela malu a bundu. Udi muenzela Mfumu. Yeye udi Mfumu wa mubidi wetu kabidi." 
1Corinthians6:14 Bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu mubishe Mfumu ku lufu, ku bukole buende neambishe ne tuetu kabidi ku muoyi mupiamupia." 
1Corinthians6:15 Nudi bamanye ne: mibidi yenu idi bidimba bia mubidi wa Kristu. Ndi mua kuangata tshidimba tshia mubidi wa Kristu, kutshienza tshidimba tshia mubidi wa mukaji muena tshiendenda anyi? Nansha kakese!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Kanuena bamanye ne: muntu udi usomba ne mukaji muena tshiendenda, udi wenza nende mubidi umue anyi? Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Bubidi buabu nebenze mubidi umue. ”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Kadi udi udisanga ne Mfumu, udi wenza nende tshintu tshimue mu Mueyelu wende." 
1Corinthians6:18 Epukayi malu a bundu! Bubi bukuabu buonsu budi muntu wenza, kabuena bukuata mubidi wende to. Kadi udi wenza malu a bundu, udi unyanga mubidi wende." 
1Corinthians6:19 Kanuena bamanye ne: mubidi wenu udi nzubu wa Mueyelu wa Tshijila anyi? Mueyelu awu udi munda muenu. Nuvua baupete kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Nuenu nudi bintu bia bende bia Mvidi Mukulu. 
1Corinthians6:20 Mvidi Mukulu mmunusumbe, mufute mushinga. Nanku tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu mu mubidi wenu." 
1Corinthians7:1 Tuandamune mpindiewu ku nkonku inuvua bangele mu mukanda unuvua bantumine. Nudi nuamba ne: “Bidi bimpe bua mulume kikadi ne mukaji to. ” 
1Corinthians7:2 Eyowa, kadi bu mudi malu a bundu matampakane bikole, bidi bipite buimpe bua mulume yonsu ikale ne mukajende, bua mukaji yonsu kabidi ikale ne bayende." 
1Corinthians7:3 Mulume yonsu enzele mukajende bidiye ne bua kumuenzela. Mukaji kabidi enzele bayende bidiye ne bua kumuenzela. 
1Corinthians7:4 Mukaji kena mua kudienzela malu ne mubidi wende, bualu mubidi wende ngwa bayende. Mushindu umue, mulume kena mua kudienzela malu ne mubidi wende, bualu mubidi wende ngwa mukajende." 
1Corinthians7:5 Kanubenganganyi mu nzubu. Panuikala basue kubengangana nanku, nuanji kumonangana. Nuenze kabidi nanku amu bua matuku makese, bua numone mua kutendelela muenu muonsu. Pashishe nudisange tshiakabidi mu nzubu, muenu mua tshibidilu. Kanuyi benze nanku, nudi mua kupanga kudilama, diabolu udi mua kunuteya, kunutshimuna." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ndi nnuambila ebi bua kunuambuluisha, ki mbua kunuelela mukenji to." 
1Corinthians7:7 Bulelela, dijinga dianyi didi ne: bantu bonsu bikale mundi. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi upesha muntu yonsu diende dipa, muntu yonsu diende." 
1Corinthians7:8 Bindi ngambila bantu bajike, ne bakaji bakamba, mbiobi ebi: mbimpe nushale nkayenu, nuikale mundi." 
1Corinthians7:9 Kadi panudi kanuyi mua kudikolela, nubuele mu dibaka. Bidi bipite buimpe kubuela mu dibaka, pa mutu pa kushala ne dialakana mu muoyi." 
1Corinthians7:10 Bena ditaba badi baselangana, ndi mbelela mukenji (udi kauyi wanyi, kadi wa kudi Mfumu) wa ne: mukaji udi ku dibaka, kena ne bua kumuka kudi bayende." 
1Corinthians7:11 — Padiye umuka kudi bayende, kabuedi mu dibaka dikuabu to. Kadi udi mua ku-mvuangana tshiakabidi ne bayende, kupingana kudiye. — Mulume kabidi udi mu dibaka, kena ne bua kuipata mukajende." 
1Corinthians7:12 Bindi ngamba mpindiewu kabiena bifuma kudi Mfumu to. Meme nkayanyi ndi mbiamba ne: pikala mulume muena ditaba ne mukaji udi kayi muena ditaba, mukajende awu muanyishe bua kushala nende mu dibaka, kena ne bua kumuipata nansha." 
1Corinthians7:13 Momumue, pikala mukaji muena ditaba ne bayende udi kayi muena ditaba, mulume awu muanyishe bua kushala nende mu dibaka, mukaji kena ne bua kumubenga nansha." 
1Corinthians7:14 Bualu mulume udi kayi muena ditaba, Mvidi Mukulu udi umuanyisha, bua padiye udisanga ne mukajende muena ditaba. Kabidi mukaji udi kayi muena ditaba, Mvidi Mukulu udi umuanyisha, bua padiye udisanga ne bayende muena ditaba. Bu biobi kabiyi nanku, bana badibu balela bavua mua kuikala ne mikiya, baledi kabayi mua kumonangana nabu. Kadi bana babu badi bantu ba tshijila, badi Mvidi Mukulu wanyisha." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kadi pikala mulume nansha mukaji, udi kayi muena ditaba, musue kubengangana ne muena dibaka nende udi muena ditaba, nuanyishe bua enze amu nanku. Diba adi muena ditaba, mulume nansha mukaji, udi mua kuenza bidiye musue. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmunubikile bua nusombe mu bupole." 
1Corinthians7:16 Wewe mukaji muena ditaba, udi mua kujadika ne: neusungidile bayebe anyi? Nansha wewe mulume muena ditaba, udi mua kujadika ne: neusungidile mukajebe anyi?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Pa kumusha amu bualu bumvua munuambile abu, ndi ngela mukenji ewu mu Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba ne: muntu yonsu asombe bilondeshile dipa divuaye mupete kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ashale muvuaye diba divua Mvidi Mukulu mumubikile." 
1Corinthians7:18 Pikalabu bamane kuteka muntu panshi, diba divua Mvidi Mukulu mumubikile, muntu awu kakebi mua kusokoka bualu abu nansha. Pikalabu kabayi bamane kuteka muntu panshi, diba divua Mvidi Mukulu mumubikile, kena ne bua kuditekeshisha panshi nansha." 
1Corinthians7:19 Nansha bakuteke panshi, nansha kabayi bakuteke panshi, ki mbualu to. Tshidi ne bualu nkutumikila mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians7:20 Muntu yonsu ashale muende mutataye diba divua Mvidi Mukulu mumubikile. 
1Corinthians7:21 Ne uvua mupika diba divua Mvidi Mukulu mukubikile, kupampakanyi nansha. Kadi paudi upeta mushindu wa kupatuka mu bupika, upatuke." 
1Corinthians7:22 Bualu mupika uvua Mvidi Mukulu mubikile, mbamane kumupikula, bualu ukadi wa Mfumu. Momumue kabidi, muntu uvua kayi mupika diba divua Kristu mumubikile, ukadi mupika wa Kristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mvidi Mukulu uvua munusumbe, muhite mushinga. Nanku kanudienji bapika ba bantu." 
1Corinthians7:24 Eyowa, bana hetu, muntu yonsu ashale kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu muende muvuaye diba divua Mvidi Mukulu mumubikile." 
1Corinthians7:25 Ndi ngandamuna ku nkonku yenu ya pa bantu badi kabayi mu dibaka. Bindi ngamba ebi ki mbia kudi Mfumu to. Ndi mfila meji mundi mumone. Bu mudi Mfumu mumfuile luse, nudi amu mua kuitaba bindi ngamba." 
1Corinthians7:26 Bu mutudi tshikondu tshia dikenga, ndi ngela meji ne: mbimpe muntu yonsu ashale muende mudiye." 
1Corinthians7:27 Wewe ne mukaji, nanku kukebi mua kulekelangana nende. Kuyi ne mukaji, nanku kukebi kubuela mu dibaka." 
1Corinthians7:28 Kadi paudi usela, kuena wenza bualu bubi. Padi nsongakaji uya ku dibaka, kena wenza bualu bubi. Kadi ndi musue kunuepula ku ntatu ya matuku onsu idi bantu badi mu dibaka nayi." 
1Corinthians7:29 Bana hetu, ndi musue kuamba nunku: matuku mmashale makese. Kutuadijila mpindiewu, bantu badi basele, basombe bu badi kabayi ne bakaji;" 
1Corinthians7:30 badi badila, basombe bu badi kabayi ne dibungama; badi baseka, basombe bu badi kabayi ne disanka; badi basumba bintu, basombe bu badi kabayi ne bivuabu basumbe;" 
1Corinthians7:31 badi bakuata mudimu ne bia panu, basombe bu badi kabayi bakuata nabi mudimu. Bualu bia panu kabiena binenga kabidi mutantshi mule to." 
1Corinthians7:32 Mvua musue kunuepula ku ntatu yonsu. Udi kayi mu dibaka, udi usumpakana bua malu a Mfumu, ukeba kusankisha Mfumu." 
1Corinthians7:33 Kadi udi mu dibaka, udi usumpakana bua malu a panu, ukeba kusankisha mukajende." 
1Corinthians7:34 Muoyi wende udi usumpakana ne: ngenze etshi, ngenze tshiatshia. Mukaji kabidi udi kayi mu dibaka, nansha nsongakaji, udi usumpakana bua malu a Mfumu, bualu udi ukeba kusankisha Mfumu mu bionsu bidiye wenza, nansha wela meji. Kadi mukaji udi mu dibaka, udi usumpakana bua malu a panu, ukeba kusankisha bayende." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ndi ngamba nanku bua kunuenzela bimpe, ki mbua kunuenzeja malu ku bukole. Ndi musue bua nuenze amu malu mimpe, nukuatshile Mfumu mudimu muenu muonsu." 
1Corinthians7:36 Tuyayi mu bualu bua badi babangilangana. Padi nsongalume ne dijinga dikole, umona ne: meme tshiyi musele nsongakaji awu, ndi mmuenzela bibi, mbimpe baselangane mudibu basue. Kabena benza bualu bubi to." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kadi padi muntu, kabayi bamuenzeje ku bukole, mujadike munda muende ne: tshiena musue kusela, mumanye kabidi mua kudikolela, mbimpe alame amu dipangadika dia kubenga kubuela ne nsongakaji ewu mu dibaka." 
1Corinthians7:38 Nanku udi ubuela mu dibaka ne mubangila wende, udi wenza bimpe. Kadi udi kayi ubuela nende mu dibaka, udi wenza bimpe bipite." 
1Corinthians7:39 Mukaji udi mu dibaka, kena mua kuenza mudiye musue, patshidi bayende ne muoyi. Amu bayende mumane kufua, udi mua kubuela mu dibaka ne muntu udiye musue. Kadi muntu awu ikale amu muena ditaba." 
1Corinthians7:40 Kadi bu yeye mua kushala mukamba, neikale ne disanka dipite. Ke tshindi ngela meji. Ndi ngitaba ne: nansha meme ndi ne Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians8:1 Tuyayi ku lukonku lunuvua bangele bua minyinyi ivuabu balambule mvidie: Ndi ngitaba binudi nuamba ne: “Bonsu tudi bamanye malu.” Kadi dimanya edi didi diela muntu mulu. Amu dinanga didi dibakolesha mu ditaba. 
1Corinthians8:2 Muntu udi wela meji ne: ndi mumanye, kena muanji kumanya mudiye ne bua kumanya." 
1Corinthians8:3 Amu muntu udi unanga Mvidi Mukulu, ke udi Mvidi Mukulu mumanye." 
1Corinthians8:4 Nuvua bangebeje ne: tudi mua kudia minyinyi ivuabu balambule mvidie anyi? Tudi bamanye bimpe ne: mvidie mikuabu kayenaku to. Mvidi Mukulu udi amu umue. 
1Corinthians8:5 Bushuwa mu diulu ne pa buloba mudi bintu bidi bantu banemeka ne: mmvidie. — Ke mutudi mua kuamba ne: “mvidie” ne “bamfumu” bidi bia bungi. — 
1Corinthians8:6 Kadi buetu tuetu kudi Mvidi Mukulu amu umuepele, Tatu, Mufuki wa bionsu. Tudi ne muoyi panu, bua kuya kudiye. Kudi kabidi Mfumu umuepele, Yezu Kristu. Bionsu bidiku ku bukole buende. Tudi bapete muoyi amu kudiye." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kadi bantu bonsu kabena bamanye bualu ebu to. Bamue badi bibidile ditendelela mvidie. Nanku too ne ku lelu, padibu badia minyinyi eyi, badi amu bela meji ne: tudi tunemeka mvidie ayi. Ke mudi kondu kabu ka munda kabapisha, padibu badia tshiakudia tshia nanku." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kadi tshidi tshitusemeja pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu ki ntshiakudia nansha. Tuetu katuyi badie minyinyi ayi, katuena dijimija tshintu. Tuetu bayidie, katuena tupeta tshintu." 
1Corinthians8:9 Kadi dimukayi! Bualu panudi nuenza nanku, nudia bionsu binudi basue, bumue nudi mua kulenduisha badi batekete mu ditaba." 
1Corinthians8:10 Bualu muntu udi ne ditaba ditekete, udi mua kukumona wewe, udi wamba ne: ndi mumanye malu, udia mu nzubu wa kutendelela mvidie. Diba adi kuena umusaka bua adie munyinyi uvuabu balambule, udi kondu kende ka munda kabenga anyi?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Nenku muntu udi kayi ne ditaba dikole awu, neajimine, bualu wewe udi wamba ne: ndi mumanye malu! Yeye mene ke muanenu udi Kristu mufuile!" 
1Corinthians8:12 Panudi nuenzela bana benu bibi, nushipa kondu kabu ka munda kadi katekete, nudi nuenzela Kristu mene bibi." 
1Corinthians8:13 Nanku pikala biakudia bilenduisha muanetu, kashidi tshiena mua kudia kabidi munyinyi, bua tshifikishi muanetu ku bubi." 
1Corinthians9:1 Tshiena mua kuenza mundi musue anyi? Tshiena mupostolu anyi? Tshiona mumone Yezu Mfumu wetu anyi? Nuenu kanuena tshipeta tshia ku mudimu undi mukuatshile Mfumu anyi? 
1Corinthians9:2 Nansha bakuabu kabayi bitaba ne: ndi mupostolu, kadi buenu nuenu ndi mupostolu. Nanku dijadika dia ne: ndi mupostolu, ke nuenu mene, bualu nudi badisange ne Mfumu." 
1Corinthians9:3 Umvuayi mundi ndilumbuluila, mpisha badi banjana:" 
1Corinthians9:4 Pandi nkuata mudimu, kabena ne bua kundisha, kabidi kunnuisha anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:5 Tshiena mua kuya mu luendu ne mukaji muena ditaba, mudi bapostolu bakuabu, Petro ne bana babu ne Mfumu, benza anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Nanku amu meme ne Barnabase, ke badi ne tshilumbu tshia kukuata mudimu ne bianza, bua kupeta tshiakudia tshietu anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Katshia nukadi bumvue bamba ne: musolayi udi mua kudifuta bua mudimu udiye wenza mu mvita anyi? Muntu udi ne budimi bua mvinyo, kena mua kudia tumuma tua mu budimi abu anyi? Udi ulama mikoku, kena mua kunua mabele ayi anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Tshiena njadika bindi ngamba ebi amu ne bilejilu bidi bantu bonsu bamanye to. Mikenji ya Moshe kabidi idi ilongesha bualu bua momumue. 
1Corinthians9:9 Bualu mbafunde mu mikenji eyi ne: “Ngombe udi ukuata mudimu ushipula miepu, kabena mua kumuela nkata ku mbanga nansha. ” Mvidi Mukulu udi bualu ne ngombe anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu wamba, kena ubiamba bualu buetu anyi? Bushuwa, mukenji awu mmutufundila tuetu. Nansha udi udima, nansha udi ushipula ntete, bonsu mbatekemene kupeta bia ku dinowa." 
1Corinthians9:11 Tuvua bamiamine munda muenu maminu a Lumu lua Disanka, adi kaayi amueneka ku mesu. Mutudi katuyi mua kunowa kunudi bia panu bitudi tukengela mbishi?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Padi bakuabu mua kupeta bia nanku kunudi, tuetu katuena mua kubipeta anyi? Tudi bashadile kudibu anyi? Kadi katuvua balombe bituvua mua kulomba nansha. Pa mutu pa kuenza nanku, tuoua tuditatshisha bua kupeta bituvua tukengela, bua katujikidi Lumu lua Disanka ludi lutangila Kristu njila." 
1Corinthians9:13 Nudi bamanye bimpe ne: badi benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, badi bapeta biakudia biabu ku bidi bantu bela mu nzubu amu. Badi balambula milambu pa tshilambuilu, badi bapeta tshiabu tshitupa tshia milambu eyi." 
1Corinthians9:14 Ke pavua Mfumu muele mukenji ne: badi balongesha Lumu lua Disanka, bapete biakudia ku mudimu ewu." 
1Corinthians9:15 Kadi meme tshivua mulombe bimvua mua kulomba nansha. Tshiena nnufundila nanku, bua mbipete mpindiewu. Ndi njinga kufua pa mutu pa kubilomba! Muntu nansha umue kena mua kunnyenga lumu luanyi pa bualu ebu to!" 
1Corinthians9:16 Tshiena mua kuditemba, bua pandi mmanyisha bantu Lumu lua Disanka nansha. Bualu mbujitu budi bungomekela. Tshiyi ntangalaja Lumu lua Disanka, ndi muena diakabi." 
1Corinthians9:17 Bu meme mudisunguile mudimu ewu, mvua mua kutekemena bua bamfute. Kadi pandi tshiyi ngenza mudimu awu ku disua dianyi, ndi nkumbaja amu bidibu bamfundile." 
1Corinthians9:18 Nanku difutu dindi mpeta ndifutu kaayi? Ke disanka dindi nadi, pandi mua kulongesha Lumu lua Disanka patupu, tshiyi nkeba ne: bamfute, tshiyi ndomba bidi muambi wa Lumu lua Disanka mua kulomba." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ndi mua kuenza mundi musue. Tshiena mupika wa muntu to. Kadi ndi mua kudienza mupika wa bonsu, bua kufikisha kudi Kristu bonsu bandi mua kufikisha." 
1Corinthians9:20 Pandi nkuata mudimu munkatshi mua bena Yuda, ndi ndienza muena Yuda, bua kubafikisha kudi Kristu. Nansha meme tshiyi ne bua kulama mikenji ya Moshe, pandi nkuata mudimu munkatshi mua bantu badi bayilama, ndi nyilama kabidi, bua kubafikisha kudi Kristu." 
1Corinthians9:21 Momumue kabidi, pandi muaba udi bantu kabayi bamanye mikenji ya Moshe, ndi nsomba mudibu basomba bobu, tshiyi ndama mikenji, bua kufikisha bantu aba kudi Kristu. Kadi tshiena musue kuamba ne: ndi mbenga mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu to. Mikenji indi ndama meme nya Kristu." 
1Corinthians9:22 Pandi ne bantu badi batekete mu ditaba, ndi nsomba amu mudibu basomba bobu, bua kubafikisha kudi Kristu. Ndi nditeka mulongu umue ne muntu yonsu, bua mmone mua kupandisha nansha bamue ba kudibu." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ndi ngenza bionsu ebi bua Lumu lua Disanka, bua mmone mua kupeta bidi Lumu alu lutulaya." 
1Corinthians9:24 Nudi bamanye bimpe ne: mu manaya bonsu badi banyema, kadi amu umue udi upeta nsala wa kalumbandi. Nanku nyemayi bikole, bua numupete." 
1Corinthians9:25 Bonsu badi banaya nanku, badi badikengesha, bajila bintu bivule. Badi benza nanku bua kupeta nsala wa kalumbandi wa matuku makese. Kadi tuetu tudi tunyema bua kupeta nsala wa kalumbandi udi ushala kashidi." 
1Corinthians9:26 Ke pandi nnyema, ntangila tshindi ngipatshila. Tshiena bu mututshianganyi udi wela dinkomu kua patupu." 
1Corinthians9:27 Ndi ndituuta bikole, nkengesha mubidi wanyi mujima. Tshianana ndi bu muntu udi ubikila bakuabu bua bipatshile nsala wa kalumbandi, meme mene tshiyi mua kumupeta, mpangila mu njila." 
1Corinthians10:1 Bana hetu, ndi musue bua nuvuluke bivua bienzekele bankambua hetu bayua baya ne Moshe. Divuba divua dibalama bonsu. Ke mutotabu basabuke mayi manene Makunze kakuyi bualu." 
1Corinthians10:2 Bu muvuabu bapitshile mu divuba ne mu mayi manene, mbamane kubatua bonsu mu mayi, bua bikale balongi ba Moshe." 
1Corinthians10:3 Bayua badia bonsu biakudia bia momumue bidi kabiyi bimueneka. 
1Corinthians10:4 Bavua banua bonsu biakunua bia momumue bidi kabiyi bimueneka. Bualu bayua banua mayi a ku lubuebue kaluyi lumueneka, luvua luenda nabu. Lubuebue alu ke Kristu." 
1Corinthians10:5 Kadi nansha bobu benze nanku, bavule ba kudibu kabavua balengelela Mvidi Mukulu. Ke muvuabu bafuile mu tshipela." 
1Corinthians10:6 Bilejilu ebi bidi bitudimuja, bua katujingi malu mabi, muvua bantu abu baajinge," 
1Corinthians10:7 kabidi bua kanutendeledi mvidie, muvua bamue ba kudibu benze. Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Bantu aba kusomba mu tshibilu bua kudia ne kunua; pashishe kujukabu bua kuenza malu mabi. ”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Katuena ne bua kuenza malu a bundu, muvua bamue ba kudibu benze. Bantu binunu makumi abidi ne bisatu kufua dituku dimue." 
1Corinthians10:9 Katuena mua kuteta Mfumu, muvua bamue ba kudibu benze. Ke nyoka kubasuma, bobu kufua." 
1Corinthians10:10 Kanuena ne bua kujana Mvidi Mukulu, muvua bamue ba kudibu benze. Mutumibue, uvuabu batume ne lufu, kubashipa." 
1Corinthians10:11 Makenga awu avua mabakuate bua kutulongesha bualu. Bayua batufundilewu bua kutubela. Bualu tudi mu tshikondu tshia nshikidilu. 
1Corinthians10:12 Nanku muntu udi wela meji ne: ndi muimane kulu, adimuke bua kaponyi panshi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Bualu matetshibua onsu anuvua nawu, ke adibu bateta nawu bantu misangu yonsu. Mvidi Mukulu udi ukumbaja malaya ende. Kakuanyisha bua matetshibua anupite bukole. Kadi diba didibu banuteta, yeye neanupe bukole bua kutua nkanana, kabidi bua kupatuka nabu mu matetshibua." 
1Corinthians10:14 Nanku, balunda banyi bananga, lekelayi kutendelela mvidie." 
1Corinthians10:15 Nudi bantu ba lungenyi. Jingululayi bindi ngamba ebi. 
1Corinthians10:16 Vulukayi dikopu ditudi tuela nadi Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, tumutumbisha. Patudi tunuinamu, katuena tudisanga ne mashi a Kristu anyi? Vulukayi diampa ditudi tukosa, diabanyangana. Patudi tudidia, katuena tudisanga ne mubidi wa Kristu anyi?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Diampa didi amu dimue epele. Nanku nansha tuetu bikale bavule, tudi tuenza mubidi amu umue, bualu tudi tudisanga bonsu mu diampa dimue adi." 
1Corinthians10:18 Tangilayi bena Izrayele: badi badia bidi bantu balambula, badi badisanga ne Mvidi Mukulu udibu balambula bintu abi." 
1Corinthians10:19 Nudi nuela meji ne: pandi ngamba nanku, ndi ngangata mvidie, nansha munyinyi udibu balambula mvidie, ne mushinga anyi?" 
1Corinthians10:20 “Nansha kakese! Kadi ndi ngamba ne: bidi batendeledi ba mvidie balambula, kabena babilambula Mvidi Mukulu, kadi amu mikishi mibi. Nanku tshiena musue bua nudisange ne mikishi mibi." 
1Corinthians10:21 Kanuena mua kunuina mu dikopu dia Mfumu, kunuina kabidi mu dikopu dia mikishi mibi. Kanuena mua kudila ku mesa a Mfumu, kudila kabidi ku mesa a mikishi mibi nansha." 
1Corinthians10:22 Tudi basue kujula Mfumu mukawu anyi? Nudi nuela meji ne: tudi bamupite bukole anyi? 
1Corinthians10:23 Bamue badi bamba ne: “Tudi mua kuenza muonsu mutudi basue. ” Eyowa, kadi bionsu kabiena bimpe to. “Tudi mua kuenza muonsu mutudi basue,” kadi bionsu kabiena bilengelela Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba to." 
1Corinthians10:24 Muntu nansha umue kakebi bidi bimulengelela yeye nkayende, kadi akebe bidi bilengelela bakuabu." 
1Corinthians10:25 Nudi mua kudia munudi basue munyinyi onsu udibu basumbisha mu tshisalu, kanuyi nupampakana, kanuyi nudiebeja mu kondu kenu ka munda ne: mmifume penyi." 
1Corinthians10:26 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Buloba ne bionsu bidipu mbintu bia Mfumu. ” 
1Corinthians10:27 Pikala muntu udi kayi muena ditaba munubikile bua kudia kuende, nuenu banyishe bua kuyamu, nudie bionsu bidibu banulambila, kanuyi nupampakana. Kanuebeji mu kondu kenu ka munda ne: minyinyi eyi mmifume penyi?" 
1Corinthians10:28 Kadi pikala muntu unuambila ne: “Munyinyi ewu ngwa ku nyama uvuabu balambule mvidie,” kuudi to! Kadi unemeke muntu udi ukuambila nanku, unemeke kabidi kondu ka munda," 
1Corinthians10:29 tshiena ngamba ne: kondu kenu ka munda kadi kanupisha; kadi ka muntu mukuabu awu kadi kamupisha yeye. Bumue nenunkonke ne: “Kadi mudi kondu ka bakuabu kankandika mua kuenza mundi musue mbishi? 
1Corinthians10:30 Pandi ndia, ngela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, mudibu mua kungasa tshilumbu, pandi ndia bindi ngela nabi Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, mmunyi?”" 
1Corinthians10:31 Ke mundi ngamba ne: nansha nudia, nansha nunua, nansha nuenza bualu bukuabu, nuenze bionsu bua kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians10:32 Kadi kanulenduishi nansha muena Yuda, nansha muntu wa mu tshisamba tshikuabu, nansha Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
1Corinthians10:33 Ngidikijayi! Ndi ndibamba bua kusankisha bantu bonsu mu malu onsu. Tshiena nkeba bidi bindengelela meme, kadi bidi bilengelela bonsu, bua bapete lupandu." 
1Corinthians11:1 Ngidikijayi, mundi ngidikija Kristu." 
1Corinthians11:2 Ndi nnuela kalumbandi, bualu nudi numvuluka diba dionsu, nukumbaja kabidi bimvua munulongeshe, muvuabu bando-ngeshebi kumpala." 
1Corinthians11:3 Kadi ndi musue bua nujingulule ne: Kristu udi Mfumu wa muntu mulume yonsu. Mulume yonsu udi musele, udi mfumu wa mukajende. Mvidi Mukulu udi Mfumu wa Kristu." 
1Corinthians11:4 Pikala muntu mulume utendelela munkatshi mua bantu, ne tshifulu ku mutu, nansha ubamanyisha malu avua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile, udi uluisha Kristu bundu."
