1Corinthians11:5 Kadi pikala mukaji utendelela munkatshi mua bantu ku mutu kutupu, nansha ubamanyisha malu avua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile, udi ufuisha bayende bundu, bualu udi bu mukaji udibu bakungule mutu." 
1Corinthians11:6 Pikala mukaji kayi usuika tshitambala ku mutu, mbimpe bamukungule mu mutu! Kadi bu mudi mukaji ufua bundu, padibu bamukungula, nansha bamukosa nsuki, asuike tshitambala ku mutu." 
1Corinthians11:7 Nanku muntu mulume kena mua kuvuala tshintu ku mutu, bualu udi tshimfuanyi tshia Mvidi Mukulu, tshidi tshileja butumbi buende. Kadi mukaji udi uleja butumbi bua bayende." 
1Corinthians11:8 Bualu kabavua bafuke mulume mufume kudi mukaji. Kadi bavua bafuke mukaji mufume kudi mulume. 
1Corinthians11:9 Kabavua bafuke mulume bua mukaji, kadi amu mukaji bua mulume." 
1Corinthians11:10 Bualu bua batumibue, mukaji udi ne bua kusuika tshitambala ku mutu, bua kuleja mudiye ku bumfumu bua bayende." 
1Corinthians11:11 Kadi patudi badisange ne Mfumu, mukaji kena mua kuikalaku kakuyi mulume, mulume kena mua kuikalaku kakuyi mukaji." 
1Corinthians11:12 Bualu, bu mudibu bafuke mukaji mufume kudi mulume, ke mudibu balela mulume kudi mukaji. Kadi bonsu babidi badi bafume kudi Mvidi Mukulu, udi Mufuki wa bionsu." 
1Corinthians11:13 Dikoselayi tshilumbu nkayenu: mbimpe bua mukaji atendelele Mvidi Mukulu munkatshi mua bantu ku mutu kutupu anyi? 
1Corinthians11:14 Ku bantu, bidi bienza bundu, padi mulume wenda ne nsuki mile," 
1Corinthians11:15 kadi bidi lumu padi mukaji ne nsuki mile, bualu mukaji mmupete nsuki mile bua kudibuikila nayi bu tshitambala." 
1Corinthians11:16 Kadi pikala muntu musue kutontolola bindi ngamba, tshintu tshimuepele tshindi musue kuamba tshidi amu ne: nansha tuetu, nansha Bisumbu bia bena ditaba, katuena ne tshibidilu tshikuabu, patudi tutendelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians11:17 Bua bindi mua kunulongesha mpindiewu, tshiena mua kunuela kalumbandi to. Bualu bisangilu bienu bia ditendelela kabiena binulengelela, kadi bidi binuenzela bibi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Bualu bua kumpala: bayua bangambila ne: panudi nusangila, nudi nuabulukangana mu bisumbu bidi bifuilakana. — Ndi ngitaba bualu ebu tshitupa." 
1Corinthians11:19 (Matapuluka adi ne bua kuenzeka munkatshi muenu, bua badi balama ditaba dilelela, bamueneke patoke.)" 
1Corinthians11:20 Panudi nudisangisha, kanutshiena nudia didia dia Mfumu." 
1Corinthians11:21 Bualu diakamue panudi nusomba ku mesa, muntu yonsu udi udia lukasalukasa bidiye mufike nabi, mushindu udi bamue bashala ne nzala, banga bakuatshika maluvu." 
1Corinthians11:22 Kanuena mua kudila ne kunuina ku mbanza yenu anyi? Nudi nupetula Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba bua tshinyi? Nudi nuluisha badi bianza bitupu bundu bua tshinyi? Nudi basue nmuambile tshinyi? Bua nnuele kalumbandi anyi? Nansha kakese! Tshiena mua kunuela kalumbandi bua malu a nanku nansha! 
1Corinthians11:23 Telejayi bimvua mupete kudi Mfumu, kabidi bimvua munulongeshe. Mfumu Yezu, butuku buvuabu ne bua kumukuata, uvua muangate diampa." 
1Corinthians11:24 Kuelaye Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Pashishe kukosololaye diampa, wamba ne: “Etshi mmubidi wanyi, undi ndambula bualu buenu. Enzayi nunku bua kumyuluka.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Momumue, bobu bamane kudia, kuangataye dikopu, wamba ne: “Dikopu edi didi ndondu mupiamupia wa Mvidi Mukulu, udi mashi anyi ajadika. Misangu yonsu inudi nunuinamu, nuenze nanku bua kumvuluka. ”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Nenku misangu yonsu inudi nudia diampa edi, nunuina mu dikopu edi, nudi numanyisha bantu lufu lua Mfumu too ne pafikaye." 
1Corinthians11:27 Kadi padi muntu udia diampa dia Mfumu, unuina mu dikopu diende, kayi mubiakanyine, nebamuase tshilumbu tshia mubidi ne mashi bia Mfumu." 
1Corinthians11:28 Nanku muntu yonsu adikonkonone, pashishe adie diampa, anuine mu dikopu edi." 
1Corinthians11:29 Bualu padi muntu udia diampa, nansha unuina mu dikopu edi, kayi mujingulule mubidi wa Mfumu, udi udikebela tshilumbu padiye udia, nansha unua." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ke padi ba bungi ba kunudi basama, kabayi ne bukole, bafue kabidi ba bungi." 
1Corinthians11:31 Bu tuetu mua kudikonkonona kumpala, Mvidi Mukulu kavua mua kutunyoka nanku." 
1Corinthians11:32 Kadi Mfumu udi utulumbuluisha, utunyoka, bua kabavu kutupisha pamue ne bantu bakuabu ba pa buloba dituku dia tshilumbuluilu." 
1Corinthians11:33 Nanku, bana hetu, panudi nudisangisha ku didia dia Mfumu, indilanganayi." 
1Corinthians11:34 Pikala muntu ne nzala, adile kuende. Tshianana bisangilu bienu nebinubueje mu tshilumbu kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi bua malu makuabu, nengalongolole pangikala mufike kuenu." 
1Corinthians12:1 Ndi ngandamuna mpindiewu ku nkonku inuvua bangele bua bidi bitangila mapa a kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Bana hetu, ndi musue bua nujingulule bimpe mudi mapa aa." 
1Corinthians12:2 Nudi bamanye ne: diba dinuvua kanuyi banji kuitaba Mvidi Mukulu, bavua banusaka, bua nutendelele mvidie ya patupu, kanuyi mua kutua nkanana." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ke pandi musue bua nujingulule bimpe ne: padi Mueyelu wa Tshijila ulombola muntu, kena mua kuamba ne: “Yezu ikale mutshipa!” Nansha muntu kena mua kujadika ne: “Yezu udi Mfumu,” padi Mueyelu wa Tshijila kauyi umulombola." 
1Corinthians12:4 Mapa adi mashilangane, kadi amu Mueyelu umue wa momumue ke udi wafila." 
1Corinthians12:5 Midimu ya kuenza idi mishilangane, kadi utudi tukuatshila midimu ayi udi amu Mfumu umue wa momumue." 
1Corinthians12:6 Bukole ne meji bia kuenza nabi mudimu bidi bishilangane ku muntu ku muntu, kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi ubifila kudi bonsu udi amu umue wa momumue." 
1Corinthians12:7 Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi umueneka munda mua muntu yonsu, ne dipa didi dilengelela bantu bonsu," 
1Corinthians12:8 Muntu kampanda udi upeta kudi Mueyelu dipa dia kuakula ne meji. Mukuabu udi upeta kudi Mueyelu wa momumue dipa dia kuakula bilondeshile dimanya diende. 
1Corinthians12:9 Munga udi upeta kudi Mueyelu umue wa momumue dipa dia ditaba dikole, mukuabu dipa dia kuondapa babedi." 
1Corinthians12:10 Mukuabu udi upeta kudi Mueyelu dipa dia kuenza malu a dikema, mukuabu dipa dia kumanyisha bantu malu avua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile. Munga udi upeta dipa dia kusunguluja bidi bifuma kudi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bidi kabiyi bifuma kudiwu. Umue udi upeta dipa dia kuakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, munga dipa dia kumvuija bidibu bamba mu miakulu ayi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Amu Mueyelu umue wa momumue awu, ke udi ufila bionsu abi. Udi upesha muntu yonsu diende dipa dia pa buadi bu mudiwu musue." 
1Corinthians12:12 Bualu Kristu udi bu mubidi, udi umue, kadi muikale ne bidimba bivule. Kadi bidimba bionsu, nansha biobi bivule, bidi bienza mubidi amu umue." 
1Corinthians12:13 Buonsu buetu, bena Yuda nansha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bapika nansha bantu badi benza malu mudibu basue, bavua batutue mu mayi, bua tuetu kuenza mubidi umue ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Mbatuwuje kabidi bonsu ne Mueyelu umuepele ewu." 
1Corinthians12:14 Mubidi kawena amu ne tshidimba tshimue, kadi udi ne bia bungi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Padi dikasa diamba ne: “Meme tshiena tshianza to; nanku tshiena tshidimba tshia mubidi,” bualu ebu kabuena budiumbusha ku mubidi to." 
1Corinthians12:16 Padi ditshi diamba ne: “Tshiena disu; nanku tshiena tshidimba tshia mubidi,” bualu ebu kabuena budiumbusha ku mubidi to." 
1Corinthians12:17 Bu mubidi wende mujima muikale amu disu, muntu uvua mua kumvua bishi? Bu mubidi wende mujima muikale amu ditshi, uvua mua kununkila bishi?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Bushuwa, Mvidi Mukulu mmuteke mu mubidi tshidimba tshionsu pa muaba watshi, muvuaye musue." 
1Corinthians12:19 Bu bionsu bikale amu tshidimba tshimue, mubidi uvua penyi?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Kadi bidimba bidi bivule, mubidi udi amu umue." 
1Corinthians12:21 Nanku disu kadiena mua kuambila tshianza ne: “Meme tshiena nkukengela to!” Mutu kawena mua kuambila makasa ne: “Meme tshiena nkukengela to!” 
1Corinthians12:22 Bualu bidimba bidi bimueneka bu bidi bitekete, ke bitudi nabi dikenga menemene." 
1Corinthians12:23 Kabidi bitudi tuela meji ne: kabiena ne mushinga, ke bitudi dinemeka menemene. Bidimba bitudi katuyi tutelatela, tudi tubilama ne kanemu kavule." 
1Corinthians12:24 Katuena ne bua kuenza nanku ne bidimba bikuabu bidi bipite buimpe. Mvidi Mukulu uvua mulongolole mubidi, bua kunemesha nangananga bidimba bidi kabiyi ne lumu." 
1Corinthians12:25 Ke muvuaye musue bua bidimba bishilangane bia mubidi bienze bionsu tshintu tshimue, biambuluishangane." 
1Corinthians12:26 Padi tshidimba tshia mubidi tshimue tshisama, bidimba bionsu bidi bisama pamue natshi. Padibu batumbisha tshidimba tshimue, bidimba bikuabu bionsu bidi bisanka pamue natshi." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nuenu bonsu nudi mubidi, wa Kristu. Yonsu wa kunudi udi tshidimba tshiawu." 
1Corinthians12:28 Nanku mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, Mvidi Mukulu mmuteke bonsu pa muaba wabu: bangabanga bapostolu, pashishe bambi, balonda kudi balongeshi; kunyima kudi benji ba malu a dikema, kudi badi ne bukole bua kuondapa babedi, nansha badi bambuluisha bakuabu, nansha badi balombola bantu nabu, ne badi bakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye." 
1Corinthians12:29 Bonsu kabena bapostolu, bambi, nansha balongeshi to. Bonsu kabena ne bukole bua kuenza malu a dikema," 
1Corinthians12:30 nansha bua kuondapa babedi, nansha bua kuakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, nansha bua kuyumvuija." 
1Corinthians12:31 Nanku kebayi mapa adi mapite makuabu. Kadi nennuleje mpindiewu njila udi mupite mapa makuabu onsu. 
1Corinthians13:1 Nansha meme muakule miakulu ya bantu, ne ya batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, kadi tshiyi ne dinanga, miaku yanyi idi amu bu ludibu ludi luenza mutoyi, ludila, nansha bu ngonga udi udila." 
1Corinthians13:2 Nansha meme ne dipa dia kumanyisha bantu malu avua Mvidi Mukulu mungambile, nansha meme mumanye malu onsu, ne adi masokome menemene, nansha meme ne ditaba dia mua kutentemuna nadi mikuna, meme tshiyi ne dinanga, ndi tshianana." 
1Corinthians13:3 Nansha meme muabanyangane bintu bianyi bionsu, nansha meme mufile mubidi wanyi bua bangoshe, meme tshiyi ne dinanga, kabiena bingenzela tshintu." 
1Corinthians13:4 Udi unanga udi ne lutuulu, udi ne muoyi wa kalolu, kena ne lubabu, kena uditemba, kena uditambisha." 
1Corinthians13:5 Kena upanga kanemu, kena ukeba kudisankisha, kena ufika munda, kena ne njiya." 
1Corinthians13:6 Udi unanga, kena usanka padi muntu wenza bibi, kadi amu padiye wenza bimpe." 
1Corinthians13:7 Udi unanga, kena wela muntu nyima. Udi amu witaba muntu yonsu, umutendakena, umuakidila ne lutulu luvule." 
1Corinthians13:8 Dinanga kashidi kadiena dijimina. Dituku dikuabu bambi kabakuakula kabidi to. Bantu kabakuakula kabidi miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye. Kumanya malu masokome a Mvidi Mukulu nekujike. 
1Corinthians13:9 Bualu dimanya dietu dia Mvidi Mukulu didi dishadile. Malu adi bambi batuambila adi amu makese. 
1Corinthians13:10 Kadi pamueneka bulelela bujima, bidi bishadile nebijimine." 
1Corinthians13:11 Pantshivua muana, mvua ngakula, ngumvua malu, ngela meji amu bu muana. Kadi pankadi muntu mukole, meme kulekela malu onsu a buana." 
1Corinthians13:12 Mpindiewu bitudi tumona bidi bifuanangane ne tshimfuanyi tshibuitshidile tshidi tshimueneka mu lumuenu. Kadi diba adi netumonangane ne Mvidi Mukulu mpala ne mpala. Lelu ndi mumanye amu nankunanku. Kadi diba adi nemmanye Mvidi Mukulu muonsu mudiye, mudiye mummanye kabidi muonsu mundi." 
1Corinthians13:13 Mpindiewu, bisatu abi bidi bishala: ke ditaba, ditekemena, ne dinanga. Kadi ku bisatu abi tshidi tshipite bikuabu ke dinanga." 
1Corinthians14:1 Nanku, kebayi nangananga bua nupete dinanga. Jingayi kabidi mapa a kudi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu, nangananga dipa dia buambi." 
1Corinthians14:2 Bualu udi wakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, kena uyukila ne bantu, kadi amu ne Mvidi Mukulu, bualu muntu nansha umue kena ujingulula bidiye wamba. Ku bukole bua Mueyelu udi wamba malu masokome." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kadi muambi udi wambila bantu malu adi Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile, udi uyukila ne bantu, bua kubakolesha mu ditaba, kubatua nyama ku mikolu, ne kubasamba." 
1Corinthians14:4 Udi wakula mu miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, udi udikolesha amu yeye nkayende mu ditaba. Kadi udi umanyisha bantu malu adi Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile, udi wambuluisha Tshisumbu tshijima tshia bena ditaba." 
1Corinthians14:5 Ndi musue bua nuakule bonsu miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye. Kadi ndi mpita kujinga bua nuikale ne dipa dia kumanyisha bantu malu adi Mvidi Mukulu munuambile. Bualu udi ne dipa edi, udi utamba kuambuluisha bantu bipite muntu udi wakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye. Muntu udi wakula nanku udi mua kuambuluisha Tshisumbu tshijima tshia bena ditaba, amu padi muntu mua kumvuija bidiye wamba." 
1Corinthians14:6 Bana hetu, ndi nnuebeja ne: meme mufike kuenu aku ngakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, nennuambuluishe ku tshinyi? Nennuambuluishe amu pandi mmanyisha malu adi Mvidi Mukulu mungambile, nkolesha dimanya dienu, nnulondela malu a kudi Mvidi Mukulu, nansha unulongesha bualu kampanda." 
1Corinthians14:7 Tufuanyikija ne biombelu bu lushiba nansha lunzenze. Bu meyi a biombelu abi kaayi adila ntendu mishilangane, kabena mua kusunguluja musambu udibu bimba." 
1Corinthians14:8 Padi muntu wela mpungi kayi umanyisha bualu patoke, wadilongolola ku mvita nnganyi?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Momumue binudi nuamba mu miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, bu biobi kabiyi biumvuika, bantu nebajingulule binudi nuambe munyi? Miaku yenu neijimine mu lupepele." 
1Corinthians14:10 Panuapa padi miaku kabukabu. Kadi kakuena muakulu udi bantu kabayi bumvua. 
1Corinthians14:11 Pandi tshiyi mumanye muakulu udibu bayukila nanyi, udi uyukila nanyi udi muenyi kundi, ne meme kabidi kudiye." 
1Corinthians14:12 Nanku bu munudi ne nzala ya kupeta mapa a kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila, kebayi nangananga mapa adi ambuluisha Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
1Corinthians14:13 Nanku udi wakula mu miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, udi mua kulomba kudi Mvidi Mukulu dipa dia kuyumvuija." 
1Corinthians14:14 Bualu pandi ntendelela, ngakula mu miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, Mueyelu udi utendelela munda muanyi. Kadi lungenyi luanyi kaluena ku ditendelela adi to." 
1Corinthians14:15 Kadi ngenze tshinyi? Nengenze bionsu bibidi, nentendelele pamue ne Mueyelu wanyi, nentendelele kabidi ne lungenyi. Nengimbe misambu ne Mueyelu wanyi, nengimbe misambu kabidi pamue ne lungenyi luanyi." 
1Corinthians14:16 Paudi wela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila mu Mueyelu nkayawu, muntu mukuabu udi ubuela mu tshisangilu awu, udi mua kudisanga nenu mu ditendelela bishi? Bu mudiye kayi umvua binudi nuamba, kena mua kuitaba amene nansha." 
1Corinthians14:17 Nansha wewe utendelela bimpe bitambe, wela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, kuena wambuluisha muntu awu mu ditaba diende nansha." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndi ngela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bualu ndi ngakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, munupite nuenu bonsu." 
1Corinthians14:19 Kadi padi bena ditaba badisanga pamue, ndi musue kuakula miaku itanu idi yumvuika, bua kulongesha bakuabu, pamutu pa kuakula miaku binunu ne binunu mu miakulu idi bantu kabayi mua kumvua." 
1Corinthians14:20 Bana hetu, kanuikadi bu bana mu ngelelu wenu wa meji; nuikale bana bua bidi bitangila bubi. Kadi nuikale bantu bakole mu ngelelu wenu wa meji." 
1Corinthians14:21 Mu Mukanda wa tshijila, Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Nengambile bantu aba malu mu miakulu idi bantu kabayi bumvue, kabidi mukana mua bantu ba bisamba, kadi nansha diba adi, kabakunteleja to. ”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Nenku dipa dia kuakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bumvue, didi dileja bantu badi kabayi bitaba bualu, kadi kadiena dileja bena ditaba nansha. Kadi dipa dia buambi, dia kumanyisha bantu malu adi Mvidi Mukulu wamba, didi dileja bena ditaba bualu, kadi kadiena dileja badi kabayi ne ditaba to." 
1Corinthians14:23 Padi Tshisumbu tshijima tshia bena ditaba mu ditendelela, bonsu bakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bumvua, bantu ba patupu, nansha badi kabayi bena ditaba, babuela muaba awu, kabena mua kunuamba ne: nudi bapale anyi?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kadi padi bonsu bamanyisha malu adi Mvidi Mukulu wamba, muntu wa patupu, nansha udi kayi muena ditaba, mubuele muaba awu, bidiye umvua nebimujadikile ne: ndi muena mibi. Bionsu bidiye umvua nebimulumbuluishe." 
1Corinthians14:25 Meji ende masokome neamueneke patoke. Nenku neadiele panshi bua kukukuila Mvidi Mukulu, neambe ne: “Mvidi Mukulu bushuwa udi munkatshi muetu!”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Bana hetu, telejayi nkomenu wa bionsu bitudi bambe ebi. Panudi ntendelela Mvidi Mukulu, umue wa kunudi udi wimba musambu, munga udi ulongesha, mukuabu udi umanyisha malu adi Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile, ewu udi wakula mu miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, munga udi uyumvuija. Kadi bionsu ebi bidi ne bua kukolesha bena Tshisumbu mu ditaba diabu." 
1Corinthians14:27 Padibu bakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye, amu bantu babidi nansha basatu, badi mua kuakula balondangane, kabidi muntu mukuabu umvuije bidibu bamba." 
1Corinthians14:28 Pikalaku kakuyi udi mua kuyumvuija, badi bakula miakulu ayi balekele kuakula ne diyi dikole munkatshi mua bantu, badiakuile amu munda munda, bayukile ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Corinthians14:29 Bambi badi batumanyisha bivua Mvidi Mukulu mubambile, badi mua kuakula kabidi amu babidi nansha basatu. Kadi bambi bakuabu bakonkonona bidibu bamba." 
1Corinthians14:30 Kadi padi Mvidi Mukulu wambila muntu mukuabu udi muaba awu malu, muntu utshidi wakula awu apuwe." 
1Corinthians14:31 Nuenu bonsu nudi mua kumanyishangana malu adi Mvidi Mukulu munuleje, kadi balondangana ku muntu ku muntu, bua numone mua kulongesha bantu bonsu, kubakolesha ku muoyi." 
1Corinthians14:32 Badi bamanyisha bantu malu adi Mvidi Mukulu mubaleje, badi ne bua kutabalela dipa didibu bapeta." 
1Corinthians14:33 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu kena mutubikile bua kusomba mu tshimvundu, kadi amu mu bupole. Bu mudibi bienzeka mu Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba," 
1Corinthians14:34 bakaji badi ne bua kupuwa mu Bisangilu bienu. Kabena mua kuakula. Mikenji ya Moshe idi yamba ne: bakaji badi ne bua kuitaba ku meyi. 
1Corinthians14:35 Padibu basue kumanya bualu kampanda, bebeje amu babayabu ku nzubu. Kabiena bimpe bua mukaji akule mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
1Corinthians14:36 Muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu mmufumine kuenu anyi? Mbanutuminewu amu nuenu anyi? 
1Corinthians14:37 Padi muntu wela meji ne: ndi muambi, nansha ne: ndi mupete dipa kudi Mueyelu, amanye ne: bindi munufundile ebi mmukenji wa kudi Mfumu." 
1Corinthians14:38 Kadi padiye kayi ubiangata ne mushinga, kanumuangatshi ne mushinga to." 
1Corinthians14:39 Nenku bana hetu, nujinge kumanyisha bantu malu adi Mvidi Mukulu munuambile. Kadi kanukandiki badi bakula miakulu idi bantu kabayi bamanye." 
1Corinthians14:40 Bionsu bienzeke amu ne kanemu, bilondangane bimpe." 
1Corinthians15:1 Bana hetu, mpindiewu ndi musue kunuvuluija Lumu lua Disanka lumvua munulongeshe. Nuvua baluitabe, baluangate bu nshindamenu wa ditaba dienu." 
1Corinthians15:2 Lumu alu ludi kutusungidila panudi nululama mushindu umvua munulongeshelu. Kanuyi benza nanku, nudi babuele mu njila wa ditaba anu patupu." 
1Corinthians15:3 Mvua munulongeshe malu avuabu bandongeshe: Bualu bupite bunene mbobu ebu: Kristu mmufue bua mibi yetu, muvua Mikanda ya tshijila midianza kuamba." 
1Corinthians15:4 Mbamujike. Kadi mmubike ku lufu dituku disatu, muvua Mikanda ya tshijila mimane kuamba." 
1Corinthians15:5 Uvua mumuenekele Petro, pashishe bapostolu dikumi ne babidi." 
1Corinthians15:6 Pashishe uvua mumuenekele balongi bende bapite pa nkama itanu musangu umue. Bavule ba kudibu batshidi ne muoyi, bamue mbamane kufua." 
1Corinthians15:7 Pashishe kumuenekelaye Yakobe, ku ndekelu, mmudileje kudi bapostolu bonsu." 
1Corinthians15:8 Kunyima kua bonsu aba mmumuenekele ne meme, nansha muvuabu bandele muana wa kabishi mu ditaba." 
1Corinthians15:9 Bulelela, ndi mushadile kudi bapostolu bonsu, tshiena nansha mukumbane bua bambikile mupostolu, bualu mvua mukengeshe Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kadi bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu munnange, nkadi bu mundi emu. Dinanga diende divua dikuata mudimu munda muanyi. Ndi mukuate mudimu mupite bapostolu bakuabu bonsu. Uvua ukuata mudimu awu ki mmeme to, kadi Mvidi Mukulu pamue nanyi, bualu uvua munnange." 
1Corinthians15:11 Dilongesha edi, nansha nuenu badipeta kundi, nansha kudi bapostolu bakuabu, didi amu dia momumue. Bindi mulongesha ebi, ke bidi bapostolu bakuabu balongeshe, ke binudi nuitaba." 
1Corinthians15:12 Patudi tulongesha ne: Kristu mmubike ku lufu, mmunyi mudi bamue ba kunudi bamba ne: bafue kabakubika ku lufu?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Pikala bafue bulelela kabayi babika ku lufu, nanku Kristu kabidi kavua mubike ku lufu nansha kakese." 
1Corinthians15:14 Pikala Kristu kayi mubike ku lufu, katuena ne tshitudi mua kulongesha to. Kanuena ne tshinudi ne bua kuitaba to." 
1Corinthians15:15 Diba adi tudi tushiminyina Mvidi Mukulu malu, bualu tudi tujadika ne: mutubishe Kristu ku lufu, padiye kayi mumubishe. Bualu kena mua kumubisha, pikala bafue bulelela kabayi mua kubika ku lufu." 
1Corinthians15:16 Bualu pikala bafue kabayi mua kubika ku lufu, nanku Kristu kena mubike ku lufu." 
1Corinthians15:17 Pikala Kristu kayi mubike ku lufu, ditaba dienu kadiena ne tshipeta. Nanku ki mbanji kunujimijila mibi yenu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Diba adi kabidi bayua bafue bamane kuitaba Kristu mbajimine. 
1Corinthians15:19 Patudi tutekemena Kristu amu bua matuku atudi tusomba panu, diakabi dietu ndipite dia bantu bakuabu bonsu." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kadi Kristu mmubike ku lufu bulelela. Ke patudi mua kujadika ne: bafue bakuabu kabidi nebabike ku lufu. 
1Corinthians15:21 Bualu bu mudi lufu lufume kudi muntu umue, ke mudi dibiika dia ku bafue kabidi difume kudi muntu umue." 
1Corinthians15:22 Bu mudi bantu bonsu bafue bualu mbadisange ne Adame, ke mudi bantu bonsu ne bua kubika ku lufu padibu badisanga ne Kristu." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kadi muntu yonsu udi ubika mu wende mulongu. Kristu ke ntungamulongu wa bantu bonsu badi babika. Padiye upingana panu, badi bende nebabike kabidi." 
1Corinthians15:24 Pashishe nshikidilu udi ufika. Kristu neapite makalenga, mamfumu ne makole onsu a panu ku bukole. Neapeshe Mvidi Mukulu Tatuende Bukalenga." 
1Corinthians15:25 Bualu Kristu udi ne bua kuikala mukalenga too ne padi Mvidi Mukulu utshimuna bena lukuna bonsu, ubateka kuinshi kua makasa ende." 
1Corinthians15:26 Muena lukuna wa nshikidilu wabutulabu ndufu. 
1Corinthians15:27 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu mmumutekele bionsu kuinshi kua makasa. ” Kadi padibu bamba ne: “Mmumutekele bionsu kuinshi kua makasa ende,” muaku ewu: “bionsu” kawena musue kuamba ne: Mvidi Mukulu, udi muteke bionsu ku bumfumu bua Kristu mmuditeke ne yeye mene nanku." 
1Corinthians15:28 Padi bintu bionsu bimane kuitaba bumfumu bua Kristu, nanku Muana mene neaditeke ku bumfumu bua Mvidi Mukulu, uvua muteke bionsu ku bumfumu buende. Diba adi Mvidi Mukulu nkayende neikale mukalenga udi wenza bionsu munda mua bonsu." 
1Corinthians15:29 Elayi meji ku bidi bienzeka mu tshisumbu tshietu: bamue badi babatue mu mayi mu dina dia bantu bafue bavuabu kabayi batue nanku. Padi bafue kabayi babike ku lufu, tshidibu batekemena kupeta ntshinyi? Diba adi badi banyisha bua babatue nanku bua tshinyi?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Tuetu kabidi tudi tudiela mu njiwu diba dionsu bua tshinyi? 
1Corinthians15:31 Bana hetu bu mundi nnujadikila ne: ndi mua kuditemba bulelela bualu buenu, bualu nudi badisanga ne Mfumu wetu, ke mundi njadika kabidi ne ndi mu njiwu ya lufu matuku onsu." 
1Corinthians15:32 Bu meme muluangane ne “Nyama wa lonji” munu mu Efeze amu bua kupeta bia panu, bimvua mupete mbinganyi? Nanku padi bafhe kabayi babika ku lufu, ndondayi kasumuinu ka ne: “Tudiayi, tunuayi, bualu maloba tudi tufue. ”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Kanudishimi: “Panudi nuenda ne balunda babi, nenunyanguke. ”" 
1Corinthians15:34 Mbimpe nupete tshiakabidi meji mempe. Lekelayi kuenza malu mabi. Bamue ba kunudi kabena bamanye Mvidi Mukulu to, ke bundu buenu!" 
1Corinthians15:35 Bumue nenunkonke ne: “Kadi bafue nebabike ku lufu mushindu kaayi? Nebapete mibidi ya mushindu kaayi?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Udi mubule meji anyi? Lutete luudi ukuna ludi lutoloke amu padilu lufila. 
1Corinthians15:37 Tshiudi ukuna tshidi amu ntete patupu, nansha ya kuenza bukula, nansha mikuabu. Kadi kuvua mukuna mutshi to." 
1Corinthians15:38 Ku lutete alu, Mvidi Mukulu udi umenesha mutshi mudiye musue, ku lutete luonsu walu mutshi." 
1Corinthians15:39 Bintu bidi ne muoyi, kabiena bionsu ne mubidi wa momumue to. Bantu badi ne wabu, nyama ne wayi, nyunyi ne wayi, mishipa kabidi ne wayi." 
1Corinthians15:40 Mudi kabidi mibidi ya mu diulu, ne mibidi ya pa buloba. Buimpe bua mibidi ya mu diulu, budi bushilangane ne bua mibidi ya pa buloba." 
1Corinthians15:41 Diba didi ne buimpe buadi, ngondu udi ne buende, mitotu ne buayi. Nansha mitotu mene kayena yonsu ne buimpe bua momumue to." 
1Corinthians15:42 Ke bidi bienzeka diba didi bantu babike. Tshidibu bajika ntshintu tshidi tshibola kadi tshidi tshibika netshikale tshia kashidi. 
1Corinthians15:43 Tshidibu bamiamina ntshintu tshitekete tshia tshianana, kadi tshidi tshibika netshikale ne lumu kabidi ne bukole." 
1Corinthians15:44 Tshidibu bajika mmubidi wa buntu, tshidi tshibika mmubidi udi upeta muoyi kudi Mueyelu. Nenku padi mubidi wa buntu muikaleku, mubidi udi upeta muoyi kudi Mueyelu udiku kabidi." 
1Corinthians15:45 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Adame muntu wa kumpala uvua mupete muoyi, ” kadi Adame wa ndekelu udiku ku bukole bua udi ufila muoyi." 
1Corinthians15:46 Kadi tshidi tshidianza kutuadija mmubidi wa buntu, pashishe Mueyelu udi ulonda." 
1Corinthians15:47 Adame wa kumpala bayua bamuenze ne buloba. Kadi Adame muibidi mmufume mu diulu. 
1Corinthians15:48 Ba pa buloba mbafuanangane ne udibu benza ne buloba. Kadi ba mu diulu mbafuanangane ne udi mufume mu diulu. 
1Corinthians15:49 Nanku bu mutuvua bafuane muntu uvuabu benza ne buloba, netufuanangane ne udi mufuma mu diulu." 
1Corinthians15:50 Bana hetu, ndi njadika ne: bantu badi ne mubidi wa buntu, kabena mua kubuela mu bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Bidi bibola kabiena mua kupeta bidi bishala kashidi." 
1Corinthians15:51 Mpindiewu ndi nnusokoluela bualu busokome: katuakufua bonsu, kadi bonsu netuandamuke," 
1Corinthians15:52 mu katupa kipi, mu mubunyi wa disu, padila mpungi wa ndekelu. Bualu padibu bela mpungi awu, bafue nebabike ku lufu, bua bashale ne muoyi kashidi. Bonsu netuandamuke." 
1Corinthians15:53 Bualu tshidi tshibola tshidi ne bua kuandamuka, tshienza tshidi tshishala kashidi. Tshidi tshifua tshidi ne bua kuandamuka, tshienza tshidi katshiyi mua kufua." 
1Corinthians15:54 Pikala tshidi tshibola tshimana kuandamuka tshienza tshidi tshishala kashidi, pikala tshidi tshifua tshimana kuandamuka tshienza tshidi katshiyi mua kufua, muaku ewu wa mu Mukanda wa tshijila udi ukumbana ne: “Mbabutule lufu, mbalutshimune kashidi!”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Lufu, kutshimuna kuebe kuepi? Lufu bukole buebe bua kushipangana budi penyi? ”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Lufu ludi lupeta bukole bua kushipangana kudi bubi. Bubi budi bupeta bukole kudi mikenji. 
1Corinthians15:57 Kadi tudi tuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bualu tudi tutshimuine kudi Mfumu wetu Kristu." 
1Corinthians15:58 Nenku, bana hetu basuibue, shindamayi bikole, kanunyungi. Tungunukayi amu kutungunuka nuye kumpala. Nutungunuje mudimu wa Mfumu. Numanye ne: mudimu unudi nukuata badisange ne Mfumu kawena wa patupu." 
1Corinthians16:1 Ndi ngandamuna kabidi ku nkonku inuvua bela pa bintu bidibu basangishila Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba badi mu Yerushalayime. Nulonde mikenji imvua muelele Bisumbu bia bena ditaba ba mu Ngalatiya. 
1Corinthians16:2 Dia lumingu dionsu, yonsu wa kunudi ateke ku luseke tshitupa tshia makuta ende, bilondeshile bungi buvuaye mupete. Atshilame mu nzubu, bua diba dindi mfika, kaditatshishi bua kukeba makuta." 
1Corinthians16:3 Pangafika, nentume bantu banuikala basungule, nembapeshe mikanda ya dianyisha, bua bafikishe binudi bafile ku Yerushalayime." 
1Corinthians16:4 Patuamona ne: mbikumbane bua tuetu kuya nabu, netuye." 
1Corinthians16:5 Meme mumane kupitshila mu buloba bua Masedoniya, nemfike kuenu aku, (bualu ndi ndonda njila wa Masedoniya. )" 
1Corinthians16:6 Bumue nenshale nenu matuku, nansha muvu mujima wa mashika. Nenungambuluishe, bua tufike kuonsu kundi ne bua kuya." 
1Corinthians16:7 Bualu tshiena musue kunusamba kulukulu. Ndi musue kushala nenu matuku, bu Mfumu mua kuanyisha." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kadi ndi muele meji a kushala munu mu Efeze too ne ku dituku dia Pentekostese. 
1Corinthians16:9 Bualu tudi tshikondu tshimpe tshia meme kuenza mudimu munene, nansha bantu bavule banduisha." 
1Corinthians16:10 Pikala Timote mufike, numuakidile bimpe muenu. Bualu udi ukuatshila Mfumu mudimu, mundi ngenza meme." 
1Corinthians16:11 Muntu kamupetudi. Numuambuluishe bua atungunuke ne luendu luende bimpe, apingane kundi. Bualu meme ne bena ditaba bakuabu tudi bamuindile." 
1Corinthians16:12 Mvua musengelele muanetu Apolose bikole, bua afike kuenu aku pamue ne bena ditaba netu bakuabu. Kadi kena musue kuvua mpindiewu. Neafike papetaye diba." 
1Corinthians16:13 Tabalayi, shindamayi bikole mu ditaba. Kolayi muoyi. Nuikale ne bukitu." 
1Corinthians16:14 Enzayi bionsu ne dinanga. 
1Corinthians16:15 Nudi bamanye Stefanaze, ne ba mu nzubu muende. Bobu ke bantu ba kumpala mu Akaya bavua bitabe, bakuatshile Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba nabu mudimu. Bana hetu, ndi nnulomba ne:" 
1Corinthians16:16 nutumikile bantu ba nenku, nutumikile bonsu badibu bakuate nabu mudimu." 
1Corinthians16:17 Ndi musanke bua difika dia Stefanaze, Fortunatuse ne Akayukuse. Bavua bangambuluisha pa mutu penu, bualu kanuvuapu." 
1Corinthians16:18 Bavua bankolesha mu maboku muyuabu banukolesha nuenu. Nudi ne bua kuangata bantu ba nenku ne mushinga. 
1Corinthians16:19 Bisumbu bia bena ditaba bidi mu Aziya bidi binuela muoyi. Akuila ne Priskila pamue ne Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba tshidi tshidisangisha ku nzubu kuabu badi banuela mioyi mivule munda mua Mfumu udi utusanga. 
1Corinthians16:20 Bena ditaba bonsu badi kunu badi banuela muoyi. Elanganayi muoyi, nupukilangane bu bana ba muntu." 
1Corinthians16:21 Meme Polu ndi mfunda miaku eyi ne tshianza etshi ne: Muoyi wenu awu. 
1Corinthians16:22 Pikala muntu kayi unanga Mfumu, ikale mutshipa! Maranatha — Mfumu wetu vuakunu!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Dinanga dia Mfumu Yezu dishindame munda muenu. 
1Corinthians16:24 Mu Yezu Kristu ndi mununange buonsu buenu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Meme Polu, uvua Mvidi Mukulu musungule, bua ngikale mupostolu wa Yezu Kristu, pamue ne muanetu Timote, tudi mfundila Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba badi mu Korente, ne bonsu bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu badi basomba mu ditunga dijima dia Akaya, mukanda ewu." 
2Corinthians1:2 Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu, ne bia kudi Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu bishindame munda muenu." 
2Corinthians1:3 Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu, Tatu wa Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, Tatu udi utunanga bikole. Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu udi utuambuluisha misangu ne misangu mu makenga etu onsu." 
2Corinthians1:4 Nansha tuetu bapete makenga a mishindu kaayi, udi utusamba amu kutusamba. Ke mutudi mua kusamba kabidi badi mu makenga mashilangane, ne disambangana didi Mvidi Mukulu mene utusamba nadi." 
2Corinthians1:5 Patudi tudisanga ne Kristu mu makenga ende mavule, Kristu udi utusamba kabidi bipite." 
2Corinthians1:6 Patudi tukenga, bidi amu bua nukole muoyi, nupete lupandu. Padibu batusamba, bidi amu bua banusambe kabidi, bua numone mua kumvua ne lutuulu makenga atudi tuetu kabidi nawu." 
2Corinthians1:7 Ke mutudi katuyi dipampakana bualu buenu nansha kakese. Bualu tudi bamanye ne: munudi nukenga pamue netu, nebanusambe kabidi pamue netu." 
2Corinthians1:8 Bana hetu, tudi basue bua numanye ne: makenga makole avua matukuate mu buloba bua Aziya. Avua matunemene bujitu. Bujitu abu buvua butupite bukole. Katutshivua batekemene kabidi ne: netushale ne muoyi." 
2Corinthians1:9 Tuvua bele meji ne: mbamane kutufundila tshibawu tshia lufu. Kadi bivua bienzeka nanku, bua tulonge mutudi katuyi mua kuditekemena, kadi tutekemene amu kudi Mvidi Mukulu udi ubisha bafue." 
2Corinthians1:10 Yeye ke uvua mutusungidile ku njiwu mikole ya lufu ayi. Neansungidile ku mikuabu kabidi. Eyowa, tudi bamutekemene ne: neansungidile ku mikuabu." 
2Corinthians1:11 Bualu nuenu nudi nuambuluisha, panudi nnulombela kudiye. Padi bann bavule banlombela kudi Mvidi Mukulu, neabateleje. Nanku neanele lupemba. Diba adi bann ba bungi kabidi nebamuele tuasakidila." 
2Corinthians1:12 Tudi mua kuditemba, bualu kondu ken ka munda kadi kanjadikila ne: ndi bende panu, nangananga munkatshi muenu, ne muoyi wa didipuekesha, kanyi ndinga bann, balonde bidi Mvidi Mukulu wenza. Nanku tshivua tshindudika ki mmeji a bann nansha, kadi amu dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu utunanga nadi." 
2Corinthians1:13 Bualu mu mikanda yen katuvua bafunde bualu nansha bumue, bunudi kanuyi mua kubala, kujingulula. Nukadi bajingulule bikuabu." 
2Corinthians1:14 Ndi ntekemena ne: dinku dikuabu nenubijingulule bionsu, bua dinku dia Mfumu Yezu numone mua kuditemba bualu buen, mundi tuetu nditemba bualu buenu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Bu mundi ntekemena nanku, mvua musue kunukumbula, bua Mvidi Mukulu anuele lupemba misangu ibidi." 
2Corinthians1:16 Mvua muele meji a kupitshila kuenu aku, pandi nya ku Masedoniya, pashishe a kumonangana nenu mu dipingana dianyi kabidi. Diba adi nuvua mua kungambuluisha bua meme kufika ku Yudeya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Pamvua mujadike nanku, mvua tshibubabuba anyi? Pandi ndongolola malu anyi, ndi nkeba amu kudisankisha anyi? Eku ngitaba ne: eyowa, mundamunda mbenga." 
2Corinthians1:18 Mvidi Mukulu, udi ne diyi dimue, udi mua kujadika ne: tshiena mua kumulaya bualu mukana, kububenga munda." 
2Corinthians1:19 Bualu Yezu Kristu Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, utuvua tuetu bonsu, Silase, Timote ne meme kabidi, banumanyishe, kena muntu udi wamba “eyowa” ku mishiku, mundamunda wela meji mushindu mukuabu. Kadi Yeye udi amu “eyowa”." 
2Corinthians1:20 Kudi Kristu ke kudi Mvidi Mukulu wamba “eyowa” ku bionsu bivuaye mulaye. Nanku kudi Yezu tuetu kabidi tudi tuamba Amene wetu, bua kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Corinthians1:21 Amu Mvidi Mukulu mene ke udi utushindika pamue nenu, bua tudisange ne Kristu. Ke mudiye utuenza bantu ba tshijila," 
2Corinthians1:22 ututua tshitampi tshiende bua kuleja ne: tudi bende, utupa kabidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila bu tshieya tshia bionsu bidiye utulamina." 
2Corinthians1:23 Ndi mbikila Mvidi Mukulu, bua ajadike bindi ngamba mpindiewu — eyowa, meme mushime, anshipe! — Nanku ndi ngamba ne: tshi vua musue kupingana ku Korente, amu bua kunuenzela bimpe." 
2Corinthians1:24 Katuena basue kunufundila tshinudi ne bua kuitaba, bualu nukadi bashindame mu ditaba. Kadi tudi tujinga kukuata nenu mudimu, bua nupete diakalenga." 
2Corinthians2:1 Ke pamvua tshiyi musue kupingana kuenu aku, bua tshinubungamiji tshiakabidi." 
2Corinthians2:2 Bualu, bu meme nnubungamija, badi mua kunsankisha kabidi mbanganyi? Amu nuenu bandi mbungamija!" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ke pamvua munufundile mukanda wanyi awu! Tshivua musue kufika kuenu aku, bualu tshivua musue bua bambungamije kudi bantu bavua ne bua kunsankisha. Bualu ndi ngitaba ne: pandi nsanka, nuenu bonsu nudi nusanka." 
2Corinthians2:4 Eyowa, mvua munufundile mukanda awu ne kanyinganyinga kakole, kabidi ne dipampakana, ne binsonji bivule. Kadi tshivua musue kunubungamija nansha. Mvua musue kunuleja mundi mununange bikole." 
2Corinthians2:5 Padi umue wa kunudi mubungamije mukuabu, kena mumbungamije meme to. Tuambe ne: mmunubungamije nuenu bonsu, — nansha bamue ba kunudi, bualu tshiena musue kukolesha malu." 
2Corinthians2:6 Bantu ba bungi ba kunudi mbamunyoke, mbikumbane." 
2Corinthians2:7 Kadi mpindiewu, nudi ne bua kumufuila luse, kumukolesha ku muoyi, bua kumuepula ku kanyinganyinga kakole kapite, kadi mua kumutekesha mu mikolu kashidi." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ke pandi nnulomba ne: munuenzele bimpe, numuleje munudi bamunange." 
2Corinthians2:9 Bualu pamvua munufundile mukanda wanyi, mvua musue kunuteta kabidi, bua mmone ne: nutshidi amu basue kuitaba bindi nnufundila anyi?" 
2Corinthians2:10 Panudi nufuila muntu luse bua tshilema tshivuaye muenze, meme kabidi ndi mmufuila luse. Bualu pandi mfuila muntu luse — pandi ne tshilumbu tshia kufuila muntu luse — ndi mmufuila bualu buenu kumpala kua Kristu." 
2Corinthians2:11 Bualu tshiena musue bua diabolu atutshimune. Bualu tudi bamanye meji mabi adiye nawu. 
2Corinthians2:12 Pamvua mufike mu Trowase, bua kumanyisha bantu Lumu lua Disanka lua Yezu Kristu, mvua musangane ne: Mvidi Mukulu, bualu bua dinanga didiye utunanga nadi, mmunzuluile njila muimpe wa meme kuenza mudimu." 
2Corinthians2:13 Kadi mvua mupampakane bikole, bualu tshivua musangane muanetu Tite. Ke mumvua mulayangane ne bena mu Trowase, bua kuya ku Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Kadi tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu, bualu misangu yonsu udi utubueja mu mulongu wa badi batshimuna, patudi badisange ne Kristu. Udi utuangata bu bena mudimu bende, bua tumanyishe Kristu miaba yonsu, mudi dipembu dia manananshi ditangalaka miaba yonsu." 
2Corinthians2:15 Bushuwa, tudi bu mulambu wa manananshi udi Kristu ulambula Mvidi Mukulu; tudi dipembu diawu didi ditangalaka kudi badi mu njila wa lupandu, ne kudi badi babutuka." 
2Corinthians2:16 Bua badi bajimina, dipembu adi didi diumvuika mupuya mubi udi ufila lufu. Bua badi mu njila wa lupandu, dipembu adi didi diumvuika mupuya muimpe udi ufila muoyi. Nanku udi ne bukole bua kukumbaja mudimu wa mushindu ewu nnganyi?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Tuetu katuena bu bantu bakuabu ba bungi badi batangila muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu bu bintu bia kuenda nabi mushinga. Kadi tuetu tudi tunumanyisha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, katuyi tukeba kudisankisha muinshi muinshi. Mvidi Mukulu mmututume. Ke patudi tuvuluka mudiye uditangila, tukuata mudimu badisange ne Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:1 Bitudi bambe ebi bidi bileja ne: tudi basue tshiakabidi kuditemba anyi? Tudi bu bamue badi bakengela mikanda ya kudileja nayi kunudi, nansha badi banulomba mikuabu bua kuya kudileja nayi kudi bakuabu anyi?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Nuenu ke mukanda utudi mua kudileja nawu, mukanda udi mufunda mu mioyi yetu, udi bonsu mua kumanya ne kubala." 
2Corinthians3:3 Eyowa, nuenu nudi mukanda uvua Kristu mufundishishe kutudi. Kena muufundishishe ne mayi a mukanda, kadi amu ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi. Kena muufundishishe pa mabue, kadi amu mu mioyi ya bantu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Tudi tujadika nanku, bualu tudi batekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu ku bukole bua Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:5 Bushuwa katuena mua kuamba ne: tudi mua kukumbaja mudimu ewu ku bukole buetu tuetu. Tudi mua kuukumbaja amu ku bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu. 
2Corinthians3:6 Bualu Yeye mmutuenze bena mudimu ba ndondu mupiamupia. Mu ndondu awu, Mvidi Mukulu kena mutupe mikenji idibu bafunde nansha, kadi mmutupe Mueyelu wende. Mikenji idibu bafunde idi itufikisha ku lufu, kadi Mueyelu udi utufikisha ku muoyi." 
2Corinthians3:7 Bayua bafunde mikenji pa mabue ku dileta ku dileta. Diba adi butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu buvua bukenka. Mpala wa Moshe uvua ubalakana bikole bipite, bena Izrayele kabayi mua kumutangila nansha. Kadi bukenke buvua pa mpala wa Moshe abu buvua amu ne bua kujimina. Pavua mikenji, ivua ne bua kutufikisha ku lufu, imueneka pamue ne butumbi bunene nanku," 
2Corinthians3:8 kadi butumbi budi bumueneka padi Mueyelu ukuata mudimu, nebuikale bunene bupite!" 
2Corinthians3:9 Bulongolodi buvua butupisha bukavua ne lumu. Nenku bulongolodi budi butubingisha kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu nebuikale ne lumu lupite! 
2Corinthians3:10 Tudi mua kuamba kabidi ne: lumu luvua lumueneka kale ludi tshianana, patudi tulufuanyikija ne lumu lupite ludi lumueneka lelu." 
2Corinthians3:11 Bualu pikala bivua bishala matuku makese bimuenesha lumu, nanku bidi bishala kashidi nebimueneshe lumu lupite!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Tudi tuakula ne dikima dionsu, bualu tudi batekemene bia nanku." 
2Corinthians3:13 Katuena bu Moshe uvua mudibuikile tshilamba mu mpala, bua bena Izrayele kabamonyi muvua bukenke bua lupitapita abu buenda bujimina." 
2Corinthians3:14 Kadi lungenyi luabu kaluvua mua kumvua bualu to. Too ne ku lelu padibu babala mikanda ya ndondu wa kale, tshilamba tshia momumue tshidi tshibuikila lungenyi luabu. Badi bumusha tshilamba etshi amu padi muntu udisanga ne Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:15 Lelu utudi ewu kabidi, misangu yonsu idibu babala mikanda ya Moshe, tshilamba tshidi tshibuikila lungenyi luabu." 
2Corinthians3:16 Kadi Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Padi muntu umonangana ne Maweja-Nangila, badi bumusha tshilamba. ”" 
2Corinthians3:17 Kadi Maweja-Nangila utudi tutela muaba ewu, ke Mfumu udi ukuata mudimu ku bukole bua Mueyelu wende. Muaba udi Mueyelu wa Mfumu, ke muaba utudi tuenza mutudi basue." 
2Corinthians3:18 Tuetu bonsu tudi tumuenesha butumbi bua Mfumu, bualu ki mbabuikile mpala wetu ne tshilamba. Ke mutudi bandamuke, bua difuanangane ne Mfumu, bua tumuke mu butumbi, tubuele mu bukuabu budi bupita bua kumpala. Ke bidi Mfumu muenze ku bukole bua Mueyelu wende." 
2Corinthians4:1 Mvidi Mukulu mmutufuile luse, mutupeshe mudimu ewu. Ke patudi katuyi mua kuteketa mu maboku." 
2Corinthians4:2 Tukadi bamane kubenga malu a mu musokoku adi atufuisha bundu. Katuena tukuata mudimu ne budimu. Katuena tuandamuna muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu bua kuwenza wa dishima. Kadi tudi mmanyisha bantu patoke malu a Mvidi Mukulu amu pa wowu. Ke patudi basue kudileja kudi muntu yonsu udi witaba Mvidi Mukulu bilondeshile kondu ka munda muende. 
2Corinthians4:3 Bantu badi kabayi mua kumvua bimpe Lumu lua Disanka lutudi mmanyisha, ke amu bantu badi bajimina." 
2Corinthians4:4 Diabolu, nwidie mubi wa pa buloba ebu, mmututubije lungenyi luabu. Ke padibu kabayi mua kuitaba Lumu lua Disanka, kabayi mua kumona bukenke budilu lutangalaja. Mu bukenke ebu butumbi bua Kristu budi bumueneka patoke. Mu Kristu mene Mvidi Mukulu udi umueneka." 
2Corinthians4:5 Bualu patudi tulongesha, katuena tudimanyisha tuetu to. Tudi mmanyisha Yezu Kristu bu Mfumu. Tuetu tudi amu bantu badi banukuatshila mudimu ku disua diende." 
2Corinthians4:6 Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambe ne: “Butoke bukenke mu miidima! ” Ke muvuaye mukenkeshe butoke buende mu mioyi yetu, bua mmanye butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu budi bubalakana pa mpala wa Kristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kadi tuetu bavua bapete dipa dinene adi kudi Mueyelu, tudi amu bu ngesu ya dima, bua bantu bamone bimpe mudi bukole ebu bua dikema buikale bua Mvidi Mukulu, kabuyi buetu tuetu." 
2Corinthians4:8 Badi batukengesha mishindu yonsu, kadi kabena batuboza. Tudi tupampakana, kadi katuena tuteketa mu maboku." 
2Corinthians4:9 Badi banduisha, kadi Mvidi Mukulu kena utulekela nansha. Badi batuela panshi, kadi tudi tulandapuka." 
2Corinthians4:10 Tudi Ulambula diba dionsu mu mubidi wetu lufu lua Kristu, bua muoyi udi Kristu ufila, umueneke kabidi mu mubidi wetu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Matuku etu onsu a panu, tudi amu mu njiwu ya lufu bualu bua Yezu, bua muoyi udi Kristu ufila, umueneke kabidi mu mubidi wetu udi ne bua kufua." 
2Corinthians4:12 Nunku lufu ludi luenza mudimu munda muetu, kadi muoyi udi wenza mudimu munda muenu." 
2Corinthians4:13 Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Ndi ntekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Ke pandi ngakula. ” Ke mutudi tuenza tuetu. Bu mutudi tutekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu, tumuitaba, tudi tulongesha Lumu lua Disanka katuyi tupungila." 
2Corinthians4:14 Mvidi Mukulu mmubishe Mfumu Yezu ku lufu. Ke mutudi bamanye ne: neatubishe ku lufu pamue nende. Neaditeke nenu pamue kumpala kua nkuasa wa butumbi. 
2Corinthians4:15 Tudi tuenza bionsu abi bualu buenu, bua bantu, badi bitaba bua Mvidi Mukulu abanange, bavulangane, bamuele tuasakidila, bamutumbishe." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ke patudi katuyi tuteketa mu maboku. Nansha bukole bua mubidi buenda buteketa ku kakese ku kakese, muoyi utudi tupeta kudi Mvidi Mukulu udi wenda ukola ku dituku ku dituku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Makenga atudi tumvua matuku aa adi amu makese, adi apita kabidi lubilu. Kadi neatupeteshe lumu luvule ludi lushala kashidi, ludi ne mushinga mupite wa makenga aa." 
2Corinthians4:18 Bualu katuena tobokela bidi bimueneka, kadi bidi kabiyi bimueneka. Bidi bimueneka kabiena binenga, kadi bidi kabiyi bimueneka bidi bishala kashidi." 
2Corinthians5:1 Tudi bamanye ne: nzubu utudi tusomba, mmomumue ne: mubidi wetu wa panu, udi upuka. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmutulongoluele nzubu mukuabu mu diulu, nzubu udi ushala kashidi, udibu kabayi basa kudi bantu." 
2Corinthians5:2 Patutshidi panu, tudi tutua mikemu mpindiewu, tujinga bua batubuikile ne nzubu wetu wa mu diulu." 
2Corinthians5:3 Bobu batubuikile nanku, katuakushala katuyi ne tshilamba, patuashiya mubidi wetu wa panu." 
2Corinthians5:4 Eyowa, patutshidi tusomba mu nzubu wetu wa panu ewu, tudi tutua mikemu bu bambule bujitu. Katuena basue kushiya mubidi wetu wa panu. Kadi tudi basue batubuikile ne mubidi wetu wa mu diulu, bua bidi ne bua kufua biandamuke bienze bia muoyi." 
2Corinthians5:5 Amu Mvidi Mukulu mene ke udi utulongolola, bua tumone mua kuandamuka nanku. Ukadi mutupe Mueyelu wende bu tshieya tshia bionsu bidiye mutulamine." 
2Corinthians5:6 Nanku diba dionsu tudi amu bakole muoyi. Tudi bamanye ne: patutshidi tusomba mu mubidi ewu, tudi dishilangana mutantshi ne Mfumu." 
2Corinthians5:7 Bualu ditshidi mu tshikondu tshia kuitaba, katuyi banji kumona." 
2Corinthians5:8 Tudi bakole muoyi, tujinga kushiya mubidi ewu diakamue, bua kuya kusomba mu nzubu mudi Mfumu." 
2Corinthians5:9 Kadi tshitudi tujinga menemene ke kumusankisha diba dionsu, nansha tuetu basombe mu mubidi ewu, nansha tuetu baye mu nzubu muende." 
2Corinthians5:10 Bualu bonsu tudi ne bua kumueneka kumpala kua Kristu, bua atulumbuluishe. Diba adi muntu yonsu udi ne bua kupeta bidiye ne bua kupeta bilondeshile malu, nansha mimpe nansha mabi, avuaye muenze patshivuaye mu mubidi wende." 
2Corinthians5:11 Tudi bamanye mutudi ne bua kutshina Mfumu. Ke patudi tukeba kufikisha bantu ku ditaba. Mvidi Mukulu mmutumanye muetu muonsu mutudi. Ndi ntekemena kabidi ne: nuenu munda muenu nudi bammanye kabidi muanyi muonsu mundi. 
2Corinthians5:12 Katuena basue kuditemba tshiakabidi kunudi. Kadi tudi tujinga kunupetesha tshikondu tshinudi mua kuditemba bualu buetu. Ke munudi mua kupuwisha badi baditemba bua bidi bimueneka, kabayi bamanye bidi mu muoyi wa muntu." 
2Corinthians5:13 Pikalabu batuambule mulu, tshilumbu atshi tshidi tshitutangila amu tuetu ne Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi bualu buenu tudi ne bua kukuata mudimu ne lungenyi." 
2Corinthians5:14 Bualu dinanga didi Kristu mutuleje didi ditulombola mu bionsu bitudi tuenza. Bualu tudi bajadike ne: bu mudi umue mufuile bantu bonsu, tuetu bonsu tudi bafue pamue nende." 
2Corinthians5:15 Uvua mufuile bantu bonsu, bua bantu batshidi ne muoyi kabakebi kabidi bidi bibalengelela bobu, kadi bakebe bidi bilengelela udi mubafuile, udi Mvidi Mukulu mubishe ku lufu." 
2Corinthians5:16 Nenku kutuadija ku lelu, katutshiena tulumbuluisha mudi bantu balumbuluisha muntu nabu. Ku kale tuvua balumbuluishe Kristu mushindu awu. Kadi mpindiewu katuena tuenza kabidi nanku to." 
2Corinthians5:17 Padi muntu udisanga ne Kristu, ukadi muntu mupiamupia: bikulukulu mbimane kushila bipiabipia muaba." 
2Corinthians5:18 Bionsu abi Mvidi Mukulu ke udi ubienza. Udi mututuangaje nende kudi Kristu, mutupeshe kabidi mudimu wa kufikisha bantu bakuabu bua badilengeje nende." 
2Corinthians5:19 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmukuate mudimu, bua Kristu alengeje bantu bonsu nende. Kavua musue kuvuluka kabidi malu abu mabi. mMutupeshe kabidi mudimu wa kumanyisha bantu mudibu mua kudilengeja nende." 
2Corinthians5:20 Ke mutudi tuakula mu dina dia Kristu. Mvidi Mukulu mene udi unubikila patudi Umuambila ne: “Mu dina dia Kristu tudi tunusengelela ne: nuanyishe bua Kristu anutuangaje ne Mvidi Mukulu.” 
2Corinthians5:21 Kristu kavua muenze bualu bubi to. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmuteke bubi buetu pambidi pende, bua amone mua kutubingisha kumpala kuende, patudi badisange ne Kristu." 
2Corinthians6:1 Nenku tuetu badi bakuatshi ba mudimu pamue ne Mvidi Mukulu, tudi tunubela bua dinanga divua Mvidi Mukulu mutuleje dipatule tshipeta." 
2Corinthians6:2 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Tshikondu tshia kukuleja mundi nkunanga tshimane kufika, ke meme kukuteleja. Dituku dia kukusungidila dimane kufika, ke meme kubambuluisha. ” Telejayi! Lelu ke tshikondu tshinudi ne bua kuanyisha bua Mvidi Mukulu anunange, ke dituku didiye mua kunusungidila." 
2Corinthians6:3 Katuena basue bua nupetele pa kujanyina mudimu wetu. Ke mutudi katuyi basue kulenduisha muntu nansha umue. 
2Corinthians6:4 Kadi mu malu onsu tudi tuleja mutudi tukuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu. Tudi tulama lutuulu mu makenga, mu ntatu, ne mu njiwu." 
2Corinthians6:5 Bayua batutuute, batuele mu nkanu. Bayua batukebele bimvundu. Tuvua bakuate midimu mikole, balale tshitabela, bapange ne tshiakudia." 
2Corinthians6:6 Tudi tuleja mutudi tukuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu, bualu munda muetu kamuena meji mabi. Tudi tukuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu ku meji mimpe atudi nawu munda, ku dimanya dituvua bapete, ku lutuulu, ku muoyi wa kalolu, ku mapa atuvua bapete kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila, ku dinanga dilelela ditudi tuleja bantu," 
2Corinthians6:7 ku malu atudi tulongesha amu pa wowu, ne ku bukole butudi tupeta kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku tshia mvita tshitudi tudisungidila natshi, nansha tshitudi tuluisha natshi bakuabu, ke malu mimpe atudi tuenza, adi Mvidi Mukulu ne bantu mua kuanyisha." 
2Corinthians6:8 Badi batuela kalumbandi, batujana. Badi batupenda, batupa lumu. Badi batutangila bu bena dishima, bitaba bitudi tuamba ne: mbilelela." 
2Corinthians6:9 Bamue badi batutangila bu benyi, bakuabu bu bantu badi bonsu bamanye. Tudi tupunga ne lufu, kadi nudi numona mutudi ne muoyi. Badi batunyoka, kadi kabena batushipa." 
2Corinthians6:10 Badi batubungamija, kadi tudi tuleja amu disanka. Tudi tumueneka bu bapele, kadi tudi tunemesha bantu bavule. Tudi tumueneka bu badi ku bianza kutupu, kadi tudi ne bionsu." 
2Corinthians6:11 Bana hetu basuibue ba mu Korente, tuvua banuambile malu onsu patoke, banunzuluile muoyi wetu mujima." 
2Corinthians6:12 Tuetu katuvua banubenge, kadi nuenu nuvua bambenge." 
2Corinthians6:13 Mpindiewu ndi nnuambila bu bana banyi ne: nutunange mutudi banunange. Nutunzuluile mioyi yenu mijima! 
2Corinthians6:14 Kanukuatshi mudimu pamue ne badi kabayi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu. Bidi bimpe kabiena mua kumvuangana ne bidi bibi. Muaba udi butoke kawena miidima. 
2Corinthians6:15 Kristu ne diabolu badi mua kumyuangana anyi? Muena ditaba ne udi kayi muena ditaba, badi mua kuenza tshintu tshimue anyi?" 
2Corinthians6:16 Mutudi mua kutendelela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mbishi? Bualu tudi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi. Ke pavua Mvidi Mukulu mene muambe ne: “Nengase nzubu wanyi munkatshi muabu, nengendakane nabu miaba yonsu. Nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu, bobu nebikale bantu banyi.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Ke pavua Maweja-Nangila muambe kabidi ne: “Nudi ne bua kumuka kudi bantu abu, nuye kusomba wenu muaba pa nkayenu. Kanulengi tshintu tshidi ne mikiya. Nanku Meme nennuakidile." 
2Corinthians6:18 Meme nengikale Tatu wenu, nuenu nenuikale bana banyi ba balume ne ba bakaji. Ke mundi ngamba Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu. ”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Bana hetu basuibue, ke bivuabu batulaye tuetu. Nanku tudilongololayi, tumushe manyanu onsu adi pambidi, tuditokeshe kabidi mu muoyi wetu. Tuikale bantu ba tshijila menemene, badi benza bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
2Corinthians7:2 Tunzuluilayi mioyi yenu! Katuena benzele muntu nansha umue bibi. Katuena banyenge muntu bivuaye nabi. Katuena bakengeshe muntu. 
2Corinthians7:3 Tshiena ngamba nanku bua kunudiwula. Bualu nkadi mumane kunujadikila ne: tudi banunange bikole. Ke mutudi nenu matuku onsu kaba kamue, nansha tuetu ne muoyi, nansha tufua." 
2Corinthians7:4 Ndi nnuambila malu onsu patoke! Ndi nditemba bualu buenu! Mu makenga etu onsu ndi mukoleshe amu muoyi, mumvue kabidi amu disanka dipite." 
2Corinthians7:5 Nansha patuvua bafike ku Masedoniya, katuvua ne dikisha nansha dikese. Tuvua bapete ntatu nseke yonsu: baluishi bavua batutatshisha; tuvua kabidi ne dipampakana mu muoyi." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi usamba badi batekete mu maboku, kutukolesha ku muoyi diba divua Tite mufike." 
2Corinthians7:7 Katuvua amu bakole muoyi bua difika diende nkayadi, kadi nangananga bua bivuaye mutuambile bua mushindu unuvua bamukoleshe kabidi ku muoyi. Uvua mutulondele munudi nujinga bikole kumonangana nanyi, munudi nubungama bua bivua bienzeka, munudi basue kutua ku tshianyi. Ke padi disanka dianyi dipita kuvulangana lelu." 
2Corinthians7:8 Bualu mukanda wanyi umvua munutumine, uvua munubungamije. Kadi lelu tshiena nnyingalala bua bimvua munufundile nansha. Pamvua mumvue muvua mukanda wanyi munubungamije, mvua muanji kunyingalala." 
2Corinthians7:9 Kadi lelu ndi ne disanka. — Tshiena nsanka bua pamvua munubungamije, kadi bua padi dibungama dienu dinupetesha bukole bua kudilengeja. Mvidi Mukulu uvua mukuate mudimu ne dibungama dienu adi. Ke pamvua katuyi banuenzele bibi nansha." 
2Corinthians7:10 Padi Mvidi Mukulu ukuata mudimu ne dibungama dietu, udi utuambuluisha bua tudilengeje, tupete lupandu. Ke patudi katuyi mua kunyingalala nansha. Kadi patudi tubungama tujinga bia panu, tudi tukeba lufu." 
2Corinthians7:11 Monayi muvua Mvidi Mukulu mukuate mudimu ne dibungama dinuvua nadi! Mpindiewu nukadi nutua tshilumbu atshi tshiadi. Nukadi nukeba kuleja munudi babinge! Nudi bafikile muena tshibawu munda. Nudi nutshina tshiji tshianyi, nujinga kumonangana nanyi! Nudi ne disuminyina, nukeba kunyoka badi benza bibi! Ke munudi baleje muenu muonsu munudi babinge mu tshilumbu atshi." 
2Corinthians7:12 Tshivua munufundile mukanda, bualu bua muntu uvua muenze bibi, nansha bualu bua muntu uvuabu benzele bibi to. Kadi mvua musue kunuleja patoke ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu, munudi nujinga kutua ku tshianyi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ke munuvua benze! Ke munuvua batukoleshe ku muoyi! Kadi katuvua bakole amu muoyi. Tuvua kabidi bumvue disanka dipite bunene, patuvua bamone Tite usanka bikole bua mushindu unuvua bonsu bamusambe." 
2Corinthians7:14 Mvua muanji kuditemba kakese bualu buenu ku mesu kuende. Nanku kanuena bamfuishe bundu. Bualu bu mutuvua banuambile misangu yonsu amu malu malelela, nansha pamvua muditembe bualu buenu ku mesu a Tite, tshivua mushime to." 
2Corinthians7:15 Mpindiewu udi mununange bipite muvuaye muenze kumpala, bualu udi uvuluka munuvua bonsu bajinge kumutumikila, kabidi munuvua bamuakidile ne kanemu, kabidi ne luzakalu." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndi musanke bua pandi mua kutekemena muanyi muonsu kunudi. 
2Corinthians8:1 Bana hetu, tudi tujinga bua numanye muvua dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu dikuate mudimu mu Bisumbu bia bena ditaba ba mu Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians8:2 Makenga a bungi avua makuate bena ditaba aba, abateta. Kadi bavua amu ne disanka dipite. Ke muyuabu bafile bintu ne kalolu, nansha bobu mene nabi bikese." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ndi nnujadikila ne: bayua bafile bilondeshile dimona diabu, badipitshishe mene." 
2Corinthians8:4 Bayua batusengelela amu kutusengelela bikole bua tuitabe bua basangishe bintu bia kuambuluisha nabi bena ditaba ba mu Yudeya," 
2Corinthians8:5 Bayua benze bipite ne patuvua batekemene. Bayua badianze kudifila kudi Mfumu. Pashishe bayua badifile kabidi kutudi, bua bamone mua kuitaba bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ke patuvua basengelele Tite, bua apingane kuenu aku, atungunuke ne mudimu uvuaye mushile mu njila, bua nujikije mudimu ewu ne muoyi wa kalolu." 
2Corinthians8:7 Nudi babanji mu bionsu: mu ditaba, mu dipa dia kuakula, mu dimanya dia malu, mu disuminyina dia mishindu yonsu, mu dinanga dinudi batunange nadi. Ke mutudi basue bua nudileje kabidi babanji mu dienza dia mudimu ewu wa kalolu." 
2Corinthians8:8 Tshiena nnuelela mukenji. Kadi ndi nnusonsola, nnuleja muvua bakuabu bakuata mudimu ne disuminyina, bua nuleje kabidi patoke munudi nunanga bantu." 
2Corinthians8:9 Bualu nudi bamanye dinanga divua Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu mutuleje. Uvua ne biuma, kadi mmudienze mupele bualu buenu, bua kununemesha ku bupele buende." 
2Corinthians8:10 Nanku ndi mfila meji mu bualu ebu: bidi bimpe bua nutungunuke ne binuvua bashile mu njila tshidimu tshishale. Nuvua ba kumpala bua kubanga mudimu awu, ba kumpala kabidi bua kuwelela meji." 
2Corinthians8:11 Tungunukayi nawu mpindiewu, nuujikije. Disuminyina dinuvua nadi pa kubanga mudimu awu, nuikale kabidi nadi pa kuujikija. Nufile binudi nabi." 
2Corinthians8:12 Panudi nufila ne muoyi wa kalolu, Mvidi Mukulu neapime binudi nufila bilondeshile binudi nabi; kakubipima bilondeshile binudi kanuyi nabi." 
2Corinthians8:13 Katuena basue kunubueja mu dikenga, bua tumone kua kuambuluisha bakuabu. Kadi mbimpe bonsu bikale ne bintu bungi bua momumue." 
2Corinthians8:14 Matuku aa nudi ne bintu bipite bungi. Ke munudi mua kuambuluisha badi mu dikenga. Nanku, dituku dinudi nubuela mu dikenga, nebanuambuluishe kabidi, padi bintu biabu bimane kuvulangana. Ke mutudi mua kuikala ne bintu bungi bua momumue." 
2Corinthians8:15 Ke muvua Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Uvua muangule bintu bipite, kavua ushala nabi bipite bungi. Uvua muangule bikese, kavua ubula tshintu. ”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Tudi tuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bualu uvua mupeshe Tite disuminyina bualu buenu ditudi tuetu kabidi nadi!" 
2Corinthians8:17 Uvua muanyishe bituvua balombe. Tuambe ne: bu muvuaye ne disuminyina divule, mmudijadikile nkayende bua kufika kuenu." 
2Corinthians8:18 Tudi tumutuma pamue ne muanetu udibu banyisha mu Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba, bua mudimu wa kulongesha Lumu lua Disanka udiye ukuata." 
2Corinthians8:19 Bena ditaba kabidi bayua bamusungule bua kutufilaye ku luendu, bua atuambuluishe mu mudimu ewu wa kalolu utudi tukuata, bua kutumbisha Mfumu, kabidi bua kuleja mutudi basue kuambuluisha bakuabu." 
2Corinthians8:20 Tudi basue kuepela bijanu bidibu mua kutujana pa mushindu utudi tuenza mudimu ne bintu bivule ebi. 
2Corinthians8:21 Tudi tukeba kuenza ki ngamu bidi Mfumu mua kuanyisha, kadi kabidi bidi bantu mua kuanyisha." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tudi tubatuma ne muanetu mukuabu, utuvua bamane kuteta misangu ya bungi. Tuetu kumusangana ne disuminyina misangu yonsu. Kadi mpindiewu udi ne disuminyina dipite, bualu udi munutekemene bikole." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tite ke utudi tuendakana nende, tukuata kabidi nende mudimu bua kunuambuluisha. Bana hetu bakuabu badi bamufila ku luendu badi bamienampala ba Bisumbu bia bena ditaba. Badi bakuata mudimu amu bua lumu lua Kristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Nubaleje munudi babanange bulelela, bua mu Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba bantu bajadike ne: tuvua tuditemba bualu buenu amu pa bualu." 
2Corinthians9:1 Tshiena ne bua kunutumina mukanda bua kunulomba, bua nuambuluishe pamue netu bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu badi mu Yudeya." 
2Corinthians9:2 Bualu ndi mumanye munudi basue kuambuluisha. Ke mumvua muditambishe bualu buenu, ngambila bena Masedoniya ne: “Bana hetu ba mu Akaya bakadi babange kusangisha bintu kukadi tshidimu tshijima.” Nanku disuminyina dienu divua disonsola ba bungi ba kudibu." 
2Corinthians9:3 Kadi ndi nnutumina bana hetu aba, bua diditemba dietu bualu buenu kadikadi dia patupu. Ndi musue bua banusangane nuenu bamane kusangisha bintu, mumvua muambe." 
2Corinthians9:4 Kadi bu tuetu mua kufika ne bena Masedoniya banusangane kanuyi basangishe bintu, bundu nebutukuate tuetu bavua batekemene bikole kunudi! Kadi nangananga nebunukuate nuenu!" 
2Corinthians9:5 Ke pamvua muele meji ne: ndi ne bua kusengelela bana hetu aba, bua badianjile kuenu aku kumpala kuanyi. Basangishe muaba umue binuvua balaye ne muoyi wa kalolu. Nanku pangafika, nembisangane. Ke munudi mua kuleja bantu munudi nubifila ne muoyi wenu mujima, kabayi banuenzeja malu ku bukole." 
2Corinthians9:6 Vulukayi ne: udi umiamina bikese, neanowe bikese; udi umiamina bia bungi, neanowe bia bungi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Muntu yonsu afile mudiye muele meji, kayi ne muoyi mujoboke, kabayi bamuenzeje malu ku bukole. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi unanga udi upa ne disanka." 
2Corinthians9:8 Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole bua kunuvudijila bintu bilenga bia mishindu yonsu, bua nupete matuku onsu bionsu binudi nukengela, nushale ne bikuabu bipite bungi bua kuambuluisha nabi bakuabu." 
2Corinthians9:9 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Udi upesha bakengi matuku onsu, kayi ubatompuela, ubaleja muoyi wa kalolu kashidi tshiendelele. ”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Mvidi Mukulu udi upesha tshidime maminu ne biakudia, neanupeshe maminu onsu anudi nukengela. Neaameneshe kabidi. Nanku muoyi wenu wa kalolu neukuame bimuma bimpe." 
2Corinthians9:11 Diba dionsu neavudije biuma bienu, bua numone mua kuambuluisha bakuabu ne muoyi wa kalolu. Nanku bantu ba bungi nebele Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bua bintu bienu bitudi mua kubapesha." 
2Corinthians9:12 Bualu mudimu unudi nukuata awu kawena wambuluisha amu bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi netupete kabidi tshipeta tshikuabu tshipite bimpe, bualu bantu ba bungi nebele Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila." 
2Corinthians9:13 Panudi nukumbaja mudimu ewu ne muoyi umue, bantu ba bungi nebatumbishe Mvidi Mukulu bualu buenu. Nebanuele tuasakidila, bua panudi nuitaba Lumu lua Disanka lua Kristu muenu muonsu, kabidi bua muoyi wa kalolu unudi nuabanyangana nabu, kabidi ne bantu bakuabu bonsu, bintu bienu." 
2Corinthians9:14 Nebanulombele kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Nebanunange bikole, padibu bamona mudi Mvidi Mukulu mupite kunuenzela bimpe." 
2Corinthians9:15 Tuelayi Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila bua mapa ende, adi mapite bionsu bitudi mua kuela meji." 
2Corinthians10:1 Meme Polu, ndi ne bua kudilumbuluila mpindiewu. Badi bangamba ne: ndi ne bowa, pandi munkatshi muenu. Kadi pandi kule, ndi nnubela ne dikima. Bu mudi Kristu ne muoyi mulenga wa bupole, ndi nnusengelela ne:" 
2Corinthians10:2 kanumbikidi bua meme kuleja dikima pandi munkatshi muenu. Bualu tshiena ntshina bantu badi banjana, bamba ne: udi ukeba amu bia panu!" 
2Corinthians10:3 Bushuwa, tudi amu bantu. Kadi katuena baluangana ne bia mvita bia bantu." 
2Corinthians10:4 Bia mvita bitudi uluangana nabi, kabiena bia bantu ba panu. Kadi bidi bia mvita bikole bitudi bapete kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bitudi mua kubutula nabi nzubu ivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Tudi tu-vingutula nabi meji a dishima." 
2Corinthians10:5 Tudi tubumbula nabi ditambisha dionsu didi dijikila njila wa kumanya Mvidi Mukulu. Tudi tuela meji onsu mu nkanu, bua itabe Kristu." 
2Corinthians10:6 Nuenu bamane kuitaba Kristu muenu muonsu, netuikale nenu pabuipi, bua kunyoka bantomboji bonsu." 
2Corinthians10:7 Nudi nutangila nangananga bidi bimueneka ku mesu. Nanku padi muntu wela meji ne: ndi wa Kristu, amanye ne: tuetu kabidi tudi ba Kristu, mudiye yeye amu." 
2Corinthians10:8 Tshiena ne bua kufua bundu, nansha meme muditambishe kakese, bua bumfumu buvua Mfumu mutupeshe. Bumfumu ndi nabu amu bua kunutuma kumpala mu tshisumbu, ki mbua kunubutula nabu to." 
2Corinthians10:9 Tshiena musue kumueneka bu muntu udi ukeba kunukuatshisha bowa ne mikanda yanyi. 
2Corinthians10:10 Bualu badi bamba ne: “Mu mikanda ya Polu mudi miaku mikole idi itapa ku matshi. Kadi padiye munkatshi muetu, udi bu kantu ka patupu, wakula bikuata ne luse.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Muntu udi wamba nanku, amanye ne: bu mudi mikanda yanyi inutapa ku matshi, meme muikale kule, ke muanutapa kabidi miaku yanyi ku matshi patuamonangana nenu mpala ne mpala." 
2Corinthians10:12 Bushuwa katuena ne dikima dia kuditeka mu mulongu umue, nansha dia kudifuanyikija, ne bamue badi badipa lumu nkayabu. Badi bantu batatakane, badi badienzela tshipimu tshia kudipima natshi, badilumbuluisha bobu nkayabu." 
2Corinthians10:13 Kadi tuetu katuena basue kuditambisha tupita mikalu. Mvidi Mukulu uvua muanyishe bua tulongeshe Lumu lua Disanka kuenu aku. Ke bindi mua kuditambishila. 
2Corinthians10:14 Bu tuetu katuyi bafike kuenu aku, tuvua mua kupita mikalu. Kadi nudi munda mua mikalu idi Mvidi Mukulu mutufundile. Bualu tuvua bafike kuenu aku, banumanyishe Lumu lua Disanka lua Kristu." 
2Corinthians10:15 Nanku katuena tusambuka mikalu. Katuena tuditemba bua midimu ivua bakuabu bakuate. Kadi tudi batekemene ne: ditaba dienu nedikole, bua tumone mua kukuata mudimu mupite bunene munkatshi muenu, katuyi tupita mikalu ivua Mvidi Mukulu mutufundile." 
2Corinthians10:16 Ditaba dienu dimane kukola, netumone mua kutantshisha Lumu lua Disanka mu matunga a kupita kuenu aku, katuyi tuditemba bua mudimu uvua bakuabu bakuate muaba mukuabu." 
2Corinthians10:17 Ke mudi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Udi musue kuditemba, aditembe bua bidi Mfumu muenze. ”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Bualu muntu udi udianyisha, kena ne mushinga nansha, kadi amu udi Mfumu muanyishe." 
2Corinthians11:1 Eyowa ndi musue bua nungitabe, nunganyishe, nansha meme mudileje mutatakane kakese!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Ndi mununange, munukuatshile mukawu, mudi Mvidi Mukulu mununange, munukuatshile mukawu. Bualu nudi bu mukaji utshidi kamama, umvua mufile kudi bayende umuepele, ke Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:3 Nyoka, uvua mupambule Eva ne budimu buende, ke undi ntshina. Bualu meji enu adi mua kupambuka mu njila, nuenu kulekela kunanga Kristu, kulekela kumuitaba ne muoyi umue." 
2Corinthians11:4 Bualu nudi nuitaba pa lukasa muntu udi unulongesha Kristu mushilangane ne utuvua banulongeshe. Nudi basue kuakidila diakamue mueyelu mushilangane ne unuvua bapete, nuanyisha kabidi Lumu lua Disanka lushilangane ne lutuvua banulongeshe." 
2Corinthians11:5 Kadi ndi muele meji ne: tshiena mushadile kudi bapostolu benu ba kalanda musenga banudi nuditemba nabu! 
2Corinthians11:6 Bumue tshiena mumanye mua kuakula bimpe. Kadi bua dimanya, ndi nadi. Ke bimvua munuleje patoke matuku onsu, kabidi mishindu yonsu." 
2Corinthians11:7 Pamvua munulongeshe Lumu lua Disanka, tshivua mulombe difutu. Mvua mudipuekeshe bua kununemesha. Pamvua muenze nanku, mvua muenze bibi anyi?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Pamvua nkuata mudimu kuenu, mvua muanyishe bua bamfute kudi Bisumbu bikuabu bia bena ditaba. Tuambe ne: mvua mubashiye bianza bitupu, bua mmone mua kunuambuluisha nuenu!" 
2Corinthians11:9 Matuku amvua mulale kuenu aku, pamvua nkengela makuta, muntu nansha umue kavua muambule bujitu buanyi. Bana hetu bayua bumukila ku Masedoniya, ke bayua bantuadila bionsu bimvua nkengela. Tshivua musue kunuomekela bujitu buanyi ku kalu nansha kamue. Ke mungenza kabidi mu matuku atshidi kumpala." 
2Corinthians11:10 Mu dina dia bulelela bua Kristu budi munda muanyi, ndi mujadike ne: muntu nansha umue mu ditunga dijima dia Akaya, kena mua kunnyenga lumu luanyi elu." 
2Corinthians11:11 Ndi muambe nanku bua tshinyi? Bualu tshiena mununange anyi? Mvidi Mukulu mmumanye mundi mununange! 
2Corinthians11:12 Nengenze amu mundi ngenza mpindiewu. Bualu tshiena musue bua bapostolu benu ba kalanda musenga abu bambe ne: “Tudi tukuata mudimu mushindu wa momumue ne Polu.” 
2Corinthians11:13 Bantu abu mbapostolu ba dishima, badi badinga bantu, ba-disokoka badileja bu bapostolu ba Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Katuena ne bua kukema nansha. Diabolu kabidi udi mua kudisokoka, kudileja ne bukenke bu mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Corinthians11:15 Nanku katuena mua kukema bua padi badi bakuatshila diabolu mudimu, badisokoka, badileja bu bantu badi bakuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu. Kadi ku ndekelu nebabanyoke bilondeshile mudimu uvuabubakuate." 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndi ngambulula ne: muntu kantangidi ne: ndi mupale. Kadi panudi basue kuntangila nanku, nuanyishe bua ngenze bu muntu mupale, bua mmone mua kuditambisha kakese." 
2Corinthians11:17 Bushuwa bindi ngamba mpindiewu, ki mbidi Mfumu musue bua meme kuamba nansha. Pandi ne bua kuditemba nanku, ndi ngakula amu bu muntu mupale." 
2Corinthians11:18 Bu mudi bantu bavule baditemba bua malu a panu, ndi mua kuditemba kabidi." 
2Corinthians11:19 Bu munudi ne meji, nenulengulule ne mimuemue bupale bua bakuabu!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Nudi nuanyisha bua banutumine diyi, mudibu batumina bapika, bua banunyenge bintu bienu, banudinge, banupetule, banukume minu mu mpala." 
2Corinthians11:21 Bu mumvua tshiyi ne bukole bua kunukengesha nanku, ndi ngumvua bundu be! Kadi pikala muntu ukimina kuditambisha, — ndi ngakula bu muntu mupale — ndi mua kuditambisha ne meme kabidi." 
2Corinthians11:22 Badi bena Ebrewu menemene anyi? Meme kabidi! Badi bena Izrayele anyi? Meme kabidi! Badi bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Abrahame anyi? Nansha meme! 
2Corinthians11:23 Badi bakuatshila Kristu mudimu anyi? Nanku, — ndi ngakula bu muntu mujimije lungenyi — meme kabidi ndi mukuatshile Kristu mudimu, mubapite bonsu! Bayua bankengesha bipite muyuabu babakengesha bobu. Bayua bangela mu lukanu misangu ya bungi. Bayua bantuuta bipite. Meme kubuela mu njiwu ya lufu misangu ne misangu." 
2Corinthians11:24 Bena Yuda bayua bankuma mfimbu makumi asatu ne tshitema misangu itanu. 
2Corinthians11:25 Bena Rome bayua bampiande mfimbu misangu isatu. Bayua bangase mabue musangu umue bua kunshipa. Mvua mudine mu mayi ne buatu misangu isatu. Musangu umue mvua mushale meba makumi abidi ne anayi amu munkatshi mua mayi manene. 
2Corinthians11:26 Mu ngendu yanyi kayiyi kubala, mvua mupete njiwu mu misulu, pavua mayi mapasalale. Mvua mupete njiwu kudi banyenganganyi ba bintu, kudi bana hetu bena Yuda, ne kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Mvua mu njiwu mu bimenga ne mu bipela, pa mayi manene kabidi. Mvua muyipete ne kudi bana hetu ba dishima." 
2Corinthians11:27 Mvua mukuate midimu mikole ya dipungi. Mvua mutshishe butuku misangu ne misangu. Mvua mufue ne nyota. Mvua mupange biakudia matuku mulongulongu. Mashika avua mantonde, bualu tshivua ne bilamba bikumbane." 
2Corinthians11:28 Mvua mua kutela bikuabu bia bungi. Kadi ntshidi ntela amu tshimue: ke bujitu bundi nabu matuku onsu, ntatshila Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba." 
2Corinthians11:29 Padi muntu kayi ne bukole, meme kabidi ndi ndiumvua ne: tshiena nabu. Padi muntu udishinda mu bubi, bidi bimbungamija bikole." 
2Corinthians11:30 Bu meme ne bua kuditambisha, nenditambishe bua butekete buonsu bundi nabu." 
2Corinthians11:31 Mvidi Mukulu, Tatuende wa Mfumu Yezu, mummanye ne: tshiena nshima to. Atumbe kashidi tshiendelele!" 
2Corinthians11:32 Pamvua ku Damase, mulombodi wa ditunga, uvua ukuatshila mukalenga wa ditunga Aretase mudimu, uvua muteke basolayi ku biibi bia tshimenga bua kunkuata." 
2Corinthians11:33 Kadi bayua bampatuile ku madidishi a ku tshimana tshia tshimenga. Kuntuluilabu mu tshisaka. Ke mumvua mupanduke mu bianza bia mulombodi awu nanku. 
2Corinthians12:1 Nansha kabiyi bimpe, ndi amu ne bua kuditemba. Bualu nudi numbambidika bua ngenze nanku. Nengakule mpindiewu bua malu avua Mfumu mundeje, munsokoluele." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndi mumanye muena Kristu kampanda, uvuabu bambule, baye nende mu diulu muamua menemene, kukadi bidimu dikumu ne binayi. (Tshiena mumanye ne: uvua muye ne mubidi wende anyi Mvidi Mukulu mumuleje mu lungenyi malu a kuaka. Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke udi mumanye.)" 
2Corinthians12:3 Eyowa, ndi mumanye ne: bayua bambule muntu awu, baye nende too ne mu mparadizu. (Ndi ngamba tshiakabidi ne: bayua bamuambule bulelela anyi Mvidi Mukulu mumuleje malu, tshiena mumanye. Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke udi mumanye.)" 
2Corinthians12:4 Muamua, uvua mumvue miaku idibu kabayi mua kuambulula, nansha kumvuija mu miakulu idi bantu ba panu bakula." 
2Corinthians12:5 Bua muntu awu, nenditembe. Kadi tshiena mua kuditemba bualu buanyi meme. Nenditembe amu bua malu adi aleja butekete bundi nabu." 
2Corinthians12:6 Meme musue kuditemba, tshiakudileja bu muntu mutatakane to. Bualu nengambe amu malu malelela. Kadi tshiena musue kuditemba. Ndi musue muntu angangate ne mushinga bua bidiye mumone ngenza, nansha bua bidiye mumvue ngakula, kayi upitshisha." 
2Corinthians12:7 mBandeje malu adibu kabayi mua kumvuija. Kadi bua tshimonyi mua kuditambisha, Mvidi Mukulu mmumpeshe dikenga dinene. Mutumibue wa diabolu mmuntatshishe bua tshiditembi." 
2Corinthians12:8 Mvua mulombe Mfumu misangu isatu, bua angumushile dikenga edi." 
2Corinthians12:9 Kungandamunaye ne: “Tshiudi natshi dikenga, ke amu dinanga dindi nkunanga nadi, bualu bukole buanyi budi budileja patoke paudi muena butekete.” Ke mundi musue kuditemba nangananga bua butekete buanyi, bua bukole bua Kristu buntulukile." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ke pandi nsanka bualu bua Kristu mu butekete buanyi, nansha diba mene didibu batupenda, bantatshisha, bankengesha, bankuatshisha bowa. Nanku pandi ne butekete, ke pandi ne bukole." 
2Corinthians12:11 Mvua mudileje bu muntu mutatakane. Kadi nuenu nuvua bambidike bua ngenze nanku. Nuenu ke bayua mua kundumbuluila. Bualu nansha meme muntu wa patupu, tshiena mushadile kudi bapostolu benu banudi nuamba ne: mba kalandamusenga abu." 
2Corinthians12:12 Lutuulu lumvua nalu, malu a dikema ne bishima bimvua muenze munkatshi muenu, ke bivua mua kunujadikila mundi mupostolu." 
2Corinthians12:13 Tshindi muenzele Bisumbu bikuabu bia bena ditaba, mubenge kunuenzela nuenu ntshinyi? Ee, bubi bumvua munuenzele: tshivua munulombe diambuluisha! Bu mundi munukengeshe nanku, numfuile amu luse!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Nkadi pa kufika kuenu aku, bua musangu wanyi muisatu. Bujitu buanyi kabuakuikala pa makaya enu to. Tshiena nkeba biuma bienu. Ndi nnukeba amu nuenu mene. Bualu bana kabena ne bua kudisha baledi to. Amu baledi ke badi ne bua kudisha bana babu." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ndi njinga kufila bionsu bindi nabi ne disanka bualu buenu. Nendifile ne meme mene bua kunuambuluisha. Kadi dinnanga dienu nedikepele, padi dinunanga dianyi dienda divulangana anyi?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Nanku nenuitabe ne: bujitu buanyi kabuvua pa makaya enu to. Kadi bamue nebambe ne: bu mudiye ne budimu, mmutudinge mushindu mukuabu." 
2Corinthians12:17 Kadi mvua munudinge munyi? Mvua munutumine bantu, bua banunyenge bintu bia meme kunema nabi anyi?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Bushiwa, mvua musengelele Tite, bua aye kumonangana nenu. Mvua mutume nende muena ditaba unudi bamanye. Nudi mua kujadika ne: Tite mmununyenge bintu anyi? Yeye ne meme, ka-tuvua bakuate mudimu mushindu wa momumue anyi? Katuvua bipatshile bualu amu bumue anyi?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Bumue nukadi nuela meji mpindiewu ne: Polu udi ukeba kudilumbuluila ku mesu etu. Nansha kakese! Tudi tudilumbuluila ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu, badisange ne Kristu! Bana hetu basuibue, tudi tunuambila bionsu abi, bua nuenu kushindama, kuya kumpala mu ditaba." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ndi ntshina ne: pangafika, tshiakunusangana mushindu undi musue. Tshiyi munusangane nanku, nuenu kabidi kanuakunsangana mushindu unudi basue. Bumue nensangane amu mvita ne lubabu, tshiji ne difuilakana dia mianzu, bipendu ne buakulavi, ditambisha ne buenzavi. Ke tshindi ntshina." 
2Corinthians12:21 Pangafika bua kumonangana nenu, ndi ntshina ne: Mvidi Mukulu wanyi neampuekeshe milongu ku mesu enu. Bualu nengase muadi, pandi mmona ba bungi bavua benze bibi kale, kabayi badilengeja lelu. Nanku nulekele buendenda, malu a bundu, ne bilema bikuabu binuvua benze." 
2Corinthians13:1 Nkadi pa kufika kuenu aku musangu muisatu bua kumonangana nenu. Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Badi mua kufunda muntu ku tshilumbu, amu padi bantu babidi nansha basatu batshijadika. ”" 
2Corinthians13:2 Ndi musue kubela bantu bavua benze bibi kale, ne bakuabu bonsu kabidi. Nkadi mumane kubabela mu luendu luanyi luibidi kuenu aku. Lelu tshiena munkatshi muenu. Kadi ndi ngambulula bimvua muambe diba adi ne: musangu utuamonangana tshiakabidi, tshiakufuila muntu nansha umue luse to." 
2Corinthians13:3 Nudi basue kujadika mudi Kristu wakuila mukana muanyi. Nanku nenujadike bualu ebu diba adi. Kristu kakunuteketela to. Kadi nealeje bukole buende munkatshi muenu. 
2Corinthians13:4 Bushuwa uvua muteketele bantu bayua bamupopele ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Kadi mpindiewu udi ne muoyi ku bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu. Tuetu kabidi, badisange nende, tudi ne butekete. Kadi netupete muoyi pamue nende ku bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu. Nenujadike bualu ebu." 
2Corinthians13:5 Dikonkayi! Nutshidi bena ditaba anyi? Ditetayi! Kristu utshidi munkatshi muenu anyi? Panudi kanuyi bamone nanku, nukadi bamuvile." 
2Corinthians13:6 Kadi ndi mutekemene ne: nenumanye mutudi tuetu katuyi bamuvile. 
2Corinthians13:7 Tudi tulomba Mvidi Mukulu bua kanuenji bualu bubi nansha bumue. Katuena tujinga kudileja ne: tudi ne bukole. Kadi tshitudi tujinga tshidi amu ne: nuenze malu mimpe. Nansha tuetu bimueneka bu bantu badi kabayi ne bukole, ki mbualu to." 
2Corinthians13:8 Bualu katuena tuluisha bulelela bua Mvidi Mukulu. Tudi tubuluila diba dionsu. 
2Corinthians13:9 Tudi tusanka patudi ne butekete, nuenu ne bukole. Ke patudi tunulombela kabidi kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua anulengeje, anupingaje mu njila mululame." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ndi munufundile bionsu ebi, nansha mundi mutantshi mule, bua, pangafika, tshikadi ne tshilumbu tshia kunubela ne disu dikole. Bualu Mfumu mmumpeshe bumfumu ki mbua kunyangakaja Tshisumbu, kadi amu bua kutshibaka." 
2Corinthians13:11 Mpindiewu, bana hetu, kolayi! Nulonde amu njila mululame. Nukoleshangane ku muoyi. Nuenze tshintu tshimue. Sombayi ne bupole. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu udi utunanga, neatupe bupole buende. Neikale nenu." 
2Corinthians13:12 Elanganayi muoyi, nupukilangane bu bana ba muntu. Bena ditaba bonsu ba mu Tshisumbu tshietu badi banuela muoyi." 
2Corinthians13:13 Luse lua Mfumu Yezu Kristu, dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu, ne didisanga ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila, bikale nenu bonsu." 
Galatians1:1 Meme Polu, udi unufundila mukanda ewu, ndi mupete mudimu wa bupostolu ki nkudi bantu, nansha ku diambuluisha dia muntu, kadi kudi Yezu Kristu, ne kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu, udi umubisha ku lufu." 
Galatians1:2 Meme ne bana hetu bonsu badi kunu, tudi tunuela muoyi, nuenu badi mu Bisumbu bia bena ditaba bia mu Ngalate, tunujingila ne:" 
Galatians1:3 Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu, ne bia kudi Yezu Kristu, bishindame mu mioyi yenu." 
Galatians1:4 Kristu mmudifile bua kutusungidila ku mibi yetu, kutupikula ku tshikondu tshibi tshia lelu etshi. Ke muvuaye mukumbaje bivua Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu musue." 
Galatians1:5 Mvidi Mukulu atumbe kashidi tshiendelele! Amene. 
Galatians1:6 Nudi bankemeshe bikole! Mvidi Mukulu, uvua munubikile ku luse lua Kristu, nuenu kumushiya lukasa nanku, kulonda Lumu lua Disanka lukuabu!" 
Galatians1:7 Bushuwa, kakuena Lumu lua Disanka lukuabu nansha! Kudi amu bantu bakuabu badi banudinga, basue kushintulula Lumu lua Disanka lua Kristu." 
Galatians1:8 Kadi pangikala meme, nansha muntu mukuabu, nansha mutumibue mene wa Mvidi Mukulu, tunulongesha Lumu lua Disanka bishilangane ne lutuvua banulongeshe, tuasangana bena tshibawu kuenza anyi? Tuenza!" 
Galatians1:9 Tukavua bamane kunuambila kale bindi ngambulula lelu ne: muntu udi unulongesha Lumu lua Disanka lushilangane ne lutuvua banulongeshe, mmuena tshibawu!" 
Galatians1:10 Nudi nuela meji ne: ndi nkeba bua bantu banganyishe anyi? Nansha! Ndi musue amu bua Mvidi Mukulu anganyishe! Ndi nkeba kusankisha bantu anyi? Bu meme nkeba kusankisha bantu, tshi vua mua kuikala muena mudimu wa Kristu to." 
Galatians1:11 Bana hetu, ndi nnujadikila ne: Lumu lua Disanka lundi ndongesha kaluena lufume kudi bantu to." 
Galatians1:12 Tshivua mulupete kudi muntu. Kabavua bandongeshe lumu elu nansha. Kadi anu Kristu uvua mudileje kundi, ke uvua mulummanyishe." 
Galatians1:13 Nudi bamanye mumvua musuminyine kale malu a Mvidi Mukulu adi bena Yuda balongesha, nkengesha ne tshikisu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba Mvidi Mukulu, nkeba kutshibutula." 
Galatians1:14 Mvua mukumbaje bimpe bitambe malu a ditaba dia bena Yuda, mupite bena mulongu wanyi bavule. Mvua musuminyine bibidilu bia bankambua, kakuyi wa kufuanangana nanyi." 
Galatians1:15 Kadi bu mudi Mvidi Mukulu munnange, ukavua mudianze kunsungula, kabayi banji kundela, bua meme kumukuatshila mudimu." 
Galatians1:16 Diba divuaye musue kutumanyisha Muanende, bua meme kumanyisha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu Lumu luende lua Disanka, tshivua muye kulomba meji kudi muntu." 
Galatians1:17 Tshivua nansha muye ku Yerushalayime, bua kumonangana ne bakavua bapete mudimu wa bupostolu kumpala kuanyi. Kadi diakamue mvua muye ku Arabiya. Pashishe meme kupingana ku Damase." 
Galatians1:18 Amu kupita bidimu bisatu, meme kushisha kuya ku Yerushalayime, bua kumonangana ne Petro. Tuvua nende mbingu ibidi bulubulu." 
Galatians1:19 Kadi tshivua mumone mupostolu mukuabu nansha umue, pa kumusha Yakobe, muanabu ne Mfumu." 
Galatians1:20 Bindi nnufundila ebi mbilelela. Ndi njadika ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu ne: tshiena nshima.
