Galatians1:21 Pashishe meme kuya mu buloba bua Siriya ne bua Silisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Tshikondu tshijima atshi, bena ditaba ba mu Bisumbu bia bena Kristu bia mu Yudeya kabavua banji kutumona to." 
Galatians1:23 Bavua anu bamanye bivua bantu bamba ne: “Muntu ewu uvua mutukengeshe kale, ukadi ulongesha ditaba divuaye ukeba kubutula.”" 
Galatians1:24 Ke muvuabu bela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bua bivuaye mungenzele." 
Galatians2:1 Kupita bidimi dikumi ne binayi, tuvua bapingane ne Bamabase ku Yerushalayime. Meme kuangata kabidi Tite, bua aye netu." 
Galatians2:2 Mvidi Mukulu mene uvua mundeje mumvua ne bua kuyaku. Patuvua nkayetu mu tshisangilu ne balombodi ba Tshisumbu, mvua mubumvuije Lumu lua Disanka lundi ndongesha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Tshivua musue bua mudimu umvua nkuata kale, nansha undi nkuata lelu, wikale wa tshianana." 
Galatians2:3 Nanku Tite, utudi tukuata nende mudimu, nansha yeye muena Ngreke, ki mbambe bua bamuteke panshi." 
Galatians2:4 Bushuwa bena ditaba bakuabu, bena mpala ibidi, bavua babuelakane netu, bavua basue kumutekesha panshi. Bantu aba mbabuele mu Tshisumbu tshietu bua kututentekela, kumona mutudi tudienzela bitudi basue, bualu tudi tuitaba Yezu Kristu. Nanku bavua basue kutupingaja mu bupika." 
Galatians2:5 Kadi tuetu, katuena bitabe nansha kakese bivua bantu aba balombe, bua numone mua kuitaba Lumu lua Disanka pa lolu." 
Galatians2:6 Kadi bantu bavua balombodi ba Tshisumbu kabavua bangambile malu makuabu a meme kuenza. — Tshivua bualu ne bulombodi buabu to. Mu bualu ebu Mvidi Mukulu mmutuangate bonsu ne mushinga. — 
Galatians2:7 Kadi bavua bamone ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumpeshe mudimu wa kulongesha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu Lumu lua Disanka, amu muvuaye mupeshe Petro mudimu wa kubilongesha bena Yuda." 
Galatians2:8 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmuenze, bua ngikale mupostolu bua bisamba bikuabu, amu muvuaye muenze bua Petro ikale mupostolu bua bena Yuda." 
Galatians2:9 Yakobe, Petro, ne Yowanane, bavua bantu banemeka bu balombodi banene, bavua bitabe ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumpeshe mudimu ewu wa pa buawu. Nanku meme ne Bamabase, bavua batuele muoyi, batukuate ku tshianza, bua kuleja mutudi tukuata nabu mudimu wa momumue. Ke tuetu bonsu pamue kumvuangana nabu ne: meme ne Bamabase, netuye kukuatshila bisamba bikuabu mudimu, bobu nebakuatshile bena Yuda mudimu." 
Galatians2:10 Bavua batulomba amu, bua tuvuluke bakengi ba mu Tshisumbu tshiabu bavua mu Yerushalayime. Ke tshimvua muenze muanyi muonsu." 
Galatians2:11 Kadi Petro mumane kufika mu Antiyokiya, meme kumubela, bantu bonsu bumvue, bualu uvua muenze bibi." 
Galatians2:12 Bantu bavua Yakobe mutume kabayi banji kufika, Petro uvua udia pamue ne bena ditaba ba bisamba bikuabu. Kadi bantu abu bamane kufika, yeye kusesuka, kayi musue kudia kabidi ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Uvua utshina bena Yuda badi balongesha mudibu ne bua kuteka bantu panshi." 
Galatians2:13 Bamue bena ditaba ba mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda, bakavua baleja bukata, bidikija Petro. Bamabase mene ukavua ulonda tshilejilu tshiabu tshibi." 
Galatians2:14 Pamvua mumone mu wabu benza malu mabi, adi abengangana ne Lumu lua Disanka, meme kubela Petro kumpala kua bantu bonsu, kunuambila ne: “Wewe, muena Yuda, uvua usomba munemu amu bu bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, kuyi ulonda mikenji ya bena Yuda. Kadi mmunyi muudi musue mpindiewu, bua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu balonde bibidilu bia bena Yuda?”" 
Galatians2:15 Tuetu mene mbatulele bena Yuda. Katuena benji ba malu mabi ba mu bisamba bikuabu. 
Galatians2:16 Kadi tudi bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ubingisha muntu, amu bua padiye witaba Yezu Kristu, ki mbua padiye ulonda mikenji ya Moshe nansha. Ke patuvua bitabe Yezu Kristu, tuetu kabidi bena Yuda, bua Mvidi Mukulu atubingishe bualu bua ditaba dietu mu Kristu, ki mbua patuvua bakumbaje mikenji. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu kakubingisha muntu nansha umue, bua padiye ukumbaja mikenji." 
Galatians2:17 Nanku patudi tuitaba Kristu, bua Mvidi Mukulu atubingishe petu, bidi bimueneka se: tuetu bena Yuda kabidi, tudi benji ba malu mabi, amu bu bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Nanku Kristu mmuanyishe malu mabi anyi? Nansha kakese!" 
Galatians2:18 Kadi meme mulongeshe tshiakabidi ne: nulonde mikenji, imvua mukandike ne: kanuyilondi, ndi ndienza mushipi wa mikenji." 
Galatians2:19 Kadi bua bidi bitangila mikenji, ndi mufile lufu lunkebela kudi mikenji mene, bua ngikale ne muoyi bualu bua Mvidi Mukulu. Ndi mulue pamue ne Kristu ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Galatians2:20 Nanku udi ne muoyi ki mmeme to. Kadi Kristu udi ne muoyi munda muanyi. Muoyi undi nawu mpindiewu panu, ndi nawu, bualu ndi ngitaba Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua munnange, mufue kabidi bualu buanyi." 
Galatians2:21 Tshiena mubenge bua Mvidi Mukulu annange nansha. Kadi pikala Mvidi Mukulu utubingisha, bualu tudi tukumbaja mikenji, nanku Kristu kavua ne bua kufua nansha." 
Galatians3:1 Nuenu bena Ngalate, nudi bantu batatakane! Uvua munulowe nnganyi? Tshivua munuleje patoke Yezu Kristu, uvuabu bapopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane anyi?" 
Galatians3:2 Ndi musue kunuela lukonku amu lumue: nuvua bapete Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua tshinyi? Bualu nuvua bakumbaje mikenji, anyi bualu nuvua bumvue Lumu lua Disanka, baluitabe?" 
Galatians3:3 mMunyi munudi kanuyi mua kumvua? Tshidi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu mutuadije munda muenu, nudi basue kudikumbajilatshi amu ku bukole buenu nkayenu!" 
Galatians3:4 Malu manene onsu anudi bamone adi amu a patupu anyi? Nansha kakese! Tshiena mua kuitaba ne: neikale amu a patupu! 
Galatians3:5 Padi Mvidi Mukulu unupesha Mueyelu wende, wenza malu a kukema munkatshi muenu, udi wenza nanku, bua panudi bumvue Lumu lua Disanka, baluitabe, ki mbua panudi bakumbaje mikenji." 
Galatians3:6 Vuluka Abrahame. Mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Uvua mutekemene Mvidi Mukulu. Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu mumubingishe bua ditaba diende.” 
Galatians3:7 Ke munudi numona ne: ndelanganyi menemene ya Abrahame mbantu badi bitaba. 
Galatians3:8 Mikanda ya tshijila ivua midianze kumanyisha muvua Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kuhingisha bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, anu bua ditaba diabu. Ke mutudi tubalamu Lumu lua Disanka elu luwabu bambile Abrahame ne: “Mvidi Mukulu neele bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba lupemba bualu buebe. ”" 
Galatians3:9 Nanku bonsu badi bitaba, nebabele lupemba, bu muvua Abrahame muitabe, bamuele lupemba." 
Galatians3:10 Kadi badi bela meji ne: Mvidi Mukulu neatubingishe, bualu tudi tukumbaja mikenji, mbena tshibawu. Bualu mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Udi kayi ukumbaja bimpe diba dionsu bionsu bidibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji, mmuena tshibawu.”" 
Galatians3:11 Mikanda ya tshijila idi ilongesha patoke mudi Mvidi Mukulu kayi mua kuhingisha muntu, bualu udi ukumbaja mikenji, bualu idi yamba ne: “Amu muntu udi Mvidi Mukulu ubingisha bua ditaba diende, neikale ne muoyi.”" 
Galatians3:12 Kadi mikenji kayena ifuma kudi ditaba. Apu Mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Muntu udi ukumbaja mikenji neikale ne muoyi kudiyi. ” 
Galatians3:13 Kristu uvua mudienze muena tshibawu pa muaba wetu, bua kutupikula ku tshibawu tshituha natshi bualu bua mikenji. Bualu Mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Muntu udibu balembeleja ku mutshi mmuena tshibawu. ”" 
Galatians3:14 Kristu uvua muenze nanku, bua Mvidi Mukulu amone mua kuela bantu ba bisamba bikuabu lupemba kudiye, muvuaye mulaye Abrahame; ne bua tupete, bualu bua ditaba dietu, Mueyelu uvua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye." 
Galatians3:15 Bana hetu, ndi nnutekela tshilejilu: padi muntu mufunde mukanda mumanyike, mumanyishe bantu diyi diende dia ndekelu, muntu mukuabu kena mua kushipa mukanda awu, nansha kusakidilaku bualu." 
Galatians3:16 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mene mmulaye Abrahame, mulaye kabidi muntu wa ku ndelanganyi yende. Mikanda ya tshijila kayena yamba ne: “mmulaye ndelanganyi yende,” bu idi itela bantu bavule. Idi yambane: “mmulaye muntu wa ku ndelanganyi yebe. ” Nanku idi itela amu muntu umue, ke Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Ndi musue kuamba ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmufue ndondu ne Abrahame, mumulaye ne: nendame ndondu wanyi ewu. Kupita bidimu nkama inayi ne makumi asatu, mikenji kushisha kufika ku bantu. Nanku mikenji eyi kayena mua kushipa ndondu ewu, nansha kunyanga dilaya dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Galatians3:18 Pikala Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kudisankisha, tupiane dipa diende, bualu tudi tulama mikenji, nanku disanka dietu edi kadiakufuma ku dilaya diende to. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmusankishe Abrahame, bualu bua dilaya divuaye mumulaye." 
Galatians3:19 Kadi mbele mikenji bua tshinyi? Bavua bayisakidile ku dilaya bua kuleja patoke malu adi Mvidi Mukulu kayi musue. Ivua ne bua kunenga too ne pafika muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Abrahame, uvuabu batela mu dilaya adi. Batumibue bavua bafikisha mikenji eyi kudi muntu, bua ayileje bantu bakuabu." 
Galatians3:20 Kadi katuena tukengela muntu pankatshi, padi, udi ukuata mudimu, muikale amu umue. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu udi ukuata mudimu nkayende." 
Galatians3:21 Nanku mikenji mmibengangane ne malayaa Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Nansha kakese! Bu bobu bele mikenji ivua mua kupetesha bantu muoyi, Mvidi Mukulu uvua mua kuhingisha bantu bualu bua mikenji." 
Galatians3:22 Kadi Mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Bantu bonsu mbapika ba bubi.” Nanku bidi Mvidi Mukulu ulaya, nebabipete amu kudi Kristu, padibu bamuitaba." 
Galatians3:23 Tshikondu tshia kuitaba katshiyi tshianji kufika, tuvua ku bupika bua mikenji, bindile bua njila wa ditaba adi amueneke." 
Galatians3:24 Nenku mikenji ivua ne bua kutuludika too ne pafika Kristu, bua Mvidi Mukulu amone mua kudibingisha, patudi tuitaba Kristu." 
Galatians3:25 Nanku tshikondu tshia kuitaba tshimane kufika, katutshiena bualu ne muludiki awu." 
Galatians3:26 Bualu nudi bana ba Mvidi Mukulu, panudi nuitaba, nudisanga ne Yezu Kristu." 
Galatians3:27 Nuenu bonsu mbanutue mu mayi, bua nuenze tshintu tshimue ne Kristu! Nsombelu mupiamupia unudi nende mu Kristu, udi bu tshilamba tshinudi bavuale." 
Galatians3:28 Nanku nansha wewe muena Yuda nansha muntu wa tshisamba tshikuabu, nansha wewe mupika nansha muntu udi udienzela malu mudiye musue, nansha wewe mulume nansha mukaji, ebi bionsu kabiena ne bualu. Nudi nuenza bonsu tshintu tshimue, panudi badisange ne Kristu." 
Galatians3:29 Nanku panudi bantu ba Kristu, nudi ndelanganyi ya Abrahame. Nenupete bivua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye." 
Galatians4:1 Ndi musue kunutekela tshilejilu: padi muntu udi ne bua kupiana mutshikale muana, udi amu bu mupika, nansha bintu bionsu bikale biende." 
Galatians4:2 Too ne ku diba diashindikabu kudi tatuende, udi amu ne bua kutumikila badi bamukolesha, ne badi bakuata mudimu ne bintu biende." 
Galatians4:3 Ke mutuvua bapika ba makole a mulu, bualu tutshivua bana." 
Galatians4:4 Kadi pakafika tshikondu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mujadike, kutumaye Muanende. Bavua bamulele kudi mukaji. Uvua ne bua kukumbaja kabidi mikenji ya bena Yuda." 
Galatians4:5 Ke muvuaye mupikule bavua mu bupika bua mikenji, bua tushale bana ba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Galatians4:6 Bua kuleja munudi bana bende menemene, Mvidi Mukulu kutuma Mueyelu wa Muanende mu mioyi yetu. Mueyelu awu udi wela diyi ne: “Abba! Tatu wanyi! ”" 
Galatians4:7 Nanku kutshiena mupika to. Ukadi muana. Bu muudi muanende, Mvidi Mukulu neakupeshe bilenga bidiye ulamina bana bende." 
Galatians4:8 Kale kanuvua bamanye Mvidi Mukulu nansha. Ke munuvua bapika ba bintu bivua kabiyi nansha mvidie mene. 
Galatians4:9 Kadi mpindiewu nudi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu. Tuambe ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmunumanye! Kadi mmunyi munudi basue kupingana ku bintu ebi bidi kabiyi ne bukole, kabiyi mushinga, kudienza bapika babi?" 
Galatians4:10 Nudi nupita kunemeka matuku makuabu, ngondu, mivu, ne bidimu." 
Galatians4:11 Ndi mpampakana bikole bualu buenu! Mudimu mukole undi munukuatshile, neupete tshipeta anyi?" 
Galatians4:12 Bana hetu, ndi nnulomba ne: numfuane, bu mumvua mukuate mudimu bua kunufuana! Kanuvua bangenzela meme bibi to." 
Galatians4:13 Nudi bavuluke mumvua mupete mushindu wa kunulongesha Lumu lua Disanka musangu wa kumpala, bualu mvua nsama." 
Galatians4:14 Disama dimvua nadi, divua dinuelesha meji bikole. Kadi kanuvua bampetule, nansha bambenge. Nuvua bangakidile anu bu mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, nansha bu Yezu Kristu mene." 
Galatians4:15 Nuvua basanke be! Kadi disanka adi diepi? Ndi nnujadikila ne: bu biobi mua kuenzeka, diba adi nuenu bonsu nuvua mua kuditonkona mesu, kuampesha." 
Galatians4:16 Lelu nkadi muena lukuna wenu, bualu ndi muambila malu amu mudiwu anyi?" 
Galatians4:17 Bantu aba badi banulabidila pambidi. Kadi meji abu kaena mimpe nansha. Badi basue bua numuke kundi, nubalonde amu bobu." 
Galatians4:18 Kuidikija bantu nkuimpe, kadi amu bantu badi benza bimpe. Nubidikije diba dionsu, ki ngamu pandi munkatshi muenu!" 
Galatians4:19 Bana banyi basuibue, bu mudi mukaji ukenga bua kulela muana, ke mundi nkenga tshiakabidi bualu buenu, bua Kristu amueneke patoke munda muenu." 
Galatians4:20 Kia! Bu meme mua kumonangana nenu diba edi! Mvua mua kunuambila miaku ivua mua kunutua ku muoyi. Bualu tshiena mumanye mundi mua kupita nenu! 
Galatians4:21 Nudi basue kudienza bapika ba mikenji. Kadi kanuena bumvue tshidi mikenji eyi mene yamba anyi? 
Galatians4:22 Mu mukanda wa mikenji tudi tubala ne: mbalelele Abrahame bana ba balume babidi, umue kudi Agare, mukaji mupika, mukuabu kudi Sara, mukaji uvuaye mudisunguile." 
Galatians4:23 Muana muabu bamulelele kudi Agare, mmulela bu bantu bonsu. Kadi muana muabu bamulelele kudi Sara, mmulela bualu bua dilaya divua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye." 
Galatians4:24 Munda mua bualu ebu mudi dilongesha dinene: bamamu babidi aba badi baleja ndondu ibidi: ndondu wa kumpala udi Agare uleja, ke wa pa mukuna wa Sinayi, wa bana bapika." 
Galatians4:25 Agare udi uleja mukuna wa Sinayi udi tshipeta tshia Arabiya, uleja kabidi lelu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, tshidi mu bupika pamue ne bonsu badi basombamu." 
Galatians4:26 Kadi Yerushalayime wa mu diulu kena mu bupika; yeye ke mamuetu! 
Galatians4:27 Bualu Mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Sankaku, wewe mukaji udi kuyi ne bana! Ela mbila ya disanka, wewe udi kuyi mumvue dikenga dia pa kulela! Bualu mukaji muabu babenge, neikale ne bana bavule, bapite ba mukaji udi bayende munange. ”" 
Galatians4:28 Bana hetu, bu mmuabu balele Izake bualu bua dilaya divua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye, ke mudibu banulele nuenu." 
Galatians4:29 Bu muvua muana muabu balele bu bantu bonsu, mukengeshe kale muabu balele ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ke mudibu banukengesha lelu." 
Galatians4:30 Kadi Mikanda ya tshijila idi yamba ne: “Ipata mukaji mupika ewu ne muanende, bualu muana wa mupika kena mua kupiana pamue ne muana wa mukaji, udi kayi ku bumfumu bua muntu. ”" 
Galatians4:31 Nanku, bana hetu, katuena bana ba mukaji mupika, tudi bana ba mukaji udi kayi ku bumfumu bua muntu." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu uvua mutupikule bua tuetu kudisunguila tshitudi basue. Nanku shindamenayi momu. Kanupinganyi mu bupika. 
Galatians5:2 Telejayi tshindi meme Polu nnuambila. Nuenu banyishe bua banuteke panshi, Kristu kena mua kunuambuluisha kabidi to." 
Galatians5:3 Ndi nnushindikila tshiakabidi ne: muntu yonsu udi wanyisha bua bamuteke panshi, udi ne bua kukumbaja mikenji yonsu nkong." 
Galatians5:4 Nuenu badi basue bua Mvidi Mukulu anubingishe bua panudi nulama mikenji, nudi babulukangane ne Kristu. Nudi babenge bua Mvidi Mukulu anunange." 
Galatians5:5 Kadi tuetu ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila, udi ukuata mudimu patudi tuitaba, tudi bindile, batekemene se: Mvidi Mukulu neatubingishe." 
Galatians5:6 Patudi badisange ne Kristu, nansha batuteke panshi, nansha kabayi batuteke, kabiena ne bualu. Tshikole tuitabe, tuleje ditaba dietu mu nsombelu wetu mujima pa kunangangana." 
Galatians5:7 Nuvua babange luendu bimpe. Udi munuimanyike, bua kanulondi kabidi njila wa bulelela, nnganyi?" 
Galatians5:8 Bivua bantu abu banuambile bua nuitabe, kabivua bifuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu udi unubikila nansha." 
Galatians5:9 Ke padibu bamba ne: “Buanga bua mampa bukese budi butuntumija tshitapitapi tshionsu. ” 
Galatians5:10 Kadi bu mutudi badisange nenu mu Kristu, ndi amu mumanye ne: nudi ne meji a momumue ne anyi. Kadi muntu udi unupambula, ne nganyi ne nganyi, Mvidi Mukulu neamunyoke." 
Galatians5:11 Bana hetu, meme mutshikale mulongeshe bushuwa ne: badi ne bua kunuteka panshi, batshidi bankengesha bua tshinyi? Diba adi Lumu lua Disanka lua Kristu, mupopela pa mutshi mutshiamakane, lundi ndongesha, kaluvua mua kutonda muntu to." 
Galatians5:12 Ndi njinga se: badi bakeba kunupambula bayile kule: badipakule! 
Galatians5:13 Bana hetu, Mvidi Mukulu mmunubikile, bua nudisunguile tshinudi basue kuenza. Tshiena musue kuamba ne: nudisunguile amu majinga mabi adi anusankisha mu buntu buenu. Kadi nunangangane, nuambuluishangane." 
Galatians5:14 Bualu paudi “unanga muntu nebe, bu muudi mudinange, ” udi ukumbaja mikenji yonsu." 
Galatians5:15 Kadi panudi nusumangana, nusunsulangana, bu nyama ya lonji, nudimuke, tshianana nenubutulangane." 
Galatians5:16 Ndi nnulomba ne: nuanyishe bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila unulombole. Kanulondi majinga mabi a buntu buenu. 
Galatians5:17 Majinga mabi adi abengangana ne bidi Mueyelu musue. Mueyelu udi ujinga bidi muoyi wetu mubi ubenga. Mueyelu ne majinga mabi bidi biluishangana. Ke munudi kanuyi mua kukumbaja bilenga binudi nujinga. 
Galatians5:18 Kadi padi Mueyelu unulombola, mikenji kayena kabidi ne bualu kunudi." 
Galatians5:19 Bantu bonsu mbamanye kudi majinga mabi atufikisha: ku buendenda, buenzavi, malu a bundu;" 
Galatians5:20 ku ditendelela dia mvidie, ne ku majimbu; ku lukinu, matandu, lubabu, tshiiji, difuilakana mianzu, diabulukangana, ditapulukangana;" 
Galatians5:21 ku lukuka, bunuavi, budiavi, ne ku malu mabi makuabu. Bu mumvua munubele kale, lelu kabidi ndi nnuambila ne: badi benza malu a nanku, kabakupeta muaba mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Galatians5:22 Kadi bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila upetesha ke dinanga, disanka, ditalala, lutulu, diyi dilenga, muoyi muimpe, diyi dimue," 
Galatians5:23 bupole, didikanda. Bushuwa, mikenji kayena ibengangana ne malu a nanku." 
Galatians5:24 Bantu ba Yezu Kristu mbashipe buntu buabu, babupopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane, pamue ne nkuka, ne majinga mabi abu." 
Galatians5:25 Bu muvua Mueyelu mutupeshe muoyi, utulombole kabidi mu nsombelu wetu." 
Galatians5:26 Kanuditambishi, katufikishanganyi munda, katutekedianganyi lubabu." 
Galatians6:1 Bana hetu, bu mudi Mueyelu unulombola, nuenu bajikile muntu wenza bualu bubi, numupingaje mu njila mululame ne miaku mimpe. Yonsu wa kunudi amanye ne: badi mua kunteta ne meme kabidi." 
Galatians6:2 Ambuluishanganayi bua kuambuishangana majitu. Ke munudi nutumikila mikenji ya Kristu nanku. 
Galatians6:3 Padi muntu uditemba ne: ndi kampanda, yeye kayi nanku, udi udishima nkayende." 
Galatians6:4 Muntu yonsu akonkonone nsombelu wende. Pikala nsombelu wende muimpe, asanke bua bivuaye muenze, kayi udifuanyikija ne bakuabu." 
Galatians6:5 Bualu muntu yonsu udi ne bua kudiambuila bujitu buende kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. 
Galatians6:6 Muntu udibu balongesha Lumu lua Disanka, udi ne bua kuabanyangana bintu biende ne udi umulongesha." 
Galatians6:7 Kanudidingi. Kabena baseka Mvidi Mukulu. Muntu neanowe bivuaye mukune. 
Galatians6:8 Padi muntu ukuna bidi bimusankisha amu yeye, neanowe lufu. Padiye ukuna bidi bisankisha Mueyelu wa Tshijila, neapete kudiwu muoyi wa tshiendelele." 
Galatians6:9 Tuenze amu malu mimpe, katuyi tupungila, katuyi tuteketa mu maboku. Nanku pakumbana tshikondu, netunowe." 
Galatians6:10 Patutshidi ne diba, tuenzelayi bantu bonsu bimpe, kadi nangananga bena ditaba netu." 
Galatians6:11 Mateta manene anudi numona aa, ndi nnufundilawu mpindiewu ku tshianza tshianyi." 
Galatians6:12 Badi basue bua banuteke panshi ku bukole mbantu kaayi? Ke badi bakeba amu bilenga bia panu, batshina bua kababakengeshi bualu bua mutshi mutshiamakane wa Kristu." 
Galatians6:13 Bantu aba badi batekangana panshi, kabena balonda mikenji mikuabu. Badi basue bua banuteke panshi, bua bamone mua kuditambisha ne: tuetu ke bavua babenzeje nanku." 
Galatians6:14 Kadi meme tshiena musue kuditambishila ku tshintu tshikuabu, anu ku mutshi mutshiamakane wa Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu. Bu mudibu bapopele Kristu pa mutshi mutshiamakane, bia panu bionsu mbifue bualu buanyi. Meme kabidi ndi mufue bua bia panu." 
Galatians6:15 Nansha bakuteke panshi, nansha kabayi bakuteke panshi, kabiena ne bualu. Tshikole Mvidi Mukulu anuenze bantu bapiabapia." 
Galatians6:16 Bonsu badi balonda njila ewu, ndi mbajingila ne: Mvidi Mukulu abapeteshe bupole, abafuile luse, bobu ne bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu bonsu." 
Galatians6:17 Matuku adi kumpala, muntu kantatshishi kabidi to. Bualu bibangu bindi nabi ebi bidi bijadika mundi mupika wa Yezu." 
Galatians6:18 Bana hetu, dinanga dia Yezu Kristu, Mfumu wetu, dishindame munda muenu. Amene." 
Ephesians1:1 Meme Polu, uvua Mvidi Mukulu mubikile, bua ngikale mupostolu, ndi mfundila bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu badi mu Efeze, bavua badisange ne Yezu Kristu mu ditaba, mukanda ewu." 
Ephesians1:2 Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu, Tatu wetu, ne bia kudi Yezu Kristu, Mfumu wetu, bishindame munda muenu." 
Ephesians1:3 Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu, Tatu wa Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, tumuele tuasakidila! Bualu mmutuele lupemba mu Yezu Kristu, mmutupeshe kudiye mapa onsu a mu diulu." 
Ephesians1:4 Mvidi Mukulu ukavua mutunange, kayi muanji kufuka buloba. Ukavua mutusungule bua tuikale bende mu Kristu, tuikale ba tshijila, katuyi ne kalema kumpala kuende. Bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu mutunange," 
Ephesians1:5 uvua mudianze kujadika nkayende bua kutuenza bana bende mu Yezu Kristu. Ke tshivuaye musue, kabidi ke bivua bimulengelela." 
Ephesians1:6 Nanku tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu bua ditunanga diende dia dikema, divuaye mutulejile bimpe bitambe mu Muanende munanga." 
Ephesians1:7 Mvidi Mukulu mmutupikule ku bubi, mmutujimijile mibi yetu yonsu ku mulambu wa lufu lua Yezu Kristu. Ke muvuaye mutuleje ditunanga diende dia dikema." 
Ephesians1:8 Uvua mutunange bikole. Ke muvuaye mutupeshe lungenyi ne meji, bua tujingulule bidiye wenza." 
Ephesians1:9 Bivuaye wipatshila bitshivua bisokome. Kadi mmutumanyishebi, mumane kujadika nkayende bua kubikumbaja mu Kristu." 
Ephesians1:10 Neabikumbaje ku nshikidilu wa bidimu. Neasangishe bionsu bidi mu diulu ne bidi pa buloba. Neabiteke ku bukalenga bua Mfumu umue epele, Kristu." 
Ephesians1:11 Munda mua Kristu, tudi bafike muaba wa lupandu. Mvidi Mukulu mmudianze kutusungula muvuaye musue. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi ukumbaja bionsu, amu muvuaye mubijadike, mujinge kabidi ne: bikale nanku." 
Ephesians1:12 Nanku tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu bua buneme buende, bualu tuetu ke bavua badianza kutekemena kudi Kristu!" 
Ephesians1:13 Nuenu kabidi diba dinuvua bumvue muaku mulelela, Lumu lua Disanka ludi lunupetesha lupandu, nuvua bitabe Kristu. Diba adi Mvidi Mukulu uvua munupe Mueyelu wende uvuaye mulaye, munutue tshitampi tshiende, bua kunuleja munudi bantu bende menemene." 
Ephesians1:14 Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi utujadikila ne: netupete bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mulaye bantu badi bende. Udi utushindikila kabidi ne: Mvidi Mukulu neatupikule, bua tuikale bende menemene. Nanku tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu bua buneme buende." 
Ephesians1:15 Bua bionsu ebi, nangananga kabidi bua pandi ngumvua batela munudi bitabe Mfumu Yezu, munudi banange kabidi bantu bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu," 
Ephesians1:16 ndi ngela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila diba dionsu bualu buenu. Ndi nnuvuluka misangu yonsu indi ntendelela. 
Ephesians1:17 Ndi ndomba kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, Tatu wa butumbi, bua anupe Mueyelu wende. Wowu neunuenze bantu ba meji, unumanyishe Mvidi Mukulu, bua numujingulule bimpe." 
Ephesians1:18 Ndi ndomba Mvidi Mukulu bua atokeshe lungenyi luenu, bua numanye tshinudi mua kutekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bu mudiye munubikidile. Nanku nenumanye biuma bilenga bidiye mulamine bantu bende." 
Ephesians1:19 Nenumanye kabidi bukole busunguluke budiye utuambuluisha nabu, tuetu badi bamuitaba. Bobu mene ke buvuaye muleje muende muonsu," 
Ephesians1:20 pavuaye mubishe Kristu ku lufu, mumuzangike mu nkuasa wa bumfumu mu diulu ku dia bukole diende." 
Ephesians1:21 Muamua Kristu udi ku mutu kua makole onsu adi kaayi amueneka, kabidi ku mutu kua mamfumu onsu mashilangane. Nansha lelu, nansha matuku adi kumpala, kakuena bumfumu nansha bumue budi kabuyi ku diyi diende." 
Ephesians1:22 Mvidi Mukulu mmuteke bionsu ku makasa a Kristu. mMumuteke kabidi Mfumu munene wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. 
Ephesians1:23 Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, ke mubidi wa Kristu. Kristu, udi munda mua bionsu, udi ukuata kabidi mudimu munda mua Tshisumbu atshi ne bukole buende buonsu." 
Ephesians2:1 Kale nuvua bafue bua bilema bienu, ne bua mibi yenu." 
Ephesians2:2 Nuvua benze malu mabi adibu benza pa buloba. Nuvua batumikile mfumu wa makole a mulu, mukishi mubi ewu utshidi ukuata mudimu munda mua bantu badi batombokela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ephesians2:3 Bonsu buetu tuvua benze anu bu bobu. Tuvua tulonda amu majinga etu mabi. Tuvua tukumbaja amu bivua mubidi wetu, ne meji etu, bijinga. Nanku tuvua amu ne bua kupeta dinyoka kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bu bantu bakuabu bonsu." 
Ephesians2:4 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi ne luse lunene, kabidi udi utunanga bikole." 
Ephesians2:5 Ke muvuaye mutubishe pamue ne Kristu, diba dituvua bafue bua malu etu mabi. mMutupandishe amu ku luse luende patupu." 
Ephesians2:6 mMutubishe ku lufu pamue ne Kristu, bua kutusombesha mu nkuasa wa bumfumu mu diulu pamue nende." 
Ephesians2:7 Bionsu abi nebimueneke patoke mu matuku adi kumpala. Diba adi dinanga diende dinene dipite nedidileje patoke, bualu bua bidiye mutuenzele munda mua Yezu Kristu." 
Ephesians2:8 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmutusungile amu ku luse luende patupu. Nuenu kanuvua ne tshia kuenza. Tshienu tshivua amu kuanyisha mu ditaba dipa edi dia lupandu dia kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
Ephesians2:9 Lupandu kaluena lufuma ku midimu yenu. Nanku muntu nansha umue kena mua kuditemba. 
Ephesians2:10 Bualu amu Mvidi Mukulu ke udi mutufumbe, mutufuke bua tuetu kudisanga ne Yezu Kristu, bua tukumbaje malu mimpe akavuaye mudianze kulongolola bua tuetu kuenza." 
Ephesians2:11 Kabavua banulele bena Yuda. Bena Yuda bavua banuamba ne: “ki mbabateke panshi.” Kadi bobu mene bavua babateka panshi amu mushindu udi bantu batekangana panshi. Nenku, vulukayi munuvua kale." 
Ephesians2:12 Mu tshikondu atshi kanuvua pabuipi ne Kristu. Nuvua benyi. Kanuvua ba mu tshisamba tshia Izrayele, tshivua Mvidi Mukulu musungule. Ndondu ivua Mvidi Mukulu mutue ne bantu bende, ne malaya avuaye mubalaye, kabivua binutangila. Nuvua basombe panu, kanuyi batekemene tshintu, kanuyi ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ephesians2:13 Kadi nuenu bavua kule, mpindiewu nudi badisange nende. Nanku nudi basemene pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu ku lufu lua Kristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Amu Kristu ke udi mututuadile bupole, bualu mmusangishe bena Yuda, ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, mu tshisamba tshimue. Pavuaye mufile mubidi wende, mmupule tshimana tshivua pankatshi pabu, tshibatapulule, tshibenze bena lukuna." 
Ephesians2:15 Uvua mushipe mikenji ya bena Yuda, meyi ne mikandu biayi. Ke muvuaye mufile bupole munkatshi mua bantu ba bisamba bibidi ebi, mubenze muntu umue epele mupiamupia munda muende." 
Ephesians2:16 Ku lufu luende lua ku mutshi mutshiamakane, Kristu mmujikije lukuna kashidi. Ku mutshi awu mmusuikakaje bisamba bibidi mu mubidi umue, mmubatuangaje kabidi ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ephesians2:17 Nanku Kristu mmufike bua kumanyisha bantu Lumu lua Disanka, ludi lufila bupole kudi bantu bonsu, kunudi nuenu bantu ba bisamba bikuabu batua kabayi pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu, ne kudi bena Yuda batua pamue nende." 
Ephesians2:18 Bualu bua Kristu, tuetu bonsu, bena Yuda ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bonsu basanga kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila, tudi mua kusemena pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ephesians2:19 Nanku nuenu bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, kanutshiena benyi, nansha bantu bafume kule. Nukadi bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu, bamane kubuela mu diku diende." 
Ephesians2:20 Nuenu kabidi nudi bidibu bibaka nabi nzubu. Tshitaku tshia nzubu awu, ke bapostolu ne bambi. Dibue dia mu ditumba ke Kristu mene." 
Ephesians2:21 Yeye ke udi utuangaja nzubu mujima, umubandisha, umuenza nzubu wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Ephesians2:22 Badisange nende, nudi penu bidibu bibaka nabi nzubu, bua, pamue ne bantu bakuabu bonsu, nuenze nzubu umue, muaba udi Mvidi Mukulu usomba mu Mueyelu wende." 
Ephesians3:1 Ke pandi meme Polu ntendelela Mvidi Mukulu bualu buenu. mBankuate mu lukanu, bualu ndi nkuatshila Yezu Kristu mudimu. Makenga onsu aa ndi ngumvua bualu buenu." 
Ephesians3:2 Bushuwa, nukadi bumvue bamba bua mudimu uvua Mvidi Mukulu mungimikile ku luse luende, bua meme kunuenzela." 
Ephesians3:3 Malu masokome andi munufundile mu tshikosu kulu eku, amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke uvua muammanyishe." 
Ephesians3:4 Nuenu baabale, nudi mua kujingulula mundi mupete lungenyi lua kumvua nalu bualu busokome budi butangila Kristu." 
Ephesians3:5 Bualu busokome ebu, Mvidi Mukulu kavua mubumanyishe bantu ba bikondu bia kale to. Kadi mpindiewu kudi Mueyelu wende mmubumanyishe patoke bapostolu ba tshijila, ne bambi bende." 
Ephesians3:6 Bualu busokome ebu budi nenku: ku bukole bua Lumu lua Disanka, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu nebapete pamue ne bena Yuda bilenga bidi Mvidi Mukulu mulamine bantu bende. Bonsu badi bidimba bia mubidi umue. Nebapete bonsu pamue bidi Mvidi Mukulu utulaya munda mua Yezu Kristu." 
Ephesians3:7 Ndi nkuata mudimu bua kutantshisha Lumu lua Disanka, anu ku luse lua Mvidi Mukulu patupu, ne ku bukole budiye mumpeshe." 
Ephesians3:8 Meme ndi mushadile ku bantu bonsu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua muntutshishe diakalenga edi: bua mmanyishe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu Lumu lua Disanka lua bubanji bupite butudi tupeta kudi Kristu. 
Ephesians3:9 Ndi mua kuambuluisha bantu bonsu, bua bajingulule mudi meji masokome a Mvidi Mukulu mua kukumbana. Kuonsu eku Mvidi Mukulu, Mufuki wa bionsu, uvua musokoke meji ende." 
Ephesians3:10 Kadi mpindiewu, Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba tshidi tshimanyisha mamfumu ne makole a mulu, meji a mishindu ne mishindu adi Mvidi Mukulu nawu." 
Ephesians3:11 Mvidi Mukulu uvua muenze nanku, bilondeshile meji ende a kashidi, avuaye mukumbajile kudi Yezu Kristu Mfumu wetu." 
Ephesians3:12 Pamue ne Kristu, utudi tuitaba, tudi mua kusemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kumutekemena muetu muonsu." 
Ephesians3:13 Ke pandi nnulomba bua kanuteketshi mu maboku, bua mabika ne mala andi mmona bualu buenu. Neanupeteshe diakalenga ne lumu." 
Ephesians3:14 Ke pandi ntuila Mvidi Mukulu Tatu binu. 
Ephesians3:15 Diku dionsu didi mu diulu ne didi pa buloba didi dipetela muoyi kudiye. 
Ephesians3:16 Ndi mmulomba se: anukankamike, bilondeshile buneme bua butumbi buende, anukoleshilemu munda muenu kudi Mueyelu wende." 
Ephesians3:17 Ndi mmulomba kabidi bua Kristu ikale mu mioyi yenu ku ditaba, bua nuase miji mu dinanga, nushindamemu." 
Ephesians3:18 Nanku nenumone mua kujingulula, pamue ne bantu bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu, bule ne butshiama, butumbuke ne bondoke bua dinanga dia Kristu." 
Ephesians3:19 Bushuwa, muntu nansha umue kena mua kujingulula dinanga didi Kristu utunanga nadi mu bujima buadi. Kadi ndi njinga bua numanye dinanga adi, bua bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu buwule tente munda muenu." 
Ephesians3:20 Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole bua kuenza bipite ne bitudi tulomba, nansha ne bitudi tuelela meji. Bualu, bukole budiye ukuata nabu mudimu munda muetu mbupite." 
Ephesians3:21 Atumbe mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, ne mu Yezu Kristu, mu bikondu bionsu, kashidi ne kashidi! Amene." 
Ephesians4:1 Nanku, meme udibu bakuate mu lukanu, bualu ndi nkuatshila Mfumu mudimu, ndi nnulomba se: nuenze malu mimpe adi bantu, badi Mvidi Mukulu ubikila bua bikale bende, ne bua kuenza." 
Ephesians4:2 Diba dionsu nudipuekeshe. Nuikale ne lutulu, kabidi ne diyi dimpe. Nulengululangane bilema, nunangangane." 
Ephesians4:3 Nuenze muenu muonsu bua kulama bobumue budi Mueyelu wa Tshijila ufila, pa kunusuikakaja pamue mu bupole." 
Ephesians4:4 Bualu mubidi udi umue, Mueyelu wa Tshijila amu umue. Ke mudi Mvidi Mukulu munubikidile kabidi ku ditekemena amu dimue." 
Ephesians4:5 Mfumu udi umue, ditaba didi dimue, kutua kua bantu mu mayi kudi kumue." 
Ephesians4:6 Mvidi Mukulu udi umue, udi Tatu wa bantu bonsu. Udi ku mutu kua bonsu, ukuata mudimu kudi bonsu, usomba munda mua bonsu." 
Ephesians4:7 Kadi yonsu wa kutudi mmupete dipa dia pa buadi, bilondeshile muvua Kristu mudifile." 
Ephesians4:8 Ke padi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba ne: “Diba divuaye mubande mulu, mmuye ne bena lukanu, mmuabanyine bantu mapa. ”" 
Ephesians4:9 Padibu bamba ne: “mmubande mulu,” mbuena kuamba ne: uvua muanji kupueka mu kandondu." 
Ephesians4:10 Uvua mupueke awu, ke Yeye menemene uvua mubande mulu, bua kuwujaye bionsu ne bukole buende." 
Ephesians4:11 Yeye ke uvua mupeshe bantu mapa a pa buawu: uvua mubikile bakuabu bua bikale bapostolu, banga bua bikale bambi, bamue bua bikale balongeshi ba Lumu lua Disanka, bakuabu bua bikale balami ba bena ditaba, nansha balongeshi babu." 
Ephesians4:12 Uvua muenze nanku bua kulongolola bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, bua bakuatshile Kristu mudimu, bua mubidi wa Kristu utante mu ditaba." 
Ephesians4:13 Ke mutudi mua kuenza bonsu tshintu tshimue mu ditaba dietu, patudi tumanya Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku netufike bonsu pamue ku mulongu wa Muntu mukole muakanangane: ke Kristu mu bujima buende." 
Ephesians4:14 Diba adi katuakuikala kabidi bana, badibu batekakaja kudi malongesha mashilangane, mushindu udi mavuala ne mpepele bitekakaja majuwa. Muntu utshidi muana mu ditaba, bena dishima badi bamupambula, banubueja mu ntupakanyi, ne malongesha abu a kudinga nawu bantu." 
Ephesians4:15 Kadi patudi bimane ne makasa abidi mu malu malelela, tunangangane kabidi, netutante bonsu, tuye kudi Kristu, mutu wetu." 
Ephesians4:16 Yeye nkayende ke udi utuangaja bikole bitupa bishilangane bia mubidi, ubisuikakaja ne manungu. Nanku padi tshitupa tshionsu tshia mubidi tshikuata mudimu amu pa wowu, mubidi mujima udi utanta, ukola mu dinanga." 
Ephesians4:17 Mu dina dia Mfumu, ndi nnuambila, nnujadikila se: kanuenji kabidi malu adi bantu badi kabayi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu benza, bualu badi balonda meji abu a patupu." 
Ephesians4:18 Badi ne lungenyi lukutakane. Bu mudibu bapange malu bikole, bapapisha muoyi wabu wa munda, kabakupeta muoyi udi Mvidi Mukulu ufila." 
Ephesians4:19 Bu mudibu kabayi bumvua bundu, badi badifila ku malu mabi a mishindu yonsu. Badi bakeba kunema nansha ku buenzavi buabu mene." 
Ephesians4:20 Kadi Kristu uvuabu banumanyishe, udi ubenga nsombelu wa nanku." 
Ephesians4:21 Bulelela, nuvua bumvue bamba, banulongesha malu ende. Nanku nudi ne bua kulonda njila mulelela wa Yezu." 
Ephesians4:22 Nudi ne bua kuvula muntu wenu wa kale awu, kulekela malu mabi anuvua benze. Muntu mukulukulu ewu udi ne majinga ende mabi, adi anufikisha ku kabutu." 
Ephesians4:23 Nuikale bantu bapiabapia. Nupete ne meji mapiamapia. 
Ephesians4:24 Vualayi muntu mupiamupia, udi Mvidi Mukulu mufuke mu tshimfuanyi tshiende. Nuenze malu makane a tshijila adi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Muaku mulelela neunuleje njila." 
Ephesians4:25 Nanku lekelayi dishima. Muntu yonsu ambile mukuende bualu amu mudibu. Bualu tuetu bonsu tudi bidimba bia mubidi umue. 
Ephesians4:26 Panudi ne tshiji, kanuenji bibi. Tshiji tshienu katshinengi too ne ku dilolu." 
Ephesians4:27 Tshianana, diabolu neapete mushindu wa kunupita bukole." 
Ephesians4:28 Nanku, muntu uvua wiba, alekele kuiba, akuate mudimu muimpe, bua kudidisha, ne bua amone mua kuambuluisha kabidi udi mu dikenga." 
Ephesians4:29 Kanuakudi muaku wa nsenda nansha umue. Kadi nuakule anu miaku milenga, idi ikolesha bantu ku muoyi, ilengelela badi banuteleja." 
Ephesians4:30 Kanubungamiji Mueyelu wa Tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mueyelu udi tshitampi tshia Mvidi Mukulu, tshidi tshileja munudi bantu bende. Mueyelu udi ujadika kabidi ne: dituku nedifike didi Mvidi Mukulu unupikula kashidi ku bubi buonsu." 
Ephesians4:31 Lekelayi kanyinganyinga konsu, bumfika munda, ne tshiji tshionsu. Kanuedianganyi mbila ya bipendu. Kanuikadi ne lukinu kudi muntu nansha umue." 
Ephesians4:32 Kadi nuikale ne muoyi muimpe, nuambuluishangane. Nufuilangane luse, bu mudi Mvidi Mukulu munufuile luse mu Kristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Nudi bana badi Mvidi Mukulu munange. Nanku nudibambe bua kuikala bu Yeye. 
Ephesians5:2 Nulonde njila wa dinanga. Vulukayi muvua Kristu mutunange, mudifile bualu buetu, bu mulambu wa dipembu dimpe, uvua usankisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ephesians5:3 Nuenu nudi bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku munkatshi muenu kabatedi, nansha amu kutela mene, buendenda, buenzavi, nansha lukuka lua biuma." 
Ephesians5:4 Buakulavi, miaku ya bupale, nansha bilele bibi, kabiumvuiki kunudi. Mukana muenu mupatuke amu miaku ya kuela nayi Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila." 
Ephesians5:5 Numanye bimpe ne: bena buendenda, bena buenzavi, nansha bena bukonkotu, kabena mua kubuela mu Bukalenga bua Kristu, ne bua Mvidi Mukulu. (Nansha muena bukonkotu udi amu muntu udi utendelela mvidie)." 
Ephesians5:6 Muntu kanudingi ne miaku ya bupote. Mvidi Mukulu neanyoke bantu badi benza malu mabi a nenku, babenga kumutumikila." 
Ephesians5:7 Kanubuelakanyi ne bantu ba nanku nansha. 
Ephesians5:8 Kale nuvua mu midima. Mpindiewu nudi mu butoke, bualu nudi badisange ne Mfumu. Enzayi malu adi bantu badi benda mu butoke ne bua kuenza." 
Ephesians5:9 Bualu amu ku butoke, ke kudi kupatuka bulenga, buakane, ne bulelela, bua mishindu yonsu." 
Ephesians5:10 Nuenze muenu muonsu bua kujingulula bidi bisankisha Mfumu. 
Ephesians5:11 Kanubuelakanyi ne bantu badi benza malu mabi a patupu a mu midima. Kadi nuabenge patoke. 
Ephesians5:12 (Bidi bienza bundu mene bua kuamba malu adi bantu abu benza mu musokoku.) 
Ephesians5:13 Diba dialejabu malu onsu aa patoke, adi amueneka amu mudiwu." 
Ephesians5:14 Bualu bidibu basokolola patoke, bidi bienza butoke. Ke mudibu bamba ne: “Wewe udi mulale, tabala, juka ku bafue. Kristu neakuludike mu butoke buende." 
Ephesians5:15 Kanuenji malu bu bantu batatakane. Nuikale bantu ba meji. 
Ephesians5:16 Enzayi bimpe mu malu onsu adi anuenzekela. Bualu matuku atudi mmabi. 
Ephesians5:17 Nanku kanuikadi bantu bapote. Kadi nukebe mua kujingulula tshidi Mfumu musue bua nuenze. 
Ephesians5:18 Kanukuatshiki maluvu. Bualu bunuavi budi bunufikisha anu ku buenzavi. Kadi ikalayi ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila munda muenu tente. 
Ephesians5:19 Nukoleshangane ku muoyi, nuimbilangane misambu, miyenga ne tusala, mudi Mueyelu unusaka bua kuimba. Imbayi, elayi Mfumu tuasakidila ne muoyi wenu mujima." 
Ephesians5:20 Mu dina dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, elayi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu tuasakidila diba dionsu, ne bua malu onsu." 
Ephesians5:21 Bu munudi nunemeka Mfumu, nutumikilangane." 
Ephesians5:22 Bakaji, nutumikile babayenu. Ke munudi nuleja munudi nutumikila Mfumu." 
Ephesians5:23 Bualu mulume udi mfumu wa mukajende, mudi Kristu Mfumu wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Kristu udi Musungidi wa Tshisumbu etshi, tshidi mubidi wende." 
Ephesians5:24 Nanku bakaji batumikile babayabu mu malu onsu, anu bu mudi Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba tshitumikila Kristu." 
Ephesians5:25 Balume, nangayi bakaji benu, muvua Kristu munange Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, mudifile bualu buatshi." 
Ephesians5:26 Uvua muenze nanku bua tshikale Tshisumbu tshia bantu menemene ba Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua mutshisukule, mutshitue mu mayi, muambe muaku." 
Ephesians5:27 Bualu uvua musue kudiangatshila Tshisumbu etshi ne bulenga buonsu. Kavua musue bua tshikale ne dinyanu, nansha ne kalema, nansha ne mutudi. Uvua mujinge bua tshikale tshia tshijila, tshiakane tshipuangane." 
Ephesians5:28 Nanku balume badi ne bua kunanga bakaji babu, bu mudibu bananga mubidi wabu. Muntu udi munange mukajende, mmudinange yeye mene." 
Ephesians5:29 Bualu muntu kena mua kukina mubidi wende. Kadi udi uudisha, uulama bimpe. Ke mudi Kristu wenzela Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba," 
Ephesians5:30 bualu tudi bidimba bia mubidi wende. 
Ephesians5:31 Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Ke mudi mulume ne bua kushiya tatuende ne mamuende, bua kulamata mukajende. Bubidi buabu nebenze tshintu tshimue. ”" 
Ephesians5:32 Miaku eyi idi itumanyisha bualu busokome bupite bunene. Ndi mumone ne: bualu ebu budi butangila Kristu ne Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. 
Ephesians5:33 Kadi budi bunutangila ne nuenu kabidi. Nanku mulume yonsu anange mukajende bu mudiye mudinange. Mukaji yonsu anemeke bayende. 
Ephesians6:1 Bana, nudi ne bua kutumikila baledi benu. Ke munudi nuleja munudi nutumikila Mfumu." 
Ephesians6:2 “Nemeka tatuebe ne mamuebe” ke mukenji wakumpala udibu bela, balaya bualu. Udi uukumbaja, badi bamulaya ne:" 
Ephesians6:3 “Neikale ne diakalenga. Neashale matuku a bungi pa buloba. ” 
Ephesians6:4 Baledi, kanufikishi bana benu munda. Kadi nubakoleshe, nubakele, nubabele mushindu udi Mfumu musue." 
Ephesians6:5 Bapika, tumikilayi bamfumu benu ba panu, batshinayi, banemekayi. Enzayi nanku ne muoyi umue, bu munudi mua kuenzela Kristu." 
Ephesians6:6 Kanubenzedi nanku, amu bua kubasankisha padibu banutangila. Kadi enzayi nanku bu bapika ba Kristu, badi bakeba kukumbaja ne muoyi wabu mujima bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Ephesians6:7 Mudimu wenu wa bupika, nuukuate ne muoyi mulenga, bu badi benzela Mfumu mene, kanuyi nuwenzela amu bantu nkayabu to." 
Ephesians6:8 Nuvuluke ne: muntu yonsu, nansha yeye mupika, nansha yeye muntu udi udienzela mudiye musue, nebamufute kudi Mfumu, bilondeshile malu mimpe avuaye muenze." 
Ephesians6:9 Kadi nuenu bamfumu ba bapika, nunemeke bapika benu amu mushindu wa momumue. Kanubakanyinyi nansha. Nuvuluke ne: nuenu ne bapika benu, nudi amu ne Mfumu umue mu diulu, udi kayi ne kansungasunga." 
Ephesians6:10 Nanku, kebayi bukole pa kudisanga ne Mfumu, bualu buende mbupite!" 
Ephesians6:11 Ambulayi bia mvita bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu unupa, bua numone mua kutuila diabolu, udi unuluisha ne budimu, nkanana." 
Ephesians6:12 Bualu katuena tuluangana mvita ne bantu, kadi amu ne makole mabi a mulu adi kaayi amueneka, kabidi ne mamfumu makuabu mashilangane, adi alama buloba mu midima." 
Ephesians6:13 Nanku ambulayi bia mvita bionsu bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Pafika dituku dibi, nenumone mua kutuila muluishi wenu nkanana. Nenushale bimane kulu, too ne munuamutshimuna." 
Ephesians6:14 Nanku, dilongololayi: suikayi bulelela bu mukaba mu tshimonu. Vualayi buakane bu kazaku ka mvita kela pambidi." 
Ephesians6:15 Bu muntu udi uvuala bisabata bua kuya ku luendu, ikalayi ne disuminyina bua kuya kulongesha Lumu lua Disanka, ludi lufila bupole." 
Ephesians6:16 Ikalayi ne ditaba, bu mudi muena mvita ne ngabu mu bianza, bua kuakidila mikete misuika kapia ya kudi diabolu, kuyela panshi." 
Ephesians6:17 Tshienu tshifulu tshinudi nuasa, ke dijadika dia ne: netupande. Muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, ke muele wa mvita udi Mueyelu wa Tshijila unuteka mu bianza." 
Ephesians6:18 Kanupu muoyi bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu. Nulombe bua anuambuluishe. Tendelelayi diba dionsu mudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila unusaka. Tabalayi, lombelayi bantu bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu, kanuyi nulekela." 
Ephesians6:19 Nundombele ne meme kabidi, bua Mvidi Mukulu ampeshe miaku mimpe mukana, misangu yonsu indi ne bua kuakula. Nanku nemmanyishe bualu busokome bua Lumu lua Disanka ne muoyi mushindame." 
Ephesians6:20 Nansha mundi mu lukanu amu mpindiewu, mbantume amu bua kumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka alu. Nanku lombayi bua ndongeshe Lumu elu ne muoyi umue, amu mudibu bamfundile bua kuenza." 
Ephesians6:21 Tishike muanetu munanga, udi ukuatshila netu Mfumu mudimu ne muoyi umue, neanuambile malu onsu adi antangila, bua numanye munkadi mpindiewu." 
Ephesians6:22 Ke pandi nnutuminaye lukasa, nangananga bua anumanyishe mutudi, kabidi bua anukoleshe ku muoyi." 
Ephesians6:23 Mvidi Mukulu Tatu ne Mfumu Yezu Kristu bapeshe bana hetu bonsu bupole, dinanga, ne ditaba." 
Ephesians6:24 Dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu dikale munda mua bonsu badi bananga Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, dibafikisha ku muoyi wa kashidi." 
Philippians1:1 Meme Polu ne Timote, badi bakuatshila Yezu Kristu mudimu, tudi tunufundila, nuenu bonsu badi bitaba Yezu Kristu mu Filipe, kabidi ne bamfumu ne babambuluishi babu ba mu Tshisumbu tshienu, mukanda ewu." 
Philippians1:2 Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu, ne bia kudi Yezu Kristu, Mfumu wetu, bishindame munda muenu." 
Philippians1:3 Ndi ngela Mvidi Mukulu wanyi tuasakidila misangu yonsu indi nnuvuluka. 
Philippians1:4 Diba dionsu dindi ntendelela Mvidi Mukulu bualu buenu, ndi ngumvua disanka." 
Philippians1:5 Bualu biangatshile ku dituku dia kumpala, too ne mpindiewu, nuvua bangambuluishe bikole bua kutangalaja Lumu lua Disanka." 
Philippians1:6 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutuadije mudimu muimpe awu munkatshi muenu, ndi mujadike ne: neatungunuke nawu too ne muajikawu, dituku diafika Yezu Kristu." 
Philippians1:7 Ndi ngenda nenu bonsu mu muoyi. Nanku bindi ngumvua bualu buenu bidi amu pa bualu. Nansha lelu mundi mu lukanu, nansha diba dimvua ndumbuluila Lumu lua Disanka, njadika bulelela bualu, nudi amu nudisanga nanyi mu dinanga divua Mvidi Mukulu mundeje." 
Philippians1:8 Mvidi Mukulu mmujadike bulelela bua bindi ngamba ebi se: ndi mununange bonsu ne dinanga dinene didi Yezu ununanga nadi. 
Philippians1:9 Ke pandi ntendelela Mvidi Mukulu, nnulombela bua nuye kumpala mu njila wa dinanga, nupete kabidi lungenyi, ne meji mimpe," 
Philippians1:10 bua numone mua kujingulula bidi biakane. Nanku dituku diafika Yezu Kristu, nenuikale kanuyi kalema, kabayi mua kunudiwula." 
Philippians1:11 Diba adi amu malu enu mimpe, avua Yezu Kristu muenze nenu, bua kutumbisha ne kunemeka Mvidi Mukulu, neikale biuma bienu." 
Philippians1:12 Bana hetu, ndi musue bua numanye ne: bivua bingenzekele bivua amu bitangalaja Lumu lua Disanka." 
Philippians1:13 Bualu bantu badi bakuata mudimu mu nzubu wa bukalenga, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu, badi bamanye ne: mbangele mu lukanu, bualu ndi nkuatshila Kristu mudimu." 
Philippians1:14 Pavuabu bammona mu lukanu, bana hetu ba bungi bavua amu batekemena kudi Mfumu, balongesha amu kulongesha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabayi batshina." 
Philippians1:15 Bushuwa bamue ba kudibu badi balongesha Kristu, bualu badi bantekela lubabu, bankebela bilumbu. Kadi bakuabu badi bamulongesha amu ne muoyi muimpe." 
Philippians1:16 Bobu abu badi benza nanku, bualu badi bannange, bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumpeshe mudimu wa kulumbuluila Lumu lua Disanka." 
Philippians1:17 Bakuabu badi balongesha ne muoyi wa kunduisha, kabidi wa kudinga bantu. Badi bakeba kumvudijila makenga pandi mu lukanu apa." 
Philippians1:18 Kadi ebi bionsu kabiena ne bualu nansha! Nansha bakuata mudimu ne meji mimpe, nansha ne meji mabi, badi balongesha amu kulongesha Kristu. Ke tshidi tshipite kunsankisha. Nengikale amu ne musangelu," 
Philippians1:19 bualu ndi mumanye ne: ku ditendelela dienu, ne ku diambuluisha dia Mueyelu wa Yezu Kristu, bionsu abi nebimpeteshe lupandu." 
Philippians1:20 Bualu ndi ngindila, ntekemena bikole ne: Mvidi Mukulu kakumfuisha bundu nansha. Matuku onsu, kadi nangananga lelu, nengikale amu ne muoyi mushindame. Nansha meme ne muoyi, nansha nkeba kufua, nentumbishe Kristu muanyi muonsu." 
Philippians1:21 Kadi muoyi mene ntshinyi? Buanyi meme, muoyi, ke Kristu! Nanku lufu nelumpeteshe muoyi mupite." 
Philippians1:22 Kadi pandi nshala ne muoyi panu, ntshidi amu nkuatshila kabidi Kristu mudimu. Nanku tshiena mumanye tshindi mua kusungula." 
Philippians1:23 Badi bankoka eku ne eku: luseke ndi musue kushiya panu, bua kuikala ne Kristu. Ke bivua mua kuikala bipite buimpe." 
Philippians1:24 Luseke lukuabu, ndi ne bua kushala panu bua kunuambuluisha." 
Philippians1:25 Ndi mujadike ne: nenshale nenu panu. Nanku nemmone mua kunuambuluisha, bua nuye kumpala bonsu, nusanke mu ditaba." 
Philippians1:26 Nenku diba dingapingana kunudi, nenuikale ne disanka dipite bualu buanyi, bua bionsu bidi Yezu Kristu munuenzele kundi." 
Philippians1:27 Kadi nuenze amu malu adi umvuangana ne Lumu lua Disanka lua Kristu. Nanku nansha meme mufike bua kunumona, nansha tshiyi mufike, nengumvue munudi bashale bashindame, badisange ne meji amue, nuluangana bonsu ne muoyi umue, bua ditaba didi Lumu lua Disanka lunupetesha." 
Philippians1:28 Kanutshinyi baluishi benu nansha kakese. Lejayi bukitu. Bualu ku bukitu buenu ke kualejila Mvidi Mukulu ne: baluishi benu badi babutuka, kadi nuenu nudi nuenda mu njila wa lupandu." 
Philippians1:29 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmunupe dipa dia nuenu kukuatshila Kristu mudimu. Kanuena amu ne bua kumuitaba nkayaku, kadi nudi ne bua kukenga kabidi bualu buende." 
Philippians1:30 Mpindiewu nudi badisange nanyi mu mvita eyi. Ke mvita inuvua bammone nduangana kale, ke indi nduangana kabidi ne lelu, bu munudi bamanye." 
Philippians2:1 Nukadi nuitaba Kristu, bakolelamu. Kristu udi ununanga, unukolesha ku muoyi. Nudi badisange ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila. Nudi nuenzelangana bimpe, nufuilangana luse." 
Philippians2:2 Nanku ndi nnulomba bua nukumbaje disanka dianyi: umvuanganayi, nanganganayi, nuikale ne muoyi umue, kabidi ne lungenyi lumue." 
Philippians2:3 Kanuenji bualu nansha bumue ne meji a lubabu, nansha a kuditemba patupu. Kadi nudipuekeshe kudi bakuabu. Muntu yonsu atangile bantu bakuabu bu badi bamupite." 
Philippians2:4 Muntu kakebi tshidi tshimusankisha amu yeye. Kadi elayi bonsu meji ku bidi bisankisha bakuabu. 
Philippians2:5 Ikalayi ne muoyi uvua nawu Kristu: 
Philippians2:6 Konsu eku uvua anu mulongu umue ne Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi kavua muuminyine ku bu-Mvidi Mukulu buende. 
Philippians2:7 Kadi uvua mudibengele bionsu bivuaye nabi, muitabe bua kuikala mupika. Kudienzaye mufuanangane ne bantu, umueneka bu muntu mene." 
Philippians2:8 Uvua musue kudipuekesha. Kutumikilaye too ne ku lufu, too ne ku lufu lua ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Philippians2:9 Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu mumuzangike, mumuinyike dina didi kumpala kua mena makuabu onsu." 
Philippians2:10 Nanku bonsu badi mu diulu, badi pa buloba, nansha badi munda mua buloba, batue binu, banemeke dina dia Yezu," 
Philippians2:11 batonde patoke ne: Yezu Kristu udi Mfumu! Ke mudibu batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu Tatu. 
Philippians2:12 Bana hetu bananga, pamvua munkatshi muenu, nuvua bantumikile misangu yonsu. Kadi nupite kuntumikila lelu, pandi tshiyipu! Nukuate mudimu, nutshine Mvidi Mukulu, numuzakele, bua nupande." 
Philippians2:13 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi ukuata mudimu diba dionsu munda muenu, bua nujinge tshidiye musue, nutshikumbaje kabidi." 
Philippians2:14 Enzayi bionsu, kanuyi nudiabakena, kanuyi nutontolola." 
Philippians2:15 Ke munudi mua kuikala bantu bimpe, ba munda mutoke. Nenusombe panu munkatshi mua bantu babi, bapambuke, bu bana ba Mvidi Mukulu, badibu kabayi mua kudiwula. Nudi ne bua kukenka munkatshi muabu bu mitotu ya mu diulu," 
Philippians2:16 diba dinudi nubalongesha muaku udi utupetesha muoyi. Nuenu benze nanku, nemmone mua kuditemba bualu buenu, dituku diafika Kristu. Bualu dituku adi nebimueneke ne: mudimu wanyi, ne lutatu luanyi, kabivua tshianana to." 
Philippians2:17 Ndi kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu bua kumulambula ditaba dienu. Pamue apa nebasakidile muoyi wanyi ku mulambu wenu. Nansha biobi bienzeka nanku, nensanke, nnubueje bonsu mu disanka adi." 
Philippians2:18 Nuenu kabidi nudi ne bua kusanka, kumbueja mu disanka dienu." 
Philippians2:19 Pasua Mfumu Yezu, ndi ntekemena kunutumina Timote lukasa, bua papinganaye, antuadile ngumu ya kuenu, ankoleshe ku muoyi." 
Philippians2:20 Yeye nkayende ke udi utata pamue nanyi, unutatshila ne nuenu kabidi." 
Philippians2:21 Bantu bakuabu bonsu badi batata anu bua bidi bibalengelela bobu nkayabu. Kabena bakeba bidi bilengelela Kristu. 
Philippians2:22 Nudi bamanye muvua Timote muleje patoke mudiye muntu wa muoyi umue. Bu mudi muana wambuluisha tatuende, ke mudiye ungambuluisha mu mudimu wa kutangalaja Lumu lua Disanka." 
Philippians2:23 Ndi mutekemene kunutuminaye, pangamona mudi tshilumbu tshianyi tshipita." 
Philippians2:24 Munda mua Mfumu ndi mujadike ne: meme mene nemfike lukasa bua kunumona. 
Philippians2:25 Ndi muele meji ne: mbimpe kunupingajila muanetu Epafrodite. Uvua mukuate nanyi mudimu, muendakane nanyi mu mvita. Yeye ke unuvua bantumine bua angambuluishe mu dikenga dianyi." 
Philippians2:26 mMunusamine bonsu muoyi, mulubakane kabidi, bualu nuvua bumvue ne: udi usama." 
Philippians2:27 Bushuwa uvua musame bikole, muambe kufua. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmumufuile luse. Ki mmumufuile amu yeye nkayende luse; mmutufuile ne meme kabidi, bua tshipetshi dibungama dinene dipite." 
Philippians2:28 Ke pandi musue kunutumina Epafrodite lukasa, bua nusanke panuamonangana nende, kabidi bua dibungama dianyi dijike." 
Philippians2:29 Nanku numuakidile ne disanka dia bungi, bualu mmuanenu mu ditaba. Nudi ne bua kunemeka bantu ba nanku." 
Philippians2:30 Bualu uvua wamba kufua bua mudimu wa Kristu. Uvua mudiele mu njiwu ya lufu, bua kungenzela mudimu unuvua nuenu kanuyi mua kunkuatshila." 
Philippians3:1 Nanku bana hetu, nusanke bua panudi badisange ne Mfumu. Kabiena bintonda bua kunufundila amu malu a momumue. Bualu malu awu adi anulengelela." 
Philippians3:2 Dimukilayi bantu badi benza bibi; dimukilayi mbua eyi. Dimukilayi badi basue kutekesha bantu panshi diteka dia dishima. 
Philippians3:3 Bualu badibu bateka panshi menemene mu bulelela ntuetu, ki mbobu nansha. Bualu tuetu tudi tutendelela Mvidi Mukulu ku bukole bua Mueyelu wende. Tudi tuditemba amu bua Yezu Kristu. Katuena tutekemena ku bidi bantu benza." 
Philippians3:4 Kadi meme kabidi mvua mua kuditemba ku bivua bantu bangenzela. Pikala muntu musue kuditemba ku bia nanku, ndi mua kuditemba mumupite yeye." 
Philippians3:5 Bualu bavua banteke panshi, pamvua mukumbaje lumingu lujima. Ndi muena Izrayele mufukila. Ndi wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Binyamine. Ndi muena Ebrewu menemene. Bua bidi bitangila dikumbaja dia mikenji, mvua Muparushe." 
Philippians3:6 Mvua ne disuminyina dipite, nkengesha Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Padibu batangila muntu udi ulama mikenji bu muntu muimpe, kakuvua muntu uvua mua kundiwula." 
Philippians3:7 Kadi bionsu abi bimvua mutangile bu bia mushinga, ndi mbitangila mpindiewu bu bia kuimansha bualu bua Kristu." 
Philippians3:8 Tshiena ngamba amu bua biobi abi to. Kadi nkadi ntangila bionsu bidi ne mushinga bu bintu bia kuimansha, bualu bua tshiuma tshipite buimpe etshi: kumanya Yezu Kristu, Mfumu wanyi. Bualu buende Yeye, ndi muimanshe bionsu bivua ne mushinga ku mesu anyi. Ndi mbitangila bu bintu bia kuela mu dyala, bua mmone mua kupeta Kristu," 
Philippians3:9 kudisanga nende tshishiki. Tshitshiena mudiele mulu ne: ndi muntu muimpe, bualu ndi ndama mikenji. Kadi ndi muimpe, bualu ndi ngitaba Yezu Kristu. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu ke udi utubingisha, patudi tuitaba." 
Philippians3:10 Tshindi njinga tshidi anu bua kumanya Kristu, kumvua bukole bua dibiika diende, kudisanga nende mu makenga, kudienza mufuanangane nende mu lufu," 
Philippians3:11 ntekemena ne: Mvidi Mukulu neambishe meme kabidi ku lufu. 
Philippians3:12 Tshiena mua kudiamba ne: nkadi mupete tshindi ngipatshila; nansha ne: nkadi muakane tshishiki. Kadi ndi ngipatshila anu kuipatshila, ndibamba bua mpete nsala wa kalumbandi, bu mudi Yezu Kristu mumane kumpeta." 
Philippians3:13 Bana hetu, tshiena musue kuamba ne: nkadi mupete nsala wa kalumbandi ewu to. Kadi ndi ngenza amu bualu bumue: malu onsu a kale, ndi ngapua muoyi, ngobokela bidi kumpala kuanyi." 
Philippians3:14 Nanku ntshidi mu njila, nyema lubilu, bua mpete nsala wa kalumbandi. Nsala awu ke muoyi mupiamupia udi Mvidi Mukulu mutubikidile, bua tuupetele mu diulu kudi Yezu Kristu." 
Philippians3:15 Tuetu bonsu bakadi bakulumpe mu bualu bua Mvidi Mukulu, ke meji atudi ne bua kuela. Kadi pikala bamue ba kunudi bela meji a mushindu mukuabu, Mvidi Mukulu neanujanduile bualu buonsu patoke." 
Philippians3:16 Nansha munyi ne munyi, tuye amu kumpala mu njila utukadi bamane kulonda too ne ku mpindiewu." 
Philippians3:17 Bana hetu, ndondayi bonsu mu makasa. Tuvua banuleje tshilejilu. Nanku tangilayi bikole badi bidikija tshilejilu etshi." 
Philippians3:18 Mvua mumane kunuambila misangu ne misangu, ndi nnuambuluila kabidi mpindiewu ne binsonji ku mesu ne: bantu ba bungi kabena balonda njila muimpe ewu to. Ke mudibu baluisha mutshi mutshiamakane wa Yezu Kristu." 
Philippians3:19 Kadi nebabutuke, bualu mvidie wabu ke difu diabu. Badi baditemba mu bivua mua kubafuisha bundu. Badi bela meji anu ku bia panu." 
Philippians3:20 Buetu tuetu, musoku wetu udi mu diulu. Tudi tuindila, tutekemena ne muoyi mujima, Musungidi wetu, Mfumu Yezu Kristu, udi ne bua kutuluka mu diulu." 
Philippians3:21 Yeye neakudimune mubidi wetu wa butekete, wa lufu, bua ufuanangane ne wende wa lumu, udiye nawu katshia wabiika ku lufu. Bualu udi ne bukenji bua kuteka bionsu ku bumfumu buende." 
Philippians4:1 Bana hetu basuibue, ke munudi mua kuikala bantu bashindame, badi badisanga ne Mfumu. Ndi njinga bikole kumonangana nenu. Nudi nunsankisha. Ndi nditemba kabidi bualu buenu." 
Philippians4:2 Wewe Evodiya, ne wewe Sintike, ndi nnulomba, nnusengelela bua numvuangane bu bana ba bakaji badi muntu umue mu ditaba." 
Philippians4:3 Wewe kabidi, Sizikuse, muena mudimu nanyi wa diyi dimue, ndi nkulomba ne: ubambuluishe. Bualu bobu bavua bangambuluisha bikole bua kutangalaja Lumu lua Disanka, pamue ne Kleman, kabidi ne bena mudimu nanyi bakuabu bonsu. Mena abu adi mu mukanda wa muoyi." 
Philippians4:4 Sankayi matuku onsu, bualu nudi badisange ne Mfumu. Ndi ngambulula ne: sankayi." 
Philippians4:5 Lejayi bantu bonsu muoyi wa kalolu. Mfumu ukadi pa kufika. 
Philippians4:6 Kanusampakenyi bualu nansha bumue. Kadi mu malu onsu nutendelele Mvidi Mukulu, nulombe bionsu binudi nabi dijinga. Nubilombe ne muoyi wa dianyisha." 
Philippians4:7 Bu munudi badisange ne Kristu, Mvidi Mukulu nealame mioyi yenu ne meji enu mu bupole buende, budi bupite bionsu bidi muntu mua kujingulula." 
Philippians4:8 Nanku bana hetu, nutambe kutabalela bionsu bidi bimpe, kabidi bidi bantu mua kupa lumu: ke bionsu bidi bia bulelela, bidi bantu mua kunemeka, bidi biakane, bidi kabiyi ne kalema, bidi bisankisha bantu, bidi bantu mua kutumbisha." 
Philippians4:9 Nukumbaje bimvua munulongeshe, binuvua bapete kundi, binuvua bumvue ngamba, binuvua bamone ngenza. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu, mutupi wa bupole, neikale nenu." 
Philippians4:10 Nuvua bapete mushindu tshiakabidi wa kundeja munudi bannange. Mvua mumvue disanka dia bungi, mmona bu dipa dia kudi Mfumu. Tshiena musue kuamba ne: nukadi balekele kusumpakana bualu buanyi. Kadi kanuvua bapete mushindu wa kuleja munudi bannange." 
Philippians4:11 Kabidi tshiena ngamba nanku, bualu ndi nkengela tshintu. Ndi mulonge mua kusanka ne bindi nabi." 
Philippians4:12 Nkadi muibidilangane ne bupele, nansha ne biuma. Ndi mulonge mua kumvua bimpe miaba yonsu, kabidi ne bionsu bidi bingenzekela. Nansha meme ne biakudia bikumbane, nansha ngu-mvua nzala, nansha meme ne bintu bivule, nansha tshiyi nabi bikumbane, ndi ngumvua amu bimpe." 
Philippians4:13 Bu mudi Kristu unkolesha, ndi mua kupitshila mu bionsu amu bimpe." 
Philippians4:14 Kadi panuvua bangambuluishe mu dikenga dianyi, nuvua benze kabidi amu bimpe." 
Philippians4:15 Nudi bamanye ne: musangu umvua mumuke ku Masedoniya, tshikondu tshimvua mutuadije kulongesha Lumu lua Disanka, ku Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba, anu nuenu nkayenu bena Filipe, ke bavua balambuluisha. Nuvua badisange nanyi mu bimvua mupete, ne mu bimvua mujimije." 
Philippians4:16 Nukavua bantumine misangu mikuabu bintu bimvua nabi dijinga, pamvua mu Tesalonike." 
Philippians4:17 Meme tshiena nkeba kupeta bintu. Kadi ndi njinga kusakidila ku binukadi nabi. 
Philippians4:18 Ndi nnujadikila ne: nkadi mupete bionsu binuvua bantumine. Bidi bikumbane bipite. Bu mudi Epafrodite muntuadile mpindiewu bimuma basue kumpesha, bionsu bindi nkengela, ndi nabi. Bintu bienu bidi bu mulambu wa dipembu dimpe, udi Mvidi Mukulu wanyisha, umusankisha." 
Philippians4:19 Bilondeshile biuma biende ne butumbi buende, Mvidi Mukulu neanupeshe kudi Yezu Kristu bionsu binudi nukengela." 
Philippians4:20 Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu atumbe kashidi tshiendelele. Amene. 
Philippians4:21 Bantu bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu badi bitaba Yezu Kristu, belayi muoyi. Bena ditaba batudi nabu, badi banutumina muoyi." 
Philippians4:22 Bantu bonsu ba mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba Mvidi Mukulu badi kunu, nangananga badi bakuata mudimu mu nzubu wa Kezare, badi banutumina muoyi." 
Philippians4:23 Dinanga dia Mfumu Yezu Kristu dishindame munda muenu bonsu. 
Colossians1:1 Meme Polu, uvua Mvidi Mukulu musue bua ngikale mupostolu, mutumibue wa Yezu Kristu, ne muanetu Timote," 
Colossians1:2 tudi tunufundila mukanda ewu, nuenu bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, badi basomba mu Kolose. Nudi badienze bana hetu mu ditaba, bualu nudi badisange ne Kristu. Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu bishindame munda muenu." 
Colossians1:3 Tudi tuela Mvidi Mukulu, Tatu wa Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, tuasakidila matuku onsu, patudi tutendelela bualu buenu." 
Colossians1:4 Bualu tudi bumvue lumu lua munudi nuitaba Yezu Kristu, nunanga bantu bonsu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Colossians1:5 Pavua Lumu lua Disanka, ludi lunuambila malu malelela, lufike kuenu musangu wa kumpala, batua banumanyishe ditekemena didilu lunupetesha. Nenku ditaba ne dinanga binudi nabi, bidi bishindamene pa binudi nutekemena, bidibu banulamine mu diulu." 
Colossians1:6 Lumu lua Disanka ludi lutangalaka, lutuadila bantu ba buloba bujima diakalenga. Diakalenga edi ke divua Lumu elu lunutuadile nuenu kabidi, bituadije ku dituku divuabu banumanyishe musangu wa kumpala dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu utunanga nadi. Nuenu kujadika bimpe mudi Lumu alu." 
Colossians1:7 Epafrase, udi wenzela Kristu mudimu pamue netu, ke uvua munulongeshe bualu abu. Mu mudimu udiye unukuatshila, udi ulamata Kristu ne muoyi umue." 
Colossians1:8 Yeye ke uvua mutumanyishe dinanga divua Mueyelu wa Tshijila mujuule munda muenu. 
Colossians1:9 Ke patudi tunulombela amu kunulombola kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bituadije ku dituku ditudi banumanye. Tudi tutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, tulomba bua nujingulule bimpe bidiye musue. Anupe meji ne lungenyi bia kudi Mueyelu wende." 
Colossians1:10 Nanku nenumone mua kusomba mudi Mfumu musue, kuenza kabidi diba dionsu bidi bimulengelela. Nenuenze midimu mimpe ya mishindu yonsu. Nenuye kumpala mu dimanya dienu dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Colossians1:11 Tudi tulomba kudi Mvidi Mukulu bua anukankamike ne bukole bua butumbi buende, bua numone mua kumvua malu onsu ne lutuulu." 
Colossians1:12 Elayi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu tuasakidila ne disanka. Bualu udi munuenze bantu badi mua kupeta bumpianyi budiye mutekele bantu bende mu Bukalenga buende bua butoke. 
Colossians1:13 Bualu mmutupikule ku bukole bua miidima, mutubueje mu bukalenga bua Muanende munanga." 
Colossians1:14 Muanende ke udi mutupikule, mutujimijile mibi." 
Colossians1:15 Kristu udi tshimfuanyi tshidi tshimueneka tshia Mvidi Mukulu udi kayi umueneka. Yeye udi Muanabute, udi mupite bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mufuke." 
Colossians1:16 Bualu kudiye Mvidi Mukulu mmufuke bionsu, bidi mu diulu ne bidi pa buloba, bidi bimueneka ne bidi kabiyi bimueneka, makole a mulu, makalenga, makokeshi, ne mamfumu. Mvidi Mukulu uvua mufuke bionsu kudiye, kabidi bualu buende Yeye." 
Colossians1:17 Kristu uvuaku, bintu kabiyi bianji kuikalaku. Bintu bionsu bidi bishala muaba wabi, amu munda muende." 
Colossians1:18 Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba tshidi mubidi, Yeye udi mutu watshi. Kudiye ke kudi muoyi mupiamupia wa mubidi awu utuadija. Bualu Yeye ke Muanabute, wa kumpala muabu babishe ku bafue, bua kuikalaye wa kumpala mu bionsu." 
Colossians1:19 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mua mujadike bua kuikalaye mujima munda mua Muanende. 
Colossians1:20 mMujadike kabidi bua bionsu bipingane kudiye, bitue nende ndondu munda mua Muanende awu. Ku lufu lua Muanende pa mutshi mutshiamakane, Mvidi Mukulu mmubueje bupole pankatshi pende ne bionsu. Ke muvuaye mupingaje bionsu kudiye, mutue nabi ndondu, nansha ne bidi pa buloba, nansha ne bidi mu diulu." 
Colossians1:21 Ku kale nuenu kabidi nuvua kule ne Mvidi Mukulu. Nuvua baluishi bende, bua malu mabi onsu anuvua nuela meji, ne anuvua nuenza." 
Colossians1:22 Kadi mpindiewu Mvidi Mukulu mmutue nenu ndondu, ku lufu luvua Muanende mufue bu bantu bonsu. Ke muvuaye munuenze kumpala kuende bantu ba tshijila, bakane, kabayi kalema." 
Colossians1:23 Kadi nudi ne bua kunanukila mu ditaba, bashindamemu, kanuyi nutenkakana. Kanujimiji ditekemena dinu-vua bapete, katshia banumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka. Ke Lumu lua Disanka luvuabu balongeshe bantu bonsu, kabidi lundi meme Polu ngenzela mudimu, muvua Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Colossians1:24 Mpindiewu ndi nsanka bua makenga adi mankuate bualu buenu. Bualu ku makenga anyi, ndi nkumbaja makenga adi Kristu kayi muanji kumvua bua mubidi wende, momumue ne bua Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
Colossians1:25 Ndi nkuatshila Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba mudimu, bilondeshile mudimu udi Mvidi Mukulu mungimikile bualu buenu. Uvua mumpeshe mudimu wa kumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka amu mudilu." 
Colossians1:26 Ke lumu luvuaye musokoke bantu bonsu mu bikondu bionsu, kadi ludiye musokoluele mpindiewu bantu bende." 
Colossians1:27 Mvidi Mukulu uvua musue kubamanyisha meji masokome mimpe, a mushinga mukole, adiye nawu bualu bua bantu bonsu. Adi nunku: Kristu udi munda muenu. Bualu buende nudi mua kutekemena ne: netudisange ne Mvidi Mukulu mu butumbi buende." 
Colossians1:28 Ke mutudi mmanyisha muntu yonsu Kristu. Tudi tudimuja bantu, tubalongesha ne meji onsu atudi nawu, bua muntu yonsu amueneke kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu mukole mushindame mu didisanga diende ne Kristu." 
Colossians1:29 Ke mudimu undi ntatshila, nduangana mvita ne bukole budi Kristu umpesha, bualu ke budi buenza mudimu munda muanyi." 
Colossians2:1 Ndi musue bua numanye mvita mikole indi nduangana bualu buenu, kabidi bua bena Lawodikiya, ne bua bantu bonsu badi kabayi banji kummanya." 
Colossians2:2 Ndi nduangana bua bikale ne muoyi wa bukitu, banangangane, benze tshintu tshimue, bamanye malu onsu mu bulelela, bashindame munda muawu. Ke mudibu mua kujingulula meji masokome a Mvidi Mukulu, momumue ne: Kristu nkayende." 
Colossians2:3 Yeye ke nsapi idi ikangula, yunzulula bibutshilu bisokome bionsu bia meji ne lungenyi bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Colossians2:4 Ndi nnuambila nanku, bua muntu nansha umue kanushimi ne miaku ya budimu." 
Colossians2:5 Nansha meme tshiyi nenu pabuipi, kadi mu lungenyi ndi nenu. Ndi nsanka bua kumona munudi benze tshintu tshimue, bitabe Kristu ne muoyi mushindame." 
Colossians2:6 Nenku panudi bamane kuitaba Yezu Kristu bu Mfumu, nudisange nende." 
Colossians2:7 Asayi miji munda muende, shindikayi mioyi yenu kudiye, shindamayi amu kushindama diba dionsu mu ditaba. Kanusesuki ku bivuabu banulongeshe. Nuele Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila muenu muonsu." 
Colossians2:8 Dimukayi bua muntu kanushimi ne malongesha a patupu a mu meji a bantu. Ke meji adi mafume ku malu adi bantu balongeshangana, ne kudi makole a mulu. Kadi kaena mafume kudi Kristu to." 
Colossians2:9 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi mujima munda mua Kristu mu bumuntu buende. 
Colossians2:10 Nuvua bapete bionsu menemene mu didisanga dienu nende. Kristu udi mfumu wa Diakalenga onsu, ne wa makole onsu a mulu." 
Colossians2:11 Panuvua badisange ne Kristu, Yeye uvua mumushe bukole bua bubi munda muenu. Ke muvuaye munuteke panshi; kadi ki mmushindu udi bantu batekangana panshi nansha." 
Colossians2:12 Bualu pavuabu banutue mu mayi, bavua banujike pamue ne Kristu. Kadi nuvua babiike kabidi pamue nende. Bualu panuvua bitabe, nuvua badifile kudi Mvidi Mukulu, muena bukole, uvua mubishe Kristu ku bafue." 
Colossians2:13 Ku kale nuvua bafue, bualu kabavua banuteke panshi, momumue ne: nuvua badine mu bubi. Kadi mpindiewu Mvidi Mukulu mmunubishe pamue ne Kristu. mMutujimijile mibi yetu yonsu." 
Colossians2:14 Uvua mushipe mukanda uvua uleja mutuvua bena tshibawu, utusonguela. Uvua mumbushe bukole buawu, bualu mmuupopele pa mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Colossians2:15 Ku mutshi mutshiamakane ke kuvua Kristu mudipikule ku makalenga, ne ku makole a mulu. mMuafuishe bundu ku mesu a bantu bonsu, bualu mmuye nawu bu bena lukanu, mu luendu lua ditshimuna diende." 
Colossians2:16 Kanuteleji badi banujana, bua binudi nudia nansha nunua, nansha bua bibilu, bua ngondu mupiamupia, nansha bua dituku dia Dikisha." 
Colossians2:17 Bionsu abi bidi amu mundidimbi wa malu atshidi kumpala. Kadi bualu bulelela budi amu Kristu. 
Colossians2:18 Kanuteleji muntu udi unudiwula, wamba ne: meme ndi ndipuekesha, ndi ntendelela batumibue; Mvidi Mukulu udi undeja malu. Muntu wa nanku udi uditambisha patupu, wela amu meji a bantu." 
Colossians2:19 Kena ulamata Kristu, udi mutu. Kristu nkayende udi udisha mubidi mujima, ulamakaja manungu ne mijilu biawu, udiundisha mubidi mudi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Colossians2:20 Nudi bafue pamue ne Kristu. mBanupikule ku makole a mulu. Nanku nudi basombe bu bantu ba pa buloba bua tshinyi? Bua tshinyi nudi banyishe bua banuelele mikenji ya mushindu ewu: 
Colossians2:21 “Kuangatshi etshi,” “Kulabudi tshiatshia,” “Kulengi eku to?”" 
Colossians2:22 Mikenji eyi idi bua bintu bidi bijimina, padi bantu bamane kukuata nabi mudimu. Amu bantu ke badi bayela, bayilongesha." 
Colossians2:23 Bushuwa mikenji eyi ya kutendelela batumibue, ya kudipuekesha, ya kukengehsa mubidi, idi imueneka bu ya meji. Kadi kayena ne mushinga nansha mukese, bualu idi isankisha amu bumuntu buetu." 
Colossians3:1 Bavua banubishe ku lufu pamue ne Kristu. Nanku kebayi bia mu diulu, mudi Kristu musombe ku diboku dia bukole dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Colossians3:2 Elayi meji ku bia kulu, kanuedi meji ku bia panu." 
Colossians3:3 Bualu nukadi bafue. Muoyi wenu udi musokome pamue ne Kristu munda mua Mvidi Mukulu. 
Colossians3:4 Muoyi wenu mulelela ke Kristu. Nanku diba diamuenekaye, nenumueneke kabidi pamue nende. Nenudisange nende mu butumbi buende." 
Colossians3:5 Nanku bengayi malu mabi onsu a pa buloba adi munda muenu: ke buendenda, malu a bundu, lukuka lua mubidi, majinga mabi, ne bukonkotu (bualu bukonkotu budi amu bu kutendelela mvidie)." 
Colossians3:6 Bilema bibi ebi ke bidi bijuula tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu, bua anyoke badi babenga kumutumikila." 
Colossians3:7 Ku kale nuvua benze malu mabi a nanku, bualu mioyi yenu ivua mijame mu bilema ebi." 
Colossians3:8 Kadi mpindiewu bengayi bionsu ebi: tshiji, difika munda, tshikisu. Kanupendi muntu, kanuakudi miaku mibi." 
Colossians3:9 Kanushiminyinyanganyi, bualu nuvua bavuule muntu mukulukulu ne bibidilu biende." 
Colossians3:10 Nuenu kulala muntu mupiamupia, udi udienzulula diba dionsu ku tshimfuanyi tshia Mvidi Mukulu, Mumufuki wende, bua amone mua kumumanya menemene." 
Colossians3:11 Nanku nansha wewe muena Yuda nansha muntu wa bisamba bikuabu, nansha bantu bakuteka panshi nansha kabayi bakuteka, nansha wewe muntu mushidimuke nansha mushadile ku bonsu, nansha wewe mupika, nansha muntu udi udienzela malu mudiye musue, ebi bionsu kabiena ne bualu. Mudi amu Kristu, udi munda mua bonsu, ukuata mudimu mu bionsu." 
Colossians3:12 Nudi bena Tshisumbu tshia bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Mvidi Mukulu mmununange; mmunusungule bua nuikale bende. Nanku nudi ne bua kuikala ne muoyi wa luse, wa dinanga, wa bupuekele, wa bupole, ne wa lutuulu." 
Colossians3:13 Nulengululangane bilema, nufuilangane luse. Misangu yonsu idi muntu tshilumbu ne mukuabu, nulekelangane bilema, muvua Kristu munulekelebi." 
Colossians3:14 Ikalayi nangananga ne dinanga. Ke mukaba udi unusuikakaja bonsu pamue. 
Colossians3:15 Bupole bunudi nupeta kudi Kristu, buludike meji enu, ne bionsu binudi nuenza. Ku bupole abu ke kudi Mvidi Mukulu munubikidile bonsu pamue, bua nuenze bidimba bia mubidi umue. Nuele Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila bua bualu ebu." 
Colossians3:16 Muaku wa Kristu wase miji munda muenu muawu muonsu mudiwu. Longeshanganayi, belanganayi, ne meji onsu anudi nawu. Ne muoyi wenu mujima, imbilayi Mvidi Mukulu misambu, mitendu ne tusala, mudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila unusaka, kabidi ne muoyi wa dianyisha." 
Colossians3:17 Bionsu binudi nuenza, nansha binudi nuamba, nubikumbaje mu dina dia Yezu Kristu. Nuele amu kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila kudiye." 
Colossians3:18 Nuenu bakaji, tumikilayi babayenu. Ke munudi ne bua kuenza kumpala kua Mfumu." 
Colossians3:19 Nuenu balume, nangayi bakaji benu. Kanubaleji mpala mubi." 
Colossians3:20 Nuenu bana, tumikilayi bionsu bidi baledi benu bamba, bualu ke tshidi Mfumu muanyishe." 
Colossians3:21 Nuenu baledi, kanukifishi bana badi kumbelu kuenu munda, tshianana nebatekete mu maboku." 
Colossians3:22 Nuenu bapika, tumikilayi bionsu bidi bamfumu benu ba panu bamba, ki ngamu bua kubasankisha padibu banumona. Kadi tumikilayi ne muoyi mulelela, bualu nudi nunemeka Mfumu." 
Colossians3:23 Nansha mudimu kaayi unudi nawu, nuwenze ne muoyi mujima, bualu nudi nuwenzela Mfumu, kanuena nuwenzela bantu to." 
Colossians3:24 Nuyuluke ne: Mfumu neanufute. Nenupete bidiye mulamine bena diende. Bualu Mfumu unudi nuenzela mudimu ke Kristu. 
Colossians3:25 Kadi muntu udi wenza malu mabi, neapete difutu dia malu mabi avuaye muenze, bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi ulumbuluisha bantu kayi ne kansungasunga." 
Colossians4:1 Nuenu bamfumu, enzelayi bapika benu bilenga bionsu binudi ne bua kubenzela. Nuvuluke ne: nuenu kabidi nudi ne Mfumu mu diulu." 
Colossians4:2 Tendelelayi Mvidi Mukulu ne munanunanu. Mutendelelayi, numuele tuasakidila, kanuyi nupungila." 
Colossians4:3 Nutulombele kabidi kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua atupeshe mushindu muimpe wa kulongesha muaku wende, wa kumanyisha bantu bualu busokome bua Kristu. Bualu mbangele mpindiewu mu nzubu wa lukanu, amu bua bualu busokome abu." 
Colossians4:4 Nanku lombayi bua mmone mua kulongesha bimpe bualu busokome abu, amu mushindu undi ne bua kuenza." 
Colossians4:5 Badi kabayi bena ditaba, sombayi nabu bimpe. Kanujimiji diba patupu." 
Colossians4:6 Miaku yenu ibasankishe, ibalengelele. Numanye mua kuandamuna muntu yonsu bimpe." 
Colossians4:7 Muanetu munanga Tishike neanuambile malu onsu adi antangila. Ke yeye utudi tuenzela nende Mfumu mudimu, kabidi udi uukuata bimpe." 
Colossians4:8 Nanku ndi mmutuma nangananga bua anuambile mutudi kunu, kabidi bua anukoleshe ku muoyi." 
Colossians4:9 Badi bamufila kudi Onezime muanetu munanga, wa muoyi umue. Yeye udi wa kuenu aku. Nebanumanyishe bionsu bidi bipitakana kunu." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarke, utudi nende mu lukanu, ne Marke, muanabu ne Barnabase, badi banuela muoyi. (Bakadi bamane kunuambila munudi ne bua kuakidila Marke bimpe, padiye ufika kuenu.)" 
Colossians4:10 Aristarke, utudi nende mu lukanu, ne Marke, muanabu ne Barnabase, badi banuela muoyi. (Bakadi bamane kunuambila munudi ne bua kuakidila Marke bimpe, padiye ufika kuenu.)" 
Colossians4:11 Yezu, udi dina dikuabu Yustuse, udi kabidi unuela muoyi. Ku bena Yuda amu bantu basatu aba, ke bavua bitabe Kristu. Tudi tukuata nabu mudimu wa kutantshisha Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua bakamba bikole be." 
Colossians4:12 Epafrase, udi kabidi wa kuenu aku, udi unuela muoyi. Muena mudimu wa Yezu Kristu ewu kena upungila bua kunulombela kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua nuikale bashindame mu ditaba, bantu bakole mu lungenyi, badi amu bakeba kukumbaja bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Colossians4:13 Ndi mujadike se: udi unutatshila bikole, utatshila kabidi bena mu Lawodikiya, ne bena mu Iyerapolise." 
Colossians4:14 Luke, munganga ne mulunda wetu, ne Demase kabidi, badi banuela muoyi." 
Colossians4:14 Luke, munganga ne mulunda wetu, ne Demase kabidi, badi banuela muoyi." 
Colossians4:15 Elayi bana hetu ba mu Lawodikiya muoyi, kabidi ne Nimfa, ne Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba badi basangile muende." 
Colossians4:16 Panuikala bamane kubala mukanda ewu, nukebe bua baubale kabidi kudi bena ditaba ba mu Lawodikiya. Nuenu kabidi nubale mukanda wanutumina bena ditaba ba mu Lawodikiya." 
Colossians4:17 Ambilayi Arshipe se: “Enza muebe muonsu bua kukumbaja bimpe mudimu uvuabu bakuimikila, uudi ne bua kuenzela Mfumu.”" 
Colossians4:18 Miaku indi nnuela nayi muoyi eyi, ndi nyifunda ku tshianza tshianyi. — Kanupu muoyi ne: ndi mu lukanu. Dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu dishindame munda muenu." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Tuetu bonsu, Polu, Silase, ne Timote, tudi tunufundila mukanda ewu, nuenu bena ditaba ba mu Tesalonike, bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu Tatu, ne ba Mfumu Yezu Kristu. Dinanga ne bupole bishindame munda muenu." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Matuku onsu tudi tuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila bualu buenu buonsu, tunuvuluka mu malomba etu, katuyi tupungila." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Bualu kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu ne Tatu wetu, tudi tuvuluka munudi nukumbaja malu adi ditaba dienu dinulomba, mudi dinanga dienu dinukuatshisha midimu mikole, kabidi munudi nutekemena kudi Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu ne muoyi umue." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Bana hetu, tudi bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmununange, munusungule bua nuikale bantu bende." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Bualu katuvua banulongeshe Lumu lua Disanka anu ku mishiku patupu, kadi ne bukole kabidi. Mueyelu wa Tshijila uvua utuambuluisha. Ke mutuvua bajadike bulelela bua Lumu lua Disanka elu ne bukitu. Nudi bamanye mutuvua basombe munkatshi muenu, anu bua kunuenzela bimpe." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nuvua bidikije tshituvua benze, ne tshivua Mfumu wenza. Nansha banukengeshe bikole, nuvua bitabe muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne disanka didi Mueyelu wa Tshijila ufila." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Nunku, nukadi tshilejilu tshia bena ditaba bonsu badi mu Masedoniya ne mu Akaya." 
1Thessalonians1:8 Bualu bituadije kuenu, muaku wa Mfumu kutangalaka mu Masedoniya, ne mu Akaya. Kadi nansha miaba mikuabu yonsu, bantu badi amu bamanye munudi nuitaba Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku katuena ne bua kuakula bualu ebu to." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Bonsu badi balonda munuvua batuakidile bimpe patuvua bafike kuenu, munuvua babenge mvidie, bapingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi ne mulelela, bua kumukuatshila mudimu." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Nudi bindile Muanende Yezu, uvuaye mubishe ku lufu, udi ne bua kutuluka mu diulu. Yeye mene ke udi utusungidila ku tshilumbuluilu tshia Mvidi Mukulu tshikadi pabuipi." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Bana hetu, nudi badimanyine ne: katuvua bafike kuenu aku, bakuate mudimu, katuyi bapete tshipeta nansha." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Nudi bamanye kabidi ne: katuyi banji kufika kuenu, bavua batupende, batukengeshe mene mu Filipe. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutupe bukitu bua kunumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka lua kudiye, nansha muvua bantu bavule batuluisha." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Katuvua banuitabijije bua kunubueja mu ntupakanyi. Katuvua bakebe bivua bitulengelela tuetu. Katuvua badinge muntu nansha umue. 
1Thessalonians2:4 Kadi tuvua bakule diba dionsu muvua Mvidi Mukulu musue. Bualu Yeye uvua muanyishe bituvua benze, mutufundile kabidi mudimu wa kumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka. Nanku katuena bakebe kusankisha bantu, kadi amu Mvidi Mukulu udi ujingulula meji adi munda muetu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Nudi bamanye bimpe ne: katshia katutu banji kuakula meyi a lubombu, nansha basokoke lukuka lua biuma mu meyi etu. Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kutujadikila nanku." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Katuvua bakebe bua nuenu, nansha bua bantu bakuabu batutumbishe." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Bu mutudi bapostolu ba Kristu, tuvua mua kunuleja bumfumu buetu. Kadi patuvua kuenu, tuvua banuleje muoyi wa kalolu, amu mudi mamu ukuba bana bende." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Bu mutuvua banunange bikole, katuvua amu ne dijinga dia kunumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka lua kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Tuvua basue kabidi kufila nansha muoyi wetu mene bualu buenu. Bualu nukavua bantu ba mushinga kutudi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Bana hetu, nudi bavuluke mutuvua bakuate mudimu, bapungile bikole. Patuvua banumanyishe Lumu lua Disanka lua kudi Mvidi Mukulu, tuvua bakuate mudimu munya ne butuku, bua muntu nansha umue wa kunudi kambudi bujitu buetu." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nuenu nudi mua kujadika bitudi tuamba. Mvidi Mukulu kabidi udi mua kubijadika: nsombelu wetu nenu, bena ditaba, uvua muakane, mululame, kayi kalema." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Nudi bamanye mutuvua benzele yonsu wa kunudi, amu mudi tatu wenzela bana bende." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Tuvua banukoleshe mu maboku, banubele. Tuvua banusengelele bikole, bua nuenze amu bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Yeye udi unubikila, bua nupete butumbi mu Bukalenga buende." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Tudi tuela amu kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila kabidi, bualu patuvua tunumanyisha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, nuvua bauteleje, bawitabe, kanuyi bautangile bu muaku wa muntu, kadi amu bu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bushuwa muaku awu uvua uleja muvuawu wa Mvidi Mukulu menemene, bualu uvua ukuata mudimu munda muenu nuenu badi bitaba." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Bana hetu, malu avua menzekele bena ditaba ba mu Yudeya, badi balamata Mvidi Mukulu, bitaba Yezu Kristu, ke avua manuenzekele. Bualu bana benu bavua banukengesha, amu muvua bena Yuda bakengeshe bana babu bena ditaba."
