1Thessalonians2:15 Bena Yuda bavua bashipe Mfumu Yezu, ne bambi kabidi. Ke muvuabu batukengeshe ne tuetu. Kabena basankisha Mvidi Mukulu. Badi bena lukuna ba bantu bakuabu bonsu." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Bualu badi benza muabu muonsu, bua katumanyishi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mudibu mua kupanda. Ke mudibu buwuje bungi bua malu mabi, avuabu benze mu bikondu bionsu. Kadi mpindiewu tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu tshikadi pambidi pabu." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Bana hetu, tuvua bashiyangane nenu bua tshitupa tshipi, kabidi amu bua mubidi. Bualu tudi amu tuenda nenu mu meji etu. Kadi bu mutuvua bajinge bikole kumonangana nenu, tuvua benze muetu muonsu bua kupeta mushindu wa kunukumbula tshiakabidi." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Nanku tuvua basue kupingana kuenu aku. Meme Polu misangu ne misangu mvua nkeba kufika kuenu. Kadi diabolu uvua mutupumbishe mua kufikaku. 
1Thessalonians2:19 Bualu amu nuenu, nudi ditekemena ne disanka dietu, ki mbantu bakuabu to! Nuenu ke badi baleja bantu mutudi batshimune. Amu bualu buenu, ke mutuaditambishila pafika Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Eyowa, nudi lumu luetu ne disanka dietu." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Kadi katuvua mua kushala bindile amu kuindila nansha. Ke patuvua bashindike mua kushala nkayetu mu Atene. 
1Thessalonians3:2 Tuvua banutumine Timote. Yeye ke muanetu utudi tukuatshila nende Mvidi Mukulu mudimu wa kumanyisha bantu Lumu lua Disanka lua Kristu. Tuvua banutumineye bua anukankamike, anukoleshe ku muoyi mu ditaba dienu." 
1Thessalonians3:3 Nanku muntu nansha umue wa kunudi katenkakanyi mu ditaba, padibu batukengeshe. Nudi bamanye ne: makenga a nanku adi amue a ku malu adi Mvidi Mukulu mutulongoluele." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Bualu patuvua nenu, tuvua badianjile kunumanyisha ne: nebatukengeshe. Ke bidi bienzeka ebi, munudi badimuene." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Nanku bu mumvua tshiyi mua kuindila kabidi, meme kutuma Timote, bua adijadikile munudi nutungunuka mu ditaba. Mvua ntshina ne: bumue diabolu udi mua kunuteta, kunyanga mudimu wonsu utuvua benze." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kadi mpindiewu Timote mmupingane kunu, utumina kuenu aku. Uvua mutumanyishe munudi nuenda mu njila wa ditaba, ne wa dinanga. Uvua mutuambile munudi batunange, batuvuluke. Nudi nujinga kutumona tshiakabidi, amu mutudi tujinga kumonangana nenu." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Nanku, bana hetu, mu ntatu yonsu, ne mu makenga, bitudi nabi lelu, malu atuvua bumvue bualu buenu adi atukolesha ku muoyi. Ditaba dienu didi ditukankamika." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Bualu mpindiewu tudi bafululuke, bualu nudi badisange ne Mfumu ne muoyi umue." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Disanka dionsu dinudi nutusankisha nadi kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu wetu, katuena ne miaku mikumbane ya kumuela nayi tuasakidila." 
1Thessalonians3:10 Munya ne butuku tudi tumulomba, tumusengelela, bua tumonangane nenu mpala ne mpala, tukumbaje malu a ditaba dienu atshidi mashale." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Mvidi Mukulu ne Tatu wetu, kabidi ne Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, batulongoluele njila, bua tufike kuenu bua kunumona." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Mfumu adiundishe dinangangana dienu, ne dinanga dinudi nunanga nadi bantu bakuabu bonsu, dikale difuanangane ne ditudi banunange nadi." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Mvidi Mukulu akoleshe mioyi yenu. Nanku nenuikale bantu ba tshijila, bakane tshishiki, kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu, diba diafika Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu ne bende bonsu." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Bana hetu, tuvua banulongeshe binudi ne bua kuenza, bua nusankishe Mvidi Mukulu. Bushuwa nukadi nuenza nanku. Kadi mpindiewu tudi Umulomba, tunusengelela mu dina dia Mfumu Yezu ne: nuenze nupitshishe." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Bualu nudi bamanye bituvua banulongeshe mu dina dia Mfumu Yezu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Mvidi Mukulu mmusue bua nulekele malu a bundu, nuikale bantu ba tshijila." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Tatu yonsu amanye mua kusomba ne mukaji mushindu udi usankisha Mvidi Mukulu, usankisha ne bantu." 
1Thessalonians4:5 Kanulondi lukuka lubi lua mubidi, mudi bantu badi kabayi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu benza." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Mu bualu ebu, muntu kadingi muntu nende, kamuenzedi bibi. Tukadi bamane kunuambilambila, banubele bikole ne: Mfumu neanyoke badi benza malu a nanku." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Mvidi Mukulu kena mutubikile bua tuikale bena tshiendenda, kadi amu bua tuikale bantu ba tshijila." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Muntu udi ubenga mikenji eyi, kena ubenga muntu, kadi udi ubenga Mvidi Mukulu, udi unupa Mueyelu wende wa Tshijila." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Kanuena nukengela bua tunufundile, nuenu bena ditaba, munudi ne bua kunangangana, bualu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende mmunulongeshe munudi mua kuenzelangana bimpe." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Ke munudi nunanga kabidi bena ditaba ba mu Masedoniya mujima. Kadi, bana hetu, tudi tunusengelela, bua nuenze nupitshishe." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Nudibambe bua numone mua kusomba ku matshi talalaa, kanuyi nubuelakana mu malu a bantu bakuabu. Nudipetele biakudia amu ku midimu inudi nukuata, bu mutuvua bamane kunuambila." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Nanku nebanunemeke kudi badi kabayi bena Kristu. Bujitu bua malu enu kabuakuikala pambidi pa muntu nansha umue to. 
1Thessalonians4:13 Bana hetu, tudi tujinga bua numanye mu bulelela malu adi atangila bantu bafue, bua kanubungami bu bantu bakuabu badi kabayi ne ditekemena." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Tudi bitabe ne: Yezu wakafua, wakabiika kabidi. Ke mutudi tuitaba kabidi ne: bantu bafue batekemene kudi Yezu, Mvidi Mukulu neababishe pamue nende." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Bualu bitudi tulongesha mpindiewu, ke bivua Mfumu mutuambile ne: tuetu batshidi ne muoyi diba diafika Mfumu, katuakudianjidila bantu bafue nansha." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Diba diatuma Mvidi Mukulu diyi, diela mutumibue wa mulongu mubandile lubila, muadi wa mpungi neumvuike. Mfumu neatuluke mu diulu. Nanku bantu bafue batekemene Kristu, nebadianjile kubiika ku bafue." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Pashishe tuetu batshidi ne muoyi diba adi, nebatuambule pamue nabu mu mavuba, bua tusambakene ne Mfumu mulu. Ke mutuikala ne Mfumu matuku onsu tshiendelele." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Nusambangane nanku ne miaku eyi. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Bana hetu, kanuena nukengela bua tunufundile bua meba nansha bua bikondu bienzeka malu aa." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Bualu nudi bamanye ne: dituku dia Mfumu nedifike, mudi muivi ufika butuku." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Diba diamba bantu ne: “Tudi talalaa. Bionsu bidi mu bupole, ” diakamue kabutu nekabakuate, mudi makenga akuata mukaji pa lulelu. Kabakupanduka to." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kadi nuenu, bana hetu, kanuena mu midima nansha. Nanku dituku adi kadiena mua kunujikila bu muivi to." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Nuenu bonsu nudi nuenda mu butoke ne mu munya. Katuena tuenda mu midima, nansha butuku." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Nenku katuena ne bua kulala tulu, mudi bantu bakuabu benza. Kadi tutabalayi, tudilame ku bunuavi." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Bualu bantu badi balala tulu butuku, bakuatshika maluvu butuku." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kadi tuetu badi benda mu munya, tudilame ku bunuavi ne ku budiavi. Tudi ne bua kuvuala ditaba ne dinanga, mudibu bavuala kazaku ka tshiamu mu mvita. Tuvuale kabidi ditekemena dia tuetu kupanda, mudibu basa tshifulu tshia tshiamu ku mutu." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu kavua mutusungule bua kuhkengesha ne tshiiji, kadi amu bua tupete lupandu kudi Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Kristu mmutufuile bua tuikale ne muoyi pamue nende, nansha tuetu ne muoyi, nansha tuetu bamane kufua diapinganaye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Nanku nukoleshangane ku muoyi, nuambuluishangane, anu munukadi nuenza amu." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Bana hetu, tudi Umulomba ne: nunemeke badi bakuata mudimu munkatshi muenu, bavua Mvidi Mukulu musungule bua kunulombola ne kunulongesha." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Nubanange, nubangate ne mushinga, bualu bua mudimu udibu bakuata munkatshi muenu. Nulame kabidi bupole munkatshi muenu." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Bana hetu, tudi tunusengelela ne: belayi bena lulengu. Kankamikayi bena buowa, ambuluishayi badi kabayi ne dikanda, ikalayi ne lutuulu kudi bantu bonsu." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Enzayi muenu muonsu, bua muntu kapingajidi mukuende bubi ku bubi. Kadi nukebe diba dionsu munudi mua kuenzelangana bimpe, kuenzela kabidi ne bantu bakuabu bonsu bimpe." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Sankayi diba dionsu. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Nutendelele, kanuyi nupungila." 
1Thessalonians5:18 Nuele Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila mu malu onsu adi enzeka. Ke tshidi Mvidi Mukulu unulomba nuenu badi badisanga ne Yezu Kristu. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Kanupumbishi Mueyelu wa Tshijila bua kuenzawu mudimu. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Kanupetudi malu adi bambi bamba. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Kadi kenketayi malu onsu, nulame adi mimpe." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Bengayi malu mabi a mishindu yonsu. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Mvidi Mukulu udi utupa bupole, anuambuluishe bua nuikale bantu bende menemene. Anulame ne mueyelu wenu, muoyi, ne mubidi, bua kanuikadi ne bubi, too ne dituku diafika Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Mvidi Mukulu uvua munubikile, neakumbaje bivua-ye mulaye, bualu udi muena diyi dimue." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bana hetu, nutulombele ne tuetu kabidi kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Elayi bana hetu bonsu muoyi, nupukilangane buena muntu." 
1Thessalonians5:27 Mu dina dia Mfumu, ndi nnusengelela ne: nubadile bena ditaba netu bonsu mukanda ewu." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Dinanga dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu dishindame munda muenu. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Tuetu bonsu, Polu, Silase, ne Timote, tudi mfundila Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Tesalonike mukanda ewu, badi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu, ne ba Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu ne bia kudi Mfumu Yezu Kristu bishindame munda muenu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Bana hetu, tudi tuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila bualu buenu, katuyi tupungila. Bidi bimpe bua tuetu kuenza nanku, bualu ditaba dienu didi diya amu kumpala, dinanga kabidi didi yonsu wa kunudi munange nadi bakuabu didi didiunda amu kudiunda." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Ke patudi tuditemba bualu buenu mu Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba ba Mvidi Mukulu. Bualu nansha mu makenga adibu banukengesha nawu, nansha mu ntatu inudi numona, nudi amu nunanukila bashindame mu ditaba." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Ebi bionsu bidi bileja mudi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu pa yoyi, bualu makenga onsu aa neanuakaje, bua numone mua kubuela mu Bukalenga buende budibu banukengesha." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu neenze amu bidi bimpe. Neakengeshe badi banukengesha. 
2Thessalonians1:7 Nuenu badi bakenga mpindiewu, Mvidi Mukulu neanupe bupole pamue netu. Ebi nebienzeke, patuluka Yezu mu diulu ne batumibue bende ba bukole, bantu bamumona." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Neatulukile bu kapia kela ndimi, bua kunyoka badi kabayi banemeka Mvidi Mukulu, kabayi bitaba Lumu lua Disanka lua Mfumu wetu Yezu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Nebapete dinyoka, babutuka kashidi. Kabakumonangana ne Mfumu; kabakumona bukole ne butumbi buende." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Ebi nebienzeke dituku didi Mfumu ufika, bua bantu bonsu badi bende, bamutumbishe, bua bonsu badi bamuitaba, bamusamune. Nuenu kabidi nenuikale munkatshi muabu, bualu nuvua bitabe bituvua banulongeshe." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ke patudi tunulombela, katuyi tupungila. Tudi tulomba Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bua anuenze bantu bakanyine muoyi udiye munubikidile. Tudi tulomba bua akumbaje ku bukole buende bilenga bionsu binudi nuipatshila, ne malu mimpe onsu adi ditaba dienu dinusaka bua kuenza." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Nanku nenutumbishe dina dia Mfumu wetu Yezu. Yeye kabidi neanutumbishe, ku bidiye wenza munda muenu. Ebi nebienzeke bualu bua Mvidi Mukulu wetu udi ununanga, ne Mfumu Yezu Kristu kabidi." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Bana hetu, nudi batekemene ne: Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu neafike; netudisange nende. Kadi tudi Umulomba ne;" 
2Thessalonians2:2 kanulubakanyi ne lungenyi, kanupampakanyi padi bantu bamba ne: dituku dia Mfumu ndimane kufika. Kanuitabi muntu udi muambila ne: ke bivua Mvidi Mukulu muleje Polu; ke bivua Polu mulongeshe; ke bivuaye mufunde mu mukanda." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Muntu nansha umue kanudingi. Bualu dituku adi kadiakufika, bantu kabayi banji kutombokela Mvidi Mukulu musangu wa ndekelu, Muena bubi, mufundila dibutuka, kayi muanji kumueneka." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Muena bubi awu neabenge bionsu bidi bantu bakukuila, ne mvidie yonsu idibu batendelela. Neaditeke ku mutu kua bionsu abi. Neabuele ne mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Neatekemu nkuasa wende, udiamba ne: ndi Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Kanuena bavuluke mumvua munuambile bionsu abi, pantshivua nenu anyi?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Kadi nudi bamanye tshidi tshikandika, bua bionsu ebi kabienzeki mpindiewu. Nanku Muena bubi udi mua kumueneka amu tshikondu tshidibu bamufundile." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Bubi budi amu bukuata mudimu mu musokoku. Kadi bidi ne bua kuenzeka, nebienzeke amu, padi utshidi ukuata Muena bubi umushila muaba." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Diba adi Muena bubi neamueneke. Kadi Mfumu Yezu neamushipe ku mueyelu wa mukana muende. Neamubutule amu ku bukenke bua difika diende. 
2Thessalonians2:9 Muena bubi neafike ne bukole bua diabolu. Neenze bishima bia mishindu yonsu, ne malu a kukema, bua kudinga nabi bantu." 
2Thessalonians2:10 Neakuate mudimu ne malu mabi a mishindu yonsu, bua kushima nawu bantu badi ne bua kujimina. Nebajimine, bualu kabavua bitabe, kabavua banange bulelela buvua mua kubasungidila." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu utshipaja mioyi yabu, bua bitabe malu a dishima." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Nenku bonsu bavua kabayi bitaba bulelela, bananga malu mabi, nebabanyoke." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Bana hetu, tudi ne bua kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, katuyi tupungila, bualu buenu nuenu, badi Mfumu munange. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmunusungule, bua nuikale ba kumpala, badi Mueyelu wa Tshijila usungidila. Bualu Mueyelu udi unuenza bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Nuenu kabidi nudi nuitaba bulelela." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Bualu bua Lumu lua Disanka lutuvua banumanyishe, Mvidi Mukulu mmunubikile, bua nupete penu butumbi bua Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Nanku, bana hetu, ikalayi bantu bashindame. Nuvuluke malongesha atuvua banuambile mukana, nansha atuvua banufundile mu mukanda." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu mmutunange, mmutupe kabidi ditekemena dishindame ku luse luende, bua tuindile ne muoyi mukole matuku adi kumpala. Tudi tumulomba, tulomba ne Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu," 
2Thessalonians2:17 bua buwuje mioyi yenu ne dikima, banupe bukole bua kuenza, ne bua kuakula bionsu bidi bimpe." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Bana hetu, tulombelayi kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua muaku wa Mfumu utante amu kutanta lubilu, bua bantu bawangate ne mushinga, bu munuvua nuenu benze." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Lombayi kabidi bua Mvidi Mukulu atusungidile ku bianza bia bantu babi, ne bia bena malu mabi. Bualu bantu kabena basue bonsu kuitaba." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kadi Mfumu udi muena diyi dimue. Neanupe bukole. Neanuepule kudi Muena bubi. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Mu dina dia Mfumu, tudi tutekemena kunudi, tujadika mene ne: nansha lelu, nansha matuku atshidi kumpala, nudi amu nukumbaja bituvua banuambile." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Mfumu unzulule mioyi yenu, bua nuakidile Mvidi Mukulu udi ununanga, nuakidile kabidi Yezu udi ufila lutulu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Bana hetu, tudi Umulomba mu dina dia Mfumu Yezu Kristu ne: umbukayi kudi bana hetu bonsu badi kabayi bakuata mudimu," 
2Thessalonians3:7 Nudi bamanye munudi mua kulonda tshilejilu tshietu. Bualu patuvua kuenu aku, katuvua bena lulengu to." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Muntu kavua mutupe biakudia tshianana. Kadi tuvua bakuate mudimu, bapungile bikole. Tuvua benze mudimu munya ne butuku, bua muntu nansha umue wa kunudi kambudi bujitu buetu." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Tuvua benze nanku, ki mbua se katuvua ne bukokeshi bua kupeta diambuluisha kunudi. Kadi tuvua basue kunuleja tshilejilu tshia nuenu kulonda." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Bualu patuvua kuenu aku, tuvua banuambile ne: “Udi kayi musue kukuata mudimu, alekele kudia! ”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Tudi Umuambila nanku, bualu tudi bumvue ne: bamue ba munkatshi muenu kabena bakuata mudimu. Badi basomba patupu, babuelakana amu mu malua bakuabu." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Bantu abu tudi tubalomba, tubambila mu dina dia Mfumu Yezu ne: nukuate mudimu matuku onsu, bua nudipetele tshiakudia tshienu." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Bana hetu, nuenu kabidi kanupungidi bua kuenza malu mimpe." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Padi muntu kayi muitabe mikenji itudi bafunde mu mukanda ewu, numumanye. Kanuendakanyi nende, bua bundu bumukuate." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Kadi kanumutangidi bu muena lukuna. Numubele amu bu muanenu. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Mfumu udi ufila bupole, anupe ditalala diba dionsu ne mishindu yonsu. Mfumu ikale nenu bonsu." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Miaku indi nnuela nayi muoyi, ndi nyifunda ku tshianza tshianyi. — Ke mundi ntua tshiala ku mikanda yanyi yonsu. Nutangile bimpe mundi mfunda." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Dinanga dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu dishindame munda muenu bonsu. 
1Timothy1:1 Meme ndi Polu, mupostolu wa Yezu Kristu ku diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu, Musungidi wetu, ne ku diyi dia Yezu Kristu utudi tutekemena." 
1Timothy1:2 Timote, muananyi menemene mu ditaba, ndi nkufundila mukanda ewu, nkujingila ne: dinanga, luse, ne bupole, bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu ne Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, bishindame mu muoyi webe." 
1Timothy1:3 Bu mumvua mukulombe, pamvua nya ku Masedoniya, shala mu Efeze. Bualu bantu badimu badi balongesha malu adi kaayi malelela. Ubakandike! Balekele kuenza nanku!" 
1Timothy1:4 Kabakebi kumanya mianu ne mena mulongulongu bia bankambua, bidi bijula amu milandu ya patupu. Bionsu abi kabiena bitungunuja mudimu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa kusungidila bantu. Muntu udi upeta lupandu amu ku ditaba." 
1Timothy1:5 Ndi nkutumina diyi edi bua usake bantu ku dinanga, didi bantu ba muoyi mutoke nadi, padibu banyisha bilenga bidi kondu ka munda kabambila. Bikale kabidi ne ditaba dishindame." 
1Timothy1:6 Bantu bakuabu badi bapambuke mu njila ewu, baditua ku mpata ya tshianana." 
1Timothy1:7 Badi basue kuikala balongeshi ba mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, kadi kabena bajingulula mene miaku idibu bamba, nansha malu adibu balongesha, bajadika bikole." 
1Timothy1:8 Tudi bamanye ne: mikenji idi mimpe, pikala muntu wenza nayi mudimu pa wowu." 
1Timothy1:9 Tuvuluke ne: kabavua belela bantu ba malu mimpe mikenji to, kadi anu benzavi, bantomboji, bena lonji, bantu babi, bantu badi kabayi batshina Mvidi Mukulu, nansha tshintu tshia tshijila. mBayelele kabidi bantu badi bashipa tatuabu nansha mamu, bashipianganyi bakuabu," 
1Timothy1:10 bena buendenda, bakulumpe badi banyanga bana, bantu badi basumbishangana bapika, bena dishima, bantu badi baditshipa mitshipu ya dishima, ne bonsu badi benza malu adi abengangana ne dilongesha dilelela." 
1Timothy1:11 Dilongesha edi didi difuma ku Lumu lua Disanka lundi ne bua kukobola. Lumu lua Disanka elu ludi lutumanyisha butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu, udi mpokolu wa diakalenga dietu." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndi ngela Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu tuasakidila, bualu uvua mumpeshe bukole bua meme kumukuatshila mudimu. Ndi muele tuasakidila, bualu uvua mungangate ne mushinga, muanyishe bua meme kumuenzela mudimu," 
1Timothy1:13 nansha mumvua mumujane kale, mumukengeshe, mumupende. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kumfuila luse, bualu tshivua ne ditaba, tshivua mumanye tshimvua ngenza." 
1Timothy1:14 Nanku Mfumu wetu kunnanga ne dinanga dipite bunene. Kumpeshaye ditaba ne dinanga, bitudi tupeta patudi tudisanga ne Yezu Kristu." 
1Timothy1:15 Bindi ndongesha ebi bidi bilelela. Bantu bonsu bitabe ne: Yezu mmufike pa buloba bua kusungidila bantu babi. Meme ndi mubapite bonsu ku bubi. 
1Timothy1:16 Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu mumfuile meme luse. Uvua musue bua Yezu adianjile kuleja lutulu luende luonsu kundi meme, muntu mubi mupite bakuabu. Ndi mushale mpindiewu tshilejilu tshidi mua kulongesha bantu bonsu matuku adi kumpala ne: nuenu bitabe Yezu Kristu, nenupete muoyi wa kashidi." 
1Timothy1:17 Lumu ne butumbi bikale kashidi tshiendelele kudi Mukalenga wa kashidi, udi kayi ufua, kayi umueneka, udi Mvidi Mukulu umue epele! Amene." 
1Timothy1:18 Timote wanyi, ndi nkupesha mudimu ewu, bilondeshile miaku ya bambi ivuabu bakule kale bualu buebe. Miaku eyi ikukoleshe mu maboku, bua uluangane mvita mimpe." 
1Timothy1:19 Nanku ulame ditaba, ukumbaje bidi kondu kebe ka munda kakuambila. Bamue bantu bavua babenga kuteleja bivua kondu kabu ka munda kabambila. Ke muvuabu bajimije ditaba diabu." 
1Timothy1:20 Munkatshi muabu mudi Imeneya ne Aleksandre, bamvua mufile kudi diabolu, bua balonge mudibu kabayi mua kusendeka Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Timothy2:1 Bualu bua kumpala bundi ndomba: bantu batendelele Mvidi Mukulu, bamulombe, bamusengelele, bamuele tuasakidila mu dina dia bantu bonsu." 
1Timothy2:2 Nudi ne bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu bua bakalenga ba matunga ne bua bamfumu bonsu, bua tumone mua kusomba talalaa mu bupole, kunemeka Mvidi Mukulu tshishiki, kuenza amu malu mimpe." 
1Timothy2:3 Bia nanku ke bidi bimpe, bisankisha Mvidi Mukulu, Musungidi wetu," 
1Timothy2:4 udi musue bua bantu bonsu bapande, bamanye bulelela." 
1Timothy2:5 Mvidi Mukulu udi umuepele. Mudi kabidi mutuangaji umuepele pankatshi pa Mvidi Mukulu ne bantu, ke muntu Yezu Kristu." 
1Timothy2:6 Yeye uvua mudifile bua kupikula bantu bonsu. Ke muvuaye muleje mu tshikondu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mujadike ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmusue kusungidila bantu bonsu. 
1Timothy2:7 Ke padibu bantume bu mupostolu ne mulongeshi, bua kufikisha bena bisamba bikuabu ku ditaba ne ku bulelela. Tshiena nshima to. Ndi ngamba malu mudiwu." 
1Timothy2:8 Ndi musue nanku bua bantu balume batendelele Mvidi Mukulu miaba yonsu, bele bianza mulu, batendelele ne muoyi mutoke, kabayi ne tshiji, nansha matandu munda." 
1Timothy2:9 Ndi musue kabidi bua bantu bakaji bavuale mvuadilu wa kanemu, badilengeje kabayi badileja. Baluke nsuki pa ndukilu mulenga. Kabavuadi bilengejilu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nansha bia mabue a busanga, nansha bilamba bia mushinga mukole." 
1Timothy2:10 Kadi badilengeje ne malu mimpe adibu benza. Ke bidi bakaji badi banemeka Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kuenza. 
1Timothy2:11 Diba dia dilongesha bakaji bapuwe ne butumike. 
1Timothy2:12 Tshiena nganyisha bua muntu mukaji alongeshe, nansha atumine mulume diyi. Kadi udi ne bua kupuwa." 
1Timothy2:13 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mufuke Adame kumpala, pashishe Eva." 
1Timothy2:14 Kabidi kabavua badinge Adame to, amu mukaji. Ke kutupaye ku diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Timothy2:15 Kadi nebasungidile mukaji bua buledi buende, padiye unanukila mu ditaba ne mu dinanga, wenza amu ne bupuekele malu a tshijila adi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
1Timothy3:1 Bindi ndongesha ebi bidi bilelela: padi muntu ujinga kupeta mudimu wa bulombodi mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, udi musue mudimu muimpe mutambe." 
1Timothy3:2 Kadi mulombodi wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba kikadi ne bualu budibu mua kumudiwula nabu. Ikale muena mukaji umue. Ikale muntu udi udilama, muena meji, muntu udi mumanye mua kusomba ne bantu, kuakidila benyi, kulongesha bimpe." 
1Timothy3:3 Kikadi munuavi, nansha musue mvita. Kadi ikale muena bupole, muntu wa disanka, kayi mutshima wa biuma." 
1Timothy3:4 Amanye mua kulombola nzubu wende bimpe. Bana bende bamutumikile ne kanemu. 
1Timothy3:5 Bualu padi muntu kayi mumanye mua kulombola nzubu wende, udi mua kuludika Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba munyi?" 
1Timothy3:6 Kena mua kuikala muntu mupiamupia mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, bualu udi mua kuditambisha. Diba adi nebamufundile tshibawu tshiakapeta diabolu." 
1Timothy3:7 Ikale kabidi ne lumu luimpe kudi bantu badi kabayi bena Kristu, bua kabamupepeji. Tshianana udi mua kupona mu mateyi a diabolu." 
1Timothy3:8 Bambuluishi ba balombodi kabidi badi ne bua kudinemeka. Bikale kabidi bena diyi dimue. Kabikadi banuavi, nansha bantu badi bakeba kupeta biuma mu njila mibi." 
1Timothy3:9 Balamate ku malu a ditaba avuabu babalongeshe. Benze malu mimpe adi kondu ka munda kabambila. 
1Timothy3:10 Banji kubateta bangabanga. Padibu kabayi mua kubadiwula, badi mua kukuata mudimu wa bambuluishi ba balombodi." 
1Timothy3:11 Bakaji babu kabidi badi ne bua kudinemeka. Kabikadi bena bijanu. Bamanye mua kudilama. Bikale bantu ba diyi dimue mu malu onsu. 
1Timothy3:12 Muambuluishi wa balombodi ikale muena mukaji umue Amanye mua kulombola bimpe bana bende, ne nzubu wende." 
1Timothy3:13 Padi bambuluishi aba benza mudimu wabu bimpe, bena Tshisumbu nebabangate ne mushinga. Nanku nebalongeshe ne muoyi mushindame malu a ditaba, didi ditusanga ne Yezu Kristu." 
1Timothy3:14 Ndi nkufundila mukanda ewu, kadi ndi ntekemena kufika bua kumonangana nebe matuku makese aa." 
1Timothy3:15 Kadi bu meme munengakane mutantshi, mukanda ewu neukumanyishe bidi bantu ne bua kuenza mu diku dia Mvidi Mukulu, mbuena kuamba ne: mu Tshisumbu tshia bantu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, udi dikunji ne nshindamenu wa bulelela." 
1Timothy3:16 Eyowa, muntu nansha umue kena mua kuela mpata ku bualu bunene busokome bua ditaba dietu! Uvua mudileje panu mu butekete bua muntu. Mueyelu wa Tshijila kumubingisha. Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu kumumona. Bantu kulongesha bualu buende mu bisamba bikuabu. Kumuitababu pa buloba. Kumuambulabu mu diulu." 
1Timothy4:1 Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi wamba patoke ne: matuku a ku nshikidilu bamue bantu nebalekele ditaba; nebitabe bena dishima; nebanyishe malongesha a mikishi mibi. 
1Timothy4:2 Nebabapambule kudi bena mpala ibidi, ne kudi bena dishima, badi ne kabu kondu ka munda kamane kufua, bu kosha ne tshiamu tshipatula mu kapia kakunze kunzuu." 
1Timothy4:3 Bantu abu badi balongesha ne: kusela nkubi; biakudia bikuabu kanuena mua kubidia. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmufuke biakudia abi, bua bena ditaba, badi bamanye bulelela, babidie, bamane kutendelela bua kumuela tusakidila." 
1Timothy4:4 Bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mufuke, bidi bimpe. Kakuena tshintu tshibi nansha tshimue. Nanku udi mua kudia bionsu, wela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila." 
1Timothy4:5 Bualu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu ne ditendelela bidi bienza biakudia bintu bidi bisankisha Mvidi Mukulu. 
1Timothy4:6 Paudi ulongesha bana hetu malu aa, newikale muena mudimu muimpe wa Yezu Kristu. Neuleje muudi ukeba tshiakudia tshiebe tshia muoyi, mu miaku ya ditaba, ne mu malongesha malelela avuabu bakulongeshe." 
1Timothy4:7 Kadi ubenge nsumuinu ya butshimbakane, idi ibengangana ne ditaba. Enza amu muebe muonsu bua ulamate Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Timothy4:8 Manaya a kuibidija mubidi adi mimpe, alengelela bantu, kadi amu kakese. Kadi kutumikila Mvidi Mukulu kudi kubambuluisha mu bionsu, bualu kudi kutulaya muoyi bua mpindiewu, ne bua matuku atshidi kumpala." 
1Timothy4:9 Bindi ndongesha ebi bidi bilelela. Bantu bonsu babitabe. 
1Timothy4:10 Ke patudi tukuata mudimu, tudibamba, bualu tudi batekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi, udi Musungidi wa bantu bonsu, nangananga wa bena ditaba." 
1Timothy4:11 Umanyishe, ulongeshe malu onsu aa." 
1Timothy4:12 Muntu kakupetudi bua paudi nsongalume. Uleje bena ditaba malu mimpe a dinanga, a ditaba, ne a bunonoke, mu bionsu biudi wamba, ne bionsu biudi wenza." 
1Timothy4:13 Unanukile kubala Mukanda wa tshijila kumpala kua bantu bonsu. Ubele bantu, ubalongeshe too ne ku difika dianyi." 
1Timothy4:14 Kulenguludi dipa dia kudi Mvidi Mukulu didi munda muebe, diuvua mupete pavua bambi bakule, bakulu bakutenteke bianza." 
1Timothy4:15 Ukumbaje mudimu ewu bimpe. Udifileku ne muoyi mujima, bua bantu bonsu bamone muudi uya kumpala." 
1Timothy4:16 Udilame biakane. Ulongolole bimpe dilongesha diebe. Unanukilemu. Wewe muenze nanku, neudisungidile, neusungidile kabidi bantu badi bakuteleja." 
1Timothy5:1 Kubedi mukulumpe ne lonji nansha. Kadi uyukile nende, mumutangile bu tatuebe. Uyukile ne bansonga, mubatangile bu bana benu." 
1Timothy5:2 Uyukile ne bakaji bakulumpe, mubatangile bu bamamuebe; ne bansongakaji, mubatangile bu bana benu ba bakaji, baudi ne bua kunemeka." 
1Timothy5:3 Ambuluisha bakaji bakamba, badi kabayi ne mubambuluishi, ubanemeke." 
1Timothy5:4 Kadi padi mukaji mukamba ne bana, nansha ne bikulu, bana aba badianjile kukumbaja tshidi bena ditaba ne bua kuenzela bena diku diabu. Nanku bakuatshile mamuabu, nansha kakuabu, mudimu, muvua bamamu babakuatshile kumpala. Ke tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
1Timothy5:5 Mukaji mukamba menemene, udi kayi ne muntu wa kumulama, ke udi mutekemene anu kudi Mvidi Mukulu, umutendelela munya ne butuku, umulomba diambuluisha." 
1Timothy5:6 Kadi mukaji mukamba utshidi ne milowu, nansha yeye ne muoyi, mmufue." 
1Timothy5:7 Ke tshiudi ne bua kubambila, bua kabamonyi mua kubadiwula." 
1Timothy5:8 Padi muntu kayi ulama bena diende, nangananga badiye nabu mu nzubu umue, mmuvile ditaba. Udi mupite ku bubi muntu udi kayi mumanye Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Timothy5:9 Bua kufunda muntu mukaji ku tshisumbu tshia bakamba, amu yeye ne bidimu bipite makumi asambombu, muye mu dibaka musangu amu umue." 
1Timothy5:10 Bantu bajadike muvuaye muenze malu mimpe, muvuaye mukoleshe bana bende biakane, muvuaye muakidile benyi kuende, muvuaye muoweshe bena ditaba makasa, muvuaye muambuluishe bakengi, mukuate midimu mimpe yonsu." 
1Timothy5:11 Kufundi bakaji bakamba batshidi batekete mu mukanda wa bakaji bakamba to. Bualu padibu bumvua milowu ya kuya ku dibaka tshiakabidi, nebumuke kudi Kristu." 
1Timothy5:12 Nebapie tshibawu, bualu mbupule ndondu wa kumpala muabu bafue ne Kristu." 
1Timothy5:13 Kabidi bakadi bapeta tshibidilu tshia kuendakana ku nzubu ku nzubu, kujimija diba. Tshidi tshipite bubi: badi badienza bena biakulakula ne bena biambamba. Badi bakula malu adi kaayi abatangila." 
1Timothy5:14 Ke pandi musue bua bansongakaji badi bafuishe balume, baye ku mabaka, balele bana, bakuate midimu ya mu nzubu, bua baluishi hetu kabamonyi pa kutujanyina." 
1Timothy5:15 Bualu bakaji bakamba bakuabu bakadi bamane kupambuka mu njila mululame, balonda diabolu." 
1Timothy5:16 Kadi mukaji muena ditaba muikale ne bana babu bakaji bakamba, abambuluishe, bua Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba katshiditatshishi nabu. Nanku netshimone mua kuambuluisha anu bakaji bakamba menemene, badi kabayi ne mubalami." 
1Timothy5:17 Bakulu badi balombola bimpe Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, mbakumbanyine mafutu misangu ibidi, nangananga badi batata bua kumanyisha bantu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, kubumvuijawu." 
1Timothy5:18 Mukanda wa tshijila udi ujadika ne: “Ngombe udi udiata ntete ya kuenza bukula bua kuyishipula, kabena mua kumuela nkata ku mbanga to.” Udi wamba kabidi ne: “Muena mudimu badi ne bua kumufuta. ”" 
1Timothy5:19 Kuena mua kuanyisha bua bafunde mukulu ku tshilumbu, amu padi bafundi babidi nansha basatu batshijadike." 
1Timothy5:20 Badi benza malu mabi, ubakanyine ku mesu a bantu, bua bakuabu kabidi batshine." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndi nkulomba, nkusengelela kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, kua Yezu Kristu, ne kua batumibue bende ba tshijila ne: ulame mikenji eyi, kuyi ne kansungasunga mu biudi wenza, kuyi wengeleka muntu, kuyi umukengesha patupu." 
1Timothy5:22 Kutenteki muntu bianza lukasalukasa bua kumupesha muanzu mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Kubuelakanyi mu mibi idi bantu bakuabu benza. Wewe kabidi kuenji bibi. 
1Timothy5:23 Kuena mua kunua anu mayi nkayawu. Kadi wanuaku maluvu makese bua kusulakaja tshibi tshiebe, bualu udi upita kusama." 
1Timothy5:24 Mibi ya bamue bantu idi imueneka patoke, kabayi banji kubalumbuluisha. Kadi mibi ya bakuabu idi imueneka anu ku shoo." 
1Timothy5:25 Midimi mimpe kabidi idi imueneka patoke. Nansha midimu mimpe itshidi misokome, neimueneke pashishe." 
1Timothy6:1 Bapika bonsu badi ne bua kunemeka bamfumu babu ne muoyi mujima, bua muntu nansha umue kajanyi dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, nansha di longesha dietu." 
1Timothy6:2 Bapika badi ne bamfumu bena ditaba, kabena ne bua kubapetula, bamba ne: bualu mbana hetu mu ditaba. Kadi badi ne bua kubakuatshila mudimu bimpe bipite, bualu bantu badibu benzela mudimu, mbena ditaba nabu badibu bananga. Ke tshiudi ne bua kumanyisha bantu, kubumvuija kabidi." 
1Timothy6:3 Padi muntu ulongesha malu adi kaayi umvuangana ne miaku milelela ya Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu, nansha ne ditaba dietu," 
1Timothy6:4 muntu awu mmuena ditambisha. Kena mumanye tshintu to. Udi ujinga kuelangana mpata ya bupale, ne kutandangana amu bua miaku. Ke kudi kufuma lubabu, matandu, bipendu, dielela muntu meji mabi," 
1Timothy6:5 dielangana mpata ne munanunanu ne bantu badi ne lungenyi lunyanguke, kabatshiyi bamanye bulelela. Bualu badi bela meji ne: kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu mmuaba wa kupeta biuma." 
1Timothy6:6 Bulelela, kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu nekunemeshe muntu, padiye usanka ne bidiye nabi." 
1Timothy6:7 Bualu katuvua balue panu ne kantu, katuakumukapu ne kantu." 
1Timothy6:8 Nanku tuetu ne biakudia, kabidi ne bilamba, mbikumbane." 
1Timothy6:9 Kadi bantu badi basue kunema amu kunema, nebabuele mu matetshibua. Nkuka yabu mibi mivule neyibakuatshishe mu buteyi, neyibabutule, neyibajimije kashidi." 
1Timothy6:10 Bualu lukuka lua biuma mmuji wa malu mabi a mishindu yonsu. Banga bantu badi ne lukuka alu, mbapambuke mu njila wa ditaba, mbadikebele makenga mavule." 
1Timothy6:11 Kadi wewe, muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, epuka ku bionsu abi. Enza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, umulamate, ulonde amu njila wa ditaba, wa dinanga, wa lutulu ne wa bupole." 
1Timothy6:12 Mu mvita ya kukolesha ditaba diebe, uluangane bimpe, bua upete muoyi wa kashidi. Mvidi mukulu mmukubikile ku muoyi ewu, pauvua mujukule ditaba diebe ne miaku milenga, bantu ba bungi bumvue, bajadike muuvua wamba." 
1Timothy6:13 Kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, udi upa bintu bionsu muoyi, kumpala kua Yezu Kristu, uvua mujukule ditaba diende ne miaku milenga kumpala kua Ponsiyo-Pilate, ndi nkulomba ne:" 
1Timothy6:14 ukumbaje bimpe, kabidi ne munanunanu, bimvua mukuambile, too ne ku dituku diamueneka Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
1Timothy6:15 Yezu neamueneke tshikondu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mujadike. Yeye Mvidi Mukulu umuepele, ke Muena bionsu, mpokolu wa diakalenga, Mukalenga udi upita bakalenga bonsu, Mfumu udi upita bamfumu bonsu." 
1Timothy6:16 Yeye nkayende kena ufua. Udi musombe mu butoke budi muntu kayi mua kusemena pabuipi. Muntu nansha umue ki mmuanji kumumona, kena kabidi mua kumumona. Lumu ne bukole bidi kudiye kashidi. Amene." 
1Timothy6:17 Ambila bena biuma bia panu, bua kabaditambishi, kabatekemenyi biuma ebi bia lupitapita. Kadi batekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu udi utupetesha bionsu bitudi tukengela bua tuetu kusanka nabi." 
1Timothy6:18 Ubambile bua benze malu amu mimpe. Buabu buneme buikale mu midimu ya luse. Bikale bantu ba kalolu, badi bamanye mua kuabanyangana ne bakuabu bidibu nabi." 
1Timothy6:19 Ke mudibu bakungija biuma bidi bishala mu tshibutshilu tshimpe ne tshikole bua matuku adi kumpala. Diba adi nebapete muoyi udi mulelela. 
1Timothy6:20 Timote wanyi, lama biakane tshivuabu bakupeshe. Epela biakulakula bia bantu badi baluisha ditaba, badiamba ne: tudi ne dimanya, padibu kabayi bamanye." 
1Timothy6:21 Bantu bakuabu bavua badiamba ne: tudi ne dimanya adi, mbapambuke mu njila wa ditaba. Dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu dishindame munda muenu." 
2Timothy1:1 Meme Polu, mupostolu wa Yezu Kristu ku disua dia Mvidi Mukulu, mbampeshe mudimu wa kumanyisha bantu muoyi, udi Mvidi Mukulu mulaye badi badisanga ne Yezu Kristu." 
2Timothy1:2 Timote, muananyi munanga, ndi nkutumina mukanda ewu, nkujingila ne: dinanga, luse, ne bupole, bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu ne Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu bishindame munda muebe." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndi ngela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Ke Yeye undi nkuatshila mudimu ne muoyi mujima, muvua bankambua banyi benze. Ndi mmuela tuasakidila, pandi nkuvuluka munya ne butuku mu ditendelela dianyi, tshiyi mpungila." 
2Timothy1:4 Ndi mvuluka binsonji biebe. Meme kabidi ndi njinga bikole kukumona, bua meme kusanka disanka dinene." 
2Timothy1:5 Ndi mvuluka ditaba diebe, didi kadiyi ne lubombu. Kakuebe wa bakaji Loyize, ne mamuebe Enike, bakavua nadi kumpala kuebe. Ndi mushindike ne: wewe kabidi udi nadi." 
2Timothy1:6 Ke pandi nkuvuluija ne: usonsole dipa divua Mvidi Mukulu mukupeshe, pamvua mukutenteke bianza." 
2Timothy1:7 Bualu Mueyelu, utudi bapete kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kawena utuenza bantu badi ne buowa nansha. Kadi Mueyelu wende udi utupa bukole, dinanga, ne meji." 
2Timothy1:8 Nanku kuikadi ne bundu bua kujadikila bantu malu a Mfumu wetu, nansha bua kuntela meme, udi mu lukanu bualu buende. Kadi anyisha, ukenge nanyi bua Lumu lua Disanka, bilondeshile bukole budi Mvidi Mukulu nkupesha." 
2Timothy1:9 Yeye ke udi mutusungidile, mutubikile bua tuikale bantu bende, kabiyi bua midimu mimpe ituvua benze, kadi amu mukavuaye mumane kubilongolola ku luse luende. Uvua mutupe dipa edi mu Yezu Kristu, kabayi banji kufuka bintu." 
2Timothy1:10 Kadi mpindiewu mmutuleje dinanga diende patoke, padi Musungidi wetu Yezu Kristu mumueneke. Bualu Yezu Kristu mmushipe bukole bua lufu, mutumanyishe Lumu lua Disanka lua muoyi wa kashidi." 
2Timothy1:11 Mvidi Mukulu mmumpeshe mudimu wa bupostolu, bua kumanyisha ne kulongesha bantu Lumu lua Disanka elu." 
2Timothy1:12 Ke pandi ne bua kukenga nanku. Kadi tshiena nteketa mu maboku, bualu ndi mumanye undi mutekemene. Ndi mushindike ne: udi ne bukole bua kulama bimpe bivuaye mumpeshe, too ne ku dituku dia Tshilumbuluilu." 
2Timothy1:13 Miaku milelela imvua mukuambile ikuleje muudi ne bua kuakula. Unanukile bimpe mu ditaba ne mu dinanga, bitudi nabi patudi tudisanga ne Yezu Kristu." 
2Timothy1:14 Kumbajabimpe bivuabu bakulongeshe. Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi munda muetu, neukupe bukole bua kuenza nanku." 
2Timothy1:15 Bu muudi mumanye, bantu bonsu ba mu buloba bua Aziya mbandekele, Fijele ne Ermojene kabidi." 
2Timothy1:16 Mfumu asankishe bena diku dia Onesifore, bualu uvua munsambe misangu ya bungi. Kavua mumvue bundu bua pamvua mu lukanu." 
2Timothy1:17 Diba diakafikaye mu Rome, uvua munkebe diakamue, too ne patuakumonangana." 
2Timothy1:18 Mfumu anuambuluishe, bua dituku dia Tshilumbuluilu Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse. Wewe kabidi udi mumanye bimpe bungi bua midimu ivuaye mungenzele mu Efeze." 
2Timothy2:1 Muananyi, utantamane mu dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu ditudi nadi patudi tudisanga ne Yezu Kristu." 
2Timothy2:2 Biuvua mumvue meme mulongeshe, bantu ba bungi bavua babiumvue, babijadike. Nanku ubilongeshe bantu ba nsongu, badi bamanye mua kubilongesha bakuabu." 
2Timothy2:3 Kenga nanyi, mudi musolayi wa muoyi umue wa Yezu Kristu wenza." 
2Timothy2:4 Musolayi udi ku mudimu, kena ubuelakana mu malu a bantu bakuabu, padiye musue kusankisha mulombodi wa tshisumbu tshia basolayi." 
2Timothy2:5 Muntu udi ubuela mu manaya a kunyema lubilu, udi mua kupeta nsala wa lumu, amu padiye ukumbaja mikenji ya manaya." 
2Timothy2:6 Tshidime udi ukuata mudimu mukole, ke udi udianjila kunowa bia mu budimi." 
2Timothy2:7 Umvua bindi ngamba ebi. Mfumu neakuambuluishe bua ubijingulule bionsu. 
2Timothy2:8 Mesu ebe ikale amu kudi Yezu Kristu, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide, uvuabu babishe ku lufu, mudi Lumu lua Disanka lundi ndongesha luamba." 
2Timothy2:9 Ndi nkenga, mbansuike kabidi mu nkanu bu muena buenzavi, bualu ndi mmanyisha bantu Lumu lua Disanka elu. Kadi kabena mua kusuika muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu ne nkanu to." 
2Timothy2:10 Ke pandi ngumvua bionsu ne lutuulu, bua diakalenga dia bantu badi Mvidi Mukulu musungule. Ke mudibu bapeta bobu kabidi lupandu kudi Yezu Kristu, ne butumbi bua kashidi." 
2Timothy2:11 Miaku eyi idi milelela: “Bituikala bafue nende, netuikale nende ne muoyi;" 
2Timothy2:12 Bituikala bumvue makenga ne lutuulu, netudie nende bumfumu; Bituamuvila, Yeye kabidi neatuvile;" 
2Timothy2:13 Bituamubenga, Yeye neatunange, bualu kena mua kudivila muende mudiye. ”" 
2Timothy2:14 Uvuluije bantu bonsu malu aa. Ubabele bikole kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu ne: kanuedianganyi mpata ya pa miaku. Mpata ya nunku kayena ilengelela bantu, kadi idi amu ipambula badi bayiteleja." 
2Timothy2:15 Ukuate mudimu bimpe, bua bakuanyishe kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bu muena mudimu udi kayi ne bua kufua bundu bua mudimu wende, bualu udi umanyisha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu mu bulelela." 
2Timothy2:16 Epuka ku biakulakula bia patupu bidi bibengangana ne ditaba. Bualu badi babiakula nebumbuke ku kakese ku kakese kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
2Timothy2:17 Bidibu balongesha bidi bu mputa mubole udi udiunda amu kudiunda. Mu bantu ba nanku mudi Imeneya, ne Filete." 
2Timothy2:18 Bavua bumuke mu njila wa bulelela, bualu badi balongesha ne: dibiika dietu dia ku lufu ndimane kuenzeka. Ke mudibu bapambuisha kabidi bantu bavule mu njila wa ditaba." 
2Timothy2:19 Kadi tshitaku tshikole tshivua Mvidi Mukulu muase, kabena mua kutshinyungisha. Bavua bafundapu ne: “Mfumu udi mumanye bena diende. ” mBafundepu kabidi ne: “Muntu yonsu udi wamba ne: ndi muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, udi ne bua kulekela kuenza malu mabi.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Mu nzubu munene kamuena amu malonga a tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nansha a tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Mudi kabidi a mitshi, ne a diima. A kumpala badi benza nawu mudimu mu bibilu. Makuabu mmateka bua midimu ya buatshiabuatshia." 
2Timothy2:21 Padi muntu udilengeja ku malu mabi onsu andi ntela, nebamuangate bua midimu misunguluke. Bualu udi witaba Mfumu ne muoyi mujima, umulengelela. Ke mudiye mua kumuambuluisha ku midimu mimpe yonsu." 
2Timothy2:22 Epuka ku majinga mabi a mu bunsonga. Keba kuenza malu mimpe. Ikala ne ditaba, dinanga, ditalala. Udisange ne bonsu badi ne muoyi muimpe, batendelela Mfumu." 
2Timothy2:23 Kadi ubenge mpata ya bupale ne butshimbakane. Umanye ne: ndekelu wayi udi amu matandu. 
2Timothy2:24 Kadi muntu udi wenzela Mfumu mudimu, kena ne bua kutandangana to. Udi ne bua kusankidila muntu yonsu. Amanye mua kulongesha bimpe. Ikale kabidi ne lutuulu." 
2Timothy2:25 Udi ne bua kulongesha bantu badi bamuela mpata, kayi ufika munda. Bumue nebapete kudi Mvidi Mukulu mushindu wa kudilengeja, ne wa kumanya bulelela." 
2Timothy2:26 Nanku nebapete tshiakabidi meji malenga. Nebumuke ku mateyi a diabolu uvua mubakuate, mubenzeje muvuaye musue." 
2Timothy3:1 Uvuluke bimpe ne: mu matuku a nshikidilu nemuikale dikenga dikole. 
2Timothy3:2 Bualu bantu nebadinange. Nebanange bubanji. Nebaditembe, baditambisha, bapenda Mvidi Mukulu. Nebatombokele baledi babu. Kabakuvuluka kabidi bantu bavua babenzele bimpe. Kabakunemeka bidi bia tshijila." 
2Timothy3:3 Nebikale bantu ba malu makole, kabayi ne luse. Nebikale bena bijanu, bena tshikisu, bena lonji, baluishi ba bantu badi benza bimpe." 
2Timothy3:4 Nebelangane bifufu bibi. Nebikale bantu ba tshiiji, bena lutambishi luvule. Nebanange milowu, pa mutu pa kunanga Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Timothy3:5 Nebamueneke ku mesu bu bantu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu, kadi mundamunda muabu kabayi bamanye bukole bua badi bamuitaba. Nanku umuke kudi bantu abu!" 
2Timothy3:6 Bamue ba kudibu badi babuela mu nzubu ya bende, batekesha bakaji bena bitabataba, badi banyingalala bua mibi ivuabu benze kale, batua eku ne eku ne majinga a mishindu yonsu." 
2Timothy3:7 Bakaji abu badi bananga kulonga malu, kadi kabena ne mushindu wa kumanya bulelela." 
2Timothy3:8 Bu muvua Yanese ne Yambrese batombokele Moshe, ke mudi bantu abu babenga bulelela. Lungenyi lua bantu abu ndunyanguke. Ditaba diabu didi patupu." 
2Timothy3:9 Kadi kabakuya muaba mule to. Bualu bantu bonsu nebajingulule ne: bantu aba mbatatakane. Ke muvuabu bajandule kale butatakana bua Yanese ne Yambrese nanku. 
2Timothy3:10 Kadi wewe uvua mundonde mu bimvua ndongesha, mu bimvua ngenza, kabidi ne mu bimvua ngipatshila. Uvua muidikije ditaba dianyi, lutuulu banyi, dinanga dianyi, muoyi mukole umvua nawu." 
2Timothy3:11 Tuvua nebe diba dimvua nsama, diba divuabu bankengesha. Udi mumanye bionsu bivua bingenzekele mu Antiyokiya, mu Ikoniyume, ne mu Listra. Bavua bankengeshe bikole, kadi Mfumu uvua munsungidile ku bionsu." 
2Timothy3:12 Bantu bonsu badi basue kuitaba Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi umue, kudisanga ne Yezu Kristu, nebabakengeshe." 
2Timothy3:13 Kadi bantu babi ne bena dishima nebatungunuke amu kutungunuka ne dienza bibi. Nebashimangane. Bantu bakuabu nebabashime. 
2Timothy3:14 Kadi wewe, vuluka amu bimpe bivuabu bakulongeshe, biuvua muitabe, mujadike. Udi mumanye kabidi bavua bakulongeshabi." 
2Timothy3:15 Bualu bituadije ku buana buebe, udi mumanye Mikanda ya tshijila, idi mua kukupa meji adi mua kukufikisha ku lupandu, paudi witaba Yezu Kristu." 
2Timothy3:16 Bualu bionsu bidi mu Mikanda ya tshijila mbabifunde ne meji a Mvidi Mukulu. Bidi biambuluisha bua kulongesha bulelela, kubenga ntupakanyi, kulengeja bilema, kufikisha bantu ku nsombelu muimpe." 
2Timothy3:17 Ke mudi muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu mua kumanya bimpe mudimu udiye ne bua kukuata. Neikale kabidi ne bionsu bidiye ukengela bua kuenza nabi mudimu awu. 
2Timothy4:1 Ndi nkusengelela kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu ne kua Yezu Kristu, walumbuluisha ba muoyi ne bafue, ndi nkulomba mu dina dia difika dia Yezu Kristu, ne dia Bukalenga buende, ne:" 
2Timothy4:2 longesha bantu Muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. Amba amu kuamba, nansha mu tshikondu tshimpe, nansha mu tshikondu tshibi. Itabijija bantu. Ubabele, ubakoleshe ku muoyi, ubalongeshe ne lutuulu, kuyi upungila." 
2Timothy4:3 Bualu tshikondu netshifike, tshiabenga bantu kuteleja badi balongesha malu malelela. Nebakebe amu tshidibu bajinga bobu. Nebadisangishile balongeshi bavule badi babalongesha amu bidibu basue kuteleja." 
2Timothy4:4 Kabakuteleja kabidi malu malelela to. Nebaabenge bua kuteleja ne ntema yonsu mianu. 
2Timothy4:5 Kadi wewe udilame, umanye bionsu biudi wenza. Wikale ne lutuulu mu dikenga. Ulongeshe bimpe Lumu lua Disanka. Ukumbaje muebe muonsu mudimu uudi wenzela Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Timothy4:6 Diba dianyi dia kumfilabu bu mulambu diakukumbana. Tshikondu tshia meme kufua tshiafiki. 
2Timothy4:7 Ndi muluangane mvita mimpe. Ndi mujikije mutantshi wonsu umvua ne bua kunyema. Ndi mulame ditaba too ne ku ndekelu. 
2Timothy4:8 Mpindiewu tshidi tshinshadile tshidi amu bua meme kupeta nsala wa lumu. Mfumu, udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi, neangele ka lumbandi dituku dia Tshilumbuluilu. Kakungela amu meme nkayanyi. Kadi neele kabidi bantu bonsu badi bindila ne dinanga diba didiye mua kumueneka." 
2Timothy4:9 Kolesha, bua umpete lukasa." 
2Timothy4:10 Bualu Demase ukadi mundekele, muye ku Tesalonike, bualu udi mutambe kusua malu a panu. Kreshense mmuye ku Ngalate, Tite ku Dalmasiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Anu Luke ke utudi nende. Wangate Marke, nufike nende, bualu udi mua kungambuluisha." 
2Timothy4:11 Anu Luke ke utudi nende. Wangate Marke, nufike nende, bualu udi mua kungambuluisha." 
2Timothy4:11 Anu Luke ke utudi nende. Wangate Marke, nufike nende, bualu udi mua kungambuluisha." 
2Timothy4:12 Nkadi mutume Tishike mu Efeze. 
2Timothy4:13 Diba diwafika, untuadile tshinkutu tshimvua mushiye mu Trowase kua Karpuse. Untuadile kabidi ne mikanda, nangananga ya biseba bivunga." 
2Timothy4:14 Aleksandre, nsenda wa biamu, mmungenzele bibi be. Mfumu neamufute bilondeshile tshivuaye muenze." 
2Timothy4:15 Wewe kabidi umudimukile, bualu uvua mubenge bikole bionsu bituvua balongeshe." 
2Timothy4:16 Diba dimvua ndilumbuluila musangu wa kumpala, muntu nansha umue kavua mutue ku tshianyi to. Bonsu bavua banshiye. Mvidi Mukulu kabashi tshilumbu atshi to!" 
2Timothy4:17 Kadi Mfumu uvua pabuipi nanyi. Uvua munkoleshe mu maboku, bua mmone mua kukobola Lumu lua Disanka amu mudilu, kulumvuija bantu bonsu ba bisamba bikuabu. Mvidi Mukulu mmumpandishe mukana mua nyama wa ntambue." 
2Timothy4:18 Mfumu neansungidile ku malu mabi onsu. Neambueje buludi mu Bukalenga buende bua mu diulu. Butumbi buikale kudi Mfumu kashidi! Amene. 
2Timothy4:19 Ela Priskila ne Akuila, ne bena diku dia Onesifore, muoyi." 
2Timothy4:20 Eraste uvua mushale mu Korente. Mvua mushiye Trofime ku Milete, bualu uvua usama." 
2Timothy4:21 Kolesha, ufike lukasa, muvu wa mashika kauyi muanji kufika. Ebuluse, Pudense, Linuse, Klodiya, ne bena ditaba bakuabu bonsu, badi banutumina muoyi." 
2Timothy4:22 Mfumu ikale nebe. Dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu dishindame munda muenu. 
Titus1:1 Meme Polu, muena mudimu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne mupostolu wa Yezu Kristu, ndi mfunda mukanda ewu. Bavua bangimikile mudimu wa kufikisha ku ditaba bantu bavua Mvidi Mukulu musungule, ne wa kubamanyisha mudibu mua kunemeka Mvidi Mukulu mu bulelela bilondeshile ditaba diabu." 
Titus1:2 Ke mudibu mua kutekemena muoyi wa kashidi, udi Mvidi Mukulu, udi kayi ushima, mudianze kutulaya kumpala kua bidimu bionsu." 
Titus1:3 Mpindiewu tshikondu tshiakumbanyi tshidiye utumanyisha muoyi awu, mu Lumu lua Disanka lundi meme ne bua kukobola ku bukenji bupeta kudi Mvidi Mukulu, Musungidi wetu." 
Titus1:4 Wewe Tite udi muananyi mulelela mu ditaba didi didisanga nebe. Ndi nkufundila mukanda ewu, nkujingila ne: dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu ne Yezu Kristu, Musungidi wetu, bishindame munda muebe." 
Titus1:5 Mvua mukushiye mu tshidila tshia Kreta, bua wewe kulongolola bimvua meme tshiyi mujikije. Nanku mu tshimenga tshionsu uteke bakulu ku mutu kua Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Uvuluke meyi ne mikandu bimvua mukushile." 
Titus1:6 Mukulu ikale muntu udibu kabayi mua kudiwula, muena mukaji umue. Bana bende bikale bena ditaba. Kabikadi ba lumu lubi, nansha bena tshishiku." 
Titus1:7 Bualu mulombodi wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba udi wenzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu. Nanku bantu kabena mua kuikala ne mushindu wa kumudiwula ku bualu nansha bumue. Kaditembi muanzu wende. Kafiki munda lukasalukasa, kikadi munuavi, muena tshikisu, nansha muena mutshima udi ukeba kupeta biuma mu njila mubi." 
Titus1:8 Amanye mua kuakidila bimpe benyi. Anyishe bilenga bidi bantu benza. Ikale muntu wa meji, muntu muimpe, wa tshijila, udi mumanye mua kudikokesha." 
Titus1:9 Alongeshe malu a Mvidi Mukulu malelela, amu muvuabu bamulongeshewu. Nanku neamanye mua kukolesha bantu bakuabu ku muoyi. Alongeshe amu malu malelela. Aleje bantu badi babenga dilongesha diende ntupakanyi yabu." 
Titus1:10 Bualu kudi bantu bavule, nangananga munkatshi mua bena Yuda bavua babuele mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba, badi bantomboji, bashima bantu ne biakulakula." 
Titus1:11 Nanku ubakandike, ubabuikidije mukana, bualu badi bajula bimvundu mu meku majima, balongesha malu adi kaayi makane, anu bua kupeta biuma mushindu mubi." 
Titus1:12 Muena Kreta menemene, umue wa ku bambi babu, uvua wamba ne: “Bena Kreta badi amu bena dishima, nyama ya lonji, bena lulengu, basombela anu bua kudia. ”" 
Titus1:13 mMuambilemu! Ke paudi ne bua kubabela bikole bua bapingane mu ditaba dilelela. 
Titus1:14 Kabalamatshi kabidi ku nsumuinu ya bena Yuda, nansha ku mikenji ivuabu bele kudi bantu badi babenga bulelela." 
Titus1:15 Bionsu bidi biakane, bua bantu badi ne muoyi muakane. Kadi bua badi banyanguke, kabayi ne ditaba, kakuena tshintu tshimpe nansha tshimue. Bualu meji abu ne muoyi wabu mbinyanguke." 
Titus1:16 Badi bajadika ne: tudi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi malu adibu benza adi aleja ne: kabena bamumanye to. Badi bantu babi, bantomboji, kabayi mua kukumbaja mudimu muimpe nansha umue." 
Titus2:1 Kadi wewe ulongeshe Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba malu malelela. 
Titus2:2 Longesha bantu bakulakaje bua badilame bimpe, badinemeke, bikale bena meji, bashindame mu ditaba, mu dinanga ne mu lutuulu." 
Titus2:3 Longesha kabidi bakaji bakulumpe bua benze malu makanyine bantu ba tshijila, kabayi bena bijanu, kabayi basombela amu maluvu. Balongeshe kabidi bakuabu amu malu adi mimpe." 
Titus2:4 Baleje bansongakaji batshidi babuelelaku mu dibaka, mudibu mua kunanga babayabu, kunanga kabidi ne bana badibu balele." 
Titus2:5 Babalongeshe mudibu mua kuikala bena meji, ba munda mutoke, badi bakuata midimu ya nzubu ne mankenda. Bikale kabidi bantu ba muoyi muimpe, badi batumikila babayabu, bua muntu kapendi muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Titus2:6 Ubele kabidi bansonga bua bikale ne meji. 
Titus2:7 Wewe mene wikale tshilejilu mu midimu mimpe yonsu. Wikale muambi wa nsongu, udi mushindike tshidiye ulongesha." 
Titus2:8 Akula miaku amu milenga, idibu kabayi mua kudiwula. Nanku baluishi bebe nebafue bundu, bualu kabena bapeta bualu bubi bua kutujana nabu." 
Titus2:9 Bapika badi ne bua kukokela bamfumu babu, kubasankisha mu bionsu, kubenga kuela mpata ku diyi diabu." 
Titus2:10 Kabena ne bua kuiba bamfumu babu kantu nansha kamue. Kadi badi ne bua kubenzela bimpe ne munanunanu. Nanku bionsu bidibu benza abi nebinemeshe dilongesha didi ditangila Mvidi Mukulu, Musungidi wetu." 
Titus2:11 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmuleje mudiye unanga bantu, musue kubapandisha bonsu." 
Titus2:12 Dinanga edi didi ditulongesha mua kuela nyima ku malu mabi, ne ku nkuka ya pa buloba, bua tuikale bena meji, tuenze bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, tumuitabe." 
Titus2:13 Ke mutudi mua kuindila dituku dia disanka ditudi tutekemena. Dituku adi butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu wetu munene ne Musungidi Yezu Kristu nebumueneke patoke. 
Titus2:14 Yeye mene uvua mudifile buetu tuetu, bua kutupikula ku bubi buonsu, kutulengeja, kutuenza bantu bende badi bamuitaba amu Yeye, benza midimu mimpe ne disuminyina." 
Titus2:15 Ebi ke biudi ne bua kulongesha. Ke muudi ne bua kukolesha bantu ku muoyi, kubabela. Enza nanku ne bumfumu buonsu buudi nabu. Muntu nansha umue kakupepeji." 
Titus3:1 Uvuluije bena ditaba mudibu ne bua kukokela balombodi ne bamfumu ba matunga, kubatumikila. Bikale ne muoyi wa kubambuluisha mu midimu mimpe yonsu." 
Titus3:2 Kabajanyi muntu. Bikale bakebi ba bupole, badi bamanye mua kutuangaja bantu. Bikale kabidi ne diyi dimpe kudi bantu bonsu, kabayi bapungila." 
Titus3:3 Bualu ku kale, tuetu kabidi katuvua ne meji to. Tuvua bena tshitunu, bantu bapambuke. Tuvua bapika ba malu mabi, ne ba masanka mabi a mishindu yonsu. Tuvua bena buenzavi ne lubabu. Tuvua tukina bakuabu, bobu kabidi bavua batukina." 
Titus3:4 Kadi pakumueneka muoyi mulenga wa Mvidi Mukulu, Musungidi wetu, ne dinanga diende dia bantu," 
Titus3:5 ke Yeye kusungidila, ki mbua midimu mimpe ituvua benze, kadi anu bua luse luende. Uvua mutusungidile, bualu bavua bafume mu mayi, batulele tshiakabidi, batupeshe muoyi mupiamupia kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Titus3:6 Bualu ku bukole bua Yezu Kristu, Musungidi wetu, Mvidi Mukulu mmutupumuine Mueyelu wende wa Tshijila muvule." 
Titus3:7 Nanku Mvidi Mukulu kudibingisha, bualu udi utunanga. Ke mutudi mua kupiana muoyi wa kashidi utudi ditekemena." 
Titus3:8 Miaku indi ndongesha eyi idi milelela. Ndi musue wambulule malu awu misangu mivule, bua bantu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu bakumbaje midimu mimpe ne dinanukila. Ke bidi bimpe, bilengelela bantu." 
Titus3:9 Kadi lekela kuelangana mpata ya tshianana, kulondolola ndelanganyi mulongulongu ya bankambua, matandu ne mpata bia pa mikenji. Ebi kabiena biambuluisha nansha kakese." 
Titus3:10 Muntu udi utapululangana, umubele musangu wa kumpala, umubele kabidi musangu muibidi. Kadi pabengaye kuitaba, umumushe munkatshi muenu." 
Titus3:11 Bualu udi mumanye ne: muntu wa nanku mmumane kupambuka mu njila mululame. Mibi idiye wenza idi ijadika ne: mmupile. 
Titus3:12 Pangikala mukutumine Artemase nansha Tishike, ufike kundi lukasa mu tshimenga tshia Nikopolise. Ke muaba undi musue kusomba mu tshikondu tshia mashika." 
Titus3:13 Ambuluisha Zenase, mulumbuluidi wa bantu, ne Apolose, bua bapete bionsu bidibu bakengela bua luendu luabu." 
Titus3:14 Bena dietu kabidi badi ne bua kukumbaja midimu mimpe ne dinanukila, bua tumone mua kujikija majinga manene atudi nawu. Kabena mua kusomba kabayi bakuata mudimu." 
Titus3:15 Bantu bonsu batudi nabu kunu, badi bakuela muoyi. Ela badi badisanga netu mu ditaba muoyi. Dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu dishindame munda muenu bonsu." 
Philemon1:1 Meme Polu, udi mubuele mu lukanu bualu mvua mukuatshile Yezu Kristu mudimu, pamue ne muanetu Timote, tudi tunutumina nuenu bonsu mukanda wetu ewu. Wewe Filemone, mulunda wetu, utudi tukuata nende mudimu," 
Philemon1:2 pamue ne Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba badi basangile mu nzubu muebe, kabidi ne muanetu wa bakaji Apiya, ne Arshipe, utudi nende mu mvita, tudi tunujingila bonsu ne:" 
Philemon1:3 dinanga ne bupole bia Mvidi Mukulu Tatu wetu ne Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu bishindame munda muenu. 
Philemon1:4 Filemone musuibue, misangu yonsu indi ntendelela Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nkuvuluka, ngela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila." 
Philemon1:5 Bualu ndi ngumvua bantu bamba muudi unanga bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu bonsu, kabidi muudi witaba mfumu Yezu." 
Philemon1:6 Ndi ndomba Mvidi Mukulu bua didisanga dietu nebe mu ditaba dikuame bimuma. Ke muudi mua kumanya bimpe bitambe bilenga bionsu bitudi nabi munda mua Kristu. 
Philemon1:7 Muanetu Filemone, mvua musanke bikole, mukole muoyi, pamvua mumvue muudi unanga, ukankamija kabidi bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Philemon1:8 Nanku, nansha meme mupete bumfumu kudi Kristu bua kukufundila tshiudi ne bua kuenza," 
Philemon1:9 ndi musue amu kukusengelela, bua dinangangana dietu dimueneke patoke. Meme Polu nkadi mukulakaje. Ndi kabidi mu lukanu, bualu ndi muitabe Yezu Kristu." 
Philemon1:10 Ndi ngakuila Onezime. Ukadi muananyi undi mufikishe mu ditaba pandi mu lukanu apa. 
Philemon1:11 Kale kavua ukulengelela to. Kadi mpindiewu ukadi utulengelela bubidi buetu. 
Philemon1:12 Ndi mmupingaja kuudi lelu. Yeye ukadi bu meme mene. 
Philemon1:13 Mvua musue kumulama pabuipi nanyi, pandi mu lukanu emu bua Lumu lua Disanka, bua angambuluishe pa muaba webe." 
Philemon1:14 Kadi tshivua musue kuenza nanku, tshiyi mukuebeje to. Tshiena musue kukuenzela bualu buimpe ku bukole. Ndi njinga ubuenze ku budisuile buebe." 
Philemon1:15 Bumue Onezime uvua muanji kumuka kuudi tshitupa, bua, papinganaye, ashale kuudi kashidi." 
Philemon1:16 Mpindiewu katshiena mupika, kadi mmupite mupika: ukadi muanetu musuibue. Ndi mumunange bikole. Kadi wewe udi ne bua kupita kumunanga, bualu uvua mupika webe, mpindiewu ukadi muanenu munda mua Mfumu." 
Philemon1:17 Paudi untangila bu muanenu mu ditaba, umuakidile bu meme." 
Philemon1:18 Pikalaye mukuenzele bualu bubi, nansha pikalaye ne dibanza diebe, dibanza edi dishale dianyi." 
Philemon1:19 Ndi mfunda ne tshianza tshianyi miaku eyi ne: Dibanza adi, meme Polu, nenkufutedi. (Bushuwa, tshiena musue kukuvuluija ne: udi kabidi ne dianyi dibanza, ke muoyi webe mene.)" 
Philemon1:20 Eyowa, muanetu, ndi nkusengelela ne: unsankishe bualu bua Mfumu. Muoyi wanyi upete ditalala kuudi, bualu tudi bantu bamue mu Kristu." 
Philemon1:21 Pandi nkufundila apa, ndi mujadike ne: newenze tshindi mukulombe. Ndi mumanye ne: neutshikumbaje, upitshishe kabidi." 
Philemon1:22 Undongoluele kabidi muaba wa kulala, bualu ndi mutekemene ne: Mvidi Mukulu neitabe malomba enu. Neampingaje kunudi." 
Philemon1:23 Epafrase, utudi nende mu lukanu, bualu tudi bitabe Yezu Kristu, udi unuela muoyi." 
Philemon1:24 Marke, Aristarke, Demase ne Luke, badi bakuata nanyi mudimu, badi banuela kabidi muoyi." 
Philemon1:24 Marke, Aristarke, Demase ne Luke, badi bakuata nanyi mudimu, badi banuela kabidi muoyi." 
Philemon1:24 Marke, Aristarke, Demase ne Luke, badi bakuata nanyi mudimu, badi banuela kabidi muoyi." 
Philemon1:25 Dinanga dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu dishindame munda muenu. 
Hebrews1:1 Ku kale, Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambile bankambua hetu malu misangu ne misangu, kabidi mishindu ne mishindu kudi bambi." 
Hebrews1:2 Kadi matuku a ndekelu aa, mmutuambidilewu kudi Muanende. Kudiye nkudi Mvidi Mukulu mufukile bintu bionsu. Yeye ke udi Mvidi Mukulu musungule bua apiane bintu bionsu." 
Hebrews1:3 Muanende ewu ke udi uleja bukole bua butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu, ke udi uleja menemene mudi Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi udi ushindika bintu bionsu ku bukole bua muaku wende. Mumane kujimijila bantu bubi buabu, mmuye kusomba mu diulu ku tshianza tshia balume tshia Mvidi Mukulu, muena bukole buonsu." 
Hebrews1:4 Muana udi mupite batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmumupeshe dina didi dipite diabu ku buneme." 
Hebrews1:5 Katshia Mvidi Mukulu kena muanji kuambila nansha umue wa ku batumibue bende ne: “Wewe ke Muananyi, biangatshile ku lelu meme ndi Tatuebe.” Kena muanji kuambila kabidi mutumibue nansha umue ne: “Nengikale Tatuende, yeye neikale Muananyi." 
Hebrews1:6 Kadi tshikondu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu musue kutuma Muanende, muanabute pa buloba, kuambaye ne: “Batumibue bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu bamukukuile.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Bua batumibue, Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambe ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi wenza batumibue bende mueyelu, bena mudimu bende, ndimi ya kapia. ”" 
Hebrews1:8 Kadi bua Muana, Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambe ne: “Mvidi Mukulu, nkuasa webe udi mushindame kashidi, Neulombole bukalenga buebe mu buakane." 
Hebrews1:9 Udi unanga bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, ubenga bidiye ubenga. Ke pavua Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu webe mukujidile, mukuele manyi a tshijila a disanka pa mutu, mukusungule anu wewe, mubenge bena mulongu nebe. ”" 
Hebrews1:10 Kuambaye kabidi ne: “Maweja-Nangila, wewe ke udi mushindike buloba ku tshibangidilu, muenze diulu ne bianza biebe." 
Hebrews1:11 Bintu bionsu abi nebijimine, kadi wewe neushale. Diulu ne buloba nebisunsuke bu bilamba bia kale." 
Hebrews1:12 Neubivunge mudibu bavunga kazaku, nebikudimuke bu bilamba. Kadi wewe udi ushala momumue, bidimu biebe kabiena bijika. ”" 
Hebrews1:13 Mvidi Mukulu katshia kena muanji kuambila nansha umue wa ku batumibue bende ne: “Somba ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume, too ne pangateka baluishi bebe bu tshidiatshilu tshia makasa ebe. ”" 
Hebrews1:14 Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu mene mbanganyi? Buonsu buabu mmieyelu idi yenzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu. Bobu ke badiye utuma bua kuambuluisha badi ne bua kupeta lupandu. 
Hebrews2:1 Ke patudi ne bua kuangata ne mushinga malu malelela atudi bumvue, bua katujiminyi." 
Hebrews2:2 Mikenji ivua batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu bafike nayi kutudi, ivua ne mushinga munene. Muntu yonsu uvua kayi muyilonde, mubenge kuyitumikila, mmupete dinyoka di-vuaye ne bua kupeta." 
Hebrews2:3 Nanku, patualengulula lupandu bunene nenku, mutuapanduka dinyoka mmunyi? Maweja-Nangila nkayende uvua mudianze kutumanyisha lupandu elu. Pashishe bavua bumvue mudi lupandu elu kutujadikilabu bunene bualu." 
Hebrews2:4 Mvidi Mukulu uvua kabidi mujadike bulelela bua bivuabu bambe ku bishima ne ku malu a kukema a mishindu yonsu. Uvua muabanye kabidi mapa a kudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila muvuaye musue. 
Hebrews2:5 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu kena mupeshe batumibue bende bumfumu bua buloba butshidi kumpala butuvua batele to. 
Hebrews2:6 Kadi mu Mukanda wa tshijila muntu mukuabu udi wamba ne: “Eyi! Mvidi Mukulu, muntu mene nnganyi bua wewe kumuelela meji? Muana wa muntu nnganyi bua wewe kumutangila?" 
Hebrews2:7 Udi mumupuekeshe kuinshi kua batumibue bebe, wewe kumupa butumbi ne lumu," 
Hebrews2:8 wewe kumupesha bumfumu bua bintu bionsu. ” Padibu bamba ne: Mvidi Mukulu “mmupeshe muntu bumfumu bua bintu bionsu,” mmomumue ne: mmumupeshe bumfumu bua bintu bionsu, kakuyi nansha tshimue tshidi tshishale. Kadi katuena tumona ne: bintu bionsu bikadi ku bumfumu bua muntu lelu to." 
Hebrews2:9 Kadi tudi tumona ne: Yezu uvuabu bapuekeshe kakese kuinshi kua batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, bualu bua lufu luvuaye mufuile bantu, mmupete butumbi ne lumu. Nanku bualu bua dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu utunanga nadi, Yezu mmufuile bantu bonsu." 
Hebrews2:10 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu — udi mufuke bionsu, kabidi udibu bafukila bionsu — uvua ne bua kupitshisha Yezu mu makenga bua kumufikisha ku bujima buende, bua amone mua kubueja bana bende bavule mu butumbi buende. Bualu Yezu ke udi ubafikisha ku lupandu." 
Hebrews2:11 Yezu udi ulengeja bantu ku mibi yabu, ne bantu badiye ulengeja badi bonsu ne Tatu anu umue. Ke padi Yezu kayi umvua bundu bua kubabtkila ne: mbana hetu." 
Hebrews2:12 Bualu udi wamba ne: “Eyi! Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nengambile bana hetu bualu buebe, nenkutumbishe bantu bonsu bateleje." 
Hebrews2:13 Udi wamba kabidi ne: “Nentekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu.” Kabidi ne: “Ke meme ewu ne bana bavua Mvidi Mukulu mumpeshe. ” 
Hebrews2:14 Padi bana aba, mudiye ubabikila, ne mubidi ne mashi, Yezu mene uvua mudienze bu bobu, mudisange nabu mu buntu buabu. Uvua muenze nenku bua ku lufu luende, amone mua kubutula diabolu, uvua ne bumfumu bua kushipa bantu." 
Hebrews2:15 Uvua muenze nanku kabidi bua kupikula bonsu bayua bu bapika, matuku onsu avuabu panu, bualu batata batshina lufu." 
Hebrews2:16 Bualu kena mutate bua kuambuluisha batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, kadi udi mutate bua kuambuluisha ndelanganyi ya Abrahame." 
Hebrews2:17 Ke patataye ne bua kufuanangana ne bana babu ku malu onsu, bua kuikalaye mutuangaji wabu munene, udi ne luse lua bungi, kabidi udi Mvidi Mukulu wanyisha, bua amone mua kujimija mibi ya bantu." 
Hebrews2:18 Mpindiewu udi mua kuambuluisha bantu badibu bateta, bualu yeye mene batata bamuteta, kabidi uvua mumvue makenga." 
Hebrews3:1 Nanku, bana hetu bena ditaba, nuenu batata Mvidi Mukulu mubikile kabidi, nutangile Yezu utata Mvidi Mukulu mutume bua kuikalaye mutuangaji munene utudi tutonda mu ditaba dietu." 
Hebrews3:2 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu utata mumusungule bua mudimu ewu, utata mumuanyishe kabidi bu mutataye muanyishe Moshe “mu nzubu wende mujima. ”" 
Hebrews3:3 Muntu udi wibaka nzubu udi ne lumu lupite lua nzubu mene. Nanku Yezu udi ne lumu lupite lua Moshe. 
Hebrews3:4 Bualu nzubu yonsu mmuibaka kudi muntu. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu ke udi muibake bintu bionsu. 
Hebrews3:5 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu utata muanyishe Moshe mu nzubu wende mujima. Uvua muntu mutume bua kumanyisha bonsu malu avua Mvidi Mukulu musue kuamba. 
Hebrews3:6 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi wanyisha Kristu bu Muanende, udi ku mutu kua nzubu wende. Nzubu wende awu ke tuetu, amu patudi tuindila ne muoyi umue ne lutulu, bitudi tutekemena." 
Hebrews3:7 Ke mudi Mueyelu wa Tshijila wamba ne: “Nuenu bumvue diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu lelu," 
Hebrews3:8 kanupapiji mioyi yenu bu tshikondu tshinuvua bamutombokele, dituku dinuvua bamutete mu tshipela." 
Hebrews3:9 Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: Bankambua benu kumfunyina, kunteta mu tshipela amu, nansha muvuabu bamane kumona malu onsu amvua muenze bidimu makumi anayi." 
Hebrews3:10 Ke pamvua mubafikile munda. Ke meme kuamba ne: ‘Matuku onsu, meji abu adi aya kua patupu. Kabena bajingulule tshindi mutekemene kudibu.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Meme kuditshipa ne tshiji ne: bantu aba kashidi kabena babuela mu ditunga, dimvua mubalongoluele bua bikishe!" 
Hebrews3:12 Bana hetu, dimukayi! Muntu wa kunudi nansha umue kikadi ne muoyi mubi, wa kuvila ditaba, mufuane kulamuka kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi." 
Hebrews3:13 Kadi nukoleshangane ku muoyi dituku dionsu. Bidi Mikanda ya tshijila yamba bitshidi bilelela buetu tuetu “lelu.” Nenku muntu wa kunudi, kapapiji muoyi wende, kanyishi bua mibi imudinge." 
Hebrews3:14 Bualu tudi tuenda pamue ne Kristu mu njila, patudi tulama ne muoyi umue ditekemena dietu dia ku tshibangidilu too ne ku ndekelu." 
Hebrews3:15 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Lelu panudi numvua diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu, kanupapiji mioyi yenu, bu tshikondu tshinuvua bamutombokele. ”" 
Hebrews3:16 Bavua bumvue diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu, bamutombokele mbanganyi? Ke bantu bonsu bavua Moshe mupatule mu Ejipitu." 
Hebrews3:17 Bavua Mvidi Mukulu mufikile munda bidimu makumi anayi mbanganyi? Ke bonsu bavua benze bibi. Kufuabu mu tshipeta. 
Hebrews3:18 Pavua Mvidi Mukulu muditshipe ne: “Bantu aba kashidi kabena babuela mu ditunga, dimvua mubalongoluele bua kuikisha,” bavuaye wamba nanku mbanganyi? Uvua wamba bua bonsu bavua batomboke." 
Hebrews3:19 Nenku tudi tumona ne: kabena babuela mu muaba ewu wa dikisha, bualu kabavua bitabe." 
Hebrews4:1 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutulaye ne: nenubuele muaba undi munulongoluele bua nuenu kuikisha. Nanku tudimukayi, bua muntu wa kunudi kapangi kupeta muaba wa dikisha awu." 
Hebrews4:2 Bualu bavua batumanyisha Lumu lua Disanka bu muvuabu batumanyishe bavua mu tshipeta. Bavua bumvua Lumu elu kabavua baluitabe. 
Hebrews4:3 Tuetu badi bitaba, netupete muaba wa kuikishila udi Mvidi Mukulu wamba ne: “Meme kutshidipa ne tshiji ne: Bantu aba kashidi kabena babuela mu ditunga dimvua mubalongoluele bua kuikisha. ” Uvua muambe miaku eyi nansha muvua mudimu wende mumane kujika bituadijile ku tshikondu tshivuaye mufuke bionsu." 
Hebrews4:4 Bualu mu Mukanda wa tshijila, kaba kakuabu, bua dituku dia muanda mutekete, badi bamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu kujikija mudimu onsu, kuikisha dituku dia muanda mutekete. ”" 
Hebrews4:5 Kaba mene aka Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba kabidi ne: “Kashidi kabena babuela mu ditunga dimvua mubalongoluele bua kuikisha. ” 
Hebrews4:6 Bantu bavua badianjila kumvua Lumu lua Disanka, kabavua babuele muaba wa kuikisha ewu, bualu kabavua bitabe. Nanku bakuabu batshidi ne mushindu wa kubuelamu." 
Hebrews4:7 Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu mujadike tshiakabidi dituku didiye ubikila ne: “lelu.” Uvua muteke dituku edi kunyima kua bidimu bivule mukana mua Davide, mu miaku itukavua bamane kufunda kulu ne: “Lelu, panudi numvua diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu, kanupapiji mioyi yenu. ”" 
Hebrews4:8 Bualu, bu Yoshuwa mupeteshe bantu muaba wa kuikisha ewu, Mvidi Mukulu kavua mua kutela kunyima kua bidimu dituku dikuabu." 
Hebrews4:9 Nenku, dikisha difuanangane ne divua Mvidi Mukulu muikishe dituku dia muanda mutekete, ditshidi dindila bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews4:10 Bualu muntu yonsu udi ubuela muaba udi Mvidi Mukulu mulongolole bua kuikisha, udi ujikija mudimu wende, wikisha, muvua Mvidi Mukulu mujikije mudimu wende, muikishe." 
Hebrews4:11 Nenku, tuenzayi muetu muonsu bua tupete muaba wa dikisha ewu. Tukuate mudimu bua muntu nansha umue wa Mvidi Mukulu kapangi kutumikila, muvua bantu ba mu tshipeta bapange. Bualu diba adi kakupeta muaba wa dikisha ewu." 
Hebrews4:12 Bualu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu udi muoyi kabidi ne bukole. Udi mutue mupite muele wa nkanza. Udi ubuela too ne muaba udi muoyi wa muntu ne mueyelu bipetangana, too ne muaba udi manungu ne bongu bua mu mifuba bilengangana. Udi upisha nansha ubingisha majinga ne meji adi mu muoyi wa muntu." 
Hebrews4:13 Kakuena kantu nansha kamue kadi mua kusokoma Mvidi Mukulu. Bintu bionsu, bifukibua bionsu bisanga bidi bimueneka patoke ku mesu kuende. Yeye ke utudi ne bua kuambila malu etu onsu." 
Hebrews4:14 Nenku, tulaminayi momu ditaba ditudi tutonda. Bualu tudi ne mutuangaji mupite bunene, uvua mufike too ne ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu mene: ke Yezu, Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews4:15 Katuena ne mutuangaji munene udi mupange kukenga netu mu butekete buetu. Kadi mutuangaji wetu munene, bavua bamuteta mu bionsu mudibu batuteta tuetu. Kadi yeye kavua muenze bubi." 
Hebrews4:16 Nenku tusemenayi ne ditekemena dionsu ku nkuasa wa butumbi wa Mvidi Mukulu, muaba udiye utuleja ditunanga diende. Netupeteku dijimija dia mibi. Neatulejeku mudiye utunanga, bua tupete diambuluisha diba dionsu ditudi tudikengela." 
Hebrews5:1 Mutuangaji munene yonsu mmusungule munkatshi mua bantu, bua kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu ne bua kuakuila bantu. Udi ulambula malambi ne milambu bua kujimija mibi." 
Hebrews5:2 Bu mudiye yeye mene ne butekete bua bungi, udi mua kumvuila bena dipanga ne bena ntupakanyi luse." 
Hebrews5:3 Bu mudiye mene muena butekete, udi ne bua kulambula milambu, ya kayiyi amu bua kujimija mibi ya bantu bakuabu, kadi kabidi ne bua kujimija yende mene." 
Hebrews5:4 Muntu nansha umue kena mua kudipesha lumu lua kuikala mutuangaji munene. Muntu udi mua kuikala mutuangaji amu padi Mvidi Mukulu umubikila ku mudimu awu bu muvuaye muenze ne Arone. 
Hebrews5:5 Mmomumue kabidi, Kristu kena mudipeshe nkayende lumu lua kuikala mutuangaji munene. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmumuambile ne: “Wewe udi muananyi, bituadije lelu meme ndi Tatuebe.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Kaba kakuabu uvua muambe kabidi ne: “Newikale mutuangaji kashidi bu muvua Melkisedeke. ” 
Hebrews5:7 Patshivua Yezu pa buloba, uvua ulomba Mvidi Mukulu, umutendakena, wela mbila mikole, ne binsonji ku mesu, kudi uvua mua kumusungila ku lufu. Mvidi Mukulu kumuteleja bualu Yezu uvuaumutumikila." 
Hebrews5:8 Nansha muvuaye Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua mulonge butumike mu makenga onsu avuaye nawu." 
Hebrews5:9 Bamane kumufikisha ku bujima buende, ukadi mpokolu wa lupandu lua tshiendelele bua bantu bonsu badi bamutumikila." 
Hebrews5:10 Ke Mvidi Mukulu kumuteka mutuangaji munene mushindu uvua Melkisedeke. 
Hebrews5:11 Tudi ne malu a bungi a kulongesha pa bualu ebu. Kadi mbikole bua tuetu kunujinguluilawu, bualu nudi ne lujoku ku diumvua." 
Hebrews5:12 Matuku a bungi mmamane kupita, nukavua mua kuikala balongeshi. Kadi nutshidi nukengela banulongeshe malu a kumpala a miaku ya Mvidi Mukulu. Pa mutu pa kudia biakudia bikole, nutshidi nukengela kunua mabele." 
Hebrews5:13 Utshidi unua mabele mmuana. Kena mua kujingulula bualu budi buimpe nansha budi bubi. 
Hebrews5:14 Kadi biakudia bikole mbifundile bantu bakole. Bobu bakadi bibidile kujingulula bidi bimpe ne bidi bibi mu malu amonamonabu. 
Hebrews6:1 Nenku, tutungunukayi ne malongesha a bantu bakole. Tulekele malongesha a kumpala adi atangila malu a bena Kristu. Katu-nuvuluiji malu manene anukadi balonge: munudi ne bua kubenga midimu mibi yonsu, kabidi kuitaba Mvidi Mukulu," 
Hebrews6:2 muvuabu balongeshe mishindu mishilangane ya kutua bantu mu mayi, ne mishindu idibu batenteke bianza, muvuabu banumanyishe dibika dia bafue ne tshilumbuluilu tshia tshiendelele." 
Hebrews6:3 Kadi tutungunukayi! Ke bitudi basue kuenza bu Mvidi Mukulu mua kuanyisha. 
Hebrews6:4 Tshidi mua kuenzekela badi bapingana tshiakabidi mu nsombelu mubi ntshinyi? Bakaya bamane kupeta butoke bua Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua balabule dipa dia mulu, badisange ne Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Hebrews6:5 Bavua bamane kumvua ne: muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu udi mulenga, bamanye bukole bua malu atshidi kumpala." 
Hebrews6:6 Kadi nansha biobi nanku, badi bapingana mu nsombelu mubi. Kabena mua kukudimuna nsombelu wabu musangu muibidi. Bualu badi bapopela Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu tshiakabidi pa mutshi mutshiamakane, banyishe bua bamupende patoke." 
Hebrews6:7 Padi mayi a mvula abuela mu buloba misangu ne misangu, buloba bumeneshila badi babudima biakudia bimpe, Mvidi Mukulu udi ubuela lupemba." 
Hebrews6:8 Kadi padibu bumenesha meba ne mingonga, budi bua tshianana. Mvidi Mukulu neabuele mulawu, ku nshikidilu neabuoshe." 
Hebrews6:9 Kadi, bana hetu basuibue, nansha tuakula nanku, tudi batekemene bikole kunudi, bamanye ne: nudi nuenda mu njila muimpe wa lupandu." 
Hebrews6:10 Mvidi Mukulu kena wenza bibi. Kena mua kupua binudi benze muoyi. Udi amu uvuluka dinanga dinuvua bamuleje ku midimu inuvua benzele bantu ba tshijila ne inutshidi nubenzela. 
Hebrews6:11 Kadi tudi tujinga ne: muntu yonsu wa kunudi atungunuke ne disuminyina dia momumue too ne ku ndekelu, bua binudi batekemena bikumbane menemene." 
Hebrews6:12 Katuena basue bua nuikale bena lulengu, kadi nulonde tshilejilu tshia badi bitaba, bananukila ne lutulu, bapeta tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye." 
Hebrews6:13 Pavua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye Abrahame, uvua muditshipe. Bu muvuaku kakuyi muntu mukuabu uvua mumupite bunene bua amone mua kuditshipa, kutela dina dia muntu awu, Mvidi Mukulu uvua muditshipe utela amu dina diende yeye." 
Hebrews6:14 Kuambaye ne: “Ndi nkulaya ne: nenkuele lupemba. Nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe. ” 
Hebrews6:15 Abrahame kuindila ne lutulu. Ke muvuaye mupete tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mumulaye atshi. 
Hebrews6:16 Padi bantu baditshipa, badi batela dina dia muntu udi mubapite. Mutshipu awu ke udi ujadika bualu, ujikija mpata yonsu munkatshi muabu." 
Hebrews6:17 Mvidi Mukulu uvua musue kuleja patoke bantu bonsu bavua ne bua kupeta bivuaye mulaye ne: kashidi tshiena mua kushintulula dipangadika dianyi. Ke pavuaye usakidila mutshipu ku dilaya divuaye ulaya. 
Hebrews6:18 Kudi malu abidi adibu kabayi mua kushintulula, malu abidi adi Mvidi Mukulu kayi mua kuvila. Nanku malu abidi aa adi atukolesha bikole ku muoyi, bua tumone mua kutekemena ne muoyi mujima bivuabu batulaye." 
Hebrews6:19 Ditekemena adi didi diludika muoyi wetu, mudi luongu luludika buatu pa mayi. Didi dikole, didi dishindame munda muetu. Didi disompoke dia muamua dia tshilamba tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, bua kutufikisha muaba menemene wa tshijila." 
Hebrews6:20 Ke muaba uvua Yezu mubuele kumpala kuetu bua kutuleja njila. Udi mutuangaji munene bua kashidi mushindu wa Melkisedeke. 
Hebrews7:1 Melkisedeke ewu uvua mukalenga wa Saleme, kabidi mutuangaji wa Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu. Pavua Abrahame ufuma ku mvita mumane kutshimuna bakalenga, Melkisedeke kuya kusambakena nende, kumuela kabidi lupemba." 
Hebrews7:2 Abrahame kumupesha tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionsu bivuaye nabi. Bualu bua kumpala, dina dia Melkisedeke didi diumvuija ne: “Mukalenga wa malu mimpe,” pashishe uvua mukalenga wa Saleme, mbuena kuamba ne: “Mukalenga wa bupole. ”" 
Hebrews7:3 Kabena bamanye tatuende wa Melkisedeke, nansha mamuende, nansha umue wa ku bankambua bende. Kabena batela muaba nansha umue diledibua diende, nansha lufu. Udi mufuanangane ne Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu. Udi ushala mutuangaji kashidi." 
Hebrews7:4 Nuamanya ne: muntu awu mmunene! Abrahame, nkambua wetu uvua mumupeshe tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionsu bivuaye mupawule mu mvita." 
Hebrews7:5 Ba ku ndelanganyi ya Levi badi batuangaji, badi ne bukenji bilondeshile mikenji, bua kulomba tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionsu kudi bena Izrayele. Mbuena kuamba ne: badi batshilomba ne kudi bana babu, nansha bobu bikale kabidi ndelanganyi ya Abrahame." 
Hebrews7:6 Melkisedeke kavua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Levi nansha. Kadi uvua muangate kudi Abrahame tshia dikumi tshia bintu bi vua-ye nabi. Muntu uvua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye dilaya, Melkisedeke uvua mumuele kabidi lupemba." 
Hebrews7:7 Bushiwa, muntu udi wela lupemba mmupite udiye wela lupemba." 
Hebrews7:8 Ndelanganyi ya Levi, idi yangata tshia dikumi tshia bintu, mbantu badi bafua. Kadi padi Melkisedeke, wangata tshia dikumi atshi, badi batshiangata kudi muntu udi ne muoyi, mudi Mukanda wa tshijila wamba." 
Hebrews7:9 Mu tshikosu, tuambe ne: pavua Abrahame mufile tshia dikumi tshia bintu biende, Levi (muena ndelanganyi idi yangata tshia dikumi) uvua mutshifile ne yeye kabidi." 
Hebrews7:10 Tshikondu tshivua Melkisedeke muye kusambakena ne Abrahame, Levi ukavua munda mua mubidi mua nkambua wende Abrahame, nansha kabayi banji kumulela." 
Hebrews7:11 Butuangaji bua bena Levi ke mfuki wa mikenji ivuabu bapeshe bena Izrayele. Nanku bu batuangaji ba bena Levi bafike ku bujima buabu, katuvua tukengela mutuangaji mukuabu, mutuangaji wa mushindu wa Melkisedeke, kayi wa mushindu wa Arone." 
Hebrews7:12 Padi butuangaji bushintuluka, mikenji kabidi idi ishintuluka." 
Hebrews7:13 Kadi Mfumu wetu, muena malu adibu bamba aa, uvua wa tshisamba tshikuabu. Muena tshisamba tshiende nansha umue katshia kavua muenze mudimu wa butuangaji ku tshilambuilu." 
Hebrews7:14 Tudi bamanye bimpe ne: bavua balela mfumu wetu mu tshisamba tshia Yuda. Pavua Moshe mufunde mikenji idi itangila batuangaji, kavua mutele tshisamba etshi ku bualu nansha bumue." 
Hebrews7:15 Bualu budi bumvuija bionsu ebi patoke, mbobu ebu: mutuangaji mukuabu mmupatuke mufuanangane ne Melkisedeke." 
Hebrews7:16 Kabena bamuteke mutuangaji bilondeshile mikenji idi itangila ndelanganyi ya bantu. Kadi mmupete butuangaji ebu ku bukole bua muoyi udi kauyi ndekelu. 
Hebrews7:17 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Wewe newikale mutuangaji kashidi mushindu uvua Melkisedeke. ” 
Hebrews7:18 Nenku mbashipe mukenji wa kale, bualu kauvua ne bukole, kauvua ulengelela bantu." 
Hebrews7:19 Bualu mikenji ya Moshe kayivua ifikisha bualu nansha bumue ku bujima buabu. Kadi ditekemena dipite buimpe difikile kutudi. Diodi ke didi ditusemeja pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu. 
Hebrews7:20 Mvidi Mukulu kabidi mmuditshipe! Bantu bakuabu mbapete butuangaji, kakuyi mutshipu wa nanku." 
Hebrews7:21 Kadi pavua Mvidi Mukulu muteke Yezu mu butuangaji, uvua muditshipe, bualu mbafunde ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmuditshipe, nanku kena uvila bivuaye muambe ne: ‘Wewe newikale mutuangaji kashidi. ’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Nenku, Yezu ke muntu udi utujadikila ne: nudi batue ndondu mipite buimpe." 
Hebrews7:23 Mudi dishilangana dikuabu kabidi: batuangaji bakuabu bavua ba bungi, bualu bavua ne bua kufua, kabayi mua kutungunuka ne mudimu wabu." 
Hebrews7:24 Kadi Yezu udi ne muoyi kashidi. Nenku mudimu wende wa butuangaji kabena ne bua kuupiana kudi muntu mukuabu. 
Hebrews7:25 Ke padiye mua kusungidila, mpindiewu ne matuku onsu, bonsu badi bapitshila kudiye bua kusemena pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu. Bualu yeye udi ne muoyi kashidi bua kubakuila kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews7:26 Nenku Yezu udi mutuangaji munene utuvua tukengela. Udi wa tshijila. Munda muende kamuena bualu bubi nansha bumue. Kena muenze tshilema nansha tshimue. Uvua mutapuluke ne benji ba malu mabi. Kumubandishabu ku mutu kua diulu. 
Hebrews7:27 Yeye kena bu batuangaji banene bakuabu. Kena ne bua kulambula milambu ku dituku ku dituku, diambedi bua mibi yende, pashishe bua ya bantu bakuabu to. Uvua mulambule mulambu musangu umue bua kashidi, pavuaye mudilambule yeye mene." 
Hebrews7:28 Mikenji ya Moshe idi iteka bantu badi ne bilema mulongu wa batuangaji banene. Kadi miaku ya mutshipu wa Mvidi Mukulu ivuaye muambe kunyima kua mikenji, mmiteke Muana udi mufike ku bujima buende bua kashidi bu mutuangaji munene."
