Hebrews8:1 Bualu butambe bunene butudi tukeba kumvuija, mbobu ebu: tudi ne mutuangaji munene wa nanku udi musombe mu diulu ku dia balume dia nkuasa wa butumbi wa Mvidi Mukulu, wa bukole buonsu." 
Hebrews8:2 Udi wenza mudimu wa butuangaji muaba wa Tshijila, mbuena kuamba ne: mu ntenta mulelela uvuabu kabayi base kudi bantu, kadi kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Hebrews8:3 Mutuangaji munene yonsu mmuteka bua kulambula malambi ne milambu. Nanku bidi bimpe bua mutuangaji wetu munene kabidi ikale ne tshintu tshia kulambula. 
Hebrews8:4 Bu yeye mutshikale pa buloba, kavua mua kuikala nansha mutuangaji to. Bualu pa buloba batuangaji badi balambula milambu mudi mikenji ya bena Yuda yamba." 
Hebrews8:5 Kadi mudimu udi batuangaji aba benza udi amu tshidikijilu ne mundidimbi bia bidi mu diulu. Bidi bifuanangana ne bivua bienzekela Moshe. Pavuaye ne bua kuasa ntenta, Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: “Wenze bionsu bilondeshile tshilejilu tshimvua mukuleje pa mukuna. ”" 
Hebrews8:6 Kadi mpindiewu, Yezu mmupete mudimu mupite wabu. Bualu Yezu udi mutuangaji wa ndondu mupite bunene, udi mushindame pa malaya mapite buimpe." 
Hebrews8:7 Bu ndondu wa kumpala kayi ne tshilema, kabavua ne bua kupingaja ndondu muibidi pa mutu pende to." 
Hebrews8:8 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua udiwula bantu bende, padiye wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: matuku adi kumpala, nentue ndondu mupiamupia ne bena Izrayele, kabidi ne tshisamba tshia bena Yuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Kakuikala bu ndondu umvua mutue ne bankambua babu, dituku dimvua mubakuate ku diboku, bua kubapatula mu Ejipitu. Kabavua balame ndondu ewu umvua mutue nabu. Nanku meme kubalengulula. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila njadika nanku." 
Hebrews8:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndondu ungatua ne bena Izrayele kunyima kua matuku awu, udi nenku: Nenteke mikenji yanyi mu lungenyi luabu. Nenyifunde mu mioyi yabu. Nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu, bobu nebikale bantu banyi." 
Hebrews8:11 Muntu nansha umue wa kudibu kakulongesha muena kuabu, nansha muanabu, umuambila ne: ‘Umanye Maweja-Nangila!’ Bualu bonsu nebamumanye, kubangila ku muana mutekete too ne ku muntu mukole." 
Hebrews8:12 Nembajimijile bilema biabu. Tshiena mvuluka kabidi mibi yabu. ” 
Hebrews8:13 Padi Mvidi Mukulu utela ndondu mipiamipia, udi wandamuna ndondu wa kumpala, ushala wa kale. Kadi tshintu tshidi tshishala tshia kale, tshikulakaja, tshikadi pa kujimina." 
Hebrews9:1 Ndondu wa kumpala uvua ne mikenji milongolola bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, uvua kabidi ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa pa buloba." 
Hebrews9:2 Bavua base ntenta. Ntenta awu uvua wa kumpala, uvuabu babikila ne: mmuaba wa tshijila. Munda muende muvua tshitekelu tshia miendu, mesa avua ne mampa avuabu balambula Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews9:3 Pashishe kunyima kua tshilamba tshibidi tshivua tshilembeleja, kuvua ntenta mukuabu uvuabu babikila ne: mmuaba wa tshijila menemene." 
Hebrews9:4 Muaba awu uvua tshilambuilu tshienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshivuabu boshela musenga wa manananshi. Muvua kabidi mushete wa ndondu mulamika mpawungi mubidi mujima. Munda mua mushete muvua dibungu dia mpawungi dikale ne mana, dikombu dia Arone disase bilongu, ne mabue avuabu bafundile mikenji ya ndondu." 
Hebrews9:5 Pa mutu pa mushete pavua Basherubine ba lumu, bavua baleja mpala wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mapuapua abu avua mabuikile muaba udibu bajimijila bantu mibi yabu. Kadi edi ki ndiba dia tuetu kuakula malu aa onsu ku bumue ku bumue nansha." 
Hebrews9:6 Bamane kulongolola bintu bionsu ebi, batuangaji badi babuela ku dituku ku dituku mu ntenta wa kumpala bua kuenza mudimu wabu." 
Hebrews9:7 Kadi amu mutuangaji munene nkayende ke udi ubuela mu ntenta muibidi. Udi ubuelamu amu musangu umue ku tshidimu. Udi uyamu ne mashi a nyama udiye ulambula Mvidi Mukulu bua mibi yende ne bua mibi idi bantu benze mu mpukapuka. 
Hebrews9:8 Nenku, Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi uleja ne: patshidi ntenta wa tshijila muikaleku, kabena banji kunzulula njila wa kubuela muaba wa tshijila menemene." 
Hebrews9:9 Atshi ntshimfuanyi tshidi tshiumvuija malu a mu tshikondu tshitudi etshi. Tshidi tshileja ne: malambi ne milambu ya nyama ya kuosha bidibu balambula Mvidi Mukulu kabiena mua kufikisha muoyi wa muntu udi utendelela Mvidi Mukulu ku bujima buawu. 
Hebrews9:10 Ebi bidi amu mikenji ya bantu idi itangila biakudia, bia kunua, kabidi ne bibidilu bishilangane bia kudikobolola nabi. Mikenji eyi idi ne mudimu amu too ne ku diba didi Mvidi Mukulu ulongolola malu onsu tshiakabidi." 
Hebrews9:11 Kadi Kristu mmufike bu mutuangaji munene wa bintu bitukadi nabi mpindiewu. Ntenta udiye wenzela mudimu, mmupite wa kumpala bua mushinga, kabidi udi mulenga tshishiki. Kabavua bamuasa kudi bantu. Mbuena kuamba ne: kena wa pa buloba ebu budibu bafuke nansha." 
Hebrews9:12 Pavua Kristu mubuele muaba wa tshijila menemene musangu umue bua kashidi, kavua mulambule mashi a mbuji ya mpumbu, nansha a bana ba ngombe. Uvua mulambule mashi ende nkayende, mutupetele lupandu lua tshiendelele." 
Hebrews9:13 Mashi a mbuji ya mpumbu, ne a ngombe milume ne butu bua ngombe mukaji moshe, bidibu bamiamina pambidi pa bantu badi ne mikiya, bidi bibumusha mikiya ayi pambidi." 
Hebrews9:14 Pikalabi nanku, kadi mashi a Kristu neikale ne bukole kaayi? Neikale ne bukole bupite. Ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa tshiendelele, uvua mudilambule nkayende kudi Mvidi Mukulu bu mulambu kauyi kalema. Nanku mashi ende neumushe mu muoyi wetu malu onsu a tshianana, bua tumone mua kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi mudimu." 
Hebrews9:15 Ke padi Kristu mutuangaji bua ndondu mupiamupia, bua badi Mvidi Mukulu mubikile bapete bilenga bia kashidi bivuaye mulaye bantu bende. Badi mua kubipeta, bualu muntu mumane kufila. Ku lufu luende elu, mutupikule bantu ku bilema bivuabu benze, patshivuabu mu tshikondu tshia ndondu wa kumpala." 
Hebrews9:16 Muaba uvuabu bambe diyi dia ndekelu mbimpe bajadike ne: uvua mudiambe mmumane kufua. 
Hebrews9:17 Bualu diyi dia ndekelu kadiena ne mushinga padi muenadi mutshikale ne muoyi. Diyi adi didi ne mushinga amu padi muenadi mumane kufua. 
Hebrews9:18 Ke pavua ndondu wa kumpala kabidi kayi ne bukole, mashi kaayi manji kumata panshi." 
Hebrews9:19 Diambedi, Moshe uvua muambile bantu meyi ne mikandu bionsu, mudiye mubifunde mu mukanda wa mikenji. Pashishe kuangataye mashi a bana ba ngombe, kabidi ne mayi, ditamba dia mutshi wa nsompu pamue ne buanda bukunze, kumiaminaye mashi pa mukanda wa mikenji, kabidi pa mitu ya bantu bonsu." 
Hebrews9:20 Uvua wamba ne: “Etshi mmashi adi ajadika ndondu udi Mvidi Mukulu unutumina diyi bua munulaye. 
Hebrews9:21 Pashishe Moshe kumiamina kabidi mashi ku ntenta ne ku bintu bionsu bivuabu benze nabi mudimu wa kutendelela. 
Hebrews9:22 Bu mudi mikenji yamba, badi bumusha mikiya ku bintu bu bionsu amu ne mashi. Badi bajimija mibi amu padi mashi amata panshi." 
Hebrews9:23 Pikalabu balengeja bimfuanyi bia malu a mu diulu, ku ditendelela dia malu a mushindu ewu, kadi malu malelela mene a mu diulu awu, adi akengela milambu mipite buimpe." 
Hebrews9:24 Bualu Kristu kena mubuele muaba wa tshijila muasa kudi bantu, uvua amu tshimfuanyi tshia muaba mulelela. Kadi mmubuele mu diulu menemene, mudiye udileja kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu bualu buetu." 
Hebrews9:25 Mutuangaji munene wa bena Yuda udi ubuela muaba wa tshijila ku tshidimu ku tshidimu ne mashi a nyama ya milambu. Kadi Kristu kavua mubuele bua kudilambula misangu ya bungi nansha. 
Hebrews9:26 Patupu, uvua mua kumvua makenga misangu ya bungi katshia bafuke buloba. Kadi Kristu mmumueneke mpindiewu, matuku a ku nshikidilu musangu amu umue bua kudilambula bu mulambu wa kujimija bubi." 
Hebrews9:27 Muntu yonsu udi ne bua kufua musangu umue. Kunyima kua lufu, Mvidi Mukulu neamulumbuluishe." 
Hebrews9:28 Ke muvuabu balambula Kristu musangu umue bua kujimija mibi ya bantu ba bungi. Neamueneke musangu muibidi, ki mbua kujimija mibi, kadi mbua kusungila badi bamuindila." 
Hebrews10:1 Mikenji ya bena Yuda kayena ileja menemene malu malelela nansha, kadi idi amu mundidimbi wa malu atshidi kumpala. Mmunyi mudiyi mua kufikisha bantu badi basemena pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu ku bujima buabu, padibu balambula milambu amu ya momumue matuku onsu, ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, kabayi balekela?" 
Hebrews10:2 Bu bantu badi batendelela Mvidi Mukulu mushindu ewu bapeta dijimija dia mibi yabu musangu umue bua kashidi, kabavua mua kudiumvua kabidi ne: tudi bena tshibawu. Nenku kabavua mua kulambula kabidi mulambu to." 
Hebrews10:3 Kadi, milambu eyi idi ivuluija bantu mibi yabu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu." 
Hebrews10:4 Bualu mashi a ngombe milume ne a mbuji ya mpumbu kaena mua kujimija mibi. 
Hebrews10:5 Nenku pavua Kristu mufike mu bantu, uvua muambile Mvidi Mukulu ne: “Kuena musue milambu nansha malambi, kadi uvua mundongoluele mubidi." 
Hebrews10:6 Kuena muanyishe nansha nyama miosha pa tshilambuilu, nansha milambu ya kukobolola nayi bantu." 
Hebrews10:7 Ke meme kuamba ne: ‘Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ke meme ewu, ndi mfika bua kuenza tshiudi musue, bu mudibu bafunde bualu buanyi mu mukanda wa mikenji.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Kumpala udi wamba ne: “Kuena musue milambu, nansha malambi, nansha nyama miosha pa tshilambuilu, nansha milambu ya kukobolola nayi bantu. Bionsu ebi kabiena bikusankisha.” Kadi numanye ne: badi bafila milambu eyi bua kukumbaja bidi mikenji yamba." 
Hebrews10:9 Pashishe udi wamba kabidi ne: “Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ke meme ewu, ndi mfika bua kuenza tshiudi musue.” Ke mudi Mvidi Mukulu ubenga milambu yonsu ya kale, upingaja mulambu wa Kristu mu muaba wayi." 
Hebrews10:10 Bu mudi Yezu Kristu mukumbaje tshivua Mvidi Mukulu musue, bavua batujimijila mibi, ku mulambu wa mubidi wende uvuaye mufile musangu umue bua kashidi." 
Hebrews10:11 Ku dituku ku dituku, mutuangaji yonsu uvua wimana kulu bua kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu wende. Udi ulambula misangu mivule milambu ya momumue idi kayiyi mua kujimija mibi musangu nansha umue." 
Hebrews10:12 Kadi Kristu uvua mufile mulambu anu umue bua mibi. Mulambu ewu udi ushala ne bukole kashidi. Pashishe udi muye kusomba ku dia balume dia Mvidi Mukulu. 
Hebrews10:13 Mpindiewu ke muaba udiye windila bua Mvidi Mukulu ateke baluishi bende bu tshidiatshilu kuinshi kua makasa ende. 
Hebrews10:14 Nenku ku mulambu umue udi mufikishe tshisamba tshia bena ditaba ku bujima buatshi bua kashidi. 
Hebrews10:15 Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi utujadikila kabidi bualu ebu. Bualu udi wamba bangabanga ne: 
Hebrews10:16 “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndondu ungatua nabu kunyima kua matuku aa udi nenku: Nemfunde mikenji yanyi mu mioyi yabu, neishale mu lungenyi luabu.”" 
Hebrews10:17 Pashishe udi wamba kabidi ne: “Tshiena mvuluka kabidi mibi ne bilema bidibu benza. ” 
Hebrews10:18 Nenku, padibu bamane kujimija mibi, kabena balambula kabidi mulambu wa kuyijimija nansha." 
Hebrews10:19 Nenku, bana hetu, ku bukole bua mashi a mulambu wa Yezu, tudi mua kubuela ne muoyi mushindame muaba wa tshijila menemene mutudi basue." 
Hebrews10:20 Yezu mmutunzuluile njila mupiamupia, njila wa muoyi, bualu uvua upitshila mu tshilamba, mmomumue ne: mu mubidi wende wa muntu." 
Hebrews10:21 Tudi ne mutuangaji munene udibu bateka ku mutu kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
Hebrews10:22 Nenku tusemenayi kudi Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi umue, bashindame mu ditaba dietu, bamane kulengeja muoyi wetu ku bilema bionsu bidi kondu ketu ka munda katupisha nabi, bamane kuowesha mubidi wetu ne mayi mimpe." 
Hebrews10:23 Tulame bimpe ditekemena ditudi tuamba, bualu tudi bajadike ne: Mvidi Mukulu neakumbaje bivuaye mulaye." 
Hebrews10:24 Tuambuluishanganayi bua tumone mua kukoleshangana ku muoyi, tunangangane, tuenze malu mimpe." 
Hebrews10:25 Katulekedi bisangilu bietu bu bakuabu bakadi ne tshibidilu tshia kubenga kubuelamu. Kadi tukoleshangane ku muoyi, tuenze nanku nangananga lelu unudi numona mudi dituku dia Mfumu disemena pabuipi." 
Hebrews10:26 Bualu tuetu tukadi bamane kumanya bulelela. Nanku patudi tutungunuka ku bukole ku dienza malu mabi, kakuena mulambu mukuabu udi mua kujimija mibi." 
Hebrews10:27 Diba adi tshitudi mua kuenza kabidi ntshinyi? Amu kuindila ne bowa malu atshidi kumpala, momumue ne: Dikosa dia nsambu, ne kapia kakole kadi ne bua kubutula baluishi ba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews10:28 Muntu yonsu udi ubenga kuitaba mikenji ya Moshe, pamanyabu ne: mmuenze bibi, badi bamushipa, kabayi bamufuila luse, bantu babidi nansha basatu bajadike bualu." 
Hebrews10:29 Nenku muntu udi upetula Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, umona mashi a ndondu wa Mvidi Mukulu a wabu bamukobolola nawu bu tshintu tshia tshianana, upenda Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi mutunange, nebamuenzele tshinyi? Nudi mua kujadika ne: badi ne bua kumunyoka bikole bipite!" 
Hebrews10:30 Bualu tudi bamanye uvua muambe ne: “Meme ke wasombola, meme ke wafuta,” kabidi ne: “Maweja-Nangila nealumbuluishe bantu bende. ”" 
Hebrews10:31 Kupona mu bianza bia Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, mbualu budi bukuatshisha bowa!" 
Hebrews10:32 Nuvuluke munuvua kale. Amu nuenu bamane kupeta butoke bua Mvidi Mukulu, nuvua bakenga bikole, nuvua balame muoyi mushindame mu mvita." 
Hebrews10:33 Pamue apa, bavua banupenda, banukengesha ku mesu a bantu. Misangu mikuabu nuvua nuambuluisha, nukolesha ku muoyi bavuabu bakengesha nanku." 
Hebrews10:34 Bualu nuvua badisange ne bavua mu lukanu mu makenga abu. Pavuabu banunyenga bintu, nuvua bitabe ne disanka bua kubijimija. Bualu nuvua bamanye ne: tudi ne bubanji bupite buimpe budi bushala kashidi." 
Hebrews10:35 Nenku kanujimiji muoyi mushindame unudi nawu, neunupeteshe difutu dinene." 
Hebrews10:36 Nuikale ne munanunanu bua nukumbaje tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, nupete bidiye munulaye." 
Hebrews10:37 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: “Indilayi, katupa kipi, kipi menemene, nenku udi ne bua kufika neafike. Kena ujingakana nansha." 
Hebrews10:38 Kadi, muntu udi wenza bindi musue, neikale ne muoyi, bualu udi witaba. Kadi padiye upingana tshianyima, tshiena nsanka kabidi bualu buende nansha. ”" 
Hebrews10:39 Tuetu katuena bantu badi bapingana tshianyima. Kadi tudi tuitaba, tulonda njila wa lupandu." 
Hebrews11:1 Muntu udi ne ditaba ukadi ne bidiye utekemena, ukadi mumanye bidiye kayi umona." 
Hebrews11:2 Mvidi Mukulu uvua muanyishe bantu ba kale bualu bavua bitaba. 
Hebrews11:3 Ku ditaba ke kutudi bajadike ne: bintu bionsu mbabifuke ku muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku bitudi tumona mbifume ku bitudi katuyi tumona. 
Hebrews11:4 Amu bua ditaba, Ebele uvua mulambule Mvidi Mukulu mulambu mupite wa Kayine ku buimpe. Bua ditaba diende Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumubingishe bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua muanyishe malambi ende. Amu bua ditaba diende, Ebele utshidi wakula nansha yeye mumane kufua." 
Hebrews11:5 Amu bua ditaba, bakambula Enoke baya nende kua Mvidi Mukulu kayi mufue. Muntu nansha umue kena mumumone kabidi, bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumuambule bua ikale nende. Mukanda wa tshijila udi wamba ne: Enoke uvua musankishe Mvidi Mukulu kabayi banji kumuambula mulu." 
Hebrews11:6 Kadi muntu kena mua kusankisha Mvidi Mukulu padiye kayi ne ditaba. Bualu muntu udi usemena pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bua kuitaba ne: Mvidi Mukulu udiku, udi ufuta badi bamukeba." 
Hebrews11:7 Amu bua ditaba, Nowa kuteleja bivua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile bua malu avua ne bua kuenzeka, avuaye kayi muanji kumona. Kuitabaye Mvidi Mukulu, kuenza buatu. Nanku yeye ne bena diku diende kupanda. Ke muvuaye udiwula bena panu, ubinga ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu bualu uvua witaba." 
Hebrews11:8 Amu bua ditaba, Abrahame kutumikila Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumubikile. Kuyaye ku ditunga divua Mvidi Mukulu musue kumupesha bu bumpianyi. Kumukaye mu ditunga diabu, kayi mumanye kuvuaye ne bua kuya." 
Hebrews11:9 Amu bua ditaba, kusombaye bu muenyi mu ditunga divua Mvidi Mukulu mumulaye. Kusombaye mu nzubu ya ntenta ne Izake kabidi ne Yakobe, bavua bapeta dilaya dia momumue kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews11:10 Bualu Abrahame uvua mutekemene tshimenga tshivua ne tshitaku tshishindame tshidi Mvidi Mukulu muase bilondeshile meji ende. 
Hebrews11:11 Amu bua ditaba, Abrahame kupeta bukole bua kulela, nansha mukavuaye mukulakaje. Sara kabidi kavua mua kulela to. Abrahame uvua mushindike ne: Mvidi Mukulu neakumbaje bivuaye mulaye." 
Hebrews11:12 Nenku muntu umue ewu, uvua mumane kuikala bu mufue, kulela ndelanganyi ya bungi, bungi kabuyi kubala, bu mitotu ya mu diulu, bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Hebrews11:13 Bantu bonsu aba, mbafue mu ditaba. Kabavua bapeta bivua Mvidi Mukulu mubalaye. Kadi bavua babimone, bisankisha pa bule, bamba ne: tudi bena tshimuangi ne bena luendu pa buloba." 
Hebrews11:14 Bantu badi bakula nanku, badi baleja patoke mudibu bakeba ditunga diabu." 
Hebrews11:15 Bu bobu banyingalala bua ditunga divuabu bashiye, batata ne mushindu wa kupinganamu." 
Hebrews11:16 Kadi batata bajinga ditunga ditambe buimpe, mbuena kuamba ne: ditunga dia mu diulu. Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu kayi umvua bundu padibu bamubikila ne: mMvidi Mukulu wetu, bualu mmubalongoluele tshimenga." 
Hebrews11:17 Amu bua ditaba diende, Abrahame kufila Izake bu mulambu, pavua Mvidi Mukulu mumutete. Uvua muitabe bua kulambula muanende mulela umue," 
Hebrews11:18 nansha muvua Mvidi Mukulu mumulaye, mumuambile ne: “Neupete ndelanganyi imvua mukulaye kudi Izake.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Abrahame uvua wela meji ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole bua kubisha Izake ku lufu. Ke muvua Abrahame mupete tshiakabidi Izake bu muntu mubike ku bafue. 
Hebrews11:20 Amu bua ditaba diende kabidi, Izake utata muele Yakobe ne Esawu lupemba, bua matuku atshivua kumpala." 
Hebrews11:21 Amu bua ditaba, Yakobe utata muele bana bonsu babidi ba Yozefe lupemba pavuaye upunga ne lufu. Utata mueyemene ku lusongu lua dikombu diende, utendelela Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews11:22 Amu bua ditaba, Yozefe pakavuaye pa kufua, uvua umanyisha bena Izrayele muvuabu ne bua kupatuka mu Ejipitu. Utata ubaleja kabidi bivuabu ne bua kuenza ne mifuba yende." 
Hebrews11:23 Amu bua ditaba diabu, baledi ba Moshe bavua bamusokoke ngondu isatu kunyima kua diledibua diende. Bualu batata bamone ne: muana ewu mmulengele. Nanku kabavua batshina mukenji wa mukalenga nansha." 
Hebrews11:24 Amu bua ditaba, Moshe mumane kukola, kavua musue bua bamubikile kabidi ne: mmuana wa muana wa bakaji wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
Hebrews11:25 Utata muanyishe bua banukengeshe pamue ne bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu pa mutu pa kusankaye mu malu mabi. 
Hebrews11:26 Utata muele meji ne: bobu bampetule mutotabu bapetule Kristu, ndi mpeta tshiuma tshidi tshipite biuma bia mu Ejipitu. Bualu mesu ende avua atangila amu difutu divuaye muindile kumpala." 
Hebrews11:27 Amu bua ditaba, Moshe kumuka ku Ejipitu kayi utshina tshiji tshia mukalenga. Utata ne muoyi mukole, bu muntu udi umona Mvidi Mukulu udi kayi umueneka." 
Hebrews11:28 Amu bua ditaba, kujadikaye bua kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. Kutumaye diyi bua bamiamine mashi ku biibi, bua mutumibue wa lufu kashipi banabute ba bena Izrayele." 
Hebrews11:29 Amu bua ditaba diabu, bena Izrayele kusabuka Mayi manene makunze bu mudibu benda mu buloba buume. Kadi pavua bena Ejipitu batete mua kusabuka, kudinabu mu mayi." 
Hebrews11:30 Amu bua ditaba, bimana bia Yeriko kupona panshi pavua bena Izrayele banyungulukila tshimenga matuku muanda mutekete." 
Hebrews11:31 Amu bua ditaba, Rakabe, mukaji muena tshiendenda, kavua mufue pamue ne bena tshimenga bavua babenge Mvidi Mukulu, bualu mukaji awu uvua muakidile batentekedi ne muoyi muimpe." 
Hebrews11:32 Nengambe tshinyi kabidi? Tshiena ne diba dia kumvuija malu a Ngideyone, a Barake, a Shimeshone, a Yefete, a Davide, a Samuwele ne a bambi." 
Hebrews11:33 Bua ditaba diabu, kukuatabu matunga, kuenzabu malu makane, kupetabu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye. Kubuikilabu mukana mua ntambue," 
Hebrews11:34 kujimabu tupia tukole, kupandukabu ku muele wa mvita. Batua kabayi dikanda kupetabu bukole. Bavua bilobu bia mvita. Kutshimunabu bikulu bia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Hebrews11:35 Amu bua ditaba diabu, bakaji kumona muvuabu bapingaje bafue babu bamane kubabisha ku bafue. Bavua bakengeshe bakuabu too ne ku lufu. Kadi bavua babenga bua bantu kababasungididi bua bamone mua kubika ku lufu, bapeta muoyi mupiamupia udi mutambe buimpe." 
Hebrews11:36 Bavua baseka bakuabu, babakuma mikaba, bavua basuika bakuabu ne nkanu, babela mu nzubu wa lukanu." 
Hebrews11:37 Bavua bashipe bamue ne mabue, bapanda bakuabu ne nsele bipesa bibidi, anyi babashipa ne muele. Bavua baya eku ne eku bavuale biseba bia mikoku anyi bia mbuji. Bavua bapele. Bavua babakengesha, babanyanga bibi." 
Hebrews11:38 Buloba kabuvua buakanyine bantu abu! Bavua bendakana mu bipeta ne mu mikuna, basomba mu mbuebue ne mu mena mu buloba." 
Hebrews11:39 Bantu bonsu aba, Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubanyishe bua ditaba diabu. Kadi ka-bavua bapete tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye." 
Hebrews11:40 Nanku, bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu mudianjile kutulongoluela malu mapite buimpe, kavua musue bua bafike ku bujima buabu tuetu katuyi nabu." 
Hebrews12:1 Tuetu kabidi, badi batunyunguluka kudi tshisumbu tshinene etshi tshia badi bitabe Mvidi Mukulu. Nenku tumbushayi malu onsu adi atupumbisha mua kutungunuka. Tulekele mibi idi itukuata lukasa. Tunyemene ne muoyi mushindame mu njila udibu batuleja." 
Hebrews12:2 Tutangile Yezu, mfuki wa ditaba dietu, udi mua kudifikisha kabidi ku bujima buadi. Bua kupeta disanka divuabu bamulamine, kuitabaye bua bamushipe ku mutshi mutshiamakane, kayi umvua bundu bua lufu lua mushindu ewu. Mpindiewu udi musombe ku dia balume dia nkuasa wa butumbi wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews12:3 Elanganayi meji kudiye, muvuaye muanyishe bua benji ba malu mabi bamubenge bibi nanku. Nanku kanujimiji ditekemena, kanutekeshi mu maboku." 
Hebrews12:4 Bualu nudi nuluisha mibi, kadi kanuena banji kuluangana too ne ku lufu." 
Hebrews12:5 Nukadi bapue muoyi, miaku idi Mvidi Mukulu unukolesha nuenu bana bende, nayi ku muoyi anyi? “Muananyi kupetudi dinyoka didi Maweja-Nangila ukubela nadi. Kuteketshi mu maboku padiye ukutandisha." 
Hebrews12:6 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi unyoka udiye munange, udi ukuma muntu yonsu udiye wakidila bu muanende. ”" 
Hebrews12:7 Numvue makenga enu ne lutulu bualu ke adi anulongesha malu. Bualu makenga aa adi ajadika ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi unuenzela bu bana bende. Kudi muana udi tatuende kayi unyoka anyi? 
Hebrews12:8 Pikalabu kabayi banunyoka mudibu banyoka bana bonsu, nenku kanuena bana bende menemene to, kadi nudi bana ba kunga." 
Hebrews12:9 Tuvuluke batatuetu ba pa buloba! Bavua batunyoka, tuetu kubanemeka. Nenku tudi ne bua kutumikila Tatu wetu wa mu diulu bipitshidile, bua tuikale ne muoyi." 
Hebrews12:10 Batatuetu ba pa buloba bavua batunyoka bua tshitupa tshipi, muvuabu bamone ne ke bidi bimpe. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi utunyoka bua kutuenzela bimpe, bua tuikale ba tshijila bu Yeye." 
Hebrews12:11 Diba didibu batunyoka, tudi dibungama, katuena tusanka to. Kadi kunyima, bavuabu banyoka balengeja nanku, badi bakuama bimuma bia ditalala, ne bia malu mimpe." 
Hebrews12:12 Nenku bandishayi bianza bienu bidi bipungile, koleshayi mikolu yenu idi mitekete!" 
Hebrews12:13 Endayi mu njila milulame bua dikasa didi ditebuka kadikoyoboki, kadi disangale." 
Hebrews12:14 Nudikolele bua numvuangane bimpe ne bantu bonsu. Nuikale bantu ba tshijila. Bualu kanuyi nuenza nanku, kanuena mua kumona Mfumu to." 
Hebrews12:15 Dimukayi bua muntu kabengi dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu ununanga nadi. Muntu nansha umue kadienji bu mutshi wa bululu udi utoloka, ulewula bantu ba bungi ne lulengu luawu." 
Hebrews12:16 Muntu nansha umue kikadi muena malu a bundu, nansha munyangi wabintu bia tshijila, bu muvua Esawu mupane bukulu buende ku dilongu amu dimue dia biakudia." 
Hebrews12:17 Nudi bamanye ne: kunyima kua matuku, pavuaye musue bua tatuende amuele lupemba, bakamubenga. Bualu kavua mupete mushindu wa kukudimuna malu avuaye muenze, nansha muvuaye ulomba ne binsonji ku mesu." 
Hebrews12:18 Nuenu kanuena basemena bu bena Izrayele pabuipi ne mukuna udibu mua kulenga. Kanuena bamone kapia kakole, bufike ne miidima, tshipepele tshikole." 
Hebrews12:19 Kanuena bumvue muadi wa mpungi nansha tshiona tshia diyi. Pavua bena Izrayele bumvua diyi edi, bavua balomba bua kababambidi kabidi malu." 
Hebrews12:20 Bualu batua batshina bikole mukenji wa ne: “Muntu yonsu walenga mukuna, nansha nyama mene, nebamuase mabue, bamushipe.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Bualu buvuabu bamone buvua bubakuatshisha bowa bikole bipite. Ke mutua Moshe muambe ne: “Ndi nzakala, bualu ndi ne bowa bua bungi.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Kadi nuenu nudi basemena pabuipi ne mukuna wa Siyone, kabidi ne tshimenga tshia Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, ke Yerushalayime wa mu diulu, muaba udi batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu binunu ne binunu." 
Hebrews12:23 Nudi basemena pabuipi ne tshisangilu tshia tshibilu tshia banabute ba Mvidi Mukulu badi ne mena abu mafunda mulu. Nudi basemena pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu, mulumbuluishi wa bantu bonsu. Nudi basemena pabuipi ne mieyelu ya bantu batata benze bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, bafike ku bujima buabu." 
Hebrews12:24 Nudi basemena pabuipi ne Yezu, mutuangaji wa ndondu mupiamupia, kabidi pabuipi ne mashi ende atota mamate panshi, adi akula ne diyi dipite dia Ebele." 
Hebrews12:25 Nanku nudimuke! Kanubengi kuteleja udi wakula nenu. Bantu bavua babenga kuteleja muntu uvua ubabela pa buloba mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, batata bapete dinyoka. Nanku tuetu nangananga nebatunyoke patudi tubenga udi utuambila diyi didi difume mulu." 
Hebrews12:26 Diba adi, diyi diende divua dizakaje buloba. Kadi mpindiewu udi utulaya ne: “Nenzakeje musangu wa ndekelu, ki anu buloba nkayabu, kadi ne diulu kabidi.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Miaku eyi: “Musangu wa ndekelu,” idi ileja ne: bintu bidibu bafuke nebizakale, bijimine, bua tshidi katshiyi tshizakala tshishale kashidi." 
Hebrews12:28 Nenku tuele Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bualu tudi tupeta bukalenga budi kabuyi buzakala. Tumuele tuasakidila pa kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu udi umusankisha. Tumutumikile, tumutshine." 
Hebrews12:29 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu wetu udi kapia kadi kubutula. 
Hebrews13:1 Nunangangane ne dinanukila bualu nudi bana babu ne Kristu. 
Hebrews13:2 Nuvuluke ne: nudi ne bua kuakidila bimpe benyi badi bamvuila. Bualu bamue bavua benze nanku bavua bakidile batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu kabayi bamanye. 
Hebrews13:3 Nuenzele badi mu nzubu wa lukanu bu munutota mua kujinga bua banuenzele mu lukanu. Nuvuluke badibu bakengesha bualu nudi penu ne mubidi. 
Hebrews13:4 Banemeke dibaka kudi bantu bonsu. Bena dibaka balamatangane. Mvidi Mukulu nealumbuluishe benji ba malu a bundu ne bena buendenda. 
Hebrews13:5 Mu nsombelu wenu, kanuikadi ne lukuka lua biuma. Nusanke ne binudi nabi, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmuambe ne: “Tshiena nkulekela, tshiena nkushiya nkayebe nansha kakese. ”" 
Hebrews13:6 Ke patudi tujadika ne muoyi mushindame ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi ungambuluisha, tshiena ntshina tshintu nansha tshimue. Tshidi muntu mua kungenzela ntshinyi? ”" 
Hebrews13:7 Vulukayi balombodi benu ba kale, bavua banumanyishe muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nuvuluke muvuabu basombe panu, nuvuluke lufu luabu. Nuidikije ditaba diabu." 
Hebrews13:8 Yezu Kristu udi momumue makelela, lelu ne tshiendelele." 
Hebrews13:9 Kanumbuki mu njila mulelela, bua kuitaba malongesha mashilangane adi kaayi etu. Bidi bimpe bua dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu utunanga nadi dikoleshe muoyi wetu, mikenji idi itangila biakudia kayena mua kuenza nanku. Badi bitabe mikenji ya mushindu ewu, katshia kabena mua kupeta kantu nansha kakese." 
Hebrews13:10 Batuangaji badi benza mudimu muaba wa tshijila wa bena Yuda kabena mua kudia bidibu balambula pa tshilambuilu tshietu. 
Hebrews13:11 Mutuangaji munene wa bena Yuda udi ubuela ne mashi a nyama muaba wa tshijila menemene bua kualambula bu mulambu wa kujimija nawu mibi. Kadi nyama eyi badi bayoshela ku mpenga kua mitanda. 
Hebrews13:12 Ke pavua Yezu kabidi mufuile pa mpenga pa tshimenga, bua enze bena tshisamba tshiende bantu ba tshijila ku mashi ende." 
Hebrews13:13 Nenku tuyayi kudiye ku mpenga kua mitanda, batupepeje muvuabu bamupepeje yeye." 
Hebrews13:14 Bualu katuena ne tshimenga panuapa tshidi tshishala kashidi. Kadi tudi tukeba tshimenga tshidi kumpala. 
Hebrews13:15 Nanku batumbishe Mvidi Mukulu diba dionsu. Ke wetu mulambu utudi tumulambula kudi Yezu. Mmomumue ne: tusamune dina diende mukana muetu katuyi tulekela. 
Hebrews13:16 Kanupu muoyi bua kuenza malu mimpe, kabidi bua kuambuishangana, bualu milambu ya nenku ke idi isankisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hebrews13:17 Nutumikile balombodi benu, nubakokele. Bualu diba dionsu badi balame mioyi yenu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu neabalumbuluishe, neabele nkonku pa mudimu wabu. Panuikala babatumikile nebakumbaje mudimu wabu ne disanka. Tshianana nebaukumbaje ne dibungama. Abi kabiena mua kunupetesha kantu." 
Hebrews13:18 Nutulombele kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Bualu tudi bajadike mudi kondu ketu ka munda kakayi katupisha, bualu tudi tujinga kuenza bimpe diba dionsu." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndi nnusengelela ne: nundombele nangananga kudi Mvidi Mukulu, anyishe bua meme kupingana kunudi pa lukasa." 
Hebrews13:20 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubishe ku lufu Mfumu wetu Yezu, udi mulami munene wa mikoku, ku mashi a mulambu wende, adi ajadika ndondu wa tshiendelele." 
Hebrews13:21 Mvidi Mukulu wa bupole anupe bukole bua kuenza malu onsu adi mimpe bua nukumbaje tshidiye musue. Enze munda muetu malu adi amusankisha, kudi Yezu Kristu, udi ne butumbi mu nkama ne nkama ya bidimu. Amene." 
Hebrews13:22 Bana hetu, ndi nnulomba ne: nuteleje ne lutulu miaku eyi ya kunukolesha nayi ku muoyi, bualu malu andi munufundile mu mukanda ewu kaena matambe bule." 
Hebrews13:23 Ndi musue bua numanye ne: mbakopole muanetu Timote ’ mu lukanu. Pafikaye lukasa, netufike nende bua kunumona." 
Hebrews13:24 Nuele balombodi benu bonsu muoyi, kabidi ne bantu bakuabu bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Bana hetu ba mu Italiya badi banuela mioyi." 
Hebrews13:25 Dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu dishindame munda muenu bonsu. 
James1:1 Meme Yakobe, muena mudimu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne wa Mfumu Yezu Kristu, ndi ngela bantu bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu badi batangalake pa buloba bujima mioyi." 
James1:2 Bana hetu, nudimone bena diakalenga menemene, padi makenga a mishindu yonsu anukuata." 
James1:3 Bualu nudi bamanye ne: padibu bateta ditaba dienu, nudilama bimpe, nedinufikishe ku dinanukila." 
James1:4 Kadi dinanukila dienu edi didi ne bua kudileja patoke mu malu onsu, bua nuikale bantu ba malu mimpe tshishiki, badi kabayi bakenga kantu." 
James1:5 Kadi padi muntu wa kunudi ubula meji, aalombe kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Neamupeshewu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi upesha bonsu ne kalolo kabidi ne disanka." 
James1:6 Kadi aalombe ne ditaba, kayi wela mpata. Bualu muntu udi wela mpata mmufuanangane ne mavuala a mayi manene adi lupepele lujula, lutuma eku ne eku." 
James1:7 Muntu wa nanku kena mua kutekemena kantu kudi Mfumu. 
James1:8 Bualu muntu udi wela mpata, udi wenda utetuka mu bionsu bidiye wenza." 
James1:9 Muanetu mupele asanke, bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi umubandisha kulu." 
James1:10 Muanetu muena biuma asanke, bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi umupuekesha panshi. Bualu muena biuma neafube lukasa, bu tshilongu tshia mu mpata." 
James1:11 Diba didi dibanda ne luya luadi, diumisha bisosa. Tshilongu tshidi tshipona panshi, bulenga buatshi budi bujika. Ke mudi muena biuma ujimina munkatshi mua midimu yende." 
James1:12 Muntu udi ulama ditaba padibu bamuteta, mmuena diakalenga. Yeye mumane kuleja muoyi mukole, neapete nsala wa kalumbandi. Nsala awu ke muoyi udi Mvidi Mukulu mulaye bonsu badi bamunanga." 
James1:13 Padibu bateta muntu, kambi ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi unteta.” Bualu kabena mua kuteta Mvidi Mukulu kudi bubi. Yeye mene kena uteta muntu nansha umue." 
James1:14 Kadi badi bateta muntu, padi majinga ende mabi amulobesha, amukuata mu buteyi." 
James1:15 Pashishe majinga mabi adi akidila bubi munda, alela bubi. Padi bubi bumane kukola, budi bulela lufu." 
James1:16 Bana hetu bananga, kanudishimi to." 
James1:17 Mapa malenga onsu ne bintu bimpe bionsu bidi bituluka mu diulu, mbifuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu, Mufuki wa miendu ya mulu. Mvidi Mukulu kena ushintuluka; munda muende kamuena miidima; butoke buende kabuena bukepa." 
James1:18 Ku disua diende mmutupe muoyi ku muaku wende mulelela, bua tupete muaba wa kumpala munkatshi mua bifukibua biende bionsu." 
James1:19 Bana hetu basuibue, vulukayi bimpe bindi ngamba: muntu yonsu ateleje lukasa, kadi kena mua kuakula pa lukasa nansha. Kabidi kafiki munda lubilu." 
James1:20 Bualu muntu ne tshiji, kena wenza malu adi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
James1:21 Nanku bengayi bibidilu bibi bionsu, ne malu mabi a mishindu yonsu. Nuanyishe ne bupuekele muaku udi Mvidi Mukulu ukuna mu mioyi yenu, bualu udi mua kunusungidila." 
James1:22 Kanudidingi: kanuena mua kuteleja muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu patupu, kanuyi nuenza mene bidiwu unulomba." 
James1:23 Bualu muntu udi uteleja muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, kayi wenza bidiwu umuambila, udi mafuanangane ne muntu udi uditangila mu lumuenu, udimona muende mudiye." 
James1:24 Kadi yeye mumane kudimona nanku katupa, udi uya, upua muoyi diakamue muvuaye." 
James1:25 Kadi muntu udi ukenketa ne ntema mikenji mimpe idi itupikula, kayi uyiteleja patupu amu bua kuyipua muoyi, kadi uyenza, muntu awu Mvidi Mukulu neamuele lupemba mu midimu yende." 
James1:26 Padi muntu wela meji ne: ndi nnemeka Mvidi Mukulu, kayi ulama ludimi luende, udi udishima. Dinemeka diende dia Mvidi Mukulu kadiena ne mushinga nansha mukese." 
James1:27 Bantu badi banemeka Mvidi Mukulu Tatu menemene, ke badi bambuluisha bana ba nshiya, ne bakaji bakamba, mu makenga abu, badilama ku bubi buonsu budi bufuma panu." 
James2:1 Bana hetu, nuenu badi bitaba Yezu Kristu, Mfumu wetu wa butumbi, kanuena mua kusungulujangana." 
James2:2 Tutele tshilejilu: muntu mubanji udi ubuela mu tshisangilu tshienu, muele kakanu ka tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku munu, muvuale bilamba bimpe. Kadi mupele, muvuale bilamba bisunsuke, kabidi udi ubuelamu." 
James2:3 Nudi nupita kunemeka muntu udi muvuale bilamba bimpe, numuamba ne: “Sombela apa mu nkuasa muimpe.” Kadi nudi nuamba mupele ne: “Wewe imana kulu; nansha somba panshi ku makasa kuanyi eku.”" 
James2:4 Panudi nuenza nanku, nudi nusungululangana, nuleja kasungasunga kadi kafuma ku meji mabi." 
James2:5 Bana hetu basuibue, telejayi: Mvidi Mukulu mmusungule bapele ba panu, bua bikale bena biuma mu ditaba, bapete Bukalenga buvua Mvidi Mukulu mulaye badi bamunanga." 
James2:6 Kadi nuenu nudi nupetula bapele! Badi banukengesha, banufila miaba idibu balambuluisha bantu, ki mbena biuma anyi?" 
James2:7 Bobu ke badi bapenda dina dimpe didi Mvidi Mukulu munupe. 
James2:8 Bushuwa, nudi nuenza bimpe, panudi nutumikila mikenji ya Bukalenga, mudi Mukanda wa tshijila uyilongesha ne: “Unange muntu nebe, bu muudi mudinange. ”" 
James2:9 Kadi panuikala nusungululangana, nudi nuenza bibi. Mikenji idi inupisha, bualu kanuena nuyitumikila." 
James2:10 Bualu padi muntu utumikila mikenji mikuabu, ulekela umue, udi ushipa mikenji yonsu." 
James2:11 Bualu uvua muambe ne: “Kuenji malu a bundu,” ke uvua muambe kabidi ne: “Kushipi muntu ” Nanku paudi wepuka buendenda, kadi ushipa muntu, udi ushipa mikenji." 
James2:12 Akulayi, enzayi malu, bu bantu badibu ne bua kulumbuluisha kudi mikenji idi itupikula ku bupika." 
James2:13 Bualu muntu uvua kayi mufuile muanabu luse, Mvidi Mukulu neamulumbuluishe, kayi umufuila luse. Muntu uvua muleje luse, udi mua kutekemena luse kudi Mvidi Mukulu, mumukosedi wa nsambu." 
James2:14 Bana hetu, padi muntu wamba ne: “Ndi ngitaba,” kayi uleja ditaba mu bidiye wenza, neapete tshinyi? Ditaba dia nanku didi mua kumusungidila anyi?" 
James2:15 Tutele tshilejilu tshia muanenu wa balume, nansha wa bakaji. Padiye ukengela bivualu, nansha kayi ne biakudia bikumbane," 
James2:16 wewe mumuambile ne: “Waya bimpe, uye kuvuala bilamba bia kupeta luya, udie, ukute!” kuyi umupesha bidiye ukengela, miaku yebe idi imulengelela ku tshinyi?" 
James2:17 Ke mudi kabidi ditaba. Padidi nkayadi, kadiyi didileja mu bitudi tuenza, ndifue." 
James2:18 Kadi padi muntu wamba ne: “Muntu umue udi ne ditaba, mukuabu udi wenza malu,” nemmuandamune ne: “Undeje mudi muntu mua kuitaba, kayi wenza malu. Nanku meme nenkuleje ku bindi ngenza mundi ngitaba.”" 
James2:19 Udi witaba ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi amu umue. Bidi bimpe. Mikishi mibi idi itaba kabidi nanku, izakala ne bowa." 
James2:20 Kadi wewe udi muntu mubule lungenyi! Udi musue bua nkujadikile ne: ditaba, didi kadiyi didileja mu bitudi tuenza, didi tshianana anyi?" 
James2:21 Nkambua wetu Abrahame, Mvidi Mukulu mmumubingishe bua tshinyi? mBua bivuaye muenze, bualu uvua mulambule muanende Izake pa tshilambuilu." 
James2:22 Udi mumone ne: ditaba dia Abrahame ne bivuaye muenze bidi bienda pamue. Ditaba diende divua dienda dishindama tshishiki ku malu avuaye wenza. 
James2:23 Ke miaku ya mu Mukanda wa tshijila kukumbanayi ne: “Abrahame uvua mutekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu mumubingishe bua ditaba diende.” Ke Mvidi Mukulu kumuinyika ne: “Mulunda wanyi. ” 
James2:24 Nanku nudi numona ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ubingisha muntu bua malu adiye wenza, ki mbua ditaba nkayadi to." 
James2:25 Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu mubingishe kabidi Rakabe, mukaji muena tshiendenda, bua bivuaye muenze. Bualu uvua muakidile bimpe batentekedi ba bena Yuda, mubanyemeshile ku njila mukuabu." 
James2:26 Bualu bu mudi mubidi ufua padiwu kauyi ne mueyelu wa muoyi, ke mudi ditaba difua, padidi kadiyi didileja mu bitudi tuenza." 
James3:1 Bana hetu, kanujingi kuikala ba bungi ku bulongeshi. Bualu nudi bamanye ne: tuetu balongeshi, nebatulumbuluishe ne disu dikole, bipite mudibu balumbuluisha bakuabu." 
James3:2 Tudi tuenza bonsu bibi mishindu mishilangane. Kadi padi muntu kayi wakula muaku mubi musangu nansha umue, awu mmuntu wa nsongu. mMumanye kabidi mua kukanda mubidi wende mujima." 
James3:3 Patudi tuela tubalu nkanu ku mbanga, bua tuitabe bitudi tutuenzeja, tudi mua kuludika mubidi watu mujima." 
James3:4 Tuele meji kabidi ku majuwa: nansha wowu mapite bunene, nansha lupepele lukole luasaka, tshiamu tshikese tshidi tshialudika, bua aye konsu kudi muendeshi musue." 
James3:5 Ke mudi ludimi tshitupa tshikese menemene tshia mubidi, kadi ludi mua kuditemba bua malu manene adilu luenza. Tuvuluke mudi kapia kakese mua kosha difu dinene!" 
James3:6 Ludimi ludi bu kapia. Ludi tshimamuende wa bubi budi mu mubidi wetu, budi mua kutunyanga muetu muonsu mutudi. Ludi lutushidisha matuku onsu atudi pa buloba ne kapia kadi kafuma mu dijimba mene dia kapia." 
James3:7 Muntu mmupete mushindu wa kutekesha nyama yonsu ya lonji, nyunyi, bilandadi, ne minyinyi ya mu mayi." 
James3:8 Kadi katshia muntu nansha umue kena muanji kupeta mushindu wa kutekesha ludimi. Ludi tshintu tshibi tshidibu kabayi mua kuimanyika, tshiuwule ne lulengu lua lufu." 
James3:9 Tudi tuela nalu Maweja-Nangila Tatu wetu tuasakidila. Kadi tudi tutshipa nalu bantu badi Mvidi Mukulu mufuke ku tshimfuanyi tshiende. 
James3:10 Mukana mumue mudi mupatuka miaku ya kuela tuasakidila ne ya kutshipa. Bana hetu, kanuenji nanku." 
James3:11 Mpokolu nansha umue kena mua kupatula mayi mimpe ne mayi mabi muaba wa momumue. 
James3:12 Bana hetu, mutshi wa mfiku kawena mua kukuama bimuma bia olive. Monji wa mvinyo kawena mua kukuama bimuma bia mfiku. Mpokolu wa mayi a luepu kena mua kupatula mayi kaayi ne luepu." 
James3:13 Munkatshi muenu mudi muntu wa meji ne wa lungenyi anyi? Abileje ku malu mimpe adiye wenza, ku butalale bua malu, ne ku meji adiye ufila." 
James3:14 Kadi padi muoyi wenu mumane kunyanguka ne lubabu, ne lungenyi lua difuilakana mianzu, kanuditambishi bua meji to. Kanushimi, kanuvidi malu adi malelela." 
James3:15 Bualu meji a nanku kaena afuma mu diulu. Adi a panu, aleja bubi bua bantu, afuma kudi diabolu." 
James3:16 Bualu muaba udi lubabu ne difuilakana dia mianzu, ke udi kabidi tshimvundu ne buenzavi bua mishindu yonsu." 
James3:17 Kadi meji a kulu kaena kalema. Adi akeba bupole, akidila bantu bimpe, aleja musangelu, afuila bantu luse, enza malu mimpe mavule. Kaena adiwula muntu, kaena ne mioyi ibidi." 
James3:18 Lutete lua meji ludi lutoloka munkatshi mua badi bakeba ditalala. Ke muaba udilu lukuama bimuma bia malu mimpe. 
James4:1 Mvita ne matandu bidi munkatshi muenu mbifume penyi? mBifume ku majinga mabi adi aluangana munda muenu, kaayi apungila." 
James4:2 Nudi nujinga tshintu, kadi kanuena mua kutshipeta. Ke panudi nukeba kushipangana. Nudi nualakana tshintu, kanuyi mua kutshipeta. Ke panudi nutandangana, nuluangana mvita. Kanuena ne binudi nukengela, bualu kanuena nubilomba kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
James4:3 Panudi nulomba, kanuena nupeta, bualu meji anudi nubilomba nawu, adi mabi. Nudi basue kubipeta bua kudisankisha amu nkayenu." 
James4:4 Nuenu nudi bantu badi babenga Mvidi Mukulu! Kanuena bamanye ne: kunanga bia panu nkubenga Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Udi unanga bia panu, udi musue kudienza muluishi wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
James4:5 Nuvuluke mudi Mikanda ya tshijila yamba pa bualu ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi ne mukawu. Udi musue bua mueyelu udiye muteke munda muetu udileje patoke. ” 
James4:6 Kadi bu mudi Mvidi Mukulu utunanga, udi utusankisha kabidi bipite. Ke padi Mikanda ya tshijila yamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi ubenga bena ditambisha, kadi udi wanyisha bapuekele. ”" 
James4:7 Nanku tumikilayi Mvidi Mukulu. Tuilayi diabolu nkanana, bua anunyeme, aye kule!" 
James4:8 Semenayi kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku Yeye neasemene kunudi. Nuenu bena mibi, owayi bianza bienu. Nuenu bena mpala ibidi, shindikayi mioyi yenu kudi Mvidi Mukulu nkayende!" 
James4:9 Lejayi dibungama, nudile muadi, nutue mikemu. Lekelayi kuseka, nudile. Lekelayi kusanka, nubungame." 
James4:10 Nudipuekeshe kumpala kua Mfumu. Yeye neanubandishe. 
James4:11 Bana hetu, kanujananganyi to. Udi ujana muanabu, nansha umupisha, udi ujana mikenji, nansha uyipisha. Kadi paudi upisha mikenji, kuena uyitumikila kabidi, bualu udi uyitangila bu mibi." 
James4:12 Amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende udi wela mikenji; amu Yeye ke udi mua kulumbuluisha. Yeye nkayende udi mua kuhingisha, nansha kupisha. Wewe mene udi upisha muanenu, udi nganyi?" 
James4:13 Mpindiewu ndi nnubela, nuenu badi bamba ne: “Lelu, nansha maloba, netuye mu tshimenga kampanda. Netusombemu tshidimu tshijima, tuende mushinga, tupete mateta.”" 
James4:14 Kanuena bamanye bidi mua kunuenzekela maloba! Bualu nudi bu dibungi dikese didi dimueneka katupa, ditenduka." 
James4:15 Nuvua mua kuamba ne: “Pasua Mvidi Mukulu, netuikale ne muoyi, netuenze etshi, netuenze tshiatshia.”" 
James4:16 Kadi mpindiewu nudi nuditambisha, nudiela mulu. Budiambi bua nanku mbubi." 
James4:17 Nanku muntu udi mumanye bualu buimpe budiye ne bua kuenza, ubenga kubuenza, mmuena tshibawu." 
James5:1 Mpindiewu ndi nnubela nuenu, bena biuma! Dilayi, nutue mikemu, bualu makenga neanukuate!" 
James5:2 Biuma bienu mbibole. Misuasua neyidie bilamba bienu. 
James5:3 Biamu bienu bia mpawungi, ne biamu bienu bitoke bia mushinga mukole mbikuate dimoma. Dimoma edi nedinupishe, dioshe mubidi wenu bu kapia. Tukadi matuku a nshikidilu. Nutshidi amu nukungija biuma!" 
James5:4 Kanuena bafute bena mudimu badi bakuate mudimu mu madimi enu. Nuteleje mudibu badila muadi! Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu mmumvue mbila ya badi banowe biakudia bienu. 
James5:5 Nuvua basombe pa buloba mu biuma ne masanka. Nudi nudia nuondoloka. Kadi dituku dia kunushipa dikadi pabuipi. 
James5:6 Nuvua bapishe, bashipeshe bantu bavua kabayi ne bualu, kabayi nansha banutuila nkanana." 
James5:7 Bana hetu, ikalayi ne lutuulu too ne pafika Mfumu. Monayi mudi tshidime windila ne lutuulu biakudia bidibu nabi dikenga menemene, too ne diba didi buloba mua kubipatula. Udi utekemena mvulambedi ne wa ndekelu." 
James5:8 Nuenu kabidi nulame lutuulu, nukoleshe muoyi, bualu dituku didi Mfumu ufika dikadi pabuipi." 
James5:9 Bana hetu, lekelayi kubipishangana, bua Mvidi Mukulu kayi unupisha. Mukoshi wa nsambu ukadi pabuipi, ukadi pa kumueneka!" 
James5:10 Bana hetu, vulukayi bambi bavua balongesha mu dina dia Mfumu. Nulonde tshilejilu tshiabu, bualu bavua balame lutuulu mu makenga." 
James5:11 Tudi tubamba ne: mbena diakalenga, bualu bavua bananukile. Nukadi bumvue muvua Yobe mulame lutuulu, kabidi muvua Mfumu mumusankishe ku ndekelu. Bualu Mfumu udi muena dinanga ne luse." 
James5:12 Nangananga, bana hetu, panudi nulaya bualu, kanuditshipi, nutela diulu, buloba, nansha tshintu tshikuabu. Panudi nuitaba, nuambe amu ne: “Eyowa.” Panudi nubenga, nuambe amu ne: “To,” bua Mvidi Mukulu kanupishi." 
James5:13 Padi umue wa kunudi ne dikenga, atendelele. Padiye ne disanka, imbe musambu, atumbishe Mvidi Mukulu." 
James5:14 Padi umue wa kunudi usama, abikile bakulu ba Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Bamulombele kudi Mfumu, bamufite manyi mu dina dia Mfumu." 
James5:15 Panudi ntendelela ne ditaba, Mvidi Mukulu neapandishe mubedi, amupingajile bukole bua mubidi, ajimije mibi yende." 
James5:16 Tondelanganayi mibi yenu. Nulombelangane kudi Mfumu, nanku nenupande. Ditendelela dia muntu udi wenza mudi Mvidi Mukulu musue, didi ne bukole bua bungi." 
James5:17 Eliya uvua muntu bu tuetu. Kutendelelaye ne munanunanu bua mvula kaloki. Mvula nansha kuloka bidimu bisatu ne tshitupa. 
James5:18 Pashishe kutendelelaye kabidi. Diulu kulokesha mvula, buloba kutolokesha bia pa madimi." 
James5:19 Bana hetu, pikala umue wa kunudi mupambuke mu njila wa bulelela, mukuabu mumupingaje mu njila muimpe," 
James5:20 mmanye ne: muntu udi mupingaje muena bubi mu njila muimpe, neamusungidile ku lufu, kabidi mibi yende mivule neyijimine." 
1Peter1:1 Meme Petro, mupostolu wa Yezu Kristu, ndi mfundila bantu badi Mvidi Mukulu musungule mukanda ewu. Nudi batangalake mu matunga makuabu bu benyi, basombe mu buloba bua Pontuse, bua Ngalatiya, bua Kapadokiya, bua Aziya, ne bua Bitiniya." 
1Peter1:2 Mvidi Mukulu Tatu mmunusungule, muvuaye mumane kujadika. Ku bukole bua Mueyelu wende nudi bantu bende, bua nutumikile Yezu Kristu, kabidi bua banulengeje ku mashi ende, nuikale zezeze. Dinanga ne bupole bishindame bikole munda muenu." 
1Peter1:3 Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu, Tatu wa Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu! Bu mudiye ne luse luvule, mmutupe muoyi mupiamupia pa kubisha Yezu Kristu ku bafue. Ke mutudi mua kutekemena bikole," 
1Peter1:4 kusanka bua bilenga bidi Mvidi Mukulu mulamine bantu bende. Bilenga abi kabiena bibola, kabiena binyanguka, kabiena bifubidila. Mvidi Mukulu mmunulaminebi mu diulu." 
1Peter1:5 Nanku mmusue kunulama ne tshianza tshiende tshikole mu njila wa ditaba, bua nupete lupandu ludi ne bua kumueneka ku ndekelu wa bidimu." 
1Peter1:6 Ke munudi nusanka, nansha munudi ne bua kubungama mpindiewu amue matuku bua makenga a mishindu yonsu adi anukuata." 
1Peter1:7 Makenga aa adi mua kujadika bukole bua ditaba dienu. Tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshidi tshintu tshia panu tshidi tshijimina. Kadi badi batshiteta mu kapia. Ke mudibu bateta mu makenga ditaba dienu, didi dipita tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku mushinga, bua kujadika bukole buadi. Nanku dituku diafika Yezu Kristu, nebanuele kalumbandi, nebanutumbishe, nebanupe lumu." 
1Peter1:8 Kanuyi banji kumona Yezu Kristu, nudi numunanga; kanuyi numumona mpindiewu, nudi numuitaba. Ke panudi nusanka nutshionkomoka kabiyi mua kuamba." 
1Peter1:9 Bualu nenupete tshinudi nuipatshila mu ditaba dienu: ke lupandu lua mioyi yenu. 
1Peter1:10 Bambi bavua bakeba bakebulula bua kumanya mudi lupandu elu. Bavua bambila bantu mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu ne: Maweja-Nangila neanupeteshelu. 
1Peter1:11 Bavua bakeba kumanya mushindu ne diba bivua bionsu, bivua Mueyelu mubambile, mua kuenzeka. Bualu Mueyelu, uvua ukuata mudimu munda muabu, uvua mudianze kubamanyisha makenga a Kristu, ne lumu luvuaye ne bua kupeta pashishe." 
1Peter1:12 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutanduile bambi abu ne: mukenji unudi ne bua kumanyisha bantu, kanuena nuulongesha bualu buenu to, kadi bua bantu bakuabu. Ke mudi bakobodi ba Lumu lua Disanka banumanyishelu mpindiewu ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila udi Mvidi Mukulu mulume. Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu mene badi bajinga kumanya mukenji awu." 
1Peter1:13 Nanku nudilongolole bua numone mua kukuata mudimu. Nutabale muenu muonsu, batekemene bikole dipa dianupeshabu dituku diamueneka Yezu Kristu." 
1Peter1:14 Nutumikile Mvidi Mukulu. Kanulondi majinga anuvua nawu kale, panuvua kanuyi banji kumanya bulelela." 
1Peter1:15 Kadi nuikale bantu ba tshijila mu nsombelu wenu mujima, amu mudi Mvidi Mukulu udi munubikile wa tshijila." 
1Peter1:16 Bualu Mukanda wa tshijila udi ujadika ne: “Ikalayi bantu ba tshijila, bualu meme ndi wa tshijila. ”" 
1Peter1:17 Panudi ntendelela, nudi nubikila Mvidi Mukulu ne: “Tatu”. Yeye kena ne kansungasunga. Udi ukosa nsambu ya bantu amu pa yoyi, bilondeshile malu adi muntu ne mutu muenze. Nanku matuku onsu anutshidi benyi panu, nuleje Mvidi Mukulu kanemu kenu mu bionsu binudi nuenza." 
1Peter1:18 Nudi bamanye muvuabu banupikule ku nsombelu wa patupu, uvua bankambua benu banushile. Ki mbanupikule ku bintu bia lupitapita, bu mudi tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nansha tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
1Peter1:19 Kadi bavua banupikule ku mulambu wa mushinga mukole wa Kristu, uvua bu muana wa mukoku, kayi kalema, kayi katoba." 
1Peter1:20 Mvidi Mukulu kayi muanji kufuka buloba, ukavua mumane kusungula Kristu. Kadi matuku a ndekelu aa kudienzaye muntu bualu buenu." 
1Peter1:21 Kudi Kristu ke kunudi nuitabila Mvidi Mukulu, uvua mumubishe ku lufu, mumupe butumbi buende. Ke panudi nuitaba Mvidi Mukulu, nutekemena kabidi kudiye." 
1Peter1:22 Panuvua bitabe bulelela, nuvua badilengeje, bua numone mua kunanga ne muoyi umue bena ditaba nenu. Nanku nunangangane bikole, kabidi ne muoyi wenu mujima." 
1Peter1:23 mBanulele tshiakabidi, ki nkudi batatu badi bafua, kadi kudi Tatu udi ne muoyi wa tshiendelele, ku muaku wa muoyi wa Mvidi Mukulu udi ushala kashidi." 
1Peter1:24 Ke mudibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Bantu bonsu badi bu bisosa. Lumu luabu luonsu ludi amu bu bilongu bia mu mpata. Bisosa bidi biuma, bilongu bipopoka." 
1Peter1:25 Kadi muaku wa Maweja-Nangila udi ushala kashidi. ” Muaku awu ke Lumu lua Disanka luvuabu banumanyishe. 
1Peter2:1 Nanku nubenge malu mabi onsu: dishima, mpala ibidi, lubabu ne bijanu." 
1Peter2:2 Nufuane bana batekete badibu balela mpindiewu. Bu mudibu bajinga mabele, adibu kabayi basambakaja ne tshintu tshikuabu, nuenu kabidi nujinge kumanya muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu amu pa wowu, bua numone mua kukola nawu mu ditaba, kupeta lupandu." 
1Peter2:3 Bualu “nudi badijadikile mudi Maweja-Nangila mulenga mutambe,” mudibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila." 
1Peter2:4 Semenayi kudi Mfumu. Yeye ke dibue dia muoyi, divua bantu bimanshe, kadi divua Mvidi Mukulu musungule, mudiangate ne mushinga." 
1Peter2:5 Nudifile bu mabue a muoyi, bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila umone mua kuibaka nenu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku nenuikale tshisumbu tshia batuangaji ba tshijila, badi ne bua kulambula Mvidi Mukulu milambu, idi imusankisha bualu bua Yezu Kristu." 
1Peter2:6 Bualu badi bafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Ndi mudisunguile dibue dia mushinga mukole, dindi nteka mpindiewu bu dibue dia mu ditumba pa mukuna wa Siyone. Udi utekemena kudidi, kakufua bundu musangu nansha umue.”" 
1Peter2:7 Dibue edi didi dia mushinga mukole bualu buenu nuenu badi bitaba. Kadi bua badi kabayi bitaba, mbafunde ne: “Dibue divua bibaki bimanshe, ke didi dienza dibue didi diambula bujitu bujima.”" 
1Peter2:8 Muaba mukuabu mbafunde kabidi ne: “Ke dibue didi dishinda bantu, lubuebue ludi lubaponesha panshyi. ” Bantu bavua batetuka, bualu bavua babenge kuitaba muaku. Ke tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mubalongoluele." 
1Peter2:9 Kadi nuenu nudi tshisamba tshisungula. Nudi batuangaji ba Mukalenga, tshisamba tshia tshijila, bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. mBanusungule bua kumanyisha bantu malu a dikema adi Mvidi Mukulu muenze. Bualu uvua munubikile bua nupatuke mu miidima, nubuele mu butoke buende bupite buimpe." 
1Peter2:10 Kale kanuvua bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Mpindiewu nudi bantu bende. Kale kanuvua bamanye luse lua Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi mpindiewu nudi balupete. 
1Peter2:11 Bana hetu basuibue, bu munudi benyi ne bena tshimuangi panu, ndi nnulomba ne: nudilame ku majinga a buntu buenu adi aluisha muoyi wenu wa kulu." 
1Peter2:12 Nuenze malu mimpe munkatshi mua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Nanku nansha bobu banushiminyina ne: nudi benji ba malu mabi, pafika Mvidi Mukulu nebajingulule malu enu mimpe. Diba adi nebatumbishe Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Peter2:13 Mudi Mfumu musue, nuitabe muntu yonsu udi ne bumfumu. Nutumikile mukalenga wa bakalenga udi ku mutu kua bonsu." 
1Peter2:14 Nutumikile balombodi bende ba matunga, badiye mufume bua kunyoka badi benza bibi, kabidi bua kutua badi benza bimpe makumbu." 
1Peter2:15 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmusue bua nuenze malu mimpe. Nanku nenupuwishe bantu batatakane badi kabayi bamanye tshintu. 
1Peter2:16 Nuikale ne nsombelu wa bantu badi benza mudibu basue. Kadi panudi nuenza munudi basue, kanuambi ne: tudi mua kuenza kabidi malu mabi mu musokoku. Nuenze amu malu adi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu mua kuenza." 
1Peter2:17 Nunemeke bantu bonsu. Nunange bena ditaba nenu. Nutshine Mvidi Mukulu. Nunemeke mukalenga wa bakalenga. 
1Peter2:18 Nuenu bapika, tumikilayi bamfumu benu, nubanemeke muenu muonsu. Kanunemeki amu badi ne muoyi muimpe wa kalolo nutumikile ne badi ne malu makole." 
1Peter2:19 Paudi ukeba kukumbaja bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, umvua ne lutuulu makenga adibu bakukengesha nawu kapayi bualu, Mvidi Mukulu neakuele lupemba." 
1Peter2:20 Kadi paudi umvua ne lutuulu mituutu idibu bakutuuta, bualu uvua muenze bibi, udi mua kupeta lumu anyi? Nanku paudi ukenga, ulama lutuulu, bualu uvua muenze bimpe, Mvidi Mukulu neakuele lupemba." 
1Peter2:21 Ke tshidi Mvidi Mukulu munubikidile, bualu Kristu kabidi uvua mukenge bualu buenu, munushile tshilejilu, bua nulonde makasa ende." 
1Peter2:22 Kristu kavua muenze malu mabi. Bantu kabavua bamumvue musangu nansha umue wakula miaku ya dishima. 
1Peter2:23 Pa wabu bamupende, kavua mupingaje bipendu. Pavuaye ukenga, kavua ukanyina bantu. Kadi uvua utekemena amu kudi Mvidi Mukulu, udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi." 
1Peter2:24 Kristu mene uvua muambule pambidi pende mibi yetu pa mutshi mutshiamakane, bua tuetu, bafue bua bubi, tuende ne muoyi, tuenze bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. mBanuondape ku mputa ivuabu bamutape." 
1Peter2:25 Bualu nuvua bu mikoku mipambuke njila. Kadi mpindiewu mbanupingaje kudi mulami udi mua kunuludika mu njila, kulama mioyi yenu." 
1Peter3:1 Nuenu kabidi bakaji, nutumikile babayenu. Nanku bamue ba kudibu badi kabayi bitaba muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, badi mua kufika ku ditaba, pamonabu binudi nuenza. Nansha kanuyi nuamba bualu," 
1Peter3:2 nebamone munudi nubanemeka, nuenza amu malu mimpe." 
1Peter3:3 Kanukebi kudilengeja amu pambidi, bu munudi nulukisha nsuki, nuvuala bilengejilu bia mpawungi, nansha bilamba bimpe." 
1Peter3:4 Kadi buimpe buenu buikale bua mundamunda, budi kabuyi bunyanguka. Nuikale ne muoyi wa lutuulu ne wa bupole. Ke bidi ne mushinga muvule ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Peter3:5 Ke muvua bakaji ba tshijila ku kale, bavua batekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu, badilengeja bimpe, bualu bavua batumikila babayabu." 
1Peter3:6 Ke muvua Sara wenza. Uvua utumikila Abrahame, umuinyika ne: “Mfumu wanyi ”. Mpindiewu nenuikale bana bende ba bakaji, panudi nuenza malu mimpe, kanuyi nutshina kalu nansha kamue." 
1Peter3:7 Nuenu kabidi, balume, nusombe bimpe ne bakaji benu. Numanye ne: badi ne butekete. Nanku nubanemeke, bualu nebapete nenu dipa dia muoyi kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Nuenze nanku bua tshintu nansha tshimue katshieledi ditendelela dienu nkila." 
1Peter3:8 Mu tshikosu, bonsu buenu nuikale ne lungenyi lumue, kabidi ne muoyi umue. Nunangangane bu bana ba tatu ne mamu. Nuikale bantu ba muoyi mulenga, badi ne bupuekele munkatshi muabu." 
1Peter3:9 Kanupingajidianganyi bubi ku bubi. Kanupendi badi banupenda. Kadi badi banuenzela bibi, nubele lupemba, bualu diba divua Mvidi Mukulu munubikile, uvua mulaye kabidi bua kunuela lupemba." 
1Peter3:10 mBafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Muntu udi musue kusanka panu, kupeta ne diakalenga, alekele kujana bantu, alekele kushima." 
1Peter3:11 Abenge malu mabi, enze malu mimpe. Asombe talalaa ne bantu bonsu, kayi upungila." 
1Peter3:12 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi utangila badi benza malu mimpe, uteleja ditendelela diabu. Kadi udi uluisha badi benza bibi. ”" 
1Peter3:13 Panudi basuminyine kuenza malu mimpe, udi mua kunuenzela bibi nnganyi?" 
1Peter3:14 Nudi amu bena diakalenga, nansha banukengesha bua malu mimpe anudi nuenza. Kanutshinyi bantu. Kanupampakanyi." 
1Peter3:15 Kadi mu mioyi yenu nunemeke Kristu bu Mfumu wenu. Diba dionsu nuikale amu ne muoyi wa kuandamuna bonsu badi banukonka ne: nu-tumvuije ditekemena didi munda muenu. 
1Peter3:16 Kadi nubandamune ne lutuulu, kabidi ne kanemu. Nudimuke bua kondu kenu ka munda kakanupishi. Nanku badi banusonguela, banujana, bua malu mimpe anudi nuenza, bualu nudi nulonda Kristu, nebafue bundu bua bivuabu bamba abi." 
1Peter3:17 Bualu mbimpe banukengeshe, padi Mvidi Mukulu musue, bua malu mimpe anudi nuenza, pa mutu pa kunukengesha bua malu enu mabi." 
1Peter3:18 Bualu Kristu mene mmufue musangu umue bua kashidi, bualu bua mibi ya bantu. Yeye, uvua kayi ne bualu, mmufuile bena tshibawu, bua kunufikisha kudi Mvidi Mukulu. mBamushipe, bualu uvua muntu. Kadi mbamubishe ku bafue ku bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
1Peter3:19 Amu ku bukole bua Mueyelu ewu, mmuye kulongesha bavua mu kandondu ka bafue Lumu lua Disanka." 
1Peter3:20 Ke bantu bavua babenge kutumikila Mvidi Mukulu ku kale. Mvidi Mukulu uvua windila ne lutuulu, mu tshikondu tshivua Nowa muenze buatu. Bantu bakese, bonsu basanga amu muanda mukulu, ke bavua babuele mu buatu, bapandile ku mayi." 
1Peter3:21 Mayi aa adi tshimfuanyi tshia mayi mudibu banutua mpindiewu bua kunusungidila. Kabena batua muntu mu mayi aa, amu bua kumusha manyanu a pambidi. Kadi badi balomba Mvidi Mukulu bua umushe mibi yonsu idi kondu kenu ka munda kanupisha. Padibu banutua mu mayi, Mvidi Mukulu udi unusungidila, bualu Yezu Kristu mmubike ku bafue," 
1Peter3:22 mubande mu diulu, musombe ku diboku dia bukole dia Mvidi Mukulu Tatu. Ke muaba udi batumibue, mamfumu makuabu, ne makole a mu diulu bitabe bumfumu buende." 
1Peter4:1 Nudi bamanye mudi Kristu mumvue makenga mu mubidi. Ke munudi kabidi mua kukolesha muoyi, kuanyisha makenga. Bualu muntu udi umvua makenga mu mubidi, ulama lutuulu, mmubengangane ne bubi kashidi." 
1Peter4:2 Nanku bituadije ku mpindiewu, matuku anutshidi mua kusomba panu, kanulondi majinga mabi a buntu buenu. Nukebe amu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
1Peter4:3 Bualu ku kale nuvua bajimije meba mapite bungi, nuenza malu adi bantu badi kabayi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu basue kuenza. Nuvua bende mu njila mibi, balonde majinga mabi, bakuatshike maluvu, badie budiavi, banue bunuavi, batendelele mvidie mibi ya patupu." 
1Peter4:4 Mpindiewu bantu badi kabayi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu badi bakema, bualu kanuena nubuelakana kabidi nabu mu malu mabi a nanku. Ke padibu banupenda." 
1Peter4:5 Kadi bua bivuabu benza nebadilumbuluile kudi Mvidi Mukulu, ukadi pa kulumbuluisha ba muoyi ne bafue." 
1Peter4:6 Ke pavuabu bamanyishe ne bafue mene Lumu lua Disanka. Bafue aba bavua babalumbuluisha mu bantu, mudibu balumbuluisha bantu bonsu. Kadi mpindiewu mbabamanyishe Lumu lua Disanka, bua bapete ku bukole bua Mueyelu muoyi, mudi Mvidi Mukulu nawu." 
1Peter4:7 Nshikidilu wa bionsu ukadi pabuipi. Nusombe ne meji, batabale, bua numone mua kutendelela." 
1Peter4:8 Bualu bua kumpala: nunangangane ne muoyi wenu mujima. Bualu dinanga didi dijimija mibi ya bungi. 
1Peter4:9 Nuakidilangane mu nzubu yenu, kanuyi nusodia." 
1Peter4:10 Nuambuluishangane ne mapa adi yonsu wa kunudi mupete kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Ke munudi mua kuenza mudimu bimpe ne mapa mashilangane anudi bapete kudi Mvidi Mukulu nanku. 
1Peter4:11 Muntu udi ulongesha Lumu lua Disanka, amanyishe bantu miaku ya Mvidi Mukulu. Udi wambuluisha bantu, enze mudimu awu ne bukole budi Mvidi Mukulu umupesha. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu neatumbe, mu malu onsu anudi nuenza, kudi Yezu Kristu, udi ne butumbi, kabidi ne bukole tshiendelele! Amene." 
1Peter4:12 Bana hetu basuibue, kanukemi bua diteta dikole didi dinukuata. Ki mbualu bupiabupia budi kabuyi buanji kuenzeka." 
1Peter4:13 Panudi nudisanga ne Kristu mu makenga ende, nusanke. Nanku pamueneka butumbi buende, nenusanke kabidi nutshionkomoka." 
1Peter4:14 Nudi bena diakalenga, padibu banupenda bualu nudi nulonda Kristu munyima. Bualu Mueyelu wa butumbi, Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu mmunutulukile." 
1Peter4:15 Muntu nansha umue wa kunudi kabuedi mu dikenga bua ne: uvua mushipe muntu, muibe, mukengeshe bantu, nansha mubuelakane mu malu a bende." 
1Peter4:16 Kadi padi muntu ukenga, bualu udi muena Kristu, kafu bundu. Ele amu Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, bua padiye mupete dina dia muena Kristu." 
1Peter4:17 Tshikondu ntshifike tshidi Mvidi Mukulu utuadija kulumbuluisha bantu. Neadianze kulumbuluisha bantu bende. Kadi padiye ubanga kutulumbuluisha tuetu nanku, ku ndekelu badi babenga kuitaba Lumu lua Disanka neabenzele tshinyi?" 
1Peter4:18 Bualu mbafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Pikalabi bikole bua muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu kupandaye, kadi bena buenzavi ne benji ba malu mabi nebapande bishi? ”" 
1Peter4:19 Kadi Mufuki udi ukumbaja bivuaye mulaye. Nanku badi bakenga bilondeshile mudi Mvidi Mukulu musue, bananukile kuenza malu mimpe, batekemene muabu muonsu kudi Mufhki wabu." 
1Peter5:1 Bindi ngakula mpindiewu, bidi bitangila bantu ba munkatshi muenu badi bakulu ba Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba. Meme kabidi ndi mukulu. Mvua mumone ne anyi abidi makenga a Kristu. Nendisange kabidi nende mu butumbi buende bukadi pa kumueneka. Nanku ndi ngambila bakulu ne:" 
1Peter5:2 nuludike bu balami ba nsongu mikoku idi Mvidi Mukulu munupe. Mvidi Mukulu udi musue bua nuyilame bimpe ne muoyi wenu mujima, kanuyi ne tshimfulamuoyi. Nuenze mudimu muenu muonsu, kabidi ne disanka, kanuyi nukeba biuma." 
1Peter5:3 Kanukengeshi ne bumfumu bunudi nabu bantu badibu banupeshe bua nubalame. Kadi nubaleje tshilejilu tshimpe. 
1Peter5:4 Nanku pamueneka Mfumu wa balami ba mikoku, nenupete nsala wa butumbi, udi kashidi kayi ututuka." 
1Peter5:5 Nuenu kabidi bansonga, nutumikile bakulumpe. Kadi nuenu bonsu nudipuekeshe, nuambuluishangane. Bualu mbafunde mu Mukanda wa tshijila ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi uluisha bena ditambisha. Kadi udi wambuluisha ne disanka badi badipuekesha. ”" 
1Peter5:6 Nanku nudipuekeshe mu tshianza tshia bukole tshia Mvidi Mukulu, bua anubandishe tshikondu tshidiye musue." 
1Peter5:7 Muomekelayi ntatu yenu yonsu, bualu Yeye udi unulama." 
1Peter5:8 Ikalayi batabale, nudimuke! Bualu muluishi wenu diabolu udi bu nyama wa ntambue, ukungula, ukeba wa kudiaye." 
1Peter5:9 Nuikale bashindame mu ditaba, numutuile nkanana. Numanye ne: bana benu bena ditaba badi batangalake mu buloba bujima, badi bumvua makenga amu munudi nuenu numvua." 
1Peter5:10 Mvidi Mukulu mmunubikile bua nudisange nende mu butumbi buende bua kashidi, panudi nudisanga ne Kristu. Nanku nuenu bamane kukenga tshitupa tshikese, Mvidi Mukulu, mpokolu wa dinanga dionsu, neanuenze bantu ba tshijila. Neanushindike, anukoleshe bua kanutenkakanyi." 
1Peter5:11 Yeye udi ne bukole kashidi tshiendelele! Amene. 
1Peter5:12 Silase, undi ntangila bu muena ditaba netu wa muoyi umue, mmungambuluishe bua kufunda mukanda mukese ewu. Ndi musue kunukolesha ku muoyi, kunujadikila kabidi ne: nenumvue mu makenga dinanga didi Mvidi Mukulu ununanga nadi. Nushindame mu dinanga diende adi." 
1Peter5:13 Bena ditaba ba mu Tshisumbu tshidi mu Babilone, bavua Mvidi Mukulu musungule bu nuenu, badi banuela muoyi. Muananyi Marke kabidi udi unuela muoyi." 
1Peter5:13 Bena ditaba ba mu Tshisumbu tshidi mu Babilone, bavua Mvidi Mukulu musungule bu nuenu, badi banuela muoyi. Muananyi Marke kabidi udi unuela muoyi." 
1Peter5:14 Nuelangane mioyi, nupukilangane bu bena muntu. Nuenu bonsu badi badisanga ne Kristu, Mvidi Mukulu anupe bupole buende." 
2Peter1:1 Meme Simone Petro, mupostolu ne muena mudimu wa Yezu Kristu, ndi mfundila bonsu bavua bapete ditaba dia mushinga mukole dia mushindu umue ne ditudi nadi. Nudi badipete ku disua dilenga dia Mvidi Mukulu wetu ne dia Musungidi Yezu Kristu." 
2Peter1:2 Dinanga ne bupole bishindame bikole munda muenu. Nenubipete, panudi nuya kumpala mu dimanya dia Mvidi Mukulu, ne dia Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu." 
2Peter1:3 Mvidi Mukulu ku bukole buende mmutupe bionsu bitudi tukengela, bua tumone mua kukumbaja bidiye musue. Bualu bavua batumanyishe mudiye mutubikile, bua tudisange nende mu butumbi, ne mu buimpe buende." 
2Peter1:4 Ke padiye mutulaye mapa manene a mushinga mukole, bua tuetu, bamane kupeta mapa aa, tumone mua kuepuka majinga mabi a panu, adi atufikisha ku lufu, tudisange ne Mvidi Mukulu udi wa kashidi." 
2Peter1:5 Ke munudi mua kuenza muenu muonsu, bua nusakidile ku ditaba dienu nsombelu mulenga, ku nsombelu wenu mulenga dimanya," 
2Peter1:6 ku dimanya didikolela, ku didikolela dinanukila, ku dinanukila dinemeka Mvidi Mukulu," 
2Peter1:7 ku dinemeka Mvidi Mukulu diumvuangana dia buena muntu, ku diumvuangana dia buena muntu dinanga." 
2Peter1:8 Ke malu mimpe anudi ne bua kuikala nawu. Nuenu bikale nawu a bungi, neanuambuluishe bua Yezu Kristu, unudi bamanye, akuate mudimu munda muenu, anufikishe ku dikuama bimuma." 
2Peter1:9 Kadi udi kayi nawu, kena umona kule to. Udi bu mpofu. Kena uvuluka mukuabu bamujimijile mibi yende ya kale." 
2Peter1:10 Bana hetu, Mvidi Mukulu mmunubikile, mmusungule. Nanku enzayi muenu muonsu bua makanyine dibikila edi. Nuenu benze nanku, kanuakupambuka mu njila mululame." 
2Peter1:11 Ke munudi mua kubuela mu Bukalenga bua kashidi bua Mfumu wetu ne Musungidi Yezu Kristu. 
2Peter1:12 Ke pandi nnuvuluija malu aa matuku onsu, nansha nuenu bamane kuamanya, bashindame mu bulelela bunudi bapete." 
2Peter1:13 Bualu pantshidi ne muoyi apa, ndi ne bua kunuvuluija amu kunuvuluija malu aa." 
2Peter1:14 Ndi mumanye ne: nkadi pa kushiya mubidi udi ufua ewu. Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu mmummanyishe nanku. 
2Peter1:15 Ke mundi ngenza mpindiewu muanyi muonsu, bua numone mua kuvuluka kashidi malu aa, nansha meme mumane kufua." 
2Peter1:16 Patuvua banumanyishe ne: Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu neafike ne bukole buende, katuvua banulondele nsumuinu ifuma ku budimu bua bantu. Kadi tuvua badimuene butumbi buende ne etu abidi." 
2Peter1:17 Diba divuaye mupete lumu ne butumbi kudi Mvidi Mukulu Tatu, tuvuapu. Diyi divua difuma ku butumbi bua kulu, diamba ne: “Ewu ke Muananyi undi munange. Udi unsankisha bikole.”" 
2Peter1:18 Patuvua ne Yezu pa mukuna wa tshijila, tuetu mene tuvua bumvue diyi edi difuma mu diulu." 
2Peter1:19 Bu mutuvua bumvue miaku eyi, tudi bajadike bimpe menemene ne: meyi avua bambi batumanyishe kale adi malelela. Nanku panudi nuavuluka ne ntema, nudi nuenza bimpe, bualu adi bu muendu udi utema muaba wa miidima, too ne padi butuku butshia, too ne padi mutotu wa nkesha ukenkesha mioyi yenu." 
2Peter1:20 Kadi nuvuluke nangananga ne: muntu nansha umue kena mua kumvuija ku lungenyi luende nkayende miaku ya bambi, ivuabu bafunde mu Mikanda ya tshijila." 
2Peter1:21 Bualu bivua bambi batumanyishe kabivua bifuma ku disua nkayadi dia muntu. Kadi bambi bavua bakula mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, bualu Mueyelu wa Tshijila uvua ubaludika." 
2Peter2:1 Ku kale bambi ba dishima bavua bapatuke munkatshi mua bantu. Ke muapatuka kabidi balongeshi ba dishima munkatshi muenu. Nebatangalaje malongesha a dishima adi atukebela bipupu. Nebabenge Mfumu uvua mubasungidile. Nanku nebadikebele diakamue kabutu. 
2Peter2:2 Bantu ba bungi nebabalonde mu njila wa malu mabi. Bualu bua bidi balongeshi ba dishima aba benza, bantu nebajane njila wa bulelela." 
2Peter2:3 Bu mudibu ne lukuka lua biuma, balongeshi ba dishima aba nebanuelele nsumuinu ifuma ku meji a bantu, bua bapete bintu bienu. Kadi Mukoshi wabu wa nsambu ukadi mumane kujadika tshibawu tshiabu. Neababutule lukasa, kayi ujingakana." 
2Peter2:4 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu kena mufuile batumibue bavua benza bibi luse. Uvua mubele mu kandondu, mudiye mubalame mu lukanu mu miidima, too ne ku diba didibu ne bua kubalumbuluisha." 
2Peter2:5 Bantu ba kale, Mvidi Mukulu kavuamubafuile luse. Wakalokeshila benji ba malu mabi aba mvula wa tshipupu. Kusungidilaye amu bantu muanda mukulu. Ke Nowa uvua ulongesha malu mimpe, kabidi ne bantu bakuabu muanda mutekete." 
2Peter2:6 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mufundile tshimenga tshia Sodome ne tshia Ngomore tshibawu. Uvua mubinyoke, mubibutule ne kapia. Ke mudiye uleja bantu babi bidi ne bua kubenzekela." 
2Peter2:7 Uvua musungidile Lote, muntu wa malu mimpe, uvua unyingalala bua malu mabi avua bantu bena buenzavi ba tshikondu tshiende benze." 
2Peter2:8 Bualu muntu muakane ewu uvua musombe munkatshi mua bantu babi aba. Ku dituku ku dituku uvua umona, umvua malu mabi avuabu benza, avua anyingalaja muoyi wende muimpe." 
2Peter2:9 Bualu Mfumu udi mumanye mua kupatula mu makenga bantu badi bamutumikila. Udi mumanye kabidi mua kulama bantu badi benza bibi, bua kubanyoka dituku dia kubalumbuluisha." 
2Peter2:10 Neanyoke nangananga badi balonda majinga mabi a buntu buabu panu, babenga bumfumu bua Mvidi Mukulu. Balongeshi ba dishima bamvua mubambile aba, badi bantu ba dikamakama, badiambi. Kabena banemeka bifukibue bia lumu bidi mu diulu, kadi badi babipetula." 
2Peter2:11 Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu mene, nansha mudibu bapite balongeshi ba dishima aba ku bukole ne ku bumfumu, kabena basonguela bifukibue bia lumu abi kudi Mfumu, kabena nansha babipenda." 
2Peter2:12 Kadi bantu aba badi benza malu, bu badi kabayi bela meji. Badi bu nyama ya lonji idi kayiyi yela meji, idibu balela amu bua bantu bamone mua kuyikuata, kuyishipa. Badi bapenda tshidibu kabayi bamanye. Nebabashipe mudibu bashipa nyama ya lonji ayi." 
2Peter2:13 Nebabakengeshe, muvuabu bakengeshe bakuabu. Badi badisankisha, benza malu mabi munda munya. Panudi nabu ku mesa badi banufuisha bundu, banubueja mu mbipishilu, basanka bua kunudinga." 
2Peter2:14 Badi balengamena amu bakaji badi bananga malu mabi. Kuenza malu mabi kakuena kubatonda. Badi bateya badi kabayi ne muoyi mukole. Muoyi wabu mmuibidile lukuka lua biuma. Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kubatshipa! 
2Peter2:15 Badi bantu bapambuke. mBumuke mu njila mululame bua kulonda njila mubi, uvuabu balonda kudi Balaame, muana wa Bozore, uvua munange makuta avuabu ne bua kumufuta bua malu ende mabi." 
2Peter2:16 Kadi kumutandishabu bua matshi ende makole. Bualu nyama wa mpunde mukaji, utu kayi wakula, kubanga kuakula ne diyi dia buntu, kukandika malu a bupote, avua muambi awu musue kuenza." 
2Peter2:17 Bantu aba badi bu mpokolu mimane kuuma, nansha bu mavuba adi lupepele lusakila, kaayi alokesha mvula. Mvidi Mukulu mmubalamine muaba mu miidima mikole ya mu kandondu." 
2Peter2:18 Badi bakula miaku ya ditambisha ne ya bupote. Ku lukuka luabu badi bateya bantu batshidi bumuka mu njila wa bantu bapambuke. 
2Peter2:19 Badi balaya bantu ne: nenudienzele malu munudi basue. Kadi bobu mene batshidi mu bupika bua bibidilu bidi mua kubafikisha ku lufu. Bualu muntu yonsu udi mupika wa tshidi tshimukokesha. 
2Peter2:20 Bualu pikala bantu, bavua bamane kupanduka ku malu a bukua panu, bualu bavua bitabe Mfumu ne Musungidi wetu Yezu Kristu, bapingane ku malu abu a kale, baanyishe kabidi, dikenga diabu dia lelu nedipite diabu dia kale." 
2Peter2:21 Bivua bimpe bipite bua kabamanyi njila mululame, pa mutu pa kumumanya, kadi kushisha kubenga mikenji ya tshijila ivuabu babamanyishe." 
2Peter2:22 Malu adi abenzekela adi ajadika bulelela bua nsumuinu ya ne: “Mbua udi upingana ku biluishi bivuaye muluke ”, “Ngulube mumane kuowa mayi, udi udibonda mu bitotshi tshiakabidi.”" 
2Peter3:1 Bana hetu basuibue, ke mukanda muibidi undi nnufundila ewu. Mu mikanda yonsu ibidi, mvua musue kunutabuluja, bua nupete meji makane ku malongesha andi nnuvuluija." 
2Peter3:2 Ndi musue bua nuvuluke miaku ivua bambi ba tshijila banulongeshe kale, kabidi ne mikenji ya kudi Mfumu ne Musungidi, ivua bapostolu benu banumanyishe." 
2Peter3:3 Bangabanga numanye ne: matuku a nshikidilu nekupatuke bantu badi balonda amu majinga abu. Nebanuseke, banuebeja ne:" 
2Peter3:4 “Kavua munulaye bua kupingana anyi? Kadi udi penyi? Batatu hetu mbamane kufua. Kadi bionsu bidi amu bitungunuka, muvuabi bituadije katshia bafuka buloba!”" 
2Peter3:5 mBapue muoyi ku bukole muvua Mvidi Mukulu muakule ku kale, mufuke diulu ne buloba ku muaku wende. Bavua bapatule buloba mu mayi; mpindiewu budi bulelemapu." 
2Peter3:6 Kabidi ku mayi a mvula wa tshipupu, ke kuvuabu babutule buloba bua kumpala abu." 
2Peter3:7 Kadi diulu ne buloba bia lelu bitshidiku, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmubilame ku muaku wende awu. Kadi dituku didiye ulumbuluisha bantu, nebibutuke mu kapia, pamue ne bena buenzavi." 
2Peter3:8 Bana hetu basuibue, kudi bualu bumue bunudi kanuyi mua kupua muoyi. Kudi Mfumu dituku dimue didi bu bidimu tshinunu, bidimu tshinunu bidi bu dituku dimue." 
2Peter3:9 Bamue bantu badi bela meji ne: Mfumu udi ujingakana bua kukumbaja bivuaye mulaye. Kadi kabiena nanku nansha. Udi ne lutuulu lua bungi bualu buenu. Bualu udi musue bua muntu nansha umue kajiminyi, kadi bua bonsu bapete diba dia kubenga malu mabi." 
2Peter3:10 Kadi dituku dia Mfumu nedifike bu muivi. Dituku adi diulu nedibutuke ne mutoyi mukole. Kapia nekoshe bia mulu bionsu. Buloba ne bidipu bionsu nebijimine. 
2Peter3:11 Bu mudi bionsu ne bua kubutuka nanku, nudi bumvue munudi ne bua kusomba panu. Nudi ne bua kuikala bantu ba tshijila, badi benza bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
2Peter3:12 Nuindile dituku dia Mvidi Mukulu. Nuenze muenu muonsu bua difike lukasa. Bushuwa dituku adi kapia nekoshe diulu. Bia mulu nebienguluke ku ndimi ya kapia. 
2Peter3:13 Kadi tuetu tudi tutekemena bidi Mvidi Mukulu mulaye: ke diulu dipiadipia ne buloba bupiabupia, muaba wasomba bantu bua kuenza amu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Ke tshitudi bindile atshi." 
2Peter3:14 Bana hetu basuibue, panutshidi bindile dituku edi, enzayi muenu muonsu bua nuikale kanuyi katoba, kanuyi ne bubi, ku mesu kua Mvidi Mukulu. Nusombe kabidi nende mu ditalala." 
2Peter3:15 Nuvuluke ne: padi Mfumu munulamine lutuulu, mmusue bua nupete mushindu wa kupanda. Ke bivua muanetu musuibue Polu munufundile ne meji mavule avua Mvidi Mukulu mumupe." 
2Peter3:16 Ke bidiye mufunde mu mikanda yende yonsu, padiye umvuija malu a nanku. Mu mikanda yende mudi malongesha makole adi muntu kayi mua kujingulula lukasa. Bantu badi bapange mikanda, kabayi bashindame, badi bumvuija malongesha aa mushindu mubi. Ke mudibu benza kabidi ne miaku mikuabu ya mu Mikanda ya tshijila, badikebela nanku kabutu kabu." 
2Peter3:17 Bana hetu basuibue, mpindiewu nkadi mumane kunubela. Nanku nudimuke! Kanuanyishi bua bantu babi aba bena dishima banupambule, banumushe ku tshitaku tshinudi bashindame." 
2Peter3:18 Kadi nuidikije mua kuya kumpala mu dinanga, ne mu dimanya dia Mfumu wetu ne Musungidi Yezu Kristu. Yeye mene udi ne butumbi mpindiewu ne tshiendelele! Amene." 
1John1:1 Tudi tunufundila bua Muaku udi upetesha muoyi. Muaku awu uvuaku biangatshile ku tshibangidilu tshia bionsu. Tuvua bawumvue, baumone ne mesu etu, bautangile, baulenge ne bianza bietu." 
1John1:1 Tudi tunufundila bua Muaku udi upetesha muoyi. Muaku awu uvuaku biangatshile ku tshibangidilu tshia bionsu. Tuvua bawumvue, baumone ne mesu etu, bautangile, baulenge ne bianza bietu." 
1John1:2 Pavua muoyi ewu umueneka, tuvua baumone. Ke patudi tunujadikilawu, tunumanyisha muoyi wa kashidi, uvua kudi Tatu, udi mumueneke kutudi." 
1John1:2 Pavua muoyi ewu umueneka, tuvua baumone. Ke patudi tunujadikilawu, tunumanyisha muoyi wa kashidi, uvua kudi Tatu, udi mumueneke kutudi." 
1John1:3 Bituvua bamone, bituvua bumvue, tudi tunumanyishabi ne nuenu kabidi, bua nudisange netu mu bobumue butudi nabu ne Tatu, kabidi ne Muanende Yezu Kristu." 
1John1:3 Bituvua bamone, bituvua bumvue, tudi tunumanyishabi ne nuenu kabidi, bua nudisange netu mu bobumue butudi nabu ne Tatu, kabidi ne Muanende Yezu Kristu." 
1John1:4 Tudi tunufundila ebi, bua tusanke, tutshionkomoke."

1John4:3 Kadi muntu yonsu udi ubenga kujikula patoke bualu ebu, kena ne Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu to. Mueyelu udiye nawu ngwa Muluishi wa Kristu. Nudi bamanye ne: Muluishi awu uvua ne bua kufika. Mpindiewu ukadi munkatshi mua bantu."

1John4:4 Kadi nuenu, bana banyi, nudi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Nukadi batshimune bambi ba dishima. Bualu Mueyelu udi munda muenu udi ne bukole bupite bua mueyelu udi munda mua bena panu."

1John4:5 Bambi ba dishima badi bakula bua bia panu. Ke padi bena panu babateleja, bualu bambi aba mba panu."

1John4:7 Balunda banyi, tunangangane, bualu dinanga didi difume kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Muntu yonsu udi unanga, udi muana wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi mmumanye Mvidi Mukulu."

3John1:9 Nkadi mufundile Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba miaku mikese. Kadi Diyotrefeze, udi musue kuikala mfumuabu, udi ulengulula bindi ngamba." 
3John1:10 Nanku pandi mfika, ne mmanyishe patoke malu mabi onsu adiye wenza, miaku mibi idiye untamba, ne malu adiye utushiminyina. Ku bilema ebi udi usakidila kabidi tshikuabu: kena wakidila bena ditaba badi batutantshila. Udi ukandika kabidi badi basue kubakidila, ukeba kubipata mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
3John1:10 Nanku pandi mfika, ne mmanyishe patoke malu mabi onsu adiye wenza, miaku mibi idiye untamba, ne malu adiye utushiminyina. Ku bilema ebi udi usakidila kabidi tshikuabu: kena wakidila bena ditaba badi batutantshila. Udi ukandika kabidi badi basue kubakidila, ukeba kubipata mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba." 
3John1:11 Mulunda wanyi, kuidikiji bualu budi bubi, kadi idikija amu malu mimpe. Muntu udi wenza malu mimpe, udi wa Mvidi Mukulu. Udi wenza bibi, kena muanji kumona Mvidi Mukulu." 
3John1:11 Mulunda wanyi, kuidikiji bualu budi bubi, kadi idikija amu malu mimpe. Muntu udi wenza malu mimpe, udi wa Mvidi Mukulu. Udi wenza bibi, kena muanji kumona Mvidi Mukulu." 
3John1:12 Bonsu badi banyisha Demetriyose. Bulelela mene budi bumubingisha Tuetu kabidi tudi tujadika buimpe bua malu ende. Wewe kabidi udi mumanye ne: bitudi tujadika mbilelela 
3John1:12 Bonsu badi banyisha Demetriyose. Bulelela mene budi bumubingisha Tuetu kabidi tudi tujadika buimpe bua malu ende. Wewe kabidi udi mumanye ne: bitudi tujadika mbilelela 
3John1:13 Ndi ne malu a bungi a kunuambila. Kadi tshiena musue kukufundilawu ne kasala ka mayi a mukanda. 
3John1:13 Ndi ne malu a bungi a kunuambila. Kadi tshiena musue kukufundilawu ne kasala ka mayi a mukanda. 
3John1:14 Ndi ntekemena kumonangana nebe pa lukasa. Nanku netuyukidilangane nebe mpala ne mpala 
3John1:14 Ndi ntekemena kumonangana nebe pa lukasa. Nanku netuyukidilangane nebe mpala ne mpala 
3John1:15 Wikale ne ditalala. Balunda bebe badi bakuela muoyi. Elaku balunda hetu muoyi ku muntu ku muntu. 
3John1:15 Wikale ne ditalala. Balunda bebe badi bakuela muoyi. Elaku balunda hetu muoyi ku muntu ku muntu. 
Jude1:1 Meme Yuda, muena mudimu wa Yezu Kristu, ne muanabu ne Yakobe, ndi mfundila bonsu badi Mvidi Mukulu mubikile, badiye Yeye Tatu wetu unanga, badi Yezu ulama bimpe, mukanda ewu." 
Jude1:2 Ndi ndomba Mvidi Mukulu bua luse, bupole ne dinanga bivulangane munkatshi muenu." 
Jude1:3 Betu basuibue, nkavua njinga bikole kunufundila malu a pa lupandu lutudi batekemene bonsu. Kadi ndi mumone ne: ndi ne bua kunutumina kabidi mukanda ewu, bua kunukolesha ku muoyi, bua nuluile ditaba didi Mvidi Mukulu mupeshe bantu bende bua kashidi." 
Jude1:4 Bualu, bamue bantu babi mbabuele mu musokoku munkatshi muetu. Badi bakudimuna dilongesha didi ditangila dinanga dia Mvidi Mukulu, bua kudibingisha nadi ku buenzavi buabu. Ke padibu babenga Yezu Kristu, Mukalenga ne Mfumu wetu umuepele. Kukadi matuku a bungi, Mikanda ya tshijila mmimane kujadika dinyoka didibu ne bua kunyoka bantu abu." 
Jude1:5 Nansha nuenu bamanye bimpe bualu abu, ndi musue kunuvuluija muvua Maweja-Nangila musangu umue mupikule bena Izrayele mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Kadi kunyima kua matuku uvua mubutule bavua babenga kumuitaba." 
Jude1:6 Nuvuluke muvua batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu bapetula muanzu uvuabu bapete, kabidi muvuabu bapatuka muaba uvuabu basombe. Ke mudi Mvidi Mukulu ubalama, basuika nkanu ya kashidi, mu miidima ya mu kandondu ka buloba, bua amone mua kubalumbuluisha dituku dinene dia Tshilumbuluilu." 
Jude1:7 Nuvuluke kabidi bimenga bia Sodome ne Ngomore, ne bikuabu bivua nabi mutumba. Bena bimenga abi bavua benza malu mabi, anu bu batumibue aba, bakeba kuenda buendenda ne bantu ba mushindu mukuabo. Badi babanyoka mpindiewu mu kapia ka kashidi, bua tshilejilu tshiabu tshidimuje bantu bonsu." 
Jude1:8 Bantu badi balotakana abu, badi benza malu a momumue: badi banyanga mubidi wabu, bapepeja bumfumu bua Mvidi Mukulu, bapenda makole a mutu."
