Jude1:9 Mikayele, mfumu wa batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, kavua muenze nanku to. Pavuaye utandangana ne diabolu, bafuilakana nende tshitalu tshia Moshe, kena mupende diabolu, kena mumupishe. Uvua umuambila amu ne: “Mvidi Mukulu akunyoke! ”" 
Jude1:10 Kadi bantu aba badi bapenda bidibu kabayi bamanye. Bu nyama ya muitu, mbamanye amu majinga a mubidi wabu. Ke tshidi ne bua kubafikisha ku kabutu." 
Jude1:11 Bantu abu mbena diakabi. mBabuele mu njila wa Kayine; mbapambuke mu njila, bu Balaame, bua lukuka lua biuma. mBabutuke, bualu bavua batomboka, bu muvua Kora muenze." 
Jude1:12 Padibu nenu ku mesa bua didia dienu bonsu pamue, badi banufuisha bundu, bualu badi basukumina biakudia. Badi bu balami ba nyama badi badivuluka amu bobu nkayabu. Badi bu mavuba masaka kudi lupepele, adi kaayi alokesha mvula. Badi bu mitshi idi kayiyi ikuama bimuma, nansha tshikondo tshiabi tshimane kufika. Badi bu mitshi mifue misangu ibidi, matamba ayi mamane kuuma, mbajule ne miji yayi kabidi." 
Jude1:13 Badi baleja malu abu mabi, bu mudi mavuala a mayi manene atutuka ntutu. Badi bu mitotu ya milanjilanji idi ituka mulu: Mvidi Mukulu mmubalongoluele muaba mu miidima mikole, bua bashalemu kashidi." 
Jude1:14 Enoke, muntu wa muanda mutekete wa ku ndelanganyi ya Adame, ukavua muambe kale mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu bualu buabu ne: “Maweja-Nangila neafike ne batumibue bende ba tshijila binunu makumi ne makumi," 
Jude1:15 bua kulumbuluisha bantu bonsu, ne bua kunyoka bantu babi bonsu, bua malu mabi avuabu benze, pavuabu batombokele Mvidi Mukulu, ne bua miaku yabu mibi ivuabu bamujane nayi. ”" 
Jude1:16 Bantu aba kabena baleja disanka dituku nansha dimue, badi batontolodi ba kashidi. Badi benza malu amu mudi nkuka yabu. Badi bakula ne dipetu, balabidila bantu bua kupeta bintu." 
Jude1:17 Kadi nuenu, hetu basuibue, nuvuluke bivua bapostolu ba Mfumu wetu Yezu Kristu banumanyishe kale." 
Jude1:18 Bavua banuambile ne: ku nshikidilu bantu babi nebanuseke. Nebalonde majinga abu mabi. 
Jude1:19 Bantu abu nebapandulule bantu. Nebalonde bia panu, kabayi bitaba Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Jude1:20 Kadi nuenu, hetu basuibue, shindamayi amu kushindama pa ditaba dienu dia tshijila tshipite. Nutendelele mu bukole bua Mueyelu wa Tshijila." 
Jude1:21 Nuvuluke kashidi ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi utunanga Nutekemene luse lua Mfumu wenu Yezu Kristu, ludi lunupetesha muoyi wa kashidi." 
Jude1:22 Bantu batshidi bela mpata, nubafuile luse." 
Jude1:23 Nubasungidile, nubapatule mu kapia. Bakuabu kabidi nubafuile luse, kadi nubadimukile. Nubenge kashidi ne bilamba biabu mene, bidibu banyange ne bubi buabu." 
Jude1:24 Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kunulama bimpe, bua kanuponyi mu bubi. Udi mua kunufikisha kabidi, kanuyi kalema, muoyi muwule tente ne musangelu, muaba unudi mua kumona butumbi buende." 
Jude1:25 Mvidi Mukulu umuepele awu uvua mutupandishe kudi Yezu Kristu, Mfumu wetu. Butumbi, bukole, buneme ne bumfumu bidi kudiye, biangatshile ku ntuadijilu wa bidimu, lelu ne kashidi tshiendelele. Amene." 
Revelation1:1 Mu mukanda ewu mbafunde muvua Yezu Kristu mudimanyishe. Mvidi Mukulu mmuanyishe bua adileje nanku kudi bantu bende, bua bamanye bidi ne bua kuenzeka amu mpindiewu. Kristu kutuma mutumibue wende, bua abimanyishe Yowanane, muena mudimu wa Kristu." 
Revelation1:2 Yowanane uvua mujadike bionsu bivuaye mumone. Mu mukanda ewu udi umanyisha muaku uvuaye mupete kudi Mvidi Mukulu, ne malu malelela avua Yezu mumuleje." 
Revelation1:3 Muntu udi ubala mukanda ewu, mmuena diakalenga. Bantu badi bateleja miaku ya kudi muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu, bakumbaja bidibu bafunde muaba ewu, badi kabidi bena diakalenga! Bualu bionsu ebi nebikumbane amu mpindiewu." 
Revelation1:4 Meme Yowanane, ndi mfundila Bisumbu muanda mutekete bia bena ditaba bidi mu buloba bua Aziya mukanda ewu: Dinanga ne bupole bia kudi Mvidi Mukulu, udiku, uvuaku, ne wafikaku, bia kudi mieyelu muanda mutekete idi kumpala kua nkuasa wende wa butumbi," 
Revelation1:5 ne bia kudi Yezu Kristu, udi ujadika malu mudiwu, Muanabute, Wa kumpala udi mubiike ku bafue, Mukalenga wa bakalenga bonsu ba pa buloba, bishindame munda muenu. Kristu udi utunanga. mMutupikule ku mibi yetu ku lufu luende." 
Revelation1:6 mMutuenze bakalenga ne batuangaji, bua tukuatshile Tatuende Mvidi Mukulu mudimu. Yezu Kristu udi ne butumbi, kabidi ne bukole, mu nkama ne nkama ya bidimu! Amene." 
Revelation1:7 Tangila: udi upueka mu mavuba! Bantu bonsu nebamumone, nansha bavua bamutubule mubidi. Bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba nebidile muadi bualu buende. Eyowa, nebikale nanku! Amene." 
Revelation1:8 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udiku, uvuaku, wafikaku, udi wamba ne: “Meme ndi Alfa ne Omega. ”" 
Revelation1:9 Meme muanenu Yowanane, ndi mudisange ne Mfumu bu nuenu. Ke padibu bankengesha kabidi bu nuenu. Ke pandi nnanukila nenu ne lutuulu luonsu mu Bukalenga bua Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua bantume mu tshidila tshia Patmose, bualu mvua mulongeshe muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, mujadike malu malelela avua Yezu mutumanyishe." 
Revelation1:10 Dituku di Mfumu, Mueyelu wa Tshijila kumvulula. Meme kumvua panyima panyi diyi dikole, bu muadi wa mpungi," 
Revelation1:11 diamba ne: — Funda tshiudi mumone etshi mu mukanda, uutumine Bisumbu muanda mutekete bia bena ditaba ebi: tshia mu Efeze, mu Smirna, mu Pergame, mu Tiyatira, mu Sardeze, mu Filadelfiya, ne mu Lawodikiya." 
Revelation1:12 Meme kukudimuka, bua mmone uvua ungakuisha. Ke meme kumona bitekelu muanda mutekete bia miendu, bienza ne mpawungi." 
Revelation1:13 Munkatshi muabi muvua tshintu bu muntu, muvuale muntumpu mutue ne ku makasa, musuike mukaba wa mpawungi pa tshiadi." 
Revelation1:14 Nsuki yende ivua mitoke bu miosa ya mikoku, nansha bu busu bua mvula. Mesu ende avua akenka bu kapia katema." 
Revelation1:15 Makasa ende avua abalakana bu tshiamu tshikunze tshivuabu bengulule mu kapia, bafinunuje. Diyi diende divua dienza tshiona tshikole bu tshibila tshinene tshia mayi." 
Revelation1:16 Uvua ne mitotu muanda mutekete mu tshianza tshiende tshia balume. Muele mutue wa nkanza uvua upatuka mukana muende. Mpala wende uvua ukenka bu diba munda munya. 
Revelation1:17 Meme mumumone nanku, mvua mupone panshi ku makasa ende bu muntu mufue. Ke yeye kuteka tshianza tshiende tshia balume pambidi panyi, wamba ne: — Kutshinyi to! Meme ndi wa kumpala ne wa ndekelu." 
Revelation1:18 Ndi ne muoyi. Mvua mufue. Kadi mpindiewu ndi ne muoyi kashidi. Ndi Mfumu wa lufu ne wa kandondu ka bafue. 
Revelation1:19 Nenku funda biudi umona, bidi bienzeka mpindiewu, ne biavua kuenzeka pashishe." 
Revelation1:20 Udi umona mitotu muanda mutekete idi mu tshianza tshianyi tshia balume, ne bitekelu muanda mutekete bia miendu bia mpawungi. Ndi nkumvuija mudibi: mitotu muanda mutekete ke batumibue muanda mutekete ba Bisumbu muanda mutekete bia bena ditaba, bitekelu muanda mutekete ke Bisumbu muanda mutekete bia bena ditaba." 
Revelation2:1 — Fundila mutumibue wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Efeze ne: “Udi mukuate mitotu muanda mutekete mu tshianza tshiende tshia balume, wenda munkatshi mua bitekelu muanda mutekete bia miendu bienza ne mpawungi, udi wamba ne:" 
Revelation2:2 Ndi mumanye bionsu biudi muenze. Ndi mumanye muuvua mukuate mudimu bikole, mulame kabidi lutuulu. Ndi mumanye muudi ubenga benji ba malu mabi. Uvua mutete bavua badiamba ne: tudi bapostolu, pabu kabayi bapostolu. Wewe kujandula mudibu bena dishima." 
Revelation2:3 Udi ne lutuulu. Uvua mumvue makenga bualu buanyi, kuyi utekesha mu maboku." 
Revelation2:4 Kadi bualu bundi nkudiwila, mbua paudi kutshiyi munnange bu kumpala." 
Revelation2:5 Nanku vuluka muuvua kulu, wewe kupona panshi. Udilengeje, wenze bu muuvua muenze ku mbangilu. Kuyi mudilengeje, nemfike kuudi, ngumushe tshitekelu tshiebe tshia miendu pa muaba watshi." 
Revelation2:6 Kadi udi ne diakalenga, bualu udi mubenge malu a bena Nikolayite, amu mundi muabenga meme." 
Revelation2:7 “Bidi Mueyelu wambila Bisumbu bia bena ditaba, yonsu udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyi? Umvue! “Badi batshimuna, nenganyishe bua badie tshimuma tshia mutshi wa muoyi, udi mu lupangu lua Mvidi Mukulu. ”" 
Revelation2:8 — Fundila mutumibue wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Smirna ne: “Wa kumpala ne wa ndekelu, uvua mufue, kadi mupete tshiakabidi muoyi, udi wamba ne:" 
Revelation2:9 Ndi mumanye muyuabu bakukengeshe. mBakushiye mupele. Kadi bua kuamba bimpe, udi ne biuma! Ndi mumanye mudi badi badiamba bena Yuda bakujana. Kadi kabena bena Yuda to. Badi tshisumbu tshia bantu ba diabolu!" 
Revelation2:10 Kutshinyi makenga adi makuindile. Teleja bimpe: diabolu neanutete. Neele bamue ba kunudi mu nkanu. Nebanukengeshe matuku dikumi. Wewe, ukoleshe amu muoyi, nansha bua kumona lufu. Nenkupeshe muoyi wa kashidi bu kalumbandi." 
Revelation2:11 “Bidi Mueyelu wambila Bisumbu bia bena ditaba, yonsu udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyi? Umvue! “Badi batshimuna, kabakumona lufu luibidi.”" 
Revelation2:12 — Fundila mutumibue wa tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Pergame ne: “Udi ne muele mutue wa nkanza mu tshianza, udi wamba ne:" 
Revelation2:13 Ndi mumanye muaba uudi usomba. mMuaba udi nkuasa wa lumu wa diabolu. Wewe udi mundamate bikole. Kuena munwile, nansha pavuabu bashipe kuenu aku, kudi diabolu usombela, Antipase, uvua munjadikile malu muende muonsu." 
Revelation2:14 Kadi bualu bundi nkudiwila, mpadi bamue ba kunudi bitabe dilongesha dia Balaame. Balaame uvua ulongesha Balake, bua asake bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Ke muyuabu badie minyinyi ya nyama milambula nwidie, benza kabidi malu a bundu." 
Revelation2:15 Kuenu kudi kabidi badi bitaba dilongesha dia bena Nikolayite. 
Revelation2:16 Nanku, udilengeje. Tshianana, nemfike kuudi amu mpindiewu. Nenduishe bantu aba ne muele udi upatuka mukana muanyi." 
Revelation2:17 “Bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila wambila Bisumbu bia bena ditaba, yonsu udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyi? Umvue! “Badi batshimuna, nembapeshe mana masokome. Nempeshe kabidi yonsu wa kudibu lusoka lutoke lufunda dina dipiadipia, didi muntu kayi mumanye, amu udi udipeta.”" 
Revelation2:18 — Fundila mutumibue wa mu Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Tiyatira ne: “Muana wa Mvidi Mukulu udi ne mesu akenka bu kapia katema, makasa abalakana bu tshiamu tshikunze tshivuabu bengulule, bafinunuje, udi wamba ne:" 
Revelation2:19 Ndi mumanye bionsu biudi wenza. Ndi mumanye muudi munnange, mungitabe ne muoyi umue, munkuatshile mudimu ne tshisumi, muikale kabidi ne lutuulu. Ndi mumanye mudi midimu yebe ya matuku aa mipite ya mbangilu." 
Revelation2:20 Kadi bualu bundi nkudiwila mpaudi ulengulula malu a Izebele. Mukaji ewu udi udiamba mudiye muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu. Udi upambula bantu banyi, ubalongesha bua benze malu a bundu, badie minyinyi ya nyama milambula nwidie." 
Revelation2:21 Mvua muanji kumutangila mutantshi, bua adilengeje. Kadi kena musue kulekela malu ende a bundu to." 
Revelation2:22 Nenku nemmusamishe, ashale mu bulalu. Nenkengeshe kabidi bikole bavua benza nende malu a bundu, padibu kabayi balekelangana nende." 
Revelation2:23 Nenshipeshe bana bende bonsu. Nenku Bisumbu bionsu bia bena ditaba nebimanye ne: Meme ndi njingulula meji ne majinga bidi munda mua bantu. Nemfute muntu yonsu wa kunudi, bilondeshile malu avuaye muenze." 
Revelation2:24 “Kadi nuenu, bena ditaba bakuabu ba mu Tshisumbu tshia mu Tiyatira, kanuvua bitabe dilongesha dibi edi; kanuvua balonge bidi bantu aba bamba ne: ‘mMalu masokome a diabolu ’. Ndi nnujadikila ne: tshiena mua kunuomekela bujitu bukuabu to." 
Revelation2:25 Kadi nulame bimpe binudi nabi, too ne pangafika." 
Revelation2:26 Badi batshimuna, bakumbaja bindi musue too ne ku ndekelu, nembapeshe bumfumu bua bisamba bikuabu bumvua mupete kudi Tatu wanyi." 
Revelation2:27 Nebabiludike ne dikombu dia tshiamu. Nebabizaze, mudibu bazaza ngesu yadibumba." 
Revelation2:28 Nembapeshe kabidi mutotu wa ntshisha. 
Revelation2:29 “Bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila wambila Bisumbu bia bena ditaba, yonsu udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyi? Umvue!”" 
Revelation3:1 — Fundila mutumibue wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Sardeze ne: “Udi ne mieyelu muanda mutekete ya Mvidi Mukulu, ne mitotu muanda mutekete, udi wamba ne: Ndi mumanye bionsu biudi wenza. Ndi mumanye mudi bantu bela meji ne: udi ne muoyi, eku wewe mufue." 
Revelation3:2 Tabuluka, fulula kuoyi kakese, kautshidi mushale naku, kakayi kufuilamu. Bualu tshiena mumone mudi malu ebe mimpe menemene kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu wanyi to." 
Revelation3:3 Nenku vuluka bivuabu bakulongeshe. Kuvulaminyi muuvua mubilonge ne tshisumi. Ubikumbaje ne muoyi umue, udilengeje. Kuyi mutabale, nenkujikile bu muivi. Kuakumanya diba dingafika kuudi." 
Revelation3:4 Kadi mu Sardeze amu, bamue ba kunudi ki mbanyange bilamba biabu to. Ke mudibu bakanyina kuvuala bilamba bitoke, kuenda nanyi diba dionsu." 
Revelation3:5 Badi batshimuna, nebavuale bilamba bitoke. Tshiakukupula mena abu mu mukanda wa muoyi to. Nenjadikile Tatu wanyi ne batumibue bende ne: bantu aba mbanyi." 
Revelation3:6 “Bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila wambila Bisumbu bia bena ditaba, yonsu udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyi? Umvue!”" 
Revelation3:7 — Fundila mutumibue wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Filadelfiya ne: “Wa Tshijila ne wa diyi dimue, udi mulame nsapi ya mukalenga Davide, ukangula tshiibi, munga muntu kayi mua kukanga; utshikanga, munga muntu kayi mua kutshikangula, udi wamba ne:" 
Revelation3:8 Ndi mumanye bionsu biudi wenza. Ndi mumanye mudi bukole buebe bukese. Kadi nansha wewe mutekete, udi mulame amu muaku wanyi, kuyi unwila. Ndi mukukanguile tshiibi tshidi muntu nansha umue kayi mua kukanga." 
Revelation3:9 Umvuayi tshingenzela tshisumbu tshia bena diabolu, bena dishima aba, badi badiamba mudibu bena Yuda, kadi kabayi nanku. Nembenzeje ku bukole, bua badiele panshi ku makasa ebe bua kukunemeka. Nebajadike mundi mukunange." 
Revelation3:10 Bualu uvua mukumbaje diyi, dimvua mukutumine ne: una-nukile. Nanku meme panyi nenkulame tshikondu tshia dikenga tshikadi pa kufika pa buloba bujima, tshiatetabu bantu badi basapu." 
Revelation3:11 Nkadi mu njila. Lama muebe muonsu biudi nabi. Tshianana bakuabu nebakunyenge nsala webe wa lumu. 
Revelation3:12 Watshimuna, nemmuimanyike bu dikunji mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Neashalemu kashidi. Nemfunde pambidi pende dina dia Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ne dia tshimenga tshia Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Tshimenga atshi ke Yerushalayime mupiamupia, udi utuluka mu diulu. Ke tshimenga tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi wasa. Nemfunde kabidi pambidi pende dina dipiadipia dindi nadi." 
Revelation3:13 “Bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila wambila Bisumbu bia bena ditaba, yonsu udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyi? Umvue!”" 
Revelation3:14 — Fundila mutumibue wa Tshisumbu tshia bena ditaba ba mu Lawodikiya ne: “Amene, mujadiki wa malu malelela ne wa diyi dimue, mfuki wa bionsu bivua Mvidi Mukulu mufuke, udi wamba ne:" 
Revelation3:15 Ndi mumanye bionsu biudi muenze. Ndi mumanye ne: kuena nansha ku mashika nansha ku luya. Ndi njinga bikole bua wikale nansha ku tshimue tshia ku bibidi eku! 
Revelation3:16 Kadi bu muudi pankatshikatshi, kuyi ku luya kuyi ku mashika, nenkuluke mukana, nkutuile panshi!" 
Revelation3:17 Udi wamba ne: ‘Ndi mubanji. Ndi mupete bivule. Tshiena nkengela tshintu!’ Kadi kuena mumanye dikenga diudi nadi, didi dikuatshisha luse! Udi mupele, udi butaka, udi mpofu." 
Revelation3:18 Ke pandi nkupesha lungenyi, bua usumbe kundi mpawungi muengulula mu kapia. Nanku newikale mubanji. Usumbe kabidi bilamba bitoke bua ubivuale, usokoke butaka buebe, ulekele kufua bundu. Usumbe kabidi buanga bua kuela mu mesu, bua umone." 
Revelation3:19 Ndi ntandisha bandi munange, mbanyoka. Nenku wikale ne tshisumi, udilengeje." 
Revelation3:20 Teleja! Ndi ngimana ku tshiibi, nkokola. Padi muntu umvua diyi dianyi, unkanguila tshiibi, nembuele mu nzubu muende. Nendie nende, yeye neadie nanyi." 
Revelation3:21 Badi batshimuna, nenganyishe bua basombe pabuipi nanyi mu nkuasa wanyi wa butumbi, bu mumvua meme mutshimune, nsomba pabuipi ne Tatu wanyi mu nkuasa wende wa butumbi." 
Revelation3:22 “Bidi Mueyelu wa Tshijila wambila Bisumbu bia bena ditaba, yonsu udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyi? Umvue!”" 
Revelation4:1 Pashishe Mvidi Mukulu kundeja malu makuabu. Meme kumona tshiibi tshiunzuluka mu diulu. Diyi dimvua mumvue diela tshiona bu mpungi, dingambila bualu bangabanga adi, kumvuika, kungambila ne: — Banda apa. Nenkuleje malu adi ne bua kuenzeka pashishe." 
Revelation4:2 Diakamue Mueyelu wa Tshijila kumvu-lula. Mu diulu muvua nkuasa wa butumbi. Muntu uvua musombe mu nkuasa awu. 
Revelation4:3 Uvua ukenka mpala bu mabue a mushinga mukole a yaspise ne sarduwane. Muanzankongolu uvua wenza tshijengu kulu kua nkuasa, wengelela bu dibue dia emerode." 
Revelation4:4 Nkuasa ya butumbi mikuabu makumi abidi ne inayi ivua miele nkuasa wa butumbi awu munkatshi. Bakulu makumi abidi ne banayi bavua basombe mu nkuasa ayi, bavuale bilamba bitoke, basa ne bilulu bia bukalenga bienza ne mpawungi." 
Revelation4:5 Mikenya, bibingu, ne makubakuba, bivua bipatuka ku nkuasa awu wa butumbi. Bimunyi muanda mutekete bia kapia bivua bitema kumpala kua nkuasa: ke mieyelu muanda mutekete ya Mvidi Mukulu." 
Revelation4:6 Kumpala kua nkuasa kuvua tshintu bu mayi manene, menza bu lumuenu kaluyi katoba, abalakana bu lusoka lua kristale. Bia muoyi binayi, biase mesu kumpala ne kunyima, bivua binyungulukile nkuasa ku nseke yonsu." 
Revelation4:7 Tshia muoyi tshia kumpala tshiena tshifuane nyama wa ntambue. Tshibidi tshivua tshifuane muana mulume wa ngombe. Tshisalu tshivua ne mpala bu wa muntu. Tshinayi tshivua tshifuane nyunyi wa tshiminyi udi upapala mulu. 
Revelation4:8 Tshia muoyi tshionsu tshivua ne mapuapua asambombu, kabidi ne mesu nseke yonsu, munda ne panyima. Bionsu binayi bidi amu bimba munya ne butuku, biamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udi wa tshijila, wa tshijila, wa tshijila. Uvuaku, udiku, kabidi udi ufika. ”" 
Revelation4:9 Misangu yonsu idi Bia muoyi binayi bimbila udi musombe mu nkuasa, udi ne muoyi kashidi, bimutumbisha, bimukukuila, bimuela tuasakidila," 
Revelation4:10 bakulu makumi abidi ne banayi badi badiela panshi kumpala kua udi musombe mu nkuasa wa butumbi, bakukuila udi ne muoyi kashidi. Badi bela bifulu biabu bia mpawungi kumpala kua nkuasa, bamba ne:" 
Revelation4:11 “Wewe udi Maweja-Nangila wetu, kabidi ne Mvidi Mukulu wetu. mBimpe bantu bonsu bakutumbishe, bakunemeke, bitabe bumfumu buebe. Bualu udi mufuke bintu bionsu. Bionsu bidiku, bidi kabidi ne muoyi, bualu wewe udi musue nanku.”" 
Revelation5:1 Mvua mumone mukanda muvunga mu tshianza tshia balume tshia uvua musombe mu nkuasa wa butumbi. Bavua baufunde munda ne panyima, batue bitampi muanda mutekete." 
Revelation5:2 Meme kumona mutumibue wa bukole, wela diyi dikole ne: — Udi muakanyine kulamuna bitampi, kubulula mukanda nnganyi?" 
Revelation5:3 Kadi nansha mu diulu, nansha pa buloba, nansha munda mua buloba, kakuvua muntu muakanyine kubulula mukanda bua kumona bidimu to." 
Revelation5:4 Mvua ndila bikole, bualu kakuvua muntu muakanyine kubulula mukanda, kumona bidimu." 
Revelation5:5 Ke umue wa ku bakulu kungamba ne: — Lekela muadi. Tangila: ntambue wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, wa ku ndelanganyi ya mukalenga Davide, udi mutshimune. Nanku Yeye udi mua kulamuna bitampi muanda mutekete ne kubulula mukanda." 
Revelation5:6 Ke meme kumona Muana wa mukoku muimane munkatshi kumpala kua nkuasa wa butumbi, bamunyungulukila kudi Bia muoyi binayi ne kudi bakulu. Uvua mumueka bu mushipa. Uvua ne nsengu muanda mutekete, kabidi ne mesu muanda mutekete. Ke mieyelu muanda mutekete ya Mvidi Mukulu ivuabu batume pa buloba bujima." 
Revelation5:7 Muana wa mukoku kusemena, kuangata mukanda mu tshianza tshia balume tshia uvua musombe mu nkuasa." 
Revelation5:8 Yeye mumane kuangata mukanda, Bia muoyi binayi ne bakulu makumi abidi ne banayi kukukuila Muana wa mukoku. Mukulu yonsu uvua ne lunzenze, kabidi ne makopu menza ne mpawungi muwule ne musenga wa kamonya. Musenga awu ke mitendelelu ya bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Revelation5:9 Bavua bimba musambu mupiamupia, bamba ne: “Wewe udi muakanyine kuangata mukanda, kulamuna bitampi biawu. Bavua bakushipe. Nanku ku lufu luebe, Wewe kupikuila Mvidi Mukulu bantu, ba meku onsu, ba miakulu yonsu, ba bisamba bionsu, ne ba mu matunga onsu." 
Revelation5:10 Wewe kubateka bakalenga ne batuangaji, bua benzele Mvidi Mukulu wetu mudimu. Nebadie bumfumu pa buloba bujima. ”" 
Revelation5:11 Meme kutangila tshiakabidi, kumvua meyi a batumibue bavule, binunu ne bitotu. Bavua banyungulukile nkuasa wa butumbi, Bia muoyi ne bakulu." 
Revelation5:12 Bavua bimba ne diyi dikole ne: “Muana wa mukoku uvuabu bashipe, udi muakanyine kupeta bumfumu, bubanji, meji ne bukole, kanemu, lumu ne butumbi!”" 
Revelation5:13 Ke meme kumvua kabidi bifukibua bionsu, mu diulu, pa buloba, muinshi mua buloba, ne mu mayi manene, — bionsu bidi ne muoyi miaba yonsu, — bimba ne: “Tukukuile udi musombe mu nkuasa wa butumbi, kabidi ne Muana wa mukoku. Tubatumbishe, tubasamune, tuitabe bumfumu buabu kashidi tshiendelele!”" 
Revelation5:14 Bia muoyi binayi bivua bitshija ne: “Amene!” Ke bakulu kudiela panshi kukukuila. 
Revelation6:1 Pashishe meme kumona Muana wa mukoku ulamuna tshitampi tshia kumpala tshia ku bitampi muanda mutekete. Meme kumvua tshimue tshia ku Bia muoyi binayi tshiela diyi bu dikubakuba ne: “Lua!” 
Revelation6:2 Nkenzakana, ke meme kumona kabalu katoke. Uvua mubandepu uvua mukuate buta. Kumupabu tshifulu tshia bukalenga. Kumukaye bu tshilobu, bua kuya kutshimuna kabidi." 
Revelation6:3 Pashishe Muana wa mukoku kulamuna tshitampi tshibidi. Meme kumona Tshia muoyi tshibidi tshianza ne: “Lua!” 
Revelation6:4 Ke kabalu kakuabu kupatuka, kakunze. Uvua mubandepu, bavua bamupesha muele mutue, kabidi ne bumfumu bua kutangalaja mvita pa buloba, bua bantu bashipangane." 
Revelation6:5 Pashishe Muana wa mukoku kulamuna tshitampi tshisatu. Meme kumvua Tshia muoyi tshisatu tshianza ne: “Lua!” Nkenzakana, meme kumona kabalu kafiike. Uvua mubandepu uvua ne tshipiminu mu bianza." 
Revelation6:6 Meme kumvua bu diyi difuma munkatshi mua Bia muoyi binayi, diamba ne: “Kilo umue wa ntete ya kuenza bukula, nansha kilo isatu ya ntete ya orje ikale difutu dia mudimu wa dituku dimue. Kadi kanunyangi mafuta ne maluvu to.”" 
Revelation6:7 Pashishe Muana wa mukoku kulamuna tshitampi tshinayi. Ke meme kumvua Tshia muoyi tshinayi tshianza ne: “Lua!” 
Revelation6:8 Nkenzakana, ke meme kumona kabalu ka mubidi mutokoloke bu tshitalu. Uvua mubandepu, bavua bamuinyika ne: “Lufu!” Bavua bamulonda kudi kandondu ka bafue. Kubipeshabu bumfumu bua tshia binayi tshimue tshia buloba, bua kushipesha bantu ku muele wa mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, ku disama dia tshiambu, ne ku nyama ya lonji." 
Revelation6:9 Pashishe Muana wa mukoku kulamuna tshitampi tshitanu. Ke meme kumona muinshi mua tshilambuilu mioyi ya bantu bavuabu bashipe, bualu bavua balongesha muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu, baujadika muabu muonsu." 
Revelation6:10 Kuelabu diyi dikole ne: “Mfumu wa Tshijila, udi ukumbaja biudi mulaye, nealumbuluishe ba pa buloba diba kaayi? Utshidi amu windila, kuyi unyoka bavua batushipe anyi?”" 
Revelation6:11 Kupeshabu yonsu wa kudibu muntumpu mutoke, babambila ne: indilayi kabidi katupa. Banji kushipa bana benu bakuabu, banutua benzele nabu Mvidi Mukulu mudimu, buonsu buabu, bu muyuabu banushipe nuenu." 
Revelation6:12 Pashishe meme kumona Muana wa mukoku ulamuna tshitampi tshisambombu. Tshikumina tshikole kuenzekatshi. Diba kufuka, bu tshilamba tshia madilu. Ngondu mujima kukunza bu mashi." 
Revelation6:13 Mitotu kukuluka panshi, bu mutu bimuma bia mfiku bitshidi bibishi bipona, padi tshipepele tshikole tshinyukisha mutshi." 
Revelation6:14 Diulu kujimina, bu mudi mateta ajimina, padibu bavunga mukanda. Mikuna ne bidiila bionsu kutentamuka miaba yabi." 
Revelation6:15 Bakalenga ba pa buloba, balombodi, bamfumu ba basolayi, babanji, bena mianzu, kabidi ne bantu bakuabu bonsu, bapika nansha badi badienzela malu, kuyabu kusokomena mu mikuna ne mu mbuebue ivuamu." 
Revelation6:16 Kadi bavua bambila mikuna ne mbuebue ne: “Tupukilayi, nutusokoke, bua udi musombe mu nkuasa wa butumbi katumonyi, bua tshiiji tshia Muana wa mukoku katshifiki kutudi." 
Revelation6:17 Bualu dituku dinene dia tshiiji tshiabu ndimane kufika. Udi mua kubafuila nkanana nnganyi? ” 
Revelation7:1 Malu aa mamane kupita, meme kumona batumibue banayi bimane ku ntengu inayi ya buloba. Bavua bimanyike mpepele inayi ya buloba, bua lupepele nansha lumue kalututshi pa buloba, nansha pa mayi manene, nansha ku mitshi." 
Revelation7:2 Meme kumona mutumibue mukuabu ubuuka, utumina kudi diba dipatukila, ne tshitampi tshia Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi mu bianza. Kuelaye diyi dikole kudi batumibue banayi bavua ne bumfumu bua kunyangakaja buloba ne mayi manene, ubambila ne:" 
Revelation7:3 “Kanubutudi buloba, nansha mayi manene, nansha mitshi. Tuanji kutua tshitampi pa mpala ya bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu wetu. ”" 
Revelation7:4 Ke kummanyishabu bungi bua bantu bavuabu batue tshitampi tshia Mvidi Mukulu pa mpala. Bavua binunu lukama makumi anayi ne binayi, ba mu bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele." 
Revelation7:5 Bavua batue tshitampi pa mpala ya bantu binunu dikumi ne bibidi ba mu tshisamba tshionsu: tshia Yuda, tshia Rubene, tshia Ngade," 
Revelation7:6 tshia Ashere, tshia Naftali, tshia Menashe," 
Revelation7:7 tshia Shimeyone, tshia Levi, tshia Ishakare," 
Revelation7:8 tshia Zebulone, tshia Yozefe, ne tshia Binyamine." 
Revelation7:9 Malu aa mamane kupita, meme kutangila kabidi, kumona bantu bapite bungi, kabayi kubala. Bavua ba mu matunga onsu, ba meku onsu, ba bisamba bionsu, ne ba miakulu yonsu. Bavua bimane kumpala kua nkuasa wa butumbi, ne kumpala kua Muana wa mukoku, bavuale mintumpu mitoke, bakuate malala mu tshianza." 
Revelation7:10 Bavua bela mbila mikole, bamba ne: “Lupandu luetu ludi lufuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu wetu udi musombe mu nkuasa wa butumbi, ne kudi Muana wa mukoku!”" 
Revelation7:11 Batumibue bonsu bavua banyungulukile nkuasa wa butumbi, bakulu, ne Bia muoyi binayi. Bavua badiela mpala panshi kumpala kua nkuasa wa butumbi, bakukuila Mvidi Mukulu," 
Revelation7:12 bamba ne: “Amene! Lumu, butumbi, meji, diela tuasakidila, kanemu, dikanda, ne bukole, bikale kudi Mvidi Mukulu wetu kashidi ne kashidi! Amene.”" 
Revelation7:13 Umue wa ku bakulu uvua unkonka ne: — Bantu badi bavuale mintumpu mitoke aba mbanganyi? mBafume penyi? 
Revelation7:14 Meme kumuandamuna ne: — Mfumu wanyi, tshiena mumanye. Amu wewe ke udi mua kumanya. Ke kungambilaye ne: — mBantu bavuabu bakengeshe bikole, kadi kabayi bateketa. Bavua basukule mintumpu yabu, bayitokeshe mu mashi a Muana wa mukoku." 
Revelation7:15 Ke padibu bimane kumpala kua nkuasa wa butumbi wa Mvidi Mukulu, bamukuatshila mudimu butuku ne munya mu nzubu muende. Udi musombe mu nkuasa wa butumbi neikale nabu bua kubalama." 
Revelation7:16 Kabakumvua kabidi nzala musangu nansha umue. Nyota kayakubasuma. Munya kawakubosha. Luya lukole kaluakubabuela. 
Revelation7:17 Bualu Muana wa mukoku udi munkatshi mua nkuasa wa butumbi neikale mulami wabu. Neabafikishe ku mpokolu idi ne mayi adi afila muoyi. Mvidi Mukulu neabakupule binsonji bionsu ku mesu. 
Revelation8:1 Pavua Muana wa mukoku ulamuna tshitampi tshia muanda mutekete, mu diulu kupuwamu vii mutantshi wa minute bu makumi asatu." 
Revelation8:2 Pashishe meme kumona muvua batumibue muanda mutekete, bavua bimane kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, bapeta mpungi muanda mutekete." 
Revelation8:3 Mutumibue mukuabu kufika, kuimana ku tshilambuilu. Uvua ne mbabula muenza ne mpawungi, wa kuoshila manananshi. Kumupeshabu musenga wa manananshi wa bungi, wa kulambula pamue ne ditendelela dia bantu bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu, pa tshilambuilu tshia mpawungi tshivua kumpala kua nkuasa wa butumbi." 
Revelation8:4 Muinshi wa manananshi, pamue ne ditendelela dia bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, bivua bibandila mu tshianza tshia mutumibue kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Revelation8:5 Pashishe mutumibue kuangata mbabula, kuelamu kapia ka ku tshilambuilu, kuwuja. Pashishe kuitshikijaye kapia pa buloba. Ke makubakuba kuakulawu, mikenya kupenya, tshikumina kuenzeka pa buloba." 
Revelation8:6 Batumibue muanda mutekete kudilongolola bua kuela mpungi muanda mutekete, ivuabu nayi mu tshianza." 
Revelation8:7 Mutumibue wa kumpala kuela mpungi. Mvula wa mabue ne kapia, bisambakana ne mashi, kulokabi pa buloba. Tshia bisatu tshimue tshia buloba, tshia mitshi, ne bisosa bibishi bionsu kupiabi." 
Revelation8:8 Pashishe mutumibue muibidi kuela mpungi. Tshintu tshienza bu mukuna munene utema kapia, kudielatshi mu mayi manene. Tshia bisatu tshia mayi manene kuandamuka mashi." 
Revelation8:9 Tshia bisatu tshia bionsu bidi ne muoyi mu mayi manene kufua. Tshia bisatu tshia majuwa onsu kunyanguka. 
Revelation8:10 Ke mutumibue muisatu kuela mpungi. Mutotu munene, uvua utema bu tshimunyi tshia kapia, kukuluka mu diulu. Kuponenawu pa tshia bisatu tshimue tshia misulu ne pa mpokolu ya mayi." 
Revelation8:11 (Dina dia mutotu ewu divua Bululu.) Tshia bisatu tshia mayi kuandamuka mayi a bululu. Bantu ba bungi kufua, bualu bavua banua mayi avua ne lulengu." 
Revelation8:12 Mutumibue muinayi kuela mpungi. Kutuutabu tshia bisatu tshia diba, tshia ngondu, ne tshia mitotu. Nanku tshia bisatu tshia bukenka buabi kujimina. Muvua amu miidima tshia bisatu tshia dituku, ne tshia bisatu tshia butuku kabidi." 
Revelation8:13 Meme kumona kabidi nyunyi wa tshiminyi ubuuka mulu mule. Meme kumvua nyunyi awu udila bikole ne: “Eyi dikenga! Dikenga dinene! Dikenga nedikuate bantu ba pa buloba, pelabu mpungi kudi batumibue bakuabu basatu!”" 
Revelation9:1 Pashishe mutumibue muitanu kuela mpungi. Meme kumona mutotu uvua mutuuke mu diulu, mukuluke panshi. Kuupeshabu nsapi wa ku kandondu." 
Revelation9:2 Mutotu unzulula kandondu, muinshi kupatukamu, mufuane wa mu tshikutu tshinene tshia kapia. Kufiikishawu diba ne kapepe." 
Revelation9:3 Mpasu kupatuka mu muinshi awu, kutangalaka pa buloba. Mpasu ayi kupeta bukole bu bua tuminyiminyi." 
Revelation9:4 Kuyikandikabu bua kayinyangi bisosa, nansha mitshi, nansha biakudia bia pa madimi; kadi ikengeshe amu bantu bavuabu kabayi batue tshitampi tshia Mvidi Mukulu pa mpala." 
Revelation9:5 Kayivua ne bukenji bua kushipa bantu abu to; kadi amu bua kubakengesha ngondu itanu. Ivua isuma muntu, usama bu musuma kudi kaminyiminyi." 
Revelation9:6 Ngondu itanu eyi, bantu nebakebe lufu, bua lubakuate. Kadi kaluakubakuata to. Nebajinge kufua. Kadi lufu nelubanyeme mutantshi mule." 
Revelation9:7 Mpasu eyi numfuane tubalu tuvuabu balongolola ku mvita. Pa mitu payi padi bintu bu bifulu bia mpawungi. Mpala yayi numfuane ya bantu. 
Revelation9:8 Nsuki yayi idi bu ya bakaji, menu ayi bu a nyama ya ntambue." 
Revelation9:9 Pa biadi biayi padi bu tuzaku tua tshiamu. Masala ayi adi enza mutoyi bu wa matempu mavule, adi tubalu tupulumuna lukasa ku mvita." 
Revelation9:10 Idi ne mikila ne mianga bu bia tuminyiminyi. Mu mikila amu mudi bukole budi bukengesha bantu ngondu itanu. 
Revelation9:11 Idi ne mukalenga udi uyilombola. Ke mutumibue udi ulama kandondu. Bena Ebrewu badi bamuinyika ne: “Abadone,” bena Ngreke ne: “Apoliyone” (mmomumue ne: Mubutudianganyi)." 
Revelation9:12 Dikenga dia kumpala ndimane kupita; makuabu abidi nealonde. 
Revelation9:13 Pashishe mutumibue muisambombu kuela mpungi. Meme kumvua diyi dipatukila ku matumba anayi a tshilambuilu tshia mpawungi tshidi kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. 
Revelation9:14 Diyi divua diambila mutumibue muisambombu uvua mukuate mpungi ne: “Sulula batumibue banayi bavuabu basuike nkanu pabuipi ne musulu wa Perate. ” 
Revelation9:15 Kusululabu batumibue banayi abu. Bavua babalongolola amu bua diba adi, dituku adi, ngondu awu, ne tshidimu atshi, bua kubutulabu tshia bisatu tshia bantu bonsu." 
Revelation9:16 Kummanyishabu bungi bua basolayi bavua babanda pa tubalu: bavua bitotu nkama ibidi. 
Revelation9:17 Kundejabu tubalu ne basolayi bavua babandepu. Bavua ne tuzaku tua mvita tukunze bu kapia, tua lubidibidi bu mabue a safire, ne tua kalabi bu mvuanda. Mitu ya tubalu ivua bu ya nyama ya ntambue. Mukana muayi muvua mupatuka kapia, muinshi ne mvuanda." 
Revelation9:18 Bipupu bisatu kubutula tshia bisatu tshimue tshia bantu: ke kapia, muinshi, ne mvuanda, bivua bipatuka mukana mua tubalu." 
Revelation9:19 Bualu bukole bua tubalu atu buvua mukana, kabidi ku mikila. Mikila yatu ivua mifuanangane ne nyoka. Ivua ne mitu ya kukengesha nayi bantu." 
Revelation9:20 Kadi bantu bavua bashala ne muoyi, bonsu bavua bipupu ebi kabiyi bibutula, kabavua badilengeja to. Batshivua batendelela nwidie ivuabu badienzela. Batshivua bakukuila mikishi mibi, kabidi ne nwidie mienza ne mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshikunze, ne mabue, kabidi ne mitshi. Ke nwidie idi kayiyi mua kumona, kayiyi yumvua, kayiyi yenda." 
Revelation9:21 Bantu aba kabavua nansha badilengeja ku bibidilu biabu bibi bia kushipangana, kuenza malu a majimbu, kuenda buendenda, kuibangana bintu." 
Revelation10:1 Ke meme kumona mutumibue mukuabu wa bukole utuluka mu diulu. Divuba divua dimubuikile, muanzankongolu mumunyungulukile ku mutu. Mpala wende uvua bu diba, mikolu yende bu makunji a kapia." 
Revelation10:2 Uvua ne mukanda mukese mubulula mu tshianza, mudiate dikasa dia balume mu mayi manene, dia bakaji pa buloba." 
Revelation10:3 Uvua wela diyi dikole, bu ntambue ukungula. Yeye mumane kuela lubila, ke makubakuba muanda mutekete kukungula, andamuna ku lubila luende." 
Revelation10:4 Nkavua musue kufunda diakamue bivua makubakuba amba. Kadi ke meme kumvua diyi difumina mu diulu, dingamba ne: — Kumanyishi muntu malu avua makubakuba muanda mutekete mambe. Kuafundi to." 
Revelation10:5 Pashishe mutumibue umvua mumone muimane kulu, mudiate mu mayi manene ne pa buloba, kuelaye tshianza tshia balume kulu," 
Revelation10:6 uditshipa mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi kashidi, uvua mufuke diulu ne bionsu bidimu, buloba ne bionsu bidimu, mayi manene ne bionsu bidimu, wamba ne: — Kakuena dituku dikuabu to, amu lelu!" 
Revelation10:7 Kadi diba diela mutumibue wa muanda mutekete mpungi, Mvidi Mukulu neakumbaje malu ende masokome, muvuaye mumanyishe bambi bende bavua bamukuatshila mudimu." 
Revelation10:8 Pashishe diyi dimvua mumvue difumina mu diulu, kungamba kabidi ne: — Nda kuangata mukanda mukese udi mubulula, mu tshianza tshia mutumibue udi muimane kulu mu mayi manene ne pa buloba." 
Revelation10:9 Meme kuya kudi mutumibue, kumulomba mukanda mukese. Yeye kungambila ne: — Uwangate, uudie! Newenze bululu mu tshifu tshiebe. Kadi mukana muebe newikale musheme bu buitshi." 
Revelation10:10 Meme kuangata mukanda mukese mu tshianza tshia mutumibue, kuudia. Uvua musheme mukana bu buitshi. Kadi meme mumane kuumina, kungenzawu bululu mu tshifu." 
Revelation10:11 Pashishe kungambilabu ne: — Udi ne bua kumanyisha kabidi malu adi Mvidi Mukulu wamba, adi atangila bisamba bia bungi, matunga, miakulu ne bakalenga." 
Revelation11:1 Pashishe bavua bampeshe dilenga dia kupima nadi, difuanangane ne dikombu, bangamba ne: — Juka, upime nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ne tshilambuilu. Ubale bungi bua bantu badi batendelelamu." 
Revelation11:2 Kadi kupimi lupangu lua pambelu pa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to. Bualu mbalupeshe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Bantu abu nebadiatakaje tshimenga tshia tshijila ngondu makumi anayi ne ibidi. 
Revelation11:3 Meme nentume bajadiki banyi babidi, bavuale bilamba bikayapale. Matuku tshinunu nkama ibidi ne makumi asambombu aa, nebamanyishe bantu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mubambile." 
Revelation11:4 Bajadiki babidi aba ke mitshi ya diye ibidi, ne miendu ibidi idi kumpala kua Mfumu wa buloba." 
Revelation11:5 Pikala muntu ukeba kubakengesha, kapia nekapatuke mukana muabu, kabutule bena lukuna babu. Nenku muntu wakeba mua kubakengesha, nebamushipe mushindu awu." 
Revelation11:6 Bajadiki abu badi ne bumfumu bua kukanga diulu, kukandika mvula bua kaloki matuku adibu bamanyisha bantu muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. Badi kabidi ne bumfumu bua kuandamuna mayi enza mashi, ne bua kunyanga buloba, misangu yonsu idibu basue, ne bipupu bia mishindu yonsu." 
Revelation11:7 Pikala bajadiki bamane kumanyisha bionsu bivua Mvidi Mukulu mubambile, nyama udi upatuka mu kandondu neabaluishe. Neabatshimune, abashipe." 
Revelation11:8 Bitalu biabu nebishale panshi mu musesu wa mu tshimenga tshinene, muaba uvuabu bapopele Mfumu wabu pa mutshi mutshiamakane. Tshimenga etshi badi batshifuanyikija dina ne: Sodome, nansha ne: Ejipitu." 
Revelation11:9 Bantu ba bisamba, meku, miakulu, ne matunga onsu, nebaye kumona bitalu biabu matuku asatu ne tshitupa. Kabakuanyisha bua babijike nansha." 
Revelation11:10 Bantu ba pa buloba nebasanke, batue tshianga, basankishangane ne bintu, bua lufu luabu, bualu bambi babidi aba bavua batatshishe bikole bantu ba pa buloba." 
Revelation11:11 Kadi matuku asatu ne tshitupa mamane kupita, Mvidi Mukulu neabapingajile mueyelu wa muoyi, bua bajuke. Bonsu badi babamona, nebakuatshike bowa bikole." 
Revelation11:12 Pashishe bambi babidi kumvua diyi dikole dia mu diulu, dibabikila ne: “Bandayi kuneku!” Bobu kubuela mu divuba, kubanda munda mua diulu, bena lukuna babu batangile." 
Revelation11:13 Diba adi, tshikumina tshikole kuenzeka. Tshia dikumi tshia tshimenga kupuka. Bantu binunu muanda mutekete kufua ku tshikumina atshi. Bavua bashale ne muoyi kutshina bikole. Kutumbishabu Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu." 
Revelation11:14 Ke dikenga dibidi. Kadi dimukayi! Disatu didi dilonda amu mpindiewu. 
Revelation11:15 Pashishe mutumibue wa muanda mutekete kuela mpungi. Meyi makole kumvuika mu diulu, amba ne: “Bumfumu bua kulombola buloba budi kudi Maweja-Nangila wetu ne kudi Meshiya wende. Nebashale mu bukalenga kashidi. ”" 
Revelation11:16 Ke bakulu makumi abidi ne banayi badi basombe mu nkuasa ya butumbi idi kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, kudiela mpala panshi, bakukuila Mvidi Mukulu," 
Revelation11:17 bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, Wewe udiku, uvuaku, tudi tukuela tuasakidila, bualu udi muleje bukole buebe bunene; kabidi bualu udi mubange bukalenga buebe." 
Revelation11:18 Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bavua bakutombokele ne tshiji. Kadi diba dikadi dimane kukumbana dia Wewe kuleja tshiji tshiebe, dia Wewe kulumbuluisha bafue bonsu. Diba ndimane kufika dia kusankisha bambi bebe bavua bakukuatshila mudimu, ne bantu bebe bonsu badi bakunemeka, baneme ne bashadile. Diba ndimane kufika dia kubutula badi babutula buloba! ”" 
Revelation11:19 Ke nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi mu diulu, kunzuluka. Mushete wa ndondu kumuenekamu. Mikenya, mikungulu, makubakuba, tshikumina kuenzeka, kabidi mvula mukole wa mabue kuloka." 
Revelation12:1 Tshintu tshinene kumueneka mu diulu: ke mukaji uvua muvuale diba bu tshilamba, ngondu kuinshi kua makasa ende, kabidi ne tshifulu tshia bukalenga ku mutu, tshileja mitotu dikumi ne ibidi." 
Revelation12:2 Ukavua pa kulela muana, wela mbila mikole ya pa lulelu, ukengakana." 
Revelation12:3 Tshintu tshikuabu kumueneka mu diulu: ke nyoka mukunze munene wa tshidika, muikale ne mitu muanda mutekete, kabidi ne nsengu dikumi. Ku mutu onsu kuvua tshifulu tshia bukalenga." 
Revelation12:4 Kukombaye tshia bisatu tshia mitotu ya mu diulu ne mukila wende, uyimansha pa buloba. Uvua muimane kumpala kua mukaji ukavua pa kulela, bua kuminaye muana diakamue diba diapatukaye munda." 
Revelation12:5 Ke mukaji kulela muana wa balume, wavua kuludika matunga onsu ne dikombu dia tshiamu. Kadi kubakulabu muana, kuya nende too ne ku nkuasa wa butumbi wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Revelation12:6 Mukaji kunyemena mu tshipela, muvua Mvidi Mukulu mumulongoluele muaba, bua kumudishilamu matuku tshinunu nkama ibidi ne makumi asambombu." 
Revelation12:7 Pashishe mvita kujuka mu diulu. Mikayele ne batumibue bende kuluangana mvita ne nyoka wa tshidika. Nyoka pende uvua ubaluisha ne bende batumibue. 
Revelation12:8 Kadi kutshimunabu nyoka wa tshidika ne batumibue bende abu. Kabavua banyisha bua nyoka ne batumibue bende kushalabu kabidi mu diulu nansha. 
Revelation12:9 Kuipatabu nyoka wa tshidika munene awu mu diulu. Nyoka awu ke nyoka wa kale, udibu binyika ne: diabolu, nansha Satane, udi udinga buloba bujima. Kumuimanshabu pa buloba, pamue ne batumibue bende bonsu." 
Revelation12:10 Ke meme kumvua diyi dikole mu diulu diamba ne: “Tshikondu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu usungidila bantu tshiafiki mpindiewu! Mvidi Mukulu wetu mmuleje bukole buende, mmutuadije bukalenga buende mpindiewu! Udi muteke bumfumu buende mu bianza bia Meshiya wende uvuaye mudisunguile. Bualu mbipate mu diulu musonguedi wa bana hetu, uvua ubasonguela kudi Mvidi Mukulu munya ne butuku." 
Revelation12:11 Bana betu mbamutshimune ku bukole bua mashi a Muana wa mukoku, ne ku bukole bua malu malelela avuabu bambe, bajadike. Bavua bajinga kufila muoyi wabu; nansha bua kufua bavua amu bitabe." 
Revelation12:12 Nanku nuenu, diulu ne badi basombamu, tuayi tshianga! Kadi nuenu, buloba ne mayi manene, nudi bena diakabi! Bualu diabolu mmupueke kunudi. Udi ne tshiji tshikole, bualu udi mumanye mudi matuku ende mashale makese.”" 
Revelation12:13 Nyoka wa tshidika ujingulula ne: mbangele pa buloba, kutuadijaye kulondakaja mukaji uvua mulele muana wa balume awu." 
Revelation12:14 Kadi mukaji uvua mupete mapuapua abidi bu a nyunyi wa tshiminyi. Kubuukaye nawu mu tshipela too ne ku muaba wende, uvuabu ne bua kumudishila bidimu bisatu ne tshitupa, muaba uvua nyoka kayi mua kumupeta." 
Revelation12:15 Ke nyoka kupatula mayi mukana muende bungi bu musulu, avua adiela kudi mukaji, bua adiinemu." 
Revelation12:16 Kadi buloba kuambuluisha mukaji, kutubula mukana, kumina mayi avua nyoka mupatule mukana." 
Revelation12:17 Nyoka kufikila mukaji munda bikole. Kuyaye kuluisha ndelanganyi ya mukaji ivua mishale. Ke bantu bonsu badi batumikila mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, bitabe malu malelela avua Yezu mumanyishe." 
Revelation12:18 Ke nyoka wa tshidika kuimana ku muelelu wa mayi manene. 
Revelation13:1 Pashishe meme kumona nyama upatuka mu mayi manene. Uvua ne nsengu dikumi ne mitu muanda mutekete. Ku lusengu luonsu kuvua tshifulu tshia bukalenga. Pa mitu yende bavua bafunde mena a kusendeka nawu Mvidi Mukulu. 
Revelation13:2 Nyama umvua mumone uvua bu nkashama, mikolu yende bu ya nyama wa urse, ne mukana muende bu mua ntambue. Nyoka wa tshidika uvua mumupeshe bukole buende, nkuasa wende wa bukalenga, ne bumfumu buende bunene." 
Revelation13:3 Umue wa ku mitu yende uvua umueka bu mutapa mputa wa lufu. Kadi mputa awu ukavua mumane kuuma. Buloba bujima buvua bukatshila, bulonda nyama munyima." 
Revelation13:4 Bantu bonsu kutuadija kukukuila nyoka wa tshidika, bualu uvua mufile bumfumu buende kudi nyama. Bavua bakukuila kabidi nyama, bamba ne: “Udi mufuanangane ne nyama nnganyi? Udi mua kuluangana nende nnganyi?”" 
Revelation13:5 Bavua banyishe bua nyama akule miaku ya kapeja, asendeke Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua mupete bumfumu bua kuenza malu ende ngondu makumi anayi ne ibidi." 
Revelation13:6 Kutuadijaye kusendeka Mvidi Mukulu, kupenda dina diende, muaba udiye usomba, kabidi ne bonsu badi basomba mu diulu." 
Revelation13:7 Bavua banyishe bua nyama aluishe bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu, abatshimune. Uvua mupete bumfumu bua kulombola bantu bonsu, ba bisamba bionsu, ba miakulu yonsu, ne ba mu matunga onsu." 
Revelation13:8 Bantu bonsu ba pa buloba nebamukukuile. Ke bonsu bavuabu kabayi bafunde mena abu, mu mukanda wa muoyi katshia bafuka buloba; ke mukanda udi Muana wa mukoku udibu bashipe nawu." 
Revelation13:9 “Udi ne matshi a kumvua, asangane kumvua anyi? Umvue!" 
Revelation13:10 Muntu udibu bafundile lukanu, nebaye nende mu lukanu. Muntu udibu bafundile kufua ku muele wa mvita, neafue ku muele wa mvua. Ke padi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu ne bua kunanukila mu dikenga, kuleja ditaba diabu.”" 
Revelation13:11 Pashishe meme kumona nyama mukuabu upatuka mu buloba. Uvua ne nsengu ibidi bu ya mukoku, wakula bu nyoka wa tshidika." 
Revelation13:12 Uvua utuma diyi ne bumfumu buonsu buvua nyama wa kumpala nabu. Uvua ubambidika buloba ne bantu bonsu, bua bikukuile nyama wa kumpala, uvua ne mputa wa lufu mumane kuuma." 
Revelation13:13 Nyama muibidi ewu uvua wenza malu manene a kukema. Uvua upuekesha kapia ka mu diulu pa buloba, bantu bonsu batangile." 
Revelation13:14 Uvua upambuisha bantu ba pa buloba ku malu a dikema avuaye ne bukenji bua kuenza mu dina dia nyama wa kumpala. Kuambilaye bantu ba pa buloba, bua benze tshimfuanyi, banemekele natshi nyama uvuabu batape muele wa mvita, kadi mutshikale amu ne muoyi." 
Revelation13:15 Nyama muibidi uvua mupete bumfumu bua kupuija mueyelu wa muoyi mu tshimfuanyi tshia nyama wa kumpala, bua tshimfuanyi etshi tshimone mua kuakula, ne kushipa bonsu badi babenga kutshikukuila." 
Revelation13:16 Nyama kubambidika bantu bonsu, bana ne bakulumpe, babanji ne bashadile, bapika ne badi badienzela malu, bua babatue tshitampi pa tshianza tshia balume ne pa mpala." 
Revelation13:17 Muntu nansha umue kavua mua kusumba, nansha kusumbisha, kabayi bamutue tshitampi atshi. Tshitampi atshi tshivua tshibatua dina dia nyama, nansha bungi budi bumvuija dina adi." 
Revelation13:18 Ebi bidi bikengela meji. Amu udi ne lungenyi ke udi mua kujingulula tshidi bungi abu buleja. Bungi ebu budi bumvuija dina dia muntu. Bungi buadi budi nkama isambombu makumi asambombu ne isambombu. 
Revelation14:1 Pashishe nkenzakana, meme kumona Muana wa mukoku muimane kulu pa mukuna wa Siyone. Uvua ne bantu binunu lukama ne makumi anayi ne binayi, bavuabu bafunde dina diende, ne dia Tatu wende, pa mpala." 
Revelation14:2 Meme kumvua diyi difumina mu diulu, dikungula bu bibila binene bia mayi, bu dikubakuba dikole. Kadi diyi adi divua diumvuika kabidi bu miadi ya bisanji bia lunzenze." 
Revelation14:3 Bantu aba binunu ne binunu bavua bimane kumpala kua nkuasa wa butumbi, kua Bia muoyi binayi, ne kua bakulu, bimba musambu mupiamupia. Muntu nansha umue kavua mua kulonga musambu awu, amu bantu abu binunu lukama makumi anayi ne binayi bavuabu bapikule, bumushe pa buloba." 
Revelation14:4 Bobu abu kabavua basombe ne bakaji. Kabavua babuele mu dibaka. Badi balonda Muana wa mukoku kuonsu kudiye uya. Bavua babapikule, babumushe munkatshi mua bantu bakuabu, bua bikale milambu ya tshianyi, idibu balambula Mvidi Mukulu ne Muana wa mukoku." 
Revelation14:5 Katshi kabena babumvua bashima. Kabena ne kalema nansha kamue. 
Revelation14:6 Pashishe meme kumona mutumibue mukuabu ubuuka mulu menemene. Uvua ne bua kumanyisha bantu bonsu ba pa buloba, ba mu bisamba bionsu, ba mu meku onsu, ba miakulu yonsu, ne ba mu matunga onsu, Lumu lua Disanka ludi lushala kashidi." 
Revelation14:7 Uvua wamba ne diyi dikole ne: “Tshinayi Mvidi Mukulu, mutumbishayi! Bualu diba didiye ulumbuluisha bantu ndimane kukumbana. Kukuilayi Mufuki wa diulu, wa buloba, wa mayi manene, ne wa mpokolu ya mayi. ”" 
Revelation14:8 Mutumibue muibidi uvua ulonda wa kumpala, wamba ne: “Eyi tshimenga ntshibutuke! Tshimenga tshinene tshia Babilone ntshibutuke! Ke tshiotshi tshivua tshinuishe bisamba bionsu maluvu atshi, maluvu makole a buendenda buatshi bubi!" 
Revelation14:9 Mutumibue muisatu uvua ulonda babidi ba kumpala, wela diyi dikole ne: “Udi ukukuila nyama ne tshimfuanyi tshiende, wanyisha bua bamutue tshitampi tshiende pa mpala ne pa tshianza," 
Revelation14:10 Mvidi Mukulu neamunuishe maluvu a tshiji tshiende, avuaye muele mu dikopu dia tshiji tshiende, kayi musakidile mayi! Bonsu badi bakukuila nyama, nebabakengeshe mu kapia ne mu mvuanda, batumibue ba tshijila ne Muana wa mukoku bamone." 
Revelation14:11 Muinshi wa kapia kadi kabakengesha udi ubanda mu diulu kashidi. Bonsu bavua bakukuile nyama ne tshimfuanyi tshiende, bavuabu batue tshitampi tshia dina diende, nansha butuku nansha mu munya kabena bapeta dikisha to.”" 
Revelation14:12 Ke padi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, badi bakumbaja mikenji yende, kabidi bitaba Yezu, ne bua kunanukila, kulama lutuulu." 
Revelation14:13 Pashishe meme kumvua diyi difumina mulu, dingamba ne: — Funda ne: “Badi bafuila mu mudimu wa Mfumu bituadija ku mpindiewu, mbena diakalenga!” Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Bushuwa, nebikishe bua midimu mikole ivuabu benze, bualu malu mempe avuabu benze adi abalonda, abakuila.”" 
Revelation14:14 Meme kutangila kabidi, kumona divuba ditoke, basombapu kudi kampanda, umueneka bu muntu. Uvua ne tshifulu tshia bukalenga tshia mpawungi ku mutu, ne muele mutue mu tshianza." 
Revelation14:15 Mutumibue mukuabu kupatuka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, wela diyi dikole, wambila uvua musombe pa di-vuba ne: “Ambula muele webe, unowe, bualu diba ndimane kufika. Bia pa buloba bikadi bipie! ”" 
Revelation14:16 Nenku uvua musombe pa divuba, kukuataye mudimu ne muele wende, kunowa bionsu bivua pa buloba." 
Revelation14:17 Mutumibue mukuabu kupatuka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi mu diulu. Uvua kabidi ne muele mutue. 
Revelation14:18 Mutumibue mukuabu kabidi, uvua ne bumfumu bua kusonsola kapia, uvua ufuma ku tshilambuilu. Kuelaye diyi dikole, wambila uvua ne muele mutue ne: “Angata muele webe, unowe tumuma tua mvinyo tudi mu buloba, bualu tukadi tupie.”" 
Revelation14:19 Nenku ke mutumibue kukuata mudimu ne muele wende pa buloba, kunowa tumuma tua nwinyo, kutuela mu tshikaminu tshinene tshia tshiji tshikole tshia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Revelation14:20 Bavua bazajila tumuma mu tshikaminu ku mpenga kua tshimenga. Mashi kupatuka mu tshikaminu, menza musulu. Kupuekawu mutantshi wa kilometre nkama isatu, mikale ne buondoke bua metre umue ne tshitupa." 
Revelation15:1 Pashishe meme kumona tshintu tshikuabu tshinene, kabidi tshia dikema mu diulu. Ke batumibue muanda mutekete bavua bafika ne bipupu muanda mutekete. Ke bipupu bia ndekelu, bualu nebitalaje tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Revelation15:2 Pashishe meme kumona tshintu bu mayi manene menza bu lumuenu, engelela bu kapia. Meme kumona kabidi bavua batshimune nyama, tshimfuanyi tshiende, ne kampanda uvua ne dina didi bungi budileja. Bavua bimane pa mayi manene awu, bakuate mu tshianza nzenze ivua Mvidi Mukulu mubapeshe." 
Revelation15:3 Bavua bimba musambu wa Moshe, muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ne musambu wa Muana wa mukoku ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udi muenze malu manene a dikema! Mukalenga wa bisamba bionsu, malu audi wela meji, ne audi ukumbaja, adi mimpe, aleja muudi muena diyi dimue." 
Revelation15:4 Maweja-Nangila, wabenga kukutshina nnganyi? Wabenga kukunemeka udiku anyi? Bualu Wewe nkayebe udi wa tshijila. Bisamba bionsu nebikukukuile, bualu bantu bonsu badi bamona patoke malu mimpe audi wenza. ”" 
Revelation15:5 Ebi bimane kuenzeka, meme kumona nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu unzuluka mu diulu. Mu nzubu amu muvua ntenta wa ndondu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Revelation15:6 Batumibue muanda mutekete bavua bakuate bipupu muanda mutekete mu bianza, kupatuka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu amu. Bavua bavuale bilamba bienza ne ndanda mutoke biengelela, basuike mikaba ya mpawungi pa tshiadi." 
Revelation15:7 Tshimue tshia ku Bia muoyi binayi kupeshatshi batumibue muanda mutekete makopu muanda mutekete menza ne mpawungi, avua tente ne tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu, udi ne muoyi kashidi ne kashidi." 
Revelation15:8 Ke nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu kuwula ne muinshi, bualu bua butumbi ne bukole bia Mvidi Mukulu. Muntu nansha umue kavua mua kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bipupu muanda mutekete, bivua batumibue bafike nabi, kabiyi bianji kukumbana." 
Revelation16:1 Pashishe meme kumvua diyi dikole difumina mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, diambila batumibue muanda mutekete ne: “Ndayi, nuitshikije pa buloba makopu muanda mutekete adi ne tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu!”" 
Revelation16:2 Mutumibue wa kumpala kuya kuitshikija dikopu diende pa buloba. Ke mubidi wa bantu bonsu bavuabu batue tshitampi tshia nyama, bakukuile tshimfuanyi tshiende, kupandika mputa mibi, ibasamisha bikole." 
Revelation16:3 Mutumibue muibidi kuitshikija dikopu diende pa mayi manene. Mayi kuandamuka mashi, bu a muntu mushipa. Ke bionsu bivua ne muoyi mu mayi kufuabi." 
Revelation16:4 Mutumibue muisatu kuitshikija dikopu diende mu misulu ne mu mpokolu ya mayi. Kuandamukabi mashi. 
Revelation16:5 Ke meme kumvua mutumibue udi utangila mayi, wamba ne: “Wewe udi wa Tshijila, udiku ne muaku, udi muakane, bualu udi mukose nsambu pa yoyi pa kuenza nanku." 
Revelation16:6 Bualu bavua bapumune mashi a bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, ne a bambi. Mpindiewu Wewe udi mubanuishe mashi. mBapete bivuabu ne bua kupeta!”" 
Revelation16:7 Pashishe meme kumvua diyi difumina ku tshilambuilu, diamba ne: “Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udi ukosa nsambu mudiyi, mu bulelela!”" 
Revelation16:8 Mutumibue muinayi kuitshikija dikopu diende pa diba. Ke kupetadi bukenji bua kuosha bantu ne kapia kadi. 
Revelation16:9 Munya kuosha bantu bikole. Ke bantu kusendeka dina dia Mvidi Mukulu uvua ulongolola bipupu ebi. Kadi kabavua badilengeja, kabavua batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu to." 
Revelation16:10 Mutumibue muitanu kuitshikija dikopu diende pa nkuasa wa bukalenga wa nyama. Ke bukalenga bua nyama kudiina mu miidima. Bantu bavua bakenga, badisuma menu ku ludimi bua dikenga." 
Revelation16:11 Bavua basendeka Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu bua makenga abu, ne bua mputa yabu. Kadi kabavua balekela malu abu mabi." 
Revelation16:12 Mutumibue muisambombu kuitshikija dikopu diende pa musulu munene wa Perate. Musulu kuuma, bua bakalenga badi batumina luseke ludi diba dipatukila bapete muaba wa kusabukila." 
Revelation16:13 Pashishe meme kumona mikishi mibi isatu, mifuanangane ne ndimba. Ivua ipatuka mukana mua nyoka wa tshidika, mua nyama, ne mua muambi wa dishima." 
Revelation16:14 Ke mikishi ya diabolu idi yenza malu a dikema. Mikishi isatu ayi ivua iya kumonangana ne bakalenga ba pa buloba bujima, ikeba kubasangisha bua mvita ya dituku dinene dia Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu." 
Revelation16:15 Mfumu udi wamba ne: “Teleja! Ndi mfika bu muivi. Muntu udi ushala mutabale, kayi ukopola bilamba biende, mmuena diakalenga, bualu kakuenda butaka, kakumvua bundu, pikalabu bamumona nanku.”" 
Revelation16:16 Mikishi kusangisha bakalenga muaba udibu binyika ne: Armagedone, mu buena ebrewu." 
Revelation16:17 Mutumibue wa muanda mutekete kuitshikija dikopu diende mu kapepe. Diyi dikole kumvuika mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu difumina ku nkuasa wa butumbi, diamba ne: “Ke ndekelu wa bionsu!”" 
Revelation16:18 Ke mikenya, mitoyi, makubakuba, ne tshikumina tshikole kuenzekabi. Tshikumina tshikole tshia nanku ki ntshianji kuenzeka, katshia bafuka bantu! Buloba kuzakala bikole bipite." 
Revelation16:19 Tshimenga tshinene tshiena tshipanduluke mu bitupa bisatu. Bimenga bia matunga onsu kuupuka. Mvidi Mukulu kavua mupue Babilone munene muoyi. Kumunuishaye maluvu a mu dikopu diende, divua tente ne tshiji tshiende tshikole." 
Revelation16:20 Bidiila bionsu kujimina. Kabavua bamone kabidi mikuna minene. 
Revelation16:21 Mvula wa mabue kuloka, mabue a bujitu bua kilo bu makumi anayi. Kutuutawu bantu. Bu muvua tshipupu tshia mabue atshi tshikole tshipite, bantu bavua amu basendeka Mvidi Mukulu." 
Revelation17:1 Ke umue wa ku batumibue muanda mutekete bavua ne makopu muanda mutekete kufika, ungambila ne: — Luaku. Nenkuleje mudibu ne bua kunyoka muena buendenda munene, tshimenga tshinene tshivuabu bibake ku mielelu ya misulu mivule." 
Revelation17:2 Bakalenga ba matunga bavua benda nende buendenda. Bantu ba pa buloba bavua bakuatshike maluvu a ku buendenda buende bubi. 
Revelation17:3 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kumvulula, kuya nanyi mu tshipela. Meme kumonamu mukaji musombe pa nyama mukunze kunzuu. Bavua bafunde pambidi ponsu pa nyama mena a kupenda nawu Mvidi Mukulu. Nyama awu uvua ne mitu muanda mutekete, ne nsengu dikumi." 
Revelation17:4 Mukaji uvua muvuale bilamba bimpe bikunze bia mushinga mukole. Uvua mudilengeje ne bintu bivule bia mpawungi, kabidi ne mabue a mushinga mukole, ne a busanga. Uvua ne dikopu dia mpawungi mu tshianza, diwule tente ne bintu bibi bia bundu bidi bileja buendenda buende." 
Revelation17:5 Bavua bafunde pa mpala pende dina diamba bualu busokoka ne: “Babilone munene, mamuende wa bakaji bena buendenda, ne wa malu mabi onsu a pa buloba!”" 
Revelation17:6 Ke meme kumona mukaji awu, mukuatshike mashi a bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua mukuatshike mashi a bonsu bavuabu bashipe bualu bavua bitabe Yezu. Pamvua mumumone nanku, meme kukuatshika buowa bunene." 
Revelation17:7 Ke mutumibue kungebeja ne: — Muudi ukema nanku mbishi? Nenkumvuije bualu busokome bua mukaji ewu, ne bua nyama wa mitu muanda mutekete ne nsengu dikumi udi mumuambule." 
Revelation17:8 Nyama uuvua mumone uvua ne muoyi kale, kadi kena kabidi nawu to. Udi ne bua kupatuka mu kandondu, kadi amu bua aye kubutuka. Bantu ba pa buloba badi kabayi ne dina difunda mu mukanda wa muoyi, katshia bafuka bantu, nebakeme pamonabu nyama. Bualu kale nyama awu uvua ne muoyi, kadi katshiena kabidi nawu. Dikuabu dituku neamueneke tshiakabidi." 
Revelation17:9 Amu muena meji, wa lungenyi, ke udi mua kujingulula bualu bundi ngamba mpindiewu. Mitu muanda mutekete ke mikuna muanda mutekete idi mukaji musombe. Idi kabidi bakalenga muanda mutekete." 
Revelation17:10 Batanu ba kudibu bakadi bapona panshi. Umue udi mu bukalenga lelu, mukuabu kena muanji kufika. Pafikaye, neashale amu matuku makese." 
Revelation17:11 Nyama uvua ne muoyi kale, kadi katshiyi nawu, ke udi mukalenga wa muanda mukulu. Kadi udi kabidi wa ku bakalenga ba kumpala muanda mutekete abu. Neabutuke ne yeye kabidi." 
Revelation17:12 Nsengu dikumi iudi mumone ayi, ke bakalenga dikumi badi kabayi banji kudia bukalenga. Kadi nebabudie pamue ne nyama, bua bikale ku bumfumu diba amu dimue." 
Revelation17:13 Bonsu dikumi badi bipatshila amu bualu bumue: kupesha nyama bukole buabu ne bumfumu buabu. 
Revelation17:14 Nebaluishe Muana wa mukoku. Kadi Muana wa mukoku neabatshimune, bualu udi Mfumu wa bamfumu ne Mukalenga wa bakalenga. Neabatshimune pamue ne bonsu badi bende, bamuitaba ne muoyi umue. Ke bavuaye mubikile, mudisunguile." 
Revelation17:15 Mutumibue kungambila kabidi ne: — Mayi auvua mumone muaba uvua mukaji muena buendenda musombe, ke bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu, ba mu matunga onsu, ne ba miakulu yonsu." 
Revelation17:16 Kadi nsengu dikumi iuvua mumone, kabidi ne nyama, nebikine mukaji muena buendenda. Nebimunyenge bionsu bidiye nabi, bimushiye butaka. Nebidie munyinyi wende, bibutule biende bidi bishala mu kapia." 
Revelation17:17 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmubapeshe meji a kukumbaja bidiye musue. Nebumvuangane, bapeshe nyama bukalenga buabu, too ne pakumbana miaku ivua Mvidi Mukulu muambe." 
Revelation17:18 Kadi mukaji uuvua mumone, ke tshimenga tshinene, tshidi bakalenga ba pa buloba batumikila." 
Revelation18:1 Malu aa mamane kupita, meme kumona mutumibue mukuabu utuluka mu diulu. Uvua ne bumfumu bunene. Butumbi buende buvua bukenkesha buloba bujima." 
Revelation18:2 Uvua wela diyi dikole, wamba ne: “Eyi, tshimenga ntshibutuke! Tshimenga tshinene tshia Babilone ntshibutuke! Tshikadi mpindiewu muaba udi diabolu ne mikishi mibi ya mishindu yonsu bisombela. Nyunyi mibi ya mikiya ya mishindu yonsu kabidi idi isombamu." 
Revelation18:3 Bualu tshimenga etshi tshivua tshinuishe bisamba bionsu maluvu atshi, maluvu makole a buendenda buatshi bubi. Bakalenga ba pa buloba bavua benza natshi malu a bundu. ’ Bangenda mushinga ba pa buloba bavua banema ne bintu bimpe kabiyi kubala, bivuatshi nabi.”" 
Revelation18:4 Pashishe meme kumvua diyi dikuabu difuma mu diulu, diamba ne: “Bantu banyi, umukayi mu tshimenga etshi, bua bubi buatshi kabunulamatshi, kabanunyoki pamue natshi." 
Revelation18:5 Mvidi Mukulu kena mupue muoyi malu mabi a Babilone, bualu mibi ya tshimenga etshi idi yenza mishiki too ne mu diulu." 
Revelation18:6 Enzelayi Babilone muvuaye munuenzele. Mufutayi misangu ibidi pa bivuaye muenze. Uwujayi dikopu diende ne maluvu makole. Bukole buawu bupite misangu ibidi bua avuaye munuelele. 
Revelation18:7 Numubungamije, munukengeshe, bilondeshile muvuaye uditemba bua lumu ne bubanji bivuaye nabi. Uvua udiamba ne: ‘Meme apa ndi Mukalenga mukaji. Tshiena mukamba to. Makenga kaakunkuata to.’" 
Revelation18:8 Ke padi bipupu bionsu, bidibu bamulamina, ne bua kumukuata dituku dimue: disama dia lufu, madilu, ne tshiyole tshia nzala. Kapia nekamubutule. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi umulumbuluisha, udi ne bukole. ”" 
Revelation18:9 Bakalenga ba buloba, bavua benze nende malu a bundu, basanke pamue ne bubanji buende, nebadile, bele miyenga, pamonabu muinshi wa kapia kadi kosha tshimenga." 
Revelation18:10 Nebimane mutantshi mule, bazakale bua makenga adi ne bua kukuata tshimenga. Nebambe ne: “Babilone, ndiakabi kaayi edi! nDikenga kaayi! Wewe tshimenga tshinene, tshia bukole kabidi! Badi bakunyoka amu diba dimue, ubutuka butubutuu! ”" 
Revelation18:11 Bangenda mushinga ba pa buloba kabidi badi badila, bela miyenga bualu buende, bualu muntu nansha umue kena usumba kabidi bintu biabu." 
Revelation18:12 Kabatshiena basumba mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, mabue a mushinga mukole, ne a busanga; bilamba bimpe bienza ne ndanda, bilamba bia lumu bifikuluke ne bikunze, bikuabu bienza ne buanda bua meshi; bintu bishilangane bienza ne mibanga, ne mabaya a mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshikunze, nansha tshifiike, nansha ne mabue a mekala;" 
Revelation18:13 bintu bishilangane bia kulunga nabi biakudia; manananshi, musenga wa kamonya; maluvu, mafuta, bukula ne ntete ya kuenza bukula; ngombe ne mikoku, nyama ya tubalu ne matempu; bapika ne bantu bakuabu bena mudimu." 
Revelation18:14 Bangenda mushinga aba badi bambila tshimenga ne: “Bintu bionsu biuvua mujinge mbikujimine. Bubanji buebe ne lumu luebe mbikunyeme lubilu. Kashidi kuakubipeta kabidi to!” 
Revelation18:15 Bangenda mushinga bavua banemena mu tshimenga etshi, nebimanyine kule bua makenga atshi kaabakuatshi. Nebadile miadi, bele miyenga," 
Revelation18:16 bamba ne: “Diakabi kaayi edi! Dikenga kaayi bunene nanku didi dikuata tshimenga! Tshivua tshivuale bilamba bimpe bienza ne ndanda, bilamba bia lumu bifikuluke ne bikunze bia mushinga mukole. Tshivua tshidilengeja ne bintu bia bungi bia mpawungi, kabidi ne mabue a mushinga mukole, ne a busanga." 
Revelation18:17 Biuma biebe bionsu ebi bikadi bikujimine amu diba dimue!” Balombodi bonsu ba majuwa ne bena luendu, bena mudimu ba majuwa, ne bangenda mushinga bonsu badi benda pa mayi manene, bavua bimanyine amu kule!" 
Revelation18:18 Bavua bela bibingu, pavuabu bamona muinshi wa kapia kavua kosha tshimenga, bamba ne: “Kakuvua tshimenga tshifuanangane ne tshimenga tshinene etshi to!”" 
Revelation18:19 Bavua badiela buloba mu mitu, badila, bela miyenga, bamba ne: “Diakabi kaayi! Dikenga kaayi bunene nanku didi dikuata tshimenga! Bonsu badi ne ntatu enda pa mayi manene, mbaneme ne bubanji bua tshimenga etshi. Kadi kujimijatshi bionsu amu diba dimue! ”" 
Revelation18:20 Wewe diulu, sanka, bua padi tshimenga etshi tshibutuke. Nuenu bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, nuenu bapostolu ne bambi, tuayi tshianga! Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmutshifundile tshibawu tshia bubi buvuatshi tshinuenzele!" 
Revelation18:21 Nenku mutumibue wa dikanda kuambula dibue dia bujitu, bu didibu bapela nadi. Kudielaye mu mayi manene, wamba ne: “Ke muelabu tshimenga tshinene tshia Babilone panshi ne bukole buonsu. Kabakutshimona kabidi kashidi kashidi." 
Revelation18:22 Babilone, kashidi kabakumvua kabidi muebe miadi ya nzenze, ne ya misambu ya tungimba, ya bedi ba nshiba, nansha ba mpungi. Kabakumona muena mudimu wa bianza nansha umue muebe. Kabakumvua kabidi muadi wa dibue diatshipelelu." 
Revelation18:23 Muendu kawakukenka kabidi muebe nansha musangu umue. Kabakumvua kabidi muebe mbila ya disanka ya badi babuela mu dibaka. Bangenda mushinga ba muebe ke bavua bapite ba buloba bujima. Kadi udi mushime bisamba bionsu ne malu ebe a majimbu. ” 
Revelation18:24 Bavua banyoka Babilone, bualu badi basangane mu tshimenga etshi mashi a bambi, ne a bantu bakuabu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Eyowa, mashi a bonsu bavuabu bashipe pa buloba adi pambidi pende." 
Revelation19:1 Malu aa mamane kupita, meme kumvua mu diulu meyi makole bu a bantu ba bungi, bamba ne: “Aleluya! Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila! Lupandu, butumbi ne bukole bidi kudi Mvidi Mukulu wetu!" 
Revelation19:2 Udi ukosa nsambu amu mudiyi! Bualu mmunyoke muena buendenda munene, uvua munyange buloba ne malu ende a bundu. Uvua mumusombuele, bualu uvua mushipe bantu bende.”" 
Revelation19:3 Kuambabu kabidi ne: “Aleluya! Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila! Muinshi wa kapia kadi kosha tshimenga tshinene udi uya mulu kashidi. 
Revelation19:4 Ke bakulu makumi abidi ne banayi, ne Bia muoyi binayi, kudiela panshi, bikukuila Mvidi Mukulu, udi musombe mu nkuasa wa butumbi, bimba ne: “Amene! Aleluya! Tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu!”" 
Revelation19:5 Diyi kufumina ku nkuasa wa butumbi, diamba ne: “Nuenu bonsu bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu wetu, nuenu bonsu badi bamunemeka, baneme ne bashadile!”" 
Revelation19:6 Pashishe meme kumvua meyi a bantu bavule, akungula bu bibila binene bia mayi, bu makubakuba makole. Meme kumvua bamba ne: “Aleluya! Tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu! Bualu Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu muena bukole buonsu, mmuangate bukalenga buende!" 
Revelation19:7 Tutuayi tshianga, tusankayi, tumutumbishayi! Bualu tshibilu tshia dibaka dia Muana wa mukoku ntshimane kukumbana. Mukajende kabidi mmumane kudilongolola." 
Revelation19:8 Bavua banyishe bua mukajende avuale bilamba bimpe, bienza ne buanda bua ndanda, biengelela kabiyi katoba.” (Bilamba bimpe bienza ne buanda bua ndanda, bidi bileja malu mimpe avua bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu benze.)" 
Revelation19:9 Mutumibue kungambila ne: — Funda ne: Badibu babikila ku didia dia dibaka dia Muana wa mukoku, mbena diakalenga. Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Miaku ya Mvidi Mukulu eyi kayena ya dishima." 
Revelation19:10 Ke meme kudiela ku makasa ende bua kumukukuila. Kadi kungambilaye ne: — Kuenji nanku to! Meme kabidi ndi amu muena mudimu bu wewe, bu bana benu badi bitaba bulelela buvua Yezu mubamanyishe. Kukuila Mvidi Mukulu nkayende! Bulelela budi Yezu ujadika, ke Mueyelu udi umanyisha bambi malu." 
Revelation19:11 Pashishe meme kumona diulu diunzuluka, kabalu katoke kamuenekamu. Udi mubandepu badi bamuinyika: Wa diyi dimue, Wa malu malelela; udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi, uluangana mvita amu pa bualu." 
Revelation19:12 Mesu ende avua engelela bu kapia. Uvua muase bifulu bivule bia bukalenga pa mutu. Bavua bafunde pambidi pende dina didiye yeye nkayende mumanye. 
Revelation19:13 Uvua muvuale muntumpu mutua mu mashi. Dina diende didi ne: “Muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu.” 
Revelation19:14 Biluilu bia mu diulu bivua bimulonda pa tubalu tutoke, bivuale bilamba bienza ne buanda buimpe bua ndanda mutoke, kabiyi katoba." 
Revelation19:15 Mukana muende muvua mupatuka muele mutue wa kutapa nawu bisamba bidi bimubenga. Neabiludike ne dikombu dia tshiamu. Neabizaze mudibu bazaza tumuma tua nwinyo mu tshikaminu. Ke mudiye utalaja tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu buowa. 
Revelation19:16 Bavua bafunde pa muntumpu wende ne pa tshibelu tshiende dina diende ne: “Mukalenga mupite bakalenga bonsu, Mfumu mupite bamfumu bonsu.”" 
Revelation19:17 Pashishe meme kumona mutumibue muimane mu diba. Uvua wela nyunyi yonsu ivua ibuuka mulu mule diyi dikole ne: “Luayi, nusangile bonsu mu tshibilu tshinene tshia Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Revelation19:18 Luayi, nudie munyinyi wa bakalenga, wa balombodi ba basolayi, ne wa basolayi babu; munyinyi wa tubalu ne wa badi babandapu; munyinyi wa bantu bonsu, bapika ne badi badienzela malu, baneme ne bashadile. ”" 
Revelation19:19 Pashishe meme kumona nyama, ne bakalenga ba buloba. Bavua basangisha biluilu biabu bua kuluisha uvua mubande pa kabalu ne tshiluilu tshiende." 
Revelation19:20 Kukuatabu nyama, pamue ne muambi wa dishima uvua muenze malu a dikema, nyama mutangile. (Uvua mudinge ne malu a dikema awu bavuabu batue tshitampi tshia nyama, bakukuile tshimfuanyi tshiende.) Bavua bela nyama ne muambi wa dishima, batshikale ne muoyi, mu mayi manene avua atema kapia ka mvuanda." 
Revelation19:21 Kushipabu biluilu biabu ku muele uvua upatuka mukana mua uvua mubande pa kabalu. Nyunyi yonsu kudiayi minyinyi yabi. 
Revelation20:1 Pashishe meme kumona mutumibue upatuka mu diulu, mukuate mu tshianza nsapi ya ku kandondu, kabidi ne lukanu lukole." 
Revelation20:2 Kukuataye nyoka wa tshidika, nyoka wa kale: ke diabolu nansha Satane. Kumusuikaye bua bamulame mu lukanu bidimu tshinunu." 
Revelation20:3 Mutumibue kumuela mu kandondu, kukanga ne nsapi, kutua tshitampi, bua nyoka wa tshidika kamonyi mua kupambula kabidi bisamba bia bantu, too ne muakumbana bidimu tshinunu. Pakumbana bidimu ebi, nebanji kumulekela bua katupa kipi." 
Revelation20:4 Pashishe meme kumona nkuasa ya butumbi. Bavua basombamu, bavua bapete bumfumu bua kulumbuluisha bantu. Meme kumona kabidi bantu bavuabu bashipe, bualu bavua bajadike malu malelela avua Yezu mumanyishe, bajadike ne muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu aba kabavua bakukuile nyama, nansha tshimfuanyi tshiende. Kabavua babatue tshitampi tshia nyama pa mpala, nansha pa tshianza to. Kufululukabu, kudiabu bukalenga pamue ne Kristu bidimu tshinunu." 
Revelation20:5 (Bafue bakuabu kabavua bafululuka, amu bidimu tshinunu bimane kukumbana.) Edi ke dibiika dia kumpala." 
Revelation20:6 Bantu bavua bafululuka musangu wa kumpala awu mbena diakalenga, badi Mvidi Mukulu muele lupemba mushindu musunguluke! Lufu luibidi kaluena lubakuata to. Nebakuatshile Mvidi Mukulu ne Kristu mudimu wa butuangaji. Nebadie bukalenga pamue ne Kristu bidimu tshinunu." 
Revelation20:7 Papita bidimu tshinunu, nebapande diabolu mu lukanu." 
Revelation20:8 Neaye kudinga bantu bonsu ku ntengu inayi ya buloba, ke Ngoge ne Magoge. Neabasangishe bua kuluangana mvita. Nebikale bungi bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Revelation20:9 Badi batangalaka mu buloba bujima, banyungulukila mitanda ya bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, ne tshimenga tshidi Mvidi Mukulu munange. Kadi kapia kadi katuluka mu diulu, kabosha kababutula." 
Revelation20:10 Diba adi, nebele diabolu uvua mubadinge mu mayi manene avua atema kapia ka mvuanda. mukavuabu bamane kuela nyama ne muambi wa dishima. Nebabakengeshe muaba awu munya ne butuku kashidi." 
Revelation20:11 Pashishe meme kumona nkuasa munene mutoke wa butumbi, ne uvua musombepu. Buloba ne diulu bivua bimunyema lubilu, bijimina kashidi." 
Revelation20:12 Pashishe meme kumona bafue bonsu, baneme ne bashadile, bimane kulu kumpala kua nkuasa wa butumbi. Kubululabu mikanda. Kubululabu kabidi mukanda mukuabu, mukanda wa muoyi. Kulumbuluishabu bafue, bilondeshile malu avuabu benze, avuabu bafunde mu mikanda ayi." 
Revelation20:13 Mayi manene kupingaja bafue bavua munda muawu. Lufu ne kandondu kabidi kupingaja bafue bavuabi bilame. Ke kulumbuluishabu muntu yonsu pa bivuaye muenze. 
Revelation20:14 Kadi kuelabu lufu ne kandondu ka bafue mu mayi manene atema kapia. (Mayi manene adi atema kapia aa, ke lufu luibidi.)" 
Revelation20:15 Muntu yonsu uvua kayi ne dina diende mu mukanda wa muoyi, bavua bamuela mu mayi manene atema kapia." 
Revelation21:1 Pashishe meme kumona diulu dipiadipia ne buloba bupiabupia. Diulu dia kumpala ne buloba bua kumpala bikavua bijimine. Mayi manene kaatshivuaku to. 
Revelation21:2 Ke meme kumona tshimenga tshia tshijila, Yerushalayime mupiamupia, utuluka mu diulu, ufuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua muvuale bilenga biende bia tshibilu, muindile bayende bua kubuela mu dibaka." 
Revelation21:3 Ke meme kumvua diyi dikole difumina ku nkuasa wa butumbi, diamba ne: “Mpindiewu Mvidi Mukulu udi usomba pamue ne bantu! Neashale nabu. Bobu nebikale tshisamba tshiende. Mvidi Mukulu mene neashale nabu; neikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Revelation21:4 Neabakuupule binsonji bionsu ku mesu. Lufu kaluakuikalaku kabidi, nansha madilu, nansha miadi, nansha dikenga. Bikulukulu nebishile bipiabipia muaba. ’’" 
Revelation21:5 Diba adi uvua musombe mu nkuasa wa butumbi kuambaye ne: “Mpindiewu ndi ngenzulula bionsu, bishale bipiabipia.” Pashishe kungambilaye ne: — Funda miaku yanyi eyi, bualu idi milelela. Udi mua kuyitaba." 
Revelation21:6 Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Miaku yanyi mmimane kukumbana! Ndi Alfa ne Omega, ntuadijilu ne ndekelu. Udi ne nyota, nemmupeshe tshiakunua, kayi ufuta. Nemmupeshe mayi a ku mpokolu wa mayi a muoyi." 
Revelation21:7 Tshidi muntu mua kupeta kundi padiye utshimuna ntshietshi: Nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wende, yeye neikale muananyi." 
Revelation21:8 Kadi bena bukata, bantu badi bavila Mvidi Mukulu, bamutombokela, bashipianganyi, benji ba malu a bundu, benji ba malu a majimbu, batendeledi ba nwidie, ne bena dishima bonsu, nebabele mu mayi manene atema kapia ka mvuanda. Mayi manene aa ke lufu luibidi." 
Revelation21:9 Umue wa ku batumibue muanda mutekete bavua ne makopu muanda mutekete muwule ne bipupu muanda mutekete bia ndekelu, kufikaye kundi, ungambila ne: — Luaku! Nenkuleje mukaji udi ubuela mu dibaka ne Muana wa mukoku." 
Revelation21:10 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kumvulula. Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kungambula, kumfikisha ku lusongu lua mukuna mupite bule. Kundejaye Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshia tshijila, tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mutulule mu diulu." 
Revelation21:11 Tshimenga tshivua tshiwule ne butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu, tshibalakana bu dibue dia mushinga mukole, bu dibue dia yaspise, dimueneka munda ne panyima bu lusoka lua kristale." 
Revelation21:12 Tshimana tshipite bule tshivua tshinyungulukile tshimenga. Ku tshimana aku kuvua biibi dikumi ne bibidi. Ku tshiibi tshionsu kuvua mutumibue uvua utshilama. Bavua bafunde pa biibi mena a bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia bena Izrayele. 
Revelation21:13 Ku luseke luonsu, ne ndua kudi diba dipatukila, ne ndua ku mutu, ne ndua kuinshi, ne ndua kudi diba dibuelela, kuvua biibi bisatu." 
Revelation21:14 Bavua bashikike tshimana tshia tshimenga pa mabue dikumi ne abidi. Bavua bafunde pa mabue apu mena a bapostolu dikumi ne babidi ba Muana wa mukoku. 
Revelation21:15 Mutumibue uvua uyukila nanyi, uvua ne dikombu dia mpawungi, bua kupima nadi tshimenga, biibi biatshi, ne tshimana tshiatshia." 
Revelation21:16 Nseke yonsu inayi ya tshimenga ivua mushindu umue. Nenku bule buvua momumue ne butshiama. Mutumibue uvua upima tshimenga ne dikombu, kupetaye kilometre binunu bibidi ne nkama ibidi mu bule, mu butshiama, ne mu butumbuke." 
Revelation21:17 Kupimaye kabidi tshimana, kupeta metre makumi asambombu ne atanu mulu, bilondeshile tshipimu tshia tshibidilu tshivuaye natshi." 
Revelation21:18 Bavua bibake tshimana ne mabue a yaspise, base tshimenga ne mpawungi muimpe mutambe, umueneka munda ne panyima, bu talatala kayi katoba." 
Revelation21:19 Bavua balengeje mabue a tshitaku tshia tshimana tshia tshimenga ne mabue a mushinga mukole a mishindu yonsu: dibue dia kumpala dia tshitaku divua dia yaspise, dibidi dia safire, disatu dia agate, dinayi dia emerode," 
Revelation21:20 ditanu dia onikse, disambombu dia sarduwane, dia muanda mutekete dia krizolite, dia muanda mukulu dia berile, dia tshitema dia topaze, dia dikumi dia krizopraze, dia dikumi ne dimue dia turkuwaze, ne dia dikumi ne dibidi dia ametiste." 
Revelation21:21 Biibi dikumi ne bibidi bivua mabue a busanga dikumi ne abidi. Bavua benze tshiibi tshionsu amu ne dibue dinene dimue dia busanga. Bavua benze musesu munene wa mu tshimenga ne mpawungi menemene, umueneka munda ne panyima bu talatala." 
Revelation21:22 Tshivua mumone nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu tshimenga etshi to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, pamue ne Muana wa mukoku, badi nzubu watshi." 
Revelation21:23 Tshimenga katshiena tshikengela butoke bua diba, nansha bua ngondu, bualu butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu budi butshitokesha; kabidi Muana wa mukoku ke muendu watshi." 
Revelation21:24 Bisamba bia bantu nebiende mu butoke bua tshimenga atshi. Bakalenga ba matunga nebafikemu ne bubanji buabu. 
Revelation21:25 Biibi bia tshimenga nebishale buashi dituku dijima. Kashidi kabakubinjila to. Bualu butuku kabuakuikala mu tshimenga etshi. 
Revelation21:26 Bisamba nebifikemu ne bilenga biabi, kabidi ne bubanji buabi." 
Revelation21:27 Kadi tshintu nansha tshimue tshidi ne mikiya, katshiakubuela mu tshimenga etshi. Muntu udi wenza malu mabi, ushima, kakubuelamu. Amu badi ne mena abu mu mukanda wa muoyi, mukanda wa Muana wa mukoku, ke badi mua kubuelamu." 
Revelation22:1 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kundeja musulu udi ne mayi a muoyi, ubalakana bu lusoka lua kristale. Musulu awu udi upatuka ku nkuasa wa butumbi wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne wa Muana wa mukoku," 
Revelation22:2 upueka munkatshi mua musesu munene wa mu tshimenga. Ku nseke ibidi ya musulu kudi mutshi wa muoyi, udi ukuama bimuma misangu dikumi ne ibidi ku tshidimu, musangu umue ku ngondu yonsu. Bavua bondapa bisamba bia bantu ne mabeji awu." 
Revelation22:3 Mu tshimenga kamuakuikala kabidi tshintu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mutshipe. Nkuasa wa butumbi wa Mvidi Mukulu ne wa Muana wa mukoku neikale mu tshimenga. Bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu nebamukukuile. 
Revelation22:4 Nebamone mpala wende. Nebafunde dina diende pa mpala yabu. 
Revelation22:5 Butuku kabuakuikala kabidi to. Kabakukengela munya, nansha muendu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu neabakenkeshile butoke buende. Nebadie bumfumu kashidi." 
Revelation22:6 Pashishe mutumibue kungambila ne: — Miaku eyi mmilelela, nudi mua kuyitaba. Kabidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, udi upa bambi Mueyelu wende, uvua mutume mutumibue wende, bua aleje bantu bende bidi ne bua kuenzeka amu mpindiewu." 
Revelation22:7 Yezu udi wamba ne: “Teleja! Nkadi mu njila! Bantu badi bitaba miaku idi muambi mufunde mu mukanda ewu, mbena diakalenga!”" 
Revelation22:8 Meme Yowanane, mvua mumvue bionsu ebi, mubimone kabidi. Meme mumane kubiu-mvua, mubimone bionsu, ke meme kudiela panshi ku makasa a mutumibue uvua mubideje, bua kumukukuila." 
Revelation22:9 Kadi yeye kungambila ne: — Kuenji nanku to! Ndi muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu bu wewe, bu bana benu bambi, bu bonsu badi bitaba miaku ya mu mukanda ewu. Kukuila Mvidi Mukulu nkayende!" 
Revelation22:10 Pashishe kungambaye ne: — Kusokoki miaku ya muambi idi mu mukanda ewu, bualu tshikondu tshidi bionsu ebi ne bua kuenzeka tshikadi pabuipi." 
Revelation22:11 Udi wenza malu mabi, atungunuke amu nawu. Udi musue kupia mikiya, apie amu mikiya. Kadi udi wenza malu mimpe, atungunuke amu nawu. Udi wa tshijila, ashale amu wa tshijila." 
Revelation22:12 Yezu kuamba ne: “Teleja! Nkadi mu njila! Nennutuadile mafutu enu. Nemfute muntu yonsu bilondeshile bivuaye muenze. 
Revelation22:13 Ndi Alfa ne Omega, wa kumpala ne wa ndekelu, ntuadijilu ne nshikidilu. ”" 
Revelation22:14 Bantu badi basukula mintumpu yabu, mbena diakalenga. Nanku nebabanyishe bua badie tshimuma tshia mutshi wa muoyi, babuele mu tshimenga, bapitshile ku tshiibi." 
Revelation22:15 Kadi bantu badi batombokela Mvidi Mukulu, benza malu a majimbu, benza malu a bundu, bashipianganyi, batendeledi ba nwidie, ne bonsu badi bashimangana ku miaku nansha ku ngenzelu, kabakubuela mu tshimenga!" 
Revelation22:16 “Meme Yezu, mvua mutume mutumibue wanyi bua kunujadikila bionsu ebi mu Bisumbu bienu bia bena ditaba. Ndi wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide. Ndi mutotu wa nkesha. ”" 
Revelation22:17 Mueyelu wa Tshijila, ne Mukaji udi ubuela mu dibaka, badi bamba ne: “Luaku!” Udi mumvue muaku ewu, ambe kabidi ne: “Luaku!” Muntu udi ne nyota, asemene pabuipi. Muntu udi ujinga kunua mayi a muoyi, nebamupewu tshianana." 
Revelation22:18 Meme Yowanane, ndi mbela bantu bonsu badi bumvua miaku ya muambi idi mu mukanda ewu ne: pikala muntu musakidile tshintu ku miaku eyi, Mvidi Mukulu neasakidile ku dinyoka diende bipupu bidibu bafunde mu mukanda ewu." 
Revelation22:19 Kadi pikala muntu mumbushe umue wa ku miaku ya muambi ya mu mukanda ewu, Mvidi Mukulu neamumbushile tshiende tshitupa tshia tshimuma tshia mutshi wa muoyi, ne tshiende tshitupa tshia tshimenga tshia tshijila, mudibu babifunde mu mukanda ewu." 
Revelation22:20 Udi ujadika bulelela bua malu onsu aa, udi wamba ne: “Bushuwa, nkadi mu njila!” Eyo! Bikale nanku! Mfumu Yezu, vuaku!"
